`components/DataToolbar.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { RotateCcw, Search, X } from "lucide-react";
   2 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   3 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
   4 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
   5 | 
   6 | export type FilterOption = {
   7 | 	label: string;
   8 | 	value: string;
   9 | };
  10 | 
  11 | export type DataToolbarProps = {
  12 | 	searchValue: string;
  13 | 	onSearchChange: (value: string) => void;
  14 | 	searchPlaceholder?: string;
  15 | 	filters?: {
  16 | 		label: string;
  17 | 		value: string;
  18 | 		placeholder: string;
  19 | 		options: FilterOption[];
  20 | 		onChange: (value: string) => void;
  21 | 		width?: string;
  22 | 	}[];
  23 | 	sortOptions?: FilterOption[];
  24 | 	sortValue: string;
  25 | 	onSortChange: (value: string) => void;
  26 | 	dateRange?: {
  27 | 		from: string;
  28 | 		to: string;
  29 | 		onFromChange: (value: string) => void;
  30 | 		onToChange: (value: string) => void;
  31 | 	};
  32 | 	isDirty: boolean;
  33 | 	onReset: () => void;
  34 | 	resultCount?: { filtered: number; total: number };
  35 | };
  36 | 
  37 | export function DataToolbar({
  38 | 	searchValue,
  39 | 	onSearchChange,
  40 | 	searchPlaceholder = "Search...",
  41 | 	filters = [],
  42 | 	sortOptions = [],
  43 | 	sortValue,
  44 | 	onSortChange,
  45 | 	isDirty,
  46 | 	onReset,
  47 | 	dateRange,
  48 | 	resultCount
  49 | }: DataToolbarProps) {
  50 | 	return (
  51 | 		<div className='mt-4 flex flex-col gap-3'>
  52 | 			<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2'>
  53 | 				{/* Search input */}
  54 | 				<div className='relative min-w-50 flex-1'>
  55 | 					<Search className='pointer-events-none absolute top-1/2 left-3 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400' />
  56 | 					<Input
  57 | 						className='pr-8 pl-9'
  58 | 						onChange={e => onSearchChange(e.target.value ?? "")}
  59 | 						placeholder={searchPlaceholder}
  60 | 						value={searchValue}
  61 | 					/>
  62 | 					{searchValue && (
  63 | 						<button
  64 | 							aria-label='Clear search'
  65 | 							className='absolute top-1/2 right-2.5 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 transition-colors hover:text-slate-600 dark:hover:text-slate-200'
  66 | 							onClick={() => onSearchChange("")}
  67 | 							type='button'
  68 | 						>
  69 | 							<X size={14} />
  70 | 						</button>
  71 | 					)}
  72 | 				</div>
  73 | 
  74 | 				{/* Dynamic filter dropdowns (inventory, status, badge…) */}
  75 | 				{filters.map(filter => (
  76 | 					<Select
  77 | 						key={filter.placeholder}
  78 | 						onValueChange={v => filter.onChange(v === "__reset__" ? "" : (v ?? ""))}
  79 | 						value={filter.value}
  80 | 					>
  81 | 						<SelectTrigger className={filter.width ?? "w-40"}>
  82 | 							<SelectValue placeholder={filter.placeholder} />
  83 | 						</SelectTrigger>
  84 | 						<SelectContent>
  85 | 							<SelectItem value='__reset__'>{filter.placeholder}</SelectItem>
  86 | 							{filter.options.map(opt => (
  87 | 								<SelectItem
  88 | 									key={opt.value}
  89 | 									value={opt.value}
  90 | 								>
  91 | 									{opt.label}
  92 | 								</SelectItem>
  93 | 							))}
  94 | 						</SelectContent>
  95 | 					</Select>
  96 | 				))}
  97 | 
  98 | 				{/* Date range — only renders when dateRange prop is passed */}
  99 | 				{dateRange && (
 100 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 101 | 						<Input
 102 | 							className='w-37.5 text-sm'
 103 | 							onChange={e => dateRange.onFromChange(e.target.value ?? "")}
 104 | 							type='date'
 105 | 							value={dateRange.from}
 106 | 						/>
 107 | 						<span className='text-slate-400 text-xs'>to</span>
 108 | 						<Input
 109 | 							className='w-37.5 text-sm'
 110 | 							onChange={e => dateRange.onToChange(e.target.value ?? "")}
 111 | 							type='date'
 112 | 							value={dateRange.to}
 113 | 						/>
 114 | 					</div>
 115 | 				)}
 116 | 
 117 | 				{/* Sort dropdown */}
 118 | 				{sortOptions.length > 0 && (
 119 | 					<Select
 120 | 						onValueChange={v => onSortChange(v === "__reset__" ? "" : (v ?? ""))}
 121 | 						value={sortValue}
 122 | 					>
 123 | 						<SelectTrigger className='w-45'>
 124 | 							<SelectValue placeholder='Sort by...' />
 125 | 						</SelectTrigger>
 126 | 						<SelectContent>
 127 | 							<SelectItem value='__reset__'>Sort by...</SelectItem>
 128 | 							{sortOptions.map(opt => (
 129 | 								<SelectItem
 130 | 									key={opt.value}
 131 | 									value={opt.value}
 132 | 								>
 133 | 									{opt.label}
 134 | 								</SelectItem>
 135 | 							))}
 136 | 						</SelectContent>
 137 | 					</Select>
 138 | 				)}
 139 | 
 140 | 				{/* Reset button — only visible when any filter is active */}
 141 | 				{isDirty && (
 142 | 					<Button
 143 | 						className='gap-1.5 text-slate-500'
 144 | 						onClick={onReset}
 145 | 						size='sm'
 146 | 						variant='outline'
 147 | 					>
 148 | 						<RotateCcw size={13} />
 149 | 						Reset
 150 | 					</Button>
 151 | 				)}
 152 | 			</div>
 153 | 
 154 | 			{/* Result count — only shown when filters are active */}
 155 | 			{resultCount && isDirty && (
 156 | 				<p className='text-slate-400 text-xs'>
 157 | 					Showing{" "}
 158 | 					<span className='font-medium text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300'>{resultCount.filtered}</span> of{" "}
 159 | 					{resultCount.total} results
 160 | 				</p>
 161 | 			)}
 162 | 		</div>
 163 | 	);
 164 | }

```

`components/Header.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { getAppointmentsCount } from "#/data/appointments";
   2 | import { signOut } from "#/lib/auth-client";
   3 | import { Route as RootRoute } from "@/routes/__root";
   4 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   5 | import { Link, useNavigate, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   6 | import { Calendar, Stethoscope, User, Users } from "lucide-react";
   7 | import { useState } from "react";
   8 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   9 | 
  10 |  const appointmentsCountQueryKey = ["appointments-count"] as const;
  11 | 
  12 | export default function Header() {
  13 | 	const { session } = RootRoute.useRouteContext();
  14 | 	const [isUserMenuOpen, setIsUserMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  15 | 	const router = useRouter();
  16 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  17 | 
  18 | 	// Get upcoming appointments count for the badge
  19 | 	const { data: appointmentsSummary } = useQuery({
  20 | 		queryKey: appointmentsCountQueryKey,
  21 | 		queryFn: () => getAppointmentsCount(),
  22 | 		staleTime: 0,
  23 | 		refetchInterval: 60000 // every minute refetch
  24 | 	});
  25 | 
  26 | 	const upcomingCount = appointmentsSummary?.count ?? 0;
  27 | 
  28 | 	const handleLogout = async () => {
  29 | 		await signOut({
  30 | 			fetchOptions: {
  31 | 				onSuccess: async () => {
  32 | 					await router.invalidate();
  33 | 					navigate({ to: "/" });
  34 | 					setIsUserMenuOpen(false);
  35 | 					toast.success("Logged out successfully.", {
  36 | 						description: "You will be redirected to the home page."
  37 | 					});
  38 | 				}
  39 | 			}
  40 | 		});
  41 | 	};
  42 | 
  43 | 	return (
  44 | 		<header className='sticky top-0 z-40 border-slate-200 border-b bg-white/80 backdrop-blur dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-950/80'>
  45 | 			<div className='mx-auto flex max-w-6xl items-center justify-between px-4 py-3'>
  46 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
  47 | 					<Link
  48 | 						className='flex items-center gap-2'
  49 | 						to='/'
  50 | 					>
  51 | 						<div className='flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-slate-900 text-white dark:bg-white dark:text-slate-800'>
  52 | 							<Stethoscope size={20} />
  53 | 						</div>
  54 | 
  55 | 						<div className='flex flex-col'>
  56 | 							<span className='font-semibold text-slate-900 text-sm dark:text-white'>LittleHearts</span>
  57 | 							<span className='text-[10px] text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400'>Pediatric Clinic</span>
  58 | 						</div>
  59 | 					</Link>
  60 | 
  61 | 					<nav className='hidden items-center gap-3 font-medium text-slate-700 text-sm sm:flex dark:text-slate-200'>
  62 | 						<Link
  63 | 							className='rounded-lg px-3 py-1 transition hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800'
  64 | 							to='/'
  65 | 						>
  66 | 							Home
  67 | 						</Link>
  68 | 
  69 | 						<Link
  70 | 							className='rounded-lg px-3 py-1 transition hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800'
  71 | 							to='/services'
  72 | 						>
  73 | 							Services
  74 | 						</Link>
  75 | 
  76 | 						{session && (
  77 | 							<Link
  78 | 								className='rounded-lg px-3 py-1 transition hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800'
  79 | 								to='/appointments'
  80 | 							>
  81 | 								My Appointments
  82 | 							</Link>
  83 | 						)}
  84 | 					</nav>
  85 | 				</div>
  86 | 
  87 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  88 | 					{session && (
  89 | 						<Link
  90 | 							className='inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 font-semibold text-slate-800 text-xs shadow-sm transition hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100'
  91 | 							to='/appointments/book'
  92 | 						>
  93 | 							<span>Book Appointment</span>
  94 | 
  95 | 							{upcomingCount > 0 && (
  96 | 								<span className='flex h-6 min-w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-emerald-600 px-2 font-bold text-[11px] text-white'>
  97 | 									{upcomingCount}
  98 | 								</span>
  99 | 							)}
 100 | 						</Link>
 101 | 					)}
 102 | 
 103 | 					{session ? (
 104 | 						<div className='relative'>
 105 | 							<button
 106 | 								aria-label='Open user menu'
 107 | 								className='flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-800 shadow-sm transition hover:bg-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800'
 108 | 								onClick={() => setIsUserMenuOpen(current => !current)}
 109 | 								type='button'
 110 | 							>
 111 | 								<User size={18} />
 112 | 							</button>
 113 | 
 114 | 							{isUserMenuOpen && (
 115 | 								<div className='absolute right-0 mt-2 w-56 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-lg dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-900'>
 116 | 									<div className='border-slate-100 border-b px-3 py-2 dark:border-slate-800'>
 117 | 										<p className='truncate font-semibold text-slate-900 text-sm dark:text-white'>
 118 | 											{session.user.name}
 119 | 										</p>
 120 | 										<p className='truncate text-slate-500 text-xs'>{session.user.email}</p>
 121 | 										{session.user.role === "admin" && (
 122 | 											<span className='mt-1 inline-block rounded-full bg-amber-100 px-2 py-0.5 font-medium text-[10px] text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-400'>
 123 | 												Medical Staff
 124 | 											</span>
 125 | 										)}
 126 | 									</div>
 127 | 
 128 | 									<Link
 129 | 										className='mt-2 block rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-slate-700 text-sm transition hover:bg-slate-100 dark:text-slate-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-800'
 130 | 										onClick={() => setIsUserMenuOpen(false)}
 131 | 										to='/profile'
 132 | 									>
 133 | 										<Calendar
 134 | 											className='mr-2 inline'
 135 | 											size={14}
 136 | 										/>
 137 | 										My Profile
 138 | 									</Link>
 139 | 
 140 | 									<Link
 141 | 										className='block rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-slate-700 text-sm transition hover:bg-slate-100 dark:text-slate-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-800'
 142 | 										onClick={() => setIsUserMenuOpen(false)}
 143 | 										to='/appointments'
 144 | 									>
 145 | 										<Calendar
 146 | 											className='mr-2 inline'
 147 | 											size={14}
 148 | 										/>
 149 | 										Appointment History
 150 | 									</Link>
 151 | 
 152 | 									{session?.user.role === "admin" && (
 153 | 										<>
 154 | 											<div className='my-2 border-slate-100 border-t dark:border-slate-800' />
 155 | 											<p className='px-3 py-1 font-semibold text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase'>
 156 | 												Admin Panel
 157 | 											</p>
 158 | 
 159 | 											<Link
 160 | 												className='mt-1 block rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-slate-700 text-sm transition hover:bg-slate-100 dark:text-slate-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-800'
 161 | 												onClick={() => setIsUserMenuOpen(false)}
 162 | 												to='/services/manage'
 163 | 											>
 164 | 												<Stethoscope
 165 | 													className='mr-2 inline'
 166 | 													size={14}
 167 | 												/>
 168 | 												Manage Services
 169 | 											</Link>
 170 | 
 171 | 											<Link
 172 | 												className='block rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-slate-700 text-sm transition hover:bg-slate-100 dark:text-slate-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-800'
 173 | 												onClick={() => setIsUserMenuOpen(false)}
 174 | 												to='/appointments/manage'
 175 | 											>
 176 | 												<Users
 177 | 													className='mr-2 inline'
 178 | 													size={14}
 179 | 												/>
 180 | 												Manage Appointments
 181 | 											</Link>
 182 | 										</>
 183 | 									)}
 184 | 
 185 | 									<button
 186 | 										className='mt-2 block w-full rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-left text-red-500 text-sm transition hover:bg-red-50 dark:hover:bg-red-950/30'
 187 | 										onClick={handleLogout}
 188 | 										type='button'
 189 | 									>
 190 | 										Log out
 191 | 									</button>
 192 | 								</div>
 193 | 							)}
 194 | 						</div>
 195 | 					) : (
 196 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 197 | 							<Link
 198 | 								className='rounded-full px-4 py-2 font-semibold text-slate-700 text-xs transition hover:bg-slate-100 dark:text-slate-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-800'
 199 | 								to='/sign-in'
 200 | 							>
 201 | 								Login
 202 | 							</Link>
 203 | 
 204 | 							<Link
 205 | 								className='rounded-full bg-slate-900 px-4 py-2 font-semibold text-white text-xs shadow-sm transition hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md dark:bg-white dark:text-slate-900'
 206 | 								to='/sign-up'
 207 | 							>
 208 | 								Register Child
 209 | 							</Link>
 210 | 						</div>
 211 | 					)}
 212 | 				</div>
 213 | 			</div>
 214 | 		</header>
 215 | 	);
 216 | }

```

   1 | // src/routes/components/shared/LoadingSpinner.tsx
   2 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
   3 | 
   4 | interface LoadingSpinnerProps {
   5 | 	size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg";
   6 | 	className?: string;
   7 | }
   8 | 
   9 | export function LoadingSpinner({ size = "md", className }: LoadingSpinnerProps) {
  10 | 	const sizeClasses = {
  11 | 		sm: "h-4 w-4",
  12 | 		md: "h-8 w-8",
  13 | 		lg: "h-12 w-12"
  14 | 	};
  15 | 
  16 | 	return (
  17 | 		<div className={cn("flex items-center justify-center", className)}>
  18 | 			<div
  19 | 				className={cn(
  20 | 					"animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-primary border-t-transparent",
  21 | 					sizeClasses[size]
  22 | 				)}
  23 | 			/>
  24 | 		</div>

`components/ProductCard.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | import { Link, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import { ShoppingBagIcon } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { useState } from "react";
   5 | import { addToCart } from "#/data/cart";
   6 | import type { ProductSelect } from "#/db/schema";
   7 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
   8 | import { Button } from "./ui/button";
   9 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "./ui/card";
  10 | export const cartCountQueryKey = ["cart-count"] as const;
  11 | const inventoryTone = {
  12 | 	"in-stock": "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100",
  13 | 	backorder: "bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-100",
  14 | 	preorder: "bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 border-indigo-100"
  15 | };
  16 | 
  17 | export function ProductCard({ product }: { product: ProductSelect }) {
  18 | 	const router = useRouter();
  19 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  20 | 	const [adding, setAdding] = useState(false);
  21 | 
  22 | 	return (
  23 | 		<Link
  24 | 			className='h-full cursor-pointer transition hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg'
  25 | 			params={{ id: product.id }}
  26 | 			to='/products/$id'
  27 | 		>
  28 | 			<Card className='px-2 py-4'>
  29 | 				<CardHeader className='gap-2'>
  30 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  31 | 						{product.badge && (
  32 | 							<span className='rounded-full bg-slate-900 px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold text-white text-xs'>
  33 | 								{product.badge}
  34 | 							</span>
  35 | 						)}
  36 | 					</div>
  37 | 					<CardTitle className='font-semibold text-lg'>{product.name}</CardTitle>
  38 | 					<CardDescription>{product.description}</CardDescription>
  39 | 				</CardHeader>
  40 | 
  41 | 				<CardContent className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  42 | 					<p className='flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-600 text-sm'>
  43 | 						<span className='font-semibold'>{product.rating}</span>
  44 | 						<span className='text-slate-400'>({product.reviews} reviews)</span>
  45 | 					</p>
  46 | 					<span
  47 | 						className={cn(
  48 | 							"rounded-full border px-3 py-1 font-semibold text-xs",
  49 | 							inventoryTone[product.inventory as keyof typeof inventoryTone]
  50 | 						)}
  51 | 					>
  52 | 						{product.inventory === "in-stock"
  53 | 							? "In Stock"
  54 | 							: product.inventory === "backorder"
  55 | 								? "Backorder"
  56 | 								: "Preorder"}
  57 | 					</span>
  58 | 				</CardContent>
  59 | 				<CardFooter className='flex items-center justify-between border-t-0 bg-transparent pt-0'>
  60 | 					<span className='font-semibold text-lg'>${product.price}</span>
  61 | 					<Button
  62 | 						className={"bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800"}
  63 | 						disabled={adding}
  64 | 						onClick={async e => {
  65 | 							e.preventDefault();
  66 | 							e.stopPropagation();
  67 | 							setAdding(true);
  68 | 							await addToCart({ data: { productId: product.id } });
  69 | 							await queryClient.invalidateQueries({
  70 | 								queryKey: cartCountQueryKey
  71 | 							}); // "the data you cached under this key is now stale — refetch it."
  72 | 							router.invalidate();
  73 | 							setAdding(false);
  74 | 						}}
  75 | 						size='sm'
  76 | 						variant={"secondary"}
  77 | 					>
  78 | 						<ShoppingBagIcon size={16} />
  79 | 						{adding ? "Adding..." : "Add to Cart"}
  80 | 					</Button>
  81 | 				</CardFooter>
  82 | 			</Card>
  83 | 		</Link>
  84 | 	);
  85 | }

```

`components/file-uploader.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import * as React from "react";
   2 | import Dropzone, {
   3 | 	type DropzoneInputProps,
   4 | 	type DropzoneProps,
   5 | 	type DropzoneRootProps,
   6 | 	type FileRejection
   7 | } from "react-dropzone";
   8 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   9 | 
  10 | import { Icons } from "@/components/icons";
  11 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
  12 | import { Progress } from "@/components/ui/progress";
  13 | import { ScrollArea } from "@/components/ui/scroll-area";
  14 | import { useControllableState } from "@/hooks/use-controllable-state";
  15 | import { cn, formatBytes } from "@/lib/utils";
  16 | 
  17 | export interface FileUploaderProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  18 | 	/**
  19 | 	 * Value of the uploader.
  20 | 	 * @type File[]
  21 | 	 * @default undefined
  22 | 	 * @example value={files}
  23 | 	 */
  24 | 	value?: File[];
  25 | 
  26 | 	/**
  27 | 	 * Function to be called when the value changes.
  28 | 	 * @type React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<File[]>>
  29 | 	 * @default undefined
  30 | 	 * @example onValueChange={(files) => setFiles(files)}
  31 | 	 */
  32 | 	onValueChange?: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<File[]>>;
  33 | 
  34 | 	/**
  35 | 	 * Function to be called when files are uploaded.
  36 | 	 * @type (files: File[]) => Promise<void>
  37 | 	 * @default undefined
  38 | 	 * @example onUpload={(files) => uploadFiles(files)}
  39 | 	 */
  40 | 	onUpload?: (files: File[]) => Promise<void>;
  41 | 
  42 | 	/**
  43 | 	 * Progress of the uploaded files.
  44 | 	 * @type Record<string, number> | undefined
  45 | 	 * @default undefined
  46 | 	 * @example progresses={{ "file1.png": 50 }}
  47 | 	 */
  48 | 	progresses?: Record<string, number>;
  49 | 
  50 | 	/**
  51 | 	 * Accepted file types for the uploader.
  52 | 	 * @type { [key: string]: string[]}
  53 | 	 * @default
  54 | 	 * ```ts
  55 | 	 * { "image/*": [] }
  56 | 	 * ```
  57 | 	 * @example accept={["image/png", "image/jpeg"]}
  58 | 	 */
  59 | 	accept?: DropzoneProps["accept"];
  60 | 
  61 | 	/**
  62 | 	 * Maximum file size for the uploader.
  63 | 	 * @type number | undefined
  64 | 	 * @default 1024 * 1024 * 2 // 2MB
  65 | 	 * @example maxSize={1024 * 1024 * 2} // 2MB
  66 | 	 */
  67 | 	maxSize?: DropzoneProps["maxSize"];
  68 | 
  69 | 	/**
  70 | 	 * Maximum number of files for the uploader.
  71 | 	 * @type number | undefined
  72 | 	 * @default 1
  73 | 	 * @example maxFiles={5}
  74 | 	 */
  75 | 	maxFiles?: DropzoneProps["maxFiles"];
  76 | 
  77 | 	/**
  78 | 	 * Whether the uploader should accept multiple files.
  79 | 	 * @type boolean
  80 | 	 * @default false
  81 | 	 * @example multiple
  82 | 	 */
  83 | 	multiple?: boolean;
  84 | 
  85 | 	/**
  86 | 	 * Whether the uploader is disabled.
  87 | 	 * @type boolean
  88 | 	 * @default false
  89 | 	 * @example disabled
  90 | 	 */
  91 | 	disabled?: boolean;
  92 | }
  93 | 
  94 | export function FileUploader(props: FileUploaderProps) {
  95 | 	const {
  96 | 		value: valueProp,
  97 | 		onValueChange,
  98 | 		onUpload,
  99 | 		progresses,
 100 | 		accept = { "image/*": [] },
 101 | 		maxSize = 1024 * 1024 * 2,
 102 | 		maxFiles = 1,
 103 | 		multiple = false,
 104 | 		disabled = false,
 105 | 		className,
 106 | 		...dropzoneProps
 107 | 	} = props;
 108 | 
 109 | 	const [files, setFiles] = useControllableState({
 110 | 		prop: valueProp,
 111 | 		onChange: onValueChange
 112 | 	});
 113 | 
 114 | 	const onDrop = React.useCallback(
 115 | 		(acceptedFiles: File[], rejectedFiles: FileRejection[]) => {
 116 | 			if (!multiple && maxFiles === 1 && acceptedFiles.length > 1) {
 117 | 				toast.error("Cannot upload more than 1 file at a time");
 118 | 				return;
 119 | 			}
 120 | 
 121 | 			if ((files?.length ?? 0) + acceptedFiles.length > maxFiles) {
 122 | 				toast.error(`Cannot upload more than ${maxFiles} files`);
 123 | 				return;
 124 | 			}
 125 | 
 126 | 			const newFiles = acceptedFiles.map(file =>
 127 | 				Object.assign(file, {
 128 | 					preview: URL.createObjectURL(file)
 129 | 				})
 130 | 			);
 131 | 
 132 | 			const updatedFiles = files ? [...files, ...newFiles] : newFiles;
 133 | 
 134 | 			setFiles(updatedFiles);
 135 | 
 136 | 			if (rejectedFiles.length > 0) {
 137 | 				rejectedFiles.forEach(({ file }) => {
 138 | 					toast.error(`File ${file.name} was rejected`);
 139 | 				});
 140 | 			}
 141 | 
 142 | 			if (onUpload && updatedFiles.length > 0 && updatedFiles.length <= maxFiles) {
 143 | 				const target = updatedFiles.length > 0 ? `${updatedFiles.length} files` : "file";
 144 | 
 145 | 				toast.promise(onUpload(updatedFiles), {
 146 | 					loading: `Uploading ${target}...`,
 147 | 					success: () => {
 148 | 						setFiles([]);
 149 | 						return `${target} uploaded`;
 150 | 					},
 151 | 					error: `Failed to upload ${target}`
 152 | 				});
 153 | 			}
 154 | 		},
 155 | 
 156 | 		[files, maxFiles, multiple, onUpload, setFiles]
 157 | 	);
 158 | 
 159 | 	function onRemove(index: number) {
 160 | 		if (!files) return;
 161 | 		const newFiles = files.filter((_, i) => i !== index);
 162 | 		setFiles(newFiles);
 163 | 		onValueChange?.(newFiles);
 164 | 	}
 165 | 
 166 | 	// Revoke preview url when component unmounts
 167 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 168 | 		return () => {
 169 | 			if (!files) return;
 170 | 			files.forEach(file => {
 171 | 				if (isFileWithPreview(file)) {
 172 | 					URL.revokeObjectURL(file.preview);
 173 | 				}
 174 | 			});
 175 | 		};
 176 | 		// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
 177 | 	}, [files?.forEach, files]);
 178 | 
 179 | 	const isDisabled = disabled || (files?.length ?? 0) >= maxFiles;
 180 | 
 181 | 	return (
 182 | 		<div className='relative flex flex-col gap-6 overflow-hidden'>
 183 | 			<Dropzone
 184 | 				accept={accept}
 185 | 				disabled={isDisabled}
 186 | 				maxFiles={maxFiles}
 187 | 				maxSize={maxSize}
 188 | 				multiple={maxFiles > 1 || multiple}
 189 | 				onDrop={onDrop}
 190 | 			>
 191 | 				{({
 192 | 					getRootProps,
 193 | 					getInputProps,
 194 | 					isDragActive
 195 | 				}: {
 196 | 					getRootProps: <T extends DropzoneRootProps>(props?: T) => T;
 197 | 					getInputProps: <T extends DropzoneInputProps>(props?: T) => T;
 198 | 					isDragActive: boolean;
 199 | 				}) => (
 200 | 					<div
 201 | 						{...getRootProps()}
 202 | 						className={cn(
 203 | 							"group relative grid h-52 w-full cursor-pointer place-items-center rounded-lg border-2 border-muted-foreground/25 border-dashed px-5 py-2.5 text-center transition hover:bg-muted/25",
 204 | 							"ring-offset-background focus-visible:outline-hidden focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2",
 205 | 							isDragActive && "border-muted-foreground/50",
 206 | 							isDisabled && "pointer-events-none opacity-60",
 207 | 							className
 208 | 						)}
 209 | 						{...dropzoneProps}
 210 | 					>
 211 | 						<input {...getInputProps()} />
 212 | 						{isDragActive ? (
 213 | 							<div className='flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 sm:px-5'>
 214 | 								<div className='rounded-full border border-dashed p-3'>
 215 | 									<Icons.upload
 216 | 										aria-hidden='true'
 217 | 										className='size-7 text-muted-foreground'
 218 | 									/>
 219 | 								</div>
 220 | 								<p className='font-medium text-muted-foreground'>Drop the files here</p>
 221 | 							</div>
 222 | 						) : (
 223 | 							<div className='flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 sm:px-5'>
 224 | 								<div className='rounded-full border border-dashed p-3'>
 225 | 									<Icons.upload
 226 | 										aria-hidden='true'
 227 | 										className='size-7 text-muted-foreground'
 228 | 									/>
 229 | 								</div>
 230 | 								<div className='space-y-px'>
 231 | 									<p className='font-medium text-muted-foreground'>
 232 | 										Drag {`'n'`} drop files here, or click to select files
 233 | 									</p>
 234 | 									<p className='text-muted-foreground/70 text-sm'>
 235 | 										You can upload
 236 | 										{maxFiles > 1
 237 | 											? ` ${maxFiles === Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY ? "multiple" : maxFiles}
 238 |                       files (up to ${formatBytes(maxSize)} each)`
 239 | 											: ` a file with ${formatBytes(maxSize)}`}
 240 | 									</p>
 241 | 								</div>
 242 | 							</div>
 243 | 						)}
 244 | 					</div>
 245 | 				)}
 246 | 			</Dropzone>
 247 | 			{files?.length ? (
 248 | 				<ScrollArea className='h-fit w-full px-3'>
 249 | 					<div className='max-h-48 space-y-4'>
 250 | 						{files?.map((file, index) => (
 251 | 							<FileCard
 252 | 								file={file}
 253 | 								key={index}
 254 | 								onRemove={() => onRemove(index)}
 255 | 								progress={progresses?.[file.name]}
 256 | 							/>
 257 | 						))}
 258 | 					</div>
 259 | 				</ScrollArea>
 260 | 			) : null}
 261 | 		</div>
 262 | 	);
 263 | }
 264 | 
 265 | interface FileCardProps {
 266 | 	file: File;
 267 | 	onRemove: () => void;
 268 | 	progress?: number;
 269 | }
 270 | 
 271 | function FileCard({ file, progress, onRemove }: FileCardProps) {
 272 | 	return (
 273 | 		<div className='relative flex items-center space-x-4'>
 274 | 			<div className='flex flex-1 space-x-4'>
 275 | 				{isFileWithPreview(file) ? (
 276 | 					<img
 277 | 						alt={file.name}
 278 | 						className='aspect-square shrink-0 rounded-md object-cover'
 279 | 						height={48}
 280 | 						loading='lazy'
 281 | 						src={file.preview}
 282 | 						width={48}
 283 | 					/>
 284 | 				) : null}
 285 | 				<div className='flex w-full flex-col gap-2'>
 286 | 					<div className='space-y-px'>
 287 | 						<p className='line-clamp-1 font-medium text-foreground/80 text-sm'>{file.name}</p>
 288 | 						<p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{formatBytes(file.size)}</p>
 289 | 					</div>
 290 | 					{progress ? <Progress value={progress} /> : null}
 291 | 				</div>
 292 | 			</div>
 293 | 			<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 294 | 				<Button
 295 | 					className='size-8 rounded-full'
 296 | 					disabled={progress !== undefined && progress < 100}
 297 | 					onClick={onRemove}
 298 | 					size='icon'
 299 | 					type='button'
 300 | 					variant='ghost'
 301 | 				>
 302 | 					<Icons.close className='text-muted-foreground' />
 303 | 					<span className='sr-only'>Remove file</span>
 304 | 				</Button>
 305 | 			</div>
 306 | 		</div>
 307 | 	);
 308 | }
 309 | 
 310 | function isFileWithPreview(file: File): file is File & { preview: string } {
 311 | 	return "preview" in file && typeof file.preview === "string";
 312 | }

```

   1 | import {

  17 | 	CheckCheck,
  18 | 	ChevronDown,

`components/loader.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { Loader2 } from "lucide-react";
   2 | 
   3 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
   4 | 
   5 | export default function Loader({ className }: { className?: string }) {
   6 | 	return (
   7 | 		<div className={cn("flex items-center justify-center", className)}>
   8 | 			<Loader2 className='h-8 w-8 animate-spin rounded-full border-4 border-primary border-t-transparent' />
   9 | 		</div>
  10 | 	);
  11 | }

```

`components/login-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";
   2 | import { Link, useNavigate, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import { useState } from "react";
   4 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   5 | import { z } from "zod";
   6 | import { Button } from "#/components/ui/button.tsx";
   7 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "#/components/ui/card.tsx";
   8 | import { Field, FieldDescription, FieldGroup, FieldLabel } from "#/components/ui/field.tsx";
   9 | import { Input } from "#/components/ui/input.tsx";
  10 | import { signIn } from "#/lib/auth-client";
  11 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
  12 | 
  13 | function fieldValidator(schema: z.ZodTypeAny) {
  14 | 	return ({ value }: { value: unknown }) => {
  15 | 		const result = schema.safeParse(value);
  16 | 		return result.success ? undefined : result.error.issues[0]?.message;
  17 | 	};
  18 | }
  19 | 
  20 | function FieldMessage({ error }: { error?: string }) {
  21 | 	if (!error) return null;
  22 | 	return <p className='text-destructive text-sm'>{error}</p>;
  23 | }
  24 | 
  25 | const loginSchema = z.object({
  26 | 	email: z.string().email("Enter a valid email."),
  27 | 	password: z.string().min(8, "Password must be at least 8 characters.")
  28 | });
  29 | 
  30 | export function LoginForm({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
  31 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  32 | 	const [submitError, setSubmitError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  33 | 	const router = useRouter();
  34 | 
  35 | 	const form = useForm({
  36 | 		defaultValues: {
  37 | 			email: "",
  38 | 			password: ""
  39 | 		},
  40 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
  41 | 			const result = loginSchema.safeParse(value);
  42 | 
  43 | 			if (!result.success) {
  44 | 				setSubmitError(result.error.issues[0]?.message ?? "Invalid form.");
  45 | 				return;
  46 | 			}
  47 | 
  48 | 			try {
  49 | 				setSubmitError(null);
  50 | 
  51 | 				const response = await signIn.email({
  52 | 					email: value.email,
  53 | 					password: value.password
  54 | 				});
  55 | 
  56 | 				if (response.error) {
  57 | 					setSubmitError(response.error.message ?? "Could not login.");
  58 | 					return;
  59 | 				}
  60 | 				await router.invalidate(); // Re-run __root beforeLoad to refresh the global session
  61 | 				toast.success("Logged in successfully.");
  62 | 				navigate({ to: "/" });
  63 | 			} catch {
  64 | 				setSubmitError("Something went wrong. Please try again.");
  65 | 			}
  66 | 		}
  67 | 	});
  68 | 
  69 | 	return (
  70 | 		<div
  71 | 			className={cn("flex flex-col gap-6", className)}
  72 | 			{...props}
  73 | 		>
  74 | 			<Card>
  75 | 				<CardHeader>
  76 | 					<CardTitle>Login to your account</CardTitle>
  77 | 					<CardDescription>Enter your email below to login to your account</CardDescription>
  78 | 				</CardHeader>
  79 | 				<CardContent>
  80 | 					<form
  81 | 						onSubmit={e => {
  82 | 							e.preventDefault();
  83 | 							e.stopPropagation();
  84 | 							form.handleSubmit();
  85 | 						}}
  86 | 					>
  87 | 						<FieldGroup>
  88 | 							<form.Field
  89 | 								name='email'
  90 | 								validators={{
  91 | 									onChange: fieldValidator(loginSchema.shape.email)
  92 | 								}}
  93 | 							>
  94 | 								{field => (
  95 | 									<Field>
  96 | 										<FieldLabel htmlFor={field.name}>Email</FieldLabel>
  97 | 										<Input
  98 | 											id={field.name}
  99 | 											name={field.name}
 100 | 											onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 101 | 											placeholder='m@example.com'
 102 | 											required
 103 | 											value={field.state.value}
 104 | 										/>
 105 | 										<FieldMessage
 106 | 											error={
 107 | 												field.state.meta.isTouched
 108 | 													? (field.state.meta.errors[0] as string | undefined)
 109 | 													: undefined
 110 | 											}
 111 | 										/>
 112 | 									</Field>
 113 | 								)}
 114 | 							</form.Field>
 115 | 
 116 | 							<form.Field
 117 | 								name='password'
 118 | 								validators={{
 119 | 									onChange: fieldValidator(loginSchema.shape.password)
 120 | 								}}
 121 | 							>
 122 | 								{field => (
 123 | 									<Field>
 124 | 										<div className='flex items-center'>
 125 | 											<FieldLabel htmlFor={field.name}>Password</FieldLabel>
 126 | 										</div>
 127 | 										<Input
 128 | 											id={field.name}
 129 | 											name={field.name}
 130 | 											onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 131 | 											required
 132 | 											type='password'
 133 | 											value={field.state.value}
 134 | 										/>
 135 | 										<FieldMessage
 136 | 											error={
 137 | 												field.state.meta.isTouched
 138 | 													? (field.state.meta.errors[0] as string | undefined)
 139 | 													: undefined
 140 | 											}
 141 | 										/>
 142 | 									</Field>
 143 | 								)}
 144 | 							</form.Field>
 145 | 
 146 | 							{/* Shows a red error message if the form is invalid or has errors  */}
 147 | 							<FieldMessage error={submitError ?? undefined} />
 148 | 
 149 | 							<Field>
 150 | 								<form.Subscribe selector={state => [state.canSubmit, state.isSubmitting]}>
 151 | 									{([canSubmit, isSubmitting]) => (
 152 | 										<Button
 153 | 											disabled={!canSubmit || isSubmitting}
 154 | 											type='submit'
 155 | 										>
 156 | 											{isSubmitting ? "Logging in..." : "Login"}
 157 | 										</Button>
 158 | 									)}
 159 | 								</form.Subscribe>
 160 | 								<Button
 161 | 									type='button'
 162 | 									variant='outline'
 163 | 								>
 164 | 									Login with Google
 165 | 								</Button>
 166 | 								<FieldDescription className='text-center'>
 167 | 									Don&apos;t have an account? <Link to='/sign-up'>Sign up</Link>
 168 | 								</FieldDescription>
 169 | 							</Field>
 170 | 						</FieldGroup>
 171 | 					</form>
 172 | 				</CardContent>
 173 | 			</Card>
 174 | 		</div>
 175 | 	);
 176 | }

```

`components/sidebar.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
   4 | import { PanelLeftIcon } from "lucide-react";
   5 | import { Slot } from "radix-ui";
   6 | import * as React from "react";
   7 | 
   8 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   9 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
  10 | import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
  11 | import { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetDescription, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from "@/components/ui/sheet";
  12 | import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
  13 | import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";
  14 | import { useIsMobile } from "@/hooks/use-mobile";
  15 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
  16 | 
  17 | const SIDEBAR_COOKIE_NAME = "sidebar_state";
  18 | const SIDEBAR_COOKIE_MAX_AGE = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7;
  19 | const SIDEBAR_WIDTH = "16rem";
  20 | const SIDEBAR_WIDTH_MOBILE = "18rem";
  21 | const SIDEBAR_WIDTH_ICON = "3rem";
  22 | const SIDEBAR_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUT = "b";
  23 | 
  24 | import Cookies from "js-cookie";
  25 | 
  26 | type SidebarContextProps = {
  27 | 	state: "expanded" | "collapsed";
  28 | 	open: boolean;
  29 | 	setOpen: (open: boolean) => void;
  30 | 	openMobile: boolean;
  31 | 	setOpenMobile: (open: boolean) => void;
  32 | 	isMobile: boolean;
  33 | 	toggleSidebar: () => void;
  34 | };
  35 | 
  36 | const SidebarContext = React.createContext<SidebarContextProps | null>(null);
  37 | 
  38 | function useSidebar() {
  39 | 	const context = React.useContext(SidebarContext);
  40 | 	if (!context) {
  41 | 		throw new Error("useSidebar must be used within a SidebarProvider.");
  42 | 	}
  43 | 
  44 | 	return context;
  45 | }
  46 | 
  47 | function SidebarProvider({
  48 | 	defaultOpen = true,
  49 | 	open: openProp,
  50 | 	onOpenChange: setOpenProp,
  51 | 	className,
  52 | 	style,
  53 | 	children,
  54 | 	...props
  55 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
  56 | 	defaultOpen?: boolean;
  57 | 	open?: boolean;
  58 | 	onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void;
  59 | }) {
  60 | 	const isMobile = useIsMobile();
  61 | 	const [openMobile, setOpenMobile] = React.useState(false);
  62 | 
  63 | 	// This is the internal state of the sidebar.
  64 | 	// We use openProp and setOpenProp for control from outside the component.
  65 | 	const [_open, _setOpen] = React.useState(defaultOpen);
  66 | 	const open = openProp ?? _open;
  67 | 	const setOpen = React.useCallback(
  68 | 		(value: boolean | ((value: boolean) => boolean)) => {
  69 | 			const openState = typeof value === "function" ? value(open) : value;
  70 | 			if (setOpenProp) {
  71 | 				setOpenProp(openState);
  72 | 			} else {
  73 | 				_setOpen(openState);
  74 | 			}
  75 | 
  76 | 			// This sets the cookie to keep the sidebar state.
  77 | 			Cookies.set(SIDEBAR_COOKIE_NAME, String(openState), {
  78 | 				path: "/",
  79 | 				expires: SIDEBAR_COOKIE_MAX_AGE / 86400 // js-cookie expects days, not seconds
  80 | 			});
  81 | 		},
  82 | 		[setOpenProp, open]
  83 | 	);
  84 | 
  85 | 	// Helper to toggle the sidebar.
  86 | 	const toggleSidebar = React.useCallback(() => {
  87 | 		return isMobile ? setOpenMobile(open => !open) : setOpen(open => !open);
  88 | 	}, [isMobile, setOpen]);
  89 | 
  90 | 	// Adds a keyboard shortcut to toggle the sidebar.
  91 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
  92 | 		const handleKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
  93 | 			if (event.key === SIDEBAR_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUT && (event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)) {
  94 | 				event.preventDefault();
  95 | 				toggleSidebar();
  96 | 			}
  97 | 		};
  98 | 
  99 | 		window.addEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
 100 | 		return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
 101 | 	}, [toggleSidebar]);
 102 | 
 103 | 	// We add a state so that we can do data-state="expanded" or "collapsed".
 104 | 	// This makes it easier to style the sidebar with Tailwind classes.
 105 | 	const state = open ? "expanded" : "collapsed";
 106 | 
 107 | 	const contextValue = React.useMemo<SidebarContextProps>(
 108 | 		() => ({
 109 | 			state,
 110 | 			open,
 111 | 			setOpen,
 112 | 			isMobile,
 113 | 			openMobile,
 114 | 			setOpenMobile,
 115 | 			toggleSidebar
 116 | 		}),
 117 | 		[state, open, setOpen, isMobile, openMobile, toggleSidebar]
 118 | 	);
 119 | 
 120 | 	return (
 121 | 		<SidebarContext.Provider value={contextValue}>
 122 | 			<div
 123 | 				className={cn(
 124 | 					"group/sidebar-wrapper flex min-h-svh w-full has-data-[variant=inset]:bg-sidebar",
 125 | 					className
 126 | 				)}
 127 | 				data-slot='sidebar-wrapper'
 128 | 				style={
 129 | 					{
 130 | 						"--sidebar-width": SIDEBAR_WIDTH,
 131 | 						"--sidebar-width-icon": SIDEBAR_WIDTH_ICON,
 132 | 						...style
 133 | 					} as React.CSSProperties
 134 | 				}
 135 | 				{...props}
 136 | 			>
 137 | 				{children}
 138 | 			</div>
 139 | 		</SidebarContext.Provider>
 140 | 	);
 141 | }
 142 | 
 143 | function Sidebar({
 144 | 	side = "left",
 145 | 	variant = "sidebar",
 146 | 	collapsible = "offcanvas",
 147 | 	className,
 148 | 	children,
 149 | 	dir,
 150 | 	...props
 151 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 152 | 	side?: "left" | "right";
 153 | 	variant?: "sidebar" | "floating" | "inset";
 154 | 	collapsible?: "offcanvas" | "icon" | "none";
 155 | }) {
 156 | 	const { isMobile, state, openMobile, setOpenMobile } = useSidebar();
 157 | 
 158 | 	if (collapsible === "none") {
 159 | 		return (
 160 | 			<div
 161 | 				className={cn("flex h-full w-(--sidebar-width) flex-col bg-sidebar text-sidebar-foreground", className)}
 162 | 				data-slot='sidebar'
 163 | 				{...props}
 164 | 			>
 165 | 				{children}
 166 | 			</div>
 167 | 		);
 168 | 	}
 169 | 
 170 | 	if (isMobile) {
 171 | 		return (
 172 | 			<Sheet
 173 | 				onOpenChange={setOpenMobile}
 174 | 				open={openMobile}
 175 | 				{...props}
 176 | 			>
 177 | 				<SheetContent
 178 | 					className='w-(--sidebar-width) bg-sidebar p-0 text-sidebar-foreground [&>button]:hidden'
 179 | 					data-mobile='true'
 180 | 					data-sidebar='sidebar'
 181 | 					data-slot='sidebar'
 182 | 					dir={dir}
 183 | 					side={side}
 184 | 					style={
 185 | 						{
 186 | 							"--sidebar-width": SIDEBAR_WIDTH_MOBILE
 187 | 						} as React.CSSProperties
 188 | 					}
 189 | 				>
 190 | 					<SheetHeader className='sr-only'>
 191 | 						<SheetTitle>Sidebar</SheetTitle>
 192 | 						<SheetDescription>Displays the mobile sidebar.</SheetDescription>
 193 | 					</SheetHeader>
 194 | 					<div className='flex h-full w-full flex-col'>{children}</div>
 195 | 				</SheetContent>
 196 | 			</Sheet>
 197 | 		);
 198 | 	}
 199 | 
 200 | 	return (
 201 | 		<div
 202 | 			className='group peer hidden text-sidebar-foreground md:block'
 203 | 			data-collapsible={state === "collapsed" ? collapsible : ""}
 204 | 			data-side={side}
 205 | 			data-slot='sidebar'
 206 | 			data-state={state}
 207 | 			data-variant={variant}
 208 | 		>
 209 | 			{/* This is what handles the sidebar gap on desktop */}
 210 | 			<div
 211 | 				className={cn(
 212 | 					"relative w-(--sidebar-width) bg-transparent transition-[width] duration-200 ease-linear",
 213 | 					"group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:w-0",
 214 | 					"group-data-[side=right]:rotate-180",
 215 | 					variant === "floating" || variant === "inset"
 216 | 						? "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[calc(var(--sidebar-width-icon)+(--spacing(4)))]"
 217 | 						: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-(--sidebar-width-icon)"
 218 | 				)}
 219 | 				data-slot='sidebar-gap'
 220 | 			/>
 221 | 			<div
 222 | 				className={cn(
 223 | 					"fixed inset-y-0 z-10 hidden h-svh w-(--sidebar-width) transition-[left,right,width] duration-200 ease-linear data-[side=right]:right-0 data-[side=left]:left-0 data-[side=right]:group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:-right-(--sidebar-width) data-[side=left]:group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:-left-(--sidebar-width) md:flex",
 224 | 					// Adjust the padding for floating and inset variants.
 225 | 					variant === "floating" || variant === "inset"
 226 | 						? "p-2 group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[calc(var(--sidebar-width-icon)+(--spacing(4))+2px)]"
 227 | 						: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-(--sidebar-width-icon) group-data-[side=right]:border-s group-data-[side=left]:border-e",
 228 | 					className
 229 | 				)}
 230 | 				data-side={side}
 231 | 				data-slot='sidebar-container'
 232 | 				{...props}
 233 | 			>
 234 | 				<div
 235 | 					className='flex size-full flex-col bg-sidebar group-data-[variant=floating]:rounded-lg group-data-[variant=floating]:shadow-sm group-data-[variant=floating]:ring-1 group-data-[variant=floating]:ring-sidebar-border'
 236 | 					data-sidebar='sidebar'
 237 | 					data-slot='sidebar-inner'
 238 | 				>
 239 | 					{children}
 240 | 				</div>
 241 | 			</div>
 242 | 		</div>
 243 | 	);
 244 | }
 245 | 
 246 | function SidebarTrigger({ className, onClick, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>) {
 247 | 	const { toggleSidebar } = useSidebar();
 248 | 
 249 | 	return (
 250 | 		<Button
 251 | 			className={cn(className)}
 252 | 			data-sidebar='trigger'
 253 | 			data-slot='sidebar-trigger'
 254 | 			onClick={event => {
 255 | 				onClick?.(event);
 256 | 				toggleSidebar();
 257 | 			}}
 258 | 			size='icon-sm'
 259 | 			variant='ghost'
 260 | 			{...props}
 261 | 		>
 262 | 			<PanelLeftIcon className='rtl:rotate-180' />
 263 | 			<span className='sr-only'>Toggle Sidebar</span>
 264 | 		</Button>
 265 | 	);
 266 | }
 267 | 
 268 | function SidebarRail({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"button">) {
 269 | 	const { toggleSidebar } = useSidebar();
 270 | 
 271 | 	return (
 272 | 		<button
 273 | 			aria-label='Toggle Sidebar'
 274 | 			className={cn(
 275 | 				"absolute inset-y-0 z-20 hidden w-4 transition-all ease-linear after:absolute after:inset-s-1/2 after:inset-y-0 after:w-0.5 hover:after:bg-sidebar-border group-data-[side=left]:-right-4 group-data-[side=right]:left-0 sm:flex ltr:-translate-x-1/2 rtl:-translate-x-1/2",
 276 | 				"in-data-[side=left]:cursor-w-resize in-data-[side=right]:cursor-e-resize rtl:in-data-[side=left]:cursor-e-resize rtl:in-data-[side=right]:cursor-w-resize",
 277 | 				"[[data-side=left][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-e-resize rtl:[[data-side=left][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-w-resize [[data-side=right][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-w-resize rtl:[[data-side=right][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-e-resize",
 278 | 				"group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:translate-x-0 hover:group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:bg-sidebar group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:after:inset-s-full rtl:group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:translate-x-0",
 279 | 				"[[data-side=left][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]:-inset-e-2",
 280 | 				"[[data-side=right][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]:-inset-s-2",
 281 | 				className
 282 | 			)}
 283 | 			data-sidebar='rail'
 284 | 			data-slot='sidebar-rail'
 285 | 			onClick={toggleSidebar}
 286 | 			tabIndex={-1}
 287 | 			title='Toggle Sidebar'
 288 | 			{...props}
 289 | 		/>
 290 | 	);
 291 | }

 448 | const sidebarMenuButtonVariants = cva(
 449 | 	"peer/menu-button group/menu-button flex w-full items-center gap-2 overflow-hidden rounded-md p-2 text-start text-sm outline-hidden ring-sidebar-ring transition-[width,height,padding] hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground focus-visible:ring-2 active:bg-sidebar-accent active:text-sidebar-accent-foreground disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 group-has-data-[sidebar=menu-action]/menu-item:pe-8 aria-disabled:pointer-events-none aria-disabled:opacity-50 data-active:bg-sidebar-accent data-active:font-medium data-active:text-sidebar-accent-foreground data-open:hover:bg-sidebar-accent data-open:hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground group-data-[collapsible=icon]:size-8! group-data-[collapsible=icon]:p-2! [&>span:last-child]:truncate [&_svg]:size-4 [&_svg]:shrink-0",
 450 | 	{
 451 | 		variants: {
 452 | 			variant: {
 453 | 				default: "hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground",
 454 | 				outline:
 455 | 					"bg-background shadow-[0_0_0_1px_var(--sidebar-border)] hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground hover:shadow-[0_0_0_1px_var(--sidebar-accent)]"
 456 | 			},

 461 | 			}

 465 | 			size: "default"

 470 | function SidebarMenuButton({
 471 | 	asChild = false,
 472 | 	isActive = false,
 473 | 	variant = "default",
 474 | 	size = "default",
 475 | 	tooltip,
 476 | 	className,
 477 | 	...props
 478 | }: React.ComponentProps<"button"> & {
 479 | 	asChild?: boolean;
 480 | 	isActive?: boolean;
 481 | 	tooltip?: string | React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipContent>;
 482 | } & VariantProps<typeof sidebarMenuButtonVariants>) {
 483 | 	const Comp = asChild ? Slot.Root : "button";
 484 | 	const { isMobile, state } = useSidebar();
 485 | 
 486 | 	const button = (
 487 | 		<Comp
 488 | 			className={cn(sidebarMenuButtonVariants({ variant, size }), className)}
 489 | 			data-active={isActive}
 490 | 			data-sidebar='menu-button'
 491 | 			data-size={size}
 492 | 			data-slot='sidebar-menu-button'
 493 | 			{...props}
 494 | 		/>
 495 | 	);
 496 | 
 497 | 	if (!tooltip) {
 498 | 		return button;
 499 | 	}
 500 | 
 501 | 	if (typeof tooltip === "string") {
 502 | 		tooltip = {
 503 | 			children: tooltip
 504 | 		};
 505 | 	}
 506 | 
 507 | 	return (
 508 | 		<Tooltip>
 509 | 			<TooltipTrigger asChild>{button}</TooltipTrigger>
 510 | 			<TooltipContent
 511 | 				align='center'
 512 | 				hidden={state !== "collapsed" || isMobile}
 513 | 				side='right'
 514 | 				{...tooltip}
 515 | 			/>
 516 | 		</Tooltip>
 517 | 	);
 518 | }
 519 | 
 520 | function SidebarMenuAction({
 521 | 	className,
 522 | 	asChild = false,
 523 | 	showOnHover = false,
 524 | 	...props
 525 | }: React.ComponentProps<"button"> & {
 526 | 	asChild?: boolean;
 527 | 	showOnHover?: boolean;
 528 | }) {
 529 | 	const Comp = asChild ? Slot.Root : "button";
 530 | 
 531 | 	return (
 532 | 		<Comp
 533 | 			className={cn(
 534 | 				"absolute inset-e-1 top-1.5 flex aspect-square w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-md p-0 text-sidebar-foreground outline-hidden ring-sidebar-ring transition-transform after:absolute after:-inset-2 hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground focus-visible:ring-2 peer-hover/menu-button:text-sidebar-accent-foreground group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden peer-data-[size=default]/menu-button:top-1.5 peer-data-[size=lg]/menu-button:top-2.5 peer-data-[size=sm]/menu-button:top-1 md:after:hidden [&>svg]:size-4 [&>svg]:shrink-0",

 538 | 			)}
 539 | 			data-sidebar='menu-action'

 560 | function SidebarMenuSkeleton({
 561 | 	className,
 562 | 	showIcon = false,
 563 | 	...props
 564 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 565 | 	showIcon?: boolean;
 566 | }) {
 567 | 	// Random width between 50 to 90%.
 568 | 	const [width] = React.useState(() => {
 569 | 		return `${Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) + 50}%`;
 570 | 	});
 571 | 
 572 | 	return (
 573 | 		<div
 574 | 			className={cn("flex h-8 items-center gap-2 rounded-md px-2", className)}
 575 | 			data-sidebar='menu-skeleton'
 576 | 			data-slot='sidebar-menu-skeleton'
 577 | 			{...props}
 578 | 		>
 579 | 			{showIcon && (
 580 | 				<Skeleton
 581 | 					className='size-4 rounded-md'
 582 | 					data-sidebar='menu-skeleton-icon'
 583 | 				/>
 584 | 			)}
 585 | 			<Skeleton
 586 | 				className='h-4 max-w-(--skeleton-width) flex-1'
 587 | 				data-sidebar='menu-skeleton-text'

 591 | 					} as React.CSSProperties
 592 | 				}
 593 | 			/>
 594 | 		</div>
 595 | 	);
 596 | }

```

`components/signup-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";
   2 | import { Link, useNavigate, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import { useState } from "react";
   4 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   5 | import { z } from "zod";
   6 | import { Button } from "#/components/ui/button";
   7 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "#/components/ui/card";
   8 | import { Field, FieldDescription, FieldGroup, FieldLabel } from "#/components/ui/field";
   9 | import { Input } from "#/components/ui/input";
  10 | import { signUp } from "#/lib/auth-client";
  11 | 
  12 | const signupSchema = z
  13 | 	.object({
  14 | 		name: z.string().min(2, "Name must be at least 2 characters."),
  15 | 		email: z.string().email("Enter a valid email."),
  16 | 		password: z.string().min(8, "Password must be at least 8 characters."),
  17 | 		confirmPassword: z.string()
  18 | 	})
  19 | 	.refine(data => data.password === data.confirmPassword, {
  20 | 		message: "Passwords do not match.",
  21 | 		path: ["confirmPassword"]
  22 | 	});
  23 | 
  24 | function fieldValidator(schema: z.ZodTypeAny) {
  25 | 	return ({ value }: { value: unknown }) => {
  26 | 		const result = schema.safeParse(value);
  27 | 		return result.success ? undefined : result.error.issues[0]?.message;
  28 | 	};
  29 | }
  30 | 
  31 | function FieldMessage({ error }: { error?: string }) {
  32 | 	if (!error) return null;
  33 | 	return <p className='text-destructive text-sm'>{error}</p>;
  34 | }
  35 | 
  36 | export function SignupForm({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof Card>) {
  37 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  38 | 	const [submitError, setSubmitError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  39 | 	const router = useRouter();
  40 | 
  41 | 	const form = useForm({
  42 | 		defaultValues: {
  43 | 			name: "",
  44 | 			email: "",
  45 | 			password: "",
  46 | 			confirmPassword: ""
  47 | 		},
  48 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
  49 | 			const result = signupSchema.safeParse(value);
  50 | 
  51 | 			if (!result.success) {
  52 | 				setSubmitError(result.error.issues[0]?.message ?? "Invalid form.");
  53 | 				return;
  54 | 			}
  55 | 
  56 | 			try {
  57 | 				setSubmitError(null);
  58 | 
  59 | 				const response = await signUp.email({
  60 | 					name: value.name,
  61 | 					email: value.email,
  62 | 					password: value.password
  63 | 				});
  64 | 
  65 | 				if (response.error) {
  66 | 					setSubmitError(response.error.message ?? "Could not create account.");
  67 | 					return;
  68 | 				}
  69 | 				await router.invalidate(); // Re-run __root beforeLoad to refresh the global session
  70 | 				toast.success("Account created successfully.");
  71 | 				navigate({ to: "/" });
  72 | 			} catch {
  73 | 				setSubmitError("Something went wrong. Please try again.");
  74 | 			}
  75 | 		}
  76 | 	});
  77 | 
  78 | 	return (
  79 | 		<Card {...props}>
  80 | 			<CardHeader>
  81 | 				<CardTitle>Create an account</CardTitle>
  82 | 				<CardDescription>Enter your information below to create your account</CardDescription>
  83 | 			</CardHeader>
  84 | 
  85 | 			<CardContent>
  86 | 				<form
  87 | 					onSubmit={e => {
  88 | 						e.preventDefault();
  89 | 						e.stopPropagation();
  90 | 						form.handleSubmit();
  91 | 					}}
  92 | 				>
  93 | 					<FieldGroup>
  94 | 						<form.Field
  95 | 							name='name'
  96 | 							validators={{
  97 | 								onChange: fieldValidator(signupSchema.shape.name)
  98 | 							}}
  99 | 						>
 100 | 							{field => (
 101 | 								<Field>
 102 | 									<FieldLabel htmlFor={field.name}>Full Name</FieldLabel>
 103 | 									<Input
 104 | 										id={field.name}
 105 | 										name={field.name}
 106 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 107 | 										placeholder='John Doe'
 108 | 										type='text'
 109 | 										value={field.state.value}
 110 | 									/>
 111 | 									<FieldMessage
 112 | 										error={
 113 | 											field.state.meta.isTouched
 114 | 												? (field.state.meta.errors[0] as string | undefined)
 115 | 												: undefined
 116 | 										}
 117 | 									/>
 118 | 								</Field>
 119 | 							)}
 120 | 						</form.Field>
 121 | 
 122 | 						<form.Field
 123 | 							name='email'
 124 | 							validators={{
 125 | 								onChange: fieldValidator(signupSchema.shape.email)
 126 | 							}}
 127 | 						>
 128 | 							{field => (
 129 | 								<Field>
 130 | 									<FieldLabel htmlFor={field.name}>Email</FieldLabel>
 131 | 									<Input
 132 | 										id={field.name}
 133 | 										name={field.name}
 134 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 135 | 										placeholder='m@example.com'
 136 | 										type='email'
 137 | 										value={field.state.value}
 138 | 									/>
 139 | 									<FieldDescription>We&apos;ll use this to contact you.</FieldDescription>
 140 | 									<FieldMessage
 141 | 										error={
 142 | 											field.state.meta.isTouched
 143 | 												? (field.state.meta.errors[0] as string | undefined)
 144 | 												: undefined
 145 | 										}
 146 | 									/>
 147 | 								</Field>
 148 | 							)}
 149 | 						</form.Field>
 150 | 
 151 | 						<form.Field
 152 | 							name='password'
 153 | 							validators={{
 154 | 								onChange: fieldValidator(signupSchema.shape.password)
 155 | 							}}
 156 | 						>
 157 | 							{field => (
 158 | 								<Field>
 159 | 									<FieldLabel htmlFor={field.name}>Password</FieldLabel>
 160 | 									<Input
 161 | 										id={field.name}
 162 | 										name={field.name}
 163 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 164 | 										type='password'
 165 | 										value={field.state.value}
 166 | 									/>
 167 | 									<FieldDescription>Must be at least 8 characters long.</FieldDescription>
 168 | 									<FieldMessage
 169 | 										error={
 170 | 											field.state.meta.isTouched
 171 | 												? (field.state.meta.errors[0] as string | undefined)
 172 | 												: undefined
 173 | 										}
 174 | 									/>
 175 | 								</Field>
 176 | 							)}
 177 | 						</form.Field>
 178 | 
 179 | 						<form.Field
 180 | 							name='confirmPassword'
 181 | 							validators={{
 182 | 								onChangeListenTo: ["password"],
 183 | 								onChange: ({ value, fieldApi }) => {
 184 | 									const password = fieldApi.form.getFieldValue("password");
 185 | 
 186 | 									if (value !== password) {
 187 | 										return "Passwords do not match.";
 188 | 									}
 189 | 
 190 | 									return undefined;
 191 | 								}
 192 | 							}}
 193 | 						>
 194 | 							{field => (
 195 | 								<Field>
 196 | 									<FieldLabel htmlFor={field.name}>Confirm Password</FieldLabel>
 197 | 									<Input
 198 | 										id={field.name}
 199 | 										name={field.name}
 200 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 201 | 										type='password'
 202 | 										value={field.state.value}
 203 | 									/>
 204 | 									<FieldDescription>Please confirm your password.</FieldDescription>
 205 | 									<FieldMessage
 206 | 										error={
 207 | 											field.state.meta.isTouched
 208 | 												? (field.state.meta.errors[0] as string | undefined)
 209 | 												: undefined
 210 | 										}
 211 | 									/>
 212 | 								</Field>
 213 | 							)}
 214 | 						</form.Field>
 215 | 
 216 | 						<FieldMessage error={submitError ?? undefined} />
 217 | 
 218 | 						<FieldGroup>
 219 | 							<Field>
 220 | 								<form.Subscribe selector={state => [state.canSubmit, state.isSubmitting]}>
 221 | 									{([canSubmit, isSubmitting]) => (
 222 | 										<Button
 223 | 											disabled={!canSubmit || isSubmitting}
 224 | 											type='submit'
 225 | 										>
 226 | 											{isSubmitting ? "Creating..." : "Create Account"}
 227 | 										</Button>
 228 | 									)}
 229 | 								</form.Subscribe>
 230 | 
 231 | 								<Button
 232 | 									type='button'
 233 | 									variant='outline'
 234 | 								>
 235 | 									Sign up with Google
 236 | 								</Button>
 237 | 
 238 | 								<FieldDescription className='px-6 text-center'>
 239 | 									Already have an account?{" "}
 240 | 									<Link
 241 | 										className='underline'
 242 | 										to='/sign-in'
 243 | 									>
 244 | 										Sign in
 245 | 									</Link>
 246 | 								</FieldDescription>
 247 | 							</Field>
 248 | 						</FieldGroup>
 249 | 					</FieldGroup>
 250 | 				</form>
 251 | 			</CardContent>
 252 | 		</Card>
 253 | 	);
 254 | }

```

   1 | import { ChevronDownIcon, ChevronUpIcon } from "lucide-react";
   2 | import { Accordion as AccordionPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   3 | import type * as React from "react";
   4 | 
   5 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   6 | 
   7 | function Accordion({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Root>) {
   8 | 	return (
   9 | 		<AccordionPrimitive.Root
  10 | 			className={cn("flex w-full flex-col", className)}
  11 | 			data-slot='accordion'
  12 | 			{...props}
  13 | 		/>
  14 | 	);
  15 | }
  16 | 
  17 | function AccordionItem({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Item>) {
  18 | 	return (
  19 | 		<AccordionPrimitive.Item
  20 | 			className={cn("not-last:border-b", className)}
  21 | 			data-slot='accordion-item'
  22 | 			{...props}
  23 | 		/>
  24 | 	);
  25 | }
  26 | 
  27 | function AccordionTrigger({ className, children, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Trigger>) {
  28 | 	return (
  29 | 		<AccordionPrimitive.Header className='flex'>
  30 | 			<AccordionPrimitive.Trigger
  31 | 				className={cn(
  32 | 					"group/accordion-trigger relative flex flex-1 items-start justify-between rounded-lg border border-transparent py-2.5 text-start font-medium text-sm outline-none transition-all hover:underline focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:after:border-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 **:data-[slot=accordion-trigger-icon]:ms-auto **:data-[slot=accordion-trigger-icon]:size-4 **:data-[slot=accordion-trigger-icon]:text-muted-foreground",
  33 | 					className
  34 | 				)}
  35 | 				data-slot='accordion-trigger'
  36 | 				{...props}
  37 | 			>
  38 | 				{children}
  39 | 				<ChevronDownIcon
  40 | 					className='pointer-events-none shrink-0 group-aria-expanded/accordion-trigger:hidden'
  41 | 					data-slot='accordion-trigger-icon'
  42 | 				/>
  43 | 				<ChevronUpIcon
  44 | 					className='pointer-events-none hidden shrink-0 group-aria-expanded/accordion-trigger:inline'
  45 | 					data-slot='accordion-trigger-icon'
  46 | 				/>
  47 | 			</AccordionPrimitive.Trigger>
  48 | 		</AccordionPrimitive.Header>
  49 | 	);
  50 | }
  51 | 
  52 | function AccordionContent({ className, children, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Content>) {
  53 | 	return (
  54 | 		<AccordionPrimitive.Content
  55 | 			className='overflow-hidden text-sm data-closed:animate-accordion-up data-open:animate-accordion-down'
  56 | 			data-slot='accordion-content'
  57 | 			{...props}
  58 | 		>
  59 | 			<div

  62 | 					className
  63 | 				)}
  64 | 			>
  65 | 				{children}
  66 | 			</div>
  67 | 		</AccordionPrimitive.Content>
  68 | 	);
  69 | }

`components/ui/alert.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
   2 | import type * as React from "react";
   3 | 
   4 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   5 | 
   6 | const alertVariants = cva(
   7 | 	"group/alert relative grid w-full gap-0.5 rounded-lg border px-2.5 py-2 text-start text-sm has-data-[slot=alert-action]:relative has-[>svg]:grid-cols-[auto_1fr] has-[>svg]:gap-x-2 has-data-[slot=alert-action]:pe-18 *:[svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 *:[svg]:row-span-2 *:[svg]:translate-y-0.5 *:[svg]:text-current",
   8 | 	{
   9 | 		variants: {
  10 | 			variant: {
  11 | 				default: "bg-card text-card-foreground",
  12 | 				destructive:
  13 | 					"bg-card text-destructive *:data-[slot=alert-description]:text-destructive/90 *:[svg]:text-current"
  14 | 			}
  15 | 		},
  16 | 		defaultVariants: {
  17 | 			variant: "default"
  18 | 		}
  19 | 	}
  20 | );
  21 | 
  22 | function Alert({ className, variant, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & VariantProps<typeof alertVariants>) {
  23 | 	return (
  24 | 		<div
  25 | 			className={cn(alertVariants({ variant }), className)}
  26 | 			data-slot='alert'
  27 | 			role='alert'
  28 | 			{...props}
  29 | 		/>
  30 | 	);
  31 | }
  32 | 
  33 | function AlertTitle({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
  34 | 	return (
  35 | 		<div
  36 | 			className={cn(
  37 | 				"font-medium group-has-[>svg]/alert:col-start-2 [&_a]:underline [&_a]:underline-offset-3 [&_a]:hover:text-foreground",
  38 | 				className
  39 | 			)}
  40 | 			data-slot='alert-title'
  41 | 			{...props}
  42 | 		/>
  43 | 	);
  44 | }
  45 | 
  46 | function AlertDescription({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
  47 | 	return (
  48 | 		<div
  49 | 			className={cn(
  50 | 				"text-balance text-muted-foreground text-sm md:text-pretty [&_a]:underline [&_a]:underline-offset-3 [&_a]:hover:text-foreground [&_p:not(:last-child)]:mb-4",
  51 | 				className
  52 | 			)}
  53 | 			data-slot='alert-description'
  54 | 			{...props}
  55 | 		/>
  56 | 	);
  57 | }
  58 | 
  59 | function AlertAction({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
  60 | 	return (
  61 | 		<div
  62 | 			className={cn("absolute end-2 top-2", className)}
  63 | 			data-slot='alert-action'
  64 | 			{...props}
  65 | 		/>
  66 | 	);
  67 | }
  68 | 
  69 | export { Alert, AlertAction, AlertDescription, AlertTitle };

`components/ui/aspect-ratio.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { AspectRatio as AspectRatioPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   4 | 
   5 | function AspectRatio({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof AspectRatioPrimitive.Root>) {
   6 | 	return (
   7 | 		<AspectRatioPrimitive.Root
   8 | 			data-slot='aspect-ratio'
   9 | 			{...props}
  10 | 		/>
  11 | 	);
  12 | }
  13 | 
  14 | export { AspectRatio };

   5 | 
   6 | function Avatar({
   7 | 	className,
   8 | 	size = "default",
   9 | 	...props
  10 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof AvatarPrimitive.Root> & {
  11 | 	size?: "default" | "sm" | "lg";
  12 | }) {
  13 | 	return (
  14 | 		<AvatarPrimitive.Root
  15 | 			className={cn(

  18 | 			)}

`components/ui/badge.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
   2 | import { Slot } from "radix-ui";
   3 | import type * as React from "react";
   4 | 
   5 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   6 | 
   7 | const badgeVariants = cva(
   8 | 	"group/badge inline-flex h-5 w-fit shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1 overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap rounded-4xl border border-transparent px-2 py-0.5 font-medium text-xs transition-all focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-[3px] focus-visible:ring-ring/50 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:ps-1.5 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pe-1.5 aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 [&>svg]:pointer-events-none [&>svg]:size-3!",
   9 | 	{
  10 | 		variants: {
  11 | 			variant: {
  12 | 				default: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground [a]:hover:bg-primary/80",
  13 | 				secondary: "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground [a]:hover:bg-secondary/80",
  14 | 				destructive:
  15 | 					"bg-destructive/10 text-destructive focus-visible:ring-destructive/20 dark:bg-destructive/20 dark:focus-visible:ring-destructive/40 [a]:hover:bg-destructive/20",
  16 | 				outline: "border-border text-foreground [a]:hover:bg-muted [a]:hover:text-muted-foreground",
  17 | 				ghost: "hover:bg-muted hover:text-muted-foreground dark:hover:bg-muted/50",
  18 | 				link: "text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline"
  19 | 			}
  20 | 		},
  21 | 		defaultVariants: {
  22 | 			variant: "default"
  23 | 		}
  24 | 	}
  25 | );
  26 | 
  27 | function Badge({
  28 | 	className,
  29 | 	variant = "default",
  30 | 	asChild = false,
  31 | 	...props
  32 | }: React.ComponentProps<"span"> & VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants> & { asChild?: boolean }) {
  33 | 	const Comp = asChild ? Slot.Root : "span";
  34 | 
  35 | 	return (
  36 | 		<Comp
  37 | 			className={cn(badgeVariants({ variant }), className)}
  38 | 			data-slot='badge'
  39 | 			data-variant={variant}
  40 | 			{...props}
  41 | 		/>
  42 | 	);
  43 | }
  44 | 
  45 | export { Badge, badgeVariants };

   1 | import { ChevronRightIcon, MoreHorizontalIcon } from "lucide-react";
   2 | import { Slot } from "radix-ui";
   3 | import type * as React from "react";
   4 | 
   5 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   6 | 
   7 | function Breadcrumb({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"nav">) {
   8 | 	return (
   9 | 		<nav
  10 | 			aria-label='breadcrumb'
  11 | 			className={cn(className)}
  12 | 			data-slot='breadcrumb'
  13 | 			{...props}
  14 | 		/>
  15 | 	);
  16 | }
  17 | 
  18 | function BreadcrumbList({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"ol">) {
  19 | 	return (
  20 | 		<ol
  21 | 			className={cn(
  22 | 				"wrap-break-word flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1.5 text-muted-foreground text-sm",
  23 | 				className
  24 | 			)}
  25 | 			data-slot='breadcrumb-list'
  26 | 			{...props}
  27 | 		/>
  28 | 	);
  29 | }
  30 | 
  31 | function BreadcrumbItem({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"li">) {
  32 | 	return (
  33 | 		<li
  34 | 			className={cn("inline-flex items-center gap-1", className)}
  35 | 			data-slot='breadcrumb-item'
  36 | 			{...props}
  37 | 		/>
  38 | 	);
  39 | }
  40 | 
  41 | function BreadcrumbLink({
  42 | 	asChild,
  43 | 	className,
  44 | 	...props
  45 | }: React.ComponentProps<"a"> & {
  46 | 	asChild?: boolean;
  47 | }) {
  48 | 	const Comp = asChild ? Slot.Root : "a";
  49 | 
  50 | 	return (
  51 | 		<Comp
  52 | 			className={cn("transition-colors hover:text-foreground", className)}
  53 | 			data-slot='breadcrumb-link'
  54 | 			{...props}
  55 | 		/>
  56 | 	);
  57 | }
  58 | 
  59 | function BreadcrumbPage({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"span">) {
  60 | 	return (
  61 | 		<span
  62 | 			aria-current='page'
  63 | 			aria-disabled='true'
  64 | 			className={cn("font-normal text-foreground", className)}
  65 | 			data-slot='breadcrumb-page'
  66 | 			role='link'
  67 | 			{...props}
  68 | 		/>
  69 | 	);
  70 | }
  71 | 
  72 | function BreadcrumbSeparator({ children, className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"li">) {
  73 | 	return (
  74 | 		<li
  75 | 			aria-hidden='true'
  76 | 			className={cn("[&>svg]:size-3.5", className)}
  77 | 			data-slot='breadcrumb-separator'
  78 | 			role='presentation'
  79 | 			{...props}
  80 | 		>
  81 | 			{children ?? <ChevronRightIcon className='rtl:rotate-180' />}
  82 | 		</li>
  83 | 	);
  84 | }
  85 | 
  86 | function BreadcrumbEllipsis({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"span">) {
  87 | 	return (
  88 | 		<span
  89 | 			aria-hidden='true'
  90 | 			className={cn("flex size-5 items-center justify-center [&>svg]:size-4", className)}
  91 | 			data-slot='breadcrumb-ellipsis'
  92 | 			role='presentation'
  93 | 			{...props}
  94 | 		>
  95 | 			<MoreHorizontalIcon />
  96 | 			<span className='sr-only'>More</span>
  97 | 		</span>
  98 | 	);
  99 | }
 100 | 
 101 | export {
 102 | 	Breadcrumb,
 103 | 	BreadcrumbEllipsis,
 104 | 	BreadcrumbItem,
 105 | 	BreadcrumbLink,

 107 | 	BreadcrumbPage,

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { ChevronDownIcon, ChevronLeftIcon, ChevronRightIcon } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import * as React from "react";
   5 | import { type DayButton, DayPicker, getDefaultClassNames, type Locale } from "react-day-picker";
   6 | 
   7 | import { Button, buttonVariants } from "#/components/ui/button.tsx";
   8 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   9 | 
  10 | function Calendar({
  11 | 	className,
  12 | 	classNames,

  16 | 	locale,

  18 | 	components,
  19 | 	...props
  20 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof DayPicker> & {
  21 | 	buttonVariant?: React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>["variant"];
  22 | }) {
  23 | 	const defaultClassNames = getDefaultClassNames();
  24 | 
  25 | 	return (
  26 | 		<DayPicker
  27 | 			captionLayout={captionLayout}

  30 | 				String.raw`rtl:**:[.rdp-button\_next>svg]:rotate-180`,
  31 | 				String.raw`rtl:**:[.rdp-button\_previous>svg]:rotate-180`,
  32 | 				className
  33 | 			)}
  34 | 			classNames={{

  36 | 				months: cn("relative flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row", defaultClassNames.months),
  37 | 				month: cn("flex w-full flex-col gap-4", defaultClassNames.month),

  39 | 					"absolute inset-x-0 top-0 flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-1",
  40 | 					defaultClassNames.nav
  41 | 				),
  42 | 				button_previous: cn(
  43 | 					buttonVariants({ variant: buttonVariant }),
  44 | 					"size-(--cell-size) select-none p-0 aria-disabled:opacity-50",
  45 | 					defaultClassNames.button_previous
  46 | 				),

  62 | 				caption_label: cn(
  63 | 					"select-none font-medium",
  64 | 					captionLayout === "label"
  65 | 						? "text-sm"
  66 | 						: "flex items-center gap-1 rounded-(--cell-radius) text-sm [&>svg]:size-3.5 [&>svg]:text-muted-foreground",
  67 | 					defaultClassNames.caption_label
  68 | 				),
  69 | 				weekdays: cn("flex", defaultClassNames.weekdays),
  70 | 				weekday: cn(
  71 | 					"flex-1 select-none rounded-(--cell-radius) font-normal text-[0.8rem] text-muted-foreground",
  72 | 					defaultClassNames.weekday
  73 | 				),
  74 | 				week: cn("mt-2 flex w-full", defaultClassNames.week),

  76 | 				week_number: cn("select-none text-[0.8rem] text-muted-foreground", defaultClassNames.week_number),
  77 | 				day: cn(
  78 | 					"group/day relative aspect-square h-full w-full select-none rounded-(--cell-radius) p-0 text-center [&:last-child[data-selected=true]_button]:rounded-e-(--cell-radius)",
  79 | 					props.showWeekNumber
  80 | 						? "[&:nth-child(2)[data-selected=true]_button]:rounded-s-(--cell-radius)"
  81 | 						: "[&:first-child[data-selected=true]_button]:rounded-s-(--cell-radius)",
  82 | 					defaultClassNames.day
  83 | 				),
  84 | 				range_start: cn(
  85 | 					"relative isolate z-0 rounded-s-(--cell-radius) bg-muted after:absolute after:inset-y-0 after:end-0 after:w-4 after:bg-muted",
  86 | 					defaultClassNames.range_start
  87 | 				),
  88 | 				range_middle: cn("rounded-none", defaultClassNames.range_middle),
  89 | 				range_end: cn(
  90 | 					"relative isolate z-0 rounded-e-(--cell-radius) bg-muted after:absolute after:inset-y-0 after:start-0 after:w-4 after:bg-muted",
  91 | 					defaultClassNames.range_end
  92 | 				),
  93 | 				today: cn(
  94 | 					"rounded-(--cell-radius) bg-muted text-foreground data-[selected=true]:rounded-none",
  95 | 					defaultClassNames.today
  96 | 				),
  97 | 				outside: cn("text-muted-foreground aria-selected:text-muted-foreground", defaultClassNames.outside),
  98 | 				disabled: cn("text-muted-foreground opacity-50", defaultClassNames.disabled),
  99 | 				hidden: cn("invisible", defaultClassNames.hidden),
 100 | 				...classNames
 101 | 			}}
 102 | 			components={{
 103 | 				Root: ({ className, rootRef, ...props }) => {
 104 | 					return (
 105 | 						<div
 106 | 							className={cn(className)}
 107 | 							data-slot='calendar'
 108 | 							ref={rootRef}
 109 | 							{...props}
 110 | 						/>
 111 | 					);
 112 | 				},
 113 | 				Chevron: ({ className, orientation, ...props }) => {
 114 | 					if (orientation === "left") {
 115 | 						return (
 116 | 							<ChevronLeftIcon
 117 | 								className={cn("size-4 rtl:rotate-180", className)}
 118 | 								{...props}
 119 | 							/>
 120 | 						);
 121 | 					}
 122 | 
 123 | 					if (orientation === "right") {
 124 | 						return (
 125 | 							<ChevronRightIcon
 126 | 								className={cn("size-4 rtl:rotate-180", className)}
 127 | 								{...props}
 128 | 							/>
 129 | 						);
 130 | 					}
 131 | 
 132 | 					return (
 133 | 						<ChevronDownIcon
 134 | 							className={cn("size-4", className)}
 135 | 							{...props}
 136 | 						/>
 137 | 					);
 138 | 				},
 139 | 				DayButton: ({ ...props }) => (
 140 | 					<CalendarDayButton
 141 | 						locale={locale}
 142 | 						{...props}
 143 | 					/>
 144 | 				),
 145 | 				WeekNumber: ({ children, ...props }) => {
 146 | 					return (
 147 | 						<td {...props}>
 148 | 							<div className='flex size-(--cell-size) items-center justify-center text-center'>
 149 | 								{children}
 150 | 							</div>
 151 | 						</td>
 152 | 					);
 153 | 				},
 154 | 				...components
 155 | 			}}
 156 | 			formatters={{
 157 | 				formatMonthDropdown: date => date.toLocaleString(locale?.code, { month: "short" }),
 158 | 				...formatters
 159 | 			}}
 160 | 			locale={locale}
 161 | 			showOutsideDays={showOutsideDays}
 162 | 			{...props}
 163 | 		/>
 164 | 	);
 165 | }
 166 | 
 167 | function CalendarDayButton({
 168 | 	className,
 169 | 	day,
 170 | 	modifiers,
 171 | 	locale,
 172 | 	...props
 173 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof DayButton> & { locale?: Partial<Locale> }) {
 174 | 	const defaultClassNames = getDefaultClassNames();
 175 | 
 176 | 	const ref = React.useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null);
 177 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 178 | 		if (modifiers.focused) ref.current?.focus();
 179 | 	}, [modifiers.focused]);
 180 | 
 181 | 	return (
 182 | 		<Button
 183 | 			className={cn(
 184 | 				"relative isolate z-10 flex aspect-square size-auto w-full min-w-(--cell-size) flex-col gap-1 border-0 font-normal leading-none data-[range-end=true]:rounded-(--cell-radius) data-[range-middle=true]:rounded-none data-[range-start=true]:rounded-(--cell-radius) data-[range-start=true]:rounded-s-(--cell-radius) data-[range-end=true]:rounded-e-(--cell-radius) data-[range-end=true]:bg-primary data-[range-middle=true]:bg-muted data-[range-start=true]:bg-primary data-[selected-single=true]:bg-primary data-[range-end=true]:text-primary-foreground data-[range-middle=true]:text-foreground data-[range-start=true]:text-primary-foreground data-[selected-single=true]:text-primary-foreground group-data-[focused=true]/day:relative group-data-[focused=true]/day:z-10 group-data-[focused=true]/day:border-ring group-data-[focused=true]/day:ring-[3px] group-data-[focused=true]/day:ring-ring/50 dark:hover:text-foreground [&>span]:text-xs [&>span]:opacity-70",
 185 | 				defaultClassNames.day,
 186 | 				className
 187 | 			)}
 188 | 			data-day={day.date.toLocaleDateString(locale?.code)}
 189 | 			data-range-end={modifiers.range_end}
 190 | 			data-range-middle={modifiers.range_middle}
 191 | 			data-range-start={modifiers.range_start}
 192 | 			data-selected-single={
 193 | 				modifiers.selected && !modifiers.range_start && !modifiers.range_end && !modifiers.range_middle
 194 | 			}
 195 | 			ref={ref}
 196 | 			size='icon'
 197 | 			variant='ghost'
 198 | 			{...props}
 199 | 		/>
 200 | 	);
 201 | }
 202 | 
 203 | export { Calendar, CalendarDayButton };
