`components/ui/callout.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { tv } from "tailwind-variants";
   2 | 
   3 | interface CalloutProps {
   4 | 	children: React.ReactNode;
   5 | 	color?: "primary" | "secondary" | "success" | "destructive";
   6 | }
   7 | 
   8 | interface CalloutIconProps {
   9 | 	children: React.ReactNode;
  10 | }
  11 | 
  12 | interface CalloutTextProps {
  13 | 	children: React.ReactNode;
  14 | }
  15 | 
  16 | const callOutStyles = tv({
  17 | 	base: "flex items-center gap-2 rounded p-4 text-sm",
  18 | 	variants: {
  19 | 		color: {
  20 | 			primary: "bg-accent text-accent-foreground",
  21 | 			secondary: "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground",
  22 | 			success: "bg-success/10 text-success",
  23 | 			destructive: "bg-destructive/10 text-destructive"
  24 | 		}
  25 | 	}
  26 | });
  27 | 
  28 | export function Callout({ color = "primary", ...props }: CalloutProps) {
  29 | 	return (
  30 | 		<div
  31 | 			{...props}
  32 | 			className={callOutStyles({ color })}
  33 | 		/>
  34 | 	);
  35 | }
  36 | 
  37 | export function CalloutIcon(props: CalloutIconProps) {
  38 | 	return <div {...props} />;
  39 | }
  40 | 
  41 | export function CalloutText(props: CalloutTextProps) {
  42 | 	return <p {...props} />;
  43 | }
```

`components/ui/carousel.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import useEmblaCarousel, { type UseEmblaCarouselType } from "embla-carousel-react";
   2 | import { ChevronLeftIcon, ChevronRightIcon } from "lucide-react";
   3 | import * as React from "react";
   4 | 
   5 | import { Button } from "#/components/ui/button.tsx";
   6 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   7 | 
   8 | type CarouselApi = UseEmblaCarouselType[1];
   9 | type UseCarouselParameters = Parameters<typeof useEmblaCarousel>;
  10 | type CarouselOptions = UseCarouselParameters[0];
  11 | type CarouselPlugin = UseCarouselParameters[1];
  12 | 
  13 | type CarouselProps = {
  14 | 	opts?: CarouselOptions;
  15 | 	plugins?: CarouselPlugin;
  16 | 	orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical";
  17 | 	setApi?: (api: CarouselApi) => void;
  18 | };
  19 | 
  20 | type CarouselContextProps = {
  21 | 	carouselRef: ReturnType<typeof useEmblaCarousel>[0];
  22 | 	api: ReturnType<typeof useEmblaCarousel>[1];
  23 | 	scrollPrev: () => void;
  24 | 	scrollNext: () => void;
  25 | 	canScrollPrev: boolean;
  26 | 	canScrollNext: boolean;
  27 | } & CarouselProps;
  28 | 
  29 | const CarouselContext = React.createContext<CarouselContextProps | null>(null);
  30 | 
  31 | function useCarousel() {
  32 | 	const context = React.useContext(CarouselContext);
  33 | 
  34 | 	if (!context) {
  35 | 		throw new Error("useCarousel must be used within a <Carousel />");
  36 | 	}
  37 | 
  38 | 	return context;
  39 | }
  40 | 
  41 | function Carousel({
  42 | 	orientation = "horizontal",
  43 | 	opts,
  44 | 	setApi,
  45 | 	plugins,
  46 | 	className,
  47 | 	children,
  48 | 	...props
  49 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & CarouselProps) {
  50 | 	const [carouselRef, api] = useEmblaCarousel(
  51 | 		{
  52 | 			...opts,
  53 | 			axis: orientation === "horizontal" ? "x" : "y"
  54 | 		},
  55 | 		plugins
  56 | 	);
  57 | 	const [canScrollPrev, setCanScrollPrev] = React.useState(false);
  58 | 	const [canScrollNext, setCanScrollNext] = React.useState(false);
  59 | 
  60 | 	const onSelect = React.useCallback((api: CarouselApi) => {
  61 | 		if (!api) return;
  62 | 		setCanScrollPrev(api.canScrollPrev());
  63 | 		setCanScrollNext(api.canScrollNext());
  64 | 	}, []);
  65 | 
  66 | 	const scrollPrev = React.useCallback(() => {
  67 | 		api?.scrollPrev();
  68 | 	}, [api]);
  69 | 
  70 | 	const scrollNext = React.useCallback(() => {
  71 | 		api?.scrollNext();
  72 | 	}, [api]);
  73 | 
  74 | 	const handleKeyDown = React.useCallback(
  75 | 		(event: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
  76 | 			if (event.key === "ArrowLeft") {
  77 | 				event.preventDefault();
  78 | 				scrollPrev();
  79 | 			} else if (event.key === "ArrowRight") {
  80 | 				event.preventDefault();
  81 | 				scrollNext();
  82 | 			}
  83 | 		},
  84 | 		[scrollPrev, scrollNext]
  85 | 	);
  86 | 
  87 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
  88 | 		if (!api || !setApi) return;
  89 | 		setApi(api);
  90 | 	}, [api, setApi]);
  91 | 
  92 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
  93 | 		if (!api) return;
  94 | 		onSelect(api);
  95 | 		api.on("reInit", onSelect);
  96 | 		api.on("select", onSelect);
  97 | 
  98 | 		return () => {
  99 | 			api?.off("select", onSelect);
 100 | 		};
 101 | 	}, [api, onSelect]);
 102 | 
 103 | 	return (
 104 | 		<CarouselContext.Provider
 105 | 			value={{
 106 | 				carouselRef,
 107 | 				api: api,
 108 | 				opts,
 109 | 				orientation: orientation || (opts?.axis === "y" ? "vertical" : "horizontal"),
 110 | 				scrollPrev,
 111 | 				scrollNext,
 112 | 				canScrollPrev,
 113 | 				canScrollNext
 114 | 			}}
 115 | 		>
 116 | 			<div
 117 | 				aria-roledescription='carousel'
 118 | 				className={cn("relative", className)}
 119 | 				data-slot='carousel'
 120 | 				onKeyDownCapture={handleKeyDown}
 121 | 				role='region'
 122 | 				{...props}
 123 | 			>
 124 | 				{children}
 125 | 			</div>
 126 | 		</CarouselContext.Provider>
 127 | 	);
 128 | }
 129 | 
 130 | function CarouselContent({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
 131 | 	const { carouselRef, orientation } = useCarousel();
 132 | 
 133 | 	return (
 134 | 		<div
 135 | 			className='overflow-hidden'
 136 | 			data-slot='carousel-content'
 137 | 			ref={carouselRef}
 138 | 		>
 139 | 			<div
 140 | 				className={cn("flex", orientation === "horizontal" ? "-ms-4" : "-mt-4 flex-col", className)}
 141 | 				{...props}
 142 | 			/>
 143 | 		</div>
 144 | 	);
 145 | }
 146 | 
 147 | function CarouselItem({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
 148 | 	const { orientation } = useCarousel();
 149 | 
 150 | 	return (
 151 | 		<div
 152 | 			aria-roledescription='slide'
 153 | 			className={cn(
 154 | 				"min-w-0 shrink-0 grow-0 basis-full",
 155 | 				orientation === "horizontal" ? "ps-4" : "pt-4",
 156 | 				className
 157 | 			)}
 158 | 			data-slot='carousel-item'
 159 | 			role='group'
 160 | 			{...props}
 161 | 		/>
 162 | 	);
 163 | }
 164 | 
 165 | function CarouselPrevious({
 166 | 	className,
 167 | 	variant = "outline",
 168 | 	size = "icon-sm",
 169 | 	...props
 170 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>) {
 171 | 	const { orientation, scrollPrev, canScrollPrev } = useCarousel();
 172 | 
 173 | 	return (
 174 | 		<Button
 175 | 			className={cn(
 176 | 				"absolute touch-manipulation rounded-full",
 177 | 				orientation === "horizontal"
 178 | 					? "-start-12 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2"
 179 | 					: "start-1/2 -top-12 -translate-x-1/2 rotate-90 rtl:translate-x-1/2",
 180 | 				className
 181 | 			)}
 182 | 			data-slot='carousel-previous'
 183 | 			disabled={!canScrollPrev}
 184 | 			onClick={scrollPrev}
 185 | 			size={size}
 186 | 			variant={variant}
 187 | 			{...props}
 188 | 		>
 189 | 			<ChevronLeftIcon className='rtl:rotate-180' />
 190 | 			<span className='sr-only'>Previous slide</span>
 191 | 		</Button>
 192 | 	);
 193 | }
 194 | 
 195 | function CarouselNext({
 196 | 	className,
 197 | 	variant = "outline",
 198 | 	size = "icon-sm",
 199 | 	...props
 200 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>) {
 201 | 	const { orientation, scrollNext, canScrollNext } = useCarousel();
 202 | 
 203 | 	return (
 204 | 		<Button
 205 | 			className={cn(
 206 | 				"absolute touch-manipulation rounded-full",
 207 | 				orientation === "horizontal"
 208 | 					? "-end-12 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2"
 209 | 					: "start-1/2 -bottom-12 -translate-x-1/2 rotate-90 rtl:translate-x-1/2",
 210 | 				className
 211 | 			)}
 212 | 			data-slot='carousel-next'
 213 | 			disabled={!canScrollNext}
 214 | 			onClick={scrollNext}
 215 | 			size={size}
 216 | 			variant={variant}
 217 | 			{...props}
 218 | 		>
 219 | 			<ChevronRightIcon className='rtl:rotate-180' />
 220 | 			<span className='sr-only'>Next slide</span>
 221 | 		</Button>
 222 | 	);
 223 | }
 224 | 
 225 | export { Carousel, type CarouselApi, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselNext, CarouselPrevious, useCarousel };

```

```tsx
 108 | const chartConfig = {
 109 | 	visitors: {
 110 | 		label: "Visitors"
 111 | 	},
 112 | 	desktop: {
 113 | 		label: "Desktop",
 114 | 		color: "var(--primary)"
 115 | 	},

 117 | 		label: "Mobile",
 118 | 		color: "var(--primary)"
 119 | 	}
 120 | } satisfies ChartConfig;
 121 | 
 122 | export function ChartAreaInteractive() {
 123 | 	const isMobile = useIsMobile();
 124 | 	const [timeRange, setTimeRange] = React.useState("90d");
 125 | 
 126 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 127 | 		if (isMobile) {
 128 | 			setTimeRange("7d");
 129 | 		}
 130 | 	}, [isMobile]);
 131 | 
 132 | 	const filteredData = chartData.filter(item => {
 133 | 		const date = new Date(item.date);
 134 | 		const referenceDate = new Date("2024-06-30");
 135 | 		let daysToSubtract = 90;
 136 | 		if (timeRange === "30d") {
 137 | 			daysToSubtract = 30;
 138 | 		} else if (timeRange === "7d") {
 139 | 			daysToSubtract = 7;
 140 | 		}
 141 | 		const startDate = new Date(referenceDate);
 142 | 		startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - daysToSubtract);
 143 | 		return date >= startDate;
 144 | 	});
 145 | 
 146 | 	return (
 147 | 		<Card className='@container/card'>
 148 | 			<CardHeader>
 149 | 				<CardTitle>Total Visitors</CardTitle>
 150 | 				<CardDescription>
 151 | 					<span className='@[540px]/card:block hidden'>Total for the last 3 months</span>
 152 | 					<span className='@[540px]/card:hidden'>Last 3 months</span>
 153 | 				</CardDescription>
 154 | 				<CardAction>
 155 | 					<ToggleGroup
 156 | 						className='@[767px]/card:flex hidden *:data-[slot=toggle-group-item]:px-4!'
 157 | 						onValueChange={setTimeRange}
 158 | 						type='single'
 159 | 						value={timeRange}
 160 | 						variant='outline'
 161 | 					>
 162 | 						<ToggleGroupItem value='90d'>Last 3 months</ToggleGroupItem>
 163 | 						<ToggleGroupItem value='30d'>Last 30 days</ToggleGroupItem>
 164 | 						<ToggleGroupItem value='7d'>Last 7 days</ToggleGroupItem>
 165 | 					</ToggleGroup>
 166 | 					<Select
 167 | 						onValueChange={setTimeRange}
 168 | 						value={timeRange}
 169 | 					>
 170 | 						<SelectTrigger
 171 | 							aria-label='Select a value'
 172 | 							className='flex @[767px]/card:hidden w-40 **:data-[slot=select-value]:block **:data-[slot=select-value]:truncate'
 173 | 							size='sm'
 174 | 						>
 175 | 							<SelectValue placeholder='Last 3 months' />
 176 | 						</SelectTrigger>
 177 | 						<SelectContent className='rounded-xl'>
 178 | 							<SelectItem
 179 | 								className='rounded-lg'
 180 | 								value='90d'
 181 | 							>
 182 | 								Last 3 months
 183 | 							</SelectItem>
 184 | 							<SelectItem
 185 | 								className='rounded-lg'
 186 | 								value='30d'
 187 | 							>
 188 | 								Last 30 days
 189 | 							</SelectItem>
 190 | 							<SelectItem
 191 | 								className='rounded-lg'
 192 | 								value='7d'
 193 | 							>
 194 | 								Last 7 days
 195 | 							</SelectItem>
 196 | 						</SelectContent>
 197 | 					</Select>
 198 | 				</CardAction>
 199 | 			</CardHeader>
 200 | 			<CardContent className='px-2 pt-4 sm:px-6 sm:pt-6'>
 201 | 				<ChartContainer
 202 | 					className='aspect-auto h-[250px] w-full'
 203 | 					config={chartConfig}
 204 | 				>
 205 | 					<AreaChart data={filteredData}>
 206 | 						<defs>
 207 | 							<linearGradient
 208 | 								id='fillDesktop'
 209 | 								x1='0'
 210 | 								x2='0'
 211 | 								y1='0'
 212 | 								y2='1'
 213 | 							>
 214 | 								<stop
 215 | 									offset='5%'
 216 | 									stopColor='var(--color-desktop)'
 217 | 									stopOpacity={1.0}
 218 | 								/>
 219 | 								<stop
 220 | 									offset='95%'
 221 | 									stopColor='var(--color-desktop)'
 222 | 									stopOpacity={0.1}
 223 | 								/>
 224 | 							</linearGradient>
 225 | 							<linearGradient
 226 | 								id='fillMobile'
 227 | 								x1='0'
 228 | 								x2='0'
 229 | 								y1='0'
 230 | 								y2='1'
 231 | 							>
 232 | 								<stop
 233 | 									offset='5%'
 234 | 									stopColor='var(--color-mobile)'
 235 | 									stopOpacity={0.8}
 236 | 								/>
 237 | 								<stop
 238 | 									offset='95%'
 239 | 									stopColor='var(--color-mobile)'
 240 | 									stopOpacity={0.1}
 241 | 								/>
 242 | 							</linearGradient>
 243 | 						</defs>
 244 | 						<CartesianGrid vertical={false} />
 245 | 						<XAxis
 246 | 							axisLine={false}
 247 | 							dataKey='date'
 248 | 							minTickGap={32}
 249 | 							tickFormatter={value => {
 250 | 								const date = new Date(value);
 251 | 								return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
 252 | 									month: "short",
 253 | 									day: "numeric"
 254 | 								});
 255 | 							}}
 256 | 							tickLine={false}
 257 | 							tickMargin={8}
 258 | 						/>
 259 | 						<ChartTooltip
 260 | 							content={
 261 | 								<ChartTooltipContent
 262 | 									indicator='dot'
 263 | 									labelFormatter={value => {
 264 | 										return new Date(value).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
 265 | 											month: "short",
 266 | 											day: "numeric"
 267 | 										});
 268 | 									}}
 269 | 								/>
 270 | 							}
 271 | 							cursor={false}
 272 | 						/>
 273 | 						<Area
 274 | 							dataKey='mobile'
 275 | 							fill='url(#fillMobile)'
 276 | 							stackId='a'
 277 | 							stroke='var(--color-mobile)'
 278 | 							type='natural'
 279 | 						/>
 280 | 						<Area
 281 | 							dataKey='desktop'
 282 | 							fill='url(#fillDesktop)'
 283 | 							stackId='a'
 284 | 							stroke='var(--color-desktop)'
 285 | 							type='natural'
 286 | 						/>
 287 | 					</AreaChart>
 288 | 				</ChartContainer>
 289 | 			</CardContent>
 290 | 		</Card>
 291 | 	);
 292 | }
```

`components/ui/chart.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import * as React from "react";
   4 | import type { TooltipValueType } from "recharts";
   5 | import * as RechartsPrimitive from "recharts";
   6 | 
   7 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   8 | 
   9 | // Format: { THEME_NAME: CSS_SELECTOR }
  10 | const THEMES = { light: "", dark: ".dark" } as const;
  11 | 
  12 | const INITIAL_DIMENSION = { width: 320, height: 200 } as const;
  13 | type TooltipNameType = number | string;
  14 | 
  15 | export type ChartConfig = Record<
  16 | 	string,
  17 | 	{
  18 | 		label?: React.ReactNode;
  19 | 		icon?: React.ComponentType;
  20 | 	} & ({ color?: string; theme?: never } | { color?: never; theme: Record<keyof typeof THEMES, string> })
  21 | >;
  22 | 
  23 | type ChartContextProps = {
  24 | 	config: ChartConfig;
  25 | };
  26 | 
  27 | const ChartContext = React.createContext<ChartContextProps | null>(null);
  28 | 
  29 | function useChart() {
  30 | 	const context = React.useContext(ChartContext);
  31 | 
  32 | 	if (!context) {
  33 | 		throw new Error("useChart must be used within a <ChartContainer />");
  34 | 	}
  35 | 
  36 | 	return context;
  37 | }
  38 | 
  39 | function ChartContainer({
  40 | 	id,
  41 | 	className,
  42 | 	children,
  43 | 	config,
  44 | 	initialDimension = INITIAL_DIMENSION,
  45 | 	...props
  46 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
  47 | 	config: ChartConfig;
  48 | 	children: React.ComponentProps<typeof RechartsPrimitive.ResponsiveContainer>["children"];
  49 | 	initialDimension?: {
  50 | 		width: number;
  51 | 		height: number;
  52 | 	};
  53 | }) {
  54 | 	const uniqueId = React.useId();
  55 | 	const chartId = `chart-${id ?? uniqueId.replace(/:/g, "")}`;
  56 | 
  57 | 	return (
  58 | 		<ChartContext.Provider value={{ config }}>
  59 | 			<div
  60 | 				className={cn(
  61 | 					"flex aspect-video justify-center text-xs [&_.recharts-cartesian-axis-tick_text]:fill-muted-foreground [&_.recharts-cartesian-grid_line[stroke='#ccc']]:stroke-border/50 [&_.recharts-curve.recharts-tooltip-cursor]:stroke-border [&_.recharts-dot[stroke='#fff']]:stroke-transparent [&_.recharts-layer]:outline-hidden [&_.recharts-polar-grid_[stroke='#ccc']]:stroke-border [&_.recharts-radial-bar-background-sector]:fill-muted [&_.recharts-rectangle.recharts-tooltip-cursor]:fill-muted [&_.recharts-reference-line_[stroke='#ccc']]:stroke-border [&_.recharts-sector[stroke='#fff']]:stroke-transparent [&_.recharts-sector]:outline-hidden [&_.recharts-surface]:outline-hidden",
  62 | 					className
  63 | 				)}
  64 | 				data-chart={chartId}
  65 | 				data-slot='chart'
  66 | 				{...props}
  67 | 			>
  68 | 				<ChartStyle
  69 | 					config={config}
  70 | 					id={chartId}
  71 | 				/>
  72 | 				<RechartsPrimitive.ResponsiveContainer initialDimension={initialDimension}>
  73 | 					{children}
  74 | 				</RechartsPrimitive.ResponsiveContainer>
  75 | 			</div>
  76 | 		</ChartContext.Provider>
  77 | 	);
  78 | }
  79 | 
  80 | const ChartStyle = ({ id, config }: { id: string; config: ChartConfig }) => {
  81 | 	const colorConfig = Object.entries(config).filter(([, config]) => config.theme ?? config.color);
  82 | 
  83 | 	if (!colorConfig.length) {
  84 | 		return null;
  85 | 	}
  86 | 
  87 | 	return (
  88 | 		<style
  89 | 			dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
  90 | 				__html: Object.entries(THEMES)
  91 | 					.map(
  92 | 						([theme, prefix]) => `
  93 | ${prefix} [data-chart=${id}] {
  94 | ${colorConfig
  95 | 	.map(([key, itemConfig]) => {
  96 | 		const color = itemConfig.theme?.[theme as keyof typeof itemConfig.theme] ?? itemConfig.color;
  97 | 		return color ? `  --color-${key}: ${color};` : null;
  98 | 	})
  99 | 	.join("\n")}
 100 | }
 101 | `
 102 | 					)
 103 | 					.join("\n")
 104 | 			}}
 105 | 		/>
 106 | 	);
 107 | };
 108 | 
 109 | const ChartTooltip = RechartsPrimitive.Tooltip;
 110 | 
 111 | function ChartTooltipContent({
 112 | 	active,
 113 | 	payload,
 114 | 	className,
 115 | 	indicator = "dot",
 116 | 	hideLabel = false,
 117 | 	hideIndicator = false,
 118 | 	label,
 119 | 	labelFormatter,
 120 | 	labelClassName,
 121 | 	formatter,
 122 | 	color,
 123 | 	nameKey,
 124 | 	labelKey
 125 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof RechartsPrimitive.Tooltip> &
 126 | 	React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 127 | 		hideLabel?: boolean;
 128 | 		hideIndicator?: boolean;
 129 | 		indicator?: "line" | "dot" | "dashed";
 130 | 		nameKey?: string;
 131 | 		labelKey?: string;
 132 | 	} & Omit<RechartsPrimitive.DefaultTooltipContentProps<TooltipValueType, TooltipNameType>, "accessibilityLayer">) {
 133 | 	const { config } = useChart();
 134 | 
 135 | 	const tooltipLabel = React.useMemo(() => {
 136 | 		if (hideLabel || !payload?.length) {
 137 | 			return null;
 138 | 		}
 139 | 
 140 | 		const [item] = payload;
 141 | 		const key = `${labelKey ?? item?.dataKey ?? item?.name ?? "value"}`;
 142 | 		const itemConfig = getPayloadConfigFromPayload(config, item, key);
 143 | 		const value = !labelKey && typeof label === "string" ? (config[label]?.label ?? label) : itemConfig?.label;
 144 | 
 145 | 		if (labelFormatter) {
 146 | 			return <div className={cn("font-medium", labelClassName)}>{labelFormatter(value, payload)}</div>;
 147 | 		}
 148 | 
 149 | 		if (!value) {
 150 | 			return null;
 151 | 		}
 152 | 
 153 | 		return <div className={cn("font-medium", labelClassName)}>{value}</div>;
 154 | 	}, [label, labelFormatter, payload, hideLabel, labelClassName, config, labelKey]);
 155 | 
 156 | 	if (!active || !payload?.length) {
 157 | 		return null;
 158 | 	}
 159 | 
 160 | 	const nestLabel = payload.length === 1 && indicator !== "dot";
 161 | 
 162 | 	return (
 163 | 		<div
 164 | 			className={cn(
 165 | 				"grid min-w-32 items-start gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border/50 bg-background px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs shadow-xl",
 166 | 				className
 167 | 			)}
 168 | 		>
 169 | 			{!nestLabel ? tooltipLabel : null}
 170 | 			<div className='grid gap-1.5'>
 171 | 				{payload
 172 | 					.filter(item => item.type !== "none")
 173 | 					.map((item, index) => {
 174 | 						const key = `${nameKey ?? item.name ?? item.dataKey ?? "value"}`;
 175 | 						const itemConfig = getPayloadConfigFromPayload(config, item, key);
 176 | 						const indicatorColor = color ?? item.payload?.fill ?? item.color;
 177 | 
 178 | 						return (
 179 | 							<div
 180 | 								className={cn(
 181 | 									"flex w-full flex-wrap items-stretch gap-2 [&>svg]:h-2.5 [&>svg]:w-2.5 [&>svg]:text-muted-foreground",
 182 | 									indicator === "dot" && "items-center"
 183 | 								)}
 184 | 								key={index}
 185 | 							>
 186 | 								{formatter && item?.value !== undefined && item.name ? (
 187 | 									formatter(item.value, item.name, item, index, item.payload)
 188 | 								) : (
 189 | 									<>
 190 | 										{itemConfig?.icon ? (
 191 | 											<itemConfig.icon />
 192 | 										) : (
 193 | 											!hideIndicator && (
 194 | 												<div
 195 | 													className={cn(
 196 | 														"shrink-0 rounded-[2px] border-(--color-border) bg-(--color-bg)",
 197 | 														{
 198 | 															"h-2.5 w-2.5": indicator === "dot",
 199 | 															"w-1": indicator === "line",
 200 | 															"w-0 border-[1.5px] border-dashed bg-transparent":
 201 | 																indicator === "dashed",
 202 | 															"my-0.5": nestLabel && indicator === "dashed"
 203 | 														}
 204 | 													)}
 205 | 													style={
 206 | 														{
 207 | 															"--color-bg": indicatorColor,
 208 | 															"--color-border": indicatorColor
 209 | 														} as React.CSSProperties
 210 | 													}
 211 | 												/>
 212 | 											)
 213 | 										)}
 214 | 										<div
 215 | 											className={cn(
 216 | 												"flex flex-1 justify-between leading-none",
 217 | 												nestLabel ? "items-end" : "items-center"
 218 | 											)}
 219 | 										>
 220 | 											<div className='grid gap-1.5'>
 221 | 												{nestLabel ? tooltipLabel : null}
 222 | 												<span className='text-muted-foreground'>
 223 | 													{itemConfig?.label ?? item.name}
 224 | 												</span>
 225 | 											</div>
 226 | 											{item.value != null && (
 227 | 												<span className='font-medium font-mono text-foreground tabular-nums'>
 228 | 													{typeof item.value === "number"
 229 | 														? item.value.toLocaleString()
 230 | 														: String(item.value)}
 231 | 												</span>
 232 | 											)}
 233 | 										</div>
 234 | 									</>
 235 | 								)}
 236 | 							</div>
 237 | 						);
 238 | 					})}
 239 | 			</div>
 240 | 		</div>
 241 | 	);
 242 | }
 243 | 
 244 | const ChartLegend = RechartsPrimitive.Legend;
 245 | 
 246 | function ChartLegendContent({
 247 | 	className,
 248 | 	hideIcon = false,
 249 | 	payload,
 250 | 	verticalAlign = "bottom",
 251 | 	nameKey
 252 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 253 | 	hideIcon?: boolean;
 254 | 	nameKey?: string;
 255 | } & RechartsPrimitive.DefaultLegendContentProps) {
 256 | 	const { config } = useChart();
 257 | 
 258 | 	if (!payload?.length) {
 259 | 		return null;
 260 | 	}
 261 | 
 262 | 	return (
 263 | 		<div
 264 | 			className={cn(
 265 | 				"flex items-center justify-center gap-4",
 266 | 				verticalAlign === "top" ? "pb-3" : "pt-3",
 267 | 				className
 268 | 			)}
 269 | 		>
 270 | 			{payload
 271 | 				.filter(item => item.type !== "none")
 272 | 				.map((item, index) => {
 273 | 					const key = `${nameKey ?? item.dataKey ?? "value"}`;
 274 | 					const itemConfig = getPayloadConfigFromPayload(config, item, key);
 275 | 
 276 | 					return (
 277 | 						<div
 278 | 							className={cn(
 279 | 								"flex items-center gap-1.5 [&>svg]:h-3 [&>svg]:w-3 [&>svg]:text-muted-foreground"
 280 | 							)}
 281 | 							key={index}
 282 | 						>
 283 | 							{itemConfig?.icon && !hideIcon ? (
 284 | 								<itemConfig.icon />
 285 | 							) : (
 286 | 								<div
 287 | 									className='h-2 w-2 shrink-0 rounded-[2px]'
 288 | 									style={{
 289 | 										backgroundColor: item.color
 290 | 									}}
 291 | 								/>
 292 | 							)}
 293 | 							{itemConfig?.label}
 294 | 						</div>
 295 | 					);
 296 | 				})}
 297 | 		</div>
 298 | 	);
 299 | }
 300 | 
 301 | function getPayloadConfigFromPayload(config: ChartConfig, payload: unknown, key: string) {
 302 | 	if (typeof payload !== "object" || payload === null) {
 303 | 		return undefined;
 304 | 	}
 305 | 
 306 | 	const payloadPayload =
 307 | 		"payload" in payload && typeof payload.payload === "object" && payload.payload !== null
 308 | 			? payload.payload
 309 | 			: undefined;
 310 | 
 311 | 	let configLabelKey: string = key;
 312 | 
 313 | 	if (key in payload && typeof payload[key as keyof typeof payload] === "string") {
 314 | 		configLabelKey = payload[key as keyof typeof payload] as string;
 315 | 	} else if (
 316 | 		payloadPayload &&
 317 | 		key in payloadPayload &&
 318 | 		typeof payloadPayload[key as keyof typeof payloadPayload] === "string"
 319 | 	) {
 320 | 		configLabelKey = payloadPayload[key as keyof typeof payloadPayload] as string;
 321 | 	}
 322 | 
 323 | 	return configLabelKey in config ? config[configLabelKey] : config[key];
 324 | }
 325 | 
 326 | export { ChartContainer, ChartLegend, ChartLegendContent, ChartStyle, ChartTooltip, ChartTooltipContent };

```

`components/ui/checkbox.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { CheckIcon } from "lucide-react";
   2 | import { Checkbox as CheckboxPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   3 | import type * as React from "react";
   4 | 
   5 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   6 | 
   7 | function Checkbox({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof CheckboxPrimitive.Root>) {
   8 | 	return (
   9 | 		<CheckboxPrimitive.Root
  10 | 			className={cn(
```

```tsx
 299 | function DraggableRow({ row }: { row: Row<z.infer<typeof schema>> }) {
 300 | 	const { transform, transition, setNodeRef, isDragging } = useSortable({
 301 | 		id: row.original.id
 302 | 	});
 303 | 
 304 | 	return (
 305 | 		<TableRow
 306 | 			className='relative z-0 data-[dragging=true]:z-10 data-[dragging=true]:opacity-80'
 307 | 			data-dragging={isDragging}
 308 | 			data-state={row.getIsSelected() && "selected"}
 309 | 			ref={setNodeRef}
 310 | 			style={{
 311 | 				transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
 312 | 				transition: transition
 313 | 			}}
 314 | 		>
 315 | 			{row.getVisibleCells().map(cell => (
 316 | 				<TableCell key={cell.id}>{flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}</TableCell>
 317 | 			))}
 318 | 		</TableRow>
 319 | 	);

 322 | export function DataTable({ data: initialData }: { data: z.infer<typeof schema>[] }) {
 323 | 	const [data, setData] = React.useState(() => initialData);
 324 | 	const [rowSelection, setRowSelection] = React.useState({});
 325 | 	const [columnVisibility, setColumnVisibility] = React.useState<VisibilityState>({});
 326 | 	const [columnFilters, setColumnFilters] = React.useState<ColumnFiltersState>([]);
 327 | 	const [sorting, setSorting] = React.useState<SortingState>([]);
 328 | 	const [pagination, setPagination] = React.useState({
 329 | 		pageIndex: 0,
 330 | 		pageSize: 10
 331 | 	});
 332 | 	const sortableId = React.useId();
 333 | 	const sensors = useSensors(useSensor(MouseSensor, {}), useSensor(TouchSensor, {}), useSensor(KeyboardSensor, {}));
 334 | 
 335 | 	const dataIds = React.useMemo<UniqueIdentifier[]>(() => data?.map(({ id }) => id) || [], [data]);
 336 | 
 337 | 	const table = useReactTable({
 338 | 		data,
 339 | 		columns,
 340 | 		state: {
 341 | 			sorting,
 342 | 			columnVisibility,
 343 | 			rowSelection,
 344 | 			columnFilters,
 345 | 			pagination
 346 | 		},
 347 | 		getRowId: row => row.id.toString(),
 348 | 		enableRowSelection: true,
 349 | 		onRowSelectionChange: setRowSelection,
 350 | 		onSortingChange: setSorting,
 351 | 		onColumnFiltersChange: setColumnFilters,
 352 | 		onColumnVisibilityChange: setColumnVisibility,
 353 | 		onPaginationChange: setPagination,
 354 | 		getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
 355 | 		getFilteredRowModel: getFilteredRowModel(),
 356 | 		getPaginationRowModel: getPaginationRowModel(),
 357 | 		getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
 358 | 		getFacetedRowModel: getFacetedRowModel(),
 359 | 		getFacetedUniqueValues: getFacetedUniqueValues()
 360 | 	});
 361 | 
 362 | 	function handleDragEnd(event: DragEndEvent) {
 363 | 		const { active, over } = event;
 364 | 		if (active && over && active.id !== over.id) {
 365 | 			setData(data => {
 366 | 				const oldIndex = dataIds.indexOf(active.id);
 367 | 				const newIndex = dataIds.indexOf(over.id);
 368 | 				return arrayMove(data, oldIndex, newIndex);
 369 | 			});
 370 | 		}
 371 | 	}
 372 | 
 373 | 	return (
 374 | 		<Tabs
 375 | 			className='w-full flex-col justify-start gap-6'
 376 | 			defaultValue='outline'
 377 | 		>
```

`components/ui/date-picker.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   4 | import { Calendar as CalendarIcon } from "lucide-react";
   5 | import type { RefObject } from "react";
   6 | 
   7 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   8 | import { Calendar } from "@/components/ui/calendar";
   9 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@/components/ui/popover";
  10 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
  11 | 
  12 | export const DatePicker = function DatePickerCmp({
  13 | 	date,
  14 | 	setDate,
  15 | 	ref
  16 | }: {
  17 | 	date?: Date;
  18 | 	setDate: (date?: Date) => void;
  19 | 	ref?: RefObject<HTMLDivElement | null>;
  20 | }) {
  21 | 	return (
  22 | 		<Popover>
  23 | 			<PopoverTrigger asChild>
  24 | 				<Button
  25 | 					className={cn("w-full justify-start text-start font-normal", !date && "text-muted-foreground")}
  26 | 					variant={"outline"}
  27 | 				>
  28 | 					<CalendarIcon className='me-2 h-4 w-4' />
  29 | 					{date ? format(date, "PPP") : <span>Pick a date</span>}
  30 | 				</Button>
  31 | 			</PopoverTrigger>
  32 | 			<PopoverContent
  33 | 				className='w-auto p-0'
  34 | 				ref={ref}
  35 | 			>
  36 | 				<Calendar
  37 | 					mode='single'
  38 | 					onSelect={setDate}
  39 | 					selected={date}
  40 | 				/>
  41 | 			</PopoverContent>
  42 | 		</Popover>
  43 | 	);
  44 | };

```

`components/ui/date-range-picker.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   4 | import { Calendar as CalendarIcon } from "lucide-react";
   5 | import type { DateRange } from "react-day-picker";
   6 | 
   7 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   8 | import { Calendar } from "@/components/ui/calendar";
   9 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@/components/ui/popover";
  10 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
  11 | 
  12 | interface DateRangePickerProps {
  13 | 	className?: string;
  14 | 	date?: DateRange;
  15 | 	onDateChange?: (date: DateRange | undefined) => void;
  16 | }
  17 | 
  18 | export function DateRangePicker({ date, onDateChange, className }: DateRangePickerProps) {
  19 | 	return (
  20 | 		<div className={cn("grid gap-2", className)}>
  21 | 			<Popover>
  22 | 				<PopoverTrigger asChild>
  23 | 					<Button
  24 | 						className={cn("w-75 justify-start text-left font-normal", !date && "text-muted-foreground")}
  25 | 						id='date'
  26 | 						variant='outline'
  27 | 					>
  28 | 						<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
  29 | 						{date?.from ? (
  30 | 							date.to ? (
  31 | 								<>
  32 | 									{format(date.from, "LLL dd, y")} - {format(date.to, "LLL dd, y")}
  33 | 								</>
  34 | 							) : (
  35 | 								format(date.from, "LLL dd, y")
  36 | 							)
  37 | 						) : (
  38 | 							<span>Pick a date range</span>
  39 | 						)}
  40 | 					</Button>
  41 | 				</PopoverTrigger>
  42 | 				<PopoverContent
  43 | 					align='start'
  44 | 					className='w-auto p-0'
  45 | 				>
  46 | 					<Calendar
  47 | 						defaultMonth={date?.from}
  48 | 						mode='range'
  49 | 						numberOfMonths={2}
  50 | 						onSelect={onDateChange}
  51 | 						selected={date}
  52 | 					/>
  53 | 				</PopoverContent>
  54 | 			</Popover>
  55 | 		</div>
  56 | 	);
  57 | }

```

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { XIcon } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   5 | import type * as React from "react";
   6 | 
   7 | import { Button } from "#/components/ui/button.tsx";
   8 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   9 | 
  10 | function Dialog({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Root>) {
  11 | 	return (
  12 | 		<DialogPrimitive.Root
  13 | 			data-slot='dialog'
  14 | 			{...props}
  15 | 		/>
  16 | 	);
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | function DialogTrigger({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Trigger>) {
  20 | 	return (
  21 | 		<DialogPrimitive.Trigger
  22 | 			data-slot='dialog-trigger'
  23 | 			{...props}
  24 | 		/>
  25 | 	);
  26 | }
  27 | 
  28 | function DialogPortal({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Portal>) {
  29 | 	return (
  30 | 		<DialogPrimitive.Portal
  31 | 			data-slot='dialog-portal'
  32 | 			{...props}
  33 | 		/>
  34 | 	);
  35 | }
  36 | 
  37 | function DialogClose({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Close>) {
  38 | 	return (
  39 | 		<DialogPrimitive.Close
  40 | 			data-slot='dialog-close'
  41 | 			{...props}
  42 | 		/>
  43 | 	);
  44 | }
  45 | 
  46 | function DialogOverlay({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Overlay>) {
  47 | 	return (
  48 | 		<DialogPrimitive.Overlay
  49 | 			className={cn(
  50 | 				"data-open:fade-in-0 data-closed:fade-out-0 fixed inset-0 isolate z-50 bg-black/10 duration-100 data-closed:animate-out data-open:animate-in supports-backdrop-filter:backdrop-blur-xs",
  51 | 				className
  52 | 			)}
  53 | 			data-slot='dialog-overlay'
  54 | 			{...props}
  55 | 		/>
  56 | 	);
  57 | }
  58 | 
  59 | function DialogContent({
  60 | 	className,
  61 | 	children,
  62 | 	showCloseButton = true,
  63 | 	...props
  64 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Content> & {
  65 | 	showCloseButton?: boolean;
  66 | }) {
  67 | 	return (
  68 | 		<DialogPortal>
  69 | 			<DialogOverlay />
  70 | 			<DialogPrimitive.Content
  71 | 				className={cn(
  72 | 					"data-open:fade-in-0 data-open:zoom-in-95 data-closed:fade-out-0 data-closed:zoom-out-95 fixed start-1/2 top-1/2 z-50 grid w-full max-w-[calc(100%-2rem)] -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 gap-4 rounded-xl bg-popover p-4 text-popover-foreground text-sm outline-none ring-1 ring-foreground/10 duration-100 data-closed:animate-out data-open:animate-in sm:max-w-sm rtl:translate-x-1/2",
  73 | 					className
  74 | 				)}
  75 | 				data-slot='dialog-content'
  76 | 				{...props}
  77 | 			>
  78 | 				{children}
  79 | 				{showCloseButton && (
  80 | 					<DialogPrimitive.Close
  81 | 						asChild
  82 | 						data-slot='dialog-close'
  83 | 					>
  84 | 						<Button
  85 | 							className='absolute end-2 top-2'
  86 | 							size='icon-sm'
  87 | 							variant='ghost'
  88 | 						>
  89 | 							<XIcon />
  90 | 							<span className='sr-only'>Close</span>
  91 | 						</Button>
  92 | 					</DialogPrimitive.Close>
  93 | 				)}
  94 | 			</DialogPrimitive.Content>
  95 | 		</DialogPortal>
  96 | 	);
  97 | }
  98 | 
  99 | function DialogHeader({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
 100 | 	return (
 101 | 		<div
 102 | 			className={cn("flex flex-col gap-2", className)}
 103 | 			data-slot='dialog-header'
 104 | 			{...props}
 105 | 		/>
 106 | 	);
 107 | }
 108 | 
 109 | function DialogFooter({
 110 | 	className,
 111 | 	showCloseButton = false,
 112 | 	children,
 113 | 	...props
 114 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 115 | 	showCloseButton?: boolean;
 116 | }) {
 117 | 	return (
 118 | 		<div
 119 | 			className={cn(
 120 | 				"-mx-4 -mb-4 flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 rounded-b-xl border-t bg-muted/50 p-4 sm:flex-row sm:justify-end",
 121 | 				className
 122 | 			)}
 123 | 			data-slot='dialog-footer'
 124 | 			{...props}
 125 | 		>
 126 | 			{children}
 127 | 			{showCloseButton && (
 128 | 				<DialogPrimitive.Close asChild>
 129 | 					<Button variant='outline'>Close</Button>
 130 | 				</DialogPrimitive.Close>
 131 | 			)}
 132 | 		</div>
 133 | 	);
 134 | }
 135 | 
 136 | function DialogTitle({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Title>) {
 137 | 	return (
 138 | 		<DialogPrimitive.Title
 139 | 			className={cn("font-heading font-medium text-base leading-none", className)}
 140 | 			data-slot='dialog-title'
 141 | 			{...props}
 142 | 		/>
 143 | 	);
 144 | }
 145 | 
 146 | function DialogDescription({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Description>) {
 147 | 	return (
 148 | 		<DialogPrimitive.Description
 149 | 			className={cn(
 150 | 				"text-muted-foreground text-sm *:[a]:underline *:[a]:underline-offset-3 *:[a]:hover:text-foreground",
 151 | 				className
 152 | 			)}
 153 | 			data-slot='dialog-description'
 154 | 			{...props}
 155 | 		/>
 156 | 	);
 157 | }
 158 | 
 159 | export {
 160 | 	Dialog,
 161 | 	DialogClose,
 162 | 	DialogContent,
 163 | 	DialogDescription,
 164 | 	DialogFooter,
 165 | 	DialogHeader,
 166 | 	DialogOverlay,
 167 | 	DialogPortal,
 168 | 	DialogTitle,
 169 | 	DialogTrigger
 170 | };
```

`components/ui/direction.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { Direction } from "radix-ui";
   4 | import type * as React from "react";
   5 | 
   6 | function DirectionProvider({
   7 | 	dir,
   8 | 	direction,
   9 | 	children
  10 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof Direction.DirectionProvider> & {
  11 | 	direction?: React.ComponentProps<typeof Direction.DirectionProvider>["dir"];
  12 | }) {
  13 | 	return <Direction.DirectionProvider dir={direction ?? dir}>{children}</Direction.DirectionProvider>;
  14 | }
  15 | 
  16 | const useDirection = Direction.useDirection;
  17 | 
  18 | export { DirectionProvider, useDirection };

```

```tsx
 199 | 		/>
 200 | 	);
```

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
   4 | import { useMemo } from "react";
   5 | 
   6 | import { Label } from "#/components/ui/label.tsx";

   9 | 
  10 | function FieldSet({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"fieldset">) {
  11 | 	return (
  12 | 		<fieldset
  13 | 			className={cn(
  14 | 				"flex flex-col gap-4 has-[>[data-slot=checkbox-group]]:gap-3 has-[>[data-slot=radio-group]]:gap-3",

  16 | 			)}

  30 | 			className={cn("mb-1.5 font-medium data-[variant=label]:text-sm data-[variant=legend]:text-base", className)}
  31 | 			data-slot='field-legend'
  32 | 			data-variant={variant}
  33 | 			{...props}
  34 | 		/>
  35 | 	);
  36 | }
  37 | 
  38 | function FieldGroup({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {

  40 | 		<div
  41 | 			className={cn(
  42 | 				"group/field-group @container/field-group flex w-full flex-col gap-5 data-[slot=checkbox-group]:gap-3 *:data-[slot=field-group]:gap-4",
  43 | 				className
  44 | 			)}
  45 | 			data-slot='field-group'
  46 | 			{...props}
  47 | 		/>
  48 | 	);
  49 | }
  50 | 
  51 | const fieldVariants = cva("group/field flex w-full gap-2 data-[invalid=true]:text-destructive", {
  52 | 	variants: {
  53 | 		orientation: {
  54 | 			vertical: "flex-col *:w-full [&>.sr-only]:w-auto",
  55 | 			horizontal:
  56 | 				"flex-row items-center has-[>[data-slot=field-content]]:items-start *:data-[slot=field-label]:flex-auto has-[>[data-slot=field-content]]:[&>[role=checkbox],[role=radio]]:mt-px",
  57 | 			responsive:
  58 | 				"@md/field-group:flex-row flex-col @md/field-group:items-center *:w-full @md/field-group:*:w-auto @md/field-group:has-[>[data-slot=field-content]]:items-start @md/field-group:*:data-[slot=field-label]:flex-auto [&>.sr-only]:w-auto @md/field-group:has-[>[data-slot=field-content]]:[&>[role=checkbox],[role=radio]]:mt-px"
  59 | 		}
  60 | 	},
  61 | 	defaultVariants: {
  62 | 		orientation: "vertical"
  63 | 	}
  64 | });
  65 | 
  66 | function Field({
  67 | 	className,

  75 | 			data-slot='field'

  78 | 		/>
  79 | 	);

  86 | 			data-slot='field-content'
  87 | 			{...props}
  88 | 		/>
  89 | 	);
  90 | }
  91 | 
  92 | function FieldLabel({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof Label>) {
  93 | 	return (
  94 | 		<Label
  95 | 			className={cn(
  96 | 				"group/field-label peer/field-label flex w-fit gap-2 leading-snug has-[>[data-slot=field]]:rounded-lg has-[>[data-slot=field]]:border has-data-checked:border-primary/30 has-data-checked:bg-primary/5 *:data-[slot=field]:p-2.5 group-data-[disabled=true]/field:opacity-50 dark:has-data-checked:border-primary/20 dark:has-data-checked:bg-primary/10",
  97 | 				"has-[>[data-slot=field]]:w-full has-[>[data-slot=field]]:flex-col",
  98 | 				className
  99 | 			)}

 101 | 			{...props}
 102 | 		/>
 103 | 	);
 104 | }

 106 | function FieldTitle({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
 107 | 	return (
 108 | 		<div
 109 | 			className={cn(
 110 | 				"flex w-fit items-center gap-2 font-medium text-sm group-data-[disabled=true]/field:opacity-50",
 111 | 				className
 112 | 			)}
 113 | 			data-slot='field-label'
 114 | 			{...props}
 115 | 		/>
 116 | 	);
 117 | }
 118 | 
 119 | function FieldDescription({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"p">) {
 120 | 	return (
 121 | 		<p
 122 | 			className={cn(
 123 | 				"text-start font-normal text-muted-foreground text-sm leading-normal group-has-data-horizontal/field:text-balance [[data-variant=legend]+&]:-mt-1.5",
 124 | 				"nth-last-2:-mt-1 last:mt-0",
 125 | 				"[&>a:hover]:text-primary [&>a]:underline [&>a]:underline-offset-4",
 126 | 				className
 127 | 			)}
 128 | 			data-slot='field-description'
 129 | 			{...props}
 130 | 		/>
 131 | 	);
 132 | }
 133 | 
 134 | function FieldSeparator({
 135 | 	children,
 136 | 	className,
 137 | 	...props
 138 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 139 | 	children?: React.ReactNode;
 140 | }) {
 141 | 	return (
 142 | 		<div
 143 | 			className={cn("relative -my-2 h-5 text-sm group-data-[variant=outline]/field-group:-mb-2", className)}
 144 | 			data-content={!!children}
 145 | 			data-slot='field-separator'
 146 | 			{...props}
 147 | 		>
 148 | 			<Separator className='absolute inset-0 top-1/2' />
 149 | 			{children && (
 150 | 				<span
 151 | 					className='relative mx-auto block w-fit bg-background px-2 text-muted-foreground'
 152 | 					data-slot='field-separator-content'
 153 | 				>
 154 | 					{children}
 155 | 				</span>
 156 | 			)}
 157 | 		</div>
 158 | 	);
 159 | }
 160 | 
 161 | function FieldError({
 162 | 	className,
 163 | 	children,
 164 | 	errors,
 165 | 	...props
 166 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 167 | 	errors?: Array<{ message?: string } | undefined>;
 168 | }) {
 169 | 	const content = useMemo(() => {
 170 | 		if (children) {
 171 | 			return children;
 172 | 		}
 173 | 
 174 | 		if (!errors?.length) {
 175 | 			return null;
 176 | 		}
 177 | 
 178 | 		const uniqueErrors = [...new Map(errors.map(error => [error?.message, error])).values()];
 179 | 
 180 | 		if (uniqueErrors?.length == 1) {
 181 | 			return uniqueErrors[0]?.message;
 182 | 		}
 183 | 
 184 | 		return (
 185 | 			<ul className='ms-4 flex list-disc flex-col gap-1'>
 186 | 				{uniqueErrors.map((error, index) => error?.message && <li key={index}>{error.message}</li>)}
 187 | 			</ul>
 188 | 		);
 189 | 	}, [children, errors]);
 190 | 
 191 | 	if (!content) {
 192 | 		return null;
 193 | 	}
 194 | 
 195 | 	return (
 196 | 		<div
 197 | 			className={cn("font-normal text-destructive text-sm", className)}
 198 | 			data-slot='field-error'
 199 | 			role='alert'
 200 | 			{...props}
 201 | 		>
 202 | 			{content}
 203 | 		</div>
 204 | 	);
 205 | }
 206 | 
 207 | export {
 208 | 	Field,
 209 | 	FieldContent,
 210 | 	FieldDescription,
 211 | 	FieldError,
 212 | 	FieldGroup,
 213 | 	FieldLabel,
 214 | 	FieldLegend,
 215 | 	FieldSeparator,
 216 | 	FieldSet,
 217 | 	FieldTitle,
 218 | 	fieldVariants
 219 | };

```

`components/ui/fields/checkbox-field.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useStore } from "@tanstack/react-form";
   2 | 
   3 | import { Checkbox } from "@/components/ui/checkbox";
   4 | import { FieldDescription, FieldLabel } from "@/components/ui/field";
   5 | import {
   6 | 	createFormField,
   7 | 	FormField,
   8 | 	FormFieldError,
   9 | 	FormFieldSet,
  10 | 	useFieldContext
  11 | } from "@/components/ui/form-context";
  12 | 
  13 | interface CheckboxFieldProps {
  14 | 	label: string;
  15 | 	description?: string;
  16 | }
  17 | 
  18 | export function CheckboxField({ label, description }: CheckboxFieldProps) {
  19 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
  20 | 	const isTouched = useStore(field.store, s => s.meta.isTouched);
  21 | 	const isValid = useStore(field.store, s => s.meta.isValid);
  22 | 	const value = useStore(field.store, s => s.value) as boolean;
  23 | 
  24 | 	return (
  25 | 		<FormFieldSet>
  26 | 			<FormField orientation='horizontal'>
  27 | 				<Checkbox
  28 | 					aria-invalid={isTouched && !isValid}
  29 | 					checked={value}
  30 | 					onCheckedChange={checked => {
  31 | 						field.handleChange(checked as boolean);
  32 | 						field.handleBlur();
  33 | 					}}
  34 | 				/>
  35 | 				<div className='flex flex-1 flex-col gap-1.5 leading-snug'>
  36 | 					<FieldLabel className='leading-none'>{label}</FieldLabel>
  37 | 					{description && <FieldDescription>{description}</FieldDescription>}
  38 | 					<FormFieldError />
  39 | 				</div>
  40 | 			</FormField>
  41 | 		</FormFieldSet>
  42 | 	);
  43 | }
  44 | 
  45 | export const FormCheckboxField = createFormField(CheckboxField);

```

`components/ui/fields/date-field.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
   2 | import type * as React from "react";
   3 | 
   4 | import { FieldDescription, FieldLabel } from "@/components/ui/field";
   5 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"; // Assuming you have a standard Input component
   6 | 
   7 | import { createFormField, FormField, FormFieldError, FormFieldSet, useFieldContext } from "../form-context";
   8 | 
   9 | interface DateFieldProps
  10 | 	extends Omit<
  11 | 		React.ComponentProps<"input">,
  12 | 		"value" | "onChange" | "onBlur" | "type" // Omit type to lock it down to "date"
  13 | 	> {
  14 | 	label: string;
  15 | 	description?: string;
  16 | 	required?: boolean;
  17 | 	min?: string; // e.g., "2026-01-01"
  18 | 	max?: string; // e.g., "2026-12-31"
  19 | }
  20 | 
  21 | export function DateField({ label, description, required, min, max, className, ...inputProps }: DateFieldProps) {
  22 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
  23 | 	const isTouched = useSelector(field.store, s => s.meta.isTouched);
  24 | 	const isValid = useSelector(field.store, s => s.meta.isValid);
  25 | 
  26 | 	// Safely fallback to an empty string so the HTML input stays controlled
  27 | 	const value = (useSelector(field.store, s => s.value) as string) ?? "";
  28 | 
  29 | 	return (
  30 | 		<FormFieldSet>
  31 | 			<FormField>
  32 | 				<FieldLabel htmlFor={field.name}>
  33 | 					{label}
  34 | 					{required && " *"}
  35 | 				</FieldLabel>
  36 | 
  37 | 				<Input
  38 | 					aria-invalid={isTouched && !isValid}
  39 | 					className={className}
  40 | 					id={field.name}
  41 | 					max={max}
  42 | 					min={min}
  43 | 					onBlur={field.handleBlur}
  44 | 					// Directly feed the string value 'YYYY-MM-DD' upstream to the TanStack Store
  45 | 					onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
  46 | 					required={required}
  47 | 					type='date'
  48 | 					value={value}
  49 | 					{...inputProps}
  50 | 				/>
  51 | 
  52 | 				{description && <FieldDescription>{description}</FieldDescription>}
  53 | 			</FormField>
  54 | 			<FormFieldError />
  55 | 		</FormFieldSet>
  56 | 	);
  57 | }
  58 | 
  59 | // Wrap it using your context factory to generate the high-order Form component
  60 | export const FormDateField = createFormField(DateField);

```

`components/ui/fields/file-upload-field.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
   2 | 
   3 | import { FileUploader } from "@/components/file-uploader";
   4 | import { FieldDescription, FieldLabel } from "@/components/ui/field";
   5 | 
   6 | import { createFormField, FormField, FormFieldError, FormFieldSet, useFieldContext } from "../form-context";
   7 | 
   8 | interface FileUploadFieldProps {
   9 | 	label: string;
  10 | 	description?: string;
  11 | 	required?: boolean; // Keep this prop
  12 | 	maxSize?: number;
  13 | 	maxFiles?: number;
  14 | }
  15 | 
  16 | export function FileUploadField({ label, description, required, maxSize, maxFiles }: FileUploadFieldProps) {
  17 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
  18 | 	const value = useSelector(field.store, s => s.value) as File[] | undefined;
  19 | 
  20 | 	return (
  21 | 		<FormFieldSet>
  22 | 			<FormField>
  23 | 				<FieldLabel htmlFor={field.name}>
  24 | 					{label}
  25 | 					{required && " *"}
  26 | 				</FieldLabel>
  27 | 				<div>
  28 | 					<FileUploader
  29 | 						maxFiles={maxFiles}
  30 | 						maxSize={maxSize}
  31 | 						onValueChange={field.handleChange}
  32 | 						value={value}
  33 | 					/>
  34 | 				</div>
  35 | 				{description && <FieldDescription>{description}</FieldDescription>}
  36 | 			</FormField>
  37 | 			<FormFieldError />
  38 | 		</FormFieldSet>
  39 | 	);
  40 | }
  41 |
```

`components/ui/fields/radio-group-field.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
   2 | 
   3 | import { FieldDescription, FieldLabel } from "@/components/ui/field";
   4 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
   5 | import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from "@/components/ui/radio-group";
   6 | 
   7 | import { createFormField, FormFieldError, FormFieldSet, useFieldContext } from "../form-context";
   8 | 
   9 | type Option = { value: string; label: string };
  10 | 
  11 | interface RadioGroupFieldProps {
  12 | 	label: string;
  13 | 	description?: string;
  14 | 	required?: boolean;
  15 | 	options: Option[];
  16 | }
  17 | 
  18 | export function RadioGroupField({ label, description, required, options }: RadioGroupFieldProps) {
  19 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
  20 | 	const value = useSelector(field.store, s => s.value) as string;
  21 | 
  22 | 	return (
  23 | 		<FormFieldSet>
  24 | 			<FieldLabel>
  25 | 				{label}
  26 | 				{required && " *"}
  27 | 			</FieldLabel>
  28 | 			{description && <FieldDescription>{description}</FieldDescription>}
  29 | 			<RadioGroup
  30 | 				className='flex flex-wrap gap-x-6 gap-y-2'
  31 | 				onBlur={field.handleBlur}
  32 | 				onValueChange={field.handleChange}
  33 | 				value={value}
  34 | 			>
  35 | 				{options.map(opt => (
  36 | 					<div
  37 | 						className='flex items-center space-x-2'
  38 | 						key={opt.value}
  39 | 					>
  40 | 						<RadioGroupItem
  41 | 							id={`${field.name}-${opt.value}`}
  42 | 							value={opt.value}
  43 | 						/>
  44 | 						<Label htmlFor={`${field.name}-${opt.value}`}>{opt.label}</Label>
  45 | 					</div>
  46 | 				))}
  47 | 			</RadioGroup>
  48 | 			<FormFieldError />
  49 | 		</FormFieldSet>
  50 | 	);
  51 | }
  52 | 
  53 | export const FormRadioGroupField = createFormField(RadioGroupField);

```

`components/ui/fields/select-field.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
   2 | 
   3 | import { FieldDescription, FieldLabel } from "@/components/ui/field";
   4 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
   5 | 
   6 | import { createFormField, FormField, FormFieldError, FormFieldSet, useFieldContext } from "../form-context";
   7 | 
   8 | type Option = { value: string; label: string };
   9 | 
  10 | interface SelectFieldProps {
  11 | 	label: string;
  12 | 	description?: string;
  13 | 	required?: boolean;
  14 | 	disabled?: boolean;
  15 | 	options: Option[];
  16 | 	placeholder?: string;
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | export function SelectField({
  20 | 	label,
  21 | 	description,
  22 | 	required,
  23 | 	disabled,
  24 | 	options,
  25 | 	placeholder = "Select an option"
  26 | }: SelectFieldProps) {
  27 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
  28 | 	const isTouched = useSelector(field.store, s => s.meta.isTouched);
  29 | 	const isValid = useSelector(field.store, s => s.meta.isValid);
  30 | 	const value = useSelector(field.store, s => s.value) as string;
  31 | 
  32 | 	return (
  33 | 		<FormFieldSet>
  34 | 			<FormField>
  35 | 				<FieldLabel htmlFor={field.name}>
  36 | 					{label}
  37 | 					{required && " *"}
  38 | 				</FieldLabel>
  39 | 				<Select
  40 | 					disabled={disabled}
  41 | 					onOpenChange={open => {
  42 | 						if (!open) field.handleBlur();
  43 | 					}}
  44 | 					onValueChange={field.handleChange}
  45 | 					value={value}
  46 | 				>
  47 | 					<SelectTrigger
  48 | 						aria-invalid={isTouched && !isValid}
  49 | 						id={field.name}
  50 | 					>
  51 | 						<SelectValue placeholder={placeholder} />
  52 | 					</SelectTrigger>
  53 | 					<SelectContent>
  54 | 						{options.map(opt => (
  55 | 							<SelectItem
  56 | 								key={opt.value}
  57 | 								value={opt.value}
  58 | 							>
  59 | 								{opt.label}
  60 | 							</SelectItem>
  61 | 						))}
  62 | 					</SelectContent>
  63 | 				</Select>
  64 | 				{description && <FieldDescription>{description}</FieldDescription>}
  65 | 			</FormField>
  66 | 			<FormFieldError />
  67 | 		</FormFieldSet>
  68 | 	);
  69 | }
  70 | 
  71 | export const FormSelectField = createFormField(SelectField);

```

`components/ui/fields/slider-field.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
   2 | 
   3 | import { FieldDescription, FieldLabel } from "@/components/ui/field";
   4 | import { createFormField, FormField, FormFieldSet, useFieldContext } from "@/components/ui/form-context";
   5 | import { Slider } from "@/components/ui/slider";
   6 | 
   7 | interface SliderFieldProps {
   8 | 	label: string; // Keep this prop
   9 | 	description?: string;
  10 | 	min?: number;
  11 | 	max?: number;
  12 | 	step?: number;
  13 | }
  14 | 
  15 | export function SliderField({ label, description, min = 0, max = 100, step = 1 }: SliderFieldProps) {
  16 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
  17 | 	const value = (useSelector(field.store, s => s.value) as number) ?? min;
  18 | 
  19 | 	return (
  20 | 		<FormFieldSet>
  21 | 			<FormField>
  22 | 				<FieldLabel>{label}</FieldLabel>
  23 | 				<div className='px-1'>
  24 | 					<Slider
  25 | 						max={max}
  26 | 						min={min}
  27 | 						onBlur={field.handleBlur}
  28 | 						onValueChange={v => field.handleChange(v[0])}
  29 | 						step={step}
  30 | 						value={[value]}
  31 | 					/>
  32 | 					<div className='mt-1 flex justify-between text-muted-foreground text-xs tabular-nums'>
  33 | 						<span>{min}</span>
  34 | 						<span className='font-medium'>
  35 | 							{value}/{max}
  36 | 						</span>
  37 | 						<span>{max}</span>
  38 | 					</div>
  39 | 				</div>
  40 | 				{description && <FieldDescription>{description}</FieldDescription>}
  41 | 			</FormField>
  42 | 		</FormFieldSet>
  43 | 	);
  44 | }
  45 | 
  46 | export const FormSliderField = createFormField(SliderField);

```

```tsx
  11 | }
```

`components/ui/fields/text-field.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
   2 | 
   3 | import { FieldDescription, FieldLabel } from "@/components/ui/field";
   4 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
   5 | import { Spinner } from "@/components/ui/spinner";
   6 | 
   7 | import { createFormField, FormField, FormFieldError, FormFieldSet, useFieldContext } from "../form-context";
   8 | 
   9 | interface TextFieldProps extends Omit<React.ComponentProps<"input">, "value" | "onChange" | "onBlur"> {
  10 | 	label: string; // Keep this prop
  11 | 	description?: string;
  12 | 	required?: boolean;
  13 | 	type?: "text" | "email" | "password" | "tel" | "url" | "number";
  14 | }
  15 | 
  16 | export function TextField({ label, description, required, type = "text", className, ...inputProps }: TextFieldProps) {
  17 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
  18 | 	const isTouched = useSelector(field.store, s => s.meta.isTouched);
  19 | 	const isValid = useSelector(field.store, s => s.meta.isValid);
  20 | 	const isValidating = useSelector(field.store, s => s.meta.isValidating);
  21 | 	const value = useSelector(field.store, s => s.value) as string | number;
  22 | 
  23 | 	return (
  24 | 		<FormFieldSet>
  25 | 			<FormField>
  26 | 				<FieldLabel htmlFor={field.name}>
  27 | 					{label}
  28 | 					{required && " *"}
  29 | 				</FieldLabel>
  30 | 				<div className='relative'>
  31 | 					<Input
  32 | 						aria-invalid={isTouched && !isValid}
  33 | 						className={className}
  34 | 						id={field.name}
  35 | 						onBlur={field.handleBlur}
  36 | 						onChange={e => {
  37 | 							if (type === "number") {
  38 | 								const v = e.target.value;
  39 | 								field.handleChange(v === "" ? "" : Number.parseFloat(v));
  40 | 							} else {
  41 | 								field.handleChange(e.target.value);
  42 | 							}
  43 | 						}}
  44 | 						type={type}
  45 | 						value={value ?? ""}
  46 | 						{...inputProps}
  47 | 					/>
  48 | 					{isValidating && (
  49 | 						<div className='absolute top-1/2 right-3 -translate-y-1/2'>
  50 | 							<Spinner className='h-4 w-4' />
  51 | 						</div>
  52 | 					)}
  53 | 				</div>
  54 | 				{description && <FieldDescription>{description}</FieldDescription>}
  55 | 			</FormField>
  56 | 			<FormFieldError />
  57 | 		</FormFieldSet>
  58 | 	);
  59 | }
  60 | 
  61 | export const FormTextField = createFormField(TextField);

```

`components/ui/fields/textarea-field.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
   2 | 
   3 | import { FieldDescription, FieldLabel } from "@/components/ui/field";
   4 | import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
   5 | 
   6 | import { createFormField, FormField, FormFieldError, FormFieldSet, useFieldContext } from "../form-context";
   7 | 
   8 | interface TextareaFieldProps
   9 | 	extends Omit<
  10 | 		React.ComponentProps<"textarea">,
  11 | 		"value" | "onChange" | "onBlur" // Keep these props
  12 | 	> {
  13 | 	label: string;
  14 | 	description?: string;
  15 | 	required?: boolean;
  16 | 	maxLength?: number;
  17 | 	showCount?: boolean;
  18 | }
  19 | 
  20 | export function TextareaField({
  21 | 	label,
  22 | 	description,
  23 | 	required,
  24 | 	maxLength,
  25 | 	showCount = !!maxLength,
  26 | 	className,
  27 | 	...textareaProps
  28 | }: TextareaFieldProps) {
  29 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
  30 | 	const isTouched = useSelector(field.store, s => s.meta.isTouched);
  31 | 	const isValid = useSelector(field.store, s => s.meta.isValid);
  32 | 	const value = (useSelector(field.store, s => s.value) as string) ?? "";
  33 | 
  34 | 	return (
  35 | 		<FormFieldSet>
  36 | 			<FormField>
  37 | 				<FieldLabel htmlFor={field.name}>
  38 | 					{label}
  39 | 					{required && " *"}
  40 | 				</FieldLabel>
  41 | 				<Textarea
  42 | 					aria-invalid={isTouched && !isValid}
  43 | 					className={className}
  44 | 					id={field.name}
  45 | 					maxLength={maxLength}
  46 | 					onBlur={field.handleBlur}
  47 | 					onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
  48 | 					value={value}
  49 | 					{...textareaProps}
  50 | 				/>
  51 | 				{showCount && (
  52 | 					<div className='text-right text-muted-foreground text-xs tabular-nums'>
  53 | 						{value.length}
  54 | 						{maxLength ? ` / ${maxLength}` : ""}
  55 | 					</div>
  56 | 				)}
  57 | 				{description && <FieldDescription>{description}</FieldDescription>}
  58 | 			</FormField>
  59 | 			<FormFieldError />
  60 | 		</FormFieldSet>
  61 | 	);
  62 | }
  63 | 
  64 | export const FormTextareaField = createFormField(TextareaField);
```
