`components/ui/file-preview.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import type { FC } from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | import { Icons } from "@/components/icons";
   4 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
   5 | 
   6 | export interface UploadedFile {
   7 | 	description?: string;
   8 | 	id: string;
   9 | 	isUploading?: boolean;
  10 | 	name: string;
  11 | 	type: string;
  12 | 	url?: string;
  13 | }
  14 | 
  15 | export interface FilePreviewProps {
  16 | 	className?: string;
  17 | 	files: UploadedFile[];
  18 | 	onRemove?: (id: string) => void;
  19 | 	variant?: "default" | "inverted";
  20 | }
  21 | 
  22 | const getFileExtension = (fileName: string): string => {
  23 | 	const parts = fileName.split(".");
  24 | 	return parts.length > 1 ? (parts.at(-1) ?? "") : "";
  25 | };
  26 | 
  27 | const getFileIcon = (fileType: string, fileName: string) => {
  28 | 	const extension = getFileExtension(fileName).toLowerCase();
  29 | 	const iconProps = { size: 24 };
  30 | 
  31 | 	if (fileType.startsWith("image/"))
  32 | 		return (
  33 | 			<Icons.media
  34 | 				{...iconProps}
  35 | 				className='text-emerald-500 dark:text-emerald-400'
  36 | 			/>
  37 | 		);
  38 | 
  39 | 	if (fileType === "application/pdf" || extension === "pdf")
  40 | 		return (
  41 | 			<Icons.fileTypePdf
  42 | 				{...iconProps}
  43 | 				className='text-red-500 dark:text-red-400'
  44 | 			/>
  45 | 		);
  46 | 
  47 | 	if (
  48 | 		["doc", "docx", "odt", "rtf"].includes(extension) ||
  49 | 		fileType.includes("wordprocessing") ||
  50 | 		fileType.includes("msword")
  51 | 	)
  52 | 		return (
  53 | 			<Icons.fileTypeDoc
  54 | 				{...iconProps}
  55 | 				className='text-blue-500 dark:text-blue-400'
  56 | 			/>
  57 | 		);
  58 | 
  59 | 	if (
  60 | 		["xls", "xlsx", "csv", "ods"].includes(extension) ||
  61 | 		fileType.includes("spreadsheet") ||
  62 | 		fileType.includes("excel")
  63 | 	)
  64 | 		return (
  65 | 			<Icons.fileTypeXls
  66 | 				{...iconProps}
  67 | 				className='text-green-500 dark:text-green-400'
  68 | 			/>
  69 | 		);
  70 | 
  71 | 	if (["txt", "md"].includes(extension) || fileType === "text/plain")
  72 | 		return (
  73 | 			<Icons.post
  74 | 				{...iconProps}
  75 | 				className='text-zinc-500 dark:text-zinc-400'
  76 | 			/>
  77 | 		);
  78 | 
  79 | 	if (
  80 | 		["js", "ts", "jsx", "tsx", "py", "java", "c", "cpp", "html", "css"].includes(extension) ||
  81 | 		fileType.includes("javascript") ||
  82 | 		fileType.includes("typescript")
  83 | 	)
  84 | 		return (
  85 | 			<Icons.code
  86 | 				{...iconProps}
  87 | 				className='text-yellow-500 dark:text-yellow-400'
  88 | 			/>
  89 | 		);
  90 | 
  91 | 	if (["json", "xml", "yaml", "yml"].includes(extension))
  92 | 		return (
  93 | 			<Icons.code
  94 | 				{...iconProps}
  95 | 				className='text-zinc-500 dark:text-zinc-400'
  96 | 			/>
  97 | 		);
  98 | 
  99 | 	if (fileType.startsWith("video/") || ["mp4", "avi", "mov", "mkv"].includes(extension))
 100 | 		return (
 101 | 			<Icons.video
 102 | 				{...iconProps}
 103 | 				className='text-purple-500 dark:text-purple-400'
 104 | 			/>
 105 | 		);
 106 | 
 107 | 	if (fileType.startsWith("audio/") || ["mp3", "wav", "ogg"].includes(extension))
 108 | 		return (
 109 | 			<Icons.music
 110 | 				{...iconProps}
 111 | 				className='text-pink-500 dark:text-pink-400'
 112 | 			/>
 113 | 		);
 114 | 
 115 | 	if (
 116 | 		["zip", "rar", "tar", "gz", "7z"].includes(extension) ||
 117 | 		fileType.includes("archive") ||
 118 | 		fileType.includes("compressed")
 119 | 	)
 120 | 		return (
 121 | 			<Icons.fileZip
 122 | 				{...iconProps}
 123 | 				className='text-amber-500 dark:text-amber-400'
 124 | 			/>
 125 | 		);
 126 | 
 127 | 	return (
 128 | 		<Icons.page
 129 | 			{...iconProps}
 130 | 			className='text-zinc-500 dark:text-zinc-400'
 131 | 		/>
 132 | 	);
 133 | };
 134 | 
 135 | const getFormattedFileType = (fileType: string, fileName: string): string => {
 136 | 	const ext = getFileExtension(fileName).toUpperCase();
 137 | 
 138 | 	if (fileType.includes("msword") || fileType.includes("wordprocessing")) return "DOC";
 139 | 
 140 | 	if (fileType.includes("spreadsheet") || fileType.includes("excel")) return "SPREADSHEET";
 141 | 
 142 | 	const typePart = fileType.split("/")[1];
 143 | 
 144 | 	if (!typePart || typePart === "octet-stream") {
 145 | 		return ext || "FILE";
 146 | 	}
 147 | 
 148 | 	const cleanType = typePart
 149 | 		.replace("vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.", "")
 150 | 		.replace("vnd.ms-", "")
 151 | 		.replace("x-", "")
 152 | 		.replace("document.", "")
 153 | 		.replace("presentation.", "")
 154 | 		.replace("application.", "")
 155 | 		.split(".")[0];
 156 | 
 157 | 	return cleanType?.toUpperCase().slice(0, 8) || "FILE";
 158 | };
 159 | 
 160 | export const FilePreview: FC<FilePreviewProps> = ({ files, onRemove, className, variant = "default" }) => {
 161 | 	const isInverted = variant === "inverted";
 162 | 	if (files.length === 0) return null;
 163 | 
 164 | 	return (
 165 | 		<div className={cn("flex w-full flex-col gap-2 rounded-xl p-2", className)}>
 166 | 			<div className='flex w-full flex-wrap gap-2'>
 167 | 				{files.map(file => (
 168 | 					<div
 169 | 						className={cn(
 170 | 							"group/file relative flex items-center rounded-xl transition-all",
 171 | 							isInverted
 172 | 								? "bg-primary-foreground/15 hover:bg-primary-foreground/20"
 173 | 								: "bg-muted hover:bg-muted/80",
 174 | 							file.type.startsWith("image/") && file.url
 175 | 								? "h-14 w-14 justify-center"
 176 | 								: "min-w-[180px] max-w-[220px] p-2 pr-8"
 177 | 						)}
 178 | 						key={file.id}
 179 | 					>
 180 | 						{file.isUploading && (
 181 | 							<div className='absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-black/30'>
 182 | 								<Icons.spinner
 183 | 									className='animate-spin text-white'
 184 | 									size={20}
 185 | 								/>
 186 | 							</div>
 187 | 						)}
 188 | 
 189 | 						{onRemove && (
 190 | 							<button
 191 | 								aria-label={`Remove ${file.name}`}
 192 | 								className={cn(
 193 | 									"absolute -top-1 -right-1 z-10 flex h-5 w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-full",
 194 | 									"scale-75 opacity-0 transition-all duration-150 group-hover/file:scale-100 group-hover/file:opacity-100",
 195 | 									"cursor-pointer bg-muted-foreground/60 hover:bg-muted-foreground/80"
 196 | 								)}
 197 | 								onClick={() => onRemove(file.id)}
 198 | 								type='button'
 199 | 							>
 200 | 								<Icons.close
 201 | 									className='text-white'
 202 | 									size={10}
 203 | 								/>
 204 | 							</button>
 205 | 						)}
 206 | 
 207 | 						{file.type.startsWith("image/") && file.url ? (
 208 | 							<div className='h-12 w-12 overflow-hidden rounded-md'>
 209 | 								<img
 210 | 									alt={file.name}
 211 | 									className='h-full w-full object-cover'
 212 | 									height={48}
 213 | 									src={file.url}
 214 | 									width={48}
 215 | 								/>
 216 | 							</div>
 217 | 						) : (
 218 | 							<>
 219 | 								<div
 220 | 									className={cn(
 221 | 										"mr-3 flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-lg",
 222 | 										isInverted ? "bg-primary-foreground/10" : "bg-muted-foreground/10"
 223 | 									)}
 224 | 								>
 225 | 									{getFileIcon(file.type, file.name)}
 226 | 								</div>
 227 | 								<div className='flex min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col'>
 228 | 									<p
 229 | 										className={cn(
 230 | 											"truncate font-medium text-sm",
 231 | 											isInverted ? "text-primary-foreground" : "text-foreground"
 232 | 										)}
 233 | 									>
 234 | 										{file.name.length > 18 ? `${file.name.slice(0, 15)}...` : file.name}
 235 | 									</p>
 236 | 									<span
 237 | 										className={cn(
 238 | 											"text-xs",
 239 | 											isInverted ? "text-primary-foreground/70" : "text-muted-foreground"
 240 | 										)}
 241 | 									>
 242 | 										{getFormattedFileType(file.type, file.name)}
 243 | 									</span>
 244 | 								</div>
 245 | 							</>
 246 | 						)}
 247 | 					</div>
 248 | 				))}
 249 | 			</div>
 250 | 		</div>
 251 | 	);
 252 | };

```

`components/ui/form-context.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | /**
   2 |  * form-context.tsx — Shared primitives for the TanStack Form + shadcn/ui integration.
   3 |  *
   4 |  * This file provides:
   5 |  *  - React contexts created by TanStack Form (fieldContext, formContext)
   6 |  *  - Enhanced useFieldContext with accessibility IDs and error state
   7 |  *  - Structural layout components (FormFieldSet, FormField, FormFieldError)
   8 |  *  - createFormField() — wraps a base field into a flat, self-wiring component
   9 |  *  - FieldConfig types — validators, listeners, asyncDebounceMs
  10 |  *  - Type-safe name utilities (WithTypedName, typedField)
  11 |  *
  12 |  * Consumed by:
  13 |  *  - fields/*.tsx  (import structural components + createFormField)
  14 |  *  - tanstack-form.tsx (import contexts + re-export everything)
  15 |  *
  16 |  * This file must NOT import from tanstack-form.tsx or fields/*.tsx to avoid
  17 |  * circular dependencies.
  18 |  */
  19 | 
  20 | import type { AnyFieldApi, DeepKeys } from "@tanstack/form-core";
  21 | import { createFormHookContexts, revalidateLogic, useStore as useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-form";
  22 | import type { VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
  23 | import * as React from "react";
  24 | 
  25 | import {
  26 | 	Field as DefaultField,
  27 | 	FieldError as DefaultFieldError,
  28 | 	FieldSet as DefaultFieldSet,
  29 | 	type fieldVariants
  30 | } from "@/components/ui/field";
  31 | import { Textarea as ShadcnTextarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
  32 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
  33 | 
  34 | import { Label } from "./label";
  35 | 
  36 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  37 | // 1. Contextso
  38 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  39 | 
  40 | const { fieldContext, formContext, useFieldContext: _useFieldContext, useFormContext } = createFormHookContexts();
  41 | 
  42 | type FormItemContextValue = {
  43 | 	id: string;
  44 | };
  45 | 
  46 | const FormItemContext = React.createContext<FormItemContextValue>({} as FormItemContextValue);
  47 | 
  48 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  49 | // 2. Enhanced useFieldContext
  50 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  51 | 
  52 | const useFieldContext = () => {
  53 | 	const { id } = React.useContext(FormItemContext);
  54 | 	const fieldCtx = _useFieldContext();
  55 | 
  56 | 	if (!fieldCtx) {
  57 | 		throw new Error("useFieldContext should be used within <AppField>");
  58 | 	}
  59 | 
  60 | 	const { name, store, ...rest } = fieldCtx;
  61 | 	const errors = useSelector(store, state => state.meta.errors);
  62 | 
  63 | 	return {
  64 | 		id,
  65 | 		name,
  66 | 		formItemId: `${id}-form-item`,
  67 | 		formDescriptionId: `${id}-form-item-description`,
  68 | 		formMessageId: `${id}-form-item-message`,
  69 | 		errors,
  70 | 		store,
  71 | 		...rest
  72 | 	};
  73 | };
  74 | function SelectField({ label, children, disabled }: { label: string; children: React.ReactNode; disabled?: boolean }) {
  75 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
  76 | 
  77 | 	return (
  78 | 		<div className='space-y-1'>
  79 | 			<label
  80 | 				className='block font-medium text-gray-700 text-sm'
  81 | 				htmlFor={field.formItemId}
  82 | 			>
  83 | 				{label}
  84 | 			</label>
  85 | 			<select
  86 | 				className='w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500'
  87 | 				disabled={disabled}
  88 | 				id={field.formItemId}
  89 | 				onBlur={field.handleBlur}
  90 | 				onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
  91 | 				value={useSelector(field.store, state => state.value) as string}
  92 | 			>
  93 | 				{children}
  94 | 			</select>
  95 | 			{field.errors.length > 0 && <p className='text-red-600 text-sm'>{field.errors.join(", ")}</p>}
  96 | 		</div>
  97 | 	);
  98 | }
  99 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 100 | // 3. Structural field components
 101 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 102 | 
 103 | function FieldSet({ className, children, ...props }: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"fieldset">) {
 104 | 	const id = React.useId();
 105 | 
 106 | 	return (
 107 | 		<FormItemContext.Provider value={{ id }}>
 108 | 			<DefaultFieldSet
 109 | 				className={cn("grid gap-1", className)}
 110 | 				{...props}
 111 | 			>
 112 | 				{children}
 113 | 			</DefaultFieldSet>
 114 | 		</FormItemContext.Provider>
 115 | 	);
 116 | }
 117 | 
 118 | function Field({
 119 | 	children,
 120 | 	...props
 121 | }: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof DefaultField> & VariantProps<typeof fieldVariants>) {
 122 | 	const { errors, formItemId, formDescriptionId, formMessageId, store } = useFieldContext();
 123 | 	const form = useFormContext();
 124 | 	const isTouched = useSelector(store, state => state.meta.isTouched);
 125 | 	// Show errors after user interaction OR after first submit attempt
 126 | 	const hasSubmitted = useSelector(form.store, s => s.submissionAttempts > 0);
 127 | 	const hasVisibleErrors = errors.length > 0 && (isTouched || hasSubmitted);
 128 | 
 129 | 	return (
 130 | 		<DefaultField
 131 | 			aria-describedby={hasVisibleErrors ? `${formDescriptionId} ${formMessageId}` : `${formDescriptionId}`}
 132 | 			aria-invalid={hasVisibleErrors}
 133 | 			data-invalid={hasVisibleErrors}
 134 | 			id={formItemId}
 135 | 			{...props}
 136 | 		>
 137 | 			{children}
 138 | 		</DefaultField>
 139 | 	);
 140 | }
 141 | 
 142 | function FieldError({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"p">) {
 143 | 	const { errors, formMessageId, store } = useFieldContext();
 144 | 	const form = useFormContext();
 145 | 	const isTouched = useSelector(store, state => state.meta.isTouched);
 146 | 	const hasSubmitted = useSelector(form.store, s => s.submissionAttempts > 0);
 147 | 	if (!(errors.length > 0 && (isTouched || hasSubmitted))) return null;
 148 | 	return (
 149 | 		<DefaultFieldError
 150 | 			className={cn("text-destructive text-sm", className)}
 151 | 			data-slot='form-message'
 152 | 			id={formMessageId}
 153 | 			{...props}
 154 | 			errors={errors}
 155 | 		/>
 156 | 	);
 157 | }
 158 | 
 159 | function ErrorMessages({ errors }: { errors: Array<string | { message: string }> }) {
 160 | 	return (
 161 | 		<>
 162 | 			{errors.map(error => (
 163 | 				<div
 164 | 					className='mt-1 font-bold text-red-500'
 165 | 					key={typeof error === "string" ? error : error.message}
 166 | 				>
 167 | 					{typeof error === "string" ? error : error.message}
 168 | 				</div>
 169 | 			))}
 170 | 		</>
 171 | 	);
 172 | }
 173 | 
 174 | function TextArea({ label, rows = 3 }: { label: string; rows?: number }) {
 175 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
 176 | 	const errors = useSelector(field.store, state => state.meta.errors);
 177 | 
 178 | 	return (
 179 | 		<div>
 180 | 			<Label
 181 | 				className='mb-2 font-bold text-xl'
 182 | 				htmlFor={label}
 183 | 			>
 184 | 				{label}
 185 | 			</Label>
 186 | 			<ShadcnTextarea
 187 | 				id={label}
 188 | 				onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 189 | 				onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 190 | 				rows={rows}
 191 | 				value={useSelector(field.store, state => state.value) as string}
 192 | 			/>
 193 | 			{useSelector(field.store, state => state.meta.isTouched) && <ErrorMessages errors={errors} />}
 194 | 		</div>
 195 | 	);
 196 | }
 197 | 
 198 | /**
 199 |  * Renders form-level validation errors (cross-field errors).
 200 |  * Place inside form.AppForm to show errors from form-level validators.
 201 |  *
 202 |  * @example
 203 |  * ```tsx
 204 |  * <form.AppForm>
 205 |  *   <form.Form>
 206 |  *     <FormErrors />
 207 |  *     ...fields...
 208 |  *   </form.Form>
 209 |  * </form.AppForm>
 210 |  * ```
 211 |  */
 212 | function FormErrors({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
 213 | 	const form = useFormContext();
 214 | 	return (
 215 | 		<form.Subscribe selector={state => state.errors}>
 216 | 			{errors => {
 217 | 				if (errors.length === 0) return null;
 218 | 				return (
 219 | 					<div
 220 | 						className={cn("rounded-md border bg-destructive/10 p-3 text-destructive text-sm", className)}
 221 | 						role='alert'
 222 | 						{...props}
 223 | 					>
 224 | 						<ul className='list-disc space-y-1 pl-4'>
 225 | 							{errors.map((error, i) => (
 226 | 								<li key={i}>{String(error)}</li>
 227 | 							))}
 228 | 						</ul>
 229 | 					</div>
 230 | 				);
 231 | 			}}
 232 | 		</form.Subscribe>
 233 | 	);
 234 | }
 235 | 
 236 | /**
 237 |  * Scrolls to the first field with a validation error.
 238 |  * Call after a failed form.handleSubmit() to guide the user to the problem.
 239 |  *
 240 |  * @example
 241 |  * ```tsx
 242 |  * onSubmit: ({ value }) => { ... },
 243 |  * onSubmitInvalid: () => scrollToFirstError(),
 244 |  * ```
 245 |  */
 246 | function scrollToFirstError() {
 247 | 	// Fields with errors have data-invalid="true" set by the FormField component
 248 | 	requestAnimationFrame(() => {
 249 | 		const firstError = document.querySelector('[data-invalid="true"]');
 250 | 		if (firstError) {
 251 | 			firstError.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
 252 | 			// Focus the first focusable element within the error field
 253 | 			const focusable = firstError.querySelector<HTMLElement>("input, textarea, select, button, [tabindex]");
 254 | 			focusable?.focus({ preventScroll: true });
 255 | 		}
 256 | 	});
 257 | }
 258 | 
 259 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 260 | // 4. Field-level configuration types
 261 | //
 262 | //    These mirror TanStack Form's field options that get forwarded to
 263 | //    form.Field when using the flat FormXxxField pattern via createFormField.
 264 | //    Validator values accept Zod schemas (StandardSchemaV1) or plain functions.
 265 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 266 | 
 267 | /** Field-level validators forwarded to form.Field */
 268 | type FieldValidatorConfig = {
 269 | 	/** Sync validator — runs when the field loses focus. Accepts a function or Zod schema. */
 270 | 	onBlur?: unknown;
 271 | 	/** Async validator — runs on blur. */
 272 | 	onBlurAsync?: unknown;
 273 | 	/** Debounce (ms) for onBlurAsync. */
 274 | 	onBlurAsyncDebounceMs?: number;
 275 | 	/** Re-run onBlur/onBlurAsync when these other fields blur. */
 276 | 	onBlurListenTo?: string[];
 277 | 	/** Sync validator — runs on every value change. Accepts a function or Zod schema. */
 278 | 	onChange?: unknown;
 279 | 	/** Async validator — runs on value change (debounced). */
 280 | 	onChangeAsync?: unknown;
 281 | 	/** Debounce (ms) for onChangeAsync. */
 282 | 	onChangeAsyncDebounceMs?: number;
 283 | 	/** Re-run onChange/onChangeAsync when these other fields change (linked validation). */
 284 | 	onChangeListenTo?: string[];
 285 | 	/** Sync validator — runs on field mount. */
 286 | 	onMount?: unknown;
 287 | 	/** Sync validator — runs on form submission. */
 288 | 	onSubmit?: unknown;
 289 | 	/** Async validator — runs on form submission. */
 290 | 	onSubmitAsync?: unknown;
 291 | };
 292 | 
 293 | /** Field-level side-effect listeners forwarded to form.Field */
 294 | type FieldListenerConfig = {
 295 | 	/** Fires when the field loses focus. */
 296 | 	onBlur?: (props: { value: unknown; fieldApi: AnyFieldApi }) => void;
 297 | 	/** Debounce (ms) for the onBlur listener. */
 298 | 	onBlurDebounceMs?: number;
 299 | 	/** Fires after the field value changes. Use for side effects (e.g., resetting dependent fields). */
 300 | 	onChange?: (props: { value: unknown; fieldApi: AnyFieldApi }) => void;
 301 | 	/** Debounce (ms) for the onChange listener. */
 302 | 	onChangeDebounceMs?: number;
 303 | 	/** Fires when the field mounts. */
 304 | 	onMount?: (props: { value: unknown; fieldApi: AnyFieldApi }) => void;
 305 | 	/** Fires on form submission. */
 306 | 	onSubmit?: (props: { value: unknown; fieldApi: AnyFieldApi }) => void;
 307 | };
 308 | 
 309 | /**
 310 |  * Configuration forwarded to TanStack Form's form.Field component.
 311 |  * Use with createFormField composed components (FormTextField, etc.)
 312 |  * to enable field-level validation, async validation, and side-effect listeners.
 313 |  *
 314 |  * For type-safe field names, use form.AppField render-prop pattern instead.
 315 |  */
 316 | type FieldConfig = {
 317 | 	/** Default debounce (ms) for all async validators on this field. */
 318 | 	asyncDebounceMs?: number;
 319 | 	/** Default value for this field (useful for dynamically added fields). */
 320 | 	defaultValue?: unknown;
 321 | 	/** Side-effect listeners (onChange, onBlur, onMount, onSubmit). */
 322 | 	listeners?: FieldListenerConfig;
 323 | 	/** Set to 'array' for array fields (enables pushValue, removeValue, etc.). */
 324 | 	mode?: "value" | "array";
 325 | 	/** Field-level validators (onBlur, onChange, onSubmit + async variants). */
 326 | 	validators?: FieldValidatorConfig;
 327 | };
 328 | 
 329 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 330 | // 5. createFormField — lifts a field component into a flat form-level component
 331 | //
 332 | //    Forwards TanStack Form's field-level config (validators, listeners)
 333 | //    to form.Field while keeping the ergonomic flat API.
 334 | //
 335 | //    For type-safe field names, use form.AppField render-prop pattern.
 336 | //    The flat FormXxxField pattern trades name type-safety for ergonomics.
 337 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 338 | 
 339 | type FormFieldSlot = React.ComponentType<{
 340 | 	name: string;
 341 | 	validators?: FieldValidatorConfig | undefined;
 342 | 	asyncDebounceMs?: number | undefined;
 343 | 	listeners?: FieldListenerConfig | undefined;
 344 | 	mode?: "value" | "array" | undefined;
 345 | 	defaultValue?: unknown | undefined;
 346 | 	children: (fieldApi: AnyFieldApi) => React.ReactNode;
 347 | }>;
 348 | 
 349 | function createFormField<P extends object>(FieldComponent: React.ComponentType<P>) {
 350 | 	function ComposedFormField({
 351 | 		name,
 352 | 		validators,
 353 | 		asyncDebounceMs,
 354 | 		listeners,
 355 | 		mode,
 356 | 		defaultValue,
 357 | 		...props
 358 | 	}: { name: string } & FieldConfig &
 359 | 		Omit<P, "name" | "validators" | "asyncDebounceMs" | "listeners" | "mode" | "defaultValue">) {
 360 | 		const form = useFormContext();
 361 | 		const FieldSlot = form.Field as unknown as FormFieldSlot;
 362 | 		return (
 363 | 			<FieldSlot
 364 | 				asyncDebounceMs={asyncDebounceMs}
 365 | 				defaultValue={defaultValue}
 366 | 				listeners={listeners}
 367 | 				mode={mode}
 368 | 				name={name}
 369 | 				validators={validators}
 370 | 			>
 371 | 				{fieldApi => (
 372 | 					<fieldContext.Provider value={fieldApi as AnyFieldApi}>
 373 | 						<FieldComponent {...(props as unknown as P)} />
 374 | 					</fieldContext.Provider>
 375 | 				)}
 376 | 			</FieldSlot>
 377 | 		);
 378 | 	}
 379 | 	ComposedFormField.displayName = `FormField(${FieldComponent.displayName ?? FieldComponent.name})`;
 380 | 	return ComposedFormField;
 381 | }
 382 | 
 383 | function DateField({ label, min }: { label: string; min?: string }) {
 384 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
 385 | 	const value = useSelector(field.store, state => state.value);
 386 | 
 387 | 	return (
 388 | 		<div className='space-y-1'>
 389 | 			<Label htmlFor={field.formItemId}>{label}</Label>
 390 | 			<input
 391 | 				className='w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500'
 392 | 				id={field.formItemId}
 393 | 				min={min}
 394 | 				onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 395 | 				onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 396 | 				type='date'
 397 | 				value={
 398 | 					value instanceof Date
 399 | 						? value.toISOString().split("T")[0]
 400 | 						: (value as string | number | readonly string[]) || ""
 401 | 				}
 402 | 			/>
 403 | 			{field.errors.length > 0 && <p className='text-red-600 text-sm'>{field.errors.join(", ")}</p>}
 404 | 		</div>
 405 | 	);
 406 | }
 407 | 
 408 | function TimeField({ label }: { label: string }) {
 409 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
 410 | 	const value = useSelector(field.store, state => state.value);
 411 | 
 412 | 	return (
 413 | 		<div className='space-y-1'>
 414 | 			<Label htmlFor={field.formItemId}>{label}</Label>
 415 | 			<input
 416 | 				className='w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500'
 417 | 				id={field.formItemId}
 418 | 				onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 419 | 				onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 420 | 				type='time'
 421 | 				value={(value as string | number | readonly string[]) || ""}
 422 | 			/>
 423 | 			{field.errors.length > 0 && <p className='text-red-600 text-sm'>{field.errors.join(", ")}</p>}
 424 | 		</div>
 425 | 	);
 426 | }
 427 | 
 428 | function NumberField({ label, min, max, step }: { label: string; min?: number; max?: number; step?: number }) {
 429 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
 430 | 	const value = useSelector(field.store, state => state.value);
 431 | 
 432 | 	return (
 433 | 		<div className='space-y-1'>
 434 | 			<Label htmlFor={field.formItemId}>{label}</Label>
 435 | 			<input
 436 | 				className='w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500'
 437 | 				id={field.formItemId}
 438 | 				max={max}
 439 | 				min={min}
 440 | 				onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 441 | 				onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.valueAsNumber)}
 442 | 				step={step}
 443 | 				type='number'
 444 | 				value={(value as string | number | readonly string[]) ?? ""}
 445 | 			/>
 446 | 			{field.errors.length > 0 && <p className='text-red-600 text-sm'>{field.errors.join(", ")}</p>}
 447 | 		</div>
 448 | 	);
 449 | }
 450 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 451 | // 6. Type-safe field name utilities
 452 | //
 453 | //    Standalone FormXxxField components have `name: string` by default because
 454 | //    they don't know which form they'll be used in at definition time.
 455 | //
 456 | //    These utilities narrow `name` to the form's actual field paths using
 457 | //    TanStack Form's DeepKeys<TValues>, giving full autocomplete + type errors.
 458 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 459 | 
 460 | /**
 461 |  * Narrows a composed field component's `name` prop to `DeepKeys<TValues>`.
 462 |  * Used internally by useFormFields and typedField.
 463 |  */
 464 | type WithTypedName<C, TValues> =
 465 | 	C extends React.ComponentType<infer P>
 466 | 		? P extends { name: string }
 467 | 			? React.ComponentType<Omit<P, "name"> & { name: DeepKeys<TValues> & string }>
 468 | 			: C
 469 | 		: C;
 470 | 
 471 | /**
 472 |  * Narrows any single composed field component's `name` prop to type-safe field paths.
 473 |  * Use for custom fields not included in useFormFields.
 474 |  *
 475 |  * @example
 476 |  * ```tsx
 477 |  * const narrow = typedField<MyFormValues>();
 478 |  * const TypedDatePicker = narrow(FormDatePickerField);
 479 |  * <TypedDatePicker name="birthDate" />  // ✅ type-safe
 480 |  * ```
 481 |  */
 482 | function typedField<TValues extends Record<string, unknown>>() {
 483 | 	return <C extends React.ComponentType<{ name: string }>>(Component: C): WithTypedName<C, TValues> =>
 484 | 		Component as WithTypedName<C, TValues>;
 485 | }
 486 | 
 487 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 488 | // 7. Exports
 489 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 490 | 
 491 | export type { FieldConfig, FieldListenerConfig, FieldValidatorConfig, WithTypedName };
 492 | export {
 493 | 	createFormField,
 494 | 	DateField,
 495 | 	Field as FormField,
 496 | 	FieldError as FormFieldError,
 497 | 	FieldSet as FormFieldSet,
 498 | 	FormErrors,
 499 | 	fieldContext,
 500 | 	formContext,
 501 | 	NumberField,
 502 | 	revalidateLogic,
 503 | 	SelectField,
 504 | 	scrollToFirstError,
 505 | 	TextArea,
 506 | 	TimeField,
 507 | 	typedField,
 508 | 	useFieldContext,
 509 | 	useFormContext
 510 | };

```

`components/ui/form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import type { Label as LabelPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   2 | import { Slot } from "radix-ui";
   3 | import * as React from "react";
   4 | import {
   5 | 	Controller,
   6 | 	type ControllerProps,
   7 | 	type FieldPath,
   8 | 	type FieldValues,
   9 | 	FormProvider,
  10 | 	useFormContext,
  11 | 	useFormState
  12 | } from "react-hook-form";
  13 | 
  14 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  15 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
  16 | 
  17 | const Form = FormProvider;
  18 | 
  19 | type FormFieldContextValue<
  20 | 	TFieldValues extends FieldValues = FieldValues,
  21 | 	TName extends FieldPath<TFieldValues> = FieldPath<TFieldValues>
  22 | > = {
  23 | 	name: TName;
  24 | };
  25 | 
  26 | const FormFieldContext = React.createContext<FormFieldContextValue>({} as FormFieldContextValue);
  27 | 
  28 | const FormField = <
  29 | 	TFieldValues extends FieldValues = FieldValues,
  30 | 	TName extends FieldPath<TFieldValues> = FieldPath<TFieldValues>
  31 | >({
  32 | 	...props
  33 | }: ControllerProps<TFieldValues, TName>) => (
  34 | 	<FormFieldContext.Provider value={{ name: props.name }}>
  35 | 		<Controller {...props} />
  36 | 	</FormFieldContext.Provider>
  37 | );
  38 | 
  39 | const useFormField = () => {
  40 | 	const fieldContext = React.useContext(FormFieldContext);
  41 | 	const itemContext = React.useContext(FormItemContext);
  42 | 	const { getFieldState } = useFormContext();
  43 | 	const formState = useFormState({ name: fieldContext.name });
  44 | 	const fieldState = getFieldState(fieldContext.name, formState);
  45 | 
  46 | 	if (!fieldContext) {
  47 | 		throw new Error("useFormField should be used within <FormField>");
  48 | 	}
  49 | 
  50 | 	const { id } = itemContext;
  51 | 
  52 | 	return {
  53 | 		id,
  54 | 		name: fieldContext.name,
  55 | 		formItemId: `${id}-form-item`,
  56 | 		formDescriptionId: `${id}-form-item-description`,
  57 | 		formMessageId: `${id}-form-item-message`,
  58 | 		...fieldState
  59 | 	};
  60 | };
  61 | 
  62 | type FormItemContextValue = {
  63 | 	id: string;
  64 | };
  65 | 
  66 | const FormItemContext = React.createContext<FormItemContextValue>({} as FormItemContextValue);
  67 | 
  68 | function FormItem({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
  69 | 	const id = React.useId();
  70 | 
  71 | 	return (
  72 | 		<FormItemContext.Provider value={{ id }}>
  73 | 			<div
  74 | 				className={cn("grid gap-2", className)}
  75 | 				data-slot='form-item'
  76 | 				{...props}
  77 | 			/>
  78 | 		</FormItemContext.Provider>
  79 | 	);
  80 | }
  81 | 
  82 | function FormLabel({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof LabelPrimitive.Root>) {
  83 | 	const { error, formItemId } = useFormField();
  84 | 
  85 | 	return (
  86 | 		<Label
  87 | 			className={cn("data-[error=true]:text-destructive", className)}
  88 | 			data-error={!!error}
  89 | 			data-slot='form-label'
  90 | 			htmlFor={formItemId}
  91 | 			{...props}
  92 | 		/>
  93 | 	);
  94 | }
  95 | 
  96 | function FormControl({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof Slot.Root>) {
  97 | 	const { error, formItemId, formDescriptionId, formMessageId } = useFormField();
  98 | 
  99 | 	return (
 100 | 		<Slot.Root
 101 | 			aria-describedby={error ? `${formDescriptionId} ${formMessageId}` : `${formDescriptionId}`}
 102 | 			aria-invalid={!!error}
 103 | 			data-slot='form-control'
 104 | 			id={formItemId}
 105 | 			{...props}
 106 | 		/>
 107 | 	);
 108 | }
 109 | 
 110 | function FormDescription({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"p">) {
 111 | 	const { formDescriptionId } = useFormField();
 112 | 
 113 | 	return (
 114 | 		<p
 115 | 			className={cn("text-muted-foreground text-sm", className)}
 116 | 			data-slot='form-description'
 117 | 			id={formDescriptionId}
 118 | 			{...props}
 119 | 		/>
 120 | 	);
 121 | }
 122 | 
 123 | function FormMessage({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"p">) {
 124 | 	const { error, formMessageId } = useFormField();
 125 | 	const body = error ? String(error?.message ?? "") : props.children;
 126 | 
 127 | 	if (!body) {
 128 | 		return null;
 129 | 	}
 130 | 
 131 | 	return (
 132 | 		<p
 133 | 			className={cn("text-destructive text-sm", className)}
 134 | 			data-slot='form-message'
 135 | 			id={formMessageId}
 136 | 			{...props}
 137 | 		>
 138 | 			{body}
 139 | 		</p>
 140 | 	);
 141 | }
 142 | 
 143 | export { Form, FormControl, FormDescription, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormMessage, useFormField };

```

  10 | 		"disabled:opacity-50",

`components/ui/info-button.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import * as React from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Icons } from "@/components/icons";
   5 | import { type InfobarContent, useInfobar } from "@/components/ui/infobar";
   6 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
   7 | 
   8 | interface InfoButtonProps extends Omit<React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>, "content"> {
   9 | 	content: InfobarContent;
  10 | 	size?: "default" | "sm" | "lg" | "icon";
  11 | 	variant?: "default" | "ghost" | "outline" | "secondary" | "destructive" | "link";
  12 | }
  13 | 
  14 | export function InfoButton({ content, className, variant = "ghost", size = "icon", ...props }: InfoButtonProps) {
  15 | 	const { setContent, setOpen } = useInfobar();
  16 | 
  17 | 	// Set content on mount so the infobar has it ready, but don't force it open
  18 | 	const contentRef = React.useRef(content);
  19 | 	contentRef.current = content;
  20 | 
  21 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
  22 | 		setContent(contentRef.current);
  23 | 	}, [setContent]); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  24 | 
  25 | 	const handleClick = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => {
  26 | 		setContent(content);
  27 | 		setOpen(true);
  28 | 		props.onClick?.(e);
  29 | 	};
  30 | 
  31 | 	return (
  32 | 		<Button
  33 | 			aria-label='Show information'
  34 | 			className={cn("shrink-0", className)}
  35 | 			onClick={handleClick}
  36 | 			size={size}
  37 | 			variant={variant}
  38 | 			{...props}
  39 | 		>
  40 | 			<Icons.info className='h-4 w-4' />
  41 | 			<span className='sr-only'>Show information</span>
  42 | 		</Button>
  43 | 	);
  44 | }

```

`components/ui/infobar.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { Slot } from "@radix-ui/react-slot";
   2 | import { useLocation } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
   4 | import * as React from "react";
   5 | import { Icons } from "@/components/icons";
   6 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   7 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
   8 | import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
   9 | import { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetDescription, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from "@/components/ui/sheet";
  10 | import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
  11 | import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";
  12 | import { useIsMobile } from "@/hooks/use-mobile";
  13 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
  14 | 
  15 | const INFOBAR_WIDTH = "22rem";
  16 | const INFOBAR_WIDTH_MOBILE = "22rem";
  17 | const INFOBAR_WIDTH_ICON = "3rem";
  18 | const INFOBAR_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUT = "i";
  19 | 
  20 | export type HelpfulLink = {
  21 | 	title: string;
  22 | 	url: string;
  23 | };
  24 | 
  25 | export type DescriptiveSection = {
  26 | 	title: string;
  27 | 	description: string;
  28 | 	links?: HelpfulLink[];
  29 | };
  30 | 
  31 | export type InfobarContent = {
  32 | 	title: string;
  33 | 	sections: DescriptiveSection[];
  34 | };
  35 | 
  36 | type InfobarContextProps = {
  37 | 	state: "expanded" | "collapsed";
  38 | 	open: boolean;
  39 | 	setOpen: (open: boolean) => void;
  40 | 	openMobile: boolean;
  41 | 	setOpenMobile: (open: boolean) => void;
  42 | 	isMobile: boolean;
  43 | 	toggleInfobar: () => void;
  44 | 	content: InfobarContent | null;
  45 | 	setContent: (content: InfobarContent | null) => void;
  46 | 	isPathnameChanging: boolean;
  47 | };
  48 | 
  49 | const InfobarContext = React.createContext<InfobarContextProps | null>(null);
  50 | 
  51 | function useInfobar() {
  52 | 	const context = React.useContext(InfobarContext);
  53 | 	if (!context) {
  54 | 		throw new Error("useInfobar must be used within a InfobarProvider.");
  55 | 	}
  56 | 
  57 | 	return context;
  58 | }
  59 | 
  60 | function InfobarProvider({
  61 | 	defaultOpen = true,
  62 | 	open: openProp,
  63 | 	onOpenChange: setOpenProp,
  64 | 	className,
  65 | 	style,
  66 | 	children,
  67 | 	...props
  68 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
  69 | 	defaultOpen?: boolean;
  70 | 	open?: boolean;
  71 | 	onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void;
  72 | }) {
  73 | 	const isMobile = useIsMobile();
  74 | 	const [openMobile, setOpenMobile] = React.useState(false);
  75 | 	const [content, setContent] = React.useState<InfobarContent | null>(null);
  76 | 	const [contentPathname, setContentPathname] = React.useState<string | null>(null);
  77 | 	const [isPathnameChanging, setIsPathnameChanging] = React.useState(false);
  78 | 	const { pathname } = useLocation();
  79 | 
  80 | 	// This is the internal state of the infobar.
  81 | 	// We use openProp and setOpenProp for control from outside the component.
  82 | 	const [_open, _setOpen] = React.useState(defaultOpen);
  83 | 	const open = openProp ?? _open;
  84 | 	const setOpen = React.useCallback(
  85 | 		(value: boolean | ((value: boolean) => boolean)) => {
  86 | 			const openState = typeof value === "function" ? value(open) : value;
  87 | 
  88 | 			// On mobile, also update the mobile state for the Sheet component
  89 | 			if (isMobile) {
  90 | 				setOpenMobile(openState);
  91 | 			}
  92 | 
  93 | 			// Handle desktop state
  94 | 			if (setOpenProp) {
  95 | 				setOpenProp(openState);
  96 | 			} else {
  97 | 				_setOpen(openState);
  98 | 			}
  99 | 		},
 100 | 		[setOpenProp, open, isMobile]
 101 | 	);
 102 | 
 103 | 	// Helper to toggle the infobar.
 104 | 	const toggleInfobar = React.useCallback(
 105 | 		() => (isMobile ? setOpenMobile(open => !open) : setOpen(open => !open)),
 106 | 		[isMobile, setOpen]
 107 | 	);
 108 | 
 109 | 	// Close infobar when switching between mobile and desktop to prevent state desync
 110 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 111 | 		setOpenMobile(false);
 112 | 		_setOpen(false);
 113 | 	}, []);
 114 | 
 115 | 	// Adds a keyboard shortcut to toggle the infobar.
 116 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 117 | 		const handleKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
 118 | 			if (event.key === INFOBAR_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUT && (event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)) {
 119 | 				event.preventDefault();
 120 | 				toggleInfobar();
 121 | 			}
 122 | 		};
 123 | 
 124 | 		window.addEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
 125 | 		return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
 126 | 	}, [toggleInfobar]);
 127 | 
 128 | 	// Clear content and close infobar when pathname changes
 129 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 130 | 		if (contentPathname !== null && contentPathname !== pathname) {
 131 | 			setIsPathnameChanging(true);
 132 | 			setContent(null);
 133 | 			setContentPathname(null);
 134 | 			setOpen(false);
 135 | 
 136 | 			const timer = setTimeout(() => {
 137 | 				setIsPathnameChanging(false);
 138 | 			}, 200);
 139 | 
 140 | 			return () => clearTimeout(timer);
 141 | 		}
 142 | 		// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps -- setOpen is a stable React state setter
 143 | 	}, [pathname, contentPathname, setOpen]);
 144 | 
 145 | 	// Update setContent to also track pathname
 146 | 	const handleSetContent = React.useCallback(
 147 | 		(newContent: InfobarContent | null) => {
 148 | 			setContent(newContent);
 149 | 			setContentPathname(newContent ? pathname : null);
 150 | 		},
 151 | 		[pathname]
 152 | 	);
 153 | 
 154 | 	// We add a state so that we can do data-state="expanded" or "collapsed".
 155 | 	// This makes it easier to style the infobar with Tailwind classes.
 156 | 	const state = open ? "expanded" : "collapsed";
 157 | 
 158 | 	// Update context to use handleSetContent instead of setContent
 159 | 	const contextValue = React.useMemo<InfobarContextProps>(
 160 | 		() => ({
 161 | 			state,
 162 | 			open,
 163 | 			setOpen,
 164 | 			isMobile,
 165 | 			openMobile,
 166 | 			setOpenMobile,
 167 | 			toggleInfobar,
 168 | 			content,
 169 | 			setContent: handleSetContent,
 170 | 			isPathnameChanging
 171 | 		}),
 172 | 		[state, open, setOpen, isMobile, openMobile, toggleInfobar, content, handleSetContent, isPathnameChanging]
 173 | 	);
 174 | 
 175 | 	return (
 176 | 		<InfobarContext.Provider value={contextValue}>
 177 | 			<TooltipProvider delayDuration={0}>
 178 | 				<div
 179 | 					className={cn("group/infobar-wrapper flex w-full flex-1", className)}
 180 | 					data-slot='infobar-wrapper'
 181 | 					style={
 182 | 						{
 183 | 							"--infobar-width": INFOBAR_WIDTH,
 184 | 							"--infobar-width-icon": INFOBAR_WIDTH_ICON,
 185 | 							...style
 186 | 						} as React.CSSProperties
 187 | 					}
 188 | 					{...props}
 189 | 				>
 190 | 					{children}
 191 | 				</div>
 192 | 			</TooltipProvider>
 193 | 		</InfobarContext.Provider>
 194 | 	);
 195 | }
 196 | 
 197 | function Infobar({
 198 | 	side = "left",
 199 | 	variant = "sidebar",
 200 | 	collapsible = "offcanvas",
 201 | 	className,
 202 | 	children,
 203 | 	...props
 204 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 205 | 	side?: "left" | "right";
 206 | 	variant?: "sidebar" | "floating" | "inset";
 207 | 	collapsible?: "offcanvas" | "icon" | "none";
 208 | }) {
 209 | 	const { isMobile, state, setOpen, openMobile, setOpenMobile, isPathnameChanging } = useInfobar();
 210 | 
 211 | 	if (collapsible === "none") {
 212 | 		return (
 213 | 			<div
 214 | 				className={cn("flex h-full w-(--infobar-width) flex-col bg-sidebar text-sidebar-foreground", className)}
 215 | 				data-slot='infobar'
 216 | 				{...props}
 217 | 			>
 218 | 				{children}
 219 | 			</div>
 220 | 		);
 221 | 	}
 222 | 
 223 | 	if (isMobile) {
 224 | 		return (
 225 | 			<Sheet
 226 | 				onOpenChange={value => {
 227 | 					setOpenMobile(value);
 228 | 					setOpen(value);
 229 | 				}}
 230 | 				open={openMobile}
 231 | 				{...props}
 232 | 			>
 233 | 				<SheetContent
 234 | 					className='w-(--infobar-width) bg-sidebar p-0 text-sidebar-foreground [&>button]:hidden'
 235 | 					data-infobar='infobar'
 236 | 					data-mobile='true'
 237 | 					data-slot='infobar'
 238 | 					side={side}
 239 | 					style={
 240 | 						{
 241 | 							"--infobar-width": INFOBAR_WIDTH_MOBILE
 242 | 						} as React.CSSProperties
 243 | 					}
 244 | 				>
 245 | 					<SheetHeader className='sr-only'>
 246 | 						<SheetTitle>Infobar</SheetTitle>
 247 | 						<SheetDescription>Displays the mobile infobar.</SheetDescription>
 248 | 					</SheetHeader>
 249 | 					<div className='flex h-full w-full flex-col'>{children}</div>
 250 | 				</SheetContent>
 251 | 			</Sheet>
 252 | 		);
 253 | 	}
 254 | 
 255 | 	return (
 256 | 		<div
 257 | 			className='group peer hidden text-sidebar-foreground md:block'
 258 | 			data-collapsible={state === "collapsed" ? collapsible : ""}
 259 | 			data-side={side}
 260 | 			data-slot='infobar'
 261 | 			data-state={state}
 262 | 			data-variant={variant}
 263 | 			style={
 264 | 				{
 265 | 					"--infobar-transition-duration": isPathnameChanging ? "0ms" : "300ms"
 266 | 				} as React.CSSProperties
 267 | 			}
 268 | 		>
 269 | 			<div
 270 | 				className={cn(
 271 | 					"sticky top-0 z-30 hidden h-[calc(100dvh-4.5rem)] w-(--infobar-width) shrink-0 p-2 pl-0 transition-[width,padding] duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1)] md:flex",
 272 | 					"group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:w-0 group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:overflow-hidden group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:p-0",
 273 | 					className
 274 | 				)}
 275 | 				data-slot='infobar-container'
 276 | 				{...props}
 277 | 			>
 278 | 				<div
 279 | 					className='flex h-full w-full flex-col overflow-y-auto rounded-lg border border-sidebar-border bg-sidebar text-sidebar-foreground transition-[opacity,transform] duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1)] group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:scale-95 group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:opacity-0'
 280 | 					data-infobar='infobar'
 281 | 					data-slot='infobar-inner'
 282 | 				>
 283 | 					{children}
 284 | 				</div>
 285 | 			</div>
 286 | 		</div>
 287 | 	);
 288 | }
 289 | 
 290 | function InfobarTrigger({ className, onClick, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>) {
 291 | 	const { toggleInfobar } = useInfobar();
 292 | 
 293 | 	return (
 294 | 		<Button
 295 | 			aria-label='Close info panel'
 296 | 			className={cn("size-7", className)}
 297 | 			data-infobar='trigger'
 298 | 			data-slot='infobar-trigger'
 299 | 			onClick={event => {
 300 | 				onClick?.(event);
 301 | 				toggleInfobar();
 302 | 			}}
 303 | 			size='icon'
 304 | 			variant='ghost'
 305 | 			{...props}
 306 | 		>
 307 | 			<Icons.chevronsRight className='size-4' />
 308 | 		</Button>
 309 | 	);
 310 | }

 312 | function InfobarRail({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"button">) {
 313 | 	const { toggleInfobar } = useInfobar();
 314 | 
 315 | 	return (
 316 | 		<button
 317 | 			aria-label='Toggle Infobar'
 318 | 			className={cn(
 319 | 				"absolute inset-y-0 z-20 hidden w-4 -translate-x-1/2 transition-all ease-linear after:absolute after:inset-y-0 after:left-1/2 after:w-0.5 hover:after:bg-sidebar-border group-data-[side=left]:-right-4 group-data-[side=right]:left-0 sm:flex",
 320 | 				"in-data-[side=left]:cursor-w-resize in-data-[side=right]:cursor-e-resize",
 321 | 				"[[data-side=left][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-e-resize [[data-side=right][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-w-resize",
 322 | 				"group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:translate-x-0 hover:group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:bg-sidebar group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:after:left-full",
 323 | 				"[[data-side=left][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]:-right-2",
 324 | 				"[[data-side=right][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]:-left-2",
 325 | 				className
 326 | 			)}
 327 | 			data-infobar='rail'
 328 | 			data-slot='infobar-rail'
 329 | 			onClick={toggleInfobar}
 330 | 			tabIndex={-1}
 331 | 			title='Toggle Infobar'
 332 | 			{...props}
 333 | 		/>
 334 | 	);

 497 | const infobarMenuButtonVariants = cva(
 498 | 	"peer/menu-button flex w-full items-center gap-2 overflow-hidden rounded-md p-2 text-left text-sm outline-hidden ring-sidebar-ring transition-[width,height,padding] hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground focus-visible:ring-2 active:bg-sidebar-accent active:text-sidebar-accent-foreground disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 group-has-data-[infobar=menu-action]/menu-item:pr-8 aria-disabled:pointer-events-none aria-disabled:opacity-50 data-[active=true]:bg-sidebar-accent data-[active=true]:font-medium data-[active=true]:text-sidebar-accent-foreground data-[state=open]:hover:bg-sidebar-accent data-[state=open]:hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground group-data-[collapsible=icon]:size-8! group-data-[collapsible=icon]:p-2! [&>span:last-child]:truncate [&>svg]:size-4 [&>svg]:shrink-0",
 499 | 	{
 500 | 		variants: {
 501 | 			variant: {
 502 | 				default: "hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground",
 503 | 				outline:
 504 | 					"bg-background shadow-[0_0_0_1px_var(--sidebar-border)] hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground hover:shadow-[0_0_0_1px_var(--sidebar-accent)]"
 505 | 			},
 506 | 			size: {
 507 | 				default: "h-8 text-sm",
 508 | 				sm: "h-7 text-xs",
 509 | 				lg: "h-12 text-sm group-data-[collapsible=icon]:p-0!"
 510 | 			}
 511 | 		},
 512 | 		defaultVariants: {
 513 | 			variant: "default",
 514 | 			size: "default"
 515 | 		}
 516 | 	}
 517 | );
 518 | 
 519 | function InfobarMenuButton({
 520 | 	asChild = false,
 521 | 	isActive = false,
 522 | 	variant = "default",
 523 | 	size = "default",
 524 | 	tooltip,
 525 | 	className,
 526 | 	...props
 527 | }: React.ComponentProps<"button"> & {
 528 | 	asChild?: boolean;
 529 | 	isActive?: boolean;
 530 | 	tooltip?: string | React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipContent>;
 531 | } & VariantProps<typeof infobarMenuButtonVariants>) {
 532 | 	const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "button";
 533 | 	const { isMobile, state } = useInfobar();
 534 | 
 535 | 	const button = (
 536 | 		<Comp
 537 | 			className={cn(infobarMenuButtonVariants({ variant, size }), className)}
 538 | 			data-active={isActive}
 539 | 			data-infobar='menu-button'
 540 | 			data-size={size}
 541 | 			data-slot='infobar-menu-button'
 542 | 			{...props}
 543 | 		/>
 544 | 	);
 545 | 
 546 | 	if (!tooltip) {
 547 | 		return button;
 548 | 	}
 549 | 
 550 | 	if (typeof tooltip === "string") {
 551 | 		tooltip = {
 552 | 			children: tooltip
 553 | 		};
 554 | 	}
 555 | 
 556 | 	return (
 557 | 		<Tooltip>
 558 | 			<TooltipTrigger asChild>{button}</TooltipTrigger>
 559 | 			<TooltipContent
 560 | 				align='center'
 561 | 				hidden={state !== "collapsed" || isMobile}
 562 | 				side='right'
 563 | 				{...tooltip}
 564 | 			/>
 565 | 		</Tooltip>
 566 | 	);
 567 | }

 569 | function InfobarMenuAction({
 570 | 	className,
 571 | 	asChild = false,
 572 | 	showOnHover = false,
 573 | 	...props
 574 | }: React.ComponentProps<"button"> & {
 575 | 	asChild?: boolean;
 576 | 	showOnHover?: boolean;
 577 | }) {
 578 | 	const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "button";
 579 | 
 580 | 	return (
 581 | 		<Comp
 582 | 			className={cn(
 583 | 				"absolute top-1.5 right-1 flex aspect-square w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-md p-0 text-sidebar-foreground outline-hidden ring-sidebar-ring transition-transform hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground focus-visible:ring-2 peer-hover/menu-button:text-sidebar-accent-foreground [&>svg]:size-4 [&>svg]:shrink-0",
 584 | 				// Increases the hit area of the button on mobile.
 585 | 				"after:absolute after:-inset-2 md:after:hidden",
 586 | 				"peer-data-[size=sm]/menu-button:top-1",
 587 | 				"peer-data-[size=default]/menu-button:top-1.5",
 588 | 				"peer-data-[size=lg]/menu-button:top-2.5",
 589 | 				"group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden",
 590 | 				showOnHover &&
 591 | 					"group-focus-within/menu-item:opacity-100 group-hover/menu-item:opacity-100 data-[state=open]:opacity-100 peer-data-[active=true]/menu-button:text-sidebar-accent-foreground md:opacity-0",
 592 | 				className
 593 | 			)}
 594 | 			data-infobar='menu-action'
 595 | 			data-slot='infobar-menu-action'
 596 | 			{...props}
 597 | 		/>
 598 | 	);
 599 | }

 607 | 				"peer-data-[size=sm]/menu-button:top-1",

 619 | 
 620 | function InfobarMenuSkeleton({
 621 | 	className,
 622 | 	showIcon = false,
 623 | 	...props
 624 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 625 | 	showIcon?: boolean;
 626 | }) {
 627 | 	// Random width between 50 to 90%.
 628 | 	const width = React.useMemo(() => `${Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) + 50}%`, []);
 629 | 
 630 | 	return (
 631 | 		<div
 632 | 			className={cn("flex h-8 items-center gap-2 rounded-md px-2", className)}
 633 | 			data-infobar='menu-skeleton'
 634 | 			data-slot='infobar-menu-skeleton'
 635 | 			{...props}
 636 | 		>
 637 | 			{showIcon && (

 641 | 				/>
 642 | 			)}
 643 | 			<Skeleton
 644 | 				className='h-4 max-w-(--skeleton-width) flex-1'
 645 | 				data-infobar='menu-skeleton-text'
 646 | 				style={
 647 | 					{
 648 | 						"--skeleton-width": width
 649 | 					} as React.CSSProperties
 650 | 				}
 651 | 			/>
 652 | 		</div>
 653 | 	);
 654 | }

  30 | 			className={cn(
  31 | 				"flex items-center rounded-lg has-aria-invalid:border-destructive has-aria-invalid:ring-3 has-aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:has-aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40",

  33 | 			)}

  40 | function InputOTPSlot({
  41 | 	index,
  42 | 	className,
  43 | 	...props
  44 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
  45 | 	index: number;
  46 | }) {
  47 | 	const inputOTPContext = React.useContext(OTPInputContext);
  48 | 	const { char, hasFakeCaret, isActive } = inputOTPContext?.slots[index] ?? {};
  49 | 
  50 | 	return (
  51 | 		<div
  52 | 			className={cn(
  53 | 				"relative flex size-8 items-center justify-center border-input border-y border-e text-sm outline-none transition-all first:rounded-s-lg first:border-s last:rounded-e-lg aria-invalid:border-destructive data-[active=true]:z-10 data-[active=true]:border-ring data-[active=true]:ring-3 data-[active=true]:ring-ring/50 data-[active=true]:aria-invalid:border-destructive data-[active=true]:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:bg-input/30 dark:data-[active=true]:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40",
  54 | 				className
  55 | 			)}
  56 | 			data-active={isActive}
  57 | 			data-slot='input-otp-slot'
  58 | 			{...props}
  59 | 		>
  60 | 			{char}

  62 | 				<div className='pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center'>
  63 | 					<div className='h-4 w-px animate-caret-blink bg-foreground duration-1000' />
  64 | 				</div>
  65 | 			)}
  66 | 		</div>
  67 | 	);
  68 | }
  69 |
