`components/ui/kanban.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import {
   2 | 	type Announcements,
   3 | 	type CollisionDetection,
   4 | 	closestCenter,
   5 | 	closestCorners,
   6 | 	DndContext,
   7 | 	type DndContextProps,
   8 | 	type DragCancelEvent,
   9 | 	type DragEndEvent,
  10 | 	type DraggableAttributes,
  11 | 	type DraggableSyntheticListeners,
  12 | 	type DragOverEvent,
  13 | 	DragOverlay,
  14 | 	type DragStartEvent,
  15 | 	type DropAnimation,
  16 | 	type DroppableContainer,
  17 | 	defaultDropAnimationSideEffects,
  18 | 	getFirstCollision,
  19 | 	KeyboardCode,
  20 | 	type KeyboardCoordinateGetter,
  21 | 	KeyboardSensor,
  22 | 	MeasuringStrategy,
  23 | 	MouseSensor,
  24 | 	pointerWithin,
  25 | 	rectIntersection,
  26 | 	TouchSensor,
  27 | 	type UniqueIdentifier,
  28 | 	useSensor,
  29 | 	useSensors
  30 | } from "@dnd-kit/core";
  31 | import {
  32 | 	type AnimateLayoutChanges,
  33 | 	arrayMove,
  34 | 	defaultAnimateLayoutChanges,
  35 | 	horizontalListSortingStrategy,
  36 | 	SortableContext,
  37 | 	type SortableContextProps,
  38 | 	useSortable,
  39 | 	verticalListSortingStrategy
  40 | } from "@dnd-kit/sortable";
  41 | import { CSS } from "@dnd-kit/utilities";
  42 | import { Slot as SlotPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
  43 | import * as React from "react";
  44 | import * as ReactDOM from "react-dom";
  45 | 
  46 | import { useComposedRefs } from "@/lib/compose-refs";
  47 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"; // Corrected import path
  48 | 
  49 | const directions: string[] = [KeyboardCode.Down, KeyboardCode.Right, KeyboardCode.Up, KeyboardCode.Left];
  50 | 
  51 | const coordinateGetter: KeyboardCoordinateGetter = (event, { context }) => {
  52 | 	const { active, droppableRects, droppableContainers, collisionRect } = context;
  53 | 
  54 | 	if (directions.includes(event.code)) {
  55 | 		event.preventDefault();
  56 | 
  57 | 		if (!(active && collisionRect)) return;
  58 | 
  59 | 		const filteredContainers: DroppableContainer[] = [];
  60 | 
  61 | 		for (const entry of droppableContainers.getEnabled()) {
  62 | 			if (!entry || entry?.disabled) return;
  63 | 
  64 | 			const rect = droppableRects.get(entry.id);
  65 | 
  66 | 			if (!rect) return;
  67 | 
  68 | 			const data = entry.data.current;
  69 | 
  70 | 			if (data) {
  71 | 				const { type, children } = data;
  72 | 
  73 | 				if (type === "container" && children?.length > 0) {
  74 | 					if (active.data.current?.type !== "container") {
  75 | 						return;
  76 | 					}
  77 | 				}
  78 | 			}
  79 | 
  80 | 			switch (event.code) {
  81 | 				case KeyboardCode.Down:
  82 | 					if (collisionRect.top < rect.top) {
  83 | 						filteredContainers.push(entry);
  84 | 					}
  85 | 					break;
  86 | 				case KeyboardCode.Up:
  87 | 					if (collisionRect.top > rect.top) {
  88 | 						filteredContainers.push(entry);
  89 | 					}
  90 | 					break;
  91 | 				case KeyboardCode.Left:
  92 | 					if (collisionRect.left >= rect.left + rect.width) {
  93 | 						filteredContainers.push(entry);
  94 | 					}
  95 | 					break;
  96 | 				case KeyboardCode.Right:
  97 | 					if (collisionRect.left + collisionRect.width <= rect.left) {
  98 | 						filteredContainers.push(entry);
  99 | 					}
 100 | 					break;
 101 | 				default:
 102 | 					break;
 103 | 			}
 104 | 		}
 105 | 
 106 | 		const collisions = closestCorners({
 107 | 			active,
 108 | 			collisionRect,
 109 | 			droppableRects,
 110 | 			droppableContainers: filteredContainers,
 111 | 			pointerCoordinates: null
 112 | 		});
 113 | 		const closestId = getFirstCollision(collisions, "id");
 114 | 
 115 | 		if (closestId != null) {
 116 | 			const newDroppable = droppableContainers.get(closestId);
 117 | 			const newNode = newDroppable?.node.current;
 118 | 			const newRect = newDroppable?.rect.current;
 119 | 
 120 | 			if (newNode && newRect) {
 121 | 				if (newDroppable.id === "placeholder") {
 122 | 					return {
 123 | 						x: newRect.left + (newRect.width - collisionRect.width) / 2,
 124 | 						y: newRect.top + (newRect.height - collisionRect.height) / 2
 125 | 					};
 126 | 				}
 127 | 
 128 | 				if (newDroppable.data.current?.type === "container") {
 129 | 					return {
 130 | 						x: newRect.left + 20,
 131 | 						y: newRect.top + 74
 132 | 					};
 133 | 				}
 134 | 
 135 | 				return {
 136 | 					x: newRect.left,
 137 | 					y: newRect.top
 138 | 				};
 139 | 			}
 140 | 		}
 141 | 	}
 142 | 
 143 | 	return undefined;
 144 | };
 145 | 
 146 | const ROOT_NAME = "Kanban";
 147 | const BOARD_NAME = "KanbanBoard";
 148 | const COLUMN_NAME = "KanbanColumn";
 149 | const COLUMN_HANDLE_NAME = "KanbanColumnHandle";
 150 | const ITEM_NAME = "KanbanItem";
 151 | const ITEM_HANDLE_NAME = "KanbanItemHandle";
 152 | const OVERLAY_NAME = "KanbanOverlay";
 153 | 
 154 | interface KanbanContextValue<T> {
 155 | 	activeId: UniqueIdentifier | null;
 156 | 	flatCursor: boolean;
 157 | 	getItemValue: (item: T) => UniqueIdentifier;
 158 | 	id: string;
 159 | 	items: Record<UniqueIdentifier, T[]>;
 160 | 	modifiers: DndContextProps["modifiers"];
 161 | 	orientation: "horizontal" | "vertical";
 162 | 	setActiveId: (id: UniqueIdentifier | null) => void;
 163 | 	strategy: SortableContextProps["strategy"];
 164 | }
 165 | 
 166 | const KanbanContext = React.createContext<KanbanContextValue<unknown> | null>(null);
 167 | 
 168 | function useKanbanContext(consumerName: string) {
 169 | 	const context = React.useContext(KanbanContext);
 170 | 	if (!context) {
 171 | 		throw new Error(`\`${consumerName}\` must be used within \`${ROOT_NAME}\``);
 172 | 	}
 173 | 	return context;
 174 | }
 175 | 
 176 | interface GetItemValue<T> {
 177 | 	/**
 178 | 	 * Callback that returns a unique identifier for each kanban item. Required for array of objects.
 179 | 	 * @example getItemValue={(item) => item.id}
 180 | 	 */
 181 | 	getItemValue: (item: T) => UniqueIdentifier;
 182 | }
 183 | 
 184 | type KanbanProps<T> = Omit<DndContextProps, "collisionDetection"> &
 185 | 	(T extends object ? GetItemValue<T> : Partial<GetItemValue<T>>) & {
 186 | 		value: Record<UniqueIdentifier, T[]>;
 187 | 		onValueChange?: (columns: Record<UniqueIdentifier, T[]>) => void;
 188 | 		onMove?: (event: DragEndEvent & { activeIndex: number; overIndex: number }) => void;
 189 | 		strategy?: SortableContextProps["strategy"];
 190 | 		orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical";
 191 | 		flatCursor?: boolean;
 192 | 	};
 193 | 
 194 | function Kanban<T>(props: KanbanProps<T>) {
 195 | 	const {
 196 | 		value,
 197 | 		onValueChange,
 198 | 		modifiers,
 199 | 		strategy = verticalListSortingStrategy,
 200 | 		orientation = "horizontal",
 201 | 		onMove,
 202 | 		getItemValue: getItemValueProp,
 203 | 		accessibility,
 204 | 		flatCursor = false,
 205 | 		...kanbanProps
 206 | 	} = props;
 207 | 
 208 | 	const id = React.useId();
 209 | 	const [activeId, setActiveId] = React.useState<UniqueIdentifier | null>(null);
 210 | 	const lastOverIdRef = React.useRef<UniqueIdentifier | null>(null);
 211 | 	const hasMovedRef = React.useRef(false);
 212 | 	const sensors = useSensors(
 213 | 		useSensor(MouseSensor),
 214 | 		useSensor(TouchSensor),
 215 | 		useSensor(KeyboardSensor, {
 216 | 			coordinateGetter
 217 | 		})
 218 | 	);
 219 | 
 220 | 	const getItemValue = React.useCallback(
 221 | 		(item: T): UniqueIdentifier => {
 222 | 			if (typeof item === "object" && !getItemValueProp) {
 223 | 				throw new Error("`getItemValue` is required when using array of objects");
 224 | 			}
 225 | 			return getItemValueProp ? getItemValueProp(item) : (item as UniqueIdentifier);
 226 | 		},
 227 | 		[getItemValueProp]
 228 | 	);
 229 | 
 230 | 	const getColumn = React.useCallback(
 231 | 		(id: UniqueIdentifier) => {
 232 | 			if (id in value) return id;
 233 | 
 234 | 			for (const [columnId, items] of Object.entries(value)) {
 235 | 				if (items.some(item => getItemValue(item) === id)) {
 236 | 					return columnId;
 237 | 				}
 238 | 			}
 239 | 
 240 | 			return null;
 241 | 		},
 242 | 		[value, getItemValue]
 243 | 	);
 244 | 
 245 | 	const collisionDetection: CollisionDetection = React.useCallback(
 246 | 		args => {
 247 | 			if (activeId && activeId in value) {
 248 | 				return closestCenter({
 249 | 					...args,
 250 | 					droppableContainers: args.droppableContainers.filter(container => container.id in value)
 251 | 				});
 252 | 			}
 253 | 
 254 | 			const pointerIntersections = pointerWithin(args);
 255 | 			const intersections = pointerIntersections.length > 0 ? pointerIntersections : rectIntersection(args);
 256 | 			let overId = getFirstCollision(intersections, "id");
 257 | 
 258 | 			if (!overId) {
 259 | 				if (hasMovedRef.current) {
 260 | 					lastOverIdRef.current = activeId;
 261 | 				}
 262 | 				return lastOverIdRef.current ? [{ id: lastOverIdRef.current }] : [];
 263 | 			}
 264 | 
 265 | 			if (overId in value) {
 266 | 				const containerItems = value[overId];
 267 | 				if (containerItems && containerItems.length > 0) {
 268 | 					const closestItem = closestCenter({
 269 | 						...args,
 270 | 						droppableContainers: args.droppableContainers.filter(
 271 | 							container =>
 272 | 								container.id !== overId &&
 273 | 								containerItems.some(item => getItemValue(item) === container.id)
 274 | 						)
 275 | 					});
 276 | 
 277 | 					if (closestItem.length > 0) {
 278 | 						overId = closestItem[0]?.id ?? overId;
 279 | 					}
 280 | 				}
 281 | 			}
 282 | 
 283 | 			lastOverIdRef.current = overId;
 284 | 			return [{ id: overId }];
 285 | 		},
 286 | 		[activeId, value, getItemValue]
 287 | 	);
 288 | 
 289 | 	const onDragStart = React.useCallback(
 290 | 		(event: DragStartEvent) => {
 291 | 			kanbanProps.onDragStart?.(event);
 292 | 
 293 | 			if (event.activatorEvent.defaultPrevented) return;
 294 | 			setActiveId(event.active.id);
 295 | 		},
 296 | 		// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps -- kanbanProps is unstable object ref, using specific prop
 297 | 		[kanbanProps.onDragStart]
 298 | 	);
 299 | 
 300 | 	const onDragOver = React.useCallback(
 301 | 		(event: DragOverEvent) => {
 302 | 			kanbanProps.onDragOver?.(event);
 303 | 
 304 | 			if (event.activatorEvent.defaultPrevented) return;
 305 | 
 306 | 			const { active, over } = event;
 307 | 			if (!over) return;
 308 | 
 309 | 			const activeColumn = getColumn(active.id);
 310 | 			const overColumn = getColumn(over.id);
 311 | 
 312 | 			if (!(activeColumn && overColumn)) return;
 313 | 
 314 | 			if (activeColumn === overColumn) {
 315 | 				const items = value[activeColumn];
 316 | 				if (!items) return;
 317 | 
 318 | 				const activeIndex = items.findIndex(item => getItemValue(item) === active.id);
 319 | 				const overIndex = items.findIndex(item => getItemValue(item) === over.id);
 320 | 
 321 | 				if (activeIndex !== overIndex) {
 322 | 					const newColumns = { ...value };
 323 | 					newColumns[activeColumn] = arrayMove(items, activeIndex, overIndex);
 324 | 					onValueChange?.(newColumns);
 325 | 				}
 326 | 			} else {
 327 | 				const activeItems = value[activeColumn];
 328 | 				const overItems = value[overColumn];
 329 | 
 330 | 				if (!(activeItems && overItems)) return;
 331 | 
 332 | 				const activeIndex = activeItems.findIndex(item => getItemValue(item) === active.id);
 333 | 
 334 | 				if (activeIndex === -1) return;
 335 | 
 336 | 				const activeItem = activeItems[activeIndex];
 337 | 				if (!activeItem) return;
 338 | 
 339 | 				const updatedItems = {
 340 | 					...value,
 341 | 					[activeColumn]: activeItems.filter(item => getItemValue(item) !== active.id),
 342 | 					[overColumn]: [...overItems, activeItem]
 343 | 				};
 344 | 
 345 | 				onValueChange?.(updatedItems);
 346 | 				hasMovedRef.current = true;
 347 | 			}
 348 | 		},
 349 | 		// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps -- kanbanProps is unstable object ref, using specific prop
 350 | 		[value, getColumn, getItemValue, onValueChange, kanbanProps.onDragOver]
 351 | 	);
 352 | 
 353 | 	const onDragEnd = React.useCallback(
 354 | 		(event: DragEndEvent) => {
 355 | 			kanbanProps.onDragEnd?.(event);
 356 | 
 357 | 			if (event.activatorEvent.defaultPrevented) return;
 358 | 
 359 | 			const { active, over } = event;
 360 | 
 361 | 			if (!over) {
 362 | 				setActiveId(null);
 363 | 				return;
 364 | 			}
 365 | 
 366 | 			if (active.id in value && over.id in value) {
 367 | 				const activeIndex = Object.keys(value).indexOf(active.id as string);
 368 | 				const overIndex = Object.keys(value).indexOf(over.id as string);
 369 | 
 370 | 				if (activeIndex !== overIndex) {
 371 | 					const orderedColumns = Object.keys(value);
 372 | 					const newOrder = arrayMove(orderedColumns, activeIndex, overIndex);
 373 | 
 374 | 					const newColumns: Record<UniqueIdentifier, T[]> = {};
 375 | 					for (const key of newOrder) {
 376 | 						const items = value[key];
 377 | 						if (items) {
 378 | 							newColumns[key] = items;
 379 | 						}
 380 | 					}
 381 | 
 382 | 					if (onMove) {
 383 | 						onMove({ ...event, activeIndex, overIndex });
 384 | 					} else {
 385 | 						onValueChange?.(newColumns);
 386 | 					}
 387 | 				}
 388 | 			} else {
 389 | 				const activeColumn = getColumn(active.id);
 390 | 				const overColumn = getColumn(over.id);
 391 | 
 392 | 				if (!(activeColumn && overColumn)) {
 393 | 					setActiveId(null);
 394 | 					return;
 395 | 				}
 396 | 
 397 | 				if (activeColumn === overColumn) {
 398 | 					const items = value[activeColumn];
 399 | 					if (!items) {
 400 | 						setActiveId(null);
 401 | 						return;
 402 | 					}
 403 | 
 404 | 					const activeIndex = items.findIndex(item => getItemValue(item) === active.id);
 405 | 					const overIndex = items.findIndex(item => getItemValue(item) === over.id);
 406 | 
 407 | 					if (activeIndex !== overIndex) {
 408 | 						const newColumns = { ...value };
 409 | 						newColumns[activeColumn] = arrayMove(items, activeIndex, overIndex);
 410 | 						if (onMove) {
 411 | 							onMove({
 412 | 								...event,
 413 | 								activeIndex,
 414 | 								overIndex
 415 | 							});
 416 | 						} else {
 417 | 							onValueChange?.(newColumns);
 418 | 						}
 419 | 					}
 420 | 				}
 421 | 			}
 422 | 
 423 | 			setActiveId(null);
 424 | 			hasMovedRef.current = false;
 425 | 		},
 426 | 		// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps -- kanbanProps is unstable object ref, using specific prop
 427 | 		[value, getColumn, getItemValue, onValueChange, onMove, kanbanProps.onDragEnd]
 428 | 	);
 429 | 
 430 | 	const onDragCancel = React.useCallback(
 431 | 		(event: DragCancelEvent) => {
 432 | 			kanbanProps.onDragCancel?.(event);
 433 | 
 434 | 			if (event.activatorEvent.defaultPrevented) return;
 435 | 
 436 | 			setActiveId(null);
 437 | 			hasMovedRef.current = false;
 438 | 		},
 439 | 		// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps -- kanbanProps is unstable object ref, using specific prop
 440 | 		[kanbanProps.onDragCancel]
 441 | 	);
 442 | 
 443 | 	const announcements: Announcements = React.useMemo(
 444 | 		() => ({
 445 | 			onDragStart({ active }) {
 446 | 				const isColumn = active.id in value;
 447 | 				const itemType = isColumn ? "column" : "item";
 448 | 				const position = isColumn
 449 | 					? Object.keys(value).indexOf(active.id as string) + 1
 450 | 					: (() => {
 451 | 							const column = getColumn(active.id);
 452 | 							if (!(column && value[column])) return 1;
 453 | 							return value[column].findIndex(item => getItemValue(item) === active.id) + 1;
 454 | 						})();
 455 | 				const total = isColumn
 456 | 					? Object.keys(value).length
 457 | 					: (() => {
 458 | 							const column = getColumn(active.id);
 459 | 							return column ? (value[column]?.length ?? 0) : 0;
 460 | 						})();
 461 | 
 462 | 				return `Picked up ${itemType} at position ${position} of ${total}`;
 463 | 			},
 464 | 			onDragOver({ active, over }) {
 465 | 				if (!over) return;
 466 | 
 467 | 				const isColumn = active.id in value;
 468 | 				const itemType = isColumn ? "column" : "item";
 469 | 				const position = isColumn
 470 | 					? Object.keys(value).indexOf(over.id as string) + 1
 471 | 					: (() => {
 472 | 							const column = getColumn(over.id);
 473 | 							if (!(column && value[column])) return 1;
 474 | 							return value[column].findIndex(item => getItemValue(item) === over.id) + 1;
 475 | 						})();
 476 | 				const total = isColumn
 477 | 					? Object.keys(value).length
 478 | 					: (() => {
 479 | 							const column = getColumn(over.id);
 480 | 							return column ? (value[column]?.length ?? 0) : 0;
 481 | 						})();
 482 | 
 483 | 				const overColumn = getColumn(over.id);
 484 | 				const activeColumn = getColumn(active.id);
 485 | 
 486 | 				if (isColumn) {
 487 | 					return `${itemType} is now at position ${position} of ${total}`;
 488 | 				}
 489 | 
 490 | 				if (activeColumn !== overColumn) {
 491 | 					return `${itemType} is now at position ${position} of ${total} in ${overColumn}`;
 492 | 				}
 493 | 
 494 | 				return `${itemType} is now at position ${position} of ${total}`;
 495 | 			},
 496 | 			onDragEnd({ active, over }) {
 497 | 				if (!over) return;
 498 | 
 499 | 				const isColumn = active.id in value;
 500 | 				const itemType = isColumn ? "column" : "item";
 501 | 				const position = isColumn
 502 | 					? Object.keys(value).indexOf(over.id as string) + 1
 503 | 					: (() => {
 504 | 							const column = getColumn(over.id);
 505 | 							if (!(column && value[column])) return 1;
 506 | 							return value[column].findIndex(item => getItemValue(item) === over.id) + 1;
 507 | 						})();
 508 | 				const total = isColumn
 509 | 					? Object.keys(value).length
 510 | 					: (() => {
 511 | 							const column = getColumn(over.id);
 512 | 							return column ? (value[column]?.length ?? 0) : 0;
 513 | 						})();
 514 | 
 515 | 				const overColumn = getColumn(over.id);
 516 | 				const activeColumn = getColumn(active.id);
 517 | 
 518 | 				if (isColumn) {
 519 | 					return `${itemType} was dropped at position ${position} of ${total}`;
 520 | 				}
 521 | 
 522 | 				if (activeColumn !== overColumn) {
 523 | 					return `${itemType} was dropped at position ${position} of ${total} in ${overColumn}`;
 524 | 				}
 525 | 
 526 | 				return `${itemType} was dropped at position ${position} of ${total}`;
 527 | 			},
 528 | 			onDragCancel({ active }) {
 529 | 				const isColumn = active.id in value;
 530 | 				const itemType = isColumn ? "column" : "item";
 531 | 				return `Dragging was cancelled. ${itemType} was dropped.`;
 532 | 			}
 533 | 		}),
 534 | 		[value, getColumn, getItemValue]
 535 | 	);
 536 | 
 537 | 	const contextValue = React.useMemo<KanbanContextValue<T>>(
 538 | 		() => ({
 539 | 			id,
 540 | 			items: value,
 541 | 			modifiers,
 542 | 			strategy,
 543 | 			orientation,
 544 | 			activeId,
 545 | 			setActiveId,
 546 | 			getItemValue,
 547 | 			flatCursor
 548 | 		}),
 549 | 		[id, value, activeId, modifiers, strategy, orientation, getItemValue, flatCursor]
 550 | 	);
 551 | 
 552 | 	return (
 553 | 		<KanbanContext.Provider value={contextValue as KanbanContextValue<unknown>}>
 554 | 			<DndContext
 555 | 				collisionDetection={collisionDetection}
 556 | 				modifiers={modifiers}
 557 | 				sensors={sensors}
 558 | 				{...kanbanProps}
 559 | 				accessibility={{
 560 | 					announcements,
 561 | 					screenReaderInstructions: {
 562 | 						draggable: `
 563 |             To pick up a kanban item or column, press space or enter.
 564 |             While dragging, use the arrow keys to move the item.
 565 |             Press space or enter again to drop the item in its new position, or press escape to cancel.
 566 |           `
 567 | 					},
 568 | 					...accessibility
 569 | 				}}
 570 | 				id={id}
 571 | 				measuring={{
 572 | 					droppable: {
 573 | 						strategy: MeasuringStrategy.Always
 574 | 					}
 575 | 				}}
 576 | 				onDragCancel={onDragCancel}
 577 | 				onDragEnd={onDragEnd}
 578 | 				onDragOver={onDragOver}
 579 | 				onDragStart={onDragStart}
 580 | 			/>
 581 | 		</KanbanContext.Provider>
 582 | 	);
 583 | }
 584 | 
 585 | const KanbanBoardContext = React.createContext<boolean>(false);
 586 | 
 587 | interface KanbanBoardProps extends React.ComponentProps<"div"> {
 588 | 	asChild?: boolean;
 589 | 	children: React.ReactNode;
 590 | }
 591 | 
 592 | function KanbanBoard(props: KanbanBoardProps) {
 593 | 	const { asChild, className, ref, ...boardProps } = props;
 594 | 
 595 | 	const context = useKanbanContext(BOARD_NAME);
 596 | 
 597 | 	const columns = React.useMemo(() => Object.keys(context.items), [context.items]);
 598 | 
 599 | 	const BoardPrimitive = asChild ? SlotPrimitive.Slot : "div";
 600 | 
 601 | 	return (
 602 | 		<KanbanBoardContext.Provider value={true}>
 603 | 			<SortableContext
 604 | 				items={columns}
 605 | 				strategy={
 606 | 					context.orientation === "horizontal" ? horizontalListSortingStrategy : verticalListSortingStrategy
 607 | 				}
 608 | 			>
 609 | 				<BoardPrimitive
 610 | 					aria-orientation={context.orientation}
 611 | 					data-orientation={context.orientation}
 612 | 					data-slot='kanban-board'
 613 | 					{...boardProps}
 614 | 					className={cn(
 615 | 						"flex size-full gap-4",
 616 | 						context.orientation === "horizontal" ? "flex-row" : "flex-col",
 617 | 						className
 618 | 					)}
 619 | 					ref={ref}
 620 | 				/>
 621 | 			</SortableContext>
 622 | 		</KanbanBoardContext.Provider>
 623 | 	);
 624 | }
 625 | 
 626 | interface KanbanColumnContextValue {
 627 | 	attributes: DraggableAttributes;
 628 | 	disabled?: boolean;
 629 | 	id: string;
 630 | 	isDragging?: boolean;
 631 | 	listeners: DraggableSyntheticListeners | undefined;
 632 | 	setActivatorNodeRef: (node: HTMLElement | null) => void;
 633 | }
 634 | 
 635 | const KanbanColumnContext = React.createContext<KanbanColumnContextValue | null>(null);
 636 | 
 637 | function useKanbanColumnContext(consumerName: string) {
 638 | 	const context = React.useContext(KanbanColumnContext);
 639 | 	if (!context) {
 640 | 		throw new Error(`\`${consumerName}\` must be used within \`${COLUMN_NAME}\``);
 641 | 	}
 642 | 	return context;
 643 | }
 644 | 
 645 | const animateLayoutChanges: AnimateLayoutChanges = args => defaultAnimateLayoutChanges({ ...args, wasDragging: true });
 646 | 
 647 | interface KanbanColumnProps extends React.ComponentProps<"div"> {
 648 | 	asChild?: boolean;
 649 | 	asHandle?: boolean;
 650 | 	children: React.ReactNode;
 651 | 	disabled?: boolean;
 652 | 	value: UniqueIdentifier;
 653 | }
 654 | 
 655 | function KanbanColumn(props: KanbanColumnProps) {
 656 | 	const { value, asChild, asHandle, disabled, className, style, ref, ...columnProps } = props;
 657 | 
 658 | 	const id = React.useId();
 659 | 	const context = useKanbanContext(COLUMN_NAME);
 660 | 	const inBoard = React.useContext(KanbanBoardContext);
 661 | 	const inOverlay = React.useContext(KanbanOverlayContext);
 662 | 
 663 | 	if (!(inBoard || inOverlay)) {
 664 | 		throw new Error(`\`${COLUMN_NAME}\` must be used within \`${BOARD_NAME}\` or \`${OVERLAY_NAME}\``);
 665 | 	}
 666 | 
 667 | 	if (value === "") {
 668 | 		throw new Error(`\`${COLUMN_NAME}\` value cannot be an empty string`);
 669 | 	}
 670 | 
 671 | 	const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, setActivatorNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({
 672 | 		id: value,
 673 | 		disabled,
 674 | 		animateLayoutChanges
 675 | 	});
 676 | 
 677 | 	const composedRef = useComposedRefs(ref, node => {
 678 | 		if (disabled) return;
 679 | 		setNodeRef(node as HTMLElement); // Explicitly type node
 680 | 	});
 681 | 
 682 | 	const composedStyle = React.useMemo<React.CSSProperties>(
 683 | 		() => ({
 684 | 			transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
 685 | 			transition,
 686 | 			...style
 687 | 		}),
 688 | 		[transform, transition, style]
 689 | 	);
 690 | 
 691 | 	const items = React.useMemo(() => {
 692 | 		const items = context.items[value] ?? [];
 693 | 		return items.map(item => context.getItemValue(item));
 694 | 		// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps -- context is unstable object ref, using specific properties
 695 | 	}, [context.items, value, context.getItemValue]);
 696 | 
 697 | 	const columnContext = React.useMemo<KanbanColumnContextValue>(
 698 | 		() => ({
 699 | 			id,
 700 | 			attributes,
 701 | 			listeners,
 702 | 			setActivatorNodeRef,
 703 | 			isDragging,
 704 | 			disabled
 705 | 		}),
 706 | 		[id, attributes, listeners, setActivatorNodeRef, isDragging, disabled]
 707 | 	);
 708 | 
 709 | 	const ColumnPrimitive = asChild ? SlotPrimitive.Slot : "div";
 710 | 
 711 | 	return (
 712 | 		<KanbanColumnContext.Provider value={columnContext}>
 713 | 			<SortableContext
 714 | 				items={items}
 715 | 				strategy={
 716 | 					context.orientation === "horizontal" ? horizontalListSortingStrategy : verticalListSortingStrategy
 717 | 				}
 718 | 			>
 719 | 				<ColumnPrimitive
 720 | 					data-disabled={disabled}
 721 | 					data-dragging={isDragging ? "" : undefined}
 722 | 					data-slot='kanban-column'
 723 | 					id={id}
 724 | 					{...columnProps}
 725 | 					{...(asHandle && !disabled ? attributes : {})}
 726 | 					{...(asHandle && !disabled ? listeners : {})}
 727 | 					className={cn(
 728 | 						"flex size-full flex-col gap-2 rounded-lg border bg-zinc-100 p-2.5 aria-disabled:pointer-events-none aria-disabled:opacity-50 dark:bg-zinc-900",
 729 | 						{
 730 | 							"touch-none select-none": asHandle,
 731 | 							"cursor-default": context.flatCursor,
 732 | 							"data-dragging:cursor-grabbing": !context.flatCursor,
 733 | 							"cursor-grab": !isDragging && asHandle && !context.flatCursor,
 734 | 							"opacity-50": isDragging,
 735 | 							"pointer-events-none opacity-50": disabled
 736 | 						},
 737 | 						className
 738 | 					)}
 739 | 					ref={composedRef}
 740 | 					style={composedStyle}
 741 | 				/>
 742 | 			</SortableContext>
 743 | 		</KanbanColumnContext.Provider>
 744 | 	);
 745 | }
 746 | 
 747 | interface KanbanColumnHandleProps extends React.ComponentProps<"button"> {
 748 | 	asChild?: boolean;
 749 | }
 750 | 
 751 | function KanbanColumnHandle(props: KanbanColumnHandleProps) {
 752 | 	const { asChild, disabled, className, ref, ...columnHandleProps } = props;
 753 | 
 754 | 	const context = useKanbanContext(COLUMN_NAME);
 755 | 	const columnContext = useKanbanColumnContext(COLUMN_HANDLE_NAME);
 756 | 
 757 | 	const isDisabled = disabled ?? columnContext.disabled;
 758 | 
 759 | 	const composedRef = useComposedRefs(ref, node => {
 760 | 		if (isDisabled) return;
 761 | 		columnContext.setActivatorNodeRef(node as HTMLElement); // Explicitly type node
 762 | 	});
 763 | 
 764 | 	const HandlePrimitive = asChild ? SlotPrimitive.Slot : "button";
 765 | 
 766 | 	return (
 767 | 		<HandlePrimitive
 768 | 			aria-controls={columnContext.id}
 769 | 			data-disabled={isDisabled}
 770 | 			data-dragging={columnContext.isDragging ? "" : undefined}
 771 | 			data-slot='kanban-column-handle'
 772 | 			type='button'
 773 | 			{...columnHandleProps}
 774 | 			{...(isDisabled ? {} : columnContext.attributes)}
 775 | 			{...(isDisabled ? {} : columnContext.listeners)}
 776 | 			className={cn(
 777 | 				"select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50",
 778 | 				context.flatCursor ? "cursor-default" : "cursor-grab data-dragging:cursor-grabbing",
 779 | 				className
 780 | 			)}
 781 | 			disabled={isDisabled}
 782 | 			ref={composedRef}
 783 | 		/>
 784 | 	);
 785 | }
 786 | 
 787 | interface KanbanItemContextValue {
 788 | 	attributes: DraggableAttributes;
 789 | 	disabled?: boolean;
 790 | 	id: string;
 791 | 	isDragging?: boolean;
 792 | 	listeners: DraggableSyntheticListeners | undefined;
 793 | 	setActivatorNodeRef: (node: HTMLElement | null) => void;
 794 | }
 795 | 
 796 | const KanbanItemContext = React.createContext<KanbanItemContextValue | null>(null);
 797 | 
 798 | function useKanbanItemContext(consumerName: string) {
 799 | 	const context = React.useContext(KanbanItemContext);
 800 | 	if (!context) {
 801 | 		throw new Error(`\`${consumerName}\` must be used within \`${ITEM_NAME}\``);
 802 | 	}
 803 | 	return context;
 804 | }
 805 | 
 806 | interface KanbanItemProps extends React.ComponentProps<"div"> {
 807 | 	asChild?: boolean;
 808 | 	asHandle?: boolean;
 809 | 	disabled?: boolean;
 810 | 	value: UniqueIdentifier;
 811 | }
 812 | 
 813 | function KanbanItem(props: KanbanItemProps) {
 814 | 	const { value, style, asHandle, asChild, disabled, className, ref, ...itemProps } = props;
 815 | 
 816 | 	const id = React.useId();
 817 | 	const context = useKanbanContext(ITEM_NAME);
 818 | 	const inBoard = React.useContext(KanbanBoardContext);
 819 | 	const inOverlay = React.useContext(KanbanOverlayContext);
 820 | 
 821 | 	if (!(inBoard || inOverlay)) {
 822 | 		throw new Error(`\`${ITEM_NAME}\` must be used within \`${BOARD_NAME}\``);
 823 | 	}
 824 | 
 825 | 	const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, setActivatorNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({
 826 | 		id: value,
 827 | 		disabled
 828 | 	});
 829 | 
 830 | 	if (value === "") {
 831 | 		throw new Error(`\`${ITEM_NAME}\` value cannot be an empty string`);
 832 | 	}
 833 | 
 834 | 	const composedRef = useComposedRefs(ref, node => {
 835 | 		if (disabled) return;
 836 | 		setNodeRef(node as HTMLElement); // Explicitly type node
 837 | 	});
 838 | 
 839 | 	const composedStyle = React.useMemo<React.CSSProperties>(
 840 | 		() => ({
 841 | 			transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
 842 | 			transition,
 843 | 			...style
 844 | 		}),
 845 | 		[transform, transition, style]
 846 | 	);
 847 | 
 848 | 	const itemContext = React.useMemo<KanbanItemContextValue>(
 849 | 		() => ({
 850 | 			id,
 851 | 			attributes,
 852 | 			listeners,
 853 | 			setActivatorNodeRef,
 854 | 			isDragging,
 855 | 			disabled
 856 | 		}),
 857 | 		[id, attributes, listeners, setActivatorNodeRef, isDragging, disabled]
 858 | 	);
 859 | 
 860 | 	const ItemPrimitive = asChild ? SlotPrimitive.Slot : "div";
 861 | 
 862 | 	return (
 863 | 		<KanbanItemContext.Provider value={itemContext}>
 864 | 			<ItemPrimitive
 865 | 				data-disabled={disabled}
 866 | 				data-dragging={isDragging ? "" : undefined}
 867 | 				data-slot='kanban-item'
 868 | 				id={id}
 869 | 				{...itemProps}
 870 | 				{...(asHandle && !disabled ? attributes : {})}
 871 | 				{...(asHandle && !disabled ? listeners : {})}
 872 | 				className={cn(
 873 | 					"focus-visible:outline-hidden focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-1",
 874 | 					{
 875 | 						"touch-none select-none": asHandle,
 876 | 						"cursor-default": context.flatCursor,
 877 | 						"data-dragging:cursor-grabbing": !context.flatCursor,
 878 | 						"cursor-grab": !isDragging && asHandle && !context.flatCursor,
 879 | 						"opacity-50": isDragging,
 880 | 						"pointer-events-none opacity-50": disabled
 881 | 					},
 882 | 					className
 883 | 				)}
 884 | 				ref={composedRef}
 885 | 				style={composedStyle}
 886 | 			/>
 887 | 		</KanbanItemContext.Provider>
 888 | 	);
 889 | }
 890 | 
 891 | interface KanbanItemHandleProps extends React.ComponentProps<"button"> {
 892 | 	asChild?: boolean;
 893 | }
 894 | 
 895 | function KanbanItemHandle(props: KanbanItemHandleProps) {
 896 | 	const { asChild, disabled, className, ref, ...itemHandleProps } = props;
 897 | 
 898 | 	const context = useKanbanContext(ITEM_HANDLE_NAME);
 899 | 	const itemContext = useKanbanItemContext(ITEM_HANDLE_NAME);
 900 | 
 901 | 	const isDisabled = disabled ?? itemContext.disabled;
 902 | 
 903 | 	const composedRef = useComposedRefs(ref, node => {
 904 | 		if (isDisabled) return;
 905 | 		itemContext.setActivatorNodeRef(node as HTMLElement); // Explicitly type node
 906 | 	});
 907 | 
 908 | 	const HandlePrimitive = asChild ? SlotPrimitive.Slot : "button";
 909 | 
 910 | 	return (
 911 | 		<HandlePrimitive
 912 | 			aria-controls={itemContext.id}
 913 | 			data-disabled={isDisabled}
 914 | 			data-dragging={itemContext.isDragging ? "" : undefined}
 915 | 			data-slot='kanban-item-handle'
 916 | 			type='button'
 917 | 			{...itemHandleProps}
 918 | 			{...(isDisabled ? {} : itemContext.attributes)}
 919 | 			{...(isDisabled ? {} : itemContext.listeners)}
 920 | 			className={cn(
 921 | 				"select-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50",
 922 | 				context.flatCursor ? "cursor-default" : "cursor-grab data-dragging:cursor-grabbing",
 923 | 				className
 924 | 			)}
 925 | 			disabled={isDisabled}
 926 | 			ref={composedRef}
 927 | 		/>
 928 | 	);
 929 | }
 930 | 
 931 | const KanbanOverlayContext = React.createContext(false);
 932 | 
 933 | const dropAnimation: DropAnimation = {
 934 | 	sideEffects: defaultDropAnimationSideEffects({
 935 | 		styles: {
 936 | 			active: {
 937 | 				opacity: "0.4"
 938 | 			}
 939 | 		}
 940 | 	})
 941 | };
 942 | 
 943 | interface KanbanOverlayProps extends Omit<React.ComponentProps<typeof DragOverlay>, "children"> {
 944 | 	children?: React.ReactNode | ((params: { value: UniqueIdentifier; variant: "column" | "item" }) => React.ReactNode);
 945 | 	container?: Element | DocumentFragment | null;
 946 | }
 947 | 
 948 | function KanbanOverlay(props: KanbanOverlayProps) {
 949 | 	const { container: containerProp, children, ...overlayProps } = props;
 950 | 
 951 | 	const context = useKanbanContext(OVERLAY_NAME);
 952 | 
 953 | 	const [mounted, setMounted] = React.useState(false);
 954 | 
 955 | 	React.useLayoutEffect(() => setMounted(true), []);
 956 | 
 957 | 	const container = containerProp ?? (mounted ? globalThis.document?.body : null);
 958 | 
 959 | 	if (!container) return null;
 960 | 
 961 | 	const variant = context.activeId && context.activeId in context.items ? "column" : "item";
 962 | 
 963 | 	return ReactDOM.createPortal(
 964 | 		<DragOverlay
 965 | 			className={cn(!context.flatCursor && "cursor-grabbing")}
 966 | 			dropAnimation={dropAnimation}
 967 | 			modifiers={context.modifiers}
 968 | 			{...overlayProps}
 969 | 		>
 970 | 			<KanbanOverlayContext.Provider value={true}>
 971 | 				{context.activeId && children
 972 | 					? typeof children === "function"
 973 | 						? children({
 974 | 								value: context.activeId,
 975 | 								variant
 976 | 							})
 977 | 						: children
 978 | 					: null}
 979 | 			</KanbanOverlayContext.Provider>
 980 | 		</DragOverlay>,
 981 | 		container
 982 | 	);
 983 | }
 984 | 
 985 | export {
 986 | 	Kanban,
 987 | 	KanbanBoard,
 988 | 	KanbanColumn,
 989 | 	KanbanColumnHandle,
 990 | 	KanbanItem,
 991 | 	KanbanItemHandle,
 992 | 	KanbanOverlay,
 993 | 	//
 994 | 	type KanbanProps
 995 | };

```

`components/ui/link.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { createLink, type LinkComponent } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   2 | import { type AriaLinkOptions, mergeProps, useFocusRing, useHover, useLink, useObjectRef } from "react-aria";
   3 | import { tv } from "tailwind-variants";
   4 | 
   5 | // import { ring } from '../../lib/utils'; // Assuming 'ring' is a utility from '../../lib/utils'
   6 | 
   7 | export interface AriaLinkProps extends Omit<AriaLinkOptions, "href"> {
   8 | 	children?: React.ReactNode;
   9 | 	className?: string;
  10 | }
  11 | 
  12 | const linkStyles = tv({
  13 | 	// extend: ring, // Commented out due to missing 'ring' export
  14 | 	base: ["flex items-center gap-2 text-primary text-sm", "hover:underline"]
  15 | });
  16 | 
  17 | const AriaLinkComponent = ({ className, ...props }: AriaLinkProps & { ref?: React.Ref<HTMLAnchorElement> }) => {
  18 | 	const ref = useObjectRef(props.ref);
  19 | 
  20 | 	const { isPressed, linkProps } = useLink(props, ref);
  21 | 	const { isHovered, hoverProps } = useHover(props);
  22 | 	const { isFocusVisible, isFocused, focusProps } = useFocusRing(props);
  23 | 
  24 | 	return (
  25 | 		<a
  26 | 			{...mergeProps(linkProps, hoverProps, focusProps, props)}
  27 | 			className={linkStyles({ className })}
  28 | 			data-focus-visible={isFocusVisible || undefined}
  29 | 			data-focused={isFocused || undefined}
  30 | 			data-hovered={isHovered || undefined}
  31 | 			data-pressed={isPressed || undefined}
  32 | 			ref={ref}
  33 | 		/>
  34 | 	);
  35 | };
  36 | 
  37 | AriaLinkComponent.displayName = "AriaLinkComponent";
  38 | 
  39 | const CreatedLinkComponent = createLink(AriaLinkComponent);
  40 | 
  41 | export const Link: LinkComponent<typeof AriaLinkComponent> = props => (
  42 | 	<CreatedLinkComponent
  43 | 		preload='intent'
  44 | 		{...props}
  45 | 	/>
  46 | );

```

```tsx
   2 | 	Header as AriaHeader,
```

`components/ui/menubar.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { CheckIcon, ChevronRightIcon } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { Menubar as MenubarPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   5 | import type * as React from "react";
   6 | 
   7 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   8 | 
   9 | function Menubar({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Root>) {
  10 | 	return (
  11 | 		<MenubarPrimitive.Root
  12 | 			className={cn("flex h-8 items-center gap-0.5 rounded-lg border p-[3px]", className)}
  13 | 			data-slot='menubar'
  14 | 			{...props}
  15 | 		/>
  16 | 	);
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | function MenubarMenu({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Menu>) {
  20 | 	return (
  21 | 		<MenubarPrimitive.Menu
  22 | 			data-slot='menubar-menu'
```

`components/ui/modal.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from "@/components/ui/dialog";
   2 | 
   3 | interface ModalProps {
   4 | 	children?: React.ReactNode;
   5 | 	description: string;
   6 | 	isOpen: boolean;
   7 | 	onClose: () => void;
   8 | 	title: string;
   9 | }
  10 | 
  11 | export function Modal({ title, description, isOpen, onClose, children }: ModalProps) {
  12 | 	const onChange = (open: boolean) => {
  13 | 		if (!open) {
  14 | 			onClose();
  15 | 		}
  16 | 	};
  17 | 
  18 | 	return (
  19 | 		<Dialog
  20 | 			onOpenChange={onChange}
  21 | 			open={isOpen}
  22 | 		>
  23 | 			<DialogContent>
  24 | 				<DialogHeader>
  25 | 					<DialogTitle>{title}</DialogTitle>
  26 | 					<DialogDescription>{description}</DialogDescription>
  27 | 				</DialogHeader>
  28 | 				<div>{children}</div>
  29 | 			</DialogContent>
  30 | 		</Dialog>
  31 | 	);
  32 | }

```

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { FolderIcon, MoreHorizontalIcon, ShareIcon, Trash2Icon } from "lucide-react";
   4 | 
   5 | import {
   6 | 	DropdownMenu,
   7 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
   8 | 	DropdownMenuItem,

  10 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger

  13 | 	SidebarGroup,

  19 | 	useSidebar
  20 | } from "@/components/ui/sidebar";
  21 | 
  22 | export function NavDocuments({
  23 | 	items
  24 | }: {

  26 | 		name: string;
  27 | 		url: string;
  28 | 		icon: React.ReactNode;
  29 | 	}[];
  30 | }) {
  31 | 	const { isMobile } = useSidebar();
  32 |

  35 | 			<SidebarGroupLabel>Documents</SidebarGroupLabel>

  40 | 							<a href={item.url}>
  41 | 								{item.icon}
  42 | 								<span>{item.name}</span>
  43 | 							</a>
  44 | 						</SidebarMenuButton>
  45 | 						<DropdownMenu>

  53 | 								</SidebarMenuAction>
  54 | 							</DropdownMenuTrigger>
```

```tsx
  11 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  12 | } from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  13 | import { SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuItem, useSidebar } from "@/components/ui/sidebar";
  14 | 
  15 | export function NavUser({
  16 | 	user
  17 | }: {
  18 | 	user: {
  19 | 		name: string;
  20 | 		email: string;
  21 | 		avatar: string;
  22 | 	};
  23 | }) {

  37 | 									alt={user.name}
  38 | 									src={user.avatar}

  74 | 								Account
```

`components/ui/navigation-menu.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { cva } from "class-variance-authority";
   2 | import { ChevronDownIcon } from "lucide-react";
   3 | import { NavigationMenu as NavigationMenuPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   4 | import type * as React from "react";
   5 | 
   6 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   7 | 
   8 | function NavigationMenu({
   9 | 	className,
  10 | 	children,
  11 | 	viewport = true,
  12 | 	...props
  13 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Root> & {
  14 | 	viewport?: boolean;
  15 | }) {
  16 | 	return (
  17 | 		<NavigationMenuPrimitive.Root
  18 | 			className={cn(
  19 | 				"group/navigation-menu relative flex max-w-max flex-1 items-center justify-center",
  20 | 				className
  21 | 			)}
  22 | 			data-slot='navigation-menu'
  23 | 			data-viewport={viewport}
  24 | 			{...props}
  25 | 		>
  26 | 			{children}
  27 | 			{viewport && <NavigationMenuViewport />}
  28 | 		</NavigationMenuPrimitive.Root>
  29 | 	);
  30 | }
  31 |

  51 |

  54 | );
  55 | 
  56 | function NavigationMenuTrigger({
  57 | 	className,
  58 | 	children,
  59 | 	...props

  61 | 	return (
  62 | 		<NavigationMenuPrimitive.Trigger

  67 | 			{children}{" "}

  70 | 				className='relative top-px ms-1 size-3 transition duration-300 group-data-open/navigation-menu-trigger:rotate-180 group-data-popup-open/navigation-menu-trigger:rotate-180'
  71 | 			/>
  72 | 		</NavigationMenuPrimitive.Trigger>
  73 | 	);
  74 | }
  75 | 
  76 | function NavigationMenuContent({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Content>) {
  77 | 	return (
  78 | 		<NavigationMenuPrimitive.Content
  79 | 			className={cn(
  80 | 				"data-[motion=from-end]:slide-in-from-right-52 data-[motion=from-start]:slide-in-from-left-52 data-[motion=to-end]:slide-out-to-right-52 data-[motion=to-start]:slide-out-to-left-52 data-[motion^=from-]:fade-in data-[motion^=to-]:fade-out group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:data-open:fade-in-0 group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:data-open:zoom-in-95 group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:data-closed:fade-out-0 group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:data-closed:zoom-out-95 start-0 top-0 w-full p-1 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] data-[motion^=from-]:animate-in data-[motion^=to-]:animate-out **:data-[slot=navigation-menu-link]:focus:outline-none **:data-[slot=navigation-menu-link]:focus:ring-0 group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:top-full group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:mt-1.5 group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:overflow-hidden group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:rounded-lg group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:bg-popover group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:text-popover-foreground group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:shadow group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:ring-1 group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:ring-foreground/10 group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:duration-300 group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:data-closed:animate-out group-data-[viewport=false]/navigation-menu:data-open:animate-in md:absolute md:w-auto",
  81 | 				className
  82 | 			)}

  85 | 		/>
  86 | 	);
  87 | }

  90 | 	className,

  98 | 					className
  99 | 				)}
 100 | 				data-slot='navigation-menu-viewport'
 101 | 				{...props}
 102 | 			/>
 103 | 		</div>
 104 | 	);
 105 | }

 109 | 		<NavigationMenuPrimitive.Link
 110 | 			className={cn(
 111 | 				"flex items-center gap-2 in-data-[slot=navigation-menu-content]:rounded-md rounded-lg p-2 text-sm outline-none transition-all hover:bg-muted focus:bg-muted focus-visible:outline-1 focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50 data-active:bg-muted/50 data-active:focus:bg-muted data-active:hover:bg-muted [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4",
```

`components/ui/notification-card.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import type { FC } from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | import { Icons } from "@/components/icons";
   4 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
   5 | 
   6 | export type NotificationStatus = "unread" | "read" | "archived";
   7 | export type ActionType = "redirect" | "api_call" | "workflow" | "modal";
   8 | export type ActionStyle = "primary" | "danger" | "default";
   9 | 
  10 | export interface NotificationAction {
  11 | 	executed?: boolean;
  12 | 	id: string;
  13 | 	label: string;
  14 | 	style?: ActionStyle;
  15 | 	type: ActionType;
  16 | }
  17 | 
  18 | export interface NotificationCardProps {
  19 | 	actions?: NotificationAction[];
  20 | 	body: string;
  21 | 	className?: string;
  22 | 	createdAt?: string | Date;
  23 | 	id: string;
  24 | 	loadingActionId?: string;
  25 | 	onAction?: (notificationId: string, actionId: string, actionType: ActionType) => void;
  26 | 	onMarkAsRead?: (id: string) => void;
  27 | 	status?: NotificationStatus;
  28 | 	title: string;
  29 | }
  30 | 
  31 | const formatDate = (date: string | Date): string => {
  32 | 	const d = new Date(date);
  33 | 	const now = new Date();
  34 | 	const diffMs = now.getTime() - d.getTime();
  35 | 	const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60));
  36 | 	const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60 * 60));
  37 | 	const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  38 | 
  39 | 	if (diffMins < 1) return "Just now";
  40 | 	if (diffMins < 60) return `${diffMins}m ago`;
  41 | 	if (diffHours < 24) return `${diffHours}h ago`;
  42 | 	if (diffDays < 7) return `${diffDays}d ago`;
  43 | 
  44 | 	return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
  45 | 		month: "short",
  46 | 		day: "numeric"
  47 | 	});
  48 | };
  49 | 
  50 | const getActionIcon = (actionType: ActionType) => {
  51 | 	const iconProps = { size: 12, strokeWidth: 2.5 };
  52 | 	switch (actionType) {
  53 | 		case "redirect":
  54 | 			return <Icons.externalLink {...iconProps} />;
  55 | 		case "api_call":
  56 | 			return <Icons.check {...iconProps} />;
  57 | 		case "workflow":
  58 | 			return <Icons.clock {...iconProps} />;
  59 | 		case "modal":
  60 | 			return <Icons.alertCircle {...iconProps} />;
  61 | 		default:
  62 | 			return null;
  63 | 	}
  64 | };
  65 | 
  66 | export const NotificationCard: FC<NotificationCardProps> = ({
  67 | 	id,
  68 | 	title,
  69 | 	body,
  70 | 	status = "unread",
  71 | 	createdAt,
  72 | 	actions = [],
  73 | 	onMarkAsRead,
  74 | 	onAction,
  75 | 	loadingActionId,
  76 | 	className
  77 | }) => {
  78 | 	const isUnread = status === "unread";
  79 | 
  80 | 	return (
  81 | 		<div
  82 | 			className={cn(
  83 | 				"group relative w-full rounded-2xl transition-all",
  84 | 				isUnread ? "bg-muted" : "bg-muted/40",
  85 | 				className
  86 | 			)}
  87 | 		>
  88 | 			<div className='px-4 py-3.5'>
  89 | 				<div className='flex items-start justify-between gap-3'>
  90 | 					{/* Main content */}
  91 | 					<div className='min-w-0 flex-1 space-y-1'>
  92 | 						{/* Title with unread indicator */}
  93 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  94 | 							<h3
  95 | 								className={cn(
  96 | 									"font-semibold text-[15px] leading-tight",
  97 | 									isUnread ? "text-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground"
  98 | 								)}
  99 | 							>
 100 | 								{title}
 101 | 							</h3>
 102 | 							{isUnread && <div className='h-1.5 w-1.5 flex-shrink-0 rounded-full bg-sky-500' />}
 103 | 						</div>
 104 | 
 105 | 						{/* Description */}
 106 | 						<p
 107 | 							className={cn(
 108 | 								"mb-0 text-[13px]",
 109 | 								isUnread ? "text-muted-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground/60"
 110 | 							)}
 111 | 						>
 112 | 							{body}
 113 | 						</p>
 114 | 					</div>
 115 | 
 116 | 					{/* Mark as read button */}
 117 | 					{isUnread && onMarkAsRead && (
 118 | 						<button
 119 | 							aria-label='Mark as read'
 120 | 							className={cn(
 121 | 								"rounded-lg p-1.5 transition-colors",
 122 | 								"text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent hover:text-foreground"
 123 | 							)}
 124 | 							onClick={() => onMarkAsRead(id)}
 125 | 							type='button'
 126 | 						>
 127 | 							<Icons.check size={16} />
 128 | 						</button>
 129 | 					)}
 130 | 				</div>
 131 | 
 132 | 				<div className='mt-3 flex items-end justify-between'>
 133 | 					{/* Actions */}
 134 | 					{actions.length > 0 && (
 135 | 						<div className={cn("flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2", !isUnread && "opacity-60")}>
 136 | 							{actions.map(action => {
 137 | 								const isLoading = loadingActionId === action.id;
 138 | 								const isExecuted = action.executed;
 139 | 								const showLoading = isLoading && action.type !== "modal";
 140 | 
 141 | 								return (
 142 | 									<button
 143 | 										className={cn(
 144 | 											"flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg px-4 py-1.5 font-normal text-xs transition",
 145 | 											action.style === "primary"
 146 | 												? "bg-primary/10 text-primary hover:bg-primary/20"
 147 | 												: action.style === "danger"
 148 | 													? "bg-destructive/10 text-destructive hover:bg-destructive/20"
 149 | 													: "bg-accent text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent hover:text-foreground",
 150 | 											showLoading && "opacity-50",
 151 | 											isExecuted && "cursor-not-allowed opacity-60"
 152 | 										)}
 153 | 										disabled={isLoading || isExecuted}
 154 | 										key={action.id}
 155 | 										onClick={() => onAction?.(id, action.id, action.type)}
 156 | 										type='button'
 157 | 									>
 158 | 										{showLoading ? (
 159 | 											<Icons.spinner
 160 | 												className='animate-spin'
 161 | 												size={12}
 162 | 											/>
 163 | 										) : (
 164 | 											<>
 165 | 												<span>{action.label}</span>
 166 | 												{isExecuted ? (
 167 | 													<Icons.check
 168 | 														size={12}
 169 | 														strokeWidth={2.5}
 170 | 													/>
 171 | 												) : (
 172 | 													getActionIcon(action.type)
 173 | 												)}
 174 | 											</>
 175 | 										)}
 176 | 									</button>
 177 | 								);
 178 | 							})}
 179 | 						</div>
 180 | 					)}
 181 | 
 182 | 					{/* Timestamp */}
 183 | 					{createdAt && (
 184 | 						<span className='inline-block text-[11px] text-muted-foreground/60'>
 185 | 							{formatDate(createdAt)}
 186 | 						</span>
 187 | 					)}
 188 | 				</div>
 189 | 			</div>
 190 | 		</div>
 191 | 	);
 192 | };

```

`components/ui/pagination.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { ChevronLeftIcon, ChevronRightIcon, MoreHorizontalIcon } from "lucide-react";
   2 | import type * as React from "react";
   3 | 
   4 | import { Button } from "#/components/ui/button.tsx";
   5 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   6 | 
   7 | function Pagination({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"nav">) {
   8 | 	return (
   9 | 		<nav
  10 | 			aria-label='pagination'
  11 | 			className={cn("mx-auto flex w-full justify-center", className)}
  12 | 			data-slot='pagination'
  13 | 			role='navigation'
  14 | 			{...props}
  15 | 		/>
  16 | 	);
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | function PaginationContent({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"ul">) {
  20 | 	return (
  21 | 		<ul
  22 | 			className={cn("flex items-center gap-0.5", className)}
  23 | 			data-slot='pagination-content'
  24 | 			{...props}
  25 | 		/>
  26 | 	);
  27 | }
  28 | 
  29 | function PaginationItem({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"li">) {
  30 | 	return (
  31 | 		<li
  32 | 			data-slot='pagination-item'
  33 | 			{...props}
  34 | 		/>
  35 | 	);
  36 | }
  37 | 
  38 | type PaginationLinkProps = {
  39 | 	isActive?: boolean;
  40 | } & Pick<React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>, "size"> &
  41 | 	React.ComponentProps<"a">;
  42 | 
  43 | function PaginationLink({ className, isActive, size = "icon", ...props }: PaginationLinkProps) {
  44 | 	return (
  45 | 		<Button
  46 | 			asChild
  47 | 			className={cn(className)}
  48 | 			size={size}
  49 | 			variant={isActive ? "outline" : "ghost"}
  50 | 		>
  51 | 			<a
  52 | 				aria-current={isActive ? "page" : undefined}
  53 | 				data-active={isActive}
  54 | 				data-slot='pagination-link'
  55 | 				{...props}
  56 | 			/>
  57 | 		</Button>
  58 | 	);
  59 | }
  60 | 
  61 | function PaginationPrevious({
  62 | 	className,
  63 | 	text = "Previous",
  64 | 	...props
  65 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof PaginationLink> & { text?: string }) {
  66 | 	return (
  67 | 		<PaginationLink
  68 | 			aria-label='Go to previous page'
  69 | 			className={cn("ps-1.5!", className)}
  70 | 			size='default'
  71 | 			{...props}
  72 | 		>
  73 | 			<ChevronLeftIcon
  74 | 				className='rtl:rotate-180'
  75 | 				data-icon='inline-start'
  76 | 			/>
  77 | 			<span className='hidden sm:block'>{text}</span>
  78 | 		</PaginationLink>
  79 | 	);
  80 | }
  81 | 
  82 | function PaginationNext({
  83 | 	className,
  84 | 	text = "Next",
  85 | 	...props
  86 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof PaginationLink> & { text?: string }) {
  87 | 	return (
  88 | 		<PaginationLink
  89 | 			aria-label='Go to next page'
  90 | 			className={cn("pe-1.5!", className)}
  91 | 			size='default'
  92 | 			{...props}
  93 | 		>
  94 | 			<span className='hidden sm:block'>{text}</span>
  95 | 			<ChevronRightIcon
  96 | 				className='rtl:rotate-180'
  97 | 				data-icon='inline-end'
  98 | 			/>
  99 | 		</PaginationLink>
 100 | 	);
 101 | }
 102 | 
 103 | function PaginationEllipsis({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"span">) {
 104 | 	return (
 105 | 		<span
 106 | 			aria-hidden
 107 | 			className={cn("flex size-8 items-center justify-center [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4", className)}
 108 | 			data-slot='pagination-ellipsis'
 109 | 			{...props}
 110 | 		>
```

`components/ui/search-field.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { Search, X } from "lucide-react";
   2 | import {
   3 | 	Button as AriaButton,
   4 | 	FieldError as AriaFieldError,
   5 | 	SearchField as AriaSearchField,
   6 | 	type SearchFieldProps as AriaSearchFieldProps,
   7 | 	type ValidationResult as AriaValidationResult,
   8 | 	Text
   9 | } from "react-aria-components";
  10 | 
  11 | import { FieldGroup } from "./field";
  12 | import { Input } from "./input";
  13 | import { Label } from "./label";
  14 | 
  15 | export type SearchFieldProps = {
  16 | 	description?: string;
  17 | 	errorMessage?: string | ((validation: AriaValidationResult) => string);
  18 | 	label?: string;
  19 | } & AriaSearchFieldProps;
  20 | 
  21 | export function SearchField({ description, errorMessage, label, ...props }: SearchFieldProps) {
  22 | 	return (
  23 | 		<AriaSearchField
  24 | 			{...props}
  25 | 			className='group flex min-w-10 flex-col gap-1'
  26 | 		>
  27 | 			{label ? <Label>{label}</Label> : null}
  28 | 			<FieldGroup>
  29 | 				<Search
  30 | 					aria-hidden
  31 | 					className='ml-2 size-4 text-muted-foreground group-disabled:opacity-50'
  32 | 				/>
  33 | 				<Input
  34 | 					className='w-full outline-none [&::-webkit-search-cancel-button]:hidden'
  35 | 					placeholder='Search...'
  36 | 				/>
  37 | 				<AriaButton className='mr-1 flex size-6 items-center justify-center group-empty:invisible'>
  38 | 					<X
  39 | 						aria-hidden
  40 | 						className='size-4'
  41 | 					/>
  42 | 				</AriaButton>
  43 | 			</FieldGroup>
  44 | 			{description ? (
  45 | 				<Text
  46 | 					className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'
  47 | 					slot='description'
  48 | 				>
  49 | 					{description}
  50 | 				</Text>
  51 | 			) : null}
  52 | 			<AriaFieldError className='text-destructive text-sm'>
  53 | 				{typeof errorMessage === "function"
  54 | 					? (validation: AriaValidationResult) => errorMessage(validation)
  55 | 					: errorMessage}
  56 | 			</AriaFieldError>
  57 | 		</AriaSearchField>
  58 | 	);
  59 | }

```

`components/ui/select.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { CheckIcon, ChevronDownIcon, ChevronUpIcon } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { Select as SelectPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   5 | import type * as React from "react";
   6 | 
   7 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   8 | 
   9 | function Select({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Root>) {
  10 | 	return (
  11 | 		<SelectPrimitive.Root
  12 | 			data-slot='select'
  13 | 			{...props}
  14 | 		/>
  15 | 	);
  16 | }
  17 | 
  18 | function SelectGroup({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Group>) {
  19 | 	return (
  20 | 		<SelectPrimitive.Group
  21 | 			className={cn("scroll-my-1 p-1", className)}
  22 | 			data-slot='select-group'
  23 | 			{...props}
  24 | 		/>
  25 | 	);
  26 | }
  27 | 
  28 | function SelectValue({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Value>) {
  29 | 	return (
  30 | 		<SelectPrimitive.Value
  31 | 			data-slot='select-value'
  32 | 			{...props}
  33 | 		/>
  34 | 	);
  35 | }
  36 | 
  37 | function SelectTrigger({
  38 | 	className,
  39 | 	size = "default",
  40 | 	children,
  41 | 	...props
  42 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Trigger> & {
  43 | 	size?: "sm" | "default";
  44 | }) {
  45 | 	return (
  46 | 		<SelectPrimitive.Trigger
  47 | 			className={cn(
  48 | 				"flex w-fit select-none items-center justify-between gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap rounded-lg border border-input bg-transparent py-2 ps-2.5 pe-2 text-sm outline-none transition-colors focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-3 aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 data-[size=default]:h-8 data-[size=sm]:h-7 data-[size=sm]:rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),10px)] data-placeholder:text-muted-foreground *:data-[slot=select-value]:line-clamp-1 *:data-[slot=select-value]:flex *:data-[slot=select-value]:items-center *:data-[slot=select-value]:gap-1.5 dark:bg-input/30 dark:aria-invalid:border-destructive/50 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 dark:hover:bg-input/50 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0",
  49 | 				className
  50 | 			)}
  51 | 			data-size={size}
  52 | 			data-slot='select-trigger'
  53 | 			{...props}
  54 | 		>
  55 | 			{children}
  56 | 			<SelectPrimitive.Icon asChild>
  57 | 				<ChevronDownIcon className='pointer-events-none size-4 text-muted-foreground' />
  58 | 			</SelectPrimitive.Icon>
  59 | 		</SelectPrimitive.Trigger>
  60 | 	);
  61 | }
  62 | 
  63 | function SelectContent({
  64 | 	className,
  65 | 	children,
  66 | 	position = "item-aligned",
  67 | 	align = "center",
  68 | 	...props
  69 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Content>) {
  70 | 	return (
  71 | 		<SelectPrimitive.Portal>
  72 | 			<SelectPrimitive.Content
  73 | 				align={align}
  74 | 				className={cn(
  75 | 					"data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2 data-open:fade-in-0 data-open:zoom-in-95 data-closed:fade-out-0 data-closed:zoom-out-95 relative z-50 max-h-(--radix-select-content-available-height) min-w-36 origin-(--radix-select-content-transform-origin) animate-none! overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden rounded-lg bg-popover/70 text-popover-foreground shadow-md ring-1 ring-foreground/10 duration-100 before:pointer-events-none before:absolute before:inset-0 before:-z-1 before:rounded-[inherit] before:backdrop-blur-2xl before:backdrop-saturate-150 data-[align-trigger=true]:animate-none data-closed:animate-out data-open:animate-in **:data-[slot$=-item]:data-highlighted:bg-foreground/10 **:data-[slot$=-separator]:bg-foreground/5 **:data-[variant=destructive]:**:text-accent-foreground! **:data-[variant=destructive]:text-accent-foreground! **:data-[slot$=-trigger]:aria-expanded:bg-foreground/10! **:data-[slot$=-item]:focus:bg-foreground/10 **:data-[slot$=-trigger]:focus:bg-foreground/10 **:data-[variant=destructive]:focus:bg-foreground/10!",
  76 | 					position === "popper" &&
  77 | 						"data-[side=left]:-translate-x-1 data-[side=right]:translate-x-1 data-[side=bottom]:translate-y-1 data-[side=top]:-translate-y-1 rtl:data-[side=left]:translate-x-1 rtl:data-[side=right]:-translate-x-1",
  78 | 					className
  79 | 				)}
  80 | 				data-align-trigger={position === "item-aligned"}
  81 | 				data-slot='select-content'
  82 | 				position={position}
  83 | 				{...props}
  84 | 			>
  85 | 				<SelectScrollUpButton />
  86 | 				<SelectPrimitive.Viewport
  87 | 					className={cn(
  88 | 						"data-[position=popper]:h-(--radix-select-trigger-height) data-[position=popper]:w-full data-[position=popper]:min-w-(--radix-select-trigger-width)",
  89 | 						position === "popper" && ""
  90 | 					)}
  91 | 					data-position={position}
  92 | 				>
  93 | 					{children}
  94 | 				</SelectPrimitive.Viewport>
  95 | 				<SelectScrollDownButton />
  96 | 			</SelectPrimitive.Content>
  97 | 		</SelectPrimitive.Portal>
  98 | 	);
  99 | }
 100 | 
 101 | function SelectLabel({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Label>) {
 102 | 	return (
 103 | 		<SelectPrimitive.Label
 104 | 			className={cn("px-1.5 py-1 text-muted-foreground text-xs", className)}
 105 | 			data-slot='select-label'
 106 | 			{...props}
 107 | 		/>
 108 | 	);
 109 | }

 112 | 	return (
 113 | 		<SelectPrimitive.Item
 114 | 			className={cn(
 115 | 				"relative flex w-full cursor-default select-none items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md py-1 ps-1.5 pe-8 text-sm outline-hidden focus:bg-accent focus:text-accent-foreground not-data-[variant=destructive]:focus:**:text-accent-foreground data-disabled:pointer-events-none data-disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0 *:[span]:last:flex *:[span]:last:items-center *:[span]:last:gap-2",
 116 | 				className
 117 | 			)}
```

`components/ui/sidebar.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
   2 | import { PanelLeftIcon } from "lucide-react";
   3 | import { Slot } from "radix-ui";
   4 | import * as React from "react";
   5 | 
   6 | import { Button } from "#/components/ui/button.tsx";
   7 | import { Input } from "#/components/ui/input.tsx";
   8 | import { Separator } from "#/components/ui/separator.tsx";
   9 | import { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetDescription, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from "#/components/ui/sheet.tsx";
  10 | import { Skeleton } from "#/components/ui/skeleton.tsx";
  11 | import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger } from "#/components/ui/tooltip.tsx";
  12 | import { useIsMobile } from "#/hooks/use-mobile.ts";
  13 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
  14 | 
  15 | const SIDEBAR_COOKIE_NAME = "sidebar_state";
  16 | const SIDEBAR_COOKIE_MAX_AGE = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7;
  17 | const SIDEBAR_WIDTH = "16rem";
  18 | const SIDEBAR_WIDTH_MOBILE = "18rem";
  19 | const SIDEBAR_WIDTH_ICON = "3rem";
  20 | const SIDEBAR_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUT = "b";
  21 | 
  22 | type SidebarContextProps = {
  23 | 	state: "expanded" | "collapsed";
  24 | 	open: boolean;
  25 | 	setOpen: (open: boolean) => void;
  26 | 	openMobile: boolean;
  27 | 	setOpenMobile: (open: boolean) => void;
  28 | 	isMobile: boolean;
  29 | 	toggleSidebar: () => void;
  30 | };
  31 | 
  32 | const SidebarContext = React.createContext<SidebarContextProps | null>(null);
  33 | 
  34 | function useSidebar() {
  35 | 	const context = React.useContext(SidebarContext);
  36 | 	if (!context) {
  37 | 		throw new Error("useSidebar must be used within a SidebarProvider.");
  38 | 	}
  39 | 
  40 | 	return context;
  41 | }
  42 | 
  43 | function SidebarProvider({
  44 | 	defaultOpen = true,
  45 | 	open: openProp,
  46 | 	onOpenChange: setOpenProp,
  47 | 	className,
  48 | 	style,
  49 | 	children,
  50 | 	...props
  51 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
  52 | 	defaultOpen?: boolean;
  53 | 	open?: boolean;
  54 | 	onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void;
  55 | }) {
  56 | 	const isMobile = useIsMobile();
  57 | 	const [openMobile, setOpenMobile] = React.useState(false);
  58 | 
  59 | 	// This is the internal state of the sidebar.
  60 | 	// We use openProp and setOpenProp for control from outside the component.
  61 | 	const [_open, _setOpen] = React.useState(defaultOpen);
  62 | 	const open = openProp ?? _open;
  63 | 	const setOpen = React.useCallback(
  64 | 		(value: boolean | ((value: boolean) => boolean)) => {
  65 | 			const openState = typeof value === "function" ? value(open) : value;
  66 | 			if (setOpenProp) {
  67 | 				setOpenProp(openState);
  68 | 			} else {
  69 | 				_setOpen(openState);
  70 | 			}
  71 | 
  72 | 			// This sets the cookie to keep the sidebar state.
  73 | 			document.cookie = `${SIDEBAR_COOKIE_NAME}=${openState}; path=/; max-age=${SIDEBAR_COOKIE_MAX_AGE}`;
  74 | 		},
  75 | 		[setOpenProp, open]
  76 | 	);
  77 | 
  78 | 	// Helper to toggle the sidebar.
  79 | 	const toggleSidebar = React.useCallback(() => {
  80 | 		return isMobile ? setOpenMobile(open => !open) : setOpen(open => !open);
  81 | 	}, [isMobile, setOpen, setOpenMobile]);
  82 | 
  83 | 	// Adds a keyboard shortcut to toggle the sidebar.
  84 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
  85 | 		const handleKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
  86 | 			if (event.key === SIDEBAR_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUT && (event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)) {
  87 | 				event.preventDefault();
  88 | 				toggleSidebar();
  89 | 			}
  90 | 		};
  91 | 
  92 | 		window.addEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
  93 | 		return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
  94 | 	}, [toggleSidebar]);
  95 | 
  96 | 	// We add a state so that we can do data-state="expanded" or "collapsed".
  97 | 	// This makes it easier to style the sidebar with Tailwind classes.
  98 | 	const state = open ? "expanded" : "collapsed";
  99 | 
 100 | 	const contextValue = React.useMemo<SidebarContextProps>(
 101 | 		() => ({
 102 | 			state,
 103 | 			open,
 104 | 			setOpen,
 105 | 			isMobile,
 106 | 			openMobile,
 107 | 			setOpenMobile,
 108 | 			toggleSidebar
 109 | 		}),
 110 | 		[state, open, setOpen, isMobile, openMobile, setOpenMobile, toggleSidebar]
 111 | 	);
 112 | 
 113 | 	return (
 114 | 		<SidebarContext.Provider value={contextValue}>
 115 | 			<div
 116 | 				className={cn(
 117 | 					"group/sidebar-wrapper flex min-h-svh w-full has-data-[variant=inset]:bg-sidebar",
 118 | 					className
 119 | 				)}
 120 | 				data-slot='sidebar-wrapper'
 121 | 				style={
 122 | 					{
 123 | 						"--sidebar-width": SIDEBAR_WIDTH,
 124 | 						"--sidebar-width-icon": SIDEBAR_WIDTH_ICON,
 125 | 						...style
 126 | 					} as React.CSSProperties
 127 | 				}
 128 | 				{...props}
 129 | 			>
 130 | 				{children}
 131 | 			</div>
 132 | 		</SidebarContext.Provider>
 133 | 	);
 134 | }
 135 | 
 136 | function Sidebar({
 137 | 	side = "left",
 138 | 	variant = "sidebar",
 139 | 	collapsible = "offcanvas",
 140 | 	className,
 141 | 	children,
 142 | 	dir,
 143 | 	...props
 144 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 145 | 	side?: "left" | "right";
 146 | 	variant?: "sidebar" | "floating" | "inset";
 147 | 	collapsible?: "offcanvas" | "icon" | "none";
 148 | }) {
 149 | 	const { isMobile, state, openMobile, setOpenMobile } = useSidebar();
 150 | 
 151 | 	if (collapsible === "none") {
 152 | 		return (
 153 | 			<div
 154 | 				className={cn("flex h-full w-(--sidebar-width) flex-col bg-sidebar text-sidebar-foreground", className)}
 155 | 				data-slot='sidebar'
 156 | 				{...props}
 157 | 			>
 158 | 				{children}
 159 | 			</div>
 160 | 		);
 161 | 	}
 162 | 
 163 | 	if (isMobile) {
 164 | 		return (
 165 | 			<Sheet
 166 | 				onOpenChange={setOpenMobile}
 167 | 				open={openMobile}
 168 | 				{...props}
 169 | 			>
 170 | 				<SheetContent
 171 | 					className='w-(--sidebar-width) bg-sidebar p-0 text-sidebar-foreground [&>button]:hidden'
 172 | 					data-mobile='true'
 173 | 					data-sidebar='sidebar'
 174 | 					data-slot='sidebar'
 175 | 					dir={dir}
 176 | 					side={side}
 177 | 					style={
 178 | 						{
 179 | 							"--sidebar-width": SIDEBAR_WIDTH_MOBILE
 180 | 						} as React.CSSProperties
 181 | 					}
 182 | 				>
 183 | 					<SheetHeader className='sr-only'>
 184 | 						<SheetTitle>Sidebar</SheetTitle>
 185 | 						<SheetDescription>Displays the mobile sidebar.</SheetDescription>
 186 | 					</SheetHeader>
 187 | 					<div className='flex h-full w-full flex-col'>{children}</div>
 188 | 				</SheetContent>
 189 | 			</Sheet>
 190 | 		);
 191 | 	}
 192 | 
 193 | 	return (
 194 | 		<div
 195 | 			className='group peer hidden text-sidebar-foreground md:block'
 196 | 			data-collapsible={state === "collapsed" ? collapsible : ""}
 197 | 			data-side={side}
 198 | 			data-slot='sidebar'
 199 | 			data-state={state}
 200 | 			data-variant={variant}
 201 | 		>
 202 | 			{/* This is what handles the sidebar gap on desktop */}
 203 | 			<div
 204 | 				className={cn(
 205 | 					"relative w-(--sidebar-width) bg-transparent transition-[width] duration-200 ease-linear",
 206 | 					"group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:w-0",
 207 | 					"group-data-[side=right]:rotate-180",
 208 | 					variant === "floating" || variant === "inset"
 209 | 						? "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[calc(var(--sidebar-width-icon)+(--spacing(4)))]"
 210 | 						: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-(--sidebar-width-icon)"
 211 | 				)}
 212 | 				data-slot='sidebar-gap'
 213 | 			/>
 214 | 			<div
 215 | 				className={cn(
 216 | 					"fixed inset-y-0 z-10 hidden h-svh w-(--sidebar-width) transition-[left,right,width] duration-200 ease-linear data-[side=right]:right-0 data-[side=left]:left-0 data-[side=right]:group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:right-[calc(var(--sidebar-width)*-1)] data-[side=left]:group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:left-[calc(var(--sidebar-width)*-1)] md:flex",
 217 | 					// Adjust the padding for floating and inset variants.
 218 | 					variant === "floating" || variant === "inset"
 219 | 						? "p-2 group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[calc(var(--sidebar-width-icon)+(--spacing(4))+2px)]"
 220 | 						: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-(--sidebar-width-icon) group-data-[side=right]:border-s group-data-[side=left]:border-e",
 221 | 					className
 222 | 				)}
 223 | 				data-side={side}
 224 | 				data-slot='sidebar-container'
 225 | 				{...props}
 226 | 			>
 227 | 				<div
 228 | 					className='flex size-full flex-col bg-sidebar group-data-[variant=floating]:rounded-lg group-data-[variant=floating]:shadow-sm group-data-[variant=floating]:ring-1 group-data-[variant=floating]:ring-sidebar-border'
 229 | 					data-sidebar='sidebar'
 230 | 					data-slot='sidebar-inner'
 231 | 				>
 232 | 					{children}
 233 | 				</div>
 234 | 			</div>
 235 | 		</div>
 236 | 	);
 237 | }
 238 | 
 239 | function SidebarTrigger({ className, onClick, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>) {
 240 | 	const { toggleSidebar } = useSidebar();
 241 | 
 242 | 	return (
 243 | 		<Button
 244 | 			className={cn(className)}
 245 | 			data-sidebar='trigger'
 246 | 			data-slot='sidebar-trigger'
 247 | 			onClick={event => {
 248 | 				onClick?.(event);
 249 | 				toggleSidebar();
 250 | 			}}
 251 | 			size='icon-sm'
 252 | 			variant='ghost'
 253 | 			{...props}
 254 | 		>
 255 | 			<PanelLeftIcon className='rtl:rotate-180' />
 256 | 			<span className='sr-only'>Toggle Sidebar</span>
 257 | 		</Button>
 258 | 	);
 259 | }

 269 | 				"in-data-[side=left]:cursor-w-resize in-data-[side=right]:cursor-e-resize rtl:in-data-[side=left]:cursor-e-resize rtl:in-data-[side=right]:cursor-w-resize",
 270 | 				"[[data-side=left][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-e-resize rtl:[[data-side=left][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-w-resize [[data-side=right][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-w-resize rtl:[[data-side=right][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-e-resize",

 441 | const sidebarMenuButtonVariants = cva(

[&>span:last-child]:truncate [&_svg]:size-4 [&_svg]:shrink-0",
 443 | 	{
 444 | 		variants: {
 445 | 			variant: {

 462 | 
 463 | function SidebarMenuButton({
 464 | 	asChild = false,
 465 | 	isActive = false,
 466 | 	variant = "default",
 467 | 	size = "default",
 468 | 	tooltip,
 469 | 	className,
 470 | 	...props
 471 | }: React.ComponentProps<"button"> & {
 472 | 	asChild?: boolean;
 473 | 	isActive?: boolean;
 474 | 	tooltip?: string | React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipContent>;
 475 | } & VariantProps<typeof sidebarMenuButtonVariants>) {
 476 | 	const Comp = asChild ? Slot.Root : "button";
 477 | 	const { isMobile, state } = useSidebar();
 478 | 
 479 | 	const button = (
 480 | 		<Comp
 481 | 			className={cn(sidebarMenuButtonVariants({ variant, size }), className)}
 482 | 			data-active={isActive}
 483 | 			data-sidebar='menu-button'
 484 | 			data-size={size}
 485 | 			data-slot='sidebar-menu-button'
 486 | 			{...props}
 487 | 		/>
 488 | 	);
 489 | 
 490 | 	if (!tooltip) {
 491 | 		return button;
 492 | 	}
 493 | 
 494 | 	if (typeof tooltip === "string") {
 495 | 		tooltip = {
 496 | 			children: tooltip
 497 | 		};
 498 | 	}
 499 | 
 500 | 	return (
 501 | 		<Tooltip>
 502 | 			<TooltipTrigger asChild>{button}</TooltipTrigger>
 503 | 			<TooltipContent
 504 | 				align='center'
 505 | 				hidden={state !== "collapsed" || isMobile}
 506 | 				side='right'
 507 | 				{...tooltip}
 508 | 			/>
 509 | 		</Tooltip>
 510 | 	);
 511 | }
 512 | 
 513 | function SidebarMenuAction({
 514 | 	className,
 515 | 	asChild = false,
 516 | 	showOnHover = false,
 517 | 	...props
 518 | }: React.ComponentProps<"button"> & {
 519 | 	asChild?: boolean;
 520 | 	showOnHover?: boolean;
 521 | }) {
 522 | 	const Comp = asChild ? Slot.Root : "button";
 523 | 
 524 | 	return (
 525 | 		<Comp
 526 | 			className={cn(
 527 | 				"absolute end-1 top-1.5 flex aspect-square w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-md p-0 text-sidebar-foreground outline-hidden ring-sidebar-ring transition-transform after:absolute after:-inset-2 hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground focus-visible:ring-2 peer-hover/menu-button:text-sidebar-accent-foreground group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden peer-data-[size=default]/menu-button:top-1.5 peer-data-[size=lg]/menu-button:top-2.5 peer-data-[size=sm]/menu-button:top-1 md:after:hidden [&>svg]:size-4 [&>svg]:shrink-0",
 528 | 				showOnHover &&
 529 | 					"group-focus-within/menu-item:opacity-100 group-hover/menu-item:opacity-100 aria-expanded:opacity-100 peer-data-active/menu-button:text-sidebar-accent-foreground md:opacity-0",

 531 | 			)}
 532 | 			data-sidebar='menu-action'

 534 | 			{...props}
 535 | 		/>
 536 | 	);

 553 | function SidebarMenuSkeleton({
 554 | 	className,
 555 | 	showIcon = false,
 556 | 	...props
 557 | }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
 558 | 	showIcon?: boolean;
 559 | }) {
 560 | 	// Random width between 50 to 90%.
 561 | 	const [width] = React.useState(() => {
 562 | 		return `${Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) + 50}%`;
 563 | 	});
 564 | 
 565 | 	return (
 566 | 		<div
 567 | 			className={cn("flex h-8 items-center gap-2 rounded-md px-2", className)}
 568 | 			data-sidebar='menu-skeleton'
 569 | 			data-slot='sidebar-menu-skeleton'
 570 | 			{...props}
 571 | 		>
 572 | 			{showIcon && (
 573 | 				<Skeleton
 574 | 					className='size-4 rounded-md'
 575 | 					data-sidebar='menu-skeleton-icon'
 576 | 				/>
 577 | 			)}
 578 | 			<Skeleton
 579 | 				className='h-4 max-w-(--skeleton-width) flex-1'
 580 | 				data-sidebar='menu-skeleton-text'
 581 | 				style={
 582 | 					{
 583 | 						"--skeleton-width": width
 584 | 					} as React.CSSProperties
 585 | 				}
 586 | 			/>
 587 | 		</div>
 588 | 	);
 589 | }
```

`components/ui/slider.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { Slider as SliderPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   4 | import * as React from "react";
   5 | 
   6 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   7 | 
   8 | function Slider({
   9 | 	className,
  10 | 	defaultValue,
  11 | 	value,
  12 | 	min = 0,
  13 | 	max = 100,
  14 | 	...props
  15 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof SliderPrimitive.Root>) {
  16 | 	const _values = React.useMemo(
  17 | 		() => (Array.isArray(value) ? value : Array.isArray(defaultValue) ? defaultValue : [min, max]),
  18 | 		[value, defaultValue, min, max]
  19 | 	);
  20 | 
  21 | 	return (
  22 | 		<SliderPrimitive.Root
  23 | 			className={cn(
  24 | 				"relative flex w-full touch-none select-none items-center data-vertical:h-full data-vertical:min-h-40 data-vertical:w-auto data-vertical:flex-col data-disabled:opacity-50",
  25 | 				className
  26 | 			)}
  27 | 			data-slot='slider'
  28 | 			defaultValue={defaultValue}
  29 | 			max={max}
  30 | 			min={min}
  31 | 			value={value}
  32 | 			{...props}
  33 | 		>
  34 | 			<SliderPrimitive.Track
  35 | 				className='relative grow overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-muted data-horizontal:h-1 data-vertical:h-full data-horizontal:w-full data-vertical:w-1'
  36 | 				data-slot='slider-track'
  37 | 			>
  38 | 				<SliderPrimitive.Range
  39 | 					className='absolute select-none bg-primary data-horizontal:h-full data-vertical:w-full'
  40 | 					data-slot='slider-range'
  41 | 				/>
  42 | 			</SliderPrimitive.Track>
  43 | 			{Array.from({ length: _values.length }, (_, index) => (
  44 | 				<SliderPrimitive.Thumb
  45 | 					className='relative block size-3 shrink-0 select-none rounded-full border border-ring bg-white ring-ring/50 transition-[color,box-shadow] after:absolute after:-inset-2 hover:ring-3 focus-visible:outline-hidden focus-visible:ring-3 active:ring-3 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50'
  46 | 					data-slot='slider-thumb'
  47 | 					key={index}
  48 | 				/>
  49 | 			))}
  50 | 		</SliderPrimitive.Root>
  51 | 	);
  52 | }
  53 | 
  54 | export { Slider };

```

```tsx
   1 | import { CircleCheckIcon, InfoIcon, Loader2Icon, OctagonXIcon, TriangleAlertIcon } from "lucide-react";
   2 | import { useTheme } from "next-themes";
   3 | import { Toaster as Sonner, type ToasterProps } from "sonner";
   4 | 
   5 | const Toaster = ({ ...props }: ToasterProps) => {
   6 | 	const { theme = "system" } = useTheme();
   7 | 
   8 | 	return (
   9 | 		<Sonner
  10 | 			className='toaster group'
  11 | 			icons={{
  12 | 				success: <CircleCheckIcon className='size-4' />,
  13 | 				info: <InfoIcon className='size-4' />,
  14 | 				warning: <TriangleAlertIcon className='size-4' />,
  15 | 				error: <OctagonXIcon className='size-4' />,
  16 | 				loading: <Loader2Icon className='size-4 animate-spin' />
  17 | 			}}
  18 | 			style={
  19 | 				{
  20 | 					"--normal-bg": "var(--popover)",
  21 | 					"--normal-text": "var(--popover-foreground)",
  22 | 					"--normal-border": "var(--border)",
  23 | 					"--border-radius": "var(--radius)"
  24 | 				} as React.CSSProperties
  25 | 			}
  26 | 			theme={theme as ToasterProps["theme"]}
  27 | 			toastOptions={{
  28 | 				classNames: {
  29 | 					toast: "cn-toast"
  30 | 				}
  31 | 			}}
  32 | 			{...props}
  33 | 		/>
  34 | 	);
  35 | };
  36 | 
  37 | export { Toaster };
```

`components/ui/spinner.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { Loader2Icon } from "lucide-react";
   2 | 
   3 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   4 | 
   5 | function Spinner({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"svg">) {
   6 | 	return (
   7 | 		<Loader2Icon
   8 | 			aria-label='Loading'
   9 | 			className={cn("size-4 animate-spin", className)}
  10 | 			role='status'
  11 | 			{...props}
  12 | 		/>
  13 | 	);
```
