`components/ui/tanstack-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { createFormHook } from "@tanstack/react-form";
   2 | import type { VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
   3 | import * as React from "react";
   4 | 
   5 | import { Button, type buttonVariants } from "@/components/ui/button";
   6 | import {
   7 | 	FieldContent,
   8 | 	FieldDescription,
   9 | 	FieldGroup,
  10 | 	FieldLabel,
  11 | 	FieldLegend,
  12 | 	FieldSeparator,
  13 | 	FieldTitle
  14 | } from "@/components/ui/field";
  15 | import { InputGroup, InputGroupAddon, InputGroupInput } from "@/components/ui/input-group";
  16 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
  17 | 
  18 | import {
  19 | 	CheckboxField,
  20 | 	FileUploadField,
  21 | 	FormCheckboxField,
  22 | 	FormFileUploadField,
  23 | 	FormRadioGroupField,
  24 | 	FormSelectField,
  25 | 	FormSliderField,
  26 | 	FormSwitchField,
  27 | 	FormTextareaField,
  28 | 	FormTextField,
  29 | 	RadioGroupField,
  30 | 	SelectField,
  31 | 	SliderField,
  32 | 	SwitchField,
  33 | 	TextareaField,
  34 | 	TextField
  35 | } from "./fields";
  36 | import {
  37 | 	FormField,
  38 | 	FormFieldError,
  39 | 	FormFieldSet,
  40 | 	fieldContext,
  41 | 	formContext,
  42 | 	TextArea,
  43 | 	useFormContext,
  44 | 	type WithTypedName
  45 | } from "./form-context";
  46 | 
  47 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  48 | // Form-level components (used as form.ComponentName)
  49 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  50 | 
  51 | function Form({
  52 | 	children,
  53 | 	...props
  54 | }: Omit<React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"form">, "onSubmit" | "noValidate"> & {
  55 | 	children?: React.ReactNode;
  56 | }) {
  57 | 	const form = useFormContext();
  58 | 	const handleSubmit = React.useCallback(
  59 | 		(e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
  60 | 			e.preventDefault();
  61 | 			e.stopPropagation();
  62 | 			form.handleSubmit();
  63 | 		},
  64 | 		[form]
  65 | 	);
  66 | 	return (
  67 | 		<form
  68 | 			className={cn("mx-auto flex w-full flex-col gap-2 p-2 md:p-5", props.className)}
  69 | 			noValidate
  70 | 			onSubmit={handleSubmit}
  71 | 			{...props}
  72 | 		>
  73 | 			{children}
  74 | 		</form>
  75 | 	);
  76 | }
  77 | 
  78 | function SubmitButton({
  79 | 	children,
  80 | 	className,
  81 | 	size,
  82 | 	...props
  83 | }: React.ComponentProps<"button"> & VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants>) {
  84 | 	const form = useFormContext();
  85 | 	return (
  86 | 		<form.Subscribe selector={state => [state.canSubmit, state.isSubmitting] as const}>
  87 | 			{([canSubmit]) => (
  88 | 				<Button
  89 | 					className={className}
  90 | 					disabled={!canSubmit}
  91 | 					size={size}
  92 | 					type='submit'
  93 | 					{...props}
  94 | 				>
  95 | 					{children}
  96 | 				</Button>
  97 | 			)}
  98 | 		</form.Subscribe>
  99 | 	);
 100 | }
 101 | 
 102 | function SubscribeButton({ label }: { label: string }) {
 103 | 	const form = useFormContext();
 104 | 	return (
 105 | 		<form.Subscribe selector={state => state.isSubmitting}>
 106 | 			{isSubmitting => (
 107 | 				<Button
 108 | 					disabled={isSubmitting}
 109 | 					type='submit'
 110 | 				>
 111 | 					{label}
 112 | 				</Button>
 113 | 			)}
 114 | 		</form.Subscribe>
 115 | 	);
 116 | }
 117 | function StepButton({
 118 | 	label,
 119 | 	handleMovement,
 120 | 	...props
 121 | }: React.ComponentProps<"button"> &
 122 | 	VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> & {
 123 | 		label: React.ReactNode | string;
 124 | 		handleMovement: () => void;
 125 | 	}) {
 126 | 	return (
 127 | 		<Button
 128 | 			onClick={handleMovement}
 129 | 			size='sm'
 130 | 			type='button'
 131 | 			variant='ghost'
 132 | 			{...props}
 133 | 		>
 134 | 			{label}
 135 | 		</Button>
 136 | 	);
 137 | }
 138 | 
 139 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 140 | // Hook creation
 141 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 142 | 
 143 | const { useAppForm, withForm, withFieldGroup } = createFormHook({
 144 | 	fieldContext,
 145 | 	formContext,
 146 | 	fieldComponents: {
 147 | 		// Structural (for custom fields via AppField escape hatch)
 148 | 		Field: FormField,
 149 | 		FieldError: FormFieldError,
 150 | 		FieldSet: FormFieldSet,
 151 | 		FieldContent,
 152 | 		FieldDescription,
 153 | 		FieldGroup,
 154 | 		TextArea,
 155 | 		FieldLabel,
 156 | 		FieldLegend,
 157 | 		FieldSeparator,
 158 | 		FieldTitle,
 159 | 		InputGroup,
 160 | 		InputGroupAddon,
 161 | 		InputGroupInput,
 162 | 		// Base field components (for AppField render-prop pattern)
 163 | 		TextField,
 164 | 		TextareaField,
 165 | 		SelectField,
 166 | 		CheckboxField,
 167 | 		SwitchField,
 168 | 		RadioGroupField,
 169 | 		SliderField,
 170 | 		FileUploadField
 171 | 	},
 172 | 	formComponents: {
 173 | 		// Layout & actions
 174 | 		Form,
 175 | 		SubmitButton,
 176 | 		StepButton,
 177 | 		SubscribeButton,
 178 | 		FieldLegend,
 179 | 		FieldDescription,
 180 | 		FieldSeparator,
 181 | 		// Composed field components (flat API — convenience pattern)
 182 | 		// These allow form.TextField, form.SelectField, etc.
 183 | 		// For type-safe field names, use form.AppField render-prop instead.
 184 | 		TextField: FormTextField,
 185 | 		TextareaField: FormTextareaField,
 186 | 		SelectField: FormSelectField,
 187 | 		CheckboxField: FormCheckboxField,
 188 | 		SwitchField: FormSwitchField,
 189 | 		RadioGroupField: FormRadioGroupField,
 190 | 		SliderField: FormSliderField,
 191 | 		FileUploadField: FormFileUploadField
 192 | 	}
 193 | });
 194 | 
 195 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 196 | // Type-safe field names — useFormFields
 197 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 198 | 
 199 | /**
 200 |  * Returns all composed field components with type-safe `name` props.
 201 |  * Pass your form's value type (or `z.infer<typeof schema>`) to narrow names.
 202 |  *
 203 |  * @example
 204 |  * ```tsx
 205 |  * type FormValues = z.infer<typeof mySchema>;
 206 |  * const form = useAppForm({ defaultValues: {...} as FormValues, ... });
 207 |  * const { FormTextField, FormSelectField } = useFormFields<FormValues>();
 208 |  *
 209 |  * <FormTextField name="email" />  // ✅ autocomplete + type check
 210 |  * <FormTextField name="typo" />   // ❌ TypeScript error!
 211 |  * ```
 212 |  */
 213 | function useFormFields<TValues extends Record<string, unknown>>() {
 214 | 	type Typed<C> = WithTypedName<C, TValues>;
 215 | 	return {
 216 | 		FormTextField: FormTextField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormTextField>,
 217 | 		FormTextareaField: FormTextareaField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormTextareaField>,
 218 | 		FormSelectField: FormSelectField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormSelectField>,
 219 | 		FormCheckboxField: FormCheckboxField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormCheckboxField>,
 220 | 		FormSwitchField: FormSwitchField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormSwitchField>,
 221 | 		FormRadioGroupField: FormRadioGroupField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormRadioGroupField>,
 222 | 		FormSliderField: FormSliderField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormSliderField>,
 223 | 		FormFileUploadField: FormFileUploadField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormFileUploadField>
 224 | 	};
 225 | }
 226 | 
 227 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 228 | // Exports
 229 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 230 | 
 231 | export type {
 232 | 	FieldConfig,
 233 | 	FieldListenerConfig,
 234 | 	FieldValidatorConfig,
 235 | 	WithTypedName
 236 | } from "./form-context";
 237 | export {
 238 | 	createFormField,
 239 | 	FormErrors,
 240 | 	FormField,
 241 | 	FormFieldError,
 242 | 	FormFieldSet,
 243 | 	revalidateLogic,
 244 | 	scrollToFirstError,
 245 | 	typedField,
 246 | 	useFieldContext,
 247 | 	useFormContext
 248 | } from "./form-context";
 249 | 
 250 | export { useAppForm, useFormFields, withFieldGroup, withForm };

```

`components/ui/toggle-group.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import type { VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
   4 | import { ToggleGroup as ToggleGroupPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   5 | import * as React from "react";
   6 | 
   7 | import { toggleVariants } from "#/components/ui/toggle.tsx";
   8 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   9 | 
  10 | const ToggleGroupContext = React.createContext<
  11 | 	VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants> & {
  12 | 		spacing?: number;
  13 | 		orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical";
  14 | 	}
  15 | >({
  16 | 	size: "default",
  17 | 	variant: "default",
  18 | 	spacing: 2,
  19 | 	orientation: "horizontal"
  20 | });
  21 | 
  22 | function ToggleGroup({
  23 | 	className,
  24 | 	variant,
  25 | 	size,
  26 | 	spacing = 2,
  27 | 	orientation = "horizontal",
  28 | 	children,
  29 | 	...props
  30 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof ToggleGroupPrimitive.Root> &
  31 | 	VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants> & {
  32 | 		spacing?: number;
  33 | 		orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical";
  34 | 	}) {
  35 | 	return (
  36 | 		<ToggleGroupPrimitive.Root
  37 | 			className={cn(
  38 | 				"group/toggle-group flex w-fit flex-row items-center gap-[--spacing(var(--gap))] rounded-lg data-vertical:flex-col data-vertical:items-stretch data-[size=sm]:rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),10px)]",
  39 | 				className
  40 | 			)}
  41 | 			data-orientation={orientation}
  42 | 			data-size={size}
  43 | 			data-slot='toggle-group'
  44 | 			data-spacing={spacing}
  45 | 			data-variant={variant}
  46 | 			style={{ "--gap": spacing } as React.CSSProperties}
  47 | 			{...props}
  48 | 		>
  49 | 			<ToggleGroupContext.Provider value={{ variant, size, spacing, orientation }}>
  50 | 				{children}
  51 | 			</ToggleGroupContext.Provider>
  52 | 		</ToggleGroupPrimitive.Root>
  53 | 	);
  54 | }
  55 | 
  56 | function ToggleGroupItem({
  57 | 	className,
  58 | 	children,
  59 | 	variant = "default",
  60 | 	size = "default",
  61 | 	...props
  62 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof ToggleGroupPrimitive.Item> & VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants>) {
  63 | 	const context = React.useContext(ToggleGroupContext);
  64 | 
  65 | 	return (
  66 | 		<ToggleGroupPrimitive.Item
  67 | 			className={cn(
  68 | 				"shrink-0 focus:z-10 focus-visible:z-10 group-data-[spacing=0]/toggle-group:rounded-none group-data-horizontal/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:data-[variant=outline]:border-s-0 group-data-vertical/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:data-[variant=outline]:border-t-0 group-data-[spacing=0]/toggle-group:px-2 group-data-[spacing=0]/toggle-group:has-data-[icon=inline-start]:ps-1.5 group-data-[spacing=0]/toggle-group:has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pe-1.5 group-data-horizontal/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:last:rounded-e-lg group-data-vertical/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:last:rounded-b-lg group-data-horizontal/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:data-[variant=outline]:first:border-s group-data-vertical/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:data-[variant=outline]:first:border-t group-data-horizontal/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:first:rounded-s-lg group-data-vertical/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:first:rounded-t-lg",
  69 | 				toggleVariants({
  70 | 					variant: context.variant || variant,
  71 | 					size: context.size || size
  72 | 				}),
  73 | 				className
  74 | 			)}
  75 | 			data-size={context.size || size}
  76 | 			data-slot='toggle-group-item'
  77 | 			data-spacing={context.spacing}
  78 | 			data-variant={context.variant || variant}
  79 | 			{...props}
  80 | 		>
  81 | 			{children}
  82 | 		</ToggleGroupPrimitive.Item>
  83 | 	);
  84 | }
  85 | 
  86 | export { ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem };

```

`components/ui/toggle.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
   2 | import { Toggle as TogglePrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   3 | import type * as React from "react";
   4 | 
   5 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   6 | 
   7 | const toggleVariants = cva(
   8 | 	"group/toggle inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1 whitespace-nowrap rounded-lg font-medium text-sm outline-none transition-all hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-[3px] focus-visible:ring-ring/50 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 aria-pressed:bg-muted aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 data-[state=on]:bg-muted dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0",
   9 | 	{
  10 | 		variants: {
  11 | 			variant: {
  12 | 				default: "bg-transparent",
  13 | 				outline: "border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-muted"
  14 | 			},
  15 | 			size: {
  16 | 				default: "h-8 min-w-8 px-2.5 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:ps-2 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pe-2",
  17 | 				sm: "h-7 min-w-7 rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),12px)] px-2.5 text-[0.8rem] has-data-[icon=inline-start]:ps-1.5 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pe-1.5 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3.5",
  18 | 				lg: "h-9 min-w-9 px-2.5 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:ps-2 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pe-2"
  19 | 			}
  20 | 		},
  21 | 		defaultVariants: {
  22 | 			variant: "default",
  23 | 			size: "default"
  24 | 		}
  25 | 	}
  26 | );
  27 | 
  28 | function Toggle({
  29 | 	className,
  30 | 	variant = "default",
  31 | 	size = "default",
  32 | 	...props
  33 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof TogglePrimitive.Root> & VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants>) {
  34 | 	return (
  35 | 		<TogglePrimitive.Root
  36 | 			className={cn(toggleVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
  37 | 			data-slot='toggle'
  38 | 			{...props}
  39 | 		/>
  40 | 	);
  41 | }
  42 | 
  43 | export { Toggle, toggleVariants };

```

`components/ui/tooltip.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | "use client";
   2 | 
   3 | import { Tooltip as TooltipPrimitive } from "radix-ui";
   4 | import type * as React from "react";
   5 | 
   6 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils.ts";
   7 | 
   8 | function TooltipProvider({ delayDuration = 0, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Provider>) {
   9 | 	return (
  10 | 		<TooltipPrimitive.Provider
  11 | 			data-slot='tooltip-provider'
  12 | 			delayDuration={delayDuration}
  13 | 			{...props}
  14 | 		/>
  15 | 	);
  16 | }
  17 | 
  18 | function Tooltip({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Root>) {
  19 | 	return (
  20 | 		<TooltipPrimitive.Root
  21 | 			data-slot='tooltip'
  22 | 			{...props}
  23 | 		/>
  24 | 	);
  25 | }
  26 | 
  27 | function TooltipTrigger({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Trigger>) {
  28 | 	return (
  29 | 		<TooltipPrimitive.Trigger
  30 | 			data-slot='tooltip-trigger'
  31 | 			{...props}
  32 | 		/>
  33 | 	);
  34 | }
  35 | 
  36 | function TooltipContent({
  37 | 	className,
  38 | 	sideOffset = 0,
  39 | 	children,
  40 | 	...props
  41 | }: React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Content>) {
  42 | 	return (
  43 | 		<TooltipPrimitive.Portal>
  44 | 			<TooltipPrimitive.Content
  45 | 				className={cn(
  46 | 					"data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2 data-[state=delayed-open]:fade-in-0 data-[state=delayed-open]:zoom-in-95 data-open:fade-in-0 data-open:zoom-in-95 data-closed:fade-out-0 data-closed:zoom-out-95 z-50 inline-flex w-fit max-w-xs origin-(--radix-tooltip-content-transform-origin) items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md bg-foreground px-3 py-1.5 text-background text-xs has-data-[slot=kbd]:pe-1.5 data-[state=delayed-open]:animate-in data-closed:animate-out data-open:animate-in **:data-[slot=kbd]:relative **:data-[slot=kbd]:isolate **:data-[slot=kbd]:z-50 **:data-[slot=kbd]:rounded-sm",
  47 | 					className
  48 | 				)}
  49 | 				data-slot='tooltip-content'
  50 | 				sideOffset={sideOffset}
  51 | 				{...props}
  52 | 			>
  53 | 				{children}
  54 | 				<TooltipPrimitive.Arrow className='z-50 size-2.5 translate-y-[calc(-50%_-_2px)] rotate-45 rounded-[2px] bg-foreground fill-foreground' />
  55 | 			</TooltipPrimitive.Content>
  56 | 		</TooltipPrimitive.Portal>
  57 | 	);
  58 | }
  59 | 
  60 | export { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger };

```ts
   1 | // src/config/nav-config.ts
   2 | // Navigation configuration for the sidebar and Cmd+K bar.
   3 | // All URLs must match actual TanStack Router route paths.
   4 | 
   5 | import type { Icons } from "../components/icons";
   6 | import type { UserRole } from "@/lib/permissions";
   7 | 
   8 | export interface NavItem {
   9 | 	title: string;
  10 | 	url: string;
  11 | 	icon?: keyof typeof Icons;
  12 | 	badge?: string | number;
  13 | 	isActive?: boolean;
  14 | 	shortcut?: [string, string];
  15 | 	requiredRole?: UserRole | UserRole[];
  16 | 	pageType?: string;
  17 | 	patientId?: string;
  18 | 	roles?: ("admin" | "doctor" | "staff" | "patient")[];
  19 | 	children?: NavItem[];
  20 | 	items?: NavSubItem[];
  21 | }
  22 |

  24 | 	title: string;
  25 | 	url: string;

 445 | // Helper function to get role display name
 446 | export const getRoleDisplay = (role: string): string => {
 447 | 	const roleMap: Record<string, string> = {
 448 | 		admin: "Admin",
 449 | 		doctor: "Doctor",
 450 | 		staff: "Staff",
 451 | 		patient: "Patient"
 452 | 	};
 453 | 	return roleMap[role] || role;
 454 | };
 455 | 
 456 | // Helper function to get role color
 457 | export const getRoleColor = (role: string): string => {
 458 | 	const colorMap: Record<string, string> = {
 459 | 		admin: "text-red-600 dark:text-red-400",
 460 | 		doctor: "text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400",
 461 | 		staff: "text-green-600 dark:text-green-400",
 462 | 		patient: "text-yellow-600 dark:text-yellow-400"
 463 | 	};
 464 | 	return colorMap[role] || "text-gray-600";
 465 | };

```

`data/appointments.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { getSession } from "#/lib/auth.functions";
   2 | import { appointment, type DbAppointment as AppointmentSelect, appointmentStatusEnum, doctor, patient } from "@/db/schema";
   3 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   4 | import { and, desc, eq, gte, lte, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   5 | import { z } from "zod";
   6 | 
   7 | // Schema for creating appointments
   8 | export const appointmentSchema = z.object({
   9 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Patient is required"),
  10 | 	doctorId: z.string().min(1, "Doctor is required"),
  11 | 	serviceId: z.string().optional().nullable(),
  12 | 	appointmentDate: z.coerce.date(),
  13 | 	time: z.string(),
  14 | 	durationMinutes: z.number().default(30),
  15 | 	reason: z.string().optional(),
  16 | 	note: z.string().optional(),
  17 | 	type: z.string().default("REGULAR"),
  18 | 	appointmentPrice: z.number().optional(),
  19 | });
  20 | 
  21 | // Get upcoming appointments count for dashboard/stats
  22 | export const getUpcomingAppointmentsCount = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
  23 | 	async () => {
  24 | 		const session = await getSession();
  25 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  26 | 
  27 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  28 | 
  29 | 		// Get user's clinic ID
  30 | 		const userClinics = await db
  31 | 			.select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
  32 | 			.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
  33 | 			.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
  34 | 			.limit(1);
  35 | 
  36 | 		const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
  37 | 		if (!clinicId) return 0;
  38 | 
  39 | 		const now = new Date();
  40 | 		now.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  41 | 
  42 | 		let conditions = [
  43 | 			eq(appointment.clinicId, clinicId as string),
  44 | 			eq(appointment.isDeleted, false),
  45 | 			gte(appointment.appointmentDate, now),
  46 | 			sql`${appointment.status} IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED')`
  47 | 		];
  48 | 
  49 | 		// If patient, only count their own children's appointments
  50 | 		if (session.user.role === "patient") {
  51 | 			const myPatients = await db
  52 | 				.select({ id: patient.id })
  53 | 				.from(patient)
  54 | 				.where(eq(patient.userId, session.user.id));
  55 | 
  56 | 			const patientIds = myPatients.map(p => p.id);
  57 | 			if (patientIds.length === 0) return 0;
  58 | 			conditions.push(sql`${appointment.patientId} IN (${patientIds.join(",")})`);
  59 | 		}
  60 | 
  61 | 		const result = await db
  62 | 			.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
  63 | 			.from(appointment)
  64 | 			.where(and(...conditions));
  65 | 
  66 | 		return Number(result[0]?.count ?? 0);
  67 | 	}
  68 | );
  69 | 
  70 | // Get upcoming appointments with relations for dashboard
  71 | export const getDashboardUpcomingAppointments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
  72 | 	async () => {
  73 | 		const session = await getSession();
  74 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  75 | 
  76 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  77 | 
  78 | 		// Get user's clinic ID
  79 | 		const userClinics = await db
  80 | 			.select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
  81 | 			.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
  82 | 			.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
  83 | 			.limit(1);
  84 | 
  85 | 		const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
  86 | 		if (!clinicId) return [];
  87 | 
  88 | 		const now = new Date();
  89 | 		now.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  90 | 
  91 | 		let conditions = [
  92 | 			eq(appointment.clinicId, clinicId as string),
  93 | 			eq(appointment.isDeleted, false),
  94 | 			gte(appointment.appointmentDate, now),
  95 | 			sql`${appointment.status} IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED')`
  96 | 		];
  97 | 
  98 | 		// If patient, only show their children's appointments
  99 | 		if (session.user.role === "patient") {
 100 | 			const myPatients = await db
 101 | 				.select({ id: patient.id })
 102 | 				.from(patient)
 103 | 				.where(eq(patient.userId, session.user.id));
 104 | 
 105 | 			const patientIds = myPatients.map(p => p.id);
 106 | 			if (patientIds.length === 0) return [];
 107 | 			conditions.push(sql`${appointment.patientId} IN (${patientIds.join(",")})`);
 108 | 		}
 109 | 
 110 | 		const results = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 111 | 			where: {
 112 | 				clinicId,
 113 | 				isDeleted: false,
 114 | 				status: 'CONFIRMED'
 115 | 			},
 116 | 			with: {
 117 | 				patient: {
 118 | 					columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true }
 119 | 				},
 120 | 				doctor: {
 121 | 					columns: { id: true, name: true, specialty: true }
 122 | 				}
 123 | 			},
 124 | 			orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" },
 125 | 			limit: 5
 126 | 		});
 127 | 
 128 | 		return results;
 129 | 	}
 130 | );
 131 | 
 132 | // Get upcoming appointments count for header badge
 133 | export const getAppointmentsCount = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
 134 | 	async () => {
 135 | 		const session = await getSession();
 136 | 		if (!session) {
 137 | 			return { count: 0 };
 138 | 		}
 139 | 
 140 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 141 | 
 142 | 		// Get user's patients (if parent) or their own appointments (if admin/staff)
 143 | 		let count = 0;
 144 | 
 145 | 		if (session.user.role === "admin") {
 146 | 			// For admin, count all upcoming appointments
 147 | 			const result = await db
 148 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
 149 | 				.from(appointment)
 150 | 				.where(
 151 | 					and(
 152 | 						sql`${appointment.isDeleted} = false`,
 153 | 						sql`${appointment.appointmentDate} >= now()`,
 154 | 						eq(appointment.status, "CONFIRMED")
 155 | 					)
 156 | 				);
 157 | 			count = Number(result[0]?.count ?? 0);
 158 | 		} else {
 159 | 			// For parents, get appointments for their children
 160 | 			const myPatients = await db
 161 | 				.select({ id: patient.id })
 162 | 				.from(patient)
 163 | 				.where(eq(patient.userId, session.user.id));
 164 | 
 165 | 			const patientIds = myPatients.map(p => p.id);
 166 | 
 167 | 			if (patientIds.length > 0) {
 168 | 				const result = await db
 169 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
 170 | 					.from(appointment)
 171 | 					.where(
 172 | 						and(
 173 | 							sql`${appointment.isDeleted} = false`,
 174 | 							sql`${appointment.appointmentDate} >= now()`,
 175 | 							eq(appointment.status, "CONFIRMED"),
 176 | 							sql`${appointment.patientId} IN (${patientIds.join(",")})`
 177 | 						)
 178 | 					);
 179 | 				count = Number(result[0]?.count ?? 0);
 180 | 			}
 181 | 		}
 182 | 
 183 | 		return { count };
 184 | 	},
 185 | );
 186 | 
 187 | // Get all appointments (admin/staff only)
 188 | export const getAllAppointments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
 189 | 	async () => {
 190 | 		const session = await getSession();
 191 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 192 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 193 | 
 194 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 195 | 
 196 | 		const allAppointments = await db
 197 | 			.select({
 198 | 				id: appointment.id,
 199 | 				patientId: appointment.patientId,
 200 | 				doctorId: appointment.doctorId,
 201 | 				serviceId: appointment.serviceId,
 202 | 				appointmentDate: appointment.appointmentDate,
 203 | 				time: appointment.time,
 204 | 				status: appointment.status,
 205 | 				type: appointment.type,
 206 | 				reason: appointment.reason,
 207 | 				note: appointment.note,
 208 | 				createdAt: appointment.createdAt,
 209 | 				patientFirstName: patient.firstName,
 210 | 				patientLastName: patient.lastName,
 211 | 				doctorName: doctor.name,
 212 | 				doctorSpecialty: doctor.specialty,
 213 | 			})
 214 | 			.from(appointment)
 215 | 			.innerJoin(patient, eq(appointment.patientId, patient.id))
 216 | 			.innerJoin(doctor, eq(appointment.doctorId, doctor.id))
 217 | 			.orderBy(desc(appointment.appointmentDate));
 218 | 
 219 | 		return allAppointments;
 220 | 	},
 221 | );
 222 | 
 223 | // Get my appointments (for logged-in parent)
 224 | export const getMyAppointments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
 225 | 	async () => {
 226 | 		const session = await getSession();
 227 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 228 | 
 229 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 230 | 
 231 | 		// Get all patients belonging to this user
 232 | 		const myPatients = await db
 233 | 			.select({ id: patient.id })
 234 | 			.from(patient)
 235 | 			.where(eq(patient.userId, session.user.id));
 236 | 
 237 | 		const patientIds = myPatients.map(p => p.id);
 238 | 
 239 | 		if (patientIds.length === 0) return [];
 240 | 
 241 | 		const myAppointments = await db
 242 | 			.select({
 243 | 				id: appointment.id,
 244 | 				patientId: appointment.patientId,
 245 | 				doctorId: appointment.doctorId,
 246 | 				serviceId: appointment.serviceId,
 247 | 				appointmentDate: appointment.appointmentDate,
 248 | 				time: appointment.time,
 249 | 				status: appointment.status,
 250 | 				type: appointment.type,
 251 | 				reason: appointment.reason,
 252 | 				note: appointment.note,
 253 | 				createdAt: appointment.createdAt,
 254 | 				patientFirstName: patient.firstName,
 255 | 				patientLastName: patient.lastName,
 256 | 				doctorName: doctor.name,
 257 | 				doctorSpecialty: doctor.specialty,
 258 | 			})
 259 | 			.from(appointment)
 260 | 			.innerJoin(patient, eq(appointment.patientId, patient.id))
 261 | 			.innerJoin(doctor, eq(appointment.doctorId, doctor.id))
 262 | 			.where(sql`${appointment.patientId} IN (${patientIds.join(",")})`)
 263 | 			.orderBy(desc(appointment.appointmentDate));
 264 | 
 265 | 		return myAppointments;
 266 | 	},
 267 | );
 268 | 
 269 | // Get appointment by ID
 270 | export const getAppointmentById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 271 | 	.inputValidator((id: string) => id)
 272 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 273 | 		const session = await getSession();
 274 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 275 | 
 276 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 277 | 		const appointmentId = z.string().parse(data);
 278 | 
 279 | 		const result = await db
 280 | 			.select({
 281 | 				id: appointment.id,
 282 | 				patientId: appointment.patientId,
 283 | 				doctorId: appointment.doctorId,
 284 | 				serviceId: appointment.serviceId,
 285 | 				appointmentDate: appointment.appointmentDate,
 286 | 				time: appointment.time,
 287 | 				durationMinutes: appointment.durationMinutes,
 288 | 				status: appointment.status,
 289 | 				type: appointment.type,
 290 | 				reason: appointment.reason,
 291 | 				note: appointment.note,
 292 | 				appointmentPrice: appointment.appointmentPrice,
 293 | 				createdAt: appointment.createdAt,
 294 | 				patient: patient,
 295 | 				doctor: doctor,
 296 | 			})
 297 | 			.from(appointment)
 298 | 			.innerJoin(patient, eq(appointment.patientId, patient.id))
 299 | 			.innerJoin(doctor, eq(appointment.doctorId, doctor.id))
 300 | 			.where(eq(appointment.id, appointmentId))
 301 | 			.limit(1);
 302 | 
 303 | 		const foundAppointment = result[0] ?? null;
 304 | 
 305 | 		if (!foundAppointment) return null;
 306 | 
 307 | 		// Check authorization
 308 | 		const isAdmin = session.user.role === "admin";
 309 | 		const isParent = foundAppointment.patient.userId === session.user.id;
 310 | 
 311 | 		if (!isAdmin && !isParent) {
 312 | 			throw new Error("Forbidden");
 313 | 		}
 314 | 
 315 | 		return foundAppointment;
 316 | 	});
 317 | 
 318 | // Create a new appointment
 319 | export const createAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 320 | 	.inputValidator((data: z.infer<typeof appointmentSchema>) =>
 321 | 		appointmentSchema.parse(data),
 322 | 	)
 323 | 	.handler(async ({ data }): Promise<AppointmentSelect> => {
 324 | 		const session = await getSession();
 325 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 326 | 
 327 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 328 | 
 329 | 		// Verify patient belongs to this user or user is admin
 330 | 		const patientRecord = await db
 331 | 			.select()
 332 | 			.from(patient)
 333 | 			.where(eq(patient.id, data.patientId))
 334 | 			.limit(1);
 335 | 
 336 | 		if (!patientRecord[0]) throw new Error("Patient not found");
 337 | 
 338 | 		const isAdmin = session.user.role === "admin";
 339 | 		const isParent = patientRecord[0].userId === session.user.id;
 340 | 
 341 | 		if (!isAdmin && !isParent) {
 342 | 			throw new Error("Forbidden");
 343 | 		}
 344 | 
 345 | 		// Get clinic ID from patient
 346 | 		const clinicId = patientRecord[0].clinicId;
 347 | 
 348 | 		const result = await db
 349 | 			.insert(appointment)
 350 | 			.values({
 351 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 352 | 				...data,
 353 | 				clinicId,
 354 | 				status: "PENDING",
 355 | 				doctorSpecialty: data.serviceId ? undefined : undefined, // Will be fetched from doctor
 356 | 			})
 357 | 			.returning();
 358 | 
 359 | 		const newAppointment = result[0];
 360 | 		if (!newAppointment) {
 361 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create appointment");
 362 | 		}
 363 | 
 364 | 		return newAppointment;
 365 | 	});
 366 | 
 367 | // Update appointment status
 368 | export const updateAppointmentStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 369 | 	.inputValidator((data: { appointmentId: string; status: typeof appointmentStatusEnum.enumValues[number] }) => data)
 370 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 371 | 		const session = await getSession();
 372 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 373 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 374 | 
 375 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 376 | 
 377 | 		const result = await db
 378 | 			.update(appointment)
 379 | 			.set({
 380 | 				status: data.status,
 381 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 382 | 			})
 383 | 			.where(eq(appointment.id, data.appointmentId))
 384 | 			.returning();
 385 | 
 386 | 		if (!result[0]) throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 387 | 
 388 | 		return result[0];
 389 | 	});
 390 | 
 391 | // Cancel appointment (user or admin)
 392 | export const cancelAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 393 | 	.inputValidator((data: { appointmentId: string; reason?: string }) => data)
 394 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 395 | 		const session = await getSession();
 396 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 397 | 
 398 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 399 | 
 400 | 		// Get appointment details
 401 | 		const appointmentRecord = await db
 402 | 			.select()
 403 | 			.from(appointment)
 404 | 			.where(eq(appointment.id, data.appointmentId))
 405 | 			.limit(1);
 406 | 
 407 | 		if (!appointmentRecord[0]) throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 408 | 
 409 | 		// Get patient to check ownership
 410 | 		const patientRecord = await db
 411 | 			.select()
 412 | 			.from(patient)
 413 | 			.where(eq(patient.id, appointmentRecord[0].patientId))
 414 | 			.limit(1);
 415 | 
 416 | 		const isAdmin = session.user.role === "admin";
 417 | 		const isParent = patientRecord[0]?.userId === session.user.id;
 418 | 
 419 | 		if (!isAdmin && !isParent) {
 420 | 			throw new Error("Forbidden");
 421 | 		}
 422 | 
 423 | 		const result = await db
 424 | 			.update(appointment)
 425 | 			.set({
 426 | 				status: "CANCELLED",
 427 | 				note: data.reason ? `Cancelled: ${data.reason}` : appointmentRecord[0].note,
 428 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 429 | 			})
 430 | 			.where(eq(appointment.id, data.appointmentId))
 431 | 			.returning();
 432 | 
 433 | 		return result[0];
 434 | 	});
 435 | 
 436 | // Get available time slots for a doctor on a specific date
 437 | export const getAvailableTimeSlots = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 438 | 	.inputValidator((data: { doctorId: string; date: Date }) => data)
 439 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 440 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 441 | 
 442 | 		// Get doctor's working hours for that day
 443 | 		const dayOfWeek = data.date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long' }).toUpperCase();
 444 | 
 445 | 		const [workingDay] = await db
 446 | 			.select({ startTime: sql<string>`start_time`, endTime: sql<string>`end_time` })
 447 | 			.from(sql`working_day`)
 448 | 			.where(
 449 | 				and(
 450 | 					eq(sql`doctor_id`, data.doctorId),
 451 | 					eq(sql`day`, dayOfWeek)
 452 | 				)
 453 | 			)
 454 | 			.limit(1);
 455 | 
 456 | 		if (!workingDay) return [];
 457 | 
 458 | 		// Get existing appointments for that doctor on that date
 459 | 		const startOfDay = new Date(data.date);
 460 | 		startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 461 | 
 462 | 		const endOfDay = new Date(data.date);
 463 | 		endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 464 | 
 465 | 		const existingAppointments = await db
 466 | 			.select({ time: appointment.time })
 467 | 			.from(appointment)
 468 | 			.where(
 469 | 				and(
 470 | 					eq(appointment.doctorId, data.doctorId),
 471 | 					gte(appointment.appointmentDate, startOfDay),
 472 | 					lte(appointment.appointmentDate, endOfDay),
 473 | 					sql`${appointment.status} IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED')`
 474 | 				)
 475 | 			);
 476 | 
 477 | 		const bookedTimes = new Set(existingAppointments.map(a => a.time));
 478 | 
 479 | 		// Generate time slots
 480 | 		const startTime = workingDay.startTime;
 481 | 		const endTime = workingDay.endTime;
 482 | 		const duration = 30; // minutes
 483 | 
 484 | 		const slots = [];
 485 | 		let current = new Date(`${data.date.toDateString()} ${startTime}`);
 486 | 		const end = new Date(`${data.date.toDateString()} ${endTime}`);
 487 | 
 488 | 		while (current < end) {
 489 | 			const timeString = current.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', hour12: false });
 490 | 
 491 | 			if (!bookedTimes.has(timeString)) {
 492 | 				slots.push(timeString);
 493 | 			}
 494 | 
 495 | 			current.setMinutes(current.getMinutes() + duration);
 496 | 		}
 497 | 
 498 | 		return slots;
 499 | 	});
 500 | 
 501 | // Get all appointments for a specific patient
 502 | export const getPatientAppointments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 503 | 	.validator((patientId: string) => patientId)
 504 | 	.handler(async ({ data: patientId }) => {
 505 | 		const session = await getSession();
 506 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 507 | 
 508 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 509 | 
 510 | 		const results = await db
 511 | 			.select({
 512 | 				id: appointment.id,
 513 | 				appointmentDate: appointment.appointmentDate,
 514 | 				time: appointment.time,
 515 | 				status: appointment.status,
 516 | 				type: appointment.type,
 517 | 				reason: appointment.reason,
 518 | 				doctorName: doctor.name,
 519 | 				doctorSpecialty: doctor.specialty,
 520 | 				appointmentPrice: appointment.appointmentPrice,
 521 | 			})
 522 | 			.from(appointment)
 523 | 			.innerJoin(doctor, eq(appointment.doctorId, doctor.id))
 524 | 			.where(
 525 | 				and(
 526 | 					eq(appointment.patientId, patientId),
 527 | 					eq(appointment.isDeleted, false)
 528 | 				)
 529 | 			)
 530 | 			.orderBy(desc(appointment.appointmentDate));
 531 | 
 532 | 		return results;
 533 | 	});

```

`data/cart.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   2 | import { eq } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | import { cartItems, products } from "#/db/schema";
   4 | 
   5 | export const getCartItemsCount = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
   6 | 	async () => {
   7 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
   8 | 		const rows = await db
   9 | 			.select()
  10 | 			.from(cartItems)
  11 | 			.innerJoin(products, eq(cartItems.productId, products.id));
  12 | 
  13 | 		const count = rows.reduce((acc, row) => acc + row.cart_items.quantity, 0);
  14 | 		const total = rows.reduce(
  15 | 			(acc, row) => acc + Number(row.products.price) * row.cart_items.quantity,
  16 | 			0,
  17 | 		);
  18 | 
  19 | 		return { count, total };
  20 | 	},
  21 | );
  22 | 
  23 | export const fetchCartItems = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
  24 | 	async () => {
  25 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  26 | 		try {
  27 | 			// innerJoin returns rows shaped as: { cart_items: {...}, products: {...} }
  28 | 			const rows = await db
  29 | 				.select()
  30 | 				.from(cartItems)
  31 | 				.innerJoin(products, eq(cartItems.productId, products.id));
  32 | 
  33 | 			// Flatten each joined row into a single object for the client
  34 | 			return rows.map((row) => {
  35 | 				const cartItem = row.cart_items;
  36 | 				const product = row.products;
  37 | 
  38 | 				return {
  39 | 					id: cartItem.id,
  40 | 					productId: product.id, // productId we use in cart to redirect to product
  41 | 					name: product.name,
  42 | 					price: product.price,
  43 | 					quantity: cartItem.quantity,
  44 | 					image: product.image,
  45 | 					inventory: product.inventory,
  46 | 				};
  47 | 			});
  48 | 		} catch (error) {
  49 | 			console.error("Error fetching cart items:", error);
  50 | 			return [];
  51 | 		}
  52 | 	},
  53 | );
  54 | 
  55 | export const updateCartQuantity = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  56 | 	.inputValidator((data: { cartItemId: string; delta: 1 | -1 }) => data)
  57 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  58 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  59 | 		const [item] = await db
  60 | 			.select()
  61 | 			.from(cartItems)
  62 | 			.where(eq(cartItems.id, data.cartItemId))
  63 | 			.limit(1);
  64 | 
  65 | 		if (!item) return;
  66 | 
  67 | 		const newQuantity = item.quantity + data.delta;
  68 | 
  69 | 		if (newQuantity <= 0) {
  70 | 			await db.delete(cartItems).where(eq(cartItems.id, data.cartItemId));
  71 | 		} else {
  72 | 			await db
  73 | 				.update(cartItems)
  74 | 				.set({ quantity: newQuantity, updatedAt: new Date() })
  75 | 				.where(eq(cartItems.id, data.cartItemId));
  76 | 		}
  77 | 	});
  78 | 
  79 | export const clearCart = createServerFn({ method: "POST" }).handler(
  80 | 	async () => {
  81 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  82 | 		await db.delete(cartItems);
  83 | 	},
  84 | );
  85 | 
  86 | export const removeFromCart = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  87 | 	.inputValidator((data: { cartItemId: string }) => data)
  88 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  89 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  90 | 		try {
  91 | 			await db.delete(cartItems).where(eq(cartItems.id, data.cartItemId));
  92 | 		} catch (error) {
  93 | 			console.error("Error removing from cart:", error);
  94 | 			throw error;
  95 | 		}
  96 | 	});
  97 | 
  98 | export const addToCart = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  99 | 	.inputValidator((data: { productId: string }) => data)
 100 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 101 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 102 | 		try {
 103 | 			const [existing] = await db
 104 | 				.select()
 105 | 				.from(cartItems)
 106 | 				.where(eq(cartItems.productId, data.productId))
 107 | 				.limit(1);
 108 | 
 109 | 			if (existing) {
 110 | 				await db
 111 | 					.update(cartItems)
 112 | 					.set({ quantity: existing.quantity + 1, updatedAt: new Date() })
 113 | 					.where(eq(cartItems.id, existing.id));
 114 | 			} else {
 115 | 				await db.insert(cartItems).values({ productId: data.productId });
 116 | 			}
 117 | 		} catch (error) {
 118 | 			console.error("Error adding to cart:", error);
 119 | 			throw error;
 120 | 		}
 121 | 	});

```

`data/checkout.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   2 | import { eq } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | import { cartItems, orderItems, orders, products } from "#/db/schema";
   4 | import { getSession } from "#/lib/auth.functions";
   5 | import { sendOrderConfirmationEmail } from "@/lib/email";
   6 | 
   7 | export const createCheckoutSession = createServerFn({ method: "POST" }).handler(
   8 | 	async () => {
   9 | 		const session = await getSession();
  10 | 		if (!session) {
  11 | 			throw new Error("You must be logged in to checkout");
  12 | 		}
  13 | 
  14 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  15 | 		const Stripe = (await import("stripe")).default;
  16 | 
  17 | 		const stripe = new Stripe(process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY ?? "");
  18 | 
  19 | 		// 1. Fetch cart items with product details
  20 | 		const rows = await db
  21 | 			.select()
  22 | 			.from(cartItems)
  23 | 			.innerJoin(products, eq(cartItems.productId, products.id));
  24 | 
  25 | 		if (rows.length === 0) {
  26 | 			throw new Error("Cart is empty");
  27 | 		}
  28 | 
  29 | 		// 2. Calculate total
  30 | 		const total = rows.reduce(
  31 | 			(acc, row) => acc + Number(row.products.price) * row.cart_items.quantity,
  32 | 			0,
  33 | 		);
  34 | 
  35 | 		// 3. Create a pending order in the DB
  36 | 		const [order] = await db
  37 | 			.insert(orders)
  38 | 			.values({
  39 | 				userId: session.user.id,
  40 | 				total: total.toFixed(2),
  41 | 				status: "pending",
  42 | 			})
  43 | 			.returning();
  44 | 
  45 | 		if (!order) {
  46 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create order");
  47 | 		}
  48 | 
  49 | 		// 4. Insert order items (snapshot of product data at time of purchase)
  50 | 		await db.insert(orderItems).values(
  51 | 			rows.map((row) => ({
  52 | 				orderId: order.id,
  53 | 				productId: row.products.id,
  54 | 				name: row.products.name,
  55 | 				price: row.products.price,
  56 | 				quantity: row.cart_items.quantity,
  57 | 				image: row.products.image,
  58 | 			})),
  59 | 		);
  60 | 
  61 | 		// 5. Build line_items for Stripe
  62 | 		const line_items = rows.map((row) => ({
  63 | 			price_data: {
  64 | 				currency: "usd",
  65 | 				product_data: {
  66 | 					name: row.products.name,
  67 | 					description: row.products.description,
  68 | 					...(row.products.image.startsWith("http")
  69 | 						? { images: [row.products.image] }
  70 | 						: {}),
  71 | 				},
  72 | 				unit_amount: Math.round(Number(row.products.price) * 100),
  73 | 			},
  74 | 			quantity: row.cart_items.quantity,
  75 | 		}));
  76 | 
  77 | 		// 6. Create Stripe Checkout Session
  78 | 		const checkoutSession = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
  79 | 			mode: "payment",
  80 | 			payment_method_types: ["card"],
  81 | 			line_items,
  82 | 			success_url: `${process.env.BETTER_AUTH_URL}/checkout/success?session_id={CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID}`,
  83 | 			cancel_url: `${process.env.BETTER_AUTH_URL}/checkout/cancel`,
  84 | 			metadata: {
  85 | 				orderId: order.id,
  86 | 			},
  87 | 		});
  88 | 
  89 | 		// 7. Save the Stripe session ID in our order
  90 | 		await db
  91 | 			.update(orders)
  92 | 			.set({ stripeSessionId: checkoutSession.id })
  93 | 			.where(eq(orders.id, order.id));
  94 | 
  95 | 		if (!checkoutSession.url) {
  96 | 			throw new Error("Stripe did not return a checkout URL");
  97 | 		}
  98 | 
  99 | 		return { url: checkoutSession.url };
 100 | 	},
 101 | );
 102 | 
 103 | // Called from /checkout/success to verify payment and finalize the order
 104 | export const confirmOrder = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 105 | 	.inputValidator((data: { sessionId: string }) => data)
 106 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 107 | 		const session = await getSession();
 108 | 		if (!session) {
 109 | 			throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 110 | 		}
 111 | 
 112 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 113 | 		const Stripe = (await import("stripe")).default;
 114 | 
 115 | 		const stripe = new Stripe(process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY ?? "");
 116 | 
 117 | 		// 1. Verify payment with Stripe
 118 | 		const checkoutSession = await stripe.checkout.sessions.retrieve(
 119 | 			data.sessionId,
 120 | 		);
 121 | 
 122 | 		if (checkoutSession.payment_status !== "paid") {
 123 | 			throw new Error("Payment not completed");
 124 | 		}
 125 | 
 126 | 		// 2. Find the order by Stripe session ID
 127 | 		const [order] = await db
 128 | 			.select()
 129 | 			.from(orders)
 130 | 			.where(eq(orders.stripeSessionId, data.sessionId))
 131 | 			.limit(1);
 132 | 
 133 | 		if (!order) {
 134 | 			throw new Error("Order not found");
 135 | 		}
 136 | 
 137 | 		// 3. Only update if still pending (avoid double-processing)
 138 | 		if (order.status === "pending") {
 139 | 			await db
 140 | 				.update(orders)
 141 | 				.set({ status: "paid" })
 142 | 				.where(eq(orders.id, order.id));
 143 | 
 144 | 			// 4. Clear the cart
 145 | 			await db.delete(cartItems);
 146 | 
 147 | 			// 5. Send confirmation email (fire-and-forget)
 148 | 			const items = await db
 149 | 				.select()
 150 | 				.from(orderItems)
 151 | 				.where(eq(orderItems.orderId, order.id));
 152 | 
 153 | 			sendOrderConfirmationEmail(
 154 | 				{
 155 | 					name: "TanStack Store",
 156 | 					from: "TanStack Store <onboarding@resend.dev>",
 157 | 					ordersUrl: `${process.env.BETTER_AUTH_URL}/orders`,
 158 | 				},
 159 | 				{
 160 | 					to: session.user.email,
 161 | 					customerName: session.user.name,
 162 | 					orderId: order.id,
 163 | 					total: order.total,
 164 | 					items: items.map((item) => ({
 165 | 						name: item.name,
 166 | 						price: item.price,
 167 | 						quantity: item.quantity,
 168 | 						image: item.image,
 169 | 					})),
 170 | 				},
 171 | 			);
 172 | 		}
 173 | 
 174 | 		return { orderId: order.id, status: "paid" as const };
 175 | 	});

```

`data/clinic.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // lib/clinic.functions.ts
   2 | import { clinic, clinicMember, clinicSetting, user } from "@/db/schema";
   3 | import { getSession } from "@/lib/auth.functions";
   4 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   5 | import { and, eq, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   6 | import { z } from "zod";
   7 | 
   8 | const ClinicCreateSchema = z.object({
   9 | 	name: z.string().min(1, "Clinic name is required"),
  10 | 	email: z.string().email().optional(),
  11 | 	timezone: z.string().default("UTC"),
  12 | 	address: z.string().optional(),
  13 | 	phone: z.string().optional(),
  14 | });
  15 | 
  16 | const ClinicUpdateSchema = ClinicCreateSchema.partial();
  17 | 
  18 | // Get current user's clinic
  19 | export const getCurrentClinic = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
  20 | 	const session = await getSession();
  21 | 	if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  22 | 
  23 | 	const { db } = await import("@/db");
  24 | 
  25 | 	// Get user's primary clinic from usersToClinic
  26 | 	const userClinic = await db
  27 | 		.select({
  28 | 			clinicId: clinicMember.clinicId,
  29 | 			role: clinicMember.role,
  30 | 		})
  31 | 		.from(clinicMember)
  32 | 		.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
  33 | 		.limit(1);
  34 | 
  35 | 	if (!userClinic[0]?.clinicId) {
  36 | 		// If no clinic assigned, check user's default clinicId
  37 | 		if (session.user.clinicId) {
  38 | 			const defaultClinic = await db.query.clinic.findFirst({
  39 | 				where: { id: session.user.clinicId, isDeleted: false },
  40 | 			});
  41 | 			return defaultClinic;
  42 | 		}
  43 | 		return null;
  44 | 	}
  45 | 
  46 | 	const clinicData = await db.query.clinic.findFirst({
  47 | 		where: { id: userClinic[0].clinicId, isDeleted: false },
  48 | 	});
  49 | 
  50 | 	return clinicData;
  51 | });
  52 | 
  53 | // Get clinic by ID
  54 | export const getClinicById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  55 | 	.validator((id: string) => id)
  56 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  57 | 		const session = await getSession();
  58 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  59 | 
  60 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  61 | 		const clinicId = z.string().parse(data);
  62 | 
  63 | 		const clinicData = await db.query.clinic.findFirst({
  64 | 			where: { id: clinicId, isDeleted: false },
  65 | 		});
  66 | 
  67 | 		if (!clinicData) throw new Error("Clinic not found");
  68 | 
  69 | 		// Check if user has access to this clinic via junction table
  70 | 		const userAccess = await db
  71 | 			.select()
  72 | 			.from(clinicMember)
  73 | 			.where(and(eq(clinicMember.userId, session.user.id), eq(clinicMember.clinicId, clinicId)))
  74 | 			.limit(1);
  75 | 
  76 | 		const hasAccess = session.user.role === "admin" || userAccess.length > 0;
  77 | 
  78 | 		if (!hasAccess) throw new Error("Forbidden");
  79 | 
  80 | 		return clinicData;
  81 | 	});
  82 | 
  83 | // Create a new clinic (admin only)
  84 | export const createClinic = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  85 | 	.validator((data: z.infer<typeof ClinicCreateSchema>) => ClinicCreateSchema.parse(data))
  86 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  87 | 		const session = await getSession();
  88 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  89 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden - Admin only");
  90 | 
  91 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  92 | 		const { name, email, timezone, address, phone } = data;
  93 | 
  94 | 		// Check if clinic name already exists
  95 | 		const existing = await db.query.clinic.findFirst({
  96 | 			where: { name, isDeleted: false },
  97 | 		});
  98 | 		if (existing) throw new Error("Clinic with this name already exists");
  99 | 
 100 | 		const newClinic = await db.transaction(async tx => {
 101 | 			const [clinicData] = await tx
 102 | 				.insert(clinic)
 103 | 				.values({
 104 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 105 | 					name,
 106 | 					email,
 107 | 					timezone: timezone || "UTC",
 108 | 					address,
 109 | 					phone,
 110 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 111 | 					updatedAt: new Date(),
 112 | 				})
 113 | 				.returning();
 114 | 
 115 | 			if (!clinicData) throw new Error("Failed to create clinic");
 116 | 
 117 | 			// Add creator as clinic member with admin role
 118 | 			await tx.insert(clinicMember).values({
 119 | 				userId: session.user.id,
 120 | 				clinicId: clinicData.id,
 121 | 				role: "admin",
 122 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
 123 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 124 | 			});
 125 | 
 126 | 			// Create default clinic settings
 127 | 			await tx.insert(clinicSetting).values({
 128 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 129 | 				clinicId: clinicData.id,
 130 | 				openingTime: "09:00",
 131 | 				closingTime: "17:00",
 132 | 				workingDays: "MONDAY,TUESDAY,WEDNESDAY,THURSDAY,FRIDAY",
 133 | 				defaultAppointmentDuration: 30,
 134 | 				requireEmergencyContact: true,
 135 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
 136 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 137 | 			});
 138 | 
 139 | 			return clinicData;
 140 | 		});
 141 | 
 142 | 		return newClinic;
 143 | 	});
 144 | 
 145 | // Update clinic
 146 | export const updateClinic = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 147 | 	.validator((data: { id: string; values: z.infer<typeof ClinicUpdateSchema> }) =>
 148 | 		z.object({ id: z.string(), values: ClinicUpdateSchema }).parse(data)
 149 | 	)
 150 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 151 | 		const session = await getSession();
 152 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 153 | 
 154 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 155 | 		const { id, values } = data;
 156 | 
 157 | 		// Check permissions
 158 | 		const isAdmin = session.user.role === "admin";
 159 | 		const isClinicAdmin = await db
 160 | 			.select()
 161 | 			.from(clinicMember)
 162 | 			.where(and(eq(clinicMember.userId, session.user.id), eq(clinicMember.clinicId, id), eq(clinicMember.role, "admin")))
 163 | 			.limit(1);
 164 | 
 165 | 		if (!isAdmin && !isClinicAdmin[0]) throw new Error("Forbidden - Admin access required");
 166 | 
 167 | 		const [updated] = await db
 168 | 			.update(clinic)
 169 | 			.set({
 170 | 				...values,
 171 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 172 | 			})
 173 | 			.where(eq(clinic.id, id))
 174 | 			.returning();
 175 | 
 176 | 		if (!updated) throw new Error("Clinic not found");
 177 | 		return updated;
 178 | 	});
 179 | 
 180 | // Get clinic members
 181 | export const getClinicMembers = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 182 | 	.validator((clinicId: string) => clinicId)
 183 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 184 | 		const session = await getSession();
 185 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 186 | 
 187 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 188 | 		const clinicId = z.string().parse(data);
 189 | 
 190 | 		const members = await db.query.clinicMember.findMany({
 191 | 			where: { clinicId },
 192 | 			orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
 193 | 		});
 194 | 
 195 | 		return members;
 196 | 	});
 197 | 
 198 | // Add member to clinic
 199 | export const addClinicMember = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 200 | 	.validator((data: { clinicId: string; userId: string; role: "admin" | "doctor" | "staff" | "patient" }) => data)
 201 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 202 | 		const session = await getSession();
 203 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 204 | 
 205 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 206 | 		const { clinicId, userId, role } = data;
 207 | 
 208 | 		// Check if user has permission
 209 | 		const isAdmin = session.user.role === "admin";
 210 | 		const isClinicAdmin = await db
 211 | 			.select()
 212 | 			.from(clinicMember)
 213 | 			.where(and(eq(clinicMember.userId, session.user.id), eq(clinicMember.clinicId, clinicId), eq(clinicMember.role, "admin")))
 214 | 			.limit(1);
 215 | 
 216 | 		if (!isAdmin && !isClinicAdmin[0]) throw new Error("Forbidden");
 217 | 
 218 | 		// Check if user already exists in clinic
 219 | 		const existing = await db
 220 | 			.select()
 221 | 			.from(clinicMember)
 222 | 			.where(and(eq(clinicMember.userId, userId), eq(clinicMember.clinicId, clinicId)))
 223 | 			.limit(1);
 224 | 
 225 | 		if (existing[0]) throw new Error("User is already a member of this clinic");
 226 | 
 227 | 		// Add member
 228 | 		await db.insert(clinicMember).values({
 229 | 			userId: userId,
 230 | 			clinicId: clinicId,
 231 | 			role,
 232 | 			createdAt: new Date(),
 233 | 			updatedAt: new Date(),
 234 | 		});
 235 | 
 236 | 		// Update user's default clinic if not set
 237 | 		const userData = await db.query.user.findFirst({
 238 | 			where: { id: userId },
 239 | 			columns: { clinicId: true },
 240 | 		});
 241 | 
 242 | 		if (!userData?.clinicId) {
 243 | 			await db
 244 | 				.update(user)
 245 | 				.set({ clinicId })
 246 | 				.where(eq(user.id, userId));
 247 | 		}
 248 | 
 249 | 		return { success: true };
 250 | 	});
 251 | 
 252 | // Remove member from clinic
 253 | export const removeClinicMember = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 254 | 	.validator((data: { clinicId: string; userId: string }) => data)
 255 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 256 | 		const session = await getSession();
 257 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 258 | 
 259 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 260 | 		const { clinicId, userId } = data;
 261 | 
 262 | 		const isAdmin = session.user.role === "admin";
 263 | 		const isClinicAdmin = await db
 264 | 			.select()
 265 | 			.from(clinicMember)
 266 | 			.where(and(eq(clinicMember.userId, session.user.id), eq(clinicMember.clinicId, clinicId), eq(clinicMember.role, "admin")))
 267 | 			.limit(1);
 268 | 
 269 | 		if (!isAdmin && !isClinicAdmin[0]) throw new Error("Forbidden");
 270 | 
 271 | 		// Cannot remove self if you're the only admin
 272 | 		if (userId === session.user.id) {
 273 | 			const adminCount = await db
 274 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
 275 | 				.from(clinicMember)
 276 | 				.where(and(eq(clinicMember.clinicId, clinicId), eq(clinicMember.role, "admin")));
 277 | 
 278 | 			if (adminCount[0]?.count <= 1) {
 279 | 				throw new Error("Cannot remove the only admin from the clinic");
 280 | 			}
 281 | 		}
 282 | 
 283 | 		await db
 284 | 			.delete(clinicMember)
 285 | 			.where(and(eq(clinicMember.userId, userId), eq(clinicMember.clinicId, clinicId)));
 286 | 
 287 | 		return { success: true };
 288 | 	});

```

`data/diagnosis.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // lib/diagnosis.functions.ts
   2 | import { diagnosis, type Status } from "@/db/schema";
   3 | import { getSession } from "@/lib/auth.functions";
   4 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   5 | import { and, eq, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   6 | import { z } from "zod";
   7 | 
   8 | const DiagnosisCreateSchema = z.object({
   9 | 	patientId: z.string(),
  10 | 	doctorId: z.string(),
  11 | 	medicalId: z.string(),
  12 | 	appointmentId: z.string().optional(),
  13 | 	type: z.string().optional(),
  14 | 	diagnosis: z.string().optional(),
  15 | 	treatment: z.string().optional(),
  16 | 	notes: z.string().optional(),
  17 | 	symptoms: z.string(),
  18 | 	prescribedMedications: z.string().optional(),
  19 | 	followUpPlan: z.string().optional(),
  20 | });
  21 | 
  22 | const DiagnosisUpdateSchema = DiagnosisCreateSchema.partial();
  23 | 
  24 | // Get encounters for a patient
  25 | export const getPatientEncounters = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  26 | 	.validator((data: { patientId: string; limit?: number; offset?: number }) => data)
  27 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  28 | 		const session = await getSession();
  29 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  30 | 
  31 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  32 | 		const { patientId, limit = 20, offset = 0 } = data;
  33 | 
  34 | 		// Get user's clinic
  35 | 		const userClinic = await db
  36 | 			.select({ clinicId: sql<string>`clinic_id` })
  37 | 			.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
  38 | 			.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
  39 | 			.limit(1);
  40 | 
  41 | 		const clinicId = userClinic[0]?.clinicId;
  42 | 
  43 | 		const encounters = await db.query.diagnosis.findMany({
  44 | 			where: {
  45 | 				patientId,
  46 | 				clinicId: clinicId ?? "",
  47 | 				isDeleted: false,
  48 | 			},
  49 | 			with: {
  50 | 				doctor: {
  51 | 					columns: { id: true, name: true, specialty: true },
  52 | 				},
  53 | 				appointment: {
  54 | 					columns: { id: true, appointmentDate: true, type: true },
  55 | 				},
  56 | 				medical: {
  57 | 					columns: { id: true, createdAt: true },
  58 | 				},
  59 | 				prescriptions: {
  60 | 					limit: 5,
  61 | 					orderBy: { issuedDate: "desc" },
  62 | 				},
  63 | 				labTest: {
  64 | 					limit: 5,
  65 | 					orderBy: { testDate: "desc" },
  66 | 				},
  67 | 				vitalSigns: {
  68 | 					limit: 1,
  69 | 					orderBy: { recordedAt: "desc" },
  70 | 				},
  71 | 			},
  72 | 			orderBy: { date: "desc" },
  73 | 			limit,
  74 | 			offset,
  75 | 		});
  76 | 
  77 | 		const total = await db.$count(
  78 | 			diagnosis,
  79 | 			and(
  80 | 				eq(diagnosis.patientId, patientId),
  81 | 				eq(diagnosis.clinicId, clinicId || ""),
  82 | 				eq(diagnosis.isDeleted, false)
  83 | 			)
  84 | 		);
  85 | 
  86 | 		return { encounters, total, limit, offset };
  87 | 	});
  88 | 
  89 | // Get encounter by ID
  90 | export const getEncounterById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  91 | 	.validator((id: string) => id)
  92 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  93 | 		const session = await getSession();
  94 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  95 | 
  96 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  97 | 		const encounterId = z.string().parse(data);
  98 | 
  99 | 		const encounter = await db.query.diagnosis.findFirst({
 100 | 			where: { id: encounterId, isDeleted: false },
 101 | 			with: {
 102 | 				patient: {
 103 | 					columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true, dateOfBirth: true, userId: true },
 104 | 				},
 105 | 				doctor: {
 106 | 					columns: { id: true, name: true, specialty: true },
 107 | 				},
 108 | 				appointment: true,
 109 | 				medical: true,
 110 | 				prescriptions: {
 111 | 					with: {
 112 | 						prescribedItems: {
 113 | 							with: {
 114 | 								drug: true,
 115 | 							},
 116 | 						},
 117 | 					},
 118 | 				},
 119 | 				labTest: {
 120 | 					with: {
 121 | 						service: true,
 122 | 					},
 123 | 				},
 124 | 				vitalSigns: true,
 125 | 			},
 126 | 		});
 127 | 
 128 | 		if (!encounter) throw new Error("Encounter not found");
 129 | 
 130 | 		// Check authorization
 131 | 		const isAdmin = session.user.role === "admin";
 132 | 		const isDoctor = session.user.role === "doctor";
 133 | 		const isStaff = session.user.role === "staff";
 134 | 
 135 | 		if (!isAdmin && !isDoctor && !isStaff && encounter.patient?.userId !== session.user.id) {
 136 | 			throw new Error("Forbidden");
 137 | 		}
 138 | 
 139 | 		return encounter;
 140 | 	});
 141 | 
 142 | // Create encounter (diagnosis)
 143 | export const createEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 144 | 	.validator((data: z.infer<typeof DiagnosisCreateSchema>) => DiagnosisCreateSchema.parse(data))
 145 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 146 | 		const session = await getSession();
 147 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 148 | 
 149 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 150 | 
 151 | 		// Get user's clinic
 152 | 		const userClinic = await db
 153 | 			.select({ clinicId: sql<string>`clinic_id` })
 154 | 			.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
 155 | 			.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
 156 | 			.limit(1);
 157 | 
 158 | 		const clinicId = userClinic[0]?.clinicId;
 159 | 		if (!clinicId) throw new Error("No clinic assigned");
 160 | 
 161 | 		const [newEncounter] = await db
 162 | 			.insert(diagnosis)
 163 | 			.values({
 164 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 165 | 				clinicId: clinicId as string,
 166 | 				...data,
 167 | 				status: "ACTIVE" as Status,
 168 | 				date: new Date(),
 169 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
 170 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 171 | 			})
 172 | 			.returning();
 173 | 
 174 | 		if (!newEncounter) throw new Error("Failed to create encounter");
 175 | 		return newEncounter;
 176 | 	});
 177 | 
 178 | // Update encounter
 179 | export const updateEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 180 | 	.validator((data: { id: string; values: z.infer<typeof DiagnosisUpdateSchema> }) =>
 181 | 		z.object({ id: z.string(), values: DiagnosisUpdateSchema }).parse(data)
 182 | 	)
 183 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 184 | 		const session = await getSession();
 185 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 186 | 
 187 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 188 | 		const { id, values } = data;
 189 | 
 190 | 		const [updated] = await db
 191 | 			.update(diagnosis)
 192 | 			.set({
 193 | 				...values,
 194 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 195 | 			})
 196 | 			.where(eq(diagnosis.id, id))
 197 | 			.returning();
 198 | 
 199 | 		if (!updated) throw new Error("Encounter not found");
 200 | 		return updated;
 201 | 	});
 202 | 
 203 | // Complete encounter (set status to COMPLETED)
 204 | export const completeEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 205 | 	.validator((data: { id: string; notes?: string; followUpPlan?: string }) => data)
 206 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 207 | 		const session = await getSession();
 208 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 209 | 
 210 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 211 | 		const { id, notes, followUpPlan } = data;
 212 | 
 213 | 		const [completed] = await db
 214 | 			.update(diagnosis)
 215 | 			.set({
 216 | 				status: "COMPLETED" as Status,
 217 | 				notes: notes || undefined,
 218 | 				followUpPlan: followUpPlan || undefined,
 219 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 220 | 			})
 221 | 			.where(eq(diagnosis.id, id))
 222 | 			.returning();
 223 | 
 224 | 		if (!completed) throw new Error("Encounter not found");
 225 | 		return completed;
 226 | 	});
 227 | 
 228 | // Delete encounter (soft delete)
 229 | export const deleteEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 230 | 	.validator((id: string) => id)
 231 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 232 | 		const session = await getSession();
 233 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 234 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden - Admin only");
 235 | 
 236 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 237 | 		const encounterId = z.string().parse(data);
 238 | 
 239 | 		const [deleted] = await db
 240 | 			.update(diagnosis)
 241 | 			.set({
 242 | 				isDeleted: true,
 243 | 				deletedAt: new Date(),
 244 | 			})
 245 | 			.where(eq(diagnosis.id, encounterId))
 246 | 			.returning();
 247 | 
 248 | 		if (!deleted) throw new Error("Encounter not found");
 249 | 		return { success: true };
 250 | 	});
 251 | 
 252 | // Get encounters by date range
 253 | export const getEncountersByDateRange = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 254 | 	.validator((data: { startDate: Date; endDate: Date; doctorId?: string }) => data)
 255 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 256 | 		const session = await getSession();
 257 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 258 | 
 259 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 260 | 		const { startDate, endDate, doctorId } = data;
 261 | 
 262 | 		// Get user's clinic
 263 | 		const userClinic = await db
 264 | 			.select({ clinicId: sql<string>`clinic_id` })
 265 | 			.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
 266 | 			.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
 267 | 			.limit(1);
 268 | 
 269 | 		const clinicId = userClinic[0]?.clinicId;
 270 | 
 271 | 		const encounters = await db.query.diagnosis.findMany({
 272 | 			where: {
 273 | 				clinicId: clinicId ?? "",
 274 | 				isDeleted: false,
 275 | 				date: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 276 | 				...(doctorId ? { doctorId } : {}),
 277 | 			},
 278 | 			with: {
 279 | 				patient: {
 280 | 					columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true },
 281 | 				},
 282 | 				doctor: {
 283 | 					columns: { id: true, name: true },
 284 | 				},
 285 | 			},
 286 | 			orderBy: { date: "desc" },
 287 | 		});
 288 | 
 289 | 		return encounters;
 290 | 	});
 291 | 
 292 | 
 293 | // Add to src/data/diagnosis.ts
 294 | // Get all encounters for the clinic (admin/staff)
 295 | export const getAllEncounters = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
 296 |   const session = await getSession();
 297 |   if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 298 |   if (session.user.role === "patient") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 299 |

 301 | 
 302 |   // Get user's clinic
 303 |   const userClinic = await db
 304 |     .select({ clinicId: sql<string>`clinic_id` })
 305 |     .from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
 306 |     .where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
 307 |     .limit(1);

 312 |     where: {

 314 |       isDeleted: false,
 315 |     },
 316 |     with: {
 317 |       patient: {
 318 |         columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true },
 319 |       },

`data/doctors.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { getSession } from "#/lib/auth.functions";
   2 | import { doctor, type DbDoctor as DoctorSelect, type DoctorType } from "@/db/schema";
   3 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   4 | import { and, eq, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   5 | import { z } from "zod";
   6 | import { generateId } from '../utils';
   7 | import { DoctorEnhancedCreateSchema, type DoctorCreateInput } from '../db/zod';
   8 | 
   9 | // Schema for creating/updating doctors
  10 | export const doctorSchema = z.object({
  11 | 	name: z.string().min(1, "Name is required"),
  12 | 	email: z.email().optional().nullable(),
  13 | 	specialty: z.string().min(1, "Specialty is required"),
  14 | 	licenseNumber: z.string().optional().nullable(),
  15 | 	phone: z.string().optional().nullable(),
  16 | 	address: z.string().optional().nullable(),
  17 | 	department: z.string().optional().nullable(),
  18 | 	img: z.string().optional().nullable(),
  19 | 	colorCode: z.string().optional().nullable(),
  20 | 	availabilityStatus: z.enum(["AVAILABLE", "UNAVAILABLE", "ON_LEAVE"]).default("AVAILABLE"),
  21 | 	type: z.enum(["FULL", "PART_TIME", "CONSULTANT", "VISITING"]).default("FULL"),
  22 | 	appointmentPrice: z.number().optional(),
  23 | 	rating: z.number().min(0).max(5).optional(),
  24 | 	availableFromWeekDay: z.enum(["MONDAY", "TUESDAY", "WEDNESDAY", "THURSDAY", "FRIDAY", "SATURDAY", "SUNDAY"]).optional(),
  25 | 	availableToWeekDay: z.enum(["MONDAY", "TUESDAY", "WEDNESDAY", "THURSDAY", "FRIDAY", "SATURDAY", "SUNDAY"]).optional(),
  26 | 	availableFromTime: z.string().optional(),
  27 | 	availableToTime: z.string().optional(),
  28 | 	isActive: z.boolean().default(true),
  29 | });
  30 | 
  31 | // Get all doctors for the current clinic
  32 | export const getAllDoctors = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
  33 | 	async () => {
  34 | 		const session = await getSession();
  35 | 		if (!session) {
  36 | 			throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  37 | 		}
  38 | 
  39 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  40 | 
  41 | 		try {
  42 | 			// Get user's clinic ID
  43 | 			const userClinics = await db
  44 | 				.select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
  45 | 				.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
  46 | 				.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
  47 | 				.limit(1);
  48 | 
  49 | 			const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
  50 | 
  51 | 			if (!clinicId) {
  52 | 				return [];
  53 | 			}
  54 | 
  55 | 			const allDoctors = await db.query.doctor.findMany({
  56 |         where: {
  57 |           clinicId,
  58 |           isDeleted: false
  59 |         },
  60 |         orderBy:{ name: "asc", createdAt: "desc"  }
  61 |       })
  62 | 			return allDoctors;
  63 | 		} catch (error) {
  64 | 			console.error("Error getting all doctors: ", error);
  65 | 			return [];
  66 | 		}
  67 | 	},
  68 | );
  69 | 
  70 | // Get available doctors (for appointment booking)
  71 | export const getAvailableDoctors = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
  72 | 	async () => {
  73 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  74 | 
  75 | 		try {
  76 | 			const availableDoctors = await db
  77 | 				.select()
  78 | 				.from(doctor)
  79 | 				.where(
  80 | 					and(
  81 | 						eq(doctor.isActive, true),
  82 | 						eq(doctor.availabilityStatus, "AVAILABLE"),
  83 | 						sql`${doctor.isDeleted} = false`
  84 | 					)
  85 | 				)
  86 | 				.orderBy(doctor.name);
  87 | 
  88 | 			return availableDoctors;
  89 | 		} catch (error) {
  90 | 			console.error("Error getting available doctors: ", error);
  91 | 			return [];
  92 | 		}
  93 | 	},
  94 | );
  95 | 
  96 | // Get doctor by ID
  97 | export const getDoctorById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  98 | 	.validator((id: string) => id)
  99 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 100 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 101 | 		const doctorId = z.string().parse(data);
 102 | 
 103 | 		const result = await db
 104 | 			.select()
 105 | 			.from(doctor)
 106 | 			.where(eq(doctor.id, doctorId))
 107 | 			.limit(1);
 108 | 
 109 | 		return result[0] ?? null;
 110 | 	});
 111 | 
 112 | // Create a new doctor (admin only)
 113 | export const createDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 114 | 	.validator((data: DoctorCreateInput) =>
 115 | 		DoctorEnhancedCreateSchema.parse(data),
 116 | 	)
 117 | 	.handler(async ({ data }): Promise<DoctorSelect> => {
 118 | 		const session = await getSession();
 119 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 120 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 121 | 
 122 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 123 | 
 124 | 		// Get clinic ID from user's clinic
 125 | 		const userClinics = await db
 126 | 			.select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
 127 | 			.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
 128 | 			.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
 129 | 			.limit(1);
 130 | 
 131 | 		const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
 132 | 
 133 | 		if (!clinicId) {
 134 | 			throw new Error("No clinic assigned to this user");
 135 | 		}
 136 | 
 137 | 		const result = await db
 138 | 			.insert(doctor)
 139 | 			.values({
 140 | 				name: data.name,
 141 | 				email: data.email ?? null,
 142 | 				specialty: data.specialty,
 143 | 				licenseNumber: data.licenseNumber ?? null,
 144 | 				phone: data.phone ?? null,
 145 | 				address: data.address ?? null,
 146 | 				department: (data.department ?? null) as string | null,
 147 | 				img: (data.img ?? null) as string | null,
 148 | 				colorCode: (data.colorCode ?? null) as string | null,
 149 | 				type: (data.type ?? "FULL") as DoctorType,
 150 | 				appointmentPrice: (data.appointmentPrice ?? 0) as number,
 151 | 				rating: (data.rating ?? 0) as number,
 152 | 				availableFromWeekDay: (data.availableFromWeekDay ?? null) as "MONDAY" | "TUESDAY" | "WEDNESDAY" | "THURSDAY" | "FRIDAY" | "SATURDAY" | "SUNDAY" | null,
 153 | 				availableToWeekDay: (data.availableToWeekDay ?? null) as "MONDAY" | "TUESDAY" | "WEDNESDAY" | "THURSDAY" | "FRIDAY" | "SATURDAY" | "SUNDAY" | null,
 154 | 				availableFromTime: (data.availableFromTime ?? null) as string | null,
 155 | 				availableToTime: (data.availableToTime ?? null) as string | null,
 156 | 				isActive: (data.isActive ?? true) as boolean,
 157 | 				clinicId,
 158 | 				availabilityStatus: data.availabilityStatus ?? "AVAILABLE",
 159 | 			} as any)
 160 | 			.returning();
 161 | 
 162 | 		const newDoctor = result[0];
 163 | 		if (!newDoctor) {
 164 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create doctor");
 165 | 		}
 166 | 
 167 | 		return newDoctor;
 168 | 	});
 169 | 
 170 | // Update doctor information (admin only)
 171 | const updateDoctorSchema = doctorSchema.partial().extend({
 172 | 	id: z.string().min(1, "Doctor ID is required"),
 173 | });
 174 | 
 175 | export const updateDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 176 | 	.validator((data: z.infer<typeof updateDoctorSchema>) =>
 177 | 		updateDoctorSchema.parse(data),
 178 | 	)
 179 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 180 | 		const session = await getSession();
 181 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 182 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 183 | 
 184 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 185 | 		const { id, ...values } = data;
 186 | 
 187 | 		const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {
 188 | 			updatedAt: new Date(),
 189 | 		};
 190 | 
 191 | 		if (values.name !== undefined) updateData.name = values.name;
 192 | 		if (values.email !== undefined) updateData.email = values.email;
 193 | 		if (values.specialty !== undefined) updateData.specialty = values.specialty;
 194 | 		if (values.licenseNumber !== undefined) updateData.licenseNumber = values.licenseNumber;
 195 | 		if (values.phone !== undefined) updateData.phone = values.phone;
 196 | 		if (values.address !== undefined) updateData.address = values.address;
 197 | 		if (values.department !== undefined) updateData.department = values.department;
 198 | 		if (values.img !== undefined) updateData.img = values.img;
 199 | 		if (values.colorCode !== undefined) updateData.colorCode = values.colorCode;
 200 | 		if (values.availabilityStatus !== undefined) updateData.availabilityStatus = values.availabilityStatus;
 201 | 		if (values.type !== undefined) updateData.type = values.type;
 202 | 		if (values.appointmentPrice !== undefined) updateData.appointmentPrice = values.appointmentPrice;
 203 | 		if (values.rating !== undefined) updateData.rating = values.rating;
 204 | 		if (values.availableFromWeekDay !== undefined) updateData.availableFromWeekDay = values.availableFromWeekDay;
 205 | 		if (values.availableToWeekDay !== undefined) updateData.availableToWeekDay = values.availableToWeekDay;
 206 | 		if (values.availableFromTime !== undefined) updateData.availableFromTime = values.availableFromTime;
 207 | 		if (values.availableToTime !== undefined) updateData.availableToTime = values.availableToTime;
 208 | 		if (values.isActive !== undefined) updateData.isActive = values.isActive;
 209 | 
 210 | 		const result = await db
 211 | 			.update(doctor)
 212 | 			.set(updateData)
 213 | 			.where(eq(doctor.id, id))
 214 | 			.returning();
 215 | 
 216 | 		const updatedDoctor = result[0];
 217 | 		if (!updatedDoctor) throw new Error("Doctor not found");
 218 | 
 219 | 		return updatedDoctor;
 220 | 	});
 221 | 
 222 | // Delete doctor (soft delete, admin only)
 223 | export const deleteDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 224 | 	.validator((data: { id: string }) => data)
 225 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 226 | 		const session = await getSession();
 227 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 228 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 229 | 
 230 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 231 | 
 232 | 		await db
 233 | 			.update(doctor)
 234 | 			.set({
 235 | 				isDeleted: true,
 236 | 				deletedAt: new Date(),
 237 | 				isActive: false,
 238 | 			})
 239 | 			.where(eq(doctor.id, data.id));
 240 | 	});
 241 | 
 242 | // Get doctors by specialty
 243 | export const getDoctorsBySpecialty = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 244 | 	.validator((data: { specialty: string }) => data)
 245 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 246 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 247 | 
 248 | 		const doctors = await db
 249 | 			.select()
 250 | 			.from(doctor)
 251 | 			.where(
 252 | 				and(
 253 | 					eq(doctor.specialty, data.specialty),
 254 | 					eq(doctor.isActive, true),
 255 | 					sql`${doctor.isDeleted} = false`
 256 | 				)
 257 | 			)
 258 | 			.orderBy(doctor.name);
 259 | 
 260 | 		return doctors;
 261 | 	});

```

 186 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 187 | 		try {
 188 | 			const { appointmentId, clinicId, reason } = ctx.data;
 189 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {

 191 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
 192 | 					.set({
 193 | 						status: "CANCELLED",
 194 | 						reason,
 195 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 196 | 					})
 197 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.id, appointmentId), eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId)))
 198 | 					.returning();
 199 | 				if (!updatedAppointment) {
 200 | 					throw new Error("Appointment not found or already cancelled");
 201 | 				}

 203 | 			});
