 210 | // The original error was: Type '"PUT"' is not assignable to type 'Method | undefined'.
 211 | // Assuming 'Method' type from '@tanstack/react-start' only includes 'GET' and 'POST'
 212 | // or similar limited set. Changing to 'POST' to resolve the type error.
 213 | // Semantically, updates can often be handled by POST if PUT is not explicitly supported
 214 | // by the framework's server function abstraction.
 215 | // Also, `updateAppointmentSchema` was undefined, so it's defined above.
 216 | const updateExistingAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 217 | 	.validator(updateAppointmentSchema)
 218 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 219 | 		try {
 220 | 			const { id, clinicId, data } = ctx.data;
 221 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 222 | 				const [updatedAppointment] = await tx
 223 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
 224 | 					.set({
 225 | 						...data,
 226 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 227 | 					})
 228 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.id, id), eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId)))
 229 | 					.returning();
 230 | 				if (!updatedAppointment) {
 231 | 					throw new Error("Appointment not found or update failed");
 232 | 				}
 233 | 				return updatedAppointment;
 234 | 			});
 235 | 		} catch (error) {
 236 | 			console.error("Error updating appointment:", error);
 237 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update appointment");
 238 | 		}
 239 | 	});

 498 | 
 499 | // `updateUserSchema` was undefined, defining it here.
 500 | // It's used in `updateUserToAdmin` which takes `userId`, `clinicId`, and `name`.
 501 | const updateUserSchema = z.object({
 502 | 	userId: z.uuid(),
 503 | 	clinicId: z.uuid(),
 504 | 	name: z.string().optional()
 505 | });
 506 | const updateUserToAdmin = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 507 | 	.validator(updateUserSchema)
 508 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 509 | 		try {
 510 | 			const { userId, clinicId, name } = ctx.data;
 511 | 			const [result] = await db
 512 | 				.update(schema.user)
 513 | 				.set({
 514 | 					role: "admin",
 515 | 					emailVerified: true,
 516 | 					clinicId,
 517 | 					...(name && { name }),
 518 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 519 | 				})
 520 | 				.where(eq(schema.user.id, userId))
 521 | 				.returning();
 522 | 			return result;
 523 | 		} catch (error) {
 524 | 			console.error("Error updating user to admin:", error);
 525 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update user to admin");
 526 | 		}
 527 | 	});
 528 |

 205 | const getPatientDemographics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 206 | 	.validator(clinicDateRangeSchema)
 207 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 208 | 		try {
 209 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 210 | 
 211 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 212 | 				where: {
 213 | 					clinicId,
 214 | 					isDeleted: false,
 215 | 					createdAt: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 216 | 				},
 217 | 				columns: {
 218 | 					id: true,
 219 | 					gender: true,
 220 | 					dateOfBirth: true,
 221 | 					createdAt: true,
 222 | 					bloodGroup: true,
 223 | 					maritalStatus: true
 224 | 				}
 225 | 			});
 226 | 
 227 | 			// Calculate demographic statistics
 228 | 			const genderStats = patients.reduce(
 229 | 				(acc, p) => {
 230 | 					const gender = p.gender || "UNKNOWN";
 231 | 					acc[gender] = (acc[gender] || 0) + 1;
 232 | 					return acc;
 233 | 				},
 234 | 				{} as Record<string, number>
 235 | 			);
 236 | 
 237 | 			const ageGroups = patients.reduce(
 238 | 				(acc, p) => {
 239 | 					const age = calculateAge(p.dateOfBirth);
 240 | 					let group = "";
 241 | 					if (age < 1) group = "Infant (<1 year)";
 242 | 					else if (age < 5) group = "Toddler (1-4 years)";
 243 | 					else if (age < 12) group = "Child (5-11 years)";
 244 | 					else if (age < 18) group = "Adolescent (12-17 years)";
 245 | 					else group = "Adult (18+ years)";
 246 | 					acc[group] = (acc[group] || 0) + 1;
 247 | 					return acc;
 248 | 				},
 249 | 				{} as Record<string, number>
 250 | 			);
 251 | 
 252 | 			return {
 253 | 				totalPatients: patients.length,
 254 | 				genderDistribution: genderStats,
 255 | 				ageGroupDistribution: ageGroups,
 256 | 				patients
 257 | 			};
 258 | 		} catch (error) {
 259 | 			console.error("Error getting patient demographics:", error);
 260 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get patient demographics");
 261 | 		}
 262 | 	});
 263 | 
 264 | // Helper function to calculate age in years
 265 | function calculateAge(dateOfBirth: Date): number {
 266 | 	const today = new Date();
 267 | 	let age = today.getFullYear() - dateOfBirth.getFullYear();
 268 | 	const monthDiff = today.getMonth() - dateOfBirth.getMonth();
 269 | 	if (monthDiff < 0 || (monthDiff === 0 && today.getDate() < dateOfBirth.getDate())) {
 270 | 		age--;
 271 | 	}
 272 | 	return age;
 273 | }

 412 | const getTopConditions = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 413 | 	.validator(clinicDateRangeLimitSchema)
 414 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 415 | 		try {
 416 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate, limit } = ctx.data;
 417 | 
 418 | 			const diagnoses = await db.query.diagnosis.findMany({
 419 | 				where: {
 420 | 					clinicId,
 421 | 					date: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 422 | 					isDeleted: false
 423 | 				},
 424 | 				columns: {
 425 | 					diagnosis: true
 426 | 				}
 427 | 			});
 428 | 
 429 | 			// Count occurrences of each diagnosis
 430 | 			const conditionCounts = new Map<string, number>();
 431 | 			for (const d of diagnoses) {
 432 | 				if (d.diagnosis) {
 433 | 					// Split multiple diagnoses if needed
 434 | 					const conditions = d.diagnosis.split(",").map(c => c.trim());
 435 | 					for (const condition of conditions) {
 436 | 						const count = conditionCounts.get(condition) || 0;
 437 | 						conditionCounts.set(condition, count + 1);
 438 | 					}
 439 | 				}
 440 | 			}
 441 | 
 442 | 			const totalPatientsResult = await db.$count(
 443 | 				schema.patient,
 444 | 				and(
 445 | 					eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId),
 446 | 					eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false),
 447 | 					gte(schema.patient.createdAt, startDate),
 448 | 					lte(schema.patient.createdAt, endDate)
 449 | 				)
 450 | 			);
 451 | 
 452 | 			const totalPatients = totalPatientsResult;
 453 | 
 454 | 			const topConditions = Array.from(conditionCounts.entries())
 455 | 				.map(([condition, count]) => ({
 456 | 					condition,
 457 | 					prevalence: totalPatients > 0 ? (count / totalPatients) * 100 : 0,
 458 | 					affectedPatients: count
 459 | 				}))
 460 | 				.sort((a, b) => b.prevalence - a.prevalence)
 461 | 				.slice(0, limit);
 462 | 
 463 | 			return topConditions;
 464 | 		} catch (error) {
 465 | 			console.error("Error getting top conditions:", error);
 466 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get top conditions");
 467 | 		}
 468 | 	});
 469 | 
 470 | const getSeasonalAppointmentData = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 471 | 	.validator(clinicYearSchema)
 472 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 473 | 		try {
 474 | 			const { clinicId, year } = ctx.data;
 475 | 
 476 | 			const seasons = [
 477 | 				{ name: "Winter", months: [12, 1, 2] },
 478 | 				{ name: "Spring", months: [3, 4, 5] },
 479 | 				{ name: "Summer", months: [6, 7, 8] },
 480 | 				{ name: "Fall", months: [9, 10, 11] }
 481 | 			];
 482 | 
 483 | 			const seasonData = [];
 484 | 			for (const season of seasons) {
 485 | 				const startMonth = season.months[0];
 486 | 				const endMonth = season.months[season.months.length - 1];
 487 | 
 488 | 				let startDate: Date;
 489 | 				let endDate: Date;
 490 | 
 491 | 				if (startMonth && endMonth) {
 492 | 					// Handle year wrap for Winter
 493 | 					if (season.name === "Winter" && startMonth === 12) {
 494 | 						startDate = new Date(year - 1, startMonth - 1, 1);
 495 | 						endDate = new Date(year, endMonth - 1, 31);
 496 | 					} else {
 497 | 						startDate = new Date(year, startMonth - 1, 1);
 498 | 						endDate = new Date(year, endMonth - 1, 31);
 499 | 					}
 500 | 
 501 | 					const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 502 | 						where: {
 503 | 							clinicId,
 504 | 							isDeleted: false,
 505 | 							appointmentDate: {
 506 | 								gte: startDate,
 507 | 								lte: endDate
 508 | 							}
 509 | 						},
 510 | 						with: {
 511 | 							medicalRecords: {
 512 | 								with: {
 513 | 									vitalSigns: true,
 514 | 									diagnosis: true
 515 | 								}
 516 | 							}
 517 | 						}
 518 | 					});
 519 | 
 520 | 					// Aggregate conditions from medical records
 521 | 					const conditions: Record<string, number> = {};
 522 | 					for (const apt of appointments) {
 523 | 						if (apt.medicalRecords[0].diagnosis) {
 524 | 							const diagList = apt.medicalRecords[0].diagnosis.split(",").map(d => d.trim());
 525 | 							for (const diag of diagList) {
 526 | 								conditions[diag] = (conditions[diag] || 0) + 1;
 527 | 							}
 528 | 						}
 529 | 					}
 530 | 
 531 | 					seasonData.push({
 532 | 						season: season.name,
 533 | 						totalAppointments: appointments.length,
 534 | 						conditions,
 535 | 						topConditions: Object.entries(conditions)
 536 | 							.sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
 537 | 							.slice(0, 5)
 538 | 							.map(([condition, count]) => ({ condition, count }))
 539 | 					});
 540 | 				}
 541 | 			}
 542 | 
 543 | 			return seasonData;
 544 | 		} catch (error) {
 545 | 			console.error("Error getting seasonal appointment data:", error);
 546 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get seasonal appointment data");
 547 | 		}
 548 | 	});
 549 | 
 550 | // =======================
 551 | // Additional Analytics Functions
 552 | // =======================
 553 |

 577 | // 							totalAppointments: 0,
 578 | // 							completedAppointments: 0,
 579 | // 							cancelledAppointments: 0,

 588 | // 					if (apt.appointmentPrice) stats.totalRevenue += apt.appointmentPrice;

 610 | 
 611 | const getImmunizationCoverage = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 612 | 	.validator(clinicIdSchema)
 613 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 614 | 		try {
 615 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 616 | 
 617 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 618 | 				where: {
 619 | 					clinicId,
 620 | 					isDeleted: false
 621 | 				},
 622 | 				columns: {
 623 | 					id: true,
 624 | 					dateOfBirth: true
 625 | 				}
 626 | 			});
 627 | 
 628 | 			const immunizations = await db.query.immunization.findMany({
 629 | 				where: {
 630 | 					clinicId,
 631 | 					isDeleted: false
 632 | 				},
 633 | 				columns: {
 634 | 					patientId: true,
 635 | 					vaccine: true
 636 | 				}
 637 | 			});
 638 | 
 639 | 			// Calculate coverage by vaccine
 640 | 			const vaccineCoverage: Record<string, { total: number; completed: number; percentage: number }> = {};
 641 | 
 642 | 			const vaccineList = [...new Set(immunizations.map(imm => imm.vaccine))];
 643 | 			for (const vaccine of vaccineList) {
 644 | 				const patientsVaccinated = new Set(
 645 | 					immunizations.filter(imm => imm.vaccine === vaccine).map(imm => imm.patientId)
 646 | 				);
 647 | 				const coverage = (patientsVaccinated.size / patients.length) * 100;
 648 | 				vaccineCoverage[vaccine] = {
 649 | 					total: patients.length,
 650 | 					completed: patientsVaccinated.size,
 651 | 					percentage: coverage
 652 | 				};
 653 | 			}
 654 | 
 655 | 			return {
 656 | 				totalPatients: patients.length,
 657 | 				vaccineCoverage,
 658 | 				fullyImmunized: patients.filter(p => {
 659 | 					const patientImmunizations = immunizations.filter(imm => imm.patientId === p.id);
 660 | 					return patientImmunizations.length >= 10; // Assuming 10+ vaccines for full immunization
 661 | 				}).length
 662 | 			};
 663 | 		} catch (error) {
 664 | 			console.error("Error getting immunization coverage:", error);
 665 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get immunization coverage");
 666 | 		}
 667 | 	});
 668 | 
 669 | export {
 670 | 	// getAppointmentCountsByStatus,
 671 | 	// getAppointmentsInRange,
 672 | 	// getClinicRevenue,
 673 | 	// getDoctorPerformance,
 674 | 	getImmunizationCoverage,
 675 | 	// getMonthlyAppointmentData,
 676 | 	getNewPatientsCount,
 677 | 	// getOverdueImmunizations,
 678 | 	getPatientDemographics,
 679 | 	// getPatientsInDateRange,
 680 | 	// getPrescriptionsForAnalytics,
 681 | 	getSeasonalAppointmentData,
 682 | 	getTopConditions
 683 | };

 199 | const getAppointmentById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 200 | 	.validator(appointmentIdSchema)
 201 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 202 | 		try {
 203 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 204 | 			return await db.query.appointment.findFirst({
 205 | 				where: { id, clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 206 | 				with: {
 207 | 					patient: true,
 208 | 					doctor: true,
 209 | 					service: true,
 210 | 					clinic: true
 211 | 				}
 212 | 			});
 213 | 		} catch (error) {
 214 | 			console.error("Error getting appointment by ID:", error);
 215 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get appointment");
 216 | 		}
 217 | 	});

 219 | const createAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 220 | 	.validator(createAppointmentSchema)
 221 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 222 | 		try {
 223 | 			const { data } = ctx.data;
 224 | 			const [result] = await db
 225 | 				.insert(schema.appointment)
 226 | 				.values({
 227 | 					...data,
 228 | 					id: data.id || crypto.randomUUID(),
 229 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 230 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 231 | 				})
 232 | 				.returning();
 233 | 			return result;
 234 | 		} catch (error) {
 235 | 			console.error("Error creating appointment:", error);
 236 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create appointment");
 237 | 		}
 238 | 	});
 239 | 
 240 | const updateAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 241 | 	.validator(updateAppointmentSchema)
 242 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 243 | 		try {
 244 | 			const { id, ...data } = ctx.data;
 245 | 			const [result] = await db
 246 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
 247 | 				.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 248 | 				.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, id ?? ""))
 249 | 				.returning();
 250 | 			return result;
 251 | 		} catch (error) {
 252 | 			console.error("Error updating appointment:", error);
 253 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update appointment");
 254 | 		}
 255 | 	});

 290 | const getAppointmentsInRange = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 291 | 	.validator(dateRangeSchema)
 292 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 293 | 		try {
 294 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate, doctorId } = ctx.data;
 295 | 			const conditions: Record<string, unknown> = {
 296 | 				clinicId,
 297 | 				isDeleted: false,
 298 | 				appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 299 | 			};
 300 | 			if (doctorId) conditions.doctorId = doctorId;
 301 | 
 302 | 			return await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 303 | 				where: conditions,
 304 | 				with: {
 305 | 					patient: { with: { user: true } },
 306 | 					doctor: true
 307 | 				},
 308 | 				orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 309 | 			});
 310 | 		} catch (error) {
 311 | 			console.error("Error getting appointments in range:", error);
 312 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get appointments in range");
 313 | 		}
 314 | 	});

 318 | 	.handler(async ctx => {

 332 | const getAppointmentsFallback = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 333 | 	.validator(dateRangeSchema)
 334 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 335 | 		try {
 336 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate, doctorId } = ctx.data;
 337 | 			return await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 338 | 				where: {
 339 | 					clinicId,
 340 | 					isDeleted: false,
 341 | 					appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 342 | 					...(doctorId && { doctorId })
 343 | 				},
 344 | 				with: { patient: true, doctor: true },
 345 | 				orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 346 | 			});
 347 | 		} catch (error) {

 349 | 			throw new Error("Failed to fetch appointments");
 350 | 		}

 353 | const getAppointmentCountsByStatus = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 354 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string() }))
 355 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 356 | 		try {
 357 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 358 | 			const results = await db
 359 | 				.select({
 360 | 					status: schema.appointment.status,
 361 | 					count: count()
 362 | 				})
 363 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 364 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)))
 365 | 				.groupBy(schema.appointment.status);
 366 | 
 367 | 			return results.reduce(
 368 | 				(acc, curr) => {
 369 | 					if (curr.status) acc[curr.status] = Number(curr.count);
 370 | 					return acc;
 371 | 				},
 372 | 				{} as Record<string, number>
 373 | 			);
 374 | 		} catch (error) {
 375 | 			console.error("Error getting appointment counts:", error);
 376 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get appointment counts");
 377 | 		}
 378 | 	});
 379 | 
 380 | // const getDoctorAvailability = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 381 | // 	.validator(doctorAvailabilitySchema)

 498 | const getMonthlyAppointmentData = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 499 | 	.validator(monthlyDataSchema)
 500 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 501 | 		try {
 502 | 			const { clinicId, year } = ctx.data;
 503 | 			return await db
 504 | 				.select({
 505 | 					month: sql<number>`CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate}) AS INTEGER)`,
 506 | 					count: count()
 507 | 				})
 508 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 509 | 				.where(
 510 | 					and(
 511 | 						eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 512 | 						eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
 513 | 						sql`EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate}) = ${year}`
 514 | 					)
 515 | 				)
 516 | 				.groupBy(sql`EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`)
 517 | 				.orderBy(sql`EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`);
 518 | 		} catch (error) {
 519 | 			console.error("Error getting monthly appointment data:", error);
 520 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get monthly appointment data");
 521 | 		}
 522 | 	});

 524 | const getAppointmentsWithFilters = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 525 | 	.validator(appointmentsFilterSchema)
 526 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 527 | 		try {
 528 | 			const { clinicId, filters, pagination } = ctx.data;
 529 | 
 530 | 			// Build where conditions object for RQB
 531 | 			const whereConditions: Record<string, unknown> = {
 532 | 				clinicId: clinicId,
 533 | 				isDeleted: false
 534 | 			};
 535 | 
 536 | 			// Add simple equality filters
 537 | 			if (filters.status) whereConditions.status = filters.status;
 538 | 			if (filters.doctorId) whereConditions.doctorId = filters.doctorId;
 539 | 			if (filters.patientId) whereConditions.patientId = filters.patientId;
 540 | 			if (filters.type) whereConditions.type = filters.type;
 541 | 
 542 | 			// Add date range filters
 543 | 			if (filters.startDate && filters.endDate) {
 544 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = {
 545 | 					gte: filters.startDate,
 546 | 					lte: filters.endDate
 547 | 				};
 548 | 			} else if (filters.startDate) {
 549 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = { gte: filters.startDate };
 550 | 			} else if (filters.endDate) {
 551 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = { lte: filters.endDate };
 552 | 			}
 553 | 
 554 | 			// Add search filter using OR conditions
 555 | 			if (filters.search) {
 556 | 				whereConditions.OR = [
 557 | 					{ reason: { like: `%${filters.search}%` } },
 558 | 					{ type: { like: `%${filters.search}%` } }
 559 | 				];
 560 | 			}
 561 | 
 562 | 			const [appointments, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 563 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 564 | 					where: whereConditions,
 565 | 					with: {
 566 | 						patient: true,
 567 | 						doctor: true
 568 | 					},
 569 | 					limit: pagination.limit,
 570 | 					offset: pagination.offset,
 571 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
 572 | 				}),
 573 | 				db
 574 | 					.select({ count: count() })
 575 | 					.from(schema.appointment)
 576 | 					.where(
 577 | 						and(
 578 | 							eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 579 | 							eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
 580 | 							filters.status ? eq(schema.appointment.status, filters.status) : undefined,
 581 | 							filters.doctorId ? eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, filters.doctorId) : undefined,
 582 | 							filters.patientId ? eq(schema.appointment.patientId, filters.patientId) : undefined,
 583 | 							filters.type ? eq(schema.appointment.type, filters.type) : undefined,
 584 | 							filters.startDate && filters.endDate
 585 | 								? between(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.startDate, filters.endDate)
 586 | 								: filters.startDate
 587 | 									? gte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.startDate)
 588 | 									: filters.endDate
 589 | 										? lte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.endDate)
 590 | 										: undefined,
 591 | 							filters.search
 592 | 								? or(
 593 | 										like(schema.appointment.reason, `%${filters.search}%`),
 594 | 										like(schema.appointment.type, `%${filters.search}%`)
 595 | 									)
 596 | 								: undefined
 597 | 						)
 598 | 					)
 599 | 			]);
 600 | 
 601 | 			return {
 602 | 				appointments,
 603 | 				total: totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0
 604 | 			};
 605 | 		} catch (error) {
 606 | 			console.error("Error getting appointments with filters:", error);
 607 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get appointments with filters");
 608 | 		}
 609 | 	});
 610 | const checkTimeSlotAvailability = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 611 | 	.validator(checkAvailabilitySchema)
 612 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 613 | 		try {
 614 | 			const { doctorId, appointmentDate, durationMinutes, clinicId, excludeId } = ctx.data;
 615 | 
 616 | 			const appointmentEnd = new Date(appointmentDate);
 617 | 			appointmentEnd.setMinutes(appointmentEnd.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 618 | 
 619 | 			const conditions = [
 620 | 				eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, doctorId),
 621 | 				eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 622 | 				eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
 623 | 				lte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, appointmentEnd),
 624 | 				gte(sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate}`, appointmentDate)
 625 | 			];
 626 | 
 627 | 			if (excludeId) {
 628 | 				conditions.push(ne(schema.appointment.id, excludeId));
 629 | 			}
 630 | 
 631 | 			const overlapping = await db
 632 | 				.select()
 633 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 634 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
 635 | 				.limit(1);
 636 | 
 637 | 			return overlapping.length === 0;
 638 | 		} catch (error) {
 639 | 			console.error("Error checking time slot availability:", error);
 640 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check time slot availability");
 641 | 		}
 642 | 	});

 662 | const cancelAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 663 | 	.validator(cancelAppointmentSchema)
 664 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 665 | 		try {
 666 | 			const { appointmentId, clinicId, reason } = ctx.data;
 667 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 668 | 				const [appointment] = await tx
 669 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
 670 | 					.set({
 671 | 						status: "CANCELLED",
 672 | 						note: reason,
 673 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 674 | 					})
 675 | 					.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, appointmentId))
 676 | 					.returning();
 677 | 
 678 | 				// Create notification
 679 | 				if (appointment) {
 680 | 					await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
 681 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 682 | 						userId: appointment.patientId,
 683 | 						clinicId,
 684 | 						title: "Appointment Cancelled",
 685 | 						body: `Your appointment has been cancelled. Reason: ${reason}`,
 686 | 						type: "appointment_cancelled",
 687 | 						priority: "high",
 688 | 						status: "unread",
 689 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 690 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 691 | 					});
 692 | 				}
 693 | 
 694 | 				return appointment;
 695 | 			});
 696 | 		} catch (error) {
 697 | 			console.error("Error cancelling appointment:", error);
 698 | 			throw new Error("Failed to cancel appointment");
 699 | 		}
 700 | 	});

 838 | const createAppointmentWithReminder = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 839 | 	.validator(createWithReminderSchema)
 840 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 841 | 		try {
 842 | 			const { data, reminderData } = ctx.data;
 843 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 844 | 				// Check for conflicts
 845 | 				const existingAppointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
 846 | 					where: {
 847 | 						doctorId: data.doctorId,
 848 | 						time: data.time ?? "",
 849 | 						isDeleted: false,
 850 | 						appointmentDate: { gte: data.appointmentDate },
 851 | 						status: {
 852 | 							notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]
 853 | 						}
 854 | 					}
 855 | 				});
 856 | 
 857 | 				if (existingAppointment) {
 858 | 					throw new Error("Time slot already booked");
 859 | 				}
 860 | 
 861 | 				// Create appointment
 862 | 				const [appointment] = await tx
 863 | 					.insert(schema.appointment)
 864 | 					.values({
 865 | 						...data,
 866 | 						id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 867 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 868 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 869 | 					})
 870 | 					.returning();
 871 | 
 872 | 				// Create reminder if requested
 873 | 				if (reminderData && appointment) {
 874 | 					await tx.insert(schema.reminder).values({
 875 | 						...reminderData,
 876 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 877 | 						appointmentId: appointment.id,
 878 | 						status: "PENDING"
 879 | 					});
 880 | 				}
 881 | 
 882 | 				// Create notification for patient
 883 | 				const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
 884 | 					where: { id: data.patientId },
 885 | 					with: { user: true }
 886 | 				});
 887 | 
 888 | 				if (patient?.userId) {
 889 | 					await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
 890 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 891 | 						userId: patient.userId,
 892 | 						clinicId: data.clinicId,
 893 | 						title: "Appointment Scheduled",
 894 | 						body: `Your appointment has been scheduled for ${new Date(data.appointmentDate).toLocaleDateString()} at ${data.time}`,
 895 | 						type: "appointment_scheduled",
 896 | 						priority: "high",
 897 | 						status: "unread",
 898 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 899 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 900 | 					});
 901 | 				}
 902 | 
 903 | 				return appointment;
 904 | 			});
 905 | 		} catch (error) {
 906 | 			console.error("Error creating appointment with reminder:", error);
 907 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create appointment with reminder");
 908 | 		}
 909 | 	});

 942 | 						clinicId: data.clinicId,
 943 | 						appointmentId: data.appointmentId,
 944 | 						medicalId: medicalRecord?.id ?? "",
 945 | 						diagnosis: data.diagnosis,
 946 | 						symptoms: data.symptoms,
 947 | 						status: "ACTIVE",
 948 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 949 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 950 | 					})
 951 | 					.returning();
 952 | 
 953 | 				// Create vital signs if provided
 954 | 				if (data.vitalSigns) {
 955 | 					await tx.insert(schema.vitalSign).values({
 956 | 						...data.vitalSigns,
 957 | 						patientId: data.patientId,
 958 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 959 | 						medicalId: medicalRecord?.id ?? "",
 960 | 						clinicId: data.clinicId,
 961 | 						recordedAt: new Date(),
 962 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 963 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 964 | 					});
 965 | 				}
 966 | 
 967 | 				// Create prescriptions if provided
 968 | 				if (data.prescriptions && data.prescriptions.length > 0) {
 969 | 					const [prescription] = await tx
 970 | 						.insert(schema.prescription)
 971 | 						.values({
 972 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 973 | 							medicalRecordId: medicalRecord?.id ?? "",
 974 | 							patientId: data.patientId,
 975 | 							doctorId: data.doctorId,
 976 | 							clinicId: data.clinicId,
 977 | 							encounterId: data.appointmentId,
 978 | 							status: "active",
 979 | 							issuedDate: new Date(),
 980 | 							createdAt: new Date(),
 981 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
 982 | 						})
 983 | 						.returning();
 984 | 
 985 | 					for (const med of data.prescriptions) {
 986 | 						// Find or create drug
 987 | 						let drug = await tx.query.drug.findFirst({
 988 | 							where: { name: med.medicationName }
 989 | 						});
 990 | 
 991 | 						if (!drug) {
 992 | 							[drug] = await tx
 993 | 								.insert(schema.drug)
 994 | 								.values({
 995 | 									id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 996 | 									name: med.medicationName,
 997 | 									createdAt: new Date(),
 998 | 									updatedAt: new Date()
 999 | 								})
1000 | 								.returning();
1001 | 						}
1002 | 
1003 | 						await tx.insert(schema.prescribedItem).values({
1004 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1005 | 							prescriptionId: prescription?.id ?? "",
1006 | 							clinicId: data.clinicId,
1007 | 							drugId: drug?.id ?? "",
1008 | 							dosageValue: med.dosageValue,
1009 | 							dosageUnit: med.dosageUnit,
1010 | 							frequency: med.frequency,
1011 | 							duration: med.duration,
1012 | 							createdAt: new Date(),
1013 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
1014 | 						});
1015 | 					}
1016 | 				}
1017 | 
1018 | 				// Update appointment status
1019 | 				await tx
1020 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
1021 | 					.set({ status: "COMPLETED", updatedAt: new Date() })
1022 | 					.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, data.appointmentId));
1023 | 
1024 | 				return { medicalRecord, diagnosis };
1025 | 			});
1026 | 		} catch (error) {
1027 | 			console.error("Error creating medical record with encounter:", error);
1028 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create medical record");
1029 | 		}
1030 | 	});
1031 | 
1032 | const rescheduleAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1033 | 	.validator(rescheduleSchema)
1034 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1035 | 		try {
1036 | 			const { appointmentId, newDate, newTime, reason } = ctx.data;
1037 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1038 | 				const appointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
1039 | 					where: { id: appointmentId }
1040 | 				});
1041 | 
1042 | 				if (!appointment) {
1043 | 					throw new Error("Appointment not found");
1044 | 				}
1045 | 
1046 | 				// Check new time slot availability
1047 | 				const conflict = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
1048 | 					where: {
1049 | 						doctorId: appointment.doctorId,
1050 | 						appointmentDate: {
1051 | 							lte: newDate,
1052 | 							gte: new Date()
1053 | 						},
1054 | 						isDeleted: false,
1055 | 						status: {
1056 | 							notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]
1057 | 						}
1058 | 					}
1059 | 				});
1060 | 
1061 | 				if (conflict && conflict.id !== appointmentId) {
1062 | 					throw new Error("New time slot is already booked");
1063 | 				}
1064 | 
1065 | 				// Update appointment
1066 | 				const [updated] = await tx
1067 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
1068 | 					.set({
1069 | 						appointmentDate: newDate,
1070 | 						time: newTime,
1071 | 						note: reason ? `${appointment.note || ""}\nRescheduled: ${reason}` : appointment.note,
1072 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1073 | 					})
1074 | 					.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, appointmentId))
1075 | 					.returning();
1076 | 
1077 | 				// Notify patient
1078 | 				const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
1079 | 					where: { id: appointment.patientId },
1080 | 					with: { user: true }
1081 | 				});
1082 | 
1083 | 				if (patient?.userId) {
1084 | 					await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
1085 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1086 | 						userId: patient.userId,
1087 | 						clinicId: appointment.clinicId,
1088 | 						title: "Appointment Rescheduled",
1089 | 						body: `Your appointment has been rescheduled to ${newDate.toLocaleDateString()} at ${newTime}`,
1090 | 						type: "appointment_rescheduled",
1091 | 						priority: "high",
1092 | 						status: "unread",
1093 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1094 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1095 | 					});
1096 | 				}
1097 | 
1098 | 				return updated;
1099 | 			});
1100 | 		} catch (error) {
1101 | 			console.error("Error rescheduling appointment:", error);
1102 | 			throw new Error("Failed to reschedule appointment");
1103 | 		}
1104 | 	});
1105 |

1107 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string() }))
1108 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1109 | 		try {
1110 | 			const { id } = ctx.data;
1111 | 			const [result] = await db
1112 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
1113 | 				.set({ deletedAt: null, isDeleted: false, updatedAt: new Date() })
1114 | 				.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, id))
1115 | 				.returning();

1122 | const getAppointmentsWithPagination = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1123 | 	.validator(
1124 | 		z.object({
1125 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
1126 | 			pagination: z.object({ page: z.number(), limit: z.number() }),
1127 | 			filters: z
1128 | 				.object({
1129 | 					status: z.enum(["PENDING", "CONFIRMED", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED", "NO_SHOW"]).optional(),
1130 | 					fromDate: z.date().optional(),
1131 | 					toDate: z.date().optional(),
1132 | 					patientId: z.string().optional(),
1133 | 					doctorId: z.string().optional(),
1134 | 					search: z.string().optional()
1135 | 				})
1136 | 				.optional()
1137 | 		})
1138 | 	)
1139 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1140 | 		try {
1141 | 			const { clinicId, pagination, filters } = ctx.data;
1142 | 			const { page, limit } = pagination;
1143 | 			const offset = (page - 1) * limit;
1144 | 
1145 | 			// Build where conditions object for RQB v2
1146 | 			const whereConditions: Record<string, unknown> = {
1147 | 				clinicId: clinicId,
1148 | 				isDeleted: false
1149 | 			};
1150 | 
1151 | 			// Add simple equality filters
1152 | 			if (filters?.status) whereConditions.status = filters.status;
1153 | 			if (filters?.doctorId) whereConditions.doctorId = filters.doctorId;
1154 | 			if (filters?.patientId) whereConditions.patientId = filters.patientId;
1155 | 
1156 | 			// Add date range filters
1157 | 			if (filters?.fromDate && filters?.toDate) {
1158 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = {
1159 | 					gte: filters.fromDate,
1160 | 					lte: filters.toDate
1161 | 				};
1162 | 			} else if (filters?.fromDate) {
1163 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = { gte: filters.fromDate };
1164 | 			} else if (filters?.toDate) {
1165 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = { lte: filters.toDate };
1166 | 			}
1167 | 
1168 | 			// Add search filter using OR
1169 | 			if (filters?.search) {
1170 | 				whereConditions.OR = [
1171 | 					{ reason: { like: `%${filters.search}%` } },
1172 | 					{ type: { like: `%${filters.search}%` } }
1173 | 				];
1174 | 			}
1175 | 
1176 | 			const [appointments, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
1177 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
1178 | 					where: whereConditions,
1179 | 					with: {
1180 | 						patient: {
1181 | 							columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true, email: true, phone: true }
1182 | 						},
1183 | 						doctor: {
1184 | 							columns: { id: true, name: true, specialty: true, email: true }
1185 | 						},
1186 | 						service: {
1187 | 							columns: { id: true, serviceName: true, price: true, duration: true }
1188 | 						},
1189 | 						clinic: {
1190 | 							columns: { id: true, name: true, address: true, phone: true }
1191 | 						}
1192 | 					},
1193 | 					limit: limit,
1194 | 					offset: offset,
1195 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
1196 | 				}),
1197 | 				db
1198 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
1199 | 					.from(schema.appointment)
1200 | 					.where(
1201 | 						and(
1202 | 							eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
1203 | 							eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
1204 | 							filters?.status ? eq(schema.appointment.status, filters.status) : undefined,
1205 | 							filters?.doctorId ? eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, filters.doctorId) : undefined,
1206 | 							filters?.patientId ? eq(schema.appointment.patientId, filters.patientId) : undefined,
1207 | 							filters?.fromDate && filters?.toDate
1208 | 								? between(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.fromDate, filters.toDate)
1209 | 								: filters?.fromDate
1210 | 									? gte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.fromDate)
1211 | 									: filters?.toDate
1212 | 										? lte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.toDate)
1213 | 										: undefined,
1214 | 							filters?.search
1215 | 								? or(
1216 | 										like(schema.appointment.reason, `%${filters.search}%`),
1217 | 										like(schema.appointment.type, `%${filters.search}%`)
1218 | 									)
1219 | 								: undefined
1220 | 						)
1221 | 					)
1222 | 			]);
1223 | 
1224 | 			const total = Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0);
1225 | 
1226 | 			return {
1227 | 				appointments,
1228 | 				total,
1229 | 				page,
1230 | 				limit,
1231 | 				totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit)
1232 | 			};
1233 | 		} catch (error) {
1234 | 			console.error("Error getting appointments with pagination:", error);
1235 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get paginated appointments");
1236 | 		}
1237 | 	});
1238 | const getPatientAppointments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
1239 | 	.validator(patientAppointmentsSchema)
1240 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1241 | 		try {
1242 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, pagination, status } = ctx.data;
1243 | 			const { page, limit } = pagination;
1244 | 			const offset = (page - 1) * limit;
1245 | 
1246 | 			const conditions = [
1247 | 				eq(schema.appointment.patientId, patientId),
1248 | 				eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
1249 | 				eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)
1250 | 			];

1256 | 					where: {
1257 | 						patientId,

1265 | 					},
1266 | 					limit,
1267 | 					offset,
1268 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
1269 | 				}),
1270 | 				db
1271 | 					.select({ count: count() })
1272 | 					.from(schema.appointment)
1273 | 					.where(and(...conditions))
1274 | 			]);
1275 | 
1276 | 			const total = totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0;
1277 | 
1278 | 			return {
1279 | 				appointments,
1280 | 				total,
1281 | 				page,
1282 | 				limit,
1283 | 				totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit)
1284 | 			};
1285 | 		} catch (error) {
1286 | 			console.error("Error getting patient appointments:", error);
1287 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get patient appointments");
1288 | 		}

1482 | const getUpcomingAppointments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })

1485 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
1486 | 			patientId: z.string().optional(),

1494 | 			data: {
1495 | 				clinicId,
1496 | 				pagination: { page: 1, limit },
1497 | 				filters: {
1498 | 					status: "CONFIRMED",
1499 | 					patientId,
1500 | 					doctorId,
1501 | 					fromDate: new Date()
1502 | 				}
1503 | 			}
1504 | 		});
1505 | 	});
1506 | 
1507 | const getTodaysAppointments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
1508 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string() }))
1509 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1510 | 		const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
1511 | 		const today = new Date();
1512 | 		today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
1513 | 		const tomorrow = new Date(today);
1514 | 		tomorrow.setDate(tomorrow.getDate() + 1);
1515 | 
1516 | 		return getAppointmentsWithPagination({
1517 | 			data: {
1518 | 				clinicId,
1519 | 				pagination: { page: 1, limit: 100 },
1520 | 				filters: {
1521 | 					fromDate: today,
1522 | 					toDate: tomorrow
1523 | 				}
1524 | 			}
1525 | 		});
1526 | 	});
1527 | 
1528 | const getAppointmentStatistics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
1529 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string() }))
1530 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1531 | 		const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
1532 | 		const counts = await getAppointmentCountsByStatus({ data: { clinicId } });
1533 | 		const appointments = await getAllAppointments({ data: { clinicId } });
1534 | 
1535 | 		const totalRevenue = appointments?.reduce((sum, apt) => sum + (apt.appointmentPrice ?? 0), 0) || 0;
1536 | 
1537 | 		return {
1538 | 			counts: {
1539 | 				PENDING: counts?.PENDING || 0,
1540 | 				CONFIRMED: counts?.CONFIRMED || 0,
1541 | 				COMPLETED: counts?.COMPLETED || 0,
1542 | 				CANCELLED: counts?.CANCELLED || 0,
1543 | 				NO_SHOW: counts?.NO_SHOW || 0
1544 | 			},
1545 | 			totalAppointments: appointments?.length || 0,
1546 | 			totalRevenue
1547 | 		};
1548 | 	});
1549 | 
1550 | export {
1551 | 	bulkUpdateAppointmentStatus,
1552 | 	cancelAppointment,
1553 | 	checkTimeSlotAvailability,
1554 | 	completeAppointment,
1555 | 	createAppointment,
1556 | 	createAppointmentWithReminder,
1557 | 	createManyAppointments,
1558 | 	createMedicalRecordWithEncounter,
1559 | 	deleteAppointment,
1560 | 	getAllAppointments,
1561 | 	getAppointmentById,
1562 | 	getAppointmentByIdFallback,
1563 | 	getAppointmentCountsByStatus,
1564 | 	getAppointmentStatistics,
1565 | 	getAppointments,
1566 | 	getAppointmentsByStatus,
1567 | 	getAppointmentsFallback,
1568 | 	getAppointmentsFallbackPaginated,
1569 | 	getAppointmentsInRange,
1570 | 	getAppointmentsWithFilters,
1571 | 	getAppointmentsWithPagination,
1572 | 	// getAvailableTimeSlots,
1573 | 	// getBookedSlotsF\orDoctor,
1574 | 	getDoctorAppointmentsInRange,
1575 | 	// getDoctorAvailability,
1576 | 	getMonthlyAppointmentData,

```

`data/functions/auth.ts`:

 116 | 	.validator(UserUpdateSchema)
 117 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 118 | 		try {
 119 | 			const { id, ...data } = ctx.data;
 120 | 			if (!id) {
 121 | 				throw new Error("User ID is required for update");
 122 | 			}
 123 | 			const [result] = await db
 124 | 				.update(schema.user)
 125 | 				.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 126 | 				.where(eq(schema.user.id, id as string))
 127 | 				.returning();
 128 | 			return result;
 129 | 		} catch (error) {

 132 | 		}

 382 | const getOrCreateUserQuota = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 383 | 	.validator(userQuotaUserIdSchema)
 384 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 385 | 		try {
 386 | 			const { userId } = ctx.data;
 387 | 			let quota = await db.query.userQuota.findFirst({
 388 | 				where: { userId }
 389 | 			});
 390 | 
 391 | 			if (!quota) {
 392 | 				const [newQuota] = await db
 393 | 					.insert(schema.userQuota)
 394 | 					.values({
 395 | 						userId,
 396 | 						quota: 100,
 397 | 						usedQuota: 0,
 398 | 						fileCount: 0,
 399 | 						fileCountQuota: 1000,
 400 | 						inviteCount: 0,
 401 | 						inviteQuota: 10,
 402 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 403 | 					})
 404 | 					.returning();
 405 | 				quota = newQuota;
 406 | 			}
 407 | 
 408 | 			return quota;
 409 | 		} catch (error) {
 410 | 			console.error("Error getting or creating user quota:", error);
 411 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get or create user quota");
 412 | 		}
 413 | 	});

 415 | const getUserWithAllRelations = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 416 | 	.validator(userIdSchema)
 417 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 418 | 		try {
 419 | 			const { userId } = ctx.data;
 420 | 			const user = await db.query.user.findFirst({
 421 | 				where: { id: userId ?? "" },
 422 | 				with: {
 423 | 					folders: {
 424 | 						where: { id: undefined } // Get root folders only
 425 | 					},
 426 | 					clinicMemberships: {
 427 | 						where: {
 428 | 							userId
 429 | 						}
 430 | 					},
 431 | 					doctorProfile: true,
 432 | 					staffProfile: true,
 433 | 					patientProfile: {
 434 | 						with: {
 435 | 							appointments: {
 436 | 								where: { isDeleted: false },
 437 | 								orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" },
 438 | 								limit: 5
 439 | 							}
 440 | 						}
 441 | 					},
 442 | 					notifications: {
 443 | 						where: { status: "unread" },
 444 | 						orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
 445 | 					}
 446 | 				}
 447 | 			});
 448 | 
 449 | 			return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(user));
 450 | 		} catch (error) {
 451 | 			console.error("Error getting user with relations:", error);
 452 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get user details");
 453 | 		}
 454 | 	});

 484 | 		} catch (error) {

 503 | const createManySessions = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 504 | 	.validator(SessionCreateSchema.array())
 505 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 506 | 		try {
 507 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 508 | 			const sessionsWithTimestamps = data.map(session => ({
 509 | 				...session,
 510 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
 511 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
 512 | 			}));
 513 | 			return await db.insert(schema.session).values(sessionsWithTimestamps).returning();
 514 | 		} catch (error) {
 515 | 			console.error("Error creating many sessions:", error);
 516 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create multiple sessions");
 517 | 		}
 518 | 	});

```

`data/functions/calendar.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/calendar.repo.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   4 | import { and, eq, ne, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   5 | import z from "zod";
   6 | 
   7 | import { db } from "@/db";
   8 | import type { Weekday } from "@/db/schema";
   9 | import * as schema from "@/db/schema";
  10 | 
  11 | // =======================
  12 | // Schema Validators
  13 | // =======================
  14 | 
  15 | const doctorWorkingHoursSchema = z.object({
  16 | 	doctorId: z.string(),
  17 | 	date: z.date()
  18 | });
  19 | 
  20 | const checkSlotAvailabilitySchema = z.object({
  21 | 	doctorId: z.string(),
  22 | 	start: z.date(),
  23 | 	end: z.date(),
  24 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  25 | 	excludeId: z.string().optional()
  26 | });
  27 | 
  28 | const bookedSlotsSchema = z.object({
  29 | 	doctorId: z.string(),
  30 | 	date: z.date()
  31 | });
  32 | 
  33 | const createRemindersSchema = z.object({
  34 | 	appointmentId: z.string(),
  35 | 	appointmentDate: z.date(),
  36 | 	reminderTimes: z.array(z.number()).optional()
  37 | });
  38 | 
  39 | const doctorWeeklyScheduleSchema = z.object({
  40 | 	doctorId: z.string(),
  41 | 	startDate: z.date()
  42 | });
  43 | 
  44 | // =======================
  45 | // Server Functions
  46 | // =======================
  47 | 
  48 | const getDoctorWorkingHours = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  49 | 	.validator(doctorWorkingHoursSchema)
  50 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
  51 | 		try {
  52 | 			const { doctorId, date } = ctx.data;
  53 | 			const dayOfWeek = date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "long" }).toUpperCase();
  54 | 
  55 | 			const result = await db.query.workingDay.findFirst({
  56 | 				where: {
  57 | 					doctorId,
  58 | 					day: dayOfWeek as Weekday
  59 | 				}
  60 | 			});
  61 | 
  62 | 			if (!result) {
  63 | 				return null;
  64 | 			}
  65 | 
  66 | 			return {
  67 | 				start: result.startTime,
  68 | 				end: result.endTime
  69 | 			};
  70 | 		} catch (error) {
  71 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor working hours:", error);
  72 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor working hours");
  73 | 		}
  74 | 	});
  75 | 
  76 | const checkSlotAvailability = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  77 | 	.validator(checkSlotAvailabilitySchema)
  78 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
  79 | 		try {
  80 | 			const { doctorId, start, end, clinicId, excludeId } = ctx.data;
  81 | 
  82 | 			const conditions = [
  83 | 				eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, doctorId),
  84 | 				eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
  85 | 				eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
  86 | 				sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} < ${end.toISOString()}`,
  87 | 				sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} + (${schema.appointment.durationMinutes} || ' minutes')::interval > ${start.toISOString()}`
  88 | 			];
  89 | 
  90 | 			if (excludeId) {
  91 | 				conditions.push(ne(schema.appointment.id, excludeId));
  92 | 			}
  93 | 
  94 | 			const overlapping = await db
  95 | 				.select()
  96 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
  97 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
  98 | 				.limit(1);
  99 | 
 100 | 			return overlapping.length === 0;
 101 | 		} catch (error) {
 102 | 			console.error("Error checking slot availability:", error);
 103 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check slot availability");
 104 | 		}
 105 | 	});
 106 | 
 107 | const getBookedSlotsForDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 108 | 	.validator(bookedSlotsSchema)
 109 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 110 | 		try {
 111 | 			const { doctorId, date } = ctx.data;
 112 | 			const startOfDay = new Date(date);
 113 | 			startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 114 | 			const endOfDay = new Date(date);
 115 | 			endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 116 | 
 117 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 118 | 				where: {
 119 | 					doctorId,
 120 | 					isDeleted: false,
 121 | 					appointmentDate: { gte: startOfDay, lte: endOfDay },
 122 | 					status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 123 | 				},
 124 | 				columns: { appointmentDate: true, durationMinutes: true }
 125 | 			});
 126 | 
 127 | 			return appointments.map(apt => ({
 128 | 				start: apt.appointmentDate,
 129 | 				duration: apt.durationMinutes ?? 30
 130 | 			}));
 131 | 		} catch (error) {
 132 | 			console.error("Error getting booked slots:", error);
 133 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get booked slots");
 134 | 		}
 135 | 	});
 136 | 
 137 | const createAppointmentReminders = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 138 | 	.validator(createRemindersSchema)
 139 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 140 | 		try {
 141 | 			const { appointmentId, appointmentDate, reminderTimes = [24, 2] } = ctx.data;
 142 | 			const reminders = [];
 143 | 
 144 | 			for (const hoursBefore of reminderTimes) {
 145 | 				const reminderTime = new Date(appointmentDate);
 146 | 				reminderTime.setHours(reminderTime.getHours() - hoursBefore);
 147 | 
 148 | 				// Only create reminder if the time is in the future
 149 | 				if (reminderTime > new Date()) {
 150 | 					const [reminder] = await db
 151 | 						.insert(schema.reminder)
 152 | 						.values({
 153 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 154 | 							appointmentId,
 155 | 							method: "EMAIL",
 156 | 							status: "PENDING",
 157 | 							sentAt: reminderTime
 158 | 						})
 159 | 						.returning();
 160 | 
 161 | 					reminders.push(reminder);
 162 | 				}
 163 | 			}
 164 | 
 165 | 			return reminders;
 166 | 		} catch (error) {
 167 | 			console.error("Error creating appointment reminders:", error);
 168 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create appointment reminders");
 169 | 		}
 170 | 	});
 171 | 
 172 | const getDoctorWeeklySchedule = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 173 | 	.validator(doctorWeeklyScheduleSchema)
 174 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 175 | 		try {
 176 | 			const { doctorId, startDate } = ctx.data;
 177 | 			const endDate = new Date(startDate);
 178 | 			endDate.setDate(endDate.getDate() + 6);
 179 | 			endDate.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 180 | 
 181 | 			const [workingDays, appointments] = await Promise.all([
 182 | 				db.query.workingDay.findMany({
 183 | 					where: {
 184 | 						doctorId
 185 | 					}
 186 | 				}),
 187 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 188 | 					where: {
 189 | 						doctorId,
 190 | 						isDeleted: false,
 191 | 						appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 192 | 						status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 193 | 					},
 194 | 					with: {
 195 | 						patient: {
 196 | 							columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true }
 197 | 						}
 198 | 					},
 199 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 200 | 				})
 201 | 			]);
 202 | 
 203 | 			return { workingDays, appointments };
 204 | 		} catch (error) {
 205 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor weekly schedule:", error);
 206 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor weekly schedule");
 207 | 		}
 208 | 	});
 209 | 
 210 | // =======================
 211 | // Additional Calendar Utility Functions
 212 | // =======================
 213 | 
 214 | const getAvailableTimeSlotsForDay = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 215 | 	.validator(
 216 | 		z.object({
 217 | 			doctorId: z.string(),
 218 | 			date: z.date(),
 219 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
 220 | 			durationMinutes: z.number().optional(),
 221 | 			excludeAppointmentId: z.string().optional()
 222 | 		})
 223 | 	)
 224 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 225 | 		try {
 226 | 			const { doctorId, date, clinicId, durationMinutes = 30, excludeAppointmentId } = ctx.data;
 227 | 
 228 | 			// Get working hours
 229 | 			const workingHours = await getDoctorWorkingHours({
 230 | 				data: { doctorId, date }
 231 | 			});
 232 | 
 233 | 			if (!workingHours) {
 234 | 				return [];
 235 | 			}
 236 | 
 237 | 			// Parse working hours
 238 | 			const [startHour, startMinute] = workingHours.start.split(":").map(Number);
 239 | 			const [endHour, endMinute] = workingHours.end.split(":").map(Number);
 240 | 
 241 | 			const startTime = new Date(date);
 242 | 			startTime.setHours(startHour, startMinute, 0, 0);
 243 | 
 244 | 			const endTime = new Date(date);
 245 | 			endTime.setHours(endHour, endMinute, 0, 0);
 246 | 
 247 | 			// Get booked slots
 248 | 			const bookedSlots = await getBookedSlotsForDoctor({
 249 | 				data: { doctorId, date }
 250 | 			});
 251 | 
 252 | 			// Generate available slots
 253 | 			const slots = [];
 254 | 			const currentSlot = new Date(startTime);
 255 | 
 256 | 			while (currentSlot < endTime) {
 257 | 				const slotEnd = new Date(currentSlot);
 258 | 				slotEnd.setMinutes(slotEnd.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 259 | 
 260 | 				// Check if slot extends beyond working hours
 261 | 				if (slotEnd > endTime) {
 262 | 					break;
 263 | 				}
 264 | 
 265 | 				// Check for conflicts
 266 | 				const isBooked = bookedSlots.some(booked => {
 267 | 					const bookedStart = booked.start;
 268 | 					const bookedEnd = new Date(bookedStart);
 269 | 					bookedEnd.setMinutes(bookedEnd.getMinutes() + booked.duration);
 270 | 
 271 | 					return currentSlot < bookedEnd && slotEnd > bookedStart;
 272 | 				});
 273 | 
 274 | 				// Check availability
 275 | 				const isAvailable = await checkSlotAvailability({
 276 | 					data: {
 277 | 						doctorId,
 278 | 						start: currentSlot,
 279 | 						end: slotEnd,
 280 | 						clinicId,
 281 | 						excludeId: excludeAppointmentId
 282 | 					}
 283 | 				});
 284 | 
 285 | 				if (!isBooked && isAvailable) {
 286 | 					slots.push({
 287 | 						start: currentSlot,
 288 | 						end: slotEnd,
 289 | 						startTime: currentSlot.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" }),
 290 | 						endTime: slotEnd.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" }),
 291 | 						available: true
 292 | 					});
 293 | 				}
 294 | 
 295 | 				// Move to next slot
 296 | 				currentSlot.setMinutes(currentSlot.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 297 | 			}
 298 | 
 299 | 			return slots;
 300 | 		} catch (error) {
 301 | 			console.error("Error getting available time slots for day:", error);
 302 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get available time slots");
 303 | 		}
 304 | 	});
 305 | 
 306 | const bulkCreateAppointmentReminders = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 307 | 	.validator(
 308 | 		z.object({
 309 | 			reminders: z.array(
 310 | 				z.object({
 311 | 					appointmentId: z.string(),
 312 | 					appointmentDate: z.date(),
 313 | 					reminderTimes: z.array(z.number()).optional()
 314 | 				})
 315 | 			)
 316 | 		})
 317 | 	)
 318 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 319 | 		try {
 320 | 			const { reminders } = ctx.data;
 321 | 			const allReminders = [];
 322 | 
 323 | 			for (const reminder of reminders) {
 324 | 				const createdReminders = await createAppointmentReminders({
 325 | 					data: {
 326 | 						appointmentId: reminder.appointmentId,
 327 | 						appointmentDate: reminder.appointmentDate,
 328 | 						reminderTimes: reminder.reminderTimes
 329 | 					}
 330 | 				});
 331 | 				allReminders.push(...createdReminders);
 332 | 			}
 333 | 
 334 | 			return allReminders;
 335 | 		} catch (error) {
 336 | 			console.error("Error bulk creating appointment reminders:", error);
 337 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create appointment reminders");
 338 | 		}
 339 | 	});
 340 | 
 341 | const getDoctorScheduleForMonth = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 342 | 	.validator(
 343 | 		z.object({
 344 | 			doctorId: z.string(),
 345 | 			year: z.number(),
 346 | 			month: z.number() // 0-11
 347 | 		})
 348 | 	)
 349 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 350 | 		try {
 351 | 			const { doctorId, year, month } = ctx.data;
 352 | 
 353 | 			const startDate = new Date(year, month, 1);
 354 | 			const endDate = new Date(year, month + 1, 0);
 355 | 			endDate.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 356 | 
 357 | 			const [workingDays, appointments] = await Promise.all([
 358 | 				db.query.workingDay.findMany({
 359 | 					where: {
 360 | 						doctorId
 361 | 					}
 362 | 				}),
 363 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 364 | 					where: {
 365 | 						doctorId,
 366 | 						isDeleted: false,
 367 | 						appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 368 | 						status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 369 | 					},
 370 | 					with: {
 371 | 						patient: {
 372 | 							columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true }
 373 | 						}
 374 | 					},
 375 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 376 | 				})
 377 | 			]);
 378 | 
 379 | 			// Group appointments by date
 380 | 			const appointmentsByDate = appointments.reduce(
 381 | 				(acc, apt) => {
 382 | 					const dateKey = apt.appointmentDate.toISOString().split("T")[0];
 383 | 					if (!acc[dateKey]) {
 384 | 						acc[dateKey] = [];
 385 | 					}
 386 | 					acc[dateKey].push(apt);
 387 | 					return acc;
 388 | 				},
 389 | 				{} as Record<string, typeof appointments>
 390 | 			);
 391 | 
 392 | 			// Generate schedule for each day of the month
 393 | 			const schedule = [];
 394 | 			for (let d = new Date(startDate); d <= endDate; d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1)) {
 395 | 				const currentDate = new Date(d);
 396 | 				const dayOfWeek = currentDate.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "long" }).toUpperCase();
 397 | 
 398 | 				const workingDay = workingDays.find(wd => wd.day === dayOfWeek);
 399 | 				const dateKey = currentDate.toISOString().split("T")[0];
 400 | 				const dayAppointments = appointmentsByDate[dateKey] || [];
 401 | 
 402 | 				schedule.push({
 403 | 					date: currentDate,
 404 | 					isWorkingDay: !!workingDay,
 405 | 					workingHours: workingDay
 406 | 						? {
 407 | 								start: workingDay.startTime,
 408 | 								end: workingDay.endTime
 409 | 							}
 410 | 						: null,
 411 | 					appointments: dayAppointments,
 412 | 					appointmentCount: dayAppointments.length
 413 | 				});
 414 | 			}
 415 | 
 416 | 			return schedule;
 417 | 		} catch (error) {
 418 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor schedule for month:", error);
 419 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor schedule");
 420 | 		}
 421 | 	});
 422 | 
 423 | const getConflictingAppointments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 424 | 	.validator(
 425 | 		z.object({
 426 | 			doctorId: z.string(),
 427 | 			startDate: z.date(),
 428 | 			endDate: z.date(),
 429 | 			clinicId: z.string()
 430 | 		})
 431 | 	)
 432 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 433 | 		try {
 434 | 			const { doctorId, startDate, endDate, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 435 | 
 436 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 437 | 				where: {
 438 | 					doctorId,
 439 | 					clinicId,
 440 | 					isDeleted: false,
 441 | 					appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 442 | 					status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 443 | 				},
 444 | 				orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 445 | 			});
 446 | 
 447 | 			// Find overlapping appointments
 448 | 			const conflicts = [];
 449 | 			for (let i = 0; i < appointments.length; i++) {
 450 | 				const current = appointments[i];
 451 | 				const currentStart = current.appointmentDate;
 452 | 				const currentEnd = new Date(currentStart);
 453 | 				currentEnd.setMinutes(currentEnd.getMinutes() + (current.durationMinutes || 30));
 454 | 
 455 | 				for (let j = i + 1; j < appointments.length; j++) {
 456 | 					const next = appointments[j];
 457 | 					const nextStart = next.appointmentDate;
 458 | 					const nextEnd = new Date(nextStart);
 459 | 					nextEnd.setMinutes(nextEnd.getMinutes() + (next.durationMinutes || 30));
 460 | 
 461 | 					if (currentStart < nextEnd && currentEnd > nextStart) {
 462 | 						conflicts.push({
 463 | 							appointment1: current,
 464 | 							appointment2: next,
 465 | 							overlapStart: new Date(Math.max(currentStart.getTime(), nextStart.getTime())),
 466 | 							overlapEnd: new Date(Math.min(currentEnd.getTime(), nextEnd.getTime()))
 467 | 						});
 468 | 					}
 469 | 				}
 470 | 			}
 471 | 
 472 | 			return conflicts;
 473 | 		} catch (error) {
 474 | 			console.error("Error finding conflicting appointments:", error);
 475 | 			throw new Error("Failed to find conflicting appointments");
 476 | 		}
 477 | 	});
 478 | 
 479 | export {
 480 | 	bulkCreateAppointmentReminders,
 481 | 	checkSlotAvailability,
 482 | 	createAppointmentReminders,
 483 | 	getAvailableTimeSlotsForDay,
 484 | 	getBookedSlotsForDoctor,
 485 | 	getConflictingAppointments,
 486 | 	getDoctorScheduleForMonth,
 487 | 	getDoctorWeeklySchedule,
 488 | 	getDoctorWorkingHours
 489 | };

```

 271 | 	.handler(async ctx => {

 275 | 				.select({

 291 | export const removeUserFromClinic = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 292 | 	.validator(z.object({ userId: z.string(), clinicId: z.string() }))
 293 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 294 | 		try {

 298 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.clinicMember.userId, userId), eq(schema.clinicMember.clinicId, clinicId)))
 299 | 				.returning();
 300 | 			return result;

 307 | // =======================
 308 | // Clinic Statistics
 309 | // =======================
 310 | 
 311 | export const getClinicStatistics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 312 | 	.validator(clinicIdSchema)
 313 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 314 | 		try {
 315 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 316 | 			const [doctors, patients, appointments, revenue] = await Promise.all([
 317 | 				db
 318 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 319 | 					.from(schema.doctor)
 320 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.doctor.isDeleted, false))),
 321 | 				db
 322 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 323 | 					.from(schema.patient)
 324 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false))),
 325 | 				db
 326 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 327 | 					.from(schema.appointment)
 328 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false))),
 329 | 				db
 330 | 					.select({ total: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${schema.payment.amount}), 0)` })
 331 | 					.from(schema.payment)
 332 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.payment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.payment.status, "PAID")))
 333 | 			]);
 334 | 
 335 | 			return {
 336 | 				doctors: doctors[0]?.count ?? 0,
 337 | 				patients: patients[0]?.count ?? 0,
 338 | 				appointments: appointments[0]?.count ?? 0,
 339 | 				revenue: revenue[0]?.total ?? 0
 340 | 			};
 341 | 		} catch (error) {
 342 | 			console.error("Error getting clinic statistics:", error);
 343 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get clinic statistics");
 344 | 		}
 345 | 	});
 346 | 
 347 | // =======================
 348 | // Clinic Settings
 349 | // =======================
 350 | 
 351 | export const getClinicSetting = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 352 | 	.validator(clinicIdSchema)
 353 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 354 | 		try {
 355 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 356 | 			return await db.query.clinicSetting.findFirst({
 357 | 				where: { clinicId }
 358 | 			});
 359 | 		} catch (error) {
 360 | 			console.error("Error getting clinic setting:", error);
 361 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get clinic setting");
 362 | 		}
 363 | 	});
 364 | 
 365 | export const upsertClinicSetting = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 366 | 	.validator(clinicSettingSchema)
 367 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 368 | 		try {
 369 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 370 | 			const [result] = await db
 371 | 				.insert(schema.clinicSetting)
 372 | 				.values({
 373 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 374 | 					...data,
 375 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 376 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 377 | 				})
 378 | 				.onConflictDoUpdate({
 379 | 					target: schema.clinicSetting.clinicId,
 380 | 					set: { ...data, updatedAt: new Date() }
 381 | 				})
 382 | 				.returning();
 383 | 			return result;
 384 | 		} catch (error) {
 385 | 			console.error("Error upserting clinic setting:", error);
 386 | 			throw new Error("Failed to upsert clinic setting");
 387 | 		}
 388 | 	});

 428 | // =======================
 429 | // Clinic Dashboard
 430 | // =======================
 431 | 
 432 | export const getClinicDashboard = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 433 | 	.validator(clinicIdSchema)
 434 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 435 | 		try {
 436 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 437 | 			const [clinic, stats, recentAppointments, topDoctors] = await Promise.all([
 438 | 				db.query.clinic.findFirst({
 439 | 					where: { id: clinicId, isDeleted: false }
 440 | 				}),
 441 | 				db.transaction(async tx => {
 442 | 					const [doctorCount, patientCount, appointmentCount, revenue] = await Promise.all([
 443 | 						tx
 444 | 							.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 445 | 							.from(schema.doctor)
 446 | 							.where(and(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.doctor.isDeleted, false))),
 447 | 						tx
 448 | 							.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 449 | 							.from(schema.patient)
 450 | 							.where(and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false))),
 451 | 						tx
 452 | 							.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 453 | 							.from(schema.appointment)
 454 | 							.where(
 455 | 								and(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false))
 456 | 							),
 457 | 						tx
 458 | 							.select({ total: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${schema.payment.amount}), 0)` })
 459 | 							.from(schema.payment)
 460 | 							.where(and(eq(schema.payment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.payment.status, "PAID")))
 461 | 					]);
 462 | 					return {
 463 | 						doctors: doctorCount[0]?.count ?? 0,
 464 | 						patients: patientCount[0]?.count ?? 0,
 465 | 						appointments: appointmentCount[0]?.count ?? 0,
 466 | 						revenue: revenue[0]?.total ?? 0
 467 | 					};
 468 | 				}),
 469 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 470 | 					where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 471 | 					with: {
 472 | 						patient: true,
 473 | 						doctor: true
 474 | 					},
 475 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" },
 476 | 					limit: 10
 477 | 				}),
 478 | 				db.query.doctor.findMany({
 479 | 					where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 480 | 					with: {
 481 | 						appointments: {
 482 | 							where: { isDeleted: false }
 483 | 						}
 484 | 					},
 485 | 					limit: 5
 486 | 				})
 487 | 			]);
 488 | 
 489 | 			return { clinic, stats, recentAppointments, topDoctors };
 490 | 		} catch (error) {
 491 | 			console.error("Error getting clinic dashboard:", error);
 492 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get clinic dashboard");
 493 | 		}
 494 | 	});

 496 | // =======================
 497 | // Service Management
 498 | // =======================
 499 | 
 500 | export const listServices = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 501 | 	.validator(serviceListSchema)
 502 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 503 | 		try {
 504 | 			const { clinicId, search, category, page, pageSize } = ctx.data;
 505 | 			const offset = (page - 1) * pageSize;
 506 | 
 507 | 			let whereConditions = and(eq(schema.service.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.service.isDeleted, false));
 508 | 
 509 | 			if (category) {
 510 | 				whereConditions = and(whereConditions, eq(schema.service.category, category));
 511 | 			}
 512 | 
 513 | 			if (search) {
 514 | 				whereConditions = and(whereConditions, like(schema.service.serviceName, `%${search}%`));
 515 | 			}
 516 | 
 517 | 			const [services, total] = await Promise.all([
 518 | 				db.query.service.findMany({
 519 | 					where: {
 520 | 						clinicId,
 521 | 						isDeleted: false,
 522 | 						...whereConditions
 523 | 					},
 524 | 					limit: pageSize,
 525 | 					offset,
 526 | 					orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
 527 | 				}),
 528 | 				db
 529 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 530 | 					.from(schema.service)
 531 | 					.where(whereConditions)
 532 | 					.then(result => result[0]?.count ?? 0)
 533 | 			]);
 534 | 
 535 | 			return {
 536 | 				services,
 537 | 				total,
 538 | 				page,
 539 | 				totalPages: Math.ceil(total / pageSize)
 540 | 			};
 541 | 		} catch (error) {
 542 | 			console.error("Error listing services:", error);
 543 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list services");
 544 | 		}
 545 | 	});

 584 | export const getServiceById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 585 | 	.validator(z.object({ serviceId: z.string(), clinicId: z.string().optional() }))
 586 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 587 | 		try {
 588 | 			const { serviceId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 589 | 			const whereClause = {
 590 | 				id: serviceId,
 591 | 				clinicId,
 592 | 				isDeleted: false
 593 | 			};
 594 | 			if (clinicId) {
 595 | 				whereClause.clinicId = clinicId;
 596 | 			}
 597 | 
 598 | 			return await db.query.service.findFirst({
 599 | 				where: whereClause,
 600 | 				with: {
 601 | 					appointments: {
 602 | 						where: { isDeleted: false },
 603 | 						limit: 10,
 604 | 						orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
 605 | 					},
 606 | 					labTests: {
 607 | 						limit: 10,
 608 | 						orderBy: { testDate: "desc" }
 609 | 					}
 610 | 				}
 611 | 			});
 612 | 		} catch (error) {
 613 | 			console.error("Error getting service by ID:", error);
 614 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get service");
 615 | 		}
 616 | 	});

 681 | export const getServiceStatistics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 682 | 	.validator(serviceStatsSchema)
 683 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 684 | 		try {
 685 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 686 | 			const services = await db.query.service.findMany({
 687 | 				where: {
 688 | 					clinicId,
 689 | 					isDeleted: false
 690 | 				},
 691 | 				with: {
 692 | 					appointments: {
 693 | 						where: {
 694 | 							isDeleted: false,
 695 | 							...(startDate &&
 696 | 								endDate && {
 697 | 									appointmentDate: {
 698 | 										gte: startDate,
 699 | 										lte: endDate
 700 | 									}
 701 | 								})
 702 | 						}
 703 | 					},
 704 | 					labTests: {
 705 | 						where:
 706 | 							startDate && endDate
 707 | 								? {
 708 | 										testDate: {
 709 | 											gte: startDate,
 710 | 											lte: endDate
 711 | 										}
 712 | 									}
 713 | 								: undefined
 714 | 					}
 715 | 				}
 716 | 			});
 717 | 
 718 | 			return services.map(service => ({
 719 | 				id: service.id,
 720 | 				name: service.serviceName,
 721 | 				category: service.category,
 722 | 				price: service.price,
 723 | 				duration: service.duration,
 724 | 				isAvailable: service.isAvailable,
 725 | 				appointmentCount: service.appointments.length,
 726 | 				labTestCount: service.labTests.length,
 727 | 				totalUsage: service.appointments.length + service.labTests.length,
 728 | 				estimatedRevenue: service.appointments.length * (service.price ?? 0)
 729 | 			}));
 730 | 		} catch (error) {
 731 | 			console.error("Error getting service statistics:", error);
 732 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get service statistics");
 733 | 		}
 734 | 	});
 735 | 
 736 | export const getPopularServices = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 737 | 	.validator(
 738 | 		z.object({
 739 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
 740 | 			limit: z.number().default(10),
 741 | 			startDate: z.date().optional(),
 742 | 			endDate: z.date().optional()
 743 | 		})
 744 | 	)
 745 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 746 | 		try {
 747 | 			const { clinicId, limit, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 748 | 			const stats = await getServiceStatistics({ data: { clinicId, startDate, endDate } });
 749 | 			return stats.sort((a, b) => b.totalUsage - a.totalUsage).slice(0, limit);
 750 | 		} catch (error) {
 751 | 			console.error("Error getting popular services:", error);
 752 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get popular services");
 753 | 		}
 754 | 	});

 758 | 	.handler(async ctx => {

 762 | 			const startDate = new Date();
 763 | 			startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - days);
 764 |

 766 | 			return stats.filter(service => service.totalUsage < threshold);

 769 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get low usage services");
 770 | 		}
