```ts
 773 | export const getServiceRevenueReport = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 774 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string(), startDate: z.date(), endDate: z.date() }))
 775 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 776 | 		try {
 777 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 778 | 			const services = await db.query.service.findMany({
 779 | 				where: {
 780 | 					clinicId,
 781 | 					isDeleted: false
 782 | 				},
 783 | 				with: {
 784 | 					appointments: {
 785 | 						where: {
 786 | 							isDeleted: false,
 787 | 							status: "COMPLETED",
 788 | 							appointmentDate: {
 789 | 								gte: startDate,
 790 | 								lte: endDate
 791 | 							}
 792 | 						}
 793 | 					}
 794 | 				}
 795 | 			});
 796 | 
 797 | 			const report = {
 798 | 				period: { startDate, endDate },
 799 | 				totalRevenue: 0,
 800 | 				services: [] as Array<{
 801 | 					id: string;
 802 | 					name: string;
 803 | 					category: string | null;
 804 | 					appointmentCount: number;
 805 | 					revenue: number;
 806 | 					averagePrice: number;
 807 | 				}>
 808 | 			};
 809 | 
 810 | 			for (const service of services) {
 811 | 				const appointmentCount = service.appointments.length;
 812 | 				const revenue = appointmentCount * (service.price ?? 0);
 813 | 				report.totalRevenue += revenue;
 814 | 				report.services.push({
 815 | 					id: service.id,
 816 | 					name: service.serviceName,
 817 | 					category: service.category,
 818 | 					appointmentCount,
 819 | 					revenue,
 820 | 					averagePrice: service.price ?? 0
 821 | 				});
 822 | 			}
 823 | 
 824 | 			return report;
 825 | 		} catch (error) {
 826 | 			console.error("Error getting service revenue report:", error);
 827 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get service revenue report");
 828 | 		}
 829 | 	});
 830 | 
 831 | export const canDeleteService = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 832 | 	.validator(serviceIdSchema)
 833 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 834 | 		try {
 835 | 			const { serviceId } = ctx.data;
 836 | 			const service = await db.query.service.findFirst({
 837 | 				where: { id: serviceId },
 838 | 				with: {
 839 | 					appointments: {
 840 | 						where: {
 841 | 							isDeleted: false,
 842 | 							status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 843 | 						},
 844 | 						limit: 1
 845 | 					},
 846 | 					labTests: {
 847 | 						limit: 1
 848 | 					}
 849 | 				}
 850 | 			});
 851 | 
 852 | 			if (!service) {
 853 | 				return { canDelete: false, reason: "Service not found" };
 854 | 			}
 855 | 
 856 | 			if (service.appointments.length > 0) {
 857 | 				return { canDelete: false, reason: "Service has upcoming appointments" };
 858 | 			}
 859 | 
 860 | 			if (service.labTests.length > 0) {
 861 | 				return { canDelete: false, reason: "Service has associated lab tests" };
 862 | 			}
 863 | 
 864 | 			return { canDelete: true };
 865 | 		} catch (error) {
 866 | 			console.error("Error checking if service can be deleted:", error);
 867 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check service deletion eligibility");
 868 | 		}
 869 | 	});
 870 | 
 871 | export const getServiceUsageTrends = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 872 | 	.validator(serviceUsageSchema)
 873 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 874 | 		try {
 875 | 			const { clinicId, serviceId, months } = ctx.data;
 876 | 			const trends = [];
 877 | 			const now = new Date();
 878 | 
 879 | 			const service = await getServiceById({ data: { serviceId, clinicId } });
 880 | 
 881 | 			for (let i = months - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
 882 | 				const startDate = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - i, 1);
 883 | 				const endDate = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - i + 1, 0);
 884 | 
 885 | 				const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 886 | 					where: {
 887 | 						clinicId,
 888 | 						serviceId,
 889 | 						isDeleted: false,
 890 | 						status: "COMPLETED",
 891 | 						appointmentDate: {
 892 | 							gte: startDate,
 893 | 							lte: endDate
 894 | 						}
 895 | 					}
 896 | 				});
 897 | 
 898 | 				trends.push({
 899 | 					month: startDate.toLocaleString("default", {
 900 | 						month: "long",
 901 | 						year: "numeric"
 902 | 					}),
 903 | 					appointmentCount: appointments.length,
 904 | 					revenue: appointments.length * (service?.price ?? 0)
 905 | 				});
 906 | 			}
 907 | 
 908 | 			return trends;
 909 | 		} catch (error) {
 910 | 			console.error("Error getting service usage trends:", error);
 911 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get service usage trends");
 912 | 		}
 913 | 	});
 914 | 
 915 | // =======================
 916 | // Doctor Performance
 917 | // =======================
 918 | 
 919 | export const getDoctorPerformanceReport = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 920 | 	.validator(doctorPerformanceSchema)
 921 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 922 | 		try {
 923 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 924 | 			const doctors = await db.query.doctor.findMany({
 925 | 				where: {
 926 | 					clinicId,
 927 | 					isDeleted: false
 928 | 				},
 929 | 				with: {
 930 | 					appointments: {
 931 | 						where: {
 932 | 							appointmentDate: {
 933 | 								gte: startDate,
 934 | 								lte: endDate
 935 | 							},
 936 | 							isDeleted: false
 937 | 						}
 938 | 					},
 939 | 					ratings: {
 940 | 						where: {
 941 | 							createdAt: {
 942 | 								gte: startDate,
 943 | 								lte: endDate
 944 | 							}
 945 | 						}
 946 | 					},
 947 | 					prescriptions: {
 948 | 						where: {
 949 | 							issuedDate: {
 950 | 								gte: startDate,
 951 | 								lte: endDate
 952 | 							}
 953 | 						}
 954 | 					}
 955 | 				}
 956 | 			});
 957 | 
 958 | 			return doctors.map(doctor => {
 959 | 				const completedAppointments = doctor.appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED");
 960 | 				const cancelledAppointments = doctor.appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CANCELLED");
 961 | 				const averageRating =
 962 | 					doctor.ratings.length > 0
 963 | 						? doctor.ratings.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.rating ?? 0), 0) / doctor.ratings.length
 964 | 						: 0;
 965 | 
 966 | 				return {
 967 | 					id: doctor.id,
 968 | 					name: doctor.name,
 969 | 					specialty: doctor.specialty,
 970 | 					totalAppointments: doctor.appointments.length,
 971 | 					completedAppointments: completedAppointments.length,
 972 | 					cancelledAppointments: cancelledAppointments.length,
 973 | 					completionRate:
 974 | 						doctor.appointments.length > 0
 975 | 							? (completedAppointments.length / doctor.appointments.length) * 100
 976 | 							: 0,
 977 | 					totalPrescriptions: doctor.prescriptions.length,
 978 | 					averageRating,
 979 | 					revenue: completedAppointments.reduce((sum, a) => sum + (a.appointmentPrice ?? 0), 0)
 980 | 				};
 981 | 			});
 982 | 		} catch (error) {
 983 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor performance report:", error);
 984 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor performance report");
 985 | 		}
 986 | 	});
 987 | 
 988 | // =======================
 989 | // Service CRUD Operations
 990 | // =======================
 991 | 
 992 | export const createService = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 993 | 	.validator(serviceCreateSchema)
 994 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 995 | 		try {
 996 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 997 | 			const [result] = await db
 998 | 				.insert(schema.service)
 999 | 				.values({
1000 | 					...data,
1001 | 					id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1002 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
1003 | 					updatedAt: new Date(),
1004 | 					isDeleted: false
1005 | 				})
1006 | 				.returning();
1007 | 			return result;
1008 | 		} catch (error) {
1009 | 			console.error("Error creating service:", error);
1010 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create service");
1011 | 		}
1012 | 	});

1015 | 	.validator(serviceUpdateSchema)
1016 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1017 | 		try {
1018 | 			const { id, data } = ctx.data;
1019 | 			const [result] = await db
1020 | 				.update(schema.service)
1021 | 				.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
1022 | 				.where(eq(schema.service.id, id))
1023 | 				.returning();
1024 | 			return result;
1025 | 		} catch (error) {

1068 | 				.set({ deletedAt: null, isDeleted: false, updatedAt: new Date() })

1078 | export const createServiceWithCategory = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1079 | 	.validator(z.object({ data: serviceCreateSchema, categoryId: z.string().optional() }))
1080 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1081 | 		try {
1082 | 			const { data } = ctx.data;
1083 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1084 | 				// Check if service with same name exists in clinic
1085 | 				const existing = await tx.query.service.findFirst({
1086 | 					where: {
1087 | 						clinicId: data.clinicId,
1088 | 						serviceName: data.serviceName,
1089 | 						isDeleted: false
1090 | 					}
1091 | 				});
1092 | 
1093 | 				if (existing) {
1094 | 					throw new Error("Service with this name already exists in the clinic");
1095 | 				}
1096 | 
1097 | 				// Create service
1098 | 				const [service] = await tx
1099 | 					.insert(schema.service)
1100 | 					.values({
1101 | 						...data,
1102 | 						id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1103 | 						isAvailable: data.isAvailable ?? true,
1104 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1105 | 						updatedAt: new Date(),
1106 | 						isDeleted: false
1107 | 					})
1108 | 					.returning();
1109 | 
1110 | 				// If category is provided, you could link it to a category table here
1111 | 				// This would require a service_categories table
1112 | 
1113 | 				return service;
1114 | 			});
1115 | 		} catch (error) {
1116 | 			console.error("Error creating service with category:", error);
1117 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create service with category");
1118 | 		}
1119 | 	});
1120 | 
1121 | export const cloneService = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1122 | 	.validator(cloneServiceSchema)
1123 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1124 | 		try {
1125 | 			const { serviceId, newClinicId } = ctx.data;
1126 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1127 | 				const originalService = await tx.query.service.findFirst({
1128 | 					where: { id: serviceId, isDeleted: false }
1129 | 				});
1130 | 
1131 | 				if (!originalService) {
1132 | 					throw new Error("Original service not found");
1133 | 				}
1134 | 
1135 | 				// Clone service with new ID
1136 | 				const [clonedService] = await tx
1137 | 					.insert(schema.service)
1138 | 					.values({
1139 | 						...originalService,
1140 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1141 | 						clinicId: newClinicId ?? originalService.clinicId,
1142 | 						serviceName: `${originalService.serviceName} (Copy)`,
1143 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1144 | 						updatedAt: new Date(),
1145 | 						deletedAt: null,
1146 | 						isDeleted: false
1147 | 					})
1148 | 					.returning();
1149 | 
1150 | 				return clonedService;
1151 | 			});
1152 | 		} catch (error) {
1153 | 			console.error("Error cloning service:", error);
1154 | 			throw new Error("Failed to clone service");
1155 | 		}
1156 | 	});
1157 | 
1158 | export const batchUpdateServicePrices = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1159 | 	.validator(batchPriceSchema)
1160 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1161 | 		try {
1162 | 			const { updates } = ctx.data;
1163 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1164 | 				const results = [];
1165 | 				for (const update of updates) {
1166 | 					const [updated] = await tx
1167 | 						.update(schema.service)
1168 | 						.set({
1169 | 							price: update.price,
1170 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
1171 | 						})
1172 | 						.where(eq(schema.service.id, update.id))
1173 | 						.returning();
1174 | 					results.push(updated);
1175 | 				}
1176 | 				return results;
1177 | 			});
1178 | 		} catch (error) {
1179 | 			console.error("Error batch updating service prices:", error);
1180 | 			throw new Error("Failed to batch update service prices");
1181 | 		}
1182 | 	});
```

```ts
 130 | // =======================
 131 | // Doctor Queries
 132 | // =======================
 133 | 
 134 | export const getDoctorById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 135 | 	.validator(doctorIdSchema)
 136 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 137 | 		try {
 138 | 			const { doctorId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 139 | 			const conditions = {
 140 | 				id: doctorId,
 141 | 				clinicId,
 142 | 				isDeleted: false
 143 | 			};
 144 | 			if (clinicId) conditions.clinicId = clinicId;
 145 | 
 146 | 			return await db.query.doctor.findFirst({
 147 | 				where: conditions,
 148 | 				with: {
 149 | 					user: true,
 150 | 					clinic: true,
 151 | 					workingDays: true
 152 | 				}
 153 | 			});
 154 | 		} catch (error) {
 155 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor by ID:", error);
 156 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor");
 157 | 		}
 158 | 	});
 159 | 
 160 | export const getDoctorByUserId = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 161 | 	.validator(doctorUserIdSchema)
 162 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 163 | 		try {
 164 | 			const { userId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 165 | 			const conditions = { userId, isDeleted: false, clinicId };
 166 | 			if (clinicId) conditions.clinicId = clinicId;
 167 | 
 168 | 			return await db.query.doctor.findFirst({
 169 | 				where: conditions,
 170 | 				with: { user: true, clinic: true }
 171 | 			});
 172 | 		} catch (error) {
 173 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor by user ID:", error);
 174 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor");
 175 | 		}
 176 | 	});
 177 | 
 178 | export const listDoctors = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 179 | 	.validator(listDoctorsSchema)
 180 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 181 | 		try {
 182 | 			const { clinicId, limit, offset, search, specialty, status, availabilityStatus } = ctx.data;
 183 | 
 184 | 			let conditions = and(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.doctor.isDeleted, false));
 185 | 
 186 | 			if (specialty) {
 187 | 				conditions = and(conditions, eq(schema.doctor.specialty, specialty));
 188 | 			}
 189 | 			if (status) {
 190 | 				conditions = and(conditions, eq(schema.doctor.status, status));
 191 | 			}
 192 | 			if (availabilityStatus) {
 193 | 				conditions = and(conditions, eq(schema.doctor.availabilityStatus, availabilityStatus));
 194 | 			}
 195 | 			if (search) {
 196 | 				conditions = and(
 197 | 					conditions,
 198 | 					or(like(schema.doctor.name, `%${search}%`), like(schema.doctor.specialty, `%${search}%`))
 199 | 				);
 200 | 			}
 201 | 
 202 | 			const [doctors, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 203 | 				db.query.doctor.findMany({
 204 | 					where: {
 205 | 						clinicId,
 206 | 						isDeleted: false,
 207 | 						...conditions
 208 | 					},
 209 | 					limit,
 210 | 					offset,
 211 | 					orderBy: { name: "asc" }
 212 | 				}),
 213 | 				db.select({ count: count() }).from(schema.doctor).where(conditions)
 214 | 			]);
 215 | 
 216 | 			return {
 217 | 				doctors,
 218 | 				total: totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0
 219 | 			};
 220 | 		} catch (error) {
 221 | 			console.error("Error listing doctors:", error);
 222 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list doctors");
 223 | 		}
 224 | 	});
 225 | 
 226 | // =======================
 227 | // Doctor CRUD Operations
 228 | // =======================
 229 | 
 230 | export const createDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 231 | 	.validator(DoctorCreateSchema)
 232 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 233 | 		try {
 234 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 235 | 			const [result] = await db
 236 | 				.insert(schema.doctor)
 237 | 				.values({
 238 | 					...data,
 239 | 					id: (data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID()) as string,
 240 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 241 | 					updatedAt: new Date(),
 242 | 					isDeleted: false
 243 | 				})
 244 | 				.returning();
 245 | 			return result;
 246 | 		} catch (error) {
 247 | 			console.error("Error creating doctor:", error);
 248 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create doctor");
 249 | 		}
 250 | 	});

 253 | 	.validator(DoctorUpdateSchema)
 254 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 255 | 		try {
 256 | 			const { id, ...data } = ctx.data;
 257 | 			const [result] = await db
 258 | 				.update(schema.doctor)
 259 | 				.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 260 | 				.where(eq(schema.doctor.id, id ?? ""))
 261 | 				.returning();
 262 | 			return result;
 263 | 		} catch (error) {
 264 | 			console.error("Error updating doctor:", error);
 265 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update doctor");
 266 | 		}

 286 | export const bulkUpdateDoctorStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 287 | 	.validator(z.object({ ids: z.array(z.string()), status: z.string() }))
 288 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 289 | 		try {
 290 | 			const { ids, status } = ctx.data;
 291 | 			return await db
 292 | 				.update(schema.doctor)
 293 | 				.set({ status: status as Status, updatedAt: new Date() })
 294 | 				.where(inArray(schema.doctor.id, ids))
 295 | 				.returning();

 301 | 
 302 | export const upsertDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 303 | 	.validator(DoctorCreateSchema)
 304 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 305 | 		try {
 306 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 307 | 			const [result] = await db
 308 | 				.insert(schema.doctor)
 309 | 				.values({
 310 | 					...data,
 311 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 312 | 				})
 313 | 				.onConflictDoUpdate({
 314 | 					target: schema.doctor.userId,
 315 | 					set: { ...data, updatedAt: new Date() }
 316 | 				})
 317 | 				.returning();
 318 | 			return result;
 319 | 		} catch (error) {
 320 | 			console.error("Error upserting doctor:", error);
 321 | 			throw new Error("Failed to upsert doctor");
 322 | 		}
 323 | 	});
 324 | 
 325 | export const softDeleteDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 326 | 	.validator(doctorIdSchema)
 327 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 328 | 		try {
 329 | 			const { doctorId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 330 | 			const conditions = [eq(schema.doctor.id, doctorId)];
 331 | 			if (clinicId) conditions.push(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId));
 332 | 
 333 | 			const [result] = await db
 334 | 				.update(schema.doctor)
 335 | 				.set({ deletedAt: new Date(), isDeleted: true, updatedAt: new Date() })
 336 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
 337 | 				.returning();
 338 | 			return result;
 339 | 		} catch (error) {
 340 | 			console.error("Error soft deleting doctor:", error);
 341 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete doctor");
 342 | 		}
 343 | 	});

 381 | export const createManyDoctors = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 382 | 	.validator(z.object({ doctors: z.array(DoctorCreateSchema) }))
 383 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 384 | 		try {
 385 | 			const { doctors } = ctx.data;
 386 | 			const doctorsWithIds = doctors.map(doctor => ({
 387 | 				...doctor,
 388 | 				id: (doctor.id ?? crypto.randomUUID()) as string,
 389 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
 390 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 391 | 				isDeleted: false
 392 | 			}));
 393 | 			return await db.insert(schema.doctor).values(doctorsWithIds).returning();
 394 | 		} catch (error) {
 395 | 			console.error("Error creating many doctors:", error);
 396 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create doctors");
 397 | 		}

 470 | export const deleteWorkingDay = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 471 | 	.validator(workingDayIdSchema)
 472 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 473 | 		try {
 474 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 475 | 
 476 | 			if (clinicId) {
 477 | 				// Get doctors in the clinic first
 478 | 				const clinicDoctors = await db
 479 | 					.select({ id: schema.doctor.id })
 480 | 					.from(schema.doctor)
 481 | 					.where(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId));
 482 | 
 483 | 				const doctorIds = clinicDoctors.map(d => d.id);
 484 | 
 485 | 				const [result] = await db
 486 | 					.delete(schema.workingDay)
 487 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.workingDay.id, id), inArray(schema.workingDay.doctorId, doctorIds)))
 488 | 					.returning();
 489 | 				return result;
 490 | 			}
 491 | 
 492 | 			const [result] = await db.delete(schema.workingDay).where(eq(schema.workingDay.id, id)).returning();
 493 | 			return result;
 494 | 		} catch (error) {
 495 | 			console.error("Error deleting working day:", error);
 496 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete working day");
 497 | 		}
 498 | 	});
 499 | 
 500 | export const replaceWorkingDays = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 501 | 	.validator(z.object({ doctorId: z.string(), workingDays: z.array(WorkingDaySchema) }))
 502 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 503 | 		try {
 504 | 			const { doctorId, workingDays } = ctx.data;
 505 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 506 | 				await tx.delete(schema.workingDay).where(eq(schema.workingDay.doctorId, doctorId));
 507 | 				if (workingDays.length > 0) {
 508 | 					const workingDaysWithIds = workingDays.map(day => ({
 509 | 						...day,
 510 | 						id: day.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 511 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 512 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 513 | 					}));
 514 | 					await tx.insert(schema.workingDay).values(workingDaysWithIds);
 515 | 				}
 516 | 			});
 517 | 		} catch (error) {
 518 | 			console.error("Error replacing working days:", error);
 519 | 			throw new Error("Failed to replace working days");
 520 | 		}
 521 | 	});
 522 |

 557 | 
 558 | // =======================
 559 | // Doctor Performance
 560 | // =======================
 561 | 
 562 | export const getDoctorPerformance = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 563 | 	.validator(doctorPerformanceSchema)
 564 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 565 | 		try {
 566 | 			const { doctorId, startDate, endDate, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 567 | 
 568 | 			const [appointments, ratings, prescriptions] = await Promise.all([
 569 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 570 | 					where: {
 571 | 						doctorId,
 572 | 						isDeleted: false,
 573 | 						...(clinicId && { clinicId }),
 574 | 						appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 575 | 					}
 576 | 				}),
 577 | 				db.query.rating.findMany({
 578 | 					where: {
 579 | 						staffId: doctorId,
 580 | 						createdAt: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 581 | 					}
 582 | 				}),
 583 | 				db.query.prescription.findMany({
 584 | 					where: {
 585 | 						doctorId,
 586 | 						issuedDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 587 | 					}
 588 | 				})
 589 | 			]);
 590 | 
 591 | 			const completedAppointments = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED");
 592 | 			const cancelledAppointments = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CANCELLED");
 593 | 			const averageRating =
 594 | 				ratings.length > 0 ? ratings.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.rating ?? 0), 0) / ratings.length : 0;
 595 | 
 596 | 			return {
 597 | 				totalAppointments: appointments.length,
 598 | 				completedAppointments: completedAppointments.length,
 599 | 				cancelledAppointments: cancelledAppointments.length,
 600 | 				completionRate:
 601 | 					appointments.length > 0 ? (completedAppointments.length / appointments.length) * 100 : 0,
 602 | 				totalPrescriptions: prescriptions.length,
 603 | 				averageRating,
 604 | 				totalRevenue: completedAppointments.reduce((sum, a) => sum + (a.appointmentPrice ?? 0), 0)
 605 | 			};
 606 | 		} catch (error) {
 607 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor performance:", error);
 608 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor performance");
 609 | 		}
 610 | 	});
 611 | 
 612 | // =======================
 613 | // Doctor Availability & Schedule
 614 | // =======================
 615 | 
 616 | export const getDoctorAvailability = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 617 | 	.validator(doctorAvailabilitySchema)
 618 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 619 | 		try {
 620 | 			const { doctorId, date } = ctx.data;
 621 | 
 622 | 			const startOfDay = new Date(date);
 623 | 			startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 624 | 
 625 | 			const endOfDay = new Date(date);
 626 | 			endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 627 | 
 628 | 			const [workingDays, appointments] = await Promise.all([
 629 | 				db.query.workingDay.findMany({
 630 | 					where: { doctorId }
 631 | 				}),
 632 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 633 | 					where: {
 634 | 						doctorId,
 635 | 						appointmentDate: {
 636 | 							gte: startOfDay,
 637 | 							lte: endOfDay
 638 | 						},
 639 | 						isDeleted: false
 640 | 					}
 641 | 				})
 642 | 			]);
 643 | 
 644 | 			return { workingDays, appointments };
 645 | 		} catch (error) {
 646 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor availability:", error);
 647 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor availability");
 648 | 		}
 649 | 	});
 650 | 
 651 | export const getDoctorWithSchedule = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 652 | 	.validator(doctorScheduleSchema)
 653 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 654 | 		try {
 655 | 			const { doctorId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 656 | 			const whereCondition = { id: doctorId, clinicId };
 657 | 			if (clinicId) whereCondition.clinicId = clinicId;
 658 | 
 659 | 			return await db.query.doctor.findFirst({
 660 | 				where: whereCondition,
 661 | 				with: {
 662 | 					user: true,
 663 | 					clinic: true,
 664 | 					workingDays: true,
 665 | 					appointments: {
 666 | 						where: {
 667 | 							isDeleted: false,
 668 | 							appointmentDate: { gte: new Date() }
 669 | 						},
 670 | 						with: {
 671 | 							patient: true,
 672 | 							service: true
 673 | 						},
 674 | 						orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 675 | 					},
 676 | 					medicalRecords: {
 677 | 						with: {
 678 | 							patient: true
 679 | 						},
 680 | 						orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
 681 | 						limit: 20
 682 | 					},
 683 | 					prescriptions: {
 684 | 						where: { status: "active" },
 685 | 						with: {
 686 | 							patient: true,
 687 | 							prescribedItems: {
 688 | 								with: {
 689 | 									drug: true
 690 | 								}
 691 | 							}
 692 | 						},
 693 | 						orderBy: { issuedDate: "desc" }
 694 | 					}
 695 | 				}
 696 | 			});
 697 | 		} catch (error) {
 698 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor with schedule:", error);
 699 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor schedule");
 700 | 		}
 701 | 	});
 702 | 
 703 | export const getAvailableTimeSlots = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 704 | 	.validator(timeSlotsSchema)
 705 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 706 | 		try {
 707 | 			const { doctorId, date, durationMinutes } = ctx.data;
 708 | 			const dayOfWeek = date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "long" }).toUpperCase();
 709 | 
 710 | 			const workingDay = await db.query.workingDay.findFirst({
 711 | 				where: {
 712 | 					doctorId: doctorId,
 713 | 					day: dayOfWeek as Weekday
 714 | 				}
 715 | 			});
 716 | 
 717 | 			if (!workingDay) {
 718 | 				return [];
 719 | 			}
 720 | 
 721 | 			const startOfDay = new Date(date);
 722 | 			startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 723 | 
 724 | 			const endOfDay = new Date(date);
 725 | 			endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 726 | 
 727 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 728 | 				where: {
 729 | 					doctorId,
 730 | 					appointmentDate: {
 731 | 						gte: startOfDay,
 732 | 						lte: endOfDay
 733 | 					},
 734 | 					isDeleted: false,
 735 | 					status: {
 736 | 						notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]
 737 | 					}
 738 | 				}
 739 | 			});
 740 | 
 741 | 			// Generate time slots
 742 | 			const startHour = Number.parseInt(workingDay.startTime.split(":")[0] ?? "0", 10);
 743 | 			const startMinute = Number.parseInt(workingDay.startTime.split(":")[1] ?? "0", 10);
 744 | 			const endHour = Number.parseInt(workingDay.endTime.split(":")[0] ?? "0", 10);
 745 | 			const endMinute = Number.parseInt(workingDay.endTime.split(":")[1] ?? "0", 10);
 746 | 
 747 | 			const slots = [];
 748 | 			const currentTime = new Date(date);
 749 | 			currentTime.setHours(startHour, startMinute, 0, 0);
 750 | 			const endTime = new Date(date);
 751 | 			endTime.setHours(endHour, endMinute, 0, 0);
 752 | 
 753 | 			while (currentTime < endTime) {
 754 | 				const slotEnd = new Date(currentTime);
 755 | 				slotEnd.setMinutes(slotEnd.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 756 | 
 757 | 				// Check if slot is available
 758 | 				const isBooked = appointments.some(apt => {
 759 | 					const aptTime = new Date(apt.appointmentDate);
 760 | 					return (
 761 | 						aptTime.getHours() === currentTime.getHours() &&
 762 | 						aptTime.getMinutes() === currentTime.getMinutes()
 763 | 					);
 764 | 				});
 765 | 
 766 | 				if (!isBooked) {
 767 | 					slots.push({
 768 | 						startTime: currentTime.toLocaleTimeString(),
 769 | 						endTime: slotEnd.toLocaleTimeString(),
 770 | 						available: true
 771 | 					});
 772 | 				}
 773 | 
 774 | 				currentTime.setMinutes(currentTime.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 775 | 			}
 776 | 
 777 | 			return slots;
 778 | 		} catch (error) {
 779 | 			console.error("Error getting available time slots:", error);
 780 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get available time slots");
 781 | 		}
 782 | 	});
 783 | 
 784 | export const updateDoctorSchedule = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 785 | 	.validator(updateScheduleSchema)
 786 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 787 | 		try {
 788 | 			const { doctorId, workingDays } = ctx.data;
 789 | 
 790 | 			await db.transaction(async tx => {
 791 | 				await tx.delete(schema.workingDay).where(eq(schema.workingDay.doctorId, doctorId));
 792 | 
 793 | 				for (const day of workingDays) {
 794 | 					await tx.insert(schema.workingDay).values({
 795 | 						...day,
 796 | 						doctorId,
 797 | 						id: day.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 798 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 799 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 800 | 					});
 801 | 				}
 802 | 			});
 803 | 
 804 | 			return { success: true };
 805 | 		} catch (error) {
 806 | 			console.error("Error updating doctor schedule:", error);
 807 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update doctor schedule");
 808 | 		}
 809 | 	});

```

`data/functions/labs.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repo/labs.repo.ts
   2 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   3 | import { eq, inArray } from "drizzle-orm";
   4 | import z from "zod";
   5 | 
   6 | import { db } from "@/db";
   7 | import * as schema from "@/db/schema";
   8 | 
   9 | // =======================
  10 | // Schema Validators
  11 | // =======================
  12 | 
  13 | const clinicIdSchema = z.object({ clinicId: z.string().min(1) });
  14 | const patientIdSchema = z.object({ patientId: z.string().min(1) });
  15 | const labTestIdSchema = z.object({ labTestId: z.string().min(1) });
  16 | const patientLabTestsSchema = z.object({
  17 | 	patientId: z.string(),
  18 | 	status: z.enum(["PENDING", "IN_PROGRESS", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED"]).optional()
  19 | });
  20 | const updateResultsSchema = z.object({
  21 | 	labTestId: z.string(),
  22 | 	result: z.string(),
  23 | 	status: z.enum(["PENDING", "IN_PROGRESS", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED"])
  24 | });
  25 | const createLabTestSchema = z.object({
  26 | 	id: z.string().optional(),
  27 | 	diagnosisId: z.string().optional(),
  28 | 	patientId: z.string(),
  29 | 	recordId: z.string(),
  30 | 	serviceId: z.string(),
  31 | 	testDate: z.date(),
  32 | 	result: z.string().default(""),
  33 | 	status: z.enum(["PENDING", "IN_PROGRESS", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED"]).default("PENDING"),
  34 | 	notes: z.string().optional()
  35 | });
  36 | const updateLabTestSchema = z.object({
  37 | 	id: z.string(),
  38 | 	data: z.object({
  39 | 		diagnosisId: z.string().optional(),
  40 | 		result: z.string().optional(),
  41 | 		status: z.enum(["PENDING", "IN_PROGRESS", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED"]).optional(),
  42 | 		notes: z.string().optional(),
  43 | 		testDate: z.date().optional()
  44 | 	})
  45 | });
  46 | 
  47 | // =======================
  48 | // Lab Test Queries
  49 | // =======================
  50 | 
  51 | export const getPendingByClinicId = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  52 | 	.validator(clinicIdSchema)
  53 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
  54 | 		try {
  55 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
  56 | 
  57 | 			// First get patients in the clinic
  58 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
  59 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
  60 | 				columns: { id: true }
  61 | 			});
  62 | 
  63 | 			const patientIds = patients.map(p => p.id);
  64 | 
  65 | 			if (patientIds.length === 0) {
  66 | 				return [];
  67 | 			}
  68 | 
  69 | 			return await db.query.labTest.findMany({
  70 | 				where: {
  71 | 					status: "PENDING",
  72 | 					patientId: {
  73 | 						arrayContains: patientIds // Use object syntax for inArray
  74 | 					}
  75 | 				},
  76 | 				with: {
  77 | 					patient: true,
  78 | 					service: true
  79 | 				},
  80 | 				orderBy: { testDate: "asc" }
  81 | 			});
  82 | 		} catch (error) {
  83 | 			console.error("Error getting pending lab tests by clinic:", error);
  84 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get pending lab tests");
  85 | 		}
  86 | 	});

 179 | export const getPendingLabTests = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {

 181 | 		return await db.query.labTest.findMany({

 197 | // =======================
 198 | // Lab Test Statistics
 199 | // =======================
 200 | 
 201 | export const getLabTestStatistics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 202 | 	.validator(clinicIdSchema)
 203 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 204 | 		try {
 205 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 206 | 
 207 | 			// Get patients in the clinic
 208 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 209 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 210 | 				columns: { id: true }
 211 | 			});
 212 | 
 213 | 			const patientIds = patients.map(p => p.id);
 214 | 
 215 | 			if (patientIds.length === 0) {
 216 | 				return {
 217 | 					total: 0,
 218 | 					pending: 0,
 219 | 					inProgress: 0,
 220 | 					completed: 0,
 221 | 					cancelled: 0,
 222 | 					byMonth: []
 223 | 				};
 224 | 			}
 225 | 
 226 | 			// Get all lab tests for the clinic
 227 | 			const labTests = await db.query.labTest.findMany({
 228 | 				where: {
 229 | 					patientId: {
 230 | 						arrayContains: patientIds
 231 | 					}
 232 | 				}
 233 | 			});
 234 | 
 235 | 			const total = labTests.length;
 236 | 			const pending = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "PENDING").length;
 237 | 			const inProgress = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "IN_PROGRESS").length;
 238 | 			const completed = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "COMPLETED").length;
 239 | 			const cancelled = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "CANCELLED").length;
 240 | 
 241 | 			// Group by month
 242 | 			const byMonthMap = new Map();
 243 | 			labTests.forEach(lt => {
 244 | 				const monthKey = lt.testDate
 245 | 					? new Date(lt.testDate).toLocaleString("default", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
 246 | 					: "Unknown";
 247 | 				if (!byMonthMap.has(monthKey)) {
 248 | 					byMonthMap.set(monthKey, { month: monthKey, count: 0 });
 249 | 				}
 250 | 				byMonthMap.get(monthKey).count++;
 251 | 			});
 252 | 
 253 | 			const byMonth = Array.from(byMonthMap.values());
 254 | 
 255 | 			return {
 256 | 				total,
 257 | 				pending,
 258 | 				inProgress,
 259 | 				completed,
 260 | 				cancelled,
 261 | 				byMonth
 262 | 			};
 263 | 		} catch (error) {
 264 | 			console.error("Error getting lab test statistics:", error);
 265 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get lab test statistics");
 266 | 		}
 267 | 	});
 268 | 
 269 | // =======================
 270 | // Lab Test CRUD Operations
 271 | // =======================
 272 | 
 273 | export const createLabTest = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 274 | 	.validator(createLabTestSchema)
 275 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 276 | 		try {
 277 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 278 | 
 279 | 			const [result] = await db
 280 | 				.insert(schema.labTest)
 281 | 				.values({
 282 | 					id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 283 | 					diagnosisId: data.diagnosisId,
 284 | 					patientId: data.patientId,
 285 | 					recordId: data.recordId,
 286 | 					serviceId: data.serviceId,
 287 | 					testDate: data.testDate,
 288 | 					result: data.result,
 289 | 					status: data.status,
 290 | 					notes: data.notes,
 291 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 292 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 293 | 				})
 294 | 				.returning();
 295 | 
 296 | 			return result;
 297 | 		} catch (error) {
 298 | 			console.error("Error creating lab test:", error);
 299 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create lab test");
 300 | 		}
 301 | 	});
 302 | 
 303 | export const createManyLabTests = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 304 | 	.validator(z.object({ labTests: z.array(createLabTestSchema) }))
 305 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 306 | 		try {
 307 | 			const { labTests } = ctx.data;
 308 | 
 309 | 			const labTestsWithIds = labTests.map(lt => ({
 310 | 				id: lt.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 311 | 				diagnosisId: lt.diagnosisId,
 312 | 				patientId: lt.patientId,
 313 | 				recordId: lt.recordId,
 314 | 				serviceId: lt.serviceId,
 315 | 				testDate: lt.testDate,
 316 | 				result: lt.result,
 317 | 				status: lt.status,
 318 | 				notes: lt.notes,
 319 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
 320 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
 321 | 			}));
 322 | 
 323 | 			return await db.insert(schema.labTest).values(labTestsWithIds).returning();
 324 | 		} catch (error) {
 325 | 			console.error("Error creating multiple lab tests:", error);
 326 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create lab tests");
 327 | 		}
 328 | 	});

 341 | 				.where(eq(schema.labTest.id, id))

 356 | 	.validator(z.object({ ids: z.array(z.string()), data: updateLabTestSchema.shape.data }))
 357 | 	.handler(async ctx => {

 364 | 		} catch (error) {

 396 | 			labTestIds: z.array(z.string()),

 398 | 		})
 399 | 	)

 408 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 409 | 				})

 418 | // =======================
 419 | // Lab Test Reports
 420 | // =======================
 421 | 
 422 | export const getLabTestReport = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 423 | 	.validator(
 424 | 		z.object({
 425 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
 426 | 			startDate: z.date(),
 427 | 			endDate: z.date()
 428 | 		})
 429 | 	)
 430 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 431 | 		try {
 432 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 433 | 
 434 | 			// Get patients in the clinic
 435 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 436 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 437 | 				columns: { id: true }
 438 | 			});
 439 | 
 440 | 			const patientIds = patients.map(p => p.id);
 441 | 
 442 | 			if (patientIds.length === 0) {
 443 | 				return {
 444 | 					totalTests: 0,
 445 | 					completedTests: 0,
 446 | 					pendingTests: 0,
 447 | 					cancelledTests: 0,
 448 | 					testsByService: [],
 449 | 					averageTurnaroundTime: 0
 450 | 				};
 451 | 			}
 452 | 
 453 | 			// Get lab tests within date range
 454 | 			const labTests = await db.query.labTest.findMany({
 455 | 				where: {
 456 | 					patientId: {
 457 | 						arrayContains: patientIds
 458 | 					},
 459 | 					testDate: {
 460 | 						gte: startDate,
 461 | 						lte: endDate
 462 | 					}
 463 | 				},
 464 | 
 465 | 				// and(
 466 | 				// 	inArray(schema.labTest.patientId, patientIds),
 467 | 				// 	gte(schema.labTest.testDate, startDate),
 468 | 				// 	lte(schema.labTest.testDate, endDate)
 469 | 				// ),
 470 | 				orderBy: { testDate: "desc" },
 471 | 				with: {
 472 | 					service: true
 473 | 				}
 474 | 			});
 475 | 
 476 | 			const totalTests = labTests.length;
 477 | 			const completedTests = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "COMPLETED").length;
 478 | 			const pendingTests = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "PENDING").length;
 479 | 			const cancelledTests = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "CANCELLED").length;
 480 | 
 481 | 			// Group by service
 482 | 			const testsByServiceMap = new Map();
 483 | 			labTests.forEach(lt => {
 484 | 				const serviceName = lt.service?.serviceName || "Unknown";
 485 | 				if (!testsByServiceMap.has(serviceName)) {
 486 | 					testsByServiceMap.set(serviceName, {
 487 | 						serviceName,
 488 | 						count: 0,
 489 | 						completed: 0,
 490 | 						pending: 0
 491 | 					});
 492 | 				}
 493 | 				const serviceStats = testsByServiceMap.get(serviceName);
 494 | 				serviceStats.count++;
 495 | 				if (lt.status === "COMPLETED") serviceStats.completed++;
 496 | 				if (lt.status === "PENDING") serviceStats.pending++;
 497 | 			});
 498 | 
 499 | 			const testsByService = Array.from(testsByServiceMap.values());
 500 | 
 501 | 			// Calculate average turnaround time (simplified - would need created_at and completed_at timestamps)
 502 | 			// For now, just return a placeholder
 503 | 			const averageTurnaroundTime = 0;
 504 | 
 505 | 			return {
 506 | 				totalTests,
 507 | 				completedTests,
 508 | 				pendingTests,
 509 | 				cancelledTests,
 510 | 				testsByService,
 511 | 				averageTurnaroundTime
 512 | 			};
 513 | 		} catch (error) {
 514 | 			console.error("Error getting lab test report:", error);
 515 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get lab test report");
 516 | 		}
 517 | 	});
 518 | 
 519 | // =======================
 520 | // Lab Test Notifications
 521 | // =======================
 522 | 
 523 | export const getRecentlyCompletedLabTests = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 524 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string(), limit: z.number().default(10) }))
 525 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 526 | 		try {
 527 | 			const { clinicId, limit } = ctx.data;
 528 | 
 529 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 530 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 531 | 				columns: { id: true }
 532 | 			});
 533 | 
 534 | 			const patientIds = patients.map(p => p.id);
 535 | 
 536 | 			if (patientIds.length === 0) {
 537 | 				return [];
 538 | 			}
 539 | 
 540 | 			return await db.query.labTest.findMany({
 541 | 				where: {
 542 | 					patientId: {
 543 | 						arrayContains: patientIds
 544 | 					},
 545 | 					status: "COMPLETED"
 546 | 				},
 547 | 
 548 | 				// and(inArray(schema.labTest.patientId, patientIds), eq(schema.labTest.status, "COMPLETED")),
 549 | 				with: {
 550 | 					patient: true,
 551 | 					service: true
 552 | 				},
 553 | 				orderBy: { updatedAt: "desc" },
 554 | 				limit
 555 | 			});
 556 | 		} catch (error) {
 557 | 			console.error("Error getting recently completed lab tests:", error);
 558 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get recently completed lab tests");
 559 | 		}
 560 | 	});

```

```ts
 228 | // Medical Record Count
 229 | // =======================
 230 | 
 231 | export const countMedicalRecord = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 232 | 	.validator(medicalRecordCountSchema)
 233 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 234 | 		try {
 235 | 			const { clinicId, patientId, doctorId } = ctx.data;
 236 | 			return await db.$count(
 237 | 				schema.medicalRecord,
 238 | 				and(
 239 | 					eq(schema.medicalRecord.clinicId, clinicId),
 240 | 					patientId ? eq(schema.medicalRecord.patientId, patientId) : undefined,
 241 | 					doctorId ? eq(schema.medicalRecord.doctorId, doctorId) : undefined,
 242 | 					eq(schema.medicalRecord.isDeleted, false)
 243 | 				)
 244 | 			);
 245 | 		} catch (error) {
 246 | 			console.error("Error counting medical records:", error);
 247 | 			throw new Error("Failed to count medical records");
 248 | 		}
 249 | 	});

 255 | export const listVitalSignsByPatient = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 256 | 	.validator(vitalSignsListSchema)
 257 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 258 | 		try {
 259 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, fromDate, toDate, pageSize, page } = ctx.data;
 260 | 			const whereConditions = {
 261 | 				patientId,
 262 | 				clinicId,
 263 | 				recordedAt: {
 264 | 					lte: fromDate,
 265 | 					gte: toDate
 266 | 				}
 267 | 			};
 268 | 
 269 | 			if (fromDate || toDate) {
 270 | 				if (fromDate) whereConditions.recordedAt.gte = fromDate;
 271 | 				if (toDate) whereConditions.recordedAt.lte = toDate;
 272 | 			}
 273 | 
 274 | 			return await db.query.vitalSign.findMany({
 275 | 				where: whereConditions,
 276 | 				orderBy: { recordedAt: "desc" },
 277 | 				limit: pageSize,
 278 | 				offset: (page - 1) * pageSize
 279 | 			});
 280 | 		} catch (error) {
 281 | 			console.error("Error listing vital signs:", error);
 282 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list vital signs");
 283 | 		}
 284 | 	});

 286 | export const listMedicalRecord = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 287 | 	.validator(medicalRecordListSchema)
 288 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 289 | 		try {
 290 | 			const { patientId, doctorId, clinicId, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 291 | 			const whereConditions = {
 292 | 				clinicId,
 293 | 				patientId,
 294 | 				doctorId,
 295 | 				isDeleted: false
 296 | 			};
 297 | 
 298 | 			if (patientId) whereConditions.patientId = patientId;
 299 | 			if (doctorId) whereConditions.doctorId = doctorId;
 300 | 
 301 | 			return await db.query.medicalRecord.findMany({
 302 | 				where: whereConditions,
 303 | 				with: {
 304 | 					patient: true,
 305 | 					doctor: true,
 306 | 					appointment: true,
 307 | 					prescriptions: {
 308 | 						with: {
 309 | 							prescribedItems: {
 310 | 								with: {
 311 | 									drug: true
 312 | 								}
 313 | 							}
 314 | 						}
 315 | 					}
 316 | 				},
 317 | 				orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
 318 | 				limit,
 319 | 				offset
 320 | 			});
 321 | 		} catch (error) {
 322 | 			console.error("Error listing medical records:", error);

 478 | 		try {

 497 | 					},

 509 | export const getVitalSigns = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 510 | 	.validator(vitalSignsParamsSchema)
 511 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 512 | 		try {
 513 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, page = 1, pageSize = 50, limit, fromDate, toDate, encounterId } = ctx.data;
 514 | 			const finalLimit = limit ?? pageSize;
 515 | 
 516 | 			const whereConditions = {
 517 | 				patientId,
 518 | 				clinicId,
 519 | 				recordedAt: {
 520 | 					gte: fromDate,
 521 | 					lte: toDate
 522 | 				},
 523 | 				encounterId
 524 | 			};
 525 | 
 526 | 			if (fromDate || toDate) {
 527 | 				if (fromDate) whereConditions.recordedAt.gte = fromDate;
 528 | 				if (toDate) whereConditions.recordedAt.lte = toDate;
 529 | 			}
 530 | 
 531 | 			if (encounterId) {
 532 | 				whereConditions.encounterId = encounterId;
 533 | 			}
 534 | 
 535 | 			return await db.query.vitalSign.findMany({
 536 | 				where: whereConditions,
 537 | 				orderBy: { recordedAt: "desc" },
 538 | 				limit: finalLimit,
 539 | 				offset: (page - 1) * finalLimit
 540 | 			});
 541 | 		} catch (error) {
 542 | 			console.error("Error getting vital signs:", error);
 543 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get vital signs");
 544 | 		}

 576 | export const checkVitalSignsAccess = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 577 | 	.validator(checkAccessSchema)
 578 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 579 | 		try {
 580 | 			const { userId, patientId } = ctx.data;
 581 | 			const userData = await db.query.user.findFirst({
 582 | 				where: { id: userId },
 583 | 				with: {
 584 | 					patients: true,
 585 | 					doctors: true
 586 | 				}
 587 | 			});
 588 | 
 589 | 			if (!userData) {
 590 | 				return false;
 591 | 			}
 592 | 
 593 | 			if (userData.role === "admin" || userData.role === "staff") {
 594 | 				return true;
 595 | 			}
 596 | 			if (userData.role === "doctor" && userData.doctors) {
 597 | 				return true;
 598 | 			}
 599 | 			if (userData.role === "patient" && Array.isArray(userData.patients)) {
 600 | 				return userData.patients.some(p => p.id === patientId);
 601 | 			}
 602 | 
 603 | 			// Check if user is guardian
 604 | 			const guardianRecord = await db.query.guardian.findFirst({
 605 | 				where: {
 606 | 					userId,
 607 | 					patientId
 608 | 				}
 609 | 			});
 610 | 
 611 | 			return !!guardianRecord;
 612 | 		} catch (error) {
 613 | 			console.error("Error checking vital signs access:", error);
 614 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check access");
 615 | 		}
 616 | 	});

 618 | // =======================
 619 | // Billing & Payments
 620 | // =======================
 621 | 
 622 | export const createBillForAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 623 | 	.validator(z.object({ appointmentId: z.string() }))
 624 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 625 | 		try {
 626 | 			const { appointmentId } = ctx.data;
 627 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 628 | 				const appointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
 629 | 					where: { id: appointmentId },
 630 | 					with: {
 631 | 						patient: true,
 632 | 						doctor: true,
 633 | 						service: true
 634 | 					}
 635 | 				});
 636 | 
 637 | 				if (!appointment) {
 638 | 					throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 639 | 				}
 640 | 
 641 | 				// Calculate total amount
 642 | 				let totalAmount = appointment.appointmentPrice ?? 0;
 643 | 				if (appointment.service) {
 644 | 					totalAmount += appointment.service.price || 0;
 645 | 				}
 646 | 
 647 | 				// Create payment record
 648 | 				const [payment] = await tx
 649 | 					.insert(schema.payment)
 650 | 					.values({
 651 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 652 | 						clinicId: appointment.clinicId,
 653 | 						patientId: appointment.patientId,
 654 | 						appointmentId: appointment.id,
 655 | 						billDate: new Date(),
 656 | 						totalAmount,
 657 | 						amount: totalAmount,
 658 | 						status: "PENDING",
 659 | 						receiptNumber: Math.floor(Math.random() * 1_000_000)
 660 | 					})
 661 | 					.returning();
 662 | 
 663 | 				return payment;
 664 | 			});
 665 | 		} catch (error) {
 666 | 			console.error("Error creating bill for appointment:", error);
 667 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create bill for appointment");
 668 | 		}
 669 | 	});
 670 |

 715 | 		}
 716 | 	});
 717 | 
 718 | export const listPayments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 719 | 	.validator(listPaymentsSchema)
 720 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 721 | 		try {
 722 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate, status, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 723 | 
 724 | 			const conditions: SQL[] = [eq(schema.payment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.payment.isDeleted, false)];
 725 | 
 726 | 			if (startDate) conditions.push(gte(schema.payment.paymentDate, startDate));
 727 | 			if (endDate) conditions.push(lte(schema.payment.paymentDate, endDate));
 728 | 			if (status) conditions.push(eq(schema.payment.status, status as schema.PaymentStatus));
 729 | 
 730 | 			const whereConditions: Record<string, unknown> = {
 731 | 				clinicId,
 732 | 				isDeleted: false,
 733 | 				status: status as schema.PaymentStatus | undefined
 734 | 			};
 735 | 
 736 | 			if (startDate || endDate) {
 737 | 				whereConditions.paymentDate = {};
 738 | 			}
 739 | 
 740 | 			if (typeof whereConditions.paymentDate === "object" && whereConditions.paymentDate !== null) {
 741 | 				if (startDate) (whereConditions.paymentDate as Record<string, unknown>).gte = startDate;
 742 | 				if (endDate) (whereConditions.paymentDate as Record<string, unknown>).lte = endDate;
 743 | 			}
 744 | 
 745 | 			if (status) whereConditions.status = status;
 746 | 
 747 | 			const [items, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 748 | 				db.query.payment.findMany({
 749 | 					where: whereConditions,
 750 | 					limit,
 751 | 					offset,
 752 | 					with: {
 753 | 						patient: true,
 754 | 						appointment: true
 755 | 					},
 756 | 					orderBy: { paymentDate: "desc" }
 757 | 				}),
 758 | 				db
 759 | 					.select({ count: count() })
 760 | 					.from(schema.payment)
 761 | 					.where(and(...conditions))
 762 | 			]);
 763 | 
 764 | 			return {
 765 | 				items,
 766 | 				total: totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0
 767 | 			};
 768 | 		} catch (error) {
 769 | 			console.error("Error listing payments:", error);
 770 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list payments");
 771 | 		}
 772 | 	});
 773 | 
 774 | export const getClinicRevenue = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 775 | 	.validator(clinicRevenueSchema)
 776 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 777 | 		try {
 778 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 779 | 			const payments = await db.query.payment.findMany({
 780 | 				where: {
 781 | 					clinicId,
 782 | 					isDeleted: false,
 783 | 					createdAt: {
 784 | 						gte: startDate,
 785 | 						lte: endDate
 786 | 					}
 787 | 				},
 788 | 				with: {
 789 | 					patient: true
 790 | 				},
 791 | 				orderBy: (payment, { desc }) => [desc(payment.createdAt)]
 792 | 			});
 793 | 
 794 | 			const totalRevenue = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.status === "PAID" ? (p.amountPaid ?? 0) : 0), 0);
 795 | 			const totalBilled = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.totalAmount ?? 0), 0);
 796 | 
 797 | 			const outstanding = Math.max(0, totalBilled - totalRevenue);
 798 | 
 799 | 			const pendingClaims = payments.filter(p => p.paymentMethod === "INSURANCE" && p.status !== "PAID").length;
 800 | 
 801 | 			const collectionRate = totalBilled > 0 ? Math.round((totalRevenue / totalBilled) * 100) : 100;
 802 | 
 803 | 			const transactions = payments.map(p => ({
 804 | 				id: p.id,
 805 | 				patientId: p.patientId || "",
 806 | 				patientName: p.patient ? `${p.patient.firstName} ${p.patient.lastName}` : "Unknown Patient",
 807 | 				amount: p.totalAmount ?? 0,
 808 | 				date: p.paymentDate || p.createdAt,
 809 | 				type: p.status === "PAID" ? ("PAYMENT" as const) : ("INVOICE" as const),
 810 | 				status: (p.status === "PAID"
 811 | 					? "PAID"
 812 | 					: p.status === "PENDING" || p.status === "PARTIAL"
 813 | 						? "PENDING"
 814 | 						: p.status === "UNPAID"
 815 | 							? "OVERDUE"
 816 | 							: "CANCELLED") as "PAID" | "PENDING" | "OVERDUE" | "CANCELLED",
 817 | 				description: p.notes || undefined
 818 | 			}));
 819 | 
 820 | 			return {
 821 | 				totalRevenue,
 822 | 				totalBilled,
 823 | 				monthlyRevenue: totalRevenue,
 824 | 				revenueGrowth: 12,
 825 | 				outstanding,
 826 | 				pendingClaims,
 827 | 				collectionRate,
 828 | 				paymentCount: payments.length,
 829 | 				averagePayment: payments.length > 0 ? totalRevenue / payments.length : 0,
 830 | 				payments,
 831 | 				transactions
 832 | 			};
 833 | 		} catch (error) {
 834 | 			console.error("Error getting clinic revenue:", error);
 835 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get clinic revenue");
 836 | 		}
 837 | 	});
 838 | 
 839 | export const processPayment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 840 | 	.validator(processPaymentSchema)
 841 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 842 | 		try {
 843 | 			const { paymentId, amountPaid, paymentMethod, notes } = ctx.data;
 844 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 845 | 				const payment = await tx.query.payment.findFirst({
 846 | 					where: { id: paymentId }
 847 | 				});
 848 | 
 849 | 				if (!payment) {
 850 | 					throw new Error("Payment not found");
 851 | 				}
 852 | 
 853 | 				const [updatedPayment] = await tx
 854 | 					.update(schema.payment)
 855 | 					.set({
 856 | 						amountPaid,
 857 | 						paymentMethod: paymentMethod as schema.PaymentMethod,
 858 | 						paymentDate: new Date(),
 859 | 						paidDate: new Date(),
 860 | 						status: amountPaid >= (payment.totalAmount ?? 0) ? "PAID" : "PARTIAL",
 861 | 						notes,
 862 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 863 | 					})
 864 | 					.where(eq(schema.payment.id, paymentId))
 865 | 					.returning();
 866 | 
 867 | 				return updatedPayment;
 868 | 			});
 869 | 		} catch (error) {
 870 | 			console.error("Error processing payment:", error);
 871 | 			throw new Error("Failed to process payment");
 872 | 		}
 873 | 	});
 874 | 
 875 | export const getTimeLeftForAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 876 | 	.validator(appointmentTimeSchema)
 877 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 878 | 		try {
 879 | 			const { appointmentId } = ctx.data;
 880 | 			const record = await db.query.appointment.findFirst({
 881 | 				with: {
 882 | 					patient: true,
 883 | 					doctor: true,
 884 | 					clinic: true,
 885 | 					service: true
 886 | 				},
 887 | 				where: { id: appointmentId }
 888 | 			});
 889 | 
 890 | 			if (!record?.appointmentDate) {
 891 | 				return "Appointment not found or date missing";
 892 | 			}
 893 | 
 894 | 			const now = new Date();
 895 | 			const appointmentTime = new Date(record.appointmentDate);
 896 | 
 897 | 			const diffMs = appointmentTime.getTime() - now.getTime();
 898 | 			if (diffMs < 0) return "Appointment has already passed";
 899 | 
 900 | 			const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60));
 901 | 			const hours = Math.floor(diffMins / 60);
 902 | 			const mins = diffMins % 60;
 903 | 
 904 | 			if (hours > 0) {
 905 | 				return `${hours} hours and ${mins} minutes remaining`;
 906 | 			}
 907 | 			return `${mins} minutes remaining`;
 908 | 		} catch (error) {
 909 | 			console.error("Error getting time left for appointment:", error);
 910 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get time left");
 911 | 		}
 912 | 	});
 913 |

1214 | 
1215 | export const completeEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1216 | 	.validator(completeEncounterSchema)
1217 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1218 | 		try {
1219 | 			const { medicalRecordId, diagnosisId, notes, followUpDate, prescribedMedications } = ctx.data;
1220 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1221 | 				// Update medical record
1222 | 				const [medicalRecord] = await tx
1223 | 					.update(schema.medicalRecord)
1224 | 					.set({
1225 | 						status: "COMPLETED",
1226 | 						notes,
1227 | 						followUpDate,
1228 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1229 | 					})
1230 | 					.where(eq(schema.medicalRecord.id, medicalRecordId))
1231 | 					.returning();
1232 | 
1233 | 				if (!medicalRecord) {
1234 | 					throw new Error("Medical record not found");
1235 | 				}
1236 | 
1237 | 				// Create prescriptions if provided
1238 | 				const prescriptions = [];
1239 | 				if (prescribedMedications?.length) {
1240 | 					const [prescription] = await tx
1241 | 						.insert(schema.prescription)
1242 | 						.values({
1243 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1244 | 							medicalRecordId: medicalRecord.id,
1245 | 							patientId: medicalRecord.patientId,
1246 | 							doctorId: medicalRecord.doctorId,
1247 | 							clinicId: medicalRecord.clinicId,
1248 | 							encounterId: diagnosisId || "",
1249 | 							status: "active",
1250 | 							issuedDate: new Date(),
1251 | 							createdAt: new Date(),
1252 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
1253 | 						})
1254 | 						.returning();
1255 | 
1256 | 					for (const med of prescribedMedications) {
1257 | 						const [prescribedItem] = await tx
1258 | 							.insert(schema.prescribedItem)
1259 | 							.values({
1260 | 								id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1261 | 								prescriptionId: prescription?.id ?? "",
1262 | 								clinicId: medicalRecord.clinicId,
1263 | 								drugId: med.drugId,
1264 | 								dosageValue: med.dosageValue,
1265 | 								dosageUnit: med.dosageUnit,
1266 | 								frequency: med.frequency,
1267 | 								duration: med.duration,
1268 | 								instructions: med.instructions,
1269 | 								createdAt: new Date(),
1270 | 								updatedAt: new Date()
1271 | 							})
1272 | 							.returning();
1273 | 						prescriptions.push(prescribedItem);
1274 | 					}
1275 | 				}
1276 | 
1277 | 				// Update appointment status
1278 | 				await tx
1279 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
1280 | 					.set({ status: "COMPLETED" })
1281 | 					.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, medicalRecord.appointmentId ??""));
1282 | 
1283 | 				return { medicalRecord, prescriptions };
1284 | 			});
1285 | 		} catch (error) {
1286 | 			console.error("Error completing encounter:", error);
1287 | 			throw new Error("Failed to complete encounter");
1288 | 		}
1289 | 	});
1290 | 
1291 | export const addVitalSignsToMedicalRecord = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1292 | 	.validator(addVitalSignsSchema)
1293 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1294 | 		try {
1295 | 			const { medicalRecordId, vitalSigns } = ctx.data;
1296 | 			const [vitalSign] = await db
1297 | 				.insert(schema.vitalSign)
1298 | 				.values({
1299 | 					...vitalSigns,
1300 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1301 | 					medicalId: medicalRecordId,
1302 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
1303 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
1304 | 				})
1305 | 				.returning();
1306 | 
1307 | 			if (vitalSigns.growthRecordId) {
1308 | 				const growthRec = await db.query.growthRecord.findFirst({
1309 | 					where: {
1310 | 						id: vitalSigns.growthRecordId
1311 | 					}
1312 | 				});
1313 | 
1314 | 				if (growthRec?.weight && growthRec.height) {
1315 | 					const heightNum = Number(growthRec.height);
1316 | 					const weightNum = Number(growthRec.weight);
1317 | 
1318 | 					const bmi = weightNum / (heightNum / 100) ** 2;
1319 | 					const bmiValue = Number.parseFloat(bmi.toFixed(1));
1320 | 
1321 | 					await db
1322 | 						.update(schema.vitalSign)
1323 | 						.set({ notes: `Calculated BMI: ${bmiValue}` })
1324 | 						.where(eq(schema.vitalSign.id, vitalSign?.id ?? ""));
1325 | 
1326 | 					const mr = await db.query.medicalRecord.findFirst({
1327 | 						where: {
1328 | 							id: medicalRecordId
1329 | 						}
1330 | 					});
1331 | 
1332 | 					if (mr) {
1333 | 						await recordGrowthWithPercentiles({
1334 | 							data: {
1335 | 								patientId: mr.patientId,
1336 | 								clinicId: mr.clinicId,
1337 | 								date: new Date(),
1338 | 								weight: weightNum,
1339 | 								height: heightNum,
1340 | 								bmi: bmiValue
1341 | 							}
1342 | 						});
1343 | 					}
1344 | 				}
1345 | 			}
1346 | 
1347 | 			return vitalSign;
1348 | 		} catch (error) {
1349 | 			console.error("Error adding vital signs to medical record:", error);
1350 | 			throw new Error("Failed to add vital signs");
1351 | 		}
1352 | 	});
1353 | 
1354 | export const createCompleteEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1355 | 	.validator(createCompleteEncounterSchema)
1356 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1357 | 		try {
1358 | 			const { medicalRecord, diagnoses, vitalSigns, growthRecord } = ctx.data;
1359 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1360 | 				// 1. Fetch appointment & clinic
1361 | 				const appointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
1362 | 					where: { id: medicalRecord.appointmentId },
1363 | 					columns: { clinicId: true }
1364 | 				});
1365 | 
1366 | 				if (!appointment?.clinicId) throw new Error("Clinic not assigned");
1367 | 
1368 | 				// 2. Complete appointment
1369 | 				await tx
1370 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
1371 | 					.set({ status: "COMPLETED" })
1372 | 					.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, medicalRecord.appointmentId));
1373 | 
1374 | 				// 3. Insert Records
1375 | 				const [record] = await tx
1376 | 					.insert(schema.medicalRecord)
1377 | 					.values({
1378 | 						...medicalRecord,
1379 | 						id: medicalRecord.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1380 | 						clinicId: appointment.clinicId,
1381 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1382 | 						updatedAt: new Date(),
1383 | 						isDeleted: false
1384 | 					})
1385 | 					.returning();
1386 | 
1387 | 				const [diagnosis] = await tx
1388 | 					.insert(schema.diagnosis)
1389 | 					.values({
1390 | 						...diagnoses[0],
1391 | 						id: diagnoses[0]?.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1392 | 						patientId: medicalRecord.patientId,
1393 | 						doctorId: medicalRecord.doctorId,
1394 | 						appointmentId: medicalRecord.appointmentId,
1395 | 						medicalId: record.id,
1396 | 						date: new Date(),
1397 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1398 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1399 | 					})
1400 | 					.returning();
1401 | 
1402 | 				// 4. Conditional Inserts
1403 | 				let vitalSignsResult: typeof schema.vitalSign.$inferSelect | undefined;
1404 | 				if (vitalSigns && vitalSigns.length > 0) {
1405 | 					const [vitalsResult] = await tx
1406 | 						.insert(schema.vitalSign)
1407 | 						.values({
1408 | 							...vitalSigns[0],
1409 | 							id: vitalSigns[0].id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1410 | 							medicalId: record.id,
1411 | 							createdAt: new Date(),
1412 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
1413 | 						})
1414 | 						.returning();
1415 | 					vitalSignsResult = vitalsResult;
1416 | 				}
1417 | 
1418 | 				let growthRecordResult: typeof schema.growthRecord.$inferSelect | undefined;
1419 | 				if (growthRecord && growthRecord.length > 0) {
1420 | 					const [growthResult] = await tx
1421 | 						.insert(schema.growthRecord)
1422 | 						.values({
1423 | 							...growthRecord[0],
1424 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1425 | 							recordedAt: new Date(),
1426 | 							createdAt: new Date(),
1427 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
1428 | 						})
1429 | 						.returning();
1430 | 					growthRecordResult = growthResult;
1431 | 				}
1432 | 
1433 | 				return {
1434 | 					medicalRecord: record,
1435 | 					diagnosis,
1436 | 					vitalSigns: vitalSignsResult,
1437 | 					growthRecord: growthRecordResult
1438 | 				};
1439 | 			});
1440 | 		} catch (error) {
1441 | 			console.error("Error creating complete encounter:", error);
1442 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create complete encounter");
1443 | 		}
1444 | 	});

```

`data/functions/patient.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/patient.repo.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   4 | import { and, asc, count, eq, ilike, inArray, like, or, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   5 | import z from "zod";
   6 | 
   7 | import { db } from "@/db";
   8 | import * as schema from "@/db/schema";
   9 | import type { PatientCreateInput, PatientUpdateInput } from "@/db/zod";
  10 | 
  11 | // =======================
  12 | // Zod Validators
  13 | // =======================
  14 | 
  15 | const patientIdSchema = z.object({
  16 | 	id: z.string().min(1),
  17 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1)
  18 | });
  19 | 
  20 | const clinicIdOnlySchema = z.object({
  21 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1)
  22 | });
  23 | 
  24 | const listPatientsSchema = z.object({
  25 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  26 | 	limit: z.number().min(1).max(100).default(20),
  27 | 	offset: z.number().min(0).default(0),
  28 | 	search: z.string().optional(),
  29 | 	status: z.enum(schema.statusEnum.enumValues).optional(),
  30 | 	isActive: z.boolean().optional(),
  31 | 	gender: z.enum(schema.genderEnum.enumValues).optional(),
  32 | 	bloodGroup: z.enum(schema.bloodGroupEnum.enumValues).optional()
  33 | });
  34 | 
  35 | const createPatientSchema = z.object({
  36 | 	id: z.string().optional(),
  37 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  38 | 	userId: z.string(),
  39 | 	email: z.string().email().optional(),
  40 | 	phone: z.string().optional(),
  41 | 	emergencyContactNumber: z.string().optional(),
  42 | 	firstName: z.string().min(1),
  43 | 	lastName: z.string().min(1),
  44 | 	dateOfBirth: z.date(),
  45 | 	gender: z.enum(schema.genderEnum.enumValues).optional(),
  46 | 	maritalStatus: z.enum(schema.maritalStatusEnum.enumValues).optional(),
  47 | 	nutritionalStatus: z.enum(schema.nutritionalStatusEnum.enumValues).optional(),

  49 | 	emergencyContactName: z.string().optional(),

  51 | 	relation: z.string().optional(),
  52 | 	guardianId: z.string().optional(),
  53 | 	allergies: z.string().optional(),
  54 | 	medicalConditions: z.string().optional(),
  55 | 	medicalHistory: z.string().optional(),
  56 | 	image: z.string().optional(),
  57 | 	colorCode: z.string().optional(),
  58 | 	role: z.enum(schema.roleEnum.enumValues).optional(),
  59 | 	status: z.enum(schema.statusEnum.enumValues).default("ACTIVE"),
  60 | 	isActive: z.boolean().default(true),
  61 | 	bloodGroup: z.enum(schema.bloodGroupEnum.enumValues).optional(),
  62 | 	createdById: z.string().optional(),
  63 | 	updatedById: z.string().optional()
  64 | });

  67 | 
  68 | const bulkUpdateStatusSchema = z.object({
  69 | 	patientIds: z.array(z.string()),
  70 | 	status: z.enum(schema.statusEnum.enumValues)
  71 | });
  72 | 
  73 | const dateRangeSchema = z.object({
  74 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  75 | 	startDate: z.date(),
  76 | 	endDate: z.date()
  77 | });
  78 | 
  79 | const ageRangeSchema = z.object({
  80 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  81 | 	minAgeMonths: z.number(),
  82 | 	maxAgeMonths: z.number()
  83 | });
  84 | 
  85 | const searchSchema = z.object({
  86 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  87 | 	searchTerm: z.string().min(1)
  88 | });
  89 | 
  90 | const patientWithGuardianSchema = z.object({
  91 | 	patientData: createPatientSchema,
  92 | 	guardianData: z
  93 | 		.object({
  94 | 			userId: z.string(),
  95 | 			relation: z.string(),
  96 | 			isPrimary: z.boolean().optional(),
  97 | 			phone: z.string().optional(),
  98 | 			email: z.string().email().optional()
  99 | 		})
 100 | 		.optional()

 102 | 
 103 | // =======================
 104 | // Helper Functions (Server-side only)
 105 | // =======================
 106 | 
 107 | function validatePatientData(data: PatientCreateInput | PatientUpdateInput) {
 108 | 	if (data.email && !data.email.includes("@")) {
 109 | 		return { valid: false, error: "Invalid email address" };
 110 | 	}
 111 | 	if (data.phone && data.phone.length < 5) {
 112 | 		return { valid: false, error: "Phone number too short" };
 113 | 	}
 114 | 	if (data.dateOfBirth && data.dateOfBirth > new Date()) {
 115 | 		return { valid: false, error: "Date of birth cannot be in the future" };
 116 | 	}
 117 | 	return { valid: true };
 118 | }
 119 | 
 120 | // =======================
 121 | // Server Functions
 122 | // =======================
 123 | 
 124 | export const validatePatient = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 125 | 	.validator(z.object({ data: z.any() }))
 126 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 127 | 		return validatePatientData(ctx.data.data);
 128 | 	});

 130 | export const getPatientById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 131 | 	.validator(patientIdSchema)
 132 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 133 | 		try {
 134 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 135 | 			const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 136 | 				where: {
 137 | 					id,
 138 | 					clinicId,
 139 | 					isDeleted: false
 140 | 				},
 141 | 				with: {
 142 | 					user: true,
 143 | 					clinic: true
 144 | 				}
 145 | 			});
 146 | 			return patient;
 147 | 		} catch (error) {
 148 | 			console.error("Error getting patient by ID:", error);
 149 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get patient");
 150 | 		}
 151 | 	});

 153 | export const generateMRN = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 154 | 	.validator(clinicIdOnlySchema)
 155 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 156 | 		try {
 157 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 158 | 			const lastPatient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 159 | 				where: {
 160 | 					clinicId,
 161 | 					isDeleted: false
 162 | 				},
 163 | 				orderBy: (patient, { desc }) => desc(patient.createdAt)
 164 | 			});
 165 | 
 166 | 			if (lastPatient?.mrn) {
 167 | 				const match = lastPatient.mrn.match(/\d/);
 168 | 				if (match) {
 169 | 					const nextNumber = Number.parseInt(match[0], 10);
 170 | 					return `MRN-${nextNumber.toString().padStart(6, "0")}`;
 171 | 				}
 172 | 			}
 173 | 			return "MRN-000001";
 174 | 		} catch (error) {
 175 | 			console.error("Error generating MRN:", error);
 176 | 			throw new Error("Failed to generate MRN");
 177 | 		}
 178 | 	});

 200 | export const getPatientByMRN = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 201 | 	.validator(z.object({ mrn: z.string(), clinicId: z.string() }))
 202 | 	.handler(async ctx => {

 204 | 			const { mrn, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 205 | 			const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 206 | 				where: {
 207 | 					clinicId,
 208 | 					isDeleted: false,
 209 | 					mrn
 210 | 				}
 211 | 			});
 212 | 			return patient;

 216 | 		}

 219 | export const listPatients = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 220 | 	.validator(listPatientsSchema)
 221 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 222 | 		try {
 223 | 			const { clinicId, limit, offset, search, status, isActive, gender, bloodGroup } = ctx.data;
 224 | 
 225 | 			// Start with a dynamic query builder
 226 | 			const baseConditions = and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false));
 227 | 
 228 | 			let query = db
 229 | 				.select()
 230 | 				.from(schema.patient)
 231 | 				.leftJoin(schema.user, eq(schema.patient.userId, schema.user.id))
 232 | 				.where(baseConditions)
 233 | 				.$dynamic(); // Enable dynamic mode
 234 | 
 235 | 			// Add filters dynamically
 236 | 			if (status) {
 237 | 				query = query.where(eq(schema.patient.status, status));
 238 | 			}
 239 | 
 240 | 			if (isActive !== undefined) {
 241 | 				query = query.where(eq(schema.patient.isActive, isActive));
 242 | 			}
 243 | 
 244 | 			if (gender) {
 245 | 				query = query.where(eq(schema.patient.gender, gender));
 246 | 			}
 247 | 
 248 | 			if (bloodGroup) {
 249 | 				query = query.where(eq(schema.patient.bloodGroup, bloodGroup));
 250 | 			}
 251 | 
 252 | 			// Add search with OR condition
 253 | 			if (search) {
 254 | 				query = query.where(
 255 | 					or(
 256 | 						like(schema.patient.mrn, `%${search}%`),
 257 | 						like(schema.patient.firstName, `%${search}%`),
 258 | 						like(schema.patient.lastName, `%${search}%`),
 259 | 						like(schema.patient.email, `%${search}%`),
 260 | 						like(schema.patient.phone, `%${search}%`)
 261 | 					)
 262 | 				);
 263 | 			}
 264 | 
 265 | 			// Add pagination and ordering
 266 | 			query = query.limit(limit).offset(offset).orderBy(asc(schema.patient.lastName));
 267 | 
 268 | 			// Execute the main query
 269 | 			const results = await query;
 270 | 
 271 | 			// Transform joined results to match expected format
 272 | 			const patients = results.map(result => ({
 273 | 				...result.patient,
 274 | 				user: result.user
 275 | 			}));
 276 | 
 277 | 			// Build count query separately (simpler, doesn't need dynamic mode)
 278 | 			const countConditions = [];
 279 | 			countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId));
 280 | 			countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false));
 281 | 
 282 | 			if (status) countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.status, status));
 283 | 			if (isActive !== undefined) countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.isActive, isActive));
 284 | 			if (gender) countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.gender, gender));
 285 | 			if (bloodGroup) countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.bloodGroup, bloodGroup));
 286 | 
 287 | 			if (search) {
 288 | 				countConditions.push(
 289 | 					or(
 290 | 						like(schema.patient.mrn, `%${search}%`),
 291 | 						like(schema.patient.firstName, `%${search}%`),
 292 | 						like(schema.patient.lastName, `%${search}%`),
 293 | 						like(schema.patient.email, `%${search}%`),
 294 | 						like(schema.patient.phone, `%${search}%`)
 295 | 					)
 296 | 				);
 297 | 			}
 298 | 
 299 | 			const totalResult = await db
 300 | 				.select({ count: count() })
 301 | 				.from(schema.patient)
 302 | 				.where(and(...countConditions));
 303 | 
 304 | 			return {
 305 | 				patients,
 306 | 				total: Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0)
 307 | 			};
 308 | 		} catch (error) {
 309 | 			console.error("Error listing patients:", error);
 310 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list patients");
 311 | 		}
 312 | 	});
 313 | export const createPatient = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 314 | 	.validator(createPatientSchema)
 315 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 316 | 		try {
 317 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 318 | 			const now = new Date();
 319 | 
 320 | 			const [result] = await db
 321 | 				.insert(schema.patient)
 322 | 				.values({
 323 | 					id: data.id || crypto.randomUUID(),
 324 | 					...data,
 325 | 					createdAt: now,
 326 | 					updatedAt: now
 327 | 				})
 328 | 				.returning();
 329 | 
 330 | 			return result;
 331 | 		} catch (error) {
 332 | 			console.error("Error creating patient:", error);
 333 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create patient");
 334 | 		}
 335 | 	});

 337 | export const updatePatient = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 338 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string(), data: updatePatientSchema }))
 339 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 340 | 		try {
 341 | 			const { id, data } = ctx.data;
 342 | 			const [result] = await db
 343 | 				.update(schema.patient)
 344 | 				.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 345 | 				.where(eq(schema.patient.id, id))
 346 | 				.returning();
 347 | 
 348 | 			if (!result) {
 349 | 				throw new Error("Patient not found");
 350 | 			}
 351 | 			return result;
 352 | 		} catch (error) {
 353 | 			console.error("Error updating patient:", error);
 354 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update patient");
 355 | 		}
 356 | 	});

 358 | export const softDeletePatient = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 359 | 	.validator(patientIdSchema)
 360 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 361 | 		try {
 362 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 363 | 			const [result] = await db
 364 | 				.update(schema.patient)
 365 | 				.set({ deletedAt: new Date(), isDeleted: true })
 366 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.patient.id, id), eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId)))
 367 | 				.returning();
 368 | 
 369 | 			if (!result) {
 370 | 				throw new Error("Patient not found");
 371 | 			}
 372 | 			return result;
 373 | 		} catch (error) {
 374 | 			console.error("Error deleting patient:", error);
 375 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete patient");
 376 | 		}
 377 | 	});

 379 | export const bulkUpdatePatientStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 380 | 	.validator(bulkUpdateStatusSchema)
 381 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 382 | 		try {
 383 | 			const { patientIds, status } = ctx.data;
 384 | 			const updateData = { status, updatedAt: new Date(), isActive: false };
 385 | 			if (status === "INACTIVE") {
 386 | 				updateData.isActive = false;
 387 | 			}
 388 | 
 389 | 			const result = await db
 390 | 				.update(schema.patient)
 391 | 				.set(updateData)
 392 | 				.where(inArray(schema.patient.id, patientIds))
 393 | 				.returning();
 394 | 
 395 | 			return result;
 396 | 		} catch (error) {
 397 | 			console.error("Error bulk updating patient status:", error);
 398 | 			throw new Error("Failed to bulk update patient status");
 399 | 		}
 400 | 	});
```
