```ts
 402 | export const getPatientWithFullHistory = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 403 | 	.validator(patientIdSchema)
 404 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 405 | 		try {
 406 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 407 | 			const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 408 | 				where: { id, clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 409 | 
 410 | 				with: {
 411 | 					user: true,
 412 | 					clinic: true,
 413 | 					guardians: {
 414 | 						with: { user: true }
 415 | 					},
 416 | 					appointments: {
 417 | 						where: { isDeleted: false },
 418 | 						with: { doctor: true, service: true },
 419 | 						orderBy: (appointment, { desc }) => desc(appointment.appointmentDate)
 420 | 					},
 421 | 					medicalRecords: {
 422 | 						with: {
 423 | 							doctor: true,
 424 | 							appointment: true,
 425 | 							vitalSigns: true,
 426 | 							prescriptions: {
 427 | 								with: {
 428 | 									prescribedItems: {
 429 | 										with: { drug: true }
 430 | 									}
 431 | 								}
 432 | 							}
 433 | 						},
 434 | 						orderBy: (record, { desc }) => desc(record.createdAt)
 435 | 					},
 436 | 					vitalSigns: {
 437 | 						orderBy: (vs, { desc }) => desc(vs.recordedAt),
 438 | 						limit: 10
 439 | 					},
 440 | 					growthRecords: {
 441 | 						orderBy: (gr, { desc }) => desc(gr.date)
 442 | 					},
 443 | 					immunizations: {
 444 | 						with: { administeredBy: true },
 445 | 						orderBy: (imm, { desc }) => desc(imm.date)
 446 | 					},
 447 | 					labTests: {
 448 | 						with: { service: true },
 449 | 						orderBy: (lab, { desc }) => desc(lab.testDate)
 450 | 					},
 451 | 					prescriptions: {
 452 | 						with: {
 453 | 							doctor: true,
 454 | 							prescribedItems: {
 455 | 								with: { drug: true }
 456 | 							}
 457 | 						},
 458 | 						orderBy: (pres, { desc }) => desc(pres.issuedDate)
 459 | 					},
 460 | 					payments: {
 461 | 						orderBy: (payment, { desc }) => desc(payment.paymentDate)
 462 | 					},
 463 | 					feedingLogs: {
 464 | 						orderBy: (log, { desc }) => desc(log.date)
 465 | 					},
 466 | 					developmentalChecks: {
 467 | 						orderBy: (check, { desc }) => desc(check.checkDate)
 468 | 					}
 469 | 				}
 470 | 			});
 471 | 
 472 | 			return patient;
 473 | 		} catch (error) {
 474 | 			console.error("Error getting patient full history:", error);
 475 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get patient history");
 476 | 		}

 479 | export const getPatientUpcomingAppointments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 480 | 	.validator(patientIdSchema)
 481 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 482 | 		try {
 483 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 484 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 485 | 				where: {
 486 | 					patientId: id,
 487 | 					clinicId: clinicId,
 488 | 					isDeleted: false,
 489 | 					appointmentDate: {
 490 | 						gte: new Date()
 491 | 					},
 492 | 					status: {
 493 | 						notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]
 494 | 					}
 495 | 				},
 496 | 				with: { doctor: true, service: true, clinic: true },
 497 | 				orderBy: (appointment, { asc }) => asc(appointment.appointmentDate)
 498 | 			});
 499 | 
 500 | 			return appointments;
 501 | 		} catch (error) {
 502 | 			console.error("Error getting upcoming appointments:", error);
 503 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get upcoming appointments");
 504 | 		}
 505 | 	});
 506 | 
 507 | export const getPatientStats = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 508 | 	.validator(z.object({ patientId: z.string() }))
 509 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 510 | 		try {
 511 | 			const { patientId } = ctx.data;
 512 | 
 513 | 			// Appointment stats using SQLite
 514 | 			const appointmentStats = await db
 515 | 				.select({
 516 | 					total: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)`,
 517 | 					completed: sql<number>`CAST(sum(CASE WHEN ${schema.appointment.status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)`,
 518 | 					cancelled: sql<number>`CAST(sum(CASE WHEN ${schema.appointment.status} = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)`,
 519 | 					lastVisit: sql<Date | null>`max(CASE WHEN ${schema.appointment.status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} ELSE NULL END)`,
 520 | 					nextAppointment: sql<Date | null>`min(CASE WHEN ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND ${schema.appointment.status} NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'COMPLETED') THEN ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} ELSE NULL END)`
 521 | 				})
 522 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 523 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.patientId, patientId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)));
 524 | 
 525 | 			// Payment stats
 526 | 			const paymentStats = await db
 527 | 				.select({
 528 | 					total: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)`,
 529 | 					paidAmount: sql<number>`COALESCE(CAST(sum(${schema.payment.amountPaid}) AS INTEGER), 0)`,
 530 | 					totalAmount: sql<number>`COALESCE(CAST(sum(${schema.payment.totalAmount}) AS INTEGER), 0)`
 531 | 				})
 532 | 				.from(schema.payment)
 533 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.payment.patientId, patientId), eq(schema.payment.isDeleted, false)));
 534 | 
 535 | 			// Prescription stats
 536 | 			const prescriptionStats = await db
 537 | 				.select({
 538 | 					total: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)`,
 539 | 					active: sql<number>`CAST(sum(CASE WHEN ${schema.prescription.status} = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)`
 540 | 				})
 541 | 				.from(schema.prescription)
 542 | 				.where(eq(schema.prescription.patientId, patientId));
 543 | 
 544 | 			// Immunization count
 545 | 			const immunizationCount = await db
 546 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 547 | 				.from(schema.immunization)
 548 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.immunization.patientId, patientId), eq(schema.immunization.isDeleted, false)));
 549 | 
 550 | 			const stats = appointmentStats[0];
 551 | 			const payments = paymentStats[0];
 552 | 			const prescriptions = prescriptionStats[0];
 553 | 			const immunizations = immunizationCount[0];
 554 | 
 555 | 			return {
 556 | 				totalAppointments: stats?.total ?? 0,
 557 | 				completedAppointments: stats?.completed ?? 0,
 558 | 				cancelledAppointments: stats?.cancelled ?? 0,
 559 | 				totalPayments: payments?.total ?? 0,
 560 | 				paidAmount: payments?.paidAmount ?? 0,
 561 | 				dueAmount: (payments?.totalAmount ?? 0) - (payments?.paidAmount ?? 0),
 562 | 				totalPrescriptions: prescriptions?.total ?? 0,
 563 | 				activePrescriptions: prescriptions?.active ?? 0,
 564 | 				totalImmunizations: immunizations?.count ?? 0,
 565 | 				lastVisit: stats?.lastVisit ?? null,
 566 | 				nextAppointment: stats?.nextAppointment ?? null
 567 | 			};
 568 | 		} catch (error) {
 569 | 			console.error("Error getting patient stats:", error);
 570 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get patient stats");
 571 | 		}
 572 | 	});
 573 |

 643 | export const getPatientsByAgeRange = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 644 | 	.validator(ageRangeSchema)
 645 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 646 | 		try {
 647 | 			const { clinicId, minAgeMonths, maxAgeMonths } = ctx.data;

 649 | 			minDate.setMonth(minDate.getMonth() - maxAgeMonths);
 650 | 			const maxDate = new Date();
 651 | 			maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() - minAgeMonths);
 652 | 
 653 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 654 | 				where: {
 655 | 					clinicId,
 656 | 					isDeleted: false,
 657 | 					dateOfBirth: {

 659 | 						lte: maxDate
 660 | 					}
 661 | 				},
 662 | 				with: {
 663 | 					user: true,
 664 | 					guardians: true
 665 | 				},
 666 | 				orderBy: (patient, { desc }) => desc(patient.dateOfBirth)
 667 | 			});

 675 | export const getPatientsWithAppointmentsThisWeek = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 676 | 	.validator(clinicIdOnlySchema)
 677 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 678 | 		try {
 679 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 680 | 			const startOfWeek = new Date();
 681 | 			startOfWeek.setDate(startOfWeek.getDate() - startOfWeek.getDay());
 682 | 			startOfWeek.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 683 | 
 684 | 			const endOfWeek = new Date(startOfWeek);
 685 | 			endOfWeek.setDate(endOfWeek.getDate());
 686 | 
 687 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 688 | 				where: {
 689 | 					clinicId,
 690 | 					isDeleted: false,
 691 | 					status: "CONFIRMED",
 692 | 					appointmentDate: {
 693 | 						gte: startOfWeek,
 694 | 						lte: endOfWeek
 695 | 					}
 696 | 				},
 697 | 				with: {
 698 | 					patient: {
 699 | 						with: {
 700 | 							guardians: true
 701 | 						}
 702 | 					},
 703 | 					doctor: true
 704 | 				},
 705 | 				orderBy: (appointment, { asc }) => asc(appointment.appointmentDate)
 706 | 			});
 707 | 			return appointments;
 708 | 		} catch (error) {
 709 | 			console.error("Error getting weekly appointments:", error);
 710 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get weekly appointments");
 711 | 		}
 712 | 	});

 714 | export const getPatientGrowthPercentiles = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 715 | 	.validator(patientIdSchema)
 716 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 717 | 		try {
 718 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 719 | 			const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 720 | 				where: { id, clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 721 | 
 722 | 				with: {
 723 | 					growthRecords: {
 724 | 						orderBy: (record, { asc }) => asc(record.date)
 725 | 					}
 726 | 				}
 727 | 			});
 728 | 
 729 | 			if (!patient?.growthRecords.length) {
 730 | 				return null;
 731 | 			}
 732 | 
 733 | 			const whoStandards = await db.query.whoGrowthStandard.findMany({
 734 | 				where: { gender: patient.gender as "MALE" | "FEMALE", measurementType: "BMI" }
 735 | 			});
 736 | 
 737 | 			// Calculate percentiles for each growth record
 738 | 			const growthWithPercentiles = patient.growthRecords.map(record => {
 739 | 				const standard = whoStandards.find(s => Math.abs(s.ageDays - (record.ageDays ?? 0)) <= 30);
 740 | 
 741 | 				let percentile = null;
 742 | 				if (standard && record.bmi) {
 743 | 					// Simple percentile calculation (simplified)
 744 | 					if (record.bmi <= standard.sd3neg) percentile = 1;
 745 | 					else if (record.bmi <= standard.sd2neg) percentile = 2;
 746 | 					else if (record.bmi <= standard.sd1neg) percentile = 5;
 747 | 					else if (record.bmi >= standard.sd3pos) percentile = 99;
 748 | 					else if (record.bmi >= standard.sd2pos) percentile = 97;
 749 | 					else if (record.bmi >= standard.sd1pos) percentile = 85;
 750 | 					else percentile = 50;
 751 | 				}
 752 | 
 753 | 				return { ...record, percentile };
 754 | 			});
 755 | 
 756 | 			return growthWithPercentiles;
 757 | 		} catch (error) {
 758 | 			console.error("Error calculating growth percentiles:", error);
 759 | 			throw new Error("Failed to calculate growth percentiles");
 760 | 		}
 761 | 	});
 762 |

 961 | export const createPatientWithGuardian = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 962 | 	.validator(patientWithGuardianSchema)
 963 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 964 | 		try {
 965 | 			const { patientData, guardianData } = ctx.data;
 966 | 			const now = new Date();
 967 | 
 968 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
 969 | 				// Create patient
 970 | 				const [patient] = await tx
 971 | 					.insert(schema.patient)
 972 | 					.values({
 973 | 						id: patientData.id || crypto.randomUUID(),
 974 | 						...patientData,
 975 | 						createdAt: now,
 976 | 						updatedAt: now
 977 | 					})
 978 | 					.returning();
 979 | 
 980 | 				// Create guardian if provided
 981 | 				if (guardianData && patient) {
 982 | 					await tx.insert(schema.guardian).values({
 983 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 984 | 						patientId: patient.id,
 985 | 						...guardianData,
 986 | 						isPrimary: guardianData.isPrimary ?? false
 987 | 					});
 988 | 				}
 989 | 
 990 | 				// Create initial growth record if age appropriate
 991 | 				if (patient?.dateOfBirth) {
 992 | 					const ageInDays = Math.floor((Date.now() - patient.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 993 | 
 994 | 					if (ageInDays <= 730) {
 995 | 						// First 2 years
 996 | 						await tx.insert(schema.growthRecord).values({
 997 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 998 | 							patientId: patient.id,
 999 | 							clinicId: patient.clinicId,
1000 | 							date: new Date(),
1001 | 							ageDays: ageInDays,
1002 | 							ageMonths: Math.floor(ageInDays / 30),
1003 | 							gender: patient.gender as schema.Gender,
1004 | 							recordedAt: new Date(),
1005 | 							createdAt: now,
1006 | 							updatedAt: now
1007 | 						});
1008 | 					}
1009 | 				}
1010 | 
1011 | 				return patient;
1012 | 			});
1013 | 
1014 | 			return result;
1015 | 		} catch (error) {
1016 | 			console.error("Error creating patient with guardian:", error);
1017 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create patient with guardian");
1018 | 		}
1019 | 	});

1038 | export const updateManyGuardians = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1039 | 	.validator(z.object({ ids: z.array(z.string()), data: z.any() }))
1040 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1041 | 		try {
1042 | 			const { ids, data } = ctx.data;
1043 | 			const result = await db
1044 | 				.update(schema.guardian)
1045 | 				.set(data)
1046 | 				.where(inArray(schema.guardian.id, ids))
1047 | 				.returning();
1048 | 			return result;
1049 | 		} catch (error) {
1050 | 			console.error("Error updating multiple guardians:", error);
1051 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update guardians");
1052 | 		}
1053 | 	});

1055 | export const deleteGuardian = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1056 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string() }))
1057 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1058 | 		try {
1059 | 			const { id } = ctx.data;
1060 | 			const [result] = await db.delete(schema.guardian).where(eq(schema.guardian.id, id)).returning();
1061 | 
1062 | 			if (!result) {
1063 | 				throw new Error("Guardian not found");
1064 | 			}
1065 | 			return result;
1066 | 		} catch (error) {
1067 | 			console.error("Error deleting guardian:", error);
1068 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete guardian");
1069 | 		}

1072 | export const getPatientsInDateRange = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1073 | 	.validator(dateRangeSchema)
1074 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1075 | 		try {
1076 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
1077 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
1078 | 				where: {
1079 | 					clinicId,
1080 | 					isDeleted: false,
1081 | 					createdAt: {
1082 | 						gte: startDate,
1083 | 						lte: endDate
1084 | 					}
1085 | 				},
1086 | 				columns: { createdAt: true, id: true }
1087 | 			});
1088 | 			return patients;
1089 | 		} catch (error) {
1090 | 			console.error("Error getting patients in date range:", error);
1091 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get patients");
1092 | 		}
1093 | 	});
1094 | // Add to functions/patient.ts
1095 | export const getPatientsCount = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
1096 | 	.validator(
1097 | 		z.object({
1098 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
1099 | 			search: z.string().optional(),
1100 | 			status: z.enum(schema.statusEnum.enumValues).optional()
1101 | 		})
1102 | 	)
1103 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
1104 | 		try {
1105 | 			const { clinicId, search, status } = data;
1106 | 
1107 | 			const conditions = [eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false)];
1108 | 
1109 | 			if (search?.trim()) {
1110 | 				const searchCondition = or(
1111 | 					ilike(schema.patient.mrn, `%${search}%`),
1112 | 					ilike(schema.patient.firstName, `%${search}%`),
1113 | 					ilike(schema.patient.lastName, `%${search}%`),
1114 | 					ilike(schema.patient.email, `%${search}%`),
1115 | 					ilike(schema.patient.phone, `%${search}%`)
1116 | 				);
1117 | 
1118 | 				if (searchCondition) {
1119 | 					conditions.push(searchCondition);
1120 | 				}
1121 | 			}
1122 | 
1123 | 			if (status && (status as string) !== "all") {
1124 | 				conditions.push(eq(schema.patient.status, status));
1125 | 			}
1126 | 
1127 | 			const [{ count: total }] = await db
1128 | 				.select({
1129 | 					count: count()
1130 | 				})
1131 | 				.from(schema.patient)
1132 | 				.where(and(...conditions));
1133 | 
1134 | 			return {
1135 | 				count: Number(total)
1136 | 			};
1137 | 		} catch (error) {
1138 | 			console.error("Error counting patients:", error);
1139 | 			throw new Error("Failed to count patients");
1140 | 		}
1141 | 	});

```

```ts
 137 | const getPatientGrowthRecords = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 138 | 	.validator(patientClinicSchema)
 139 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 140 | 		try {
 141 | 			const { patientId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 142 | 			const records = await db.query.growthRecord.findMany({
 143 | 				where: {
 144 | 					patientId: patientId,
 145 | 					clinicId: clinicId
 146 | 				},
 147 | 				orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 148 | 			});
 149 | 			return records;
 150 | 		} catch (error) {
 151 | 			console.error("Error getting growth records:", error);
 152 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get growth records");
 153 | 		}
 154 | 	});

 156 | const listGrowthRecords = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 157 | 	.validator(growthRecordListSchema)
 158 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 159 | 		try {
 160 | 			const { clinicId, patientId, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 161 | 
 162 | 			// Build where object dynamically
 163 | 			const where = { clinicId: clinicId, patientId };
 164 | 			if (patientId) {
 165 | 				where.patientId = patientId;
 166 | 			}
 167 | 
 168 | 			const [records, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 169 | 				db.query.growthRecord.findMany({
 170 | 					where,
 171 | 					limit,
 172 | 					offset,
 173 | 					orderBy: { date: "desc" }
 174 | 				}),
 175 | 				db
 176 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 177 | 					.from(schema.growthRecord)
 178 | 					.where(
 179 | 						patientId
 180 | 							? sql`${schema.growthRecord.clinicId} = ${clinicId} AND ${schema.growthRecord.patientId} = ${patientId}`
 181 | 							: sql`${schema.growthRecord.clinicId} = ${clinicId}`
 182 | 					)
 183 | 			]);
 184 | 
 185 | 			return {
 186 | 				records,
 187 | 				total: Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0)
 188 | 			};
 189 | 		} catch (error) {
 190 | 			console.error("Error listing growth records:", error);
 191 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list growth records");
 192 | 		}
 193 | 	});

 195 | const getGrowthRecordById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })

 214 | const listFeedingLogs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 215 | 	.validator(feedingLogFiltersSchema)
 216 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 217 | 		try {
 218 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, startDate, endDate, type, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 219 | 
 220 | 			// Build where object with operators
 221 | 			const where = {
 222 | 				patientId: patientId,
 223 | 				type,
 224 | 				clinicId,
 225 | 				date: {
 226 | 					lte: endDate,
 227 | 					gte: startDate
 228 | 				}
 229 | 			};
 230 | 
 231 | 			if (startDate) {
 232 | 				where.date = { ...where.date, gte: startDate };
 233 | 			}
 234 | 			if (endDate) {
 235 | 				where.date = { ...where.date, lte: endDate };
 236 | 			}
 237 | 			if (type) {
 238 | 				where.type = type;
 239 | 			}
 240 | 
 241 | 			const logs = await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 242 | 				where,
 243 | 				orderBy: { date: "desc" },
 244 | 				limit,
 245 | 				offset
 246 | 			});
 247 | 
 248 | 			// For counting, use raw SQL or keep using the query builder
 249 | 			const totalResult = await db
 250 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 251 | 				.from(schema.feedingLog)
 252 | 				.where(
 253 | 					and(
 254 | 						eq(schema.feedingLog.patientId, patientId),
 255 | 						startDate ? gte(schema.feedingLog.date, startDate) : undefined,
 256 | 						endDate ? lte(schema.feedingLog.date, endDate) : undefined,
 257 | 						type ? eq(schema.feedingLog.type, type) : undefined
 258 | 					)
 259 | 				);
 260 | 
 261 | 			const total = Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0);
 262 | 
 263 | 			return {
 264 | 				logs,
 265 | 				total,
 266 | 				hasMore: offset + limit < total
 267 | 			};
 268 | 		} catch (error) {
 269 | 			console.error("Error listing feeding logs:", error);
 270 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list feeding logs");
 271 | 		}
 272 | 	});
 273 | 
 274 | const getFeedingStats = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 275 | 	.validator(feedingStatsSchema)
 276 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 277 | 		try {
 278 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, days } = ctx.data;
 279 | 			const endDate = new Date();
 280 | 			const startDate = new Date();
 281 | 			startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - days);
 282 | 
 283 | 			const logs = await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 284 | 				where: {
 285 | 					patientId: patientId,
 286 | 					clinicId,
 287 | 					date: {
 288 | 						gt: startDate,
 289 | 						lt: endDate
 290 | 					}
 291 | 				},
 292 | 				orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 293 | 			});
 294 | 
 295 | 			// Rest of the function remains the same...
 296 | 			const byType: Record<string, number> = {};
 297 | 			let totalDuration = 0;
 298 | 			let totalAmount = 0;
 299 | 			const feedingsByDayMap: Record<string, { count: number; totalDuration: number; totalAmount: number }> = {};
 300 | 
 301 | 			for (const log of logs) {
 302 | 				byType[log.type] = (byType[log.type] || 0) + 1;
 303 | 				totalDuration += log.duration || 0;
 304 | 				totalAmount += log.amount || 0;
 305 | 
 306 | 				const dateKey = log.date.toISOString().split("T")[0] ?? "";
 307 | 				if (!feedingsByDayMap[dateKey]) {
 308 | 					feedingsByDayMap[dateKey] = { count: 0, totalDuration: 0, totalAmount: 0 };
 309 | 				}
 310 | 				feedingsByDayMap[dateKey].count++;
 311 | 				feedingsByDayMap[dateKey].totalDuration += log.duration || 0;
 312 | 				feedingsByDayMap[dateKey].totalAmount += log.amount || 0;
 313 | 			}
 314 | 
 315 | 			const averageDuration = logs.length > 0 ? totalDuration / logs.length : 0;
 316 | 
 317 | 			return {
 318 | 				totalFeedings: logs.length,
 319 | 				byType,
 320 | 				averageDuration,
 321 | 				totalAmount,
 322 | 				feedingsByDay: Object.entries(feedingsByDayMap)
 323 | 					.map(([date, stats]) => ({
 324 | 						date,
 325 | 						count: stats.count,
 326 | 						totalDuration: stats.totalDuration,
 327 | 						totalAmount: stats.totalAmount
 328 | 					}))
 329 | 					.sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date))
 330 | 			};
 331 | 		} catch (error) {
 332 | 			console.error("Error getting feeding stats:", error);
 333 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get feeding stats");
 334 | 		}
 335 | 	});
 336 | 
 337 | const getBreastfeedingStats = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 338 | 	.validator(feedingStatsSchema)
 339 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 340 | 		try {
 341 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, days } = ctx.data;
 342 | 			const endDate = new Date();
 343 | 			const startDate = new Date();
 344 | 			startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - days);
 345 | 
 346 | 			const logs = await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 347 | 				where: {
 348 | 					patientId: patientId,
 349 | 					clinicId,
 350 | 					type: "BREAST",
 351 | 					date: {
 352 | 						lt: startDate,
 353 | 						gt: endDate
 354 | 					}
 355 | 				},
 356 | 				orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 357 | 			});
 358 | 
 359 | 			// Rest of the function remains the same...
 360 | 			const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0] ?? "";
 361 | 			const todayFeedings = logs.filter(log => log.date.toISOString().split("T")[0] === today);
 362 | 			const todayTotal = todayFeedings.length;
 363 | 
 364 | 			const weeklyDataMap: Record<
 365 | 				string,
 366 | 				{ duration: number; count: number; leftDuration: number; rightDuration: number }
 367 | 			> = {};
 368 | 
 369 | 			for (const log of logs) {
 370 | 				const dateKey = log.date.toISOString().split("T")[0] ?? "";
 371 | 				if (!weeklyDataMap[dateKey]) {
 372 | 					weeklyDataMap[dateKey] = { duration: 0, count: 0, leftDuration: 0, rightDuration: 0 };
 373 | 				}
 374 | 				weeklyDataMap[dateKey].duration += log.duration || 0;
 375 | 				weeklyDataMap[dateKey].count++;
 376 | 				if (log.breast === "LEFT") weeklyDataMap[dateKey].leftDuration += log.duration || 0;
 377 | 				if (log.breast === "RIGHT") weeklyDataMap[dateKey].rightDuration += log.duration || 0;
 378 | 				if (log.breast === "BOTH") {
 379 | 					weeklyDataMap[dateKey].leftDuration += (log.duration || 0) / 2;
 380 | 					weeklyDataMap[dateKey].rightDuration += (log.duration || 0) / 2;
 381 | 				}
 382 | 			}
 383 | 
 384 | 			const weeklyData = Object.entries(weeklyDataMap)
 385 | 				.map(([date, stats]) => ({
 386 | 					date,
 387 | 					duration: stats.duration,
 388 | 					count: stats.count,
 389 | 					leftDuration: stats.leftDuration,
 390 | 					rightDuration: stats.rightDuration
 391 | 				}))
 392 | 				.sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date))
 393 | 				.slice(-7);
 394 | 
 395 | 			const totalDuration = logs.reduce((sum, log) => sum + (log.duration || 0), 0);
 396 | 			const averageDuration = logs.length > 0 ? totalDuration / logs.length : 0;
 397 | 
 398 | 			const last7Days = weeklyData.slice(-7);
 399 | 			const weeklyAverage =
 400 | 				last7Days.length > 0 ? last7Days.reduce((sum, day) => sum + day.count, 0) / last7Days.length : 0;
 401 | 
 402 | 			const sessionsByTimeOfDay = { morning: 0, afternoon: 0, evening: 0, night: 0 };
 403 | 			let leftPreference = 0;
 404 | 			let rightPreference = 0;
 405 | 			let bothPreference = 0;
 406 | 
 407 | 			for (const log of logs) {
 408 | 				const hour = log.date.getHours();
 409 | 				if (hour >= 6 && hour < 12) sessionsByTimeOfDay.morning++;
 410 | 				else if (hour >= 12 && hour < 17) sessionsByTimeOfDay.afternoon++;
 411 | 				else if (hour >= 17 && hour < 21) sessionsByTimeOfDay.evening++;
 412 | 				else sessionsByTimeOfDay.night++;
 413 | 
 414 | 				if (log.breast === "LEFT") leftPreference++;
 415 | 				else if (log.breast === "RIGHT") rightPreference++;
 416 | 				else if (log.breast === "BOTH") bothPreference++;
 417 | 			}
 418 | 
 419 | 			const totalFeedings = logs.length;
 420 | 			const breastPreference = {
 421 | 				left: totalFeedings > 0 ? (leftPreference / totalFeedings) * 100 : 0,
 422 | 				right: totalFeedings > 0 ? (rightPreference / totalFeedings) * 100 : 0,
 423 | 				both: totalFeedings > 0 ? (bothPreference / totalFeedings) * 100 : 0
 424 | 			};
 425 | 
 426 | 			return {
 427 | 				todayTotal,
 428 | 				weeklyAverage: Math.round(weeklyAverage * 10) / 10,
 429 | 				totalSessions: logs.length,
 430 | 				averageDuration: Math.round(averageDuration * 10) / 10,
 431 | 				weeklyData,
 432 | 				sessionsByTimeOfDay,
 433 | 				breastPreference
 434 | 			};
 435 | 		} catch (error) {
 436 | 			console.error("Error getting breastfeeding stats:", error);
 437 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get breastfeeding stats");
 438 | 		}
 439 | 	});
 440 | 
 441 | const getFeedingsByDateRange = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 442 | 	.validator(z.object({ patientId: z.string(), clinicId: z.string(), startDate: z.date(), endDate: z.date() }))
 443 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 444 | 		try {
 445 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;

 451 | 						gt: startDate,

 456 | 			});

 480 | const addMeasurementPoint = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 481 | 	.validator(addMeasurementSchema)
 482 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 483 | 		try {
 484 | 			const { patientId, date, weight, height, headCircumference, notes, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 485 | 			const result = await db
 486 | 				.insert(schema.growthRecord)
 487 | 				.values({
 488 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 489 | 					patientId,
 490 | 					clinicId,
 491 | 					date,
 492 | 					weight,
 493 | 					height,
 494 | 					headCircumference,
 495 | 					notes,
 496 | 					recordedAt: new Date(),
 497 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 498 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 499 | 				})
 500 | 				.returning();
 501 | 			return result;
 502 | 		} catch (error) {
 503 | 			console.error("Error adding measurement:", error);
 504 | 			throw new Error("Failed to add measurement");
 505 | 		}
 506 | 	});
 507 | 
 508 | const getGrowthAnalytics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 509 | 	.validator(patientClinicSchema)
 510 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 511 | 		try {
 512 | 			const { patientId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 513 | 			const records = await getPatientGrowthRecords({ data: { patientId, clinicId } });
 514 | 
 515 | 			if (!records || records.length < 2) return { velocity: null, records: records || [] };
 516 | 
 517 | 			const first = records[0];
 518 | 			const last = records[records.length - 1];
 519 | 			if (!first || !last) {
 520 | 				return { velocity: null, records };
 521 | 			}
 522 | 
 523 | 			const monthsDiff = (last.date.getTime() - first.date.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30.44);
 524 | 			const weightVelocity =
 525 | 				monthsDiff > 0 ? (Number(last.weight ?? 0) - Number(first.weight ?? 0)) / monthsDiff : 0;
 526 | 			const heightVelocity =
 527 | 				monthsDiff > 0 ? (Number(last.height ?? 0) - Number(first.height ?? 0)) / monthsDiff : 0;
 528 | 
 529 | 			return {
 530 | 				records,
 531 | 				velocity: {
 532 | 					weightKgPerMonth: weightVelocity.toFixed(2),
 533 | 					heightCmPerMonth: heightVelocity.toFixed(2)
 534 | 				}
 535 | 			};
 536 | 		} catch (error) {
 537 | 			console.error("Error calculating growth analytics:", error);
 538 | 			throw new Error("Failed to calculate growth analytics");
 539 | 		}
 540 | 	});
 541 |

 557 | const getDevelopmentalProgress = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 558 | 	.validator(z.object({ patientId: z.string() }))
 559 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 560 | 		try {
 561 | 			const { patientId } = ctx.data;
 562 | 			const [milestones, checks] = await Promise.all([
 563 | 				db.query.developmentalMilestones.findMany({
 564 | 					where: { patientId },
 565 | 					orderBy: (m, { asc }) => asc(m.dateRecorded)
 566 | 				}),
 567 | 				db.query.developmentalCheck.findMany({
 568 | 					where: { patientId },
 569 | 					orderBy: (c, { asc }) => asc(c.checkDate)
 570 | 				})
 571 | 			]);
 572 | 
 573 | 			const milestonesByAge: Record<string, typeof milestones> = {};
 574 | 			for (const milestone of milestones) {
 575 | 				if (!milestonesByAge[milestone.ageAchieved]) {
 576 | 					milestonesByAge[milestone.ageAchieved] = [];
 577 | 				}
 578 | 				milestonesByAge[milestone.ageAchieved]?.push(milestone);
 579 | 			}
 580 | 
 581 | 			return {
 582 | 				milestones: milestonesByAge,
 583 | 				developmentalChecks: checks,
 584 | 				totalMilestonesAchieved: milestones.length,
 585 | 				lastCheckup: checks[checks.length - 1]
 586 | 			};
 587 | 		} catch (error) {
 588 | 			console.error("Error getting developmental progress:", error);
 589 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get developmental progress");
 590 | 		}
 591 | 	});

 643 | const listImmunizations = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 644 | 	.validator(immunizationListSchema)
 645 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 646 | 		try {
 647 | 			const { limit, offset, patientId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 648 | 
 649 | 			const whereConditions = [eq(schema.immunization.isDeleted, false)];
 650 | 			if (clinicId) whereConditions.push(eq(schema.immunization.clinicId, clinicId));
 651 | 			if (patientId) whereConditions.push(eq(schema.immunization.patientId, patientId));
 652 | 
 653 | 			const [records, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 654 | 				db.query.immunization.findMany({
 655 | 					where: { isDeleted: false, clinicId, patientId },
 656 | 					limit,
 657 | 					offset,
 658 | 					orderBy: (imm, { desc }) => desc(imm.date)
 659 | 				}),
 660 | 				db
 661 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 662 | 					.from(schema.immunization)
 663 | 					.where(and(...whereConditions))
 664 | 			]);
 665 | 
 666 | 			return {
 667 | 				records,
 668 | 				total: Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0)
 669 | 			};
 670 | 		} catch (error) {
 671 | 			console.error("Error listing immunizations:", error);
 672 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list immunizations");
 673 | 		}

 676 | const getPatientVaccineSchedule = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 677 | 	.validator(z.object({ patientId: z.string() }))
 678 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 679 | 		try {
 680 | 			const { patientId } = ctx.data;
 681 | 			const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 682 | 				where: { id: patientId },
 683 | 				with: { immunizations: true }
 684 | 			});
 685 | 
 686 | 			if (!patient) {
 687 | 				throw new Error("Patient not found");
 688 | 			}
 689 | 
 690 | 			const ageInDays = Math.floor((Date.now() - patient.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 691 | 
 692 | 			const dueVaccines = await db.query.vaccineSchedule.findMany({
 693 | 				where: {
 694 | 					isDeleted: false,
 695 | 					ageInDaysMin: { lte: ageInDays },
 696 | 					ageInDaysMax: { gte: ageInDays }
 697 | 				}
 698 | 			});
 699 | 
 700 | 			const administeredVaccines = new Set(patient.immunizations.map(i => i.vaccine));
 701 | 			const pendingVaccines = dueVaccines.filter(v => !administeredVaccines.has(v.vaccineName));
 702 | 
 703 | 			return { pendingVaccines, administeredVaccines: patient.immunizations };
 704 | 		} catch (error) {
 705 | 			console.error("Error getting patient vaccine schedule:", error);
 706 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get vaccine schedule");
 707 | 		}
 708 | 	});

 710 | const getVaccineInventoryStatus = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 711 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string() }))
 712 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 713 | 		try {
 714 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 715 | 			const inventory = await db.query.vaccineInventory.findMany({
 716 | 				where: { clinicId },
 717 | 				orderBy: (inv, { asc }) => asc(inv.expirationDate)
 718 | 			});
 719 | 
 720 | 			const now = new Date();
 721 | 			const expiringSoon = inventory.filter(v => {
 722 | 				const daysUntilExpiry = Math.ceil(
 723 | 					((v.expirationDate?.getTime() ?? now.getTime()) - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
 724 | 				);
 725 | 				return daysUntilExpiry <= 30 && daysUntilExpiry > 0;
 726 | 			});
 727 | 
 728 | 			const expired = inventory.filter(v => v.expirationDate && v.expirationDate < now);
 729 | 			const lowStock = inventory.filter(v => v.quantity < 10);
 730 | 
 731 | 			return {
 732 | 				totalVaccines: inventory.length,
 733 | 				totalDoses: inventory.reduce((sum, v) => sum + (v.quantity ?? 0), 0),
 734 | 				expiringSoon,
 735 | 				expired,
 736 | 				lowStock,
 737 | 				inventoryByVaccine: inventory
 738 | 			};
 739 | 		} catch (error) {
 740 | 			console.error("Error getting vaccine inventory:", error);
 741 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get vaccine inventory");
 742 | 		}
 743 | 	});

 829 | const recordImmunization = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 830 | 	.validator(recordImmunizationSchema)
 831 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 832 | 		try {
 833 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 834 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
 835 | 				if (data.vaccineInventoryId) {
 836 | 					const inventory = await tx.query.vaccineInventory.findFirst({
 837 | 						where: { id: data.vaccineInventoryId }
 838 | 					});
 839 | 
 840 | 					if (!inventory || inventory.quantity < 1) {
 841 | 						throw new Error("Insufficient vaccine stock");
 842 | 					}
 843 | 
 844 | 					await tx
 845 | 						.update(schema.vaccineInventory)
 846 | 						.set({
 847 | 							quantity: inventory.quantity - 1,
 848 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
 849 | 						})
 850 | 						.where(eq(schema.vaccineInventory.id, data.vaccineInventoryId));
 851 | 				}
 852 | 
 853 | 				const [immunization] = await tx
 854 | 					.insert(schema.immunization)
 855 | 					.values({
 856 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 857 | 						recordId: crypto.randomUUID(),
 858 | 						...data,
 859 | 						status: "COMPLETED",
 860 | 						createdAt: new Date()
 861 | 					})
 862 | 					.returning();
 863 | 
 864 | 				const vaccineSchedule = await tx.query.vaccineSchedule.findFirst({
 865 | 					where: { vaccineName: data.vaccine }
 866 | 				});
 867 | 
 868 | 				if (vaccineSchedule?.ageInDaysMax) {
 869 | 					const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
 870 | 						where: { id: data.patientId }
 871 | 					});
 872 | 
 873 | 					if (patient) {
 874 | 						const ageAtVaccination = Math.floor(
 875 | 							(data.date.getTime() - patient.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
 876 | 						);
 877 | 
 878 | 						if (ageAtVaccination > vaccineSchedule.ageInDaysMax) {
 879 | 							await tx
 880 | 								.update(schema.immunization)
 881 | 								.set({ isOverDue: true })
 882 | 								.where(eq(schema.immunization.id, immunization.id));
 883 | 						}
 884 | 					}
 885 | 				}
 886 | 
 887 | 				return immunization;
 888 | 			});
 889 | 
 890 | 			return result;
 891 | 		} catch (error) {
 892 | 			console.error("Error recording immunization:", error);
 893 | 			throw new Error("Failed to record immunization");
 894 | 		}
 895 | 	});

1045 | const bulkUpdateVaccineInventory = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1046 | 	.validator(bulkVaccineUpdateSchema)
1047 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1048 | 		try {
1049 | 			const { clinicId, updates } = ctx.data;
1050 | 			const results = await db.transaction(async tx => {
1051 | 				const output = [];
1052 | 				for (const update of updates) {
1053 | 					const existing = await tx.query.vaccineInventory.findFirst({
1054 | 						where: { clinicId, vaccineName: update.vaccineName }
1055 | 					});
1056 | 
1057 | 					if (existing) {
1058 | 						const [updated] = await tx
1059 | 							.update(schema.vaccineInventory)
1060 | 							.set({
1061 | 								quantity: existing.quantity + update.quantity,
1062 | 								lotNumber: update.lotNumber || existing.lotNumber,
1063 | 								expirationDate: update.expirationDate || existing.expirationDate,
1064 | 								updatedAt: new Date()
1065 | 							})
1066 | 							.where(eq(schema.vaccineInventory.id, existing.id))
1067 | 							.returning();
1068 | 						output.push(updated);
1069 | 					} else {
1070 | 						const [created] = await tx
1071 | 							.insert(schema.vaccineInventory)
1072 | 							.values({
1073 | 								id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1074 | 								clinicId,
1075 | 								vaccineName: update.vaccineName,
1076 | 								quantity: update.quantity,
1077 | 								lotNumber: update.lotNumber,
1078 | 								expirationDate: update.expirationDate,
1079 | 								createdAt: new Date(),
1080 | 								updatedAt: new Date()
1081 | 							})
1082 | 							.returning();
1083 | 						output.push(created);
1084 | 					}
1085 | 				}
1086 | 				return output;
1087 | 			});
1088 | 			return results;
1089 | 		} catch (error) {
1090 | 			console.error("Error bulk updating vaccine inventory:", error);
1091 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update vaccine inventory");
1092 | 		}
1093 | 	});
1094 | 
1095 | const syncFeedingLogs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1096 | 	.validator(
1097 | 		z.object({
1098 | 			patientId: z.string(),
1099 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
1100 | 			externalLogs: z.array(
1101 | 				z.object({
1102 | 					timestamp: z.date(),
1103 | 					type: z.string(),
1104 | 					duration: z.number().optional(),
1105 | 					amount: z.number().optional(),
1106 | 					source: z.string()
1107 | 				})
1108 | 			)
1109 | 		})
1110 | 	)
1111 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1112 | 		try {
1113 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, externalLogs } = ctx.data;
1114 | 			const results = [];
1115 | 			const errors = [];
1116 | 
1117 | 			for (const externalLog of externalLogs) {
1118 | 				try {
1119 | 					const existingLog = await db.query.feedingLog.findFirst({
1120 | 						where: {
1121 | 							patientId,
1122 | 							clinicId,
1123 | 							date: {
1124 | 								gt: new Date(externalLog.timestamp.getTime() - 5 * 60 * 1000),
1125 | 								lt: new Date(externalLog.timestamp.getTime() + 5 * 60 * 1000)
1126 | 							}
1127 | 						}
1128 | 					});
1129 | 
1130 | 					if (!existingLog) {
1131 | 						const newLog = await createFeedingLog({
1132 | 							data: {
1133 | 								patientId,
1134 | 								date: externalLog.timestamp,
1135 | 								clinicId: clinicId,
1136 | 								type: externalLog.type as schema.FeedingType,
1137 | 								duration: externalLog.duration,
1138 | 								amount: externalLog.amount,
1139 | 								notes: `Synced from ${externalLog.source}`
1140 | 							}
1141 | 						});
1142 | 						results.push(newLog);
1143 | 					} else {
1144 | 						errors.push({
1145 | 							timestamp: externalLog.timestamp,
1146 | 							error: "Duplicate log found within 5 minute window"
1147 | 						});
1148 | 					}
1149 | 				} catch (error) {
1150 | 					errors.push({
1151 | 						timestamp: externalLog.timestamp,
1152 | 						error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"
1153 | 					});
1154 | 				}
1155 | 			}
1156 | 
1157 | 			return { synced: results.length, failed: errors.length, results, errors };
1158 | 		} catch (error) {
1159 | 			console.error("Error syncing feeding logs:", error);
1160 | 			throw new Error("Failed to sync feeding logs");
1161 | 		}
1162 | 	});
1163 | 
1164 | const recordGrowthWithPercentiles = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1165 | 	.validator(growthWithPercentilesSchema)
1166 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1167 | 		try {
1168 | 			const data = ctx.data;
1169 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
1170 | 				const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
1171 | 					where: { id: data.patientId }
1172 | 				});
1173 | 
1174 | 				if (!patient) {
1175 | 					throw new Error("Patient not found");
1176 | 				}
1177 | 
1178 | 				const ageDays = Math.floor(
1179 | 					(data.date.getTime() - patient.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
1180 | 				);
1181 | 				const ageMonths = Math.floor(ageDays / 30);
1182 | 
1183 | 				const whoStandards = await tx.query.whoGrowthStandard.findMany({
1184 | 					where: {
1185 | 						gender: patient.gender as schema.Gender,
1186 | 						ageDays: {
1187 | 							gte: ageDays - 30,
1188 | 							lte: ageDays + 30
1189 | 						}
1190 | 					}
1191 | 				});
1192 | 
1193 | 				let weightForAgeZ: number | undefined;
1194 | 				let heightForAgeZ: number | undefined;
1195 | 				let bmiForAgeZ: number | undefined;
1196 | 
1197 | 				const weightStandard = whoStandards.find(s => s.measurementType === "WEIGHT");
1198 | 				if (weightStandard && data.weight) {
1199 | 					weightForAgeZ = (data.weight - weightStandard.mValue) / weightStandard.sValue;
1200 | 				}
1201 | 
1202 | 				const heightStandard = whoStandards.find(s => s.measurementType === "HEIGHT");
1203 | 				if (heightStandard && data.height) {
1204 | 					heightForAgeZ = (data.height - heightStandard.mValue) / heightStandard.sValue;
1205 | 				}
1206 | 
1207 | 				if (data.bmi) {
1208 | 					const bmiStandard = whoStandards.find(s => s.measurementType === "BMI");
1209 | 					if (bmiStandard) {
1210 | 						bmiForAgeZ = (data.bmi - bmiStandard.mValue) / bmiStandard.sValue;
1211 | 					}
1212 | 				}
1213 | 
1214 | 				const [growthRecord] = await tx
1215 | 					.insert(schema.growthRecord)
1216 | 					.values({
1217 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1218 | 						...data,
1219 | 						ageDays,
1220 | 						ageMonths,
1221 | 						weightForAgeZ,
1222 | 						heightForAgeZ,
1223 | 						bmiForAgeZ,
1224 | 						recordedAt: new Date(),
1225 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1226 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1227 | 					})
1228 | 					.returning();
1229 | 
1230 | 				if (weightForAgeZ && (weightForAgeZ < -2 || weightForAgeZ > 2)) {
1231 | 					await tx.insert(schema.alert).values({
1232 | 						id: generateId(),
1233 | 						title: "Abnormal Growth Pattern",
1234 | 						message: `Patient ${patient.firstName} ${patient.lastName} has abnormal weight-for-age Z-score: ${weightForAgeZ.toFixed(2)}`,
1235 | 						type: "growth_alert",
1236 | 						timestamp: new Date(),
1237 | 						action: {
1238 | 							label: "View Patient",
1239 | 							href: `/patients/${patient.id}`
1240 | 						}
1241 | 					});
1242 | 				}
1243 | 
1244 | 				return growthRecord;
1245 | 			});
1246 | 
1247 | 			return result;
1248 | 		} catch (error) {
1249 | 			console.error("Error recording growth with percentiles:", error);
1250 | 			throw new Error("Failed to record growth data");
1251 | 		}
1252 | 	});
1253 | 
1254 | const getWHOStandards = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1255 | 	.validator(whoStandardsSchema)
1256 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1257 | 		try {
1258 | 			const { ageDays, gender, measurementType } = ctx.data;
1259 | 			const standard = await db.query.whoGrowthStandard.findFirst({
1260 | 				where: { ageDays, gender, measurementType }
1261 | 			});
1262 | 			return standard;
1263 | 		} catch (error) {
1264 | 			console.error("Error getting WHO standards:", error);
1265 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get WHO standards");
1266 | 		}
1267 | 	});
1268 | 
1269 | const generateRecurringFeedings = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1270 | 	.validator(recurringFeedingsSchema)
1271 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1272 | 		try {
1273 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, schedule } = ctx.data;
1274 | 			const feedings = [];
1275 | 			const currentDate = new Date(schedule.startDate);
1276 | 			const endDate = new Date(schedule.endDate);
1277 | 
1278 | 			while (currentDate <= endDate) {
1279 | 				for (const time of schedule.times) {
1280 | 					const [hours, minutes] = time.split(":").map(Number);
1281 | 					const feedingTime = new Date(currentDate);
1282 | 					feedingTime.setHours(hours || 0, minutes || 0, 0, 0);
1283 | 
1284 | 					feedings.push({
1285 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1286 | 						patientId,
1287 | 						date: feedingTime,
1288 | 						type: schedule.type,
1289 | 						duration: schedule.duration,
1290 | 						amount: schedule.amount,
1291 | 						notes: "Auto-generated from recurring schedule",
1292 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1293 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1294 | 					});
1295 | 				}
1296 | 				currentDate.setDate(currentDate.getDate() + 1);
1297 | 			}
1298 | 
1299 | 			const existingLogs = await listFeedingLogs({
1300 | 				data: {
1301 | 					patientId,
1302 | 					clinicId,
1303 | 					startDate: schedule.startDate,
1304 | 					endDate: schedule.endDate,
1305 | 					limit: 1000,
1306 | 					offset: 0
1307 | 				}
1308 | 			});
1309 | 
1310 | 			const existingTimes = new Set(existingLogs.logs.map(log => log.date.toISOString()));
1311 | 			const newFeedings = feedings.filter(feeding => !existingTimes.has(feeding.date.toISOString()));
1312 | 
1313 | 			if (newFeedings.length > 0) {
1314 | 				return await createManyFeedingLogs({ data: { logs: newFeedings } });
1315 | 			}
1316 | 
1317 | 			return [];
1318 | 		} catch (error) {
1319 | 			console.error("Error generating recurring feedings:", error);
1320 | 			throw new Error("Failed to generate recurring feedings");
1321 | 		}
1322 | 	});
1323 | 
1324 | export {
1325 | 	addMeasurementPoint,
1326 | 	bulkUpdateVaccineInventory,
1327 | 	createDevelopmentalCheck,
1328 | 	createDevelopmentalMilestone,
1329 | 	createFeedingLog,
1330 | 	createImmunization,
1331 | 	createManyFeedingLogs,
1332 | 	createVaccineSchedule,
1333 | 	deleteFeedingLog,
1334 | 	generateRecurringFeedings,
1335 | 	getAllVaccineSchedules,
1336 | 	getBreastfeedingStats,
1337 | 	getDevelopmentalProgress,
1338 | 	getDevelopmentalScreenings,
1339 | 	getFeedingLogById,
1340 | 	getFeedingStats,
1341 | 	getFeedingsByDateRange,
1342 | 	getGrowthAnalytics,
1343 | 	getGrowthRecordById,
1344 | 	getLatestFeedingLog,
1345 | 	getOverdueImmunizations,
1346 | 	getPatientGrowthRecords,
1347 | 	getPatientVaccineSchedule,
1348 | 	getUpcomingImmunizations,
1349 | 	getVaccineInventoryStatus,
1350 | 	getWHOStandards,
1351 | 	listFeedingLogs,
1352 | 	listGrowthRecords,
1353 | 	listImmunizations,
1354 | 	recordGrowthWithPercentiles,
1355 | 	recordImmunization,
1356 | 	syncFeedingLogs,
1357 | 	updateFeedingLog,
1358 | 	updateManyFeedingLogs
1359 | };
```

```ts
 115 | const getPatientActivePrescriptions = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 116 | 	.validator(patientActivePrescriptionsSchema)
 117 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 118 | 		try {
 119 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, includeExpired } = ctx.data;
 120 | 
 121 | 			// Build where object dynamically
 122 | 			const where = {
 123 | 				clinicId,
 124 | 				patientId,
 125 | 				status: "active",
 126 | 				endDate: {
 127 | 					gt: new Date()
 128 | 				}
 129 | 			};
 130 | 
 131 | 			if (clinicId) {
 132 | 				where.clinicId = clinicId;
 133 | 			}
 134 | 
 135 | 			if (!includeExpired) {
 136 | 				where.status = "active";
 137 | 				where.endDate = {
 138 | 					gt: new Date()
 139 | 				};
 140 | 			}
 141 | 
 142 | 			const prescriptions = await db.query.prescription.findMany({
 143 | 				where: { clinicId, patientId, status: "active", endDate: { gt: new Date() } },
 144 | 				with: {

 157 | 						}

 323 | const listDrugs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 324 | 	.validator(listDrugsSchema)
 325 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 326 | 		try {
 327 | 			const { search, category, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 328 | 
 329 | 			const whereConditions: Record<string, unknown> = {};
 330 | 
 331 | 			if (search) {
 332 | 				whereConditions.OR = [
 333 | 					{ name: { like: `%${search}%` } },
 334 | 					{ genericName: { like: `%${search}%` } },
 335 | 					{ brandName: { like: `%${search}%` } }
 336 | 				];
 337 | 			}
 338 | 
 339 | 			if (category) {
 340 | 				whereConditions.contraindications = { like: `%${category}%` };
 341 | 			}
 342 | 
 343 | 			const drugsList = await db.query.drug.findMany({
 344 | 				where: whereConditions,
 345 | 				limit,
 346 | 				offset,
 347 | 				orderBy: { name: "asc" }
 348 | 			});
 349 | 
 350 | 			// Count query using same conditions
 351 | 			const countResult = await db
 352 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 353 | 				.from(schema.drug)
 354 | 				.where(
 355 | 					and(
 356 | 						search
 357 | 							? or(
 358 | 									like(schema.drug.name, `%${search}%`),
 359 | 									like(schema.drug.genericName, `%${search}%`),
 360 | 									like(schema.drug.brandName, `%${search}%`)
 361 | 								)
 362 | 							: undefined,
 363 | 						category ? like(schema.drug.contraindications, `%${category}%`) : undefined
 364 | 					)
 365 | 				);
 366 | 
 367 | 			const total = Number(countResult[0]?.count ?? 0);
 368 | 
 369 | 			return {
 370 | 				drugs: drugsList,
 371 | 				pagination: { limit, offset, total, hasMore: offset + limit < total }
 372 | 			};
 373 | 		} catch (error) {
 374 | 			console.error("Error listing drugs:", error);
 375 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list drugs");
 376 | 		}
 377 | 	});
 378 | 
 379 | const getPatientAllergies = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 380 | 	.validator(z.object({ patientId: z.string() }))

 387 | 			});

 395 | const updatePrescriptionStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 396 | 	.validator(updatePrescriptionStatusSchema)
 397 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 398 | 		try {
 399 | 			const { id, status, performedBy } = ctx.data;
 400 | 			await db.transaction(async tx => {
 401 | 				await tx
 402 | 					.update(schema.prescription)
 403 | 					.set({ status, updatedAt: new Date() })
 404 | 					.where(eq(schema.prescription.id, id));
 405 | 
 406 | 				await tx.insert(schema.prescriptionLog).values({
 407 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 408 | 					prescriptionId: id,
 409 | 					action: status.toUpperCase(),
 410 | 					performedBy,
 411 | 					createdAt: new Date()
 412 | 				});
 413 | 			});
 414 | 			return { success: true };
 415 | 		} catch (error) {
 416 | 			console.error("Error updating prescription status:", error);
 417 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update prescription status");
 418 | 		}

 420 | 
 421 | const checkDoctorAccess = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 422 | 	.validator(checkDoctorAccessSchema)
 423 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 424 | 		try {
 425 | 			const { doctorId, userId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 426 | 			const userRecord = await db.query.user.findFirst({
 427 | 				where: { id: userId },
 428 | 				with: {
 429 | 					doctors: true,
 430 | 					clinics: true
 431 | 				}
 432 | 			});
 433 | 
 434 | 			if (!userRecord) return false;
 435 | 
 436 | 			// Admin has full access
 437 | 			if (userRecord.role === "admin") return true;
 438 | 
 439 | 			// Staff has limited access
 440 | 			if (userRecord.role === "staff") return true;
 441 | 
 442 | 			// Doctor access
 443 | 			if (userRecord.role === "doctor" ) {
 444 | 				const doctorRecord = await db.query.doctor.findFirst({
 445 | 					where: { userId: userId, id: doctorId }
 446 | 				});
 447 | 				return !!doctorRecord;
 448 | 			}
 449 | 
 450 | 			// Check clinic membership
 451 | 			if (clinicId) {
 452 | 				const clinicMember = await db.query.clinicMember.findFirst({
 453 | 					where: { userId: userId, clinicId: clinicId }
 454 | 				});
 455 | 				return !!clinicMember;
 456 | 			}
 457 | 
 458 | 			return false;
 459 | 		} catch (error) {
 460 | 			console.error("Error checking doctor access:", error);
 461 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check doctor access");
 462 | 		}
 463 | 	});
 464 | 
 465 | const checkDrugStock = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 466 | 	.validator(checkDrugStockSchema)
 467 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 468 | 		try {
 469 | 			const { clinicId, threshold } = ctx.data;
 470 | 			const lowStockDrugs = await db.query.drug.findMany({
 471 | 				where: {
 472 | 					clinicId,
 473 | 					quantityInStock: { lt: threshold }
 474 | 				}
 475 | 			});
 476 | 
 477 | 			for (const drug of lowStockDrugs) {
 478 | 				await db.insert(schema.notification).values({
 479 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 480 | 					userId: "admin",
 481 | 					clinicId,
 482 | 					title: "Low Stock Alert",
 483 | 					body: `${drug.name} is running low. Only ${drug.quantityInStock} units remaining.`,
 484 | 					type: "low_stock",
 485 | 					priority: "high",
 486 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 487 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 488 | 				});
 489 | 			}
 490 | 
 491 | 			return lowStockDrugs;
 492 | 		} catch (error) {
 493 | 			console.error("Error checking drug stock:", error);
 494 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check drug stock");
 495 | 		}
 496 | 	});
 497 | 
 498 | const dispenseMedication = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 499 | 	.validator(dispenseMedicationSchema)
 500 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 501 | 		try {
 502 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 503 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
 504 | 				const prescribedItem = await tx.query.prescribedItem.findFirst({
 505 | 					where: { id: data.prescribedItemId },
 506 | 					with: { drug: true }
 507 | 				});
 508 | 
 509 | 				if (!prescribedItem) {
 510 | 					throw new Error("Prescribed item not found");
 511 | 				}
 512 | 
 513 | 				if (!prescribedItem.drug || (prescribedItem.drug.quantityInStock ?? 0) < data.quantityDispensed) {
 514 | 					throw new Error("Insufficient stock");
 515 | 				}
 516 | 
 517 | 				const [dispense] = await tx
 518 | 					.insert(schema.medicationDispense)
 519 | 					.values({
 520 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 521 | 						...data,
 522 | 						dispensedAt: new Date(),
 523 | 						createdAt: new Date()
 524 | 					})
 525 | 					.returning();
 526 | 
 527 | 				await tx
 528 | 					.update(schema.drug)
 529 | 					.set({
 530 | 						quantityInStock: (prescribedItem.drug.quantityInStock ?? 0) - data.quantityDispensed,
 531 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 532 | 					})
 533 | 					.where(eq(schema.drug.id, prescribedItem.drugId));
 534 | 
 535 | 				await tx
 536 | 					.update(schema.prescribedItem)
 537 | 					.set({
 538 | 						refillsRemaining: (prescribedItem.refillsRemaining ?? 0) - 1,
 539 | 						lastRefillDate: new Date(),
 540 | 						quantityDispensedTotal: (prescribedItem.quantityDispensedTotal ?? 0) + data.quantityDispensed,
 541 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 542 | 					})
 543 | 					.where(eq(schema.prescribedItem.id, data.prescribedItemId));
 544 | 
 545 | 				await tx.insert(schema.prescriptionLog).values({
 546 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 547 | 					prescriptionId: data.prescriptionId,
 548 | 					action: "DISPENSED",
 549 | 					performedBy: data.dispensedBy,
 550 | 					details: `Dispensed ${data.quantityDispensed} units of ${prescribedItem.drug.name}`,
 551 | 					createdAt: new Date()
 552 | 				});
 553 | 
 554 | 				return dispense;
 555 | 			});
 556 | 
 557 | 			return result;
 558 | 		} catch (error) {
 559 | 			console.error("Error dispensing medication:", error);
 560 | 			throw new Error("Failed to dispense medication");
 561 | 		}
 562 | 	});

 921 | 			return result;
 922 | 		} catch (error) {
 923 | 			console.error("Error deleting prescribed item:", error);
 924 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete prescribed item");
 925 | 		}
 926 | 	});
 927 | 
 928 | // =======================
 929 | // CRUD Operations for Prescription Logs
 930 | // =======================
 931 | 
 932 | const createPrescriptionLog = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 933 | 	.validator(z.any())
 934 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 935 | 		try {
 936 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 937 | 			const [result] = await db
 938 | 				.insert(schema.prescriptionLog)
 939 | 				.values({
 940 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 941 | 					...data,
 942 | 					createdAt: new Date()
 943 | 				})
 944 | 				.returning();
 945 | 			return result;
 946 | 		} catch (error) {
 947 | 			console.error("Error creating prescription log:", error);
 948 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create prescription log");
 949 | 		}
 950 | 	});
 951 | 
 952 | const createManyPrescriptionLogs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 953 | 	.validator(z.object({ logs: z.array(z.any()) }))
 954 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 955 | 		try {
 956 | 			const { logs } = ctx.data;
 957 | 			const values = logs.map(log => ({
 958 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 959 | 				...log,
 960 | 				createdAt: new Date()
 961 | 			}));
 962 | 			const result = await db.insert(schema.prescriptionLog).values(values).returning();
 963 | 			return result;
 964 | 		} catch (error) {
 965 | 			console.error("Error creating multiple prescription logs:", error);
 966 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create prescription logs");
 967 | 		}
 968 | 	});
 969 | 
 970 | const updatePrescriptionLog = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 971 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string(), data: z.any() }))
 972 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 973 | 		try {
 974 | 			const { id, data } = ctx.data;
 975 | 			const [result] = await db
 976 | 				.update(schema.prescriptionLog)
 977 | 				.set(data)
 978 | 				.where(eq(schema.prescriptionLog.id, id))
 979 | 				.returning();
 980 | 			return result;
 981 | 		} catch (error) {
 982 | 			console.error("Error updating prescription log:", error);
 983 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update prescription log");
 984 | 		}
 985 | 	});
 986 | 
 987 | const updateManyPrescriptionLogs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 988 | 	.validator(z.object({ ids: z.array(z.string()), data: z.any() }))
 989 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 990 | 		try {
 991 | 			const { ids, data } = ctx.data;
 992 | 			const result = await db
 993 | 				.update(schema.prescriptionLog)
 994 | 				.set(data)
 995 | 				.where(inArray(schema.prescriptionLog.id, ids))
 996 | 				.returning();
 997 | 			return result;
 998 | 		} catch (error) {
 999 | 			console.error("Error updating multiple prescription logs:", error);
1000 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update prescription logs");
1001 | 		}
1002 | 	});
1003 | 
1004 | const deletePrescriptionLog = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1005 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string() }))
1006 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1007 | 		try {
1008 | 			const { id } = ctx.data;
1009 | 			const [result] = await db
1010 | 				.delete(schema.prescriptionLog)
1011 | 				.where(eq(schema.prescriptionLog.id, id))
1012 | 				.returning();
1013 | 			return result;
1014 | 		} catch (error) {
1015 | 			console.error("Error deleting prescription log:", error);
1016 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete prescription log");
1017 | 		}
1018 | 	});
1019 | 
1020 | export {
1021 | 	checkDoctorAccess,
1022 | 	checkDrugStock,
1023 | 	createDoseGuideline,
1024 | 	createDrug,
1025 | 	createManyDoseGuidelines,
1026 | 	createManyDrugs,
1027 | 	createManyPrescribedItems,
1028 | 	createManyPrescriptionLogs,
1029 | 	createManyPrescriptions,
1030 | 	createPrescribedItem,
1031 | 	createPrescription,
1032 | 	createPrescriptionLog,
1033 | 	deleteDoseGuideline,
1034 | 	deleteDrug,
1035 | 	deletePrescribedItem,
1036 | 	deletePrescription,
1037 | 	deletePrescriptionLog,
1038 | 	dispenseMedication,
1039 | 	getDoseGuidelines,
1040 | 	getDrugsByIds,
1041 | 	getPatientActivePrescriptions,

1044 | 	getPrescribedItemsByPrescriptionId,

1047 | 	getPrescriptionsForAnalytics,
```

`data/functions/queries/clinic.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // functions/queries/clinic.ts
   2 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   3 | 
   4 | import {
   5 |   canDeleteService,
   6 |   getAvailableServices,
   7 |   getClinicById,
   8 |   getClinicByName,
   9 |   getClinicDashboard,
  10 |   getClinicServices,
  11 |   getClinicSetting,
  12 |   getClinicStatistics,
  13 |   getConfigValue,
  14 |   getDefaultClinic,
  15 |   getDoctorPerformanceReport,

  17 |   getPopularServices,
  18 |   getServiceById,
  19 |   getServiceCategories,
  20 |   getServiceRevenueReport,
  21 |   getServicesByCategory,
  22 |   getServiceStatistics,
  23 |   getServiceUsageTrends,
  24 |   getUserClinics,
  25 |   listServices,
  26 |   searchServices
  27 | } from "../clinic";
  28 | 
  29 | // =======================
  30 | // Query Keys
  31 | // =======================
  32 | 
  33 | export const clinicKeys = {
  34 | 	all: ["clinics"] as const,
  35 | 
  36 | 	// Clinic detail keys
  37 | 	detail: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "detail", clinicId] as const,
  38 | 	byName: (name: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "byName", name] as const,
  39 | 	default: () => [...clinicKeys.all, "default"] as const,
  40 | 
  41 | 	// User clinic relations
  42 | 	userClinics: (userId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "user", userId] as const,
  43 | 
  44 | 	// Statistics and dashboard
  45 | 	statistics: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "statistics", clinicId] as const,
  46 | 	dashboard: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "dashboard", clinicId] as const,
  47 | 	settings: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "settings", clinicId] as const,
  48 | 
  49 | 	// Service keys
  50 | 	services: {
  51 | 		all: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "services", clinicId] as const,
  52 | 		list: (params: { clinicId: string; search?: string; category?: string; page?: number; pageSize?: number }) =>
  53 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(params.clinicId), "list", params] as const,
  54 | 		available: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "available"] as const,
  55 | 		detail: (serviceId: string, clinicId?: string) =>
  56 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId || ""), "detail", serviceId] as const,
  57 | 		byCategory: (clinicId: string, category: string) =>
  58 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "category", category] as const,
  59 | 		categories: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "categories"] as const,
  60 | 		search: (clinicId: string, searchTerm: string) =>
  61 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "search", searchTerm] as const,
  62 | 		statistics: (clinicId: string, startDate?: Date, endDate?: Date) =>
  63 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "statistics", { startDate, endDate }] as const,
  64 | 		popular: (clinicId: string, limit?: number, startDate?: Date, endDate?: Date) =>
  65 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "popular", { limit, startDate, endDate }] as const,
  66 | 		lowUsage: (clinicId: string, threshold?: number, days?: number) =>
  67 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "low-usage", { threshold, days }] as const,
  68 | 		revenue: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  69 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "revenue", { startDate, endDate }] as const,
  70 | 		usageTrends: (clinicId: string, serviceId: string, months?: number) =>
  71 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "usage-trends", serviceId, months] as const,
  72 | 		canDelete: (serviceId: string) => [...clinicKeys.services.all(""), "can-delete", serviceId] as const
  73 | 	},
  74 | 
  75 | 	// Doctor performance keys
  76 | 	doctorPerformance: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  77 | 		[...clinicKeys.all, "doctor-performance", clinicId, startDate, endDate] as const,
  78 | 
  79 | 	// Config keys
  80 | 	config: (key: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "config", key] as const
  81 | };
  82 | 
  83 | // =======================
  84 | // Clinic Query Options
  85 | // =======================

  89 | 		queryKey: clinicKeys.detail(clinicId),
  90 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getClinicById({ data: { clinicId }, signal }),

  93 | 		enabled: !!clinicId
  94 | 	});

 103 | 	});

 305 | 
 306 | // =======================
 307 | // Infinite Query Options (for paginated services)
 308 | // =======================
 309 | 
 310 | import { infiniteQueryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
 311 | 
 312 | export const infiniteServicesOptions = (params: {
 313 | 	clinicId: string;
 314 | 	search?: string;
 315 | 	category?: string;
 316 | 	pageSize?: number;
 317 | }) =>
 318 | 	infiniteQueryOptions({
 319 | 		queryKey: clinicKeys.services.list({ ...params, page: 1 }),
 320 | 		queryFn: ({ pageParam = 1, signal }) =>
 321 | 			listServices({
 322 | 				data: { ...params, page: pageParam, pageSize: params.pageSize || 10 },
 323 | 				signal
 324 | 			}),
 325 | 		initialPageParam: 1,
 326 | 		getNextPageParam: (lastPage, allPages) => {
 327 | 			const nextPage = allPages.length + 1;
 328 | 			return nextPage <= lastPage.totalPages ? nextPage : undefined;
 329 | 		},
 330 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
 331 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
 332 | 		enabled: !!params.clinicId
 333 | 	});

```

`data/functions/queries/doctor.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | 
   3 | import {
   4 |     getAvailableTimeSlots,
   5 |     getDoctorAvailability,
   6 |     getDoctorById,
   7 |     getDoctorByUserId,
   8 |     getDoctorPerformance,
   9 |     getDoctorWithSchedule,
  10 |     getWorkingDays,
  11 |     listDoctors
  12 | } from "../doctor";
  13 | 
  14 | import type { AvailabilityStatus, Status } from "@/db/schema";
  15 | 
  16 | export const doctorKeys = {
  17 | 	all: ["doctors"] as const,
  18 | 	detail: (doctorId: string, clinicId?: string) => [...doctorKeys.all, "detail", doctorId, clinicId] as const,
  19 | 	byUserId: (userId: string, clinicId?: string) => [...doctorKeys.all, "userId", userId, clinicId] as const,
  20 | 	list: (filters: Record<string, unknown>) => [...doctorKeys.all, "list", filters] as const,
  21 | 	performance: (doctorId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, clinicId?: string) =>
  22 | 		[...doctorKeys.all, "performance", doctorId, startDate, endDate, clinicId] as const,
  23 | 	availability: (doctorId: string, date: Date) => [...doctorKeys.all, "availability", doctorId, date] as const,
  24 | 	schedule: (doctorId: string, clinicId?: string) => [...doctorKeys.all, "schedule", doctorId, clinicId] as const,
  25 | 	timeSlots: (doctorId: string, date: Date, durationMinutes?: number) =>
  26 | 		[...doctorKeys.all, "timeSlots", doctorId, date, durationMinutes] as const,
  27 | 	workingDays: (doctorId: string) => [...doctorKeys.all, "workingDays", doctorId] as const
  28 | };
  29 |

  32 | 		queryKey: doctorKeys.detail(doctorId, clinicId),

  43 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  44 | 	});
```

`data/functions/queries/medical.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // queries/medical.ts
   2 | import { type QueryClient, queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   3 | 
   4 | import type { PaymentStatus } from "@/db/schema";
   5 | import {
   6 |     checkVitalSignsAccess,
   7 |     countMedicalRecord,
   8 |     getClinicRevenue,
   9 |     getDiagnosesByMedicalRecordId,
  10 |     getEncounterById,
  11 |     getLatestVitalSigns,
  12 |     getMedicalRecordById,
  13 |     getPatientEncounters,
  14 |     getPatientMedicalRecords,
  15 |     getPaymentById,
  16 |     getPaymentsByAppointmentId,
  17 |     getPaymentsByPatientId,
  18 |     getTimeLeftForAppointment,
  19 |     getTrendData,
  20 |     getVitalSignById,
  21 |     getVitalSigns,
  22 |     getVitalSignsByMedicalRecordId,
  23 |     listMedicalRecord,
  24 |     listPayments,
  25 |     listVitalSignsByPatient
  26 | } from "../medical";
  27 | 
  28 | // =======================
  29 | // Query Keys
  30 | // =======================
  31 | 
  32 | export const medicalKeys = {
  33 | 	all: ["medical"] as const,
  34 | 
  35 | 	// Medical Record keys
  36 | 	medicalRecords: ["medicalRecords"] as const,
  37 | 	medicalRecordCount: (clinicId: string, patientId?: string, doctorId?: string) =>
  38 | 		[...medicalKeys.medicalRecords, "count", clinicId, patientId, doctorId] as const,
  39 | 	medicalRecordList: (filters: {
  40 | 		clinicId: string;
  41 | 		patientId?: string;
  42 | 		doctorId?: string;
  43 | 		limit?: number;
  44 | 		offset?: number;
  45 | 	}) => [...medicalKeys.medicalRecords, "list", filters] as const,
  46 | 	medicalRecordDetail: (recordId: string, clinicId: string) =>
  47 | 		[...medicalKeys.medicalRecords, "detail", recordId, clinicId] as const,
  48 | 	patientMedicalRecords: (patientId: string, clinicId: string, limit?: number, offset?: number) =>
  49 | 		[...medicalKeys.medicalRecords, "patient", patientId, clinicId, limit, offset] as const,
  50 | 
  51 | 	// Diagnosis/Encounter keys
  52 | 	encounters: ["encounters"] as const,
  53 | 	encounterDetail: (id: string, clinicId: string) => [...medicalKeys.encounters, "detail", id, clinicId] as const,
  54 | 	patientEncounters: (patientId: string, clinicId: string) =>
  55 | 		[...medicalKeys.encounters, "patient", patientId, clinicId] as const,
  56 | 	diagnosesByMedicalRecord: (medicalId: string) => [...medicalKeys.encounters, "byMedicalRecord", medicalId] as const,
  57 | 
  58 | 	// Vital Signs keys
  59 | 	vitalSigns: ["vitalSigns"] as const,
  60 | 	vitalSignsList: (filters: {
  61 | 		patientId: string;
  62 | 		clinicId: string;
  63 | 		fromDate?: Date;
  64 | 		toDate?: Date;
  65 | 		page?: number;
  66 | 		pageSize?: number;
  67 | 		encounterId?: string;
  68 | 	}) => [...medicalKeys.vitalSigns, "list", filters] as const,
  69 | 	vitalSignsByPatient: (
  70 | 		patientId: string,
  71 | 		clinicId: string,
  72 | 		fromDate: Date,
  73 | 		toDate: Date,
  74 | 		page?: number,
  75 | 		pageSize?: number
  76 | 	) => [...medicalKeys.vitalSigns, "byPatient", patientId, clinicId, fromDate, toDate, page, pageSize] as const,
  77 | 	vitalSignDetail: (id: string, clinicId: string) => [...medicalKeys.vitalSigns, "detail", id, clinicId] as const,
  78 | 	latestVitalSigns: (patientId: string, clinicId: string) =>
  79 | 		[...medicalKeys.vitalSigns, "latest", patientId, clinicId] as const,
  80 | 	vitalSignsByMedicalRecord: (medicalId: string) =>
  81 | 		[...medicalKeys.vitalSigns, "byMedicalRecord", medicalId] as const,
  82 | 
  83 | 	// Trend Data keys
  84 | 	trendData: (patientId: string, clinicId: string, days: number) =>
  85 | 		[...medicalKeys.all, "trendData", patientId, clinicId, days] as const,
  86 | 
  87 | 	// Access Control keys
  88 | 	vitalSignsAccess: (userId: string, patientId: string) =>
  89 | 		[...medicalKeys.all, "access", "vitalSigns", userId, patientId] as const,
  90 | 
  91 | 	// Payment keys
  92 | 	payments: ["payments"] as const,
  93 | 	paymentDetail: (id: string) => [...medicalKeys.payments, "detail", id] as const,
  94 | 	paymentsByPatient: (patientId: string) => [...medicalKeys.payments, "byPatient", patientId] as const,
  95 | 	paymentsByAppointment: (appointmentId: string) =>
  96 | 		[...medicalKeys.payments, "byAppointment", appointmentId] as const,
  97 | 	paymentsList: (filters: {
  98 | 		clinicId: string;
  99 | 		startDate?: Date;
 100 | 		endDate?: Date;
 101 | 		status?: PaymentStatus;
 102 | 		limit: number;
 103 | 		offset: number;
 104 | 	}) => [...medicalKeys.payments, "list", filters] as const,
 105 | 	clinicRevenue: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
 106 | 		[...medicalKeys.payments, "revenue", clinicId, startDate, endDate] as const,
 107 | 	timeLeftForAppointment: (appointmentId: string) => [...medicalKeys.all, "timeLeft", appointmentId] as const,
 108 | 
 109 | 	// Patient Bill keys
 110 | 	patientBills: ["patientBills"] as const,
 111 | 
 112 | 	// Complex Operations keys
 113 | 	completeEncounter: (medicalRecordId: string) => [...medicalKeys.all, "completeEncounter", medicalRecordId] as const,
 114 | 	createCompleteEncounter: ["createCompleteEncounter"] as const
 115 | };

 332 | // =======================
 333 | // Mutation Query Options (for useQueryClient invalidation)
 334 | // =======================
 335 | 
 336 | // These are helper keys for invalidating queries after mutations
 337 | export const medicalMutationKeys = {
 338 | 	// Medical Record mutations
 339 | 	createMedicalRecord: () => ["createMedicalRecord"] as const,
 340 | 	updateMedicalRecord: () => ["updateMedicalRecord"] as const,
 341 | 	deleteMedicalRecord: () => ["deleteMedicalRecord"] as const,
 342 | 	softDeleteMedicalRecord: () => ["softDeleteMedicalRecord"] as const,
 343 | 	restoreMedicalRecord: () => ["restoreMedicalRecord"] as const,
 344 | 
 345 | 	// Diagnosis mutations
 346 | 	createDiagnosis: () => ["createDiagnosis"] as const,
 347 | 	updateDiagnosis: () => ["updateDiagnosis"] as const,
 348 | 	deleteDiagnosis: () => ["deleteDiagnosis"] as const,
 349 | 	softDeleteDiagnosis: () => ["softDeleteDiagnosis"] as const,
 350 | 	restoreDiagnosis: () => ["restoreDiagnosis"] as const,
 351 | 
 352 | 	// Vital Sign mutations
 353 | 	createVitalSign: () => ["createVitalSign"] as const,
 354 | 	updateVitalSign: () => ["updateVitalSign"] as const,
 355 | 	deleteVitalSign: () => ["deleteVitalSign"] as const,
 356 | 
 357 | 	// Payment mutations
 358 | 	createBillForAppointment: () => ["createBillForAppointment"] as const,
 359 | 	processPayment: () => ["processPayment"] as const,
 360 | 
 361 | 	// Patient Bill mutations
 362 | 	createPatientBill: () => ["createPatientBill"] as const,
 363 | 	updatePatientBill: () => ["updatePatientBill"] as const,
 364 | 	deletePatientBill: () => ["deletePatientBill"] as const,
 365 | 
 366 | 	// Complex Operations mutations
 367 | 	completeEncounter: () => ["completeEncounter"] as const,
 368 | 	addVitalSignsToMedicalRecord: () => ["addVitalSignsToMedicalRecord"] as const,
 369 | 	createCompleteEncounter: () => ["createCompleteEncounter"] as const
 370 | };
 371 | 
 372 | // Invalidation helper
 373 | export const invalidateMedicalQueries = (
 374 | 	queryClient: QueryClient,
 375 | 	options?: {
 376 | 		patientId?: string;
 377 | 		medicalRecordId?: string;
 378 | 		appointmentId?: string;
 379 | 		clinicId?: string;
 380 | 	}
 381 | ) => {
 382 | 	const { patientId, medicalRecordId, appointmentId, clinicId } = options || {};
 383 | 
 384 | 	// Invalidate all medical records lists
 385 | 	queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: medicalKeys.medicalRecords });
 386 | 
 387 | 	// Invalidate patient-specific queries
 388 | 	if (patientId) {
 389 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 390 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.patientMedicalRecords(patientId, clinicId || "")
 391 | 		});
 392 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 393 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.patientEncounters(patientId, clinicId || "")
 394 | 		});
 395 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 396 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.vitalSignsList({ patientId, clinicId: clinicId || "" })
 397 | 		});
 398 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 399 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.latestVitalSigns(patientId, clinicId || "")
 400 | 		});
 401 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 402 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.paymentsByPatient(patientId)
 403 | 		});
 404 | 	}
 405 | 
 406 | 	// Invalidate medical record specific queries
 407 | 	if (medicalRecordId) {
 408 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 409 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.medicalRecordDetail(medicalRecordId, clinicId || "")
 410 | 		});
 411 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 412 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.diagnosesByMedicalRecord(medicalRecordId)
 413 | 		});
 414 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 415 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.vitalSignsByMedicalRecord(medicalRecordId)
 416 | 		});
 417 | 	}
 418 | 
 419 | 	// Invalidate appointment payment queries
 420 | 	if (appointmentId) {
 421 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 422 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.paymentsByAppointment(appointmentId)
 423 | 		});
 424 | 	}
 425 | 
 426 | 	// Invalidate clinic revenue
 427 | 	if (clinicId) {
 428 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 429 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.paymentsList({ clinicId, limit: 0, offset: 0 })
 430 | 		});
 431 | 	}
 432 | };

```

`data/functions/queries/pediatric.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // queries/pediatric.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { infiniteQueryOptions, queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   4 | 
   5 | import type { FeedingType, Gender, MeasurementType } from "@/db/schema";
   6 | import {
   7 |     addMeasurementPoint,
   8 |     bulkUpdateVaccineInventory,
```
