```ts
  41 | 
  42 | // =======================
  43 | // Query Keys
  44 | // =======================
  45 | 
  46 | export const pediatricKeys = {
  47 | 	all: ["pediatric"] as const,
  48 | 
  49 | 	// Growth Records
  50 | 	growthRecords: {
  51 | 		all: ["growthRecords"] as const,
  52 | 		byPatient: (patientId: string, clinicId: string) =>
  53 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "growthRecords", "patient", patientId, clinicId] as const,
  54 | 		list: (clinicId: string, patientId?: string, limit?: number, offset?: number) =>
  55 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "growthRecords", "list", clinicId, patientId, limit, offset] as const,
  56 | 		detail: (id: string, clinicId: string) =>
  57 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "growthRecords", "detail", id, clinicId] as const,
  58 | 		analytics: (patientId: string, clinicId: string) =>
  59 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "growthRecords", "analytics", patientId, clinicId] as const
  60 | 	},
  61 | 
  62 | 	// Feeding Logs
  63 | 	feedingLogs: {
  64 | 		all: ["feedingLogs"] as const,
  65 | 		list: (filters: {
  66 | 			patientId: string;
  67 | 			clinicId: string;
  68 | 			startDate?: Date;
  69 | 			endDate?: Date;
  70 | 			type?: FeedingType;
  71 | 			limit?: number;
  72 | 			offset?: number;
  73 | 		}) => [...pediatricKeys.all, "feedingLogs", "list", filters] as const,
  74 | 		infinite: (filters: {
  75 | 			patientId: string;
  76 | 			clinicId: string;
  77 | 			startDate?: Date;
  78 | 			endDate?: Date;
  79 | 			type?: FeedingType;
  80 | 			limit?: number;
  81 | 		}) => [...pediatricKeys.all, "feedingLogs", "infinite", filters] as const,
  82 | 		detail: (id: string) => [...pediatricKeys.all, "feedingLogs", "detail", id] as const,
  83 | 		stats: (patientId: string, clinicId: string, days?: number) =>
  84 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "feedingLogs", "stats", patientId, clinicId, days] as const,
  85 | 		breastfeedingStats: (patientId: string, clinicId: string, days?: number) =>
  86 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "feedingLogs", "breastfeedingStats", patientId, clinicId, days] as const,
  87 | 		byDateRange: (patientId: string, clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  88 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "feedingLogs", "dateRange", patientId, clinicId, startDate, endDate] as const,
  89 | 		latest: (patientId: string) => [...pediatricKeys.all, "feedingLogs", "latest", patientId] as const
  90 | 	},
  91 | 
  92 | 	// Developmental
  93 | 	developmental: {
  94 | 		all: ["developmental"] as const,
  95 | 		progress: (patientId: string) => [...pediatricKeys.all, "developmental", "progress", patientId] as const,
  96 | 		screenings: (patientId: string) => [...pediatricKeys.all, "developmental", "screenings", patientId] as const
  97 | 	},
  98 | 
  99 | 	// Immunizations
 100 | 	immunizations: {
 101 | 		all: ["immunizations"] as const,
 102 | 		list: (clinicId?: string, patientId?: string, limit?: number, offset?: number) =>
 103 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "immunizations", "list", clinicId, patientId, limit, offset] as const,
 104 | 		patientSchedule: (patientId: string) =>
 105 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "immunizations", "patientSchedule", patientId] as const,
 106 | 		vaccineSchedules: {
 107 | 			all: ["vaccineSchedules"] as const
 108 | 		},
 109 | 		vaccineInventory: (clinicId: string) =>
 110 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "immunizations", "vaccineInventory", clinicId] as const,
 111 | 		overdue: (clinicId: string) => [...pediatricKeys.all, "immunizations", "overdue", clinicId] as const,
 112 | 		upcoming: (clinicId: string) => [...pediatricKeys.all, "immunizations", "upcoming", clinicId] as const
 113 | 	},
 114 | 
 115 | 	// WHO Standards
 116 | 	whoStandards: (ageDays: number, gender: Gender, measurementType: MeasurementType) =>
 117 | 		[...pediatricKeys.all, "whoStandards", ageDays, gender, measurementType] as const
 118 | };

 127 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getPatientGrowthRecords({ data: { patientId, clinicId }, signal }),

 130 | 	});

 135 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => listGrowthRecords({ data: { clinicId, patientId, limit, offset }, signal }),

 138 | 	});

 167 | export const listFeedingLogsOptions = (filters: {
 168 | 	patientId: string;
 169 | 	clinicId: string;
 170 | 	startDate?: Date;
 171 | 	endDate?: Date;
 172 | 	type?: FeedingType;
 173 | 	limit?: number;
 174 | 	offset?: number;
 175 | }) =>
 176 | 	queryOptions({
 177 | 		queryKey: pediatricKeys.feedingLogs.list(filters),
 178 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => listFeedingLogs({ data: filters, signal }),
 179 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
 180 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
 181 | 	});
 182 | 
 183 | export const infiniteFeedingLogsOptions = (filters: {
 184 | 	patientId: string;
 185 | 	clinicId: string;
 186 | 	startDate?: Date;
 187 | 	endDate?: Date;
 188 | 	type?: FeedingType;
 189 | 	limit?: number;
 190 | }) =>
 191 | 	infiniteQueryOptions({
 192 | 		queryKey: pediatricKeys.feedingLogs.infinite(filters),
 193 | 		queryFn: ({ pageParam = 0, signal }) =>
 194 | 			listFeedingLogs({
 195 | 				data: { ...filters, offset: pageParam, limit: filters.limit ?? 50 },
 196 | 				signal
 197 | 			}),
 198 | 		initialPageParam: 0,
 199 | 		getNextPageParam: (lastPage, allPages) => {
 200 | 			const loadedItems = allPages.reduce((sum, page) => sum + page.logs.length, 0);
 201 | 			return loadedItems < lastPage.total ? loadedItems : undefined;
 202 | 		},
 203 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
 204 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
 205 | 	});
 206 | 
 207 | export const getFeedingLogByIdOptions = (id: string) =>
 208 | 	queryOptions({
 209 | 		queryKey: pediatricKeys.feedingLogs.detail(id),
 210 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getFeedingLogById({ data: { id }, signal }),
 211 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
 212 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
 213 | 	});
```

`data/functions/queries/pharmacy.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | 
   3 | import {
   4 | 	checkDoctorAccess,
   5 | 	checkDrugStock,
   6 | 	getDoseGuidelines,
   7 | 	getDrugsByIds,
   8 | 	getPatientActivePrescriptions,
   9 | 	getPatientAllergies,

  16 | 	listDrugs

  18 | 
  19 | export const pharmacyKeys = {
  20 | 	all: ["pharmacy"] as const,
  21 | 
  22 | 	// Prescription keys
  23 | 	prescriptions: ["prescriptions"] as const,
  24 | 	prescription: (id: string) => [...pharmacyKeys.prescriptions, id] as const,
  25 | 	prescriptionWithItems: (id: string, clinicId?: string) =>
  26 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.prescriptions, "withItems", id, clinicId] as const,
  27 | 	patientActivePrescriptions: (patientId: string, clinicId?: string, includeExpired?: boolean) =>
  28 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.prescriptions, "active", patientId, clinicId, includeExpired] as const,
  29 | 	prescriptionsByDateRange: (patientId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  30 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.prescriptions, "dateRange", patientId, startDate, endDate] as const,
  31 | 	prescriptionsForAnalytics: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  32 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.prescriptions, "analytics", clinicId, startDate, endDate] as const,
  33 | 
  34 | 	// Prescribed Item keys
  35 | 	prescribedItems: ["prescribedItems"] as const,
  36 | 	prescribedItem: (id: string) => [...pharmacyKeys.prescribedItems, id] as const,
  37 | 	prescribedItemsByPrescription: (prescriptionId: string) =>
  38 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.prescribedItems, "byPrescription", prescriptionId] as const,
  39 | 
  40 | 	// Drug keys
  41 | 	drugs: ["drugs"] as const,
  42 | 	drug: (id: string) => [...pharmacyKeys.drugs, id] as const,

  44 | 	drugList: (filters: { search?: string; category?: string; limit?: number; offset?: number }) =>
  45 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.drugs, "list", filters] as const,
  46 | 	drugStock: (clinicId: string, threshold?: number) => [...pharmacyKeys.drugs, "stock", clinicId, threshold] as const,
  47 | 
  48 | 	// Dose Guideline keys
  49 | 	doseGuidelines: ["doseGuidelines"] as const,
  50 | 	doseGuidelinesByDrugs: (drugIds: string[]) => [...pharmacyKeys.doseGuidelines, "byDrugs", drugIds.sort()] as const,
  51 | 
  52 | 	// Patient keys
  53 | 	patientAllergies: (patientId: string) => ["patient", patientId, "allergies"] as const,
  54 | 
  55 | 	// Access keys
  56 | 	doctorAccess: (doctorId: string, userId: string, clinicId?: string) =>
  57 | 		["access", "doctor", doctorId, userId, clinicId] as const
  58 | };

 163 | // =======================
 164 | // Dose Guideline Query Options
 165 | // =======================
 166 | 
 167 | export const getDoseGuidelinesOptions = (drugIds: string[]) =>
 168 | 	queryOptions({
 169 | 		queryKey: pharmacyKeys.doseGuidelinesByDrugs(drugIds),
 170 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getDoseGuidelines({ data: { drugIds }, signal }),
 171 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 60, // 1 hour
 172 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 120, // 2 hours
 173 | 		enabled: drugIds.length > 0
 174 | 	});
 175 | 
 176 | // =======================
 177 | // Patient Query Options
 178 | // =======================
 179 | 
 180 | export const getPatientAllergiesOptions = (patientId: string) =>
 181 | 	queryOptions({
 182 | 		queryKey: pharmacyKeys.patientAllergies(patientId),
 183 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getPatientAllergies({ data: { patientId }, signal }),
 184 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes
 185 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60 // 1 hour
 186 | 	});
 187 | 
 188 | // =======================
 189 | // Access Query Options
 190 | // =======================
 191 | 
 192 | export const checkDoctorAccessOptions = (doctorId: string, userId: string, clinicId?: string) =>
 193 | 	queryOptions({
 194 | 		queryKey: pharmacyKeys.doctorAccess(doctorId, userId, clinicId),
 195 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => checkDoctorAccess({ data: { doctorId, userId, clinicId }, signal }),
 196 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
 197 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
 198 | 	});
```

`data/functions/queries/staff.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | 
   3 | import type { StaffFilters } from "@/types";
   4 | import {
   5 |   getActiveStaffByDepartment,
   6 |   getStaffByEmail,
   7 |   getStaffById,
   8 |   getStaffByRole,
   9 |   getStaffByUserId,
  10 |   getStaffStatistics,
  11 |   getStaffWithUpcomingBirthdays,

  13 |   searchStaff
  14 | } from "../staff";
  15 | 
  16 | export const staffKeys = {
  17 | 	all: ["staff"] as const,
  18 | 
  19 | 	// List/Filter keys
  20 | 	list: (filters: StaffFilters) => [...staffKeys.all, "list", filters] as const,
  21 | 
  22 | 	// Detail keys

  24 | 	byUserId: (userId: string, clinicId: string) => [...staffKeys.all, "userId", userId, clinicId] as const,
  25 | 	byEmail: (email: string, clinicId: string) => [...staffKeys.all, "email", email, clinicId] as const,

  28 | 		[...staffKeys.all, "department", clinicId, department] as const,
  29 | 
  30 | 	// Search keys

  32 | 		[...staffKeys.all, "search", clinicId, searchTerm, limit] as const,
  33 | 
  34 | 	// Statistics keys

  36 | 
  37 | 	// Upcoming birthdays

  39 | };

  47 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.list(filters),
  48 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => listStaff({ data: filters, signal }),
  49 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
  50 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
  51 | 	});
  52 | 
  53 | export const getStaffByIdOptions = (id: string, clinicId: string) =>
  54 | 	queryOptions({
  55 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.detail(id, clinicId),
  56 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffById({ data: { id, clinicId }, signal }),
  57 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  58 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  59 | 	});
  60 | 
  61 | export const getStaffByUserIdOptions = (userId: string, clinicId: string) =>
  62 | 	queryOptions({
  63 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.byUserId(userId, clinicId),
  64 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffByUserId({ data: { userId, clinicId }, signal }),
  65 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  66 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  67 | 	});
  68 | 
  69 | export const getStaffByEmailOptions = (email: string, clinicId: string) =>
  70 | 	queryOptions({
  71 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.byEmail(email, clinicId),
  72 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffByEmail({ data: { email, clinicId }, signal }),
  73 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  74 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  75 | 	});
  76 | 
  77 | export const getStaffByRoleOptions = (clinicId: string, role: "admin" | "doctor" | "staff" | "patient") =>
  78 | 	queryOptions({
  79 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.byRole(clinicId, role),
  80 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffByRole({ data: { clinicId, role }, signal }),
  81 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  82 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  83 | 	});
  84 | 
  85 | export const getActiveStaffByDepartmentOptions = (clinicId: string, department: string) =>
  86 | 	queryOptions({

  88 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getActiveStaffByDepartment({ data: { clinicId, department }, signal }),
  89 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  90 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  91 | 	});
  92 | 
  93 | // =======================
  94 | // Search Query Options
  95 | // =======================
  96 | 
  97 | export const searchStaffOptions = (clinicId: string, searchTerm: string, limit = 20) =>
  98 | 	queryOptions({
  99 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.search(clinicId, searchTerm, limit),
 100 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => searchStaff({ data: { clinicId, searchTerm, limit }, signal }),
 101 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 1, // 1 minute
 102 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
 103 | 		enabled: searchTerm.length >= 2
 104 | 	});
 105 | 
 106 | // =======================
 107 | // Statistics Query Options
 108 | // =======================

 110 | export const getStaffStatisticsOptions = (clinicId: string) =>
 111 | 	queryOptions({
 112 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.statistics(clinicId),
 113 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffStatistics({ data: { clinicId }, signal }),
 114 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 10, // 10 minutes
 115 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 30 // 30 minutes
 116 | 	});
 117 | 
 118 | export const getStaffWithUpcomingBirthdaysOptions = (clinicId: string) =>

 121 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffWithUpcomingBirthdays({ data: { clinicId }, signal }),
```

`data/functions/queries/system.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/system.repo.query-options.ts
   2 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   3 | 
   4 | // =======================
   5 | // Query Keys
   6 | // =======================
   7 | 
   8 | export const systemKeys = {
   9 | 	all: ["system"] as const,
  10 | 
  11 | 	// File search keys
  12 | 	files: {
  13 | 		all: ["files"] as const,
  14 | 		search: (userId: string, searchTerm: string) =>
  15 | 			[...systemKeys.all, "files", "search", userId, searchTerm] as const,
  16 | 		advancedSearch: (filters: AdvancedSearchFilters) => [...systemKeys.all, "files", "advanced", filters] as const
  17 | 	},
  18 | 
  19 | 	// Notification keys
  20 | 	notifications: {
  21 | 		all: ["notifications"] as const,
  22 | 		list: (filters: NotificationFilters) => [...systemKeys.all, "notifications", "list", filters] as const,
  23 | 		user: (userId: string, clinicId?: string, limit?: number, offset?: number) =>
  24 | 			[...systemKeys.all, "notifications", "user", userId, clinicId, limit, offset] as const,
  25 | 		unreadCount: (userId: string, clinicId?: string) =>
  26 | 			[...systemKeys.all, "notifications", "unreadCount", userId, clinicId] as const
  27 | 	},
  28 | 
  29 | 	// Analytics keys
  30 | 	analytics: {
  31 | 		clinic: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  32 | 			[...systemKeys.all, "analytics", "clinic", clinicId, startDate, endDate] as const
  33 | 	},
  34 | 
  35 | 	// Config keys
  36 | 	configs: {
  37 | 		all: ["configs"] as const,
  38 | 		detail: (key: string) => [...systemKeys.all, "configs", "detail", key] as const,
  39 | 		multiple: (keys: string[]) => [...systemKeys.all, "configs", "multiple", keys] as const,
  40 | 		keys: ["configs", "keys"] as const
  41 | 	},
  42 | 
  43 | 	// Payment keys
  44 | 	payments: {
  45 | 		receipt: (paymentId: string) => [...systemKeys.all, "payments", "receipt", paymentId] as const
  46 | 	}
  47 | };
  48 | 
  49 | // =======================
  50 | // Types
  51 | // =======================
  52 | 
  53 | interface AdvancedSearchFilters {
  54 | 	clinicId?: string;
  55 | 	patientName?: string;
  56 | 	doctorName?: string;
  57 | 	dateFrom?: Date;
  58 | 	dateTo?: Date;
  59 | 	status?: "PENDING" | "CONFIRMED" | "COMPLETED" | "CANCELLED" | "NO_SHOW";
  60 | }
  61 | 
  62 | interface NotificationFilters {
  63 | 	userId: string;
  64 | 	clinicId?: string;
  65 | 	status?: "all" | "read" | "unread";
  66 | 	type?: string | null;
  67 | 	search?: string;
  68 | 	limit?: number;
  69 | 	offset?: number;
  70 | }
  71 | 
  72 | // =======================
  73 | // File Search Query Options
  74 | // =======================
  75 | 
  76 | export const searchFilesOptions = (userId: string, searchTerm: string) =>
  77 | 	queryOptions({
  78 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.files.search(userId, searchTerm),
  79 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => searchFiles({ data: { userId, searchTerm }, signal }),
  80 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 1, // 1 minute
  81 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  82 | 		enabled: searchTerm.length >= 2
  83 | 	});
  84 | 
  85 | export const advancedSearchOptions = (filters: AdvancedSearchFilters) =>
  86 | 	queryOptions({
  87 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.files.advancedSearch(filters),
  88 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => advancedSearch({ data: filters, signal }),
  89 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
  90 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
  91 | 	});
  92 | 
  93 | // =======================
  94 | // Notification Query Options
  95 | // =======================
  96 | 
  97 | export const listNotificationsOptions = (filters: NotificationFilters) =>
  98 | 	queryOptions({
  99 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.notifications.list(filters),
 100 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => listNotifications({ data: filters, signal }),
 101 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 30, // 30 seconds (notifications are frequent)
 102 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 2 // 2 minutes
 103 | 	});
 104 | 
 105 | export const getUserNotificationsOptions = (userId: string, clinicId?: string, limit = 5, offset = 0) =>
 106 | 	queryOptions({
 107 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.notifications.user(userId, clinicId, limit, offset),
 108 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getUserNotifications({ data: { userId, clinicId, limit, offset }, signal }),
 109 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 30, // 30 seconds
 110 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 2 // 2 minutes
 111 | 	});
 112 | 
 113 | // Helper to get just unread count (can be used with listNotifications response)
 114 | export const unreadNotificationsCountOptions = (userId: string, clinicId?: string) =>
 115 | 	queryOptions({
 116 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.notifications.unreadCount(userId, clinicId),
 117 | 		queryFn: async ({ signal }) => {
 118 | 			const result = await listNotifications({
 119 | 				data: {
 120 | 					userId,
 121 | 					clinicId,
 122 | 					status: "unread",
 123 | 					limit: 1,
 124 | 					offset: 0
 125 | 				},
 126 | 				signal
 127 | 			});
 128 | 			return result.unreadCount;
 129 | 		},
 130 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 15, // 15 seconds (unread count changes frequently)
 131 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 // 1 minute
 132 | 	});
 133 | 
 134 | // =======================
 135 | // Analytics Query Options
 136 | // =======================
 137 | 
 138 | export const getClinicAnalyticsOptions = (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
 139 | 	queryOptions({
 140 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.analytics.clinic(clinicId, startDate, endDate),
 141 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getClinicAnalytics({ data: { clinicId, startDate, endDate }, signal }),
 142 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 15, // 15 minutes (analytics don't change rapidly)
 143 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 30 // 30 minutes
 144 | 	});
 145 | 
 146 | // =======================
 147 | // Config Query Options
 148 | // =======================
 149 | 
 150 | export const getAllConfigsOptions = () =>
 151 | 	queryOptions({
 152 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.configs.all,
 153 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getAllConfigs({ signal }),
 154 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes (configs change rarely)
 155 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60 // 1 hour
 156 | 	});
 157 | 
 158 | export const getConfigOptions = (key: string) =>
 159 | 	queryOptions({
 160 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.configs.detail(key),
 161 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getConfig({ data: { key }, signal }),
 162 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes
 163 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60 // 1 hour
 164 | 	});
 165 | 
 166 | export const getConfigsOptions = (keys: string[]) =>
 167 | 	queryOptions({
 168 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.configs.multiple(keys),
 169 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getConfigs({ data: { keys }, signal }),
 170 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes
 171 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60, // 1 hour
 172 | 		enabled: keys.length > 0
 173 | 	});
 174 | 
 175 | export const getExistingConfigKeysOptions = () =>
 176 | 	queryOptions({
 177 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.configs.keys,
 178 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getExistingConfigKeys({ signal }),
 179 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 60, // 1 hour
 180 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 120 // 2 hours
 181 | 	});
 182 | 
 183 | // =======================
 184 | // Payment Query Options
 185 | // =======================
 186 | 
 187 | export const generateReceiptOptions = (paymentId: string) =>
 188 | 	queryOptions({
 189 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.payments.receipt(paymentId),
 190 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => generateReceipt({ data: { paymentId }, signal }),
 191 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 60, // 1 hour (receipts are immutable once generated)
 192 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 120, // 2 hours
 193 | 		enabled: !!paymentId
 194 | 	});
 195 | 
 196 | // =======================
 197 | // Infinite Query Options (for paginated notifications)
 198 | // =======================
 199 | 
 200 | import { infiniteQueryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
 201 | 
 202 | import {
 203 | 	advancedSearch,
 204 | 	generateReceipt,
 205 | 	getAllConfigs,
 206 | 	getClinicAnalytics,
 207 | 	getConfig,
 208 | 	getConfigs,
 209 | 	getExistingConfigKeys,
 210 | 	getUserNotifications,
 211 | 	listNotifications,
 212 | 	searchFiles
 213 | } from "../system";
 214 | 
 215 | export const infiniteNotificationsOptions = (filters: Omit<NotificationFilters, "offset">) =>
 216 | 	infiniteQueryOptions({
 217 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.notifications.list({ ...filters, offset: 0 }),
 218 | 		queryFn: ({ pageParam = 0, signal }) =>
 219 | 			listNotifications({
 220 | 				data: { ...filters, offset: pageParam },
 221 | 				signal
 222 | 			}),
 223 | 		initialPageParam: 0,
 224 | 		getNextPageParam: (lastPage, allPages) => {
 225 | 			const loadedItems = allPages.reduce((sum, page) => sum + page.items.length, 0);
 226 | 			return loadedItems < lastPage.total ? loadedItems : undefined;
 227 | 		},
 228 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 30, // 30 seconds
 229 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
 230 | 	});

```

`data/functions/staff.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/staff.repo.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import console from "node:console";
   4 | 
   5 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   6 | import { and, eq, inArray, like, or, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   7 | import z from "zod";
   8 | 
   9 | import { db } from "@/db";
  10 | import * as schema from "@/db/schema";
  11 | 
  12 | // =======================
  13 | // Zod Validators
  14 | // =======================
  15 | 
  16 | const listStaffSchema = z.object({
  17 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  18 | 	page: z.number().min(1).default(1),
  19 | 	limit: z.number().min(1).max(100).default(20),
  20 | 	search: z.string().optional(),
  21 | 	role: z.enum(["admin", "doctor", "staff", "patient"]).optional(),
  22 | 	status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "INACTIVE", "PENDING", "SUSPENDED"]).optional()
  23 | });
  24 | 
  25 | const staffIdSchema = z.object({
  26 | 	id: z.string(),
  27 | 	clinicId: z.string()
  28 | });
  29 | 
  30 | const createStaffSchema = z.object({
  31 | 	id: z.string().optional(),
  32 | 	email: z.string().email().optional(),
  33 | 	name: z.string().min(1),
  34 | 	phone: z.string().optional(),
  35 | 	userId: z.string().optional(),
  36 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  37 | 	address: z.string(),
  38 | 	department: z.string().optional(),
  39 | 	img: z.string().optional(),
  40 | 	licenseNumber: z.string().optional(),
  41 | 	colorCode: z.string().optional(),
  42 | 	hireDate: z.date().optional(),
  43 | 	salary: z.number().optional(),
  44 | 	role: z.enum(["admin", "doctor", "staff", "patient"]),
  45 | 	status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "INACTIVE", "PENDING", "SUSPENDED"]).default("ACTIVE"),
  46 | 	isActive: z.boolean().default(true)
  47 | });
  48 | 
  49 | const updateStaffSchema = createStaffSchema.partial();
  50 | 
  51 | const bulkStaffUpdateSchema = z.object({
  52 | 	ids: z.array(z.string()),
  53 | 	data: updateStaffSchema
  54 | });
  55 | 
  56 | // =======================
  57 | // Server Functions
  58 | // =======================
  59 | 
  60 | const listStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  61 | 	.validator(listStaffSchema)
  62 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
  63 | 		try {
  64 | 			const { clinicId, page, limit, search, role, status } = ctx.data;
  65 | 			const offset = (page - 1) * limit;
  66 | 
  67 | 			const whereConditions: Record<string, unknown> = {
  68 | 				clinicId,
  69 | 				isActive: true
  70 | 			};
  71 | 
  72 | 			if (role) whereConditions.role = role;
  73 | 			if (status) whereConditions.status = status;
  74 | 
  75 | 			if (search) {
  76 | 				whereConditions.OR = [
  77 | 					{ name: { like: `%${search}%` } },
  78 | 					{ email: { like: `%${search}%` } },
  79 | 					{ phone: { like: `%${search}%` } },
  80 | 					{ department: { like: `%${search}%` } }
  81 | 				];
  82 | 			}
  83 | 
  84 | 			const [staffList, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
  85 | 				db.query.staff.findMany({
  86 | 					where: whereConditions,
  87 | 					limit,
  88 | 					offset,
  89 | 					orderBy: (staff, { asc }) => asc(staff.name)
  90 | 				}),
  91 | 				db
  92 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
  93 | 					.from(schema.staff)
  94 | 					.where(
  95 | 						and(
  96 | 							eq(schema.staff.clinicId, clinicId),
  97 | 							eq(schema.staff.isActive, true),
  98 | 							role ? eq(schema.staff.role, role) : undefined,
  99 | 							status ? eq(schema.staff.status, status) : undefined,
 100 | 							search
 101 | 								? or(
 102 | 										like(schema.staff.name, `%${search}%`),
 103 | 										like(schema.staff.email, `%${search}%`),
 104 | 										like(schema.staff.phone, `%${search}%`),
 105 | 										like(schema.staff.department, `%${search}%`)
 106 | 									)
 107 | 								: undefined
 108 | 						)
 109 | 					)
 110 | 			]);
 111 | 
 112 | 			const total = Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0);
 113 | 
 114 | 			return {
 115 | 				staff: staffList,
 116 | 				total,
 117 | 				totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit)
 118 | 			};
 119 | 		} catch (error) {
 120 | 			console.error("Error listing staff:", error);
 121 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list staff");
 122 | 		}
 123 | 	});
 124 | 
 125 | const getStaffById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 126 | 	.validator(staffIdSchema)
 127 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 128 | 		try {
 129 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 130 | 			const staff = await db.query.staff.findFirst({
 131 | 				where: { id, clinicId, isActive: true }
 132 | 			});
 133 | 			return staff;
 134 | 		} catch (error) {
 135 | 			console.error("Error getting staff by ID:", error);
 136 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get staff");
 137 | 		}
 138 | 	});
 139 | 
 140 | const createStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 141 | 	.validator(createStaffSchema)
 142 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 143 | 		try {
 144 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 145 | 			const now = new Date();
 146 | 
 147 | 			const [result] = await db
 148 | 				.insert(schema.staff)
 149 | 				.values({
 150 | 					id: data.id || crypto.randomUUID(),
 151 | 					...data,
 152 | 					createdAt: now,
 153 | 					updatedAt: now
 154 | 				})
 155 | 				.returning();
 156 | 
 157 | 			return result;
 158 | 		} catch (error) {
 159 | 			console.error("Error creating staff:", error);
 160 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create staff");
 161 | 		}
 162 | 	});
 163 | 
 164 | const createManyStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 165 | 	.validator(z.object({ staffList: z.array(createStaffSchema) }))
 166 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 167 | 		try {
 168 | 			const { staffList } = ctx.data;
 169 | 			const now = new Date();
 170 | 
 171 | 			const staffWithIds = staffList.map(staff => ({
 172 | 				...staff,
 173 | 				id: staff.id || crypto.randomUUID(),
 174 | 				createdAt: now,
 175 | 				updatedAt: now
 176 | 			}));
 177 | 
 178 | 			const result = await db.insert(schema.staff).values(staffWithIds).returning();
 179 | 
 180 | 			return result;
 181 | 		} catch (error) {
 182 | 			console.error("Error creating multiple staff members:", error);
 183 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create staff members");
 184 | 		}
 185 | 	});
 186 | 
 187 | const updateStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 188 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string(), data: updateStaffSchema }))
 189 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 190 | 		try {
 191 | 			const { id, data } = ctx.data;
 192 | 
 193 | 			const [result] = await db
 194 | 				.update(schema.staff)
 195 | 				.set({
 196 | 					...data,
 197 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 198 | 				})
 199 | 				.where(eq(schema.staff.id, id))
 200 | 				.returning();
 201 | 
 202 | 			if (!result) {
 203 | 				throw new Error("Staff member not found");
 204 | 			}
 205 | 
 206 | 			return result;
 207 | 		} catch (error) {
 208 | 			console.error("Error updating staff:", error);
 209 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update staff");
 210 | 		}
 211 | 	});
 212 | 
 213 | const updateManyStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 214 | 	.validator(bulkStaffUpdateSchema)
 215 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 216 | 		try {
 217 | 			const { ids, data } = ctx.data;
 218 |

 222 | 					...data,

 224 | 				})

 231 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update staff members");
 232 | 		}

 235 | const deleteStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 236 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string() }))
 237 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 238 | 		try {
 239 | 			const { id } = ctx.data;
 240 |

 242 | 
 243 | 			if (!result) {
 244 | 				throw new Error("Staff member not found");
 245 | 			}
 246 | 
 247 | 			return result;
 248 | 		} catch (error) {
 249 | 			console.error("Error deleting staff:", error);
 250 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete staff");
 251 | 		}
 252 | 	});

 256 | 	.handler(async ctx => {

 263 | 					deletedAt: new Date(),

 265 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 266 | 				})
 267 | 				.where(eq(schema.staff.id, id))
 268 | 				.returning();
 269 | 
 270 | 			if (!result) {
 271 | 				throw new Error("Staff member not found");
 272 | 			}
 273 | 
 274 | 			return result;

 390 | 				.set({

 405 | const searchStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 406 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string(), searchTerm: z.string().min(1), limit: z.number().default(20) }))
 407 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 408 | 		try {
 409 | 			const { clinicId, searchTerm, limit } = ctx.data;
 410 | 
 411 | 			const staff = await db.query.staff.findMany({
 412 | 				where: {
 413 | 					clinicId,
 414 | 					isActive: true,
 415 | 					OR: [
 416 | 						{ name: { like: `%${searchTerm}%` } },
 417 | 						{ email: { like: `%${searchTerm}%` } },
 418 | 						{ phone: { like: `%${searchTerm}%` } },
 419 | 						{ department: { like: `%${searchTerm}%` } }
 420 | 					]
 421 | 				},
 422 | 				limit
 423 | 			});
 424 | 
 425 | 			return staff;
 426 | 		} catch (error) {
 427 | 			console.error("Error searching staff:", error);
 428 | 			throw new Error("Failed to search staff");
 429 | 		}
 430 | 	});
 431 | 
 432 | const getStaffStatistics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 433 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string() }))
 434 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 435 | 		try {
 436 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 437 | 
 438 | 			const stats = await db
 439 | 				.select({
 440 | 					total: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)`,
 441 | 					active: sql<number>`CAST(sum(CASE WHEN ${schema.staff.isActive} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)`,
 442 | 					inactive: sql<number>`CAST(sum(CASE WHEN NOT ${schema.staff.isActive} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)`
 443 | 				})
 444 | 				.from(schema.staff)
 445 | 				.where(eq(schema.staff.clinicId, clinicId));
 446 | 
 447 | 			// Get role breakdown separately
 448 | 			const roleBreakdown = await db
 449 | 				.select({
 450 | 					role: schema.staff.role,
 451 | 					count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)`
 452 | 				})
 453 | 				.from(schema.staff)
 454 | 				.where(eq(schema.staff.clinicId, clinicId))
 455 | 				.groupBy(schema.staff.role);
 456 | 
 457 | 			return {
 458 | 				total: stats[0]?.total ?? 0,
 459 | 				active: stats[0]?.active ?? 0,
 460 | 				inactive: stats[0]?.inactive ?? 0,
 461 | 				roleBreakdown
 462 | 			};
 463 | 		} catch (error) {
 464 | 			console.error("Error getting staff statistics:", error);
 465 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get staff statistics");
 466 | 		}
 467 | 	});
 468 |

 472 | 		try {
 473 | 			// This would require a birthday field in staff table
 474 | 			// Placeholder implementation
 475 | 			const staff = await db.query.staff.findMany({
 476 | 				where: { clinicId: ctx.data.clinicId, isActive: true },
 477 | 				limit: 10
 478 | 			});
 479 | 
 480 | 			return staff;
 481 | 		} catch (error) {
 482 | 			console.error("Error getting staff birthdays:", error);
 483 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get staff birthdays");
 484 | 		}
 485 | 	});

 489 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
```

`data/functions/system.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/system.repo.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   4 | import { and, eq, like, or, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   5 | import z from "zod";
   6 | 
   7 | import { db } from "@/db";
   8 | import * as schema from "@/db/schema";
   9 | 
  10 | // =======================
  11 | // Zod Validators
  12 | // =======================
  13 | 
  14 | type JSONValue = string | number | boolean | null | { [x: string]: JSONValue } | Array<JSONValue>;
  15 | 
  16 | interface SerializableNotification {
  17 | 	id: string;
  18 | 	userId: string;
  19 | 	clinicId: string;
  20 | 	title: string;
  21 | 	body: string;
  22 | 	type: string | null;
  23 | 	status: "read" | "unread";
  24 | 	priority: "high" | "medium" | "low" | null;
  25 | 	createdAt: Date;
  26 | 	updatedAt: Date;
  27 | 	actions: { label: string; href: string; payload?: Record<string, JSONValue> }[] | null;
  28 | 	metadata: Record<string, JSONValue> | null;
  29 | }
  30 | 
  31 | const searchFilesSchema = z.object({
  32 | 	userId: z.string(),
  33 | 	searchTerm: z.string()
  34 | });

  37 | 	clinicId: z.string().optional(),

  43 | });

  46 | 	userId: z.string(),
  47 | 	clinicId: z.string().optional(),
  48 | 	status: z.enum(["all", "read", "unread"]).default("all"),
  49 | 	type: z.string().nullable().optional(),
  50 | 	search: z.string().optional(),
  51 | 	limit: z.number().default(20),
  52 | 	offset: z.number().default(0)
  53 | });

 155 | 
 156 | const searchFiles = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 157 | 	.validator(searchFilesSchema)
 158 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 159 | 		try {
 160 | 			const { userId, searchTerm } = ctx.data;
 161 | 
 162 | 			// ✅ FIX: Use object syntax for RQB v2
 163 | 			const files = await db.query.file.findMany({
 164 | 				where: {
 165 | 					userId: userId,
 166 | 					searchText: { like: `%${searchTerm}%` }
 167 | 				},
 168 | 				orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
 169 | 			});
 170 | 
 171 | 			return files;
 172 | 		} catch (error) {
 173 | 			console.error("Error searching files:", error);
 174 | 			throw new Error("Failed to search files");
 175 | 		}
 176 | 	});
 177 | 
 178 | const advancedSearch = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 179 | 	.validator(advancedSearchSchema)
 180 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 181 | 		try {
 182 | 			const { clinicId, patientName, doctorName, dateFrom, dateTo, status } = ctx.data;
 183 | 
 184 | 			// Build where conditions
 185 | 			const where: Record<string, unknown> = {
 186 | 				isDeleted: false,
 187 | 				deletedAt: null
 188 | 			};
 189 | 
 190 | 			if (clinicId) where.clinicId = clinicId;
 191 | 			if (status) where.status = status;
 192 | 			if (dateFrom && dateTo) {
 193 | 				where.appointmentDate = { gte: dateFrom, lte: dateTo };
 194 | 			}
 195 | 
 196 | 			// ✅ FIX: Build with clause with conditional includes
 197 | 			const withClause: Record<string, unknown> = {
 198 | 				service: true,
 199 | 				bills: true
 200 | 			};
 201 | 
 202 | 			if (patientName) {
 203 | 				withClause.patient = {
 204 | 					where: {
 205 | 						OR: [{ firstName: { like: `%${patientName}%` } }, { lastName: { like: `%${patientName}%` } }]
 206 | 					}
 207 | 				};
 208 | 			} else {
 209 | 				withClause.patient = true;
 210 | 			}
 211 | 
 212 | 			if (doctorName) {
 213 | 				withClause.doctor = {
 214 | 					where: {
 215 | 						name: { like: `%${doctorName}%` }
 216 | 					}
 217 | 				};
 218 | 			} else {
 219 | 				withClause.doctor = true;
 220 | 			}
 221 | 
 222 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 223 | 				where,
 224 | 				with: withClause,
 225 | 				orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
 226 | 			});
 227 | 
 228 | 			return appointments;
 229 | 		} catch (error) {
 230 | 			console.error("Error in advanced search:", error);
 231 | 			throw new Error("Failed to perform advanced search");
 232 | 		}
 233 | 	});
 234 | 
 235 | const getUserNotifications = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 236 | 	.validator(
 237 | 		z.object({
 238 | 			userId: z.string(),
 239 | 			clinicId: z.string().optional(),
 240 | 			limit: z.number().default(5),
 241 | 			offset: z.number().default(0)
 242 | 		})
 243 | 	)
 244 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 245 | 		try {
 246 | 			const { userId, clinicId, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 247 | 
 248 | 			// ✅ RQB v2 object syntax
 249 | 			const where: Record<string, unknown> = { userId };
 250 | 			if (clinicId) where.clinicId = clinicId;
 251 | 
 252 | 			const notifications = await db.query.notification.findMany({
 253 | 				where,
 254 | 				orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
 255 | 				limit,
 256 | 				offset
 257 | 			});
 258 | 
 259 | 			return notifications as unknown as SerializableNotification[];
 260 | 		} catch (error) {
 261 | 			console.error("Error getting user notifications:", error);
 262 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get notifications");
 263 | 		}
 264 | 	});
 265 | 
 266 | const listNotifications = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 267 | 	.validator(notificationsListSchema)
 268 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 269 | 		try {
 270 | 			const { userId, clinicId, status, type, search, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 271 | 
 272 | 			// ✅ Build where clause using RQB v2 object syntax
 273 | 			const where: Record<string, unknown> = { userId };
 274 | 
 275 | 			if (clinicId) where.clinicId = clinicId;
 276 | 
 277 | 			if (status === "unread") where.status = "unread";
 278 | 			if (status === "read") where.status = "read";
 279 | 			if (type) where.type = type;
 280 | 
 281 | 			// ✅ Handle search with OR condition
 282 | 			if (search) {
 283 | 				where.OR = [{ body: { like: `%${search}%` } }, { title: { like: `%${search}%` } }];
 284 | 			}
 285 | 
 286 | 			const totalResult = await db
 287 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 288 | 				.from(schema.notification)
 289 | 				.where(
 290 | 					and(
 291 | 						eq(schema.notification.userId, userId),
 292 | 						clinicId ? eq(schema.notification.clinicId, clinicId) : undefined,
 293 | 						status === "unread" ? eq(schema.notification.status, "unread") : undefined,
 294 | 						status === "read" ? eq(schema.notification.status, "read") : undefined,
 295 | 						type ? eq(schema.notification.type, type) : undefined,
 296 | 						search
 297 | 							? or(
 298 | 									like(schema.notification.body, `%${search}%`),
 299 | 									like(schema.notification.title, `%${search}%`)
 300 | 								)
 301 | 							: undefined
 302 | 					)
 303 | 				);
 304 | 
 305 | 			const unreadResult = await db
 306 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 307 | 				.from(schema.notification)
 308 | 				.where(
 309 | 					and(
 310 | 						eq(schema.notification.userId, userId),
 311 | 						clinicId ? eq(schema.notification.clinicId, clinicId) : undefined,
 312 | 						eq(schema.notification.status, "unread")
 313 | 					)
 314 | 				);
 315 | 
 316 | 			// ✅ Get paginated items using RQB v2
 317 | 			const items = await db.query.notification.findMany({
 318 | 				where,
 319 | 				orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
 320 | 				limit,
 321 | 				offset
 322 | 			});
 323 | 
 324 | 			return {
 325 | 				items: items as unknown as SerializableNotification[],
 326 | 				total: Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0),
 327 | 				unreadCount: Number(unreadResult[0]?.count ?? 0)
 328 | 			};
 329 | 		} catch (error) {
 330 | 			console.error("Error listing notifications:", error);
 331 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list notifications");
 332 | 		}
 333 | 	});
 334 |

 338 | 		try {

 340 |

 342 | 				.update(schema.notification)
 343 | 				.set({ status: "read", updatedAt: new Date() })
 344 | 				.where(
 345 | 					and(
 346 | 						eq(schema.notification.id, notificationId),
 347 | 						userId ? eq(schema.notification.userId, userId) : sql`TRUE`
 348 | 					)
 349 | 				)
 350 | 				.returning();
 351 | 
 352 | 			return result as unknown as SerializableNotification[];
 353 | 		} catch (error) {
 354 | 			console.error("Error marking notification as read:", error);
 355 | 			throw new Error("Failed to mark notification as read");
 356 | 		}

 366 | 			if (clinicId) conditions.push(eq(schema.notification.clinicId, clinicId));
 367 |

 369 | 				.update(schema.notification)
 370 | 				.set({ status: "read", updatedAt: new Date() })
 371 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
 372 | 				.returning();
 373 | 
 374 | 			return result as unknown as SerializableNotification[];

 420 | const getClinicAnalytics = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 421 | 	.validator(clinicAnalyticsSchema)
 422 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 423 | 		try {
 424 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 425 | 
 426 | 			// ✅ FIX: Use object syntax for all queries
 427 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 428 | 				where: {
 429 | 					clinicId,
 430 | 					isDeleted: false,
 431 | 					appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 432 | 				}
 433 | 			});
 434 | 
 435 | 			const payments = await db.query.payment.findMany({
 436 | 				where: {
 437 | 					clinicId,
 438 | 					status: "PAID",
 439 | 					paymentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 440 | 				}
 441 | 			});
 442 | 
 443 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 444 | 				where: {
 445 | 					clinicId,
 446 | 					isDeleted: false,
 447 | 					createdAt: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 448 | 				}
 449 | 			});
 450 | 
 451 | 			const prescriptions = await db.query.prescription.findMany({
 452 | 				where: {
 453 | 					clinicId,
 454 | 					issuedDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 455 | 				}
 456 | 			});
 457 | 
 458 | 			const appointmentStats = {
 459 | 				total: appointments.length,
 460 | 				completed: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED").length,
 461 | 				cancelled: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CANCELLED").length,
 462 | 				pending: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "PENDING").length,
 463 | 				noShow: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "NO_SHOW").length
 464 | 			};
 465 | 
 466 | 			const revenue = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.amount ?? 0), 0);
 467 | 			const revenueByMethod = payments.reduce(
 468 | 				(acc, p) => {
 469 | 					const method = p.paymentMethod || "UNKNOWN";
 470 | 					acc[method] = (acc[method] || 0) + (p.amount ?? 0);
 471 | 					return acc;
 472 | 				},
 473 | 				{} as Record<string, number>
 474 | 			);
 475 | 
 476 | 			return {
 477 | 				period: { startDate, endDate },
 478 | 				appointments: appointmentStats,
 479 | 				revenue: {
 480 | 					total: revenue,
 481 | 					byMethod: revenueByMethod,
 482 | 					averagePerAppointment: appointmentStats.completed > 0 ? revenue / appointmentStats.completed : 0
 483 | 				},
 484 | 				patients: {
 485 | 					total: patients.length,
 486 | 					newPatients: patients.length
 487 | 				},
 488 | 				prescriptions: prescriptions.length
 489 | 			};
 490 | 		} catch (error) {
 491 | 			console.error("Error getting clinic analytics:", error);
 492 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get clinic analytics");
 493 | 		}
 494 | 	});

 578 | const createPayment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 579 | 	.validator(createPaymentSchema)
 580 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 581 | 		try {
 582 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 583 | 			const [result] = await db
 584 | 				.insert(schema.payment)
 585 | 				.values({
 586 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 587 | 					...data,
 588 | 					billDate: data.billDate || new Date(),
 589 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 590 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 591 | 				})
 592 | 				.returning();
 593 | 			return result;
 594 | 		} catch (error) {
 595 | 			console.error("Error creating payment:", error);
 596 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create payment");
 597 | 		}

 600 | const recordPayment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 601 | 	.validator(createPaymentSchema)
 602 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 603 | 		try {
 604 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 605 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
 606 | 				const [payment] = await tx
 607 | 					.insert(schema.payment)
 608 | 					.values({
 609 | 						id: data.id || crypto.randomUUID(),
 610 | 						...data,
 611 | 						billDate: data.billDate || new Date(),
 612 | 						totalAmount: data.totalAmount || data.amount,
 613 | 						amountPaid: data.status === "PAID" ? data.amount : 0,
 614 | 						paidDate: data.status === "PAID" ? new Date() : null,
 615 | 						receiptNumber: data.receiptNumber || Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000),
 616 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 617 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 618 | 					})
 619 | 					.returning();
 620 | 				return payment;
 621 | 			});
 622 | 			return result;
 623 | 		} catch (error) {
 624 | 			console.error("Error recording payment:", error);
 625 | 			throw new Error("Failed to record payment");
 626 | 		}
 627 | 	});

 750 | const processPaymentWithReceipt = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 751 | 	.validator(processPaymentSchema)
 752 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 753 | 		try {
 754 | 			const { paymentId, amountPaid, paymentMethod, notes } = ctx.data;
 755 | 
 756 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
 757 | 				// ✅ FIX: Use object syntax for with clause
 758 | 				const payment = await tx.query.payment.findFirst({
 759 | 					where: { id: paymentId },
 760 | 					with: {
 761 | 						patient: true,
 762 | 						appointment: true
 763 | 					}
 764 | 				});
 765 | 
 766 | 				if (!payment) {
 767 | 					throw new Error("Payment not found");
 768 | 				}
 769 | 
 770 | 				const isFullyPaid = amountPaid >= (payment.totalAmount ?? 0);
 771 | 				const receiptNumber = `RCP-${Date.now()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000)}`;
 772 | 
 773 | 				const [updatedPayment] = await tx
 774 | 					.update(schema.payment)
 775 | 					.set({
 776 | 						amountPaid,
 777 | 						paymentMethod,
 778 | 						paymentDate: new Date(),
 779 | 						paidDate: new Date(),
 780 | 						status: isFullyPaid ? "PAID" : "PARTIAL",
 781 | 						notes: notes ? `${payment.notes || ""}\n${notes}` : payment.notes,
 782 | 						receiptNumber: Number.parseInt(receiptNumber.split("-").pop() || "0", 10),
 783 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 784 | 					})
 785 | 					.where(eq(schema.payment.id, paymentId))
 786 | 					.returning();
 787 | 
 788 | 				if (payment.patient?.userId) {
 789 | 					await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
 790 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 791 | 						userId: payment.patient.userId,
 792 | 						clinicId: payment.clinicId ?? "",
 793 | 						title: "Payment Receipt",
 794 | 						body: `Payment of ${amountPaid} received. Receipt #: ${receiptNumber}`,
 795 | 						type: "payment_receipt",
 796 | 						priority: "medium",
 797 | 						status: "unread",
 798 | 						metadata: {
 799 | 							receiptNumber,
 800 | 							amountPaid,
 801 | 							paymentMethod
 802 | 						},
 803 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 804 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 805 | 					});
 806 | 				}
 807 | 
 808 | 				return updatedPayment;
 809 | 			});
 810 | 
 811 | 			return result;
 812 | 		} catch (error) {
 813 | 			console.error("Error processing payment with receipt:", error);
 814 | 			throw new Error("Failed to process payment");
 815 | 		}
 816 | 	});

 822 | const getAllConfigs = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
 823 | 	try {
 824 | 		const configs = await db.select().from(schema.configStore);
 825 | 		return configs;
```
