```ts
 832 | const getConfig = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 833 | 	.validator(z.object({ key: z.string() }))
 834 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 835 | 		try {
 836 | 			const { key } = ctx.data;
 837 | 			const result = await db.select().from(schema.configStore).where(eq(schema.configStore.key, key)).limit(1);
 838 | 			return result[0] || null;
 839 | 		} catch (error) {
 840 | 			console.error("Error getting config:", error);
 841 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get config");
 842 | 		}
 843 | 	});
 844 | 
 845 | const getConfigs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 846 | 	.validator(z.object({ keys: z.array(z.string()) }))
 847 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 848 | 		try {
 849 | 			const { keys } = ctx.data;
 850 | 			const results = await Promise.all(keys.map(key => getConfig({ data: { key } })));
 851 | 			return results.reduce(
 852 | 				(acc, result, idx) => {
 853 | 					if (result) acc[keys[idx] ?? ""] = result.value;
 854 | 					return acc;
 855 | 				},
 856 | 				{} as Record<string, string>
 857 | 			);
 858 | 		} catch (error) {
 859 | 			console.error("Error getting multiple configs:", error);
 860 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get configs");
 861 | 		}
 862 | 	});
 863 | 
 864 | const setConfig = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 865 | 	.validator(setConfigSchema)
 866 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 867 | 		try {
 868 | 			const { key, value } = ctx.data;
 869 | 			await db.insert(schema.configStore).values({ key, value }).onConflictDoUpdate({
 870 | 				target: schema.configStore.key,
 871 | 				set: { value }
 872 | 			});
 873 | 
 874 | 			return { success: true, key };
 875 | 		} catch (error) {
 876 | 			console.error("Error setting config:", error);
 877 | 			throw new Error("Failed to set config");
 878 | 		}
 879 | 	});
 880 | 
 881 | const setConfigs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 882 | 	.validator(setConfigsSchema)
 883 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 884 | 		try {
 885 | 			const { configs } = ctx.data;
 886 | 			for (const config of configs) {
 887 | 				await setConfig({ data: config });
 888 | 			}
 889 | 			return { success: true, count: configs.length };
 890 | 		} catch (error) {
 891 | 			console.error("Error setting multiple configs:", error);
 892 | 			throw new Error("Failed to set configs");
 893 | 		}
 894 | 	});
 895 | 
 896 | const deleteConfig = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 897 | 	.validator(z.object({ key: z.string() }))
 898 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 899 | 		try {
 900 | 			const { key } = ctx.data;
 901 | 			await db.delete(schema.configStore).where(eq(schema.configStore.key, key));
 902 | 			return { success: true, key };
 903 | 		} catch (error) {
 904 | 			console.error("Error deleting config:", error);
 905 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete config");
 906 | 		}
 907 | 	});
 908 | 
 909 | const getExistingConfigKeys = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
 910 | 	try {
 911 | 		const rows = await db.select({ key: schema.configStore.key }).from(schema.configStore);
 912 | 		return rows.map(row => row.key);
 913 | 	} catch (error) {
 914 | 		console.error("Error getting existing config keys:", error);
 915 | 		throw new Error("Failed to get config keys");
 916 | 	}
 917 | });
 918 | 
 919 | const initializeMissingConfigs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 920 | 	.validator(initializeConfigsSchema)
 921 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 922 | 		try {
 923 | 			const { defaults } = ctx.data;
 924 | 			const existingKeys = await getExistingConfigKeys();
 925 | 			const missing = defaults.filter(d => !existingKeys.includes(d.key));
 926 | 
 927 | 			if (missing.length > 0) {
 928 | 				await db.insert(schema.configStore).values(missing).onConflictDoNothing();
 929 | 			}
 930 | 
 931 | 			return missing;
 932 | 		} catch (error) {
 933 | 			console.error("Error initializing missing configs:", error);
 934 | 			throw new Error("Failed to initialize configs");
 935 | 		}
 936 | 	});
 937 | 
 938 | export {
 939 | 	advancedSearch,
 940 | 	// checkDoctorAccess,
 941 | 	// checkVitalSignsAccess,
 942 | 	clearAllNotifications,
 943 | 	createInvoice,
 944 | 	createPayment,
 945 | 	deleteConfig,
 946 | 	deleteNotification,
 947 | 	deletePayment,
 948 | 	generateReceipt,
 949 | 	getAllConfigs,
 950 | 	getClinicAnalytics,
 951 | 	getConfig,
 952 | 	getConfigs,
 953 | 	getExistingConfigKeys,
 954 | 	getUserNotifications,
 955 | 	initializeMissingConfigs,
 956 | 	listNotifications,
 957 | 	markAllNotificationsAsRead,
 958 | 	markNotificationsAsRead,
 959 | 	processPaymentWithReceipt,
 960 | 	recordPayment,
 961 | 	restorePayment,
 962 | 	searchFiles,
 963 | 	setConfig,
 964 | 	setConfigs,
 965 | 	softDeletePayment,
 966 | 	updatePayment
 967 | };

```

`data/growthRecord.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // server/growth-record.server.ts
   2 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   3 | import { eq } from "drizzle-orm";
   4 | import { z } from "zod";
   5 | 
   6 | import { db } from "@/db";
   7 | import {
   8 |   growthRecord,
   9 |   type DbGrowthRecord,
  10 |   type Gender
  11 | } from "@/db/schema";
  12 | import { GrowthRecordCreateSchema, GrowthRecordUpdateSchema } from "@/db/zod";
  13 | import { getSession } from "@/lib/auth.functions";
  14 | 
  15 | // Get growth records for a patient
  16 | export const getPatientGrowthRecords = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  17 |   .validator((patientId: string) => patientId)
  18 |   .handler(async ({ data: patientId }) => {
  19 |     const session = await getSession();
  20 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  21 | 
  22 |     const results = await db.query.growthRecord.findMany({
  23 |       where: {
  24 |         patientId,
  25 |       },
  26 |       orderBy: { date: "desc" },
  27 |     });
  28 | 
  29 |     return results;
  30 |   });
  31 | 
  32 | // Get growth record by ID
  33 | export const getGrowthRecordById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  34 |   .validator((id: string) => id)
  35 |   .handler(async ({ data: id }) => {
  36 |     const session = await getSession();
  37 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  38 | 
  39 |     const result = await db.query.growthRecord.findFirst({
  40 |       where: { id },
  41 |       with: {
  42 |         patient: true,
  43 |       },
  44 |     });
  45 | 
  46 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Growth record not found");
  47 |     return result;
  48 |   });
  49 | 
  50 | // Calculate Z-score using WHO standards
  51 | function calculateZScore(
  52 |   value: number,
  53 |   mValue: number,
  54 |   sValue: number,
  55 |   lValue: number
  56 | ): number {
  57 |   if (lValue === 0) {
  58 |     return Math.log(value / mValue) / sValue;
  59 |   }
  60 |   return (Math.pow(value / mValue, lValue) - 1) / (lValue * sValue);
  61 | }
  62 | 
  63 | // Calculate percentile from Z-score
  64 | function calculatePercentile(zScore: number): number {
  65 |   // Standard normal CDF approximation
  66 |   const t = 1 / (1 + 0.2316419 * Math.abs(zScore));
  67 |   const d = 0.3989423 * Math.exp((-zScore * zScore) / 2);
  68 |   const p =
  69 |     d *
  70 |     t *
  71 |     (0.3193815 +
  72 |       t * (-0.3565638 + t * (1.781478 + t * (-1.821256 + t * 1.330274))));
  73 |   const percentile = zScore > 0 ? 1 - p : p;
  74 |   return Math.round(percentile * 100);
  75 | }
  76 | 
  77 | // Create a new growth record with automatic Z-score calculation
  78 | export const createGrowthRecord = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  79 |   .validator((data: z.infer<typeof GrowthRecordCreateSchema>) =>
  80 |     GrowthRecordCreateSchema.parse(data)
  81 |   )
  82 |   .handler(async ({ data }): Promise<DbGrowthRecord> => {
  83 |     const session = await getSession();
  84 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  85 | 
  86 |     // Get patient data
  87 |     const patientData = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
  88 |       where: { id: data.patientId, isDeleted: false },
  89 |     });
  90 | 
  91 |     if (!patientData) throw new Error("Patient not found");
  92 | 
  93 |     // Calculate age in days and months
  94 |     const ageDays = Math.floor(
  95 |       (data.date.getTime() - patientData.dateOfBirth.getTime()) /
  96 |         (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
  97 |     );
  98 |     const ageMonths = Math.floor(ageDays / 30.44);
  99 | 
 100 |     // Calculate BMI if weight and height are provided
 101 |     let bmi: number | null = null;
 102 |     if (data.weight && data.height) {
 103 |       const heightInMeters = data.height / 100;
 104 |       bmi = Number((data.weight / (heightInMeters * heightInMeters)).toFixed(1));
 105 |     }
 106 | 
 107 |     // Calculate Z-scores using WHO standards
 108 |     let weightForAgeZ: number | null = null;
 109 |     let heightForAgeZ: number | null = null;
 110 |     let bmiForAgeZ: number | null = null;
 111 |     let hcForAgeZ: number | null = null;
 112 |     let percentile: number | null = null;
 113 | 
 114 |     // Get WHO standards for weight
 115 |     if (data.weight) {
 116 |       const weightStandard = await db.query.whoGrowthStandard.findFirst({
 117 |         where: {
 118 |           ageDays: { gte: ageDays - 30, lte: ageDays + 30 },
 119 |           gender: patientData.gender as Gender,
 120 |           measurementType: "WEIGHT",
 121 |         },
 122 |         orderBy: { ageDays: "asc" },
 123 |       });
 124 | 
 125 |       if (weightStandard) {
 126 |         weightForAgeZ = calculateZScore(
 127 |           data.weight,
 128 |           weightStandard.mValue,
 129 |           weightStandard.sValue,
 130 |           weightStandard.lValue
 131 |         );
 132 |       }
 133 |     }
 134 | 
 135 |     // Get WHO standards for height
 136 |     if (data.height) {
 137 |       const heightStandard = await db.query.whoGrowthStandard.findFirst({
 138 |         where: {
 139 |           ageDays: { gte: ageDays - 30, lte: ageDays + 30 },
 140 |           gender: patientData.gender as Gender,
 141 |           measurementType: "HEIGHT",
 142 |         },
 143 |         orderBy: { ageDays: "asc" },
 144 |       });
 145 | 
 146 |       if (heightStandard) {
 147 |         heightForAgeZ = calculateZScore(
 148 |           data.height,
 149 |           heightStandard.mValue,
 150 |           heightStandard.sValue,
 151 |           heightStandard.lValue
 152 |         );
 153 |       }
 154 |     }
 155 | 
 156 |     // Get WHO standards for BMI
 157 |     if (bmi) {
 158 |       const bmiStandard = await db.query.whoGrowthStandard.findFirst({
 159 |         where: {
 160 |           ageDays: { gte: ageDays - 30, lte: ageDays + 30 },
 161 |           gender: patientData.gender as Gender,
 162 |           measurementType: "BMI",
 163 |         },
 164 |         orderBy: { ageDays: "asc" },
 165 |       });
 166 | 
 167 |       if (bmiStandard) {
 168 |         bmiForAgeZ = calculateZScore(
 169 |           bmi,
 170 |           bmiStandard.mValue,
 171 |           bmiStandard.sValue,
 172 |           bmiStandard.lValue
 173 |         );
 174 |       }
 175 |     }
 176 | 
 177 |     // Get WHO standards for head circumference
 178 |     if (data.headCircumference) {
 179 |       const hcStandard = await db.query.whoGrowthStandard.findFirst({
 180 |         where: {
 181 |           ageDays: { gte: ageDays - 30, lte: ageDays + 30 },
 182 |           gender: patientData.gender as Gender,
 183 |           measurementType: "HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE",
 184 |         },
 185 |         orderBy: { ageDays: "asc" },
 186 |       });
 187 | 
 188 |       if (hcStandard) {
 189 |         hcForAgeZ = calculateZScore(
 190 |           data.headCircumference,
 191 |           hcStandard.mValue,
 192 |           hcStandard.sValue,
 193 |           hcStandard.lValue
 194 |         );
 195 |       }
 196 |     }
 197 | 
 198 |     // Use the first available Z-score to calculate percentile
 199 |     const zScore = weightForAgeZ || heightForAgeZ || bmiForAgeZ || hcForAgeZ;
 200 |     if (zScore) {
 201 |       percentile = calculatePercentile(zScore);
 202 |     }
 203 | 
 204 |     const [result] = await db
 205 |       .insert(growthRecord)
 206 |       .values({
 207 |         ...data,
 208 |         id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 209 |         bmi,
 210 |         ageDays,
 211 |         ageMonths,
 212 |         weightForAgeZ,
 213 |         heightForAgeZ,
 214 |         bmiForAgeZ,
 215 |         hcForAgeZ,
 216 |         percentile,
 217 |         gender: patientData.gender,
 218 |         recordedAt: new Date(),
 219 |         createdAt: new Date(),
 220 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
 221 |       })
 222 |       .returning();
 223 | 
 224 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Failed to create growth record");
 225 |     return result;
 226 |   });
 227 | 
 228 | // Update growth record
 229 | export const updateGrowthRecord = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 230 |   .validator(
 231 |     (data: z.infer<typeof GrowthRecordUpdateSchema> & { id: string }) =>
 232 |       GrowthRecordUpdateSchema.extend({ id: z.string() }).parse(data)
 233 |   )
 234 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 235 |     const session = await getSession();
 236 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 237 | 
 238 |     const { id, ...updateData } = data;
 239 | 
 240 |     // Get existing record and patient data for recalculation
 241 |     const existing = await db.query.growthRecord.findFirst({
 242 |       where: { id },
 243 |       with: { patient: true },
 244 |     });
 245 | 
 246 |     if (!existing) throw new Error("Growth record not found");
 247 | 
 248 |     const patientData = existing.patient;
 249 |     if (!patientData) throw new Error("Patient not found");
 250 | 
 251 |     const weight = updateData.weight ?? existing.weight;
 252 |     const height = updateData.height ?? existing.height;
 253 |     const date = updateData.date ?? existing.date;
 254 |     // const headCircumference = updateData.headCircumference ?? existing.headCircumference;
 255 | 
 256 |     // Recalculate age
 257 |     const ageDays = Math.floor(
 258 |       (date.getTime() - patientData.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
 259 |     );
 260 |     const ageMonths = Math.floor(ageDays / 30.44);
 261 | 
 262 |     // Recalculate BMI
 263 |     let bmi: number | null = null;
 264 |     if (weight && height) {
 265 |       const heightInMeters = height / 100;
 266 |       bmi = Number((weight / (heightInMeters * heightInMeters)).toFixed(1));
 267 |     }
 268 | 
 269 |     const [result] = await db
 270 |       .update(growthRecord)
 271 |       .set({
 272 |         ...updateData,
 273 |         bmi,
 274 |         ageDays,
 275 |         ageMonths,
 276 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
 277 |       })
 278 |       .where(eq(growthRecord.id, id))
 279 |       .returning();
 280 | 
 281 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Growth record not found");
 282 |     return result;
 283 |   });
 284 | 
 285 | // Delete growth record
 286 | export const deleteGrowthRecord = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 287 |   .validator((data: { id: string }) => data)
 288 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 289 |     const session = await getSession();
 290 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 291 | 
 292 |     const [result] = await db
 293 |       .delete(growthRecord)
 294 |       .where(eq(growthRecord.id, data.id))
 295 |       .returning();
 296 | 
 297 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Growth record not found");
 298 |     return { success: true };
 299 |   });
 300 | 
 301 | // Get growth chart data with percentiles
 302 | export const getGrowthChartData = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 303 |   .validator(
 304 |     (data: {
 305 |       patientId: string;
 306 |       measurementType: "WEIGHT" | "HEIGHT" | "BMI" | "HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE";
 307 |     }) => data
 308 |   )
 309 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 310 |     const session = await getSession();
 311 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 312 | 
 313 |     const { patientId, measurementType } = data;
 314 | 
 315 |     const records = await db.query.growthRecord.findMany({
 316 |       where: { patientId },
 317 |       orderBy: { date: "asc" },
 318 |     });
 319 | 
 320 |     // Get WHO standards for percentiles
 321 |     const patientData = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 322 |       where: { id: patientId, isDeleted: false },
 323 |     });
 324 | 
 325 |     if (!patientData) throw new Error("Patient not found");
 326 | 
 327 |     const chartData = await Promise.all(
 328 |       records.map(async (record) => {
 329 |         let value: number | null = null;
 330 |         let zScore: number | null = null;
 331 |         let percentile: number | null = null;
 332 | 
 333 |         switch (measurementType) {
 334 |           case "WEIGHT":
 335 |             value = record.weight;
 336 |             zScore = record.weightForAgeZ;
 337 |             break;
 338 |           case "HEIGHT":
 339 |             value = record.height;
 340 |             zScore = record.heightForAgeZ;
 341 |             break;
 342 |           case "BMI":
 343 |             value = record.bmi;
 344 |             zScore = record.bmiForAgeZ;
 345 |             break;
 346 |           case "HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE":
 347 |             value = record.headCircumference;
 348 |             zScore = record.hcForAgeZ;
 349 |             break;
 350 |         }
 351 | 
 352 |         if (zScore) {
 353 |           percentile = calculatePercentile(zScore);
 354 |         }
 355 | 
 356 |         return {
 357 |           date: record.date,
 358 |           value,
 359 |           zScore,
 360 |           percentile,
 361 |           ageDays: record.ageDays,
 362 |           ageMonths: record.ageMonths,
 363 |         };
 364 |       })
 365 |     );
 366 | 
 367 |     return chartData;
 368 |   });
 369 | 
 370 | // Get growth velocity (rate of change)
 371 | export const getGrowthVelocity = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 372 |   .validator((patientId: string) => patientId)
 373 |   .handler(async ({ data: patientId }) => {
 374 |     const session = await getSession();
 375 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 376 | 
 377 |     const records = await db.query.growthRecord.findMany({
 378 |       where: { patientId },
 379 |       orderBy: { date: "asc" },
 380 |     });
 381 | 
 382 |     if (records.length < 2) {
 383 |       return { velocity: [], message: "Insufficient data for velocity calculation" };
 384 |     }
 385 | 
 386 |     const velocity = [];
 387 |     for (let i = 1; i < records.length; i++) {
 388 |       const prev = records[i - 1];
 389 |       const curr = records[i];
 390 |       if (!prev || !curr) continue;
 391 | 
 392 |       const daysDiff = Math.ceil(
 393 |         (curr.date.getTime() - prev.date.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
 394 |       );
 395 | 
 396 |       if (daysDiff <= 0) continue;
 397 | 
 398 |       velocity.push({
 399 |         period: { from: prev.date, to: curr.date, days: daysDiff },
 400 |         weightVelocity:
 401 |           prev.weight && curr.weight
 402 |             ? Number(((curr.weight - prev.weight) / (daysDiff / 30.44)).toFixed(2))
 403 |             : null,
 404 |         heightVelocity:
 405 |           prev.height && curr.height
 406 |             ? Number(((curr.height - prev.height) / (daysDiff / 30.44)).toFixed(2))
 407 |             : null,
 408 |         headVelocity:
 409 |           prev.headCircumference && curr.headCircumference
 410 |             ? Number(
 411 |                 ((curr.headCircumference - prev.headCircumference) / (daysDiff / 30.44)).toFixed(2)
 412 |               )
 413 |             : null,
 414 |       });
 415 |     }
 416 | 
 417 |     return { patientId, velocity };
 418 |   });
 419 | 
 420 | // Get growth alerts based on Z-scores
 421 | export const getGrowthAlerts = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 422 |   .validator((patientId: string) => patientId)
 423 |   .handler(async ({ data: patientId }) => {
 424 |     const session = await getSession();
 425 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 426 | 
 427 |     const latestRecord = await db.query.growthRecord.findFirst({
 428 |       where: { patientId },
 429 |       orderBy: { date: "desc" },
 430 |     });
 431 | 
 432 |     if (!latestRecord) return [];
 433 | 
 434 |     const alerts = [];
 435 | 
 436 |     // Weight alerts
 437 |     if (latestRecord.weightForAgeZ !== null) {
 438 |       if (latestRecord.weightForAgeZ < -2) {
 439 |         alerts.push({
 440 |           type: "WEIGHT",
 441 |           severity: "HIGH",
 442 |           message: "Underweight: Weight-for-age Z-score is below -2",
 443 |         });
 444 |       } else if (latestRecord.weightForAgeZ > 2) {
 445 |         alerts.push({
 446 |           type: "WEIGHT",
 447 |           severity: "MEDIUM",
 448 |           message: "Overweight: Weight-for-age Z-score is above 2",
 449 |         });
 450 |       }
 451 |     }
 452 | 
 453 |     // Height alerts
 454 |     if (latestRecord.heightForAgeZ !== null) {
 455 |       if (latestRecord.heightForAgeZ < -2) {
 456 |         alerts.push({
 457 |           type: "HEIGHT",
 458 |           severity: "HIGH",
 459 |           message: "Stunting: Height-for-age Z-score is below -2",
 460 |         });
 461 |       }
 462 |     }
 463 | 
 464 |     // BMI alerts
 465 |     if (latestRecord.bmiForAgeZ !== null) {
 466 |       if (latestRecord.bmiForAgeZ > 3) {
 467 |         alerts.push({
 468 |           type: "BMI",
 469 |           severity: "HIGH",
 470 |           message: "Obese: BMI-for-age Z-score is above 3",
 471 |         });
 472 |       } else if (latestRecord.bmiForAgeZ > 2) {
 473 |         alerts.push({
 474 |           type: "BMI",
 475 |           severity: "MEDIUM",
 476 |           message: "Overweight: BMI-for-age Z-score is above 2",
 477 |         });
 478 |       }
 479 |     }
 480 | 
 481 |     return alerts;
 482 |   });
 483 | 
 484 | // Get growth alerts for all patients in the clinic (dashboard-wide)
 485 | export const getClinicGrowthAlerts = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
 486 |   async () => {
 487 |     const session = await getSession();
 488 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 489 |     if (session.user.role === "patient") return [];
 490 | 
 491 |     const { db } = await import("@/db");
 492 |     const { and, eq, sql } = await import("drizzle-orm");
 493 |     const { growthRecord } = await import("@/db/schema");
 494 | 
 495 |     // Get user's clinic ID
 496 |     const userClinics = await db
 497 |       .select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
 498 |       .from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
 499 |       .where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
 500 |       .limit(1);
 501 | 
 502 |     const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
 503 |     if (!clinicId) return [];
 504 | 
 505 |     const latestRecords = await db.query.growthRecord.findMany({
 506 |       where: {
 507 |         clinicId: clinicId as string
 508 |       },
 509 |       with: {
 510 |         patient: {
 511 |           columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true }
 512 |         }
 513 |       },
 514 |       orderBy: { date: "desc" },
 515 |       limit: 50
 516 |     });
 517 | 
 518 |     const alerts = [];
 519 |     for (const record of latestRecords) {
 520 |       if (!record.patient) continue;
 521 |       const patientName = `${record.patient.firstName} ${record.patient.lastName}`;
 522 | 
 523 |       // Weight alerts
 524 |       if (record.weightForAgeZ !== null) {
 525 |         if (record.weightForAgeZ < -2) {
 526 |           alerts.push({
 527 |             patientName,
 528 |             type: "WEIGHT",
 529 |             severity: "HIGH",
 530 |             message: "Underweight: Weight-for-age Z-score is below -2",
 531 |           });
 532 |         } else if (record.weightForAgeZ > 2) {
 533 |           alerts.push({
 534 |             patientName,
 535 |             type: "WEIGHT",
 536 |             severity: "MEDIUM",
 537 |             message: "Overweight: Weight-for-age Z-score is above 2",
 538 |           });
 539 |         }
 540 |       }
 541 | 
 542 |       // Height alerts
 543 |       if (record.heightForAgeZ !== null) {
 544 |         if (record.heightForAgeZ < -2) {
 545 |           alerts.push({
 546 |             patientName,
 547 |             type: "HEIGHT",
 548 |             severity: "HIGH",
 549 |             message: "Stunting: Height-for-age Z-score is below -2",
 550 |           });
 551 |         }
 552 |       }
 553 | 
 554 |       // BMI alerts
 555 |       if (record.bmiForAgeZ !== null) {
 556 |         if (record.bmiForAgeZ > 3) {
 557 |           alerts.push({
 558 |             patientName,
 559 |             type: "BMI",
 560 |             severity: "HIGH",
 561 |             message: "Obese: BMI-for-age Z-score is above 3",
 562 |           });
 563 |         } else if (record.bmiForAgeZ > 2) {
 564 |           alerts.push({
 565 |             patientName,
 566 |             type: "BMI",
 567 |             severity: "MEDIUM",
 568 |             message: "Overweight: BMI-for-age Z-score is above 2",
 569 |           });
 570 |         }
 571 |       }
 572 |     }
 573 | 
 574 |     return alerts.slice(0, 5);
 575 |   }
 576 | );

```

`data/immunization.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // server/immunization.server.ts
   2 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   3 | import { eq, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   4 | import { z } from "zod";
   5 | 
   6 | import { db } from "@/db";
   7 | import {
   8 |   immunization,
   9 |   medicalRecord,
  10 |   vaccineInventory,
  11 |   type DbImmunization
  12 | } from "@/db/schema";
  13 | import { ImmunizationCreateSchema, ImmunizationUpdateSchema } from "@/db/zod";
  14 | import { getSession } from "@/lib/auth.functions";
  15 | import { generateId } from '../utils';
  16 | 
  17 | // Get all immunizations for a patient
  18 | export const getPatientImmunizations = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  19 |   .validator((patientId: string) => patientId)
  20 |   .handler(async ({ data: patientId }) => {
  21 |     const session = await getSession();
  22 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  23 | 
  24 |     const results = await db.query.immunization.findMany({
  25 |       where: {
  26 |         patientId,
  27 |         isDeleted: false,
  28 |       },
  29 |       with: {
  30 |         administeredBy: true,
  31 |         medicalRecord: true,
  32 |       },
  33 |       orderBy: { date: "desc" },
  34 |     });
  35 | 
  36 |     return results;
  37 |   });
  38 | 
  39 | // Get upcoming immunizations based on vaccine schedule
  40 | export const getUpcomingImmunizations = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  41 |   .validator((patientId: string) => patientId)
  42 |   .handler(async ({ data: patientId }) => {
  43 |     const session = await getSession();
  44 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  45 | 
  46 |     // Get patient age
  47 |     const patientData = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
  48 |       where: { id: patientId, isDeleted: false },
  49 |     });
  50 | 
  51 |     if (!patientData) throw new Error("Patient not found");
  52 | 
  53 |     const ageInDays = Math.floor(
  54 |       (Date.now() - new Date(patientData.dateOfBirth).getTime()) /
  55 |         (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
  56 |     );
  57 | 
  58 |     // Get all vaccine schedules
  59 |     const schedules = await db.query.vaccineSchedule.findMany({
  60 |       where: {
  61 |         isDeleted: false,
  62 |         ageInDaysMin: { lte: ageInDays },
  63 |         ageInDaysMax: { gte: ageInDays },
  64 |       },
  65 |     });
  66 | 
  67 |     // Get already administered vaccines
  68 |     const administered = await db.query.immunization.findMany({
  69 |       where: {
  70 |         patientId,
  71 |         isDeleted: false,
  72 |         status: "COMPLETED",
  73 |       },
  74 |     });
  75 | 
  76 |     const administeredVaccines = new Set(administered.map((i) => i.vaccine));
  77 | 
  78 |     const upcoming = schedules.filter((s) => !administeredVaccines.has(s.vaccineName));
  79 | 
  80 |     return upcoming;
  81 |   });
  82 | 
  83 | // Record a new immunization
  84 | export const recordImmunization = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  85 |   .validator((data: z.infer<typeof ImmunizationCreateSchema>) =>
  86 |     ImmunizationCreateSchema.parse(data)
  87 |   )
  88 |   .handler(async ({ data }): Promise<DbImmunization> => {
  89 |     const session = await getSession();
  90 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  91 | 
  92 |     // Check if vaccine is in stock
  93 |     if (data.vaccineInventoryId) {
  94 |       const inventory = await db.query.vaccineInventory.findFirst({
  95 |         where: { id: data.vaccineInventoryId },
  96 |       });
  97 | 
  98 |       if (!inventory || inventory.quantity < 1) {
  99 |         throw new Error("Insufficient vaccine stock");
 100 |       }
 101 | 
 102 |       // Decrement inventory
 103 |       await db
 104 |         .update(vaccineInventory)
 105 |         .set({
 106 |           quantity: inventory.quantity - 1,
 107 |           updatedAt: new Date(),
 108 |         })
 109 |         .where(eq(vaccineInventory.id, data.vaccineInventoryId));
 110 |     }
 111 | 
 112 |     // Create medical record if not exists
 113 |     let medicalRecordId = data.recordId;
 114 |     if (!medicalRecordId) {
 115 |       const [newMedicalRecord] = await db
 116 |         .insert(medicalRecord)
 117 |         .values({
 118 |           id: generateId(),
 119 |           patientId: data.patientId,
 120 |           doctorId: data.administeredByStaffId || session.user.id,
 121 |           clinicId: data.clinicId as string,
 122 |           symptoms: "Immunization visit",
 123 |           treatmentPlan: `Administered ${data.vaccine}`,
 124 |           notes: `Immunization: ${data.vaccine}` as string,
 125 |           createdAt: new Date(),
 126 |           updatedAt: new Date(),
 127 |         })
 128 |         .returning();
 129 |       medicalRecordId = newMedicalRecord.id;
 130 |     }
 131 | 
 132 |     // Check if vaccine is overdue
 133 |     const patientData = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 134 |       where: { id: data.patientId },
 135 |     });
 136 | 
 137 |     let isOverdue = false;
 138 |     if (patientData) {
 139 |       const ageAtVaccination = Math.floor(
 140 |         (data.date.getTime() - patientData.dateOfBirth.getTime()) /
 141 |           (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
 142 |       );
 143 | 
 144 |       const schedule = await db.query.vaccineSchedule.findFirst({
 145 |         where: { vaccineName: data.vaccine },
 146 |       });
 147 | 
 148 |       if (schedule?.ageInDaysMax && ageAtVaccination > schedule.ageInDaysMax) {
 149 |         isOverdue = true;
 150 |       }
 151 |     }
 152 | 
 153 |     const [result] = await db
 154 |       .insert(immunization)
 155 |       .values({
 156 |         ...data,
 157 |         id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 158 |         clinicId: data.clinicId as string,
 159 |         recordId: medicalRecordId as string,
 160 |         isOverDue: isOverdue,
 161 |         status: "COMPLETED",
 162 |         createdAt: new Date(),
 163 |       })
 164 |       .returning();
 165 | 
 166 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Failed to record immunization");
 167 | 
 168 |     return result;
 169 |   });
 170 | 
 171 | // Update immunization record
 172 | export const updateImmunization = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 173 |   .validator((data: z.infer<typeof ImmunizationUpdateSchema> & { id: string }) =>
 174 |     ImmunizationUpdateSchema.extend({ id: z.string() }).parse(data)
 175 |   )
 176 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 177 |     const session = await getSession();
 178 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 179 |     if (session.user.role !== "admin" && session.user.role !== "doctor") {
 180 |       throw new Error("Forbidden");
 181 |     }
 182 | 
 183 |     const { id, ...updateData } = data;
 184 | 
 185 |     const [result] = await db
 186 |       .update(immunization)
 187 |       .set({
 188 |         ...updateData,
 189 |        })
 190 |       .where(eq(immunization.id, id))
 191 |       .returning();
 192 | 
 193 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Immunization not found");
 194 |     return result;
 195 |   });
 196 | 
 197 | // Delete immunization (soft delete)
 198 | export const deleteImmunization = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 199 |   .validator((data: { id: string }) => data)
 200 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 201 |     const session = await getSession();
 202 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 203 |     if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 204 | 
 205 |     const [result] = await db
 206 |       .update(immunization)
 207 |       .set({
 208 |         isDeleted: true,
 209 |         deletedAt: new Date(),
 210 |       })
 211 |       .where(eq(immunization.id, data.id))
 212 |       .returning();
 213 | 
 214 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Immunization not found");
 215 |     return { success: true };
 216 |   });
 217 | 
 218 | // Get immunization schedule by age
 219 | export const getImmunizationScheduleByAge = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 220 |   .validator((data: { ageInDays: number }) => data)
 221 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 222 |     const session = await getSession();
 223 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 224 | 
 225 |     const schedules = await db.query.vaccineSchedule.findMany({
 226 |       where: {
 227 |         isDeleted: false,
 228 |         ageInDaysMin: { lte: data.ageInDays },
 229 |         ageInDaysMax: { gte: data.ageInDays },
 230 |       },
 231 |       orderBy: { ageInDaysMin: "asc" },
 232 |     });
 233 | 
 234 |     return schedules;
 235 |   });
 236 | 
 237 | // Get immunization certificate for a patient
 238 | export const getImmunizationCertificate = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 239 |   .validator((patientId: string) => patientId)
 240 |   .handler(async ({ data: patientId }) => {
 241 |     const session = await getSession();
 242 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 243 | 
 244 |     const patientData = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 245 |       where: { id: patientId, isDeleted: false },
 246 |     });
 247 | 
 248 |     if (!patientData) throw new Error("Patient not found");
 249 | 
 250 |     const immunizations = await db.query.immunization.findMany({
 251 |       where: {
 252 |         patientId,
 253 |         isDeleted: false,
 254 |         status: "COMPLETED",
 255 |       },
 256 |       orderBy: { date: "asc" },
 257 |     });
 258 | 
 259 |     const isFullyImmunized = immunizations.length >= 10; // Threshold
 260 | 
 261 |     return {
 262 |       patientName: `${patientData.firstName} ${patientData.lastName}`,
 263 |       dateOfBirth: patientData.dateOfBirth,
 264 |       mrn: patientData.mrn,
 265 |       immunizations: immunizations.map((imm) => ({
 266 |         vaccine: imm.vaccine,
 267 |         date: imm.date,
 268 |         dose: imm.dose,
 269 |         administeredBy: imm.administeredByStaffId,
 270 |         lotNumber: imm.lotNumber,
 271 |       })),
 272 |       isFullyImmunized,
 273 |       certificateNumber: `IMM-${Date.now()}-${patientId.slice(0, 8)}`,
 274 |       generatedDate: new Date(),
 275 |     };
 276 |   });
 277 | 
 278 | // Get due immunizations for the clinic (admin/staff)
 279 | export const getDueImmunizations = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
 280 |   async () => {
 281 |     const session = await getSession();
 282 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 283 |     if (session.user.role === "patient") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 284 | 
 285 |     // Get user's clinic ID
 286 |     const userClinics = await db
 287 |       .select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
 288 |       .from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
 289 |       .where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
 290 |       .limit(1);
 291 | 
 292 |     const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
 293 |     if (!clinicId) return [];
 294 | 
 295 |     // Find immunizations that are marked as overdue or pending in the future
 296 |     const results = await db.query.immunization.findMany({
 297 |       where: {clinicId, isDeleted: false, isOverDue: true},
 298 |       with: {
 299 |         patient: {
 300 |           columns: {
 301 |             id: true,
 302 |             firstName: true,
 303 |             lastName: true,
 304 |             mrn: true,
 305 |             phone: true
 306 |           }
 307 |         }
 308 |       },
 309 |       orderBy: { date: "asc" },
 310 |       limit: 50
 311 |     });
 312 | 
 313 |     return results;
 314 |   }
 315 | );

```

`data/medical-records.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // lib/medical-record.functions.ts
   2 | import {
   3 |   medicalRecord,
   4 |   type Status
   5 | } from "@/db/schema";
   6 | import { getSession } from "@/lib/auth.functions";
   7 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   8 | import { and, eq, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   9 | import { z } from "zod";
  10 | import { generateId } from '../utils';
  11 | 
  12 | const MedicalRecordCreateSchema = z.object({
  13 | 	patientId: z.string(),
  14 | 	appointmentId: z.string(),
  15 | 	doctorId: z.string(),
  16 | 	diagnosis: z.string().optional(),
  17 | 	symptoms: z.string().optional(),
  18 | 	treatmentPlan: z.string().optional(),
  19 | 	labRequest: z.string().optional(),
  20 | 	notes: z.string().optional(),
  21 | 	medications: z.string().optional(),
  22 | 	followUpDate: z.date().optional(),
  23 | });
  24 | 
  25 | const MedicalRecordUpdateSchema = MedicalRecordCreateSchema.partial();
  26 | 
  27 | // Get medical records for a patient
  28 | export const getPatientMedicalRecords = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  29 | 	.validator((data: { patientId: string; limit?: number; offset?: number }) => data)
  30 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  31 | 		const session = await getSession();
  32 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  33 | 
  34 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  35 | 		const { patientId, limit = 20, offset = 0 } = data;
  36 | 
  37 | 		// Get user's clinic
  38 | 		const userClinic = await db
  39 | 			.select({ clinicId: sql<string>`clinic_id` })
  40 | 			.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
  41 | 			.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
  42 | 			.limit(1);
  43 | 
  44 | 		const clinicId = userClinic[0]?.clinicId;
  45 | 
  46 | 		const records = await db.query.medicalRecord.findMany({
  47 | 			where: {
  48 | 				patientId,
  49 | 				clinicId: clinicId ?? "",
  50 | 				isDeleted: false,
  51 | 			},
  52 | 			with: {
  53 | 				doctor: {
  54 | 					columns: { id: true, name: true, specialty: true },
  55 | 				},
  56 | 				appointment: {
  57 | 					columns: { id: true, appointmentDate: true, type: true },
  58 | 				},
  59 | 				encounters: {
  60 | 					limit: 5,
  61 | 					orderBy: { date: "desc" },
  62 | 				},
  63 | 				vitalSigns: {
  64 | 					limit: 5,
  65 | 					orderBy: { recordedAt: "desc" },
  66 | 				},
  67 | 				prescriptions: {
  68 | 					limit: 5,
  69 | 					orderBy: { issuedDate: "desc" },
  70 | 				},
  71 | 			},
  72 | 			orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
  73 | 			limit,
  74 | 			offset,
  75 | 		});
  76 | 
  77 | 		const total = await db.$count(
  78 | 			medicalRecord,
  79 | 			and(
  80 | 				eq(medicalRecord.patientId, patientId),
  81 | 				eq(medicalRecord.clinicId, clinicId ?? ""),
  82 | 				eq(medicalRecord.isDeleted, false)
  83 | 			)
  84 | 		);
  85 | 
  86 | 		return { records, total, limit, offset };
  87 | 	});
  88 | 
  89 | // Get medical record by ID
  90 | export const getMedicalRecordById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  91 | 	.validator((id: string) => id)
  92 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  93 | 		const session = await getSession();
  94 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  95 | 
  96 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  97 | 		const recordId = z.string().parse(data);
  98 | 
  99 | 		const record = await db.query.medicalRecord.findFirst({
 100 | 			where: { id: recordId, isDeleted: false },
 101 | 			with: {
 102 | 				patient: {
 103 | 					columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true, dateOfBirth: true, mrn: true , userId: true},
 104 | 				},
 105 | 				doctor: {
 106 | 					columns: { id: true, name: true, specialty: true },
 107 | 				},
 108 | 				appointment: true,
 109 | 				encounters: {
 110 | 					orderBy: { date: "desc" },
 111 | 				},
 112 | 				vitalSigns: {
 113 | 					orderBy: { recordedAt: "desc" },
 114 | 				},
 115 | 				prescriptions: {
 116 | 					with: {
 117 | 						prescribedItems: {
 118 | 							with: {
 119 | 								drug: true,
 120 | 							},
 121 | 						},
 122 | 					},
 123 | 					orderBy: { issuedDate: "desc" },
 124 | 				},
 125 | 			},
 126 | 		});
 127 | 
 128 | 		if (!record) throw new Error("Medical record not found");
 129 | 
 130 | 		// Check authorization
 131 | 		const isAdmin = session.user.role === "admin";
 132 | 		const isDoctor = session.user.role === "doctor";
 133 | 		const isStaff = session.user.role === "staff";
 134 | 
 135 | 		if (!isAdmin && !isDoctor && !isStaff && record.patient?.userId !== session.user.id) {
 136 | 			throw new Error("Forbidden");
 137 | 		}
 138 | 
 139 | 		return record;
 140 | 	});
 141 | 
 142 | // Create medical record
 143 | export const createMedicalRecord = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 144 | 	.validator((data: z.infer<typeof MedicalRecordCreateSchema>) => MedicalRecordCreateSchema.parse(data))
 145 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 146 | 		const session = await getSession();
 147 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 148 | 
 149 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 150 | 
 151 | 		// Get user's clinic
 152 | 		const userClinic = await db
 153 | 			.select({ clinicId: sql<string>`clinic_id` })
 154 | 			.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
 155 | 			.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
 156 | 			.limit(1);
 157 | 
 158 | 		const clinicId = userClinic[0]?.clinicId;
 159 | 		if (!clinicId) throw new Error("No clinic assigned");
 160 | 
 161 | 		const [newRecord] = await db
 162 | 			.insert(medicalRecord)
 163 | 			.values({
 164 | 				id: generateId(),
 165 | 				clinicId: clinicId as string,
 166 | 				...data,
 167 | 				status: "ACTIVE" as Status,
 168 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
 169 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 170 | 			})
 171 | 			.returning();
 172 | 
 173 | 		if (!newRecord) throw new Error("Failed to create medical record");
 174 | 		return newRecord;
 175 | 	});
 176 | 
 177 | // Update medical record
 178 | export const updateMedicalRecord = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 179 | 	.validator((data: { id: string; values: z.infer<typeof MedicalRecordUpdateSchema> }) =>
 180 | 		z.object({ id: z.string(), values: MedicalRecordUpdateSchema }).parse(data)
 181 | 	)
 182 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 183 | 		const session = await getSession();
 184 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 185 | 
 186 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 187 | 		const { id, values } = data;
 188 | 
 189 | 		const [updated] = await db
 190 | 			.update(medicalRecord)
 191 | 			.set({
 192 | 				...values,
 193 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 194 | 			})
 195 | 			.where(eq(medicalRecord.id, id))
 196 | 			.returning();
 197 | 
 198 | 		if (!updated) throw new Error("Medical record not found");
 199 | 		return updated;
 200 | 	});
 201 | 
 202 | // Delete (soft delete) medical record
 203 | export const deleteMedicalRecord = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 204 | 	.validator((id: string) => id)
 205 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 206 | 		const session = await getSession();
 207 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 208 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden - Admin only");
 209 | 
 210 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 211 | 		const recordId = z.string().parse(data);
 212 | 
 213 | 		const [deleted] = await db
 214 | 			.update(medicalRecord)
 215 | 			.set({
 216 | 				isDeleted: true,
 217 | 				deletedAt: new Date(),
 218 | 			})
 219 | 			.where(eq(medicalRecord.id, recordId))
 220 | 			.returning();
 221 | 
 222 | 		if (!deleted) throw new Error("Medical record not found");
 223 | 		return { success: true };
 224 | 	});

```

`data/orders.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   2 | import { desc, eq } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | import { orderItems, orders } from "#/db/schema";
   4 | import { getSession } from "#/lib/auth.functions";
   5 | 
   6 | // Fetch all orders for the logged-in user (newest first)
   7 | export const getOrdersByUser = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
   8 | 	async () => {
   9 | 		const session = await getSession();
  10 | 		if (!session) {
  11 | 			throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  12 | 		}
  13 | 
  14 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  15 | 
  16 | 		// Get all orders for this user, newest first
  17 | 		const userOrders = await db
  18 | 			.select()
  19 | 			.from(orders)
  20 | 			.where(eq(orders.userId, session.user.id))
  21 | 			.orderBy(desc(orders.createdAt));
  22 | 
  23 | 		if (userOrders.length === 0) return [];
  24 | 
  25 | 		// For each order, fetch its items
  26 | 		const ordersWithItems = await Promise.all(
  27 | 			userOrders.map(async (order) => {
  28 | 				const items = await db
  29 | 					.select()
  30 | 					.from(orderItems)
  31 | 					.where(eq(orderItems.orderId, order.id));
  32 | 
  33 | 				return {
  34 | 					id: order.id,
  35 | 					status: order.status,
  36 | 					total: order.total,
  37 | 					createdAt: order.createdAt,
  38 | 					items: items.map((item) => ({
  39 | 						id: item.id,
  40 | 						name: item.name,
  41 | 						price: item.price,
  42 | 						quantity: item.quantity,
  43 | 						image: item.image,
  44 | 					})),
  45 | 				};
  46 | 			}),
  47 | 		);
  48 | 
  49 | 		return ordersWithItems;
  50 | 	},
  51 | );
  52 | 
  53 | // Fetch a single order by ID (verifies ownership)
  54 | export const getOrderById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  55 | 	.inputValidator((data: { orderId: string }) => data)
  56 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  57 | 		const session = await getSession();
  58 | 		if (!session) {
  59 | 			throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  60 | 		}
  61 | 
  62 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  63 | 
  64 | 		const [order] = await db
  65 | 			.select()
  66 | 			.from(orders)
  67 | 			.where(eq(orders.id, data.orderId))
  68 | 			.limit(1);
  69 | 
  70 | 		if (!order) {
  71 | 			throw new Error("Order not found");
  72 | 		}
  73 | 
  74 | 		// Verify the order belongs to the logged-in user
  75 | 		if (order.userId !== session.user.id) {
  76 | 			throw new Error("Forbidden");
  77 | 		}
  78 | 
  79 | 		const items = await db
  80 | 			.select()
  81 | 			.from(orderItems)
  82 | 			.where(eq(orderItems.orderId, order.id));
  83 | 
  84 | 		return {
  85 | 			id: order.id,
  86 | 			status: order.status,
  87 | 			total: order.total,
  88 | 			createdAt: order.createdAt,
  89 | 			stripeSessionId: order.stripeSessionId,
  90 | 			items: items.map((item) => ({
  91 | 				id: item.id,
  92 | 				name: item.name,
  93 | 				price: item.price,
  94 | 				quantity: item.quantity,
  95 | 				image: item.image,
  96 | 			})),
  97 | 		};
  98 | 	});
  99 | 
 100 | // Fetch ALL orders (admin only) — joins with user table to get buyer info
 101 | export const getAllOrders = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
 102 | 	async () => {
 103 | 		const session = await getSession();
 104 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 105 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 106 | 
 107 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 108 | 		const { user } = await import("@/db/schema");
 109 | 
 110 | 		// Get all orders joined with user info, newest first
 111 | 		const rows = await db
 112 | 			.select({
 113 | 				id: orders.id,
 114 | 				status: orders.status,
 115 | 				total: orders.total,
 116 | 				createdAt: orders.createdAt,
 117 | 				userName: user.name,
 118 | 				userEmail: user.email,
 119 | 			})
 120 | 			.from(orders)
 121 | 			.innerJoin(user, eq(orders.userId, user.id))
 122 | 			.orderBy(desc(orders.createdAt));
 123 | 
 124 | 		if (rows.length === 0) return [];
 125 | 
 126 | 		// For each order, fetch its items
 127 | 		const ordersWithItems = await Promise.all(
 128 | 			rows.map(async (row) => {
 129 | 				const items = await db
 130 | 					.select()
 131 | 					.from(orderItems)
 132 | 					.where(eq(orderItems.orderId, row.id));
 133 | 
 134 | 				return {
 135 | 					id: row.id,
 136 | 					user: { name: row.userName, email: row.userEmail },
 137 | 					status: row.status,
 138 | 					total: row.total,
 139 | 					createdAt: row.createdAt,
 140 | 					items: items.map((item) => ({
 141 | 						id: item.id,
 142 | 						name: item.name,
 143 | 						price: item.price,
 144 | 						quantity: item.quantity,
 145 | 						image: item.image,
 146 | 					})),
 147 | 				};
 148 | 			}),
 149 | 		);
 150 | 
 151 | 		return ordersWithItems;
 152 | 	},
 153 | );
 154 | 
 155 | export const updateOrderStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 156 | 	.inputValidator(
 157 | 		(data: { orderId: string; status: "pending" | "paid" | "failed" }) => data,
 158 | 	)
 159 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 160 | 		const session = await getSession();
 161 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 162 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 163 | 
 164 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 165 | 
 166 | 		await db
 167 | 			.update(orders)
 168 | 			.set({ status: data.status })
 169 | 			.where(eq(orders.id, data.orderId));
 170 | 	});
 171 | 
 172 | export type OrderData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getAllOrders>>[number];

```

`data/patientBill.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // server/patient-bill.server.ts
   2 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   3 | import { eq, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   4 | import { z } from "zod";
   5 | 
   6 | import { db } from "@/db";
   7 | import { patientBill, payment } from "@/db/schema";
   8 | import { PatientBillUpdateSchema } from "@/db/zod";
   9 | import { getSession } from "@/lib/auth.functions";
  10 | 
  11 | // Get bills for a payment
  12 | export const getBillsByPaymentId = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  13 |   .validator((paymentId: string) => paymentId)
  14 |   .handler(async ({ data: paymentId }) => {
  15 |     const session = await getSession();
  16 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  17 | 
  18 |     const results = await db.query.patientBill.findMany({
  19 |       where: { billId: paymentId },
  20 |       with: {
  21 |         service: true,
  22 |       },
  23 |       orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
  24 |     });
  25 | 
  26 |     return results;
  27 |   });
  28 | 
  29 | // Add bill item to a payment
  30 | export const addBillItem = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  31 |   .validator(
  32 |     (data: {
  33 |       billId: string;
  34 |       serviceId: string;
  35 |       serviceDate: Date;
  36 |       quantity: number;
  37 |       unitCost?: number;
  38 |       totalCost: number;
  39 |     }) => data
  40 |   )
  41 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
  42 |     const session = await getSession();
  43 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  44 |     if (session.user.role !== "admin" && session.user.role !== "staff") {
  45 |       throw new Error("Forbidden");
  46 |     }
  47 | 
  48 |     const { billId, serviceId, serviceDate, quantity, unitCost, totalCost } = data;
  49 | 
  50 |     // Verify service exists
  51 |     const serviceData = await db.query.service.findFirst({
  52 |       where: { id: serviceId, isDeleted: false },
  53 |     });
  54 |     if (!serviceData) throw new Error("Service not found");
  55 | 
  56 |     const finalUnitCost = unitCost || serviceData.price || 0;
  57 | 
  58 |     const [result] = await db
  59 |       .insert(patientBill)
  60 |       .values({
  61 |         id: crypto.randomUUID(),
  62 |         billId,
  63 |         serviceId,
  64 |         serviceDate,
  65 |         quantity,
  66 |         unitCost: finalUnitCost,
  67 |         totalCost: totalCost || finalUnitCost * quantity,
  68 |         createdAt: new Date(),
  69 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
  70 |       })
  71 |       .returning();
  72 | 
  73 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Failed to add bill item");
  74 | 
  75 |     // Update payment total amount
  76 |     const totalResult = await db
  77 |       .select({ sum: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${patientBill.totalCost}), 0)` })
  78 |       .from(patientBill)
  79 |       .where(eq(patientBill.billId, billId));
  80 | 
  81 |     const newTotalAmount = totalResult[0]?.sum || 0;
  82 | 
  83 |     await db
  84 |       .update(payment)
  85 |       .set({
  86 |         totalAmount: newTotalAmount,
  87 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
  88 |       })
  89 |       .where(eq(payment.id, billId));
  90 | 
  91 |     return result;
  92 |   });
  93 | 
  94 | // Update bill item
  95 | export const updateBillItem = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  96 |   .validator(
  97 |     (data: z.infer<typeof PatientBillUpdateSchema> & { id: string }) =>
  98 |       PatientBillUpdateSchema.extend({ id: z.string() }).parse(data)
  99 |   )
 100 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 101 |     const session = await getSession();
 102 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 103 |     if (session.user.role !== "admin" && session.user.role !== "staff") {
 104 |       throw new Error("Forbidden");
 105 |     }
 106 | 
 107 |     const { id, ...updateData } = data;
 108 | 
 109 |     const [result] = await db
 110 |       .update(patientBill)
 111 |       .set({
 112 |         ...updateData,
 113 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
 114 |       })
 115 |       .where(eq(patientBill.id, id))
 116 |       .returning();
 117 | 
 118 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Bill item not found");
 119 | 
 120 |     // Update payment total amount
 121 |     const totalResult = await db
 122 |       .select({ sum: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${patientBill.totalCost}), 0)` })
 123 |       .from(patientBill)
 124 |       .where(eq(patientBill.billId, result.billId));
 125 | 
 126 |     const newTotalAmount = totalResult[0]?.sum || 0;
 127 | 
 128 |     await db
 129 |       .update(payment)
 130 |       .set({
 131 |         totalAmount: newTotalAmount,
 132 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
 133 |       })
 134 |       .where(eq(payment.id, result.billId));
 135 | 
 136 |     return result;
 137 |   });
 138 | 
 139 | // Delete bill item
 140 | export const deleteBillItem = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 141 |   .validator((data: { id: string }) => data)
 142 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 143 |     const session = await getSession();
 144 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 145 |     if (session.user.role !== "admin" && session.user.role !== "staff") {
 146 |       throw new Error("Forbidden");
 147 |     }
 148 | 
 149 |     const billItem = await db.query.patientBill.findFirst({
 150 |       where: { id: data.id },
 151 |     });
 152 | 
 153 |     if (!billItem) throw new Error("Bill item not found");
 154 | 
 155 |     const [result] = await db
 156 |       .delete(patientBill)
 157 |       .where(eq(patientBill.id, data.id))
 158 |       .returning();
 159 | 
 160 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Failed to delete bill item");
 161 | 
 162 |     // Update payment total amount
 163 |     const totalResult = await db
 164 |       .select({ sum: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${patientBill.totalCost}), 0)` })
 165 |       .from(patientBill)
 166 |       .where(eq(patientBill.billId, billItem.billId));
 167 | 
 168 |     const newTotalAmount = totalResult[0]?.sum || 0;
 169 | 
 170 |     await db
 171 |       .update(payment)
 172 |       .set({
 173 |         totalAmount: newTotalAmount,
 174 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
 175 |       })
 176 |       .where(eq(payment.id, billItem.billId));
 177 | 
 178 |     return { success: true };
 179 |   });

```

`data/patients.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { getSession } from "#/lib/auth.functions";
   2 | import { patient, type DbPatient, type Status } from "@/db/schema";
   3 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";

   5 | import { z } from "zod";

   8 | // // Schema for creating/updating patients
   9 | // export const patientSchema = z.object({
  10 | // 	firstName: z.string().min(1, "First name is required"),
  11 | // 	lastName: z.string().min(1, "Last name is required"),

  19 | // 		.optional()
  20 | // 		.nullable(),
  21 | // 	allergies: z.string().optional().nullable(),

  23 | // 	medicalHistory: z.string().optional().nullable(),
  24 | // 	emergencyContactName: z.string().optional().nullable(),
  25 | // 	emergencyContactNumber: z.string().optional().nullable(),
```
