```ts
  28 | 
  29 | // Get all patients for the current clinic
  30 | export const getAllPatients = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
  31 | 	async () => {
  32 | 		const session = await getSession();
  33 | 		if (!session) {
  34 | 			throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  35 | 		}
  36 | 
  37 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  38 | 
  39 | 		try {
  40 | 			// Get user's clinic ID from clinic_member or from user's default clinic
  41 | 			const userClinics = await db
  42 | 				.select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
  43 | 				.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
  44 | 				.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
  45 | 				.limit(1);
  46 | 
  47 | 			const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
  48 | 
  49 | 			if (!clinicId) {
  50 | 				return [];
  51 | 			}
  52 | 
  53 | 			const allPatients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
  54 |         where: {
  55 |           clinicId,
  56 |           isDeleted: false
  57 |         },
  58 |         orderBy: {createdAt: "desc"}
  59 |       })
  60 | 			return allPatients;
  61 | 		} catch (error) {
  62 | 			console.error("Error getting all patients: ", error);
  63 | 			return [];
  64 | 		}
  65 | 	},
  66 | );
  67 | 
  68 | // Get recent patients for dashboard
  69 | export const getRecentPatients = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
  70 | 	async () => {
  71 | 		const session = await getSession();
  72 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  73 | 
  74 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  75 | 
  76 | 		try {
  77 | 			// Get user's clinic ID
  78 | 			const userClinics = await db
  79 | 				.select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
  80 | 				.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
  81 | 				.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
  82 | 				.limit(1);
  83 | 
  84 | 			const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
  85 | 			if (!clinicId) return [];
  86 | 
  87 | 			// For patients, only show their own children
  88 | 			const conditions = [
  89 | 				eq(patient.clinicId, clinicId as string),
  90 | 				eq(patient.isDeleted, false)
  91 | 			];
  92 | 
  93 | 			if (session.user.role === "patient") {
  94 | 				conditions.push(eq(patient.userId, session.user.id));
  95 | 			}
  96 | 
  97 | 			return await db.query.patient.findMany({
  98 | 				where: {
  99 | 					clinicId,
 100 | 					isDeleted: false,
 101 | 					role: 'patient'
 102 | 				},
 103 | 				orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
 104 | 				limit: 5,
 105 | 			});
 106 | 		} catch (error) {
 107 | 			console.error("Error getting recent patients: ", error);
 108 | 			return [];
 109 | 		}
 110 | 	},
 111 | );
 112 | 
 113 | // Get patients for the logged-in parent (my children)
 114 | export const getMyChildren = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
 115 | 	async () => {
 116 | 		const session = await getSession();
 117 | 		if (!session) {
 118 | 			throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 119 | 		}
 120 | 
 121 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 122 | 
 123 | 		try {
 124 | 			const myPatients = await db
 125 | 				.select()
 126 | 				.from(patient)
 127 | 				.where(eq(patient.userId, session.user.id))
 128 | 				.orderBy(desc(patient.createdAt));
 129 | 
 130 | 			return myPatients;
 131 | 		} catch (error) {
 132 | 			console.error("Error getting my patients: ", error);
 133 | 			return [];
 134 | 		}
 135 | 	},
 136 | );
 137 | 
 138 | // Get patient by ID with authorization check
 139 | export const getPatientById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 140 | 	.validator((id: string) => id)
 141 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 142 | 		const session = await getSession();
 143 | 		if (!session) {
 144 | 			throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 145 | 		}
 146 | 
 147 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 148 | 		const patientId = z.string().parse(data);
 149 | 
 150 | 		const result = await db
 151 | 			.select()
 152 | 			.from(patient)
 153 | 			.where(eq(patient.id, patientId))
 154 | 			.limit(1);
 155 | 
 156 | 		const foundPatient = result[0] ?? null;
 157 | 
 158 | 		if (!foundPatient) return null;
 159 | 
 160 | 		// Check authorization: admin or parent or staff can view
 161 | 		const isAdmin = session.user.role === "admin";
 162 | 		const isParent = foundPatient.userId === session.user.id;
 163 | 
 164 | 		// Check if user is staff at this clinic
 165 | 		const userClinic = await db
 166 | 			.select()
 167 | 			.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
 168 | 			.where(
 169 | 				and(
 170 | 					eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id),
 171 | 					eq(sql`clinic_id`, foundPatient.clinicId)
 172 | 				)
 173 | 			)
 174 | 			.limit(1);
 175 | 
 176 | 		const isStaff = userClinic.length > 0;
 177 | 
 178 | 		if (!isAdmin && !isParent && !isStaff) {
 179 | 			throw new Error("Forbidden");
 180 | 		}
 181 | 
 182 | 		return foundPatient;
 183 | 	});
 184 | 
 185 | // Create a new patient (child)
 186 | export const createPatient = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 187 | 	.validator((data: PatientCreateInput) =>
 188 | 		PatientCreateSchema.parse(data),
 189 | 	)
 190 | 	.handler(async ({ data }): Promise<DbPatient> => {
 191 | 		const session = await getSession();
 192 | 		if (!session) {
 193 | 			throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 194 | 		}
 195 | 
 196 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 197 | 
 198 | 		// Get user's clinic ID
 199 | 		const userClinics = await db
 200 | 			.select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
 201 | 			.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
 202 | 			.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
 203 | 			.limit(1);
 204 | 
 205 | 		const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
 206 | 
 207 | 		if (!clinicId) {
 208 | 			throw new Error("No clinic assigned to this user");
 209 | 		}
 210 | 
 211 | 		// Generate MRN (Medical Record Number)
 212 | 		const mrn = `MRN-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8).toUpperCase()}`;
 213 | 
 214 | 		const result = await db
 215 | 			.insert(patient)
 216 | 			.values({
 217 | 				mrn,
 218 | 				status: "ACTIVE" as Status,
 219 | 				isActive: true,
 220 | 				createdById: session.user.id,
 221 | 				updatedById: session.user.id,
 222 | 				...data,
 223 | 			} as any)
 224 | 			.returning();
 225 | 
 226 | 		const newPatient = result[0];
 227 | 		if (!newPatient) {
 228 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create patient");
 229 | 		}
 230 | 
 231 | 		return newPatient;
 232 | 	});
 233 | 
 234 | // Update patient information
 235 | const updatePatientSchema = PatientUpdateSchema.extend({
 236 | 	id: z.string().min(1, "Patient ID is required"),
 237 | });
 238 | 
 239 | export const updatePatient = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 240 | 	.validator((data: z.infer<typeof updatePatientSchema>) =>
 241 | 		updatePatientSchema.parse(data),
 242 | 	)
 243 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 244 | 		const session = await getSession();
 245 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 246 | 
 247 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 248 | 		const { id, ...values } = data;
 249 | 
 250 | 		// Verify patient exists and user has permission
 251 | 		const existingPatient = await db
 252 | 			.select()
 253 | 			.from(patient)
 254 | 			.where(eq(patient.id, id))
 255 | 			.limit(1);
 256 | 
 257 | 		if (!existingPatient[0]) throw new Error("Patient not found");
 258 | 
 259 | 		const isAdmin = session.user.role === "admin";
 260 | 		const isParent = existingPatient[0].userId === session.user.id;
 261 | 
 262 | 		if (!isAdmin && !isParent) {
 263 | 			throw new Error("Forbidden");
 264 | 		}
 265 | 
 266 | 		const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {
 267 | 			updatedById: session.user.id,
 268 | 			updatedAt: new Date(),
 269 | 		};
 270 | 
 271 | 		if (values.firstName !== undefined) updateData.firstName = values.firstName;
 272 | 		if (values.lastName !== undefined) updateData.lastName = values.lastName;
 273 | 		if (values.dateOfBirth !== undefined) updateData.dateOfBirth = values.dateOfBirth;
 274 | 		if (values.gender !== undefined) updateData.gender = values.gender;
 275 | 		if (values.email !== undefined) updateData.email = values.email;
 276 | 		if (values.phone !== undefined) updateData.phone = values.phone;
 277 | 		if (values.address !== undefined) updateData.address = values.address;
 278 | 		if (values.bloodGroup !== undefined) updateData.bloodGroup = values.bloodGroup;
 279 | 		if (values.allergies !== undefined) updateData.allergies = values.allergies;
 280 | 		if (values.medicalConditions !== undefined) updateData.medicalConditions = values.medicalConditions;
 281 | 		if (values.medicalHistory !== undefined) updateData.medicalHistory = values.medicalHistory;
 282 | 		if (values.emergencyContactName !== undefined) updateData.emergencyContactName = values.emergencyContactName;
 283 | 		if (values.emergencyContactNumber !== undefined) updateData.emergencyContactNumber = values.emergencyContactNumber;
 284 | 
 285 | 		const result = await db
 286 | 			.update(patient)
 287 | 			.set(updateData)
 288 | 			.where(eq(patient.id, id))
 289 | 			.returning();
 290 | 
 291 | 		const updatedPatient = result[0];
 292 | 		if (!updatedPatient) throw new Error("Patient not found after update");
 293 | 
 294 | 		return updatedPatient;
 295 | 	});
 296 | 
 297 | // Delete patient (soft delete)
 298 | export const deletePatient = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 299 | 	.validator((data: { id: string }) => data)
 300 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 301 | 		const session = await getSession();
 302 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 303 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 304 | 
 305 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 306 | 
 307 | 		await db
 308 | 			.update(patient)
 309 | 			.set({
 310 | 				isDeleted: true,
 311 | 				deletedAt: new Date(),
 312 | 				isActive: false,
 313 | 			})
 314 | 			.where(eq(patient.id, data.id));
 315 | 	});
 316 | 
 317 | // Search patients
 318 | export const searchPatients = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 319 | 	.validator((data: { searchTerm: string }) => data)
 320 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 321 | 		const session = await getSession();
 322 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 323 | 
 324 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 325 | 		const { searchTerm } = data;
 326 | 
 327 | 		const results = await db
 328 | 			.select()
 329 | 			.from(patient)
 330 | 			.where(
 331 | 				and(
 332 | 					sql`${patient.isDeleted} = false`,
 333 | 					sql`(${patient.firstName} ILIKE ${`%${searchTerm}%`} OR ${patient.lastName} ILIKE ${`%${searchTerm}%`} OR ${patient.mrn} ILIKE ${`%${searchTerm}%`})`
 334 | 				)
 335 | 			)
 336 | 			.limit(20);
 337 | 
 338 | 		return results;
 339 | 	});

```

`data/payment.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // server/payment.server.ts
   2 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   3 | import { and, eq, gte, lte, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   4 | import { z } from "zod";
   5 | 
   6 | import { db } from "@/db";
   7 | import {
   8 |   appointment,
   9 |   payment,
  10 |   type DbPayment,
  11 |   type PaymentMethod,
  12 |   type PaymentStatus
  13 | } from "@/db/schema";
  14 | import { PaymentCreateSchema } from "@/db/zod";
  15 | import { getSession } from "@/lib/auth.functions";
  16 | 
  17 | // Get payments for a patient
  18 | export const getPatientPayments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  19 |   .validator((patientId: string) => patientId)
  20 |   .handler(async ({ data: patientId }) => {
  21 |     const session = await getSession();
  22 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  23 | 
  24 |     const results = await db.query.payment.findMany({
  25 |       where: {
  26 |         patientId,
  27 |         isDeleted: false,
  28 |       },
  29 |       with: {
  30 |         appointment: {
  31 |           with: {
  32 |             doctor: true,
  33 |             service: true,
  34 |           },
  35 |         },
  36 |         bills: {
  37 |           with: {
  38 |             service: true,
  39 |           },
  40 |         },
  41 |       },
  42 |       orderBy: { billDate: "desc" },
  43 |     });
  44 | 
  45 |     return results;
  46 |   });
  47 | 
  48 | // Get payment by ID
  49 | export const getPaymentById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  50 |   .validator((id: string) => id)
  51 |   .handler(async ({ data: id }) => {
  52 |     const session = await getSession();
  53 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  54 | 
  55 |     const result = await db.query.payment.findFirst({
  56 |       where: { id, isDeleted: false },
  57 |       with: {
  58 |         patient: true,
  59 |         appointment: {
  60 |           with: {
  61 |             doctor: true,
  62 |             service: true,
  63 |           },
  64 |         },
  65 |         bills: {
  66 |           with: {
  67 |             service: true,
  68 |           },
  69 |         },
  70 |       },
  71 |     });
  72 | 
  73 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Payment not found");
  74 |     return result;
  75 |   });
  76 | 
  77 | // Create a new payment
  78 | export const createPayment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  79 |   .validator((data: z.infer<typeof PaymentCreateSchema>) =>
  80 |     PaymentCreateSchema.parse(data)
  81 |   )
  82 |   .handler(async ({ data }): Promise<DbPayment> => {
  83 |     const session = await getSession();
  84 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  85 | 
  86 |     // Verify appointment exists if provided
  87 |     if (data.appointmentId) {
  88 |       const appointmentData = await db.query.appointment.findFirst({
  89 |         where: { id: data.appointmentId, isDeleted: false },
  90 |       });
  91 |       if (!appointmentData) throw new Error("Appointment not found");
  92 |     }
  93 | 
  94 |     const receiptNumber = Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000);
  95 | 
  96 |     const [result] = await db
  97 |       .insert(payment)
  98 |       .values({
  99 |         ...data,
 100 |         id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 101 |         receiptNumber,
 102 |         createdAt: new Date(),
 103 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
 104 |       })
 105 |       .returning();
 106 | 
 107 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Failed to create payment");
 108 |     return result;
 109 |   });
 110 | 
 111 | // Update payment status
 112 | export const updatePaymentStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 113 |   .validator(
 114 |     (data: {
 115 |       id: string;
 116 |       status: PaymentStatus;
 117 |       paymentMethod?: PaymentMethod;
 118 |       notes?: string;
 119 |     }) => data
 120 |   )
 121 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 122 |     const session = await getSession();
 123 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 124 | 
 125 |     const { id, status, paymentMethod, notes } = data;
 126 | 
 127 |     const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {
 128 |       status,
 129 |       paymentMethod,
 130 |       notes,
 131 |       updatedAt: new Date(),
 132 |     };
 133 | 
 134 |     if (status === "PAID") {
 135 |       updateData.paymentDate = new Date();
 136 |       updateData.paidDate = new Date();
 137 |     }
 138 | 
 139 |     const [result] = await db
 140 |       .update(payment)
 141 |       .set(updateData)
 142 |       .where(eq(payment.id, id))
 143 |       .returning();
 144 | 
 145 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Payment not found");
 146 |     return result;
 147 |   });
 148 | 
 149 | // Process payment (mark as paid)
 150 | export const processPayment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 151 |   .validator(
 152 |     (data: {
 153 |       paymentId: string;
 154 |       amountPaid: number;
 155 |       paymentMethod: PaymentMethod;
 156 |       notes?: string;
 157 |     }) => data
 158 |   )
 159 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 160 |     const session = await getSession();
 161 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 162 | 
 163 |     const { paymentId, amountPaid, paymentMethod, notes } = data;
 164 | 
 165 |     const existingPayment = await db.query.payment.findFirst({
 166 |       where: { id: paymentId, isDeleted: false },
 167 |     });
 168 | 
 169 |     if (!existingPayment) throw new Error("Payment not found");
 170 | 
 171 |     const isFullyPaid = amountPaid >= (existingPayment.totalAmount || 0);
 172 |     const status = isFullyPaid ? "PAID" : "PARTIAL";
 173 | 
 174 |     const [result] = await db
 175 |       .update(payment)
 176 |       .set({
 177 |         amountPaid,
 178 |         paymentMethod,
 179 |         status,
 180 |         paymentDate: new Date(),
 181 |         paidDate: new Date(),
 182 |         notes: notes ? `${existingPayment.notes || ""}\n${notes}` : existingPayment.notes,
 183 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
 184 |       })
 185 |       .where(eq(payment.id, paymentId))
 186 |       .returning();
 187 | 
 188 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Payment not found");
 189 | 
 190 |     // Update appointment status if applicable
 191 |     if (result.appointmentId && isFullyPaid) {
 192 |       await db
 193 |         .update(appointment)
 194 |         .set({ status: "COMPLETED", updatedAt: new Date() })
 195 |         .where(eq(appointment.id, result.appointmentId));
 196 |     }
 197 | 
 198 |     return result;
 199 |   });
 200 | 
 201 | // Delete payment (soft delete)
 202 | export const deletePayment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 203 |   .validator((data: { id: string }) => data)
 204 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 205 |     const session = await getSession();
 206 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 207 |     if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 208 | 
 209 |     const [result] = await db
 210 |       .update(payment)
 211 |       .set({
 212 |         isDeleted: true,
 213 |         deletedAt: new Date(),
 214 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
 215 |       })
 216 |       .where(eq(payment.id, data.id))
 217 |       .returning();
 218 | 
 219 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Payment not found");
 220 |     return { success: true };
 221 |   });
 222 | 
 223 | // Get payment summary for clinic
 224 | export const getPaymentSummary = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 225 |   .validator(
 226 |     (data?: { startDate?: Date; endDate?: Date }) => data || {}
 227 |   )
 228 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 229 |     const session = await getSession();
 230 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 231 | 
 232 |     const { startDate, endDate } = data || {};
 233 | 
 234 |     const conditions = [eq(payment.isDeleted, false)];
 235 | 
 236 |     if (startDate) conditions.push(gte(payment.billDate, startDate));
 237 |     if (endDate) conditions.push(lte(payment.billDate, endDate));
 238 | 
 239 |     const summary = await db
 240 |       .select({
 241 |         totalPayments: sql<number>`COUNT(*)`,
 242 |         totalAmount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${payment.totalAmount}), 0)`,
 243 |         totalPaid: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${payment.amountPaid}), 0)`,
 244 |         totalDiscount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${payment.discount}), 0)`,
 245 |         paidCount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ${payment.status} = 'PAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)`,
 246 |         pendingCount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ${payment.status} = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)`,
 247 |         unpaidCount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ${payment.status} = 'UNPAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)`,
 248 |         refundedCount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ${payment.status} = 'REFUNDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)`,
 249 |         partialCount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ${payment.status} = 'PARTIAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)`,
 250 |       })
 251 |       .from(payment)
 252 |       .where(and(...conditions));
 253 | 
 254 |     return summary[0] || {
 255 |       totalPayments: 0,
 256 |       totalAmount: 0,
 257 |       totalPaid: 0,
 258 |       totalDiscount: 0,
 259 |       paidCount: 0,
 260 |       pendingCount: 0,
 261 |       unpaidCount: 0,
 262 |       refundedCount: 0,
 263 |       partialCount: 0,
 264 |     };
 265 |   });

```

`data/prescriptions.ts`:

```ts
   1 | 
   2 |  import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   3 |  import { and, desc, eq, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   4 |  import { z } from "zod";
   5 |  import { getSession } from "#/lib/auth.functions";
   6 |  import { prescription, patient, doctor, type DbPrescription } from "@/db/schema";
   7 | import { generateId } from '../utils';
   8 | 
   9 |  export const prescriptionSchema = z.object({
  10 |  	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Patient is required"),
  11 |  	doctorId: z.string().min(1, "Doctor is required"),
  12 |  	appointmentId: z.string().optional().nullable(),
  13 |  	medications: z.array(z.object({
  14 |  		name: z.string().min(1),
  15 |  		dosage: z.string().min(1),
  16 |  		frequency: z.string().min(1),
  17 |  		duration: z.string().min(1),
  18 |  		instructions: z.string().optional(),
  19 |  	})),
  20 |  	diagnosis: z.string().optional(),
  21 |  	notes: z.string().optional(),
  22 |  	status: z.enum(["active", "completed", "on_hold", "cancelled"]).default("active"),
  23 |  	startDate: z.coerce.date().default(() => new Date()),
  24 |  	endDate: z.coerce.date().optional().nullable(),
  25 |  });
  26 | 
  27 |  export const getPrescriptionsByPatient = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  28 |  	.validator((patientId: string) => patientId)
  29 |  	.handler(async ({ data: patientId }) => {
  30 |  		const session = await getSession();
  31 |  		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  32 | 
  33 |  		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  34 | 
  35 |  		const results = await db
  36 |  			.select({
  37 |  				id: prescription.id,
  38 |  				medications: prescription.medicationName,
  39 |  				diagnosis: prescription.diagnosis,
  40 |  				status: prescription.status,
  41 |  				startDate: prescription.issuedDate,
  42 |  				doctorName: doctor.name,
  43 |  				patientFirstName: patient.firstName,
  44 |  				patientLastName: patient.lastName,
  45 |  			})
  46 |  			.from(prescription)
  47 |  			.innerJoin(patient, eq(prescription.patientId, patient.id))
  48 |  			.innerJoin(doctor, eq(prescription.doctorId, doctor.id))
  49 |  			.where(eq(prescription.patientId, patientId))
  50 |  			.orderBy(desc(prescription.createdAt));
  51 | 
  52 |  		return results;
  53 |  	});
  54 | 
  55 |  export const createPrescription = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  56 |  	.validator((data: z.infer<typeof prescriptionSchema>) => prescriptionSchema.parse(data))
  57 |  	.handler(async ({ data }): Promise<DbPrescription> => {
  58 |  		const session = await getSession();
  59 |  		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  60 |  		if (session.user.role === "patient") throw new Error("Forbidden");
  61 | 
  62 |  		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  63 | 
  64 |  		// Get clinicId from patient
  65 |  		const [patientRecord] = await db
  66 |  			.select({ clinicId: patient.clinicId })
  67 |  			.from(patient)
  68 |  			.where(eq(patient.id, data.patientId))
  69 |  			.limit(1);
  70 | 
  71 |  		if (!patientRecord) throw new Error("Patient not found");
  72 | 
  73 |  		const [newPrescription] = await db
  74 |  			.insert(prescription)
  75 |  			.values({
  76 |  				id: generateId(),
  77 | 				...data,
  78 | 			} as any)
  79 |  			.returning();
  80 | 
  81 |  		if (!newPrescription) throw new Error("Failed to create prescription");
  82 |  		return newPrescription;
  83 |  	});
  84 | 
  85 |  export const updatePrescriptionStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  86 |  	.validator(z.object({
  87 |  		id: z.string(),
  88 |  		status: z.enum(["active", "completed", "on_hold", "cancelled"])
  89 |  	}))
  90 |  	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  91 |  		const session = await getSession();
  92 |  		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  93 | 
  94 |  		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  95 | 
  96 |  		const [updated] = await db
  97 |  			.update(prescription)
  98 |  			.set({
  99 |  				status: data.status,
 100 |  				updatedAt: new Date()
 101 |  			})
 102 |  			.where(eq(prescription.id, data.id))
 103 |  			.returning();
 104 | 
 105 |  		return updated;
 106 |  	});
 107 | 
 108 |  export const getPrescriptionById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 109 |  	.validator((id: string) => id)
 110 |  	.handler(async ({ data: id }) => {
 111 |  		const session = await getSession();
 112 |  		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 113 | 
 114 |  		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 115 | 
 116 |  		const [result] = await db
 117 |  			.select({
 118 |  				id: prescription.id,
 119 |  				medications: prescription.medicationName,
 120 |  				diagnosis: prescription.diagnosis,
 121 |  				notes: prescription.notes,
 122 |  				status: prescription.status,
 123 |  				startDate: prescription.issuedDate,
 124 |  				endDate: prescription.endDate,
 125 |  				doctor: {
 126 |  					name: doctor.name,
 127 |  					specialty: doctor.specialty,
 128 |  				},
 129 |  				patient: {
 130 |  					firstName: patient.firstName,
 131 |  					lastName: patient.lastName,
 132 |  					mrn: patient.mrn,
 133 |  				}
 134 |  			})
 135 |  			.from(prescription)
 136 |  			.innerJoin(patient, eq(prescription.patientId, patient.id))
 137 |  			.innerJoin(doctor, eq(prescription.doctorId, doctor.id))
 138 |  			.where(eq(prescription.id, id))
 139 |  			.limit(1);
 140 | 
 141 |  		return result ?? null;
 142 |  	});
 143 | 
 144 |  export const deletePrescription = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 145 |  	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string() }))
 146 |  	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 147 |  		const session = await getSession();
 148 |  		if (!session || session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 149 | 
 150 |  		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 151 |  		await db.delete(prescription).where(eq(prescription.id, data.id));
 152 | 
 153 |  		return { success: true };
 154 |  	});

```

`data/products.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   2 | import { eq } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | import { z } from "zod";
   4 | import { getSession } from "#/lib/auth.functions";
   5 | import { type ProductSelect, products } from "@/db/schema";
   6 | import { uploadFile } from "@/lib/storage";
   7 | 
   8 | export const getAllProducts = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
   9 | 	async () => {
  10 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  11 | 		try {
  12 | 			const allProducts = await db.select().from(products);
  13 | 			return allProducts;
  14 | 		} catch (error) {
  15 | 			console.error("Error getting all products: ", error);
  16 | 			return [];
  17 | 		}
  18 | 	},
  19 | );
  20 | 
  21 | export const getRecommendedProducts = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
  22 | 	async () => {
  23 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  24 | 		try {
  25 | 			const recommendedProducts = await db.select().from(products).limit(3);
  26 | 			return recommendedProducts;
  27 | 		} catch (error) {
  28 | 			console.error("Error getting recommended products: ", error);
  29 | 			return [];
  30 | 		}
  31 | 	},
  32 | );
  33 | 
  34 | const idSchema = z.string();
  35 | 
  36 | export const getProductById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  37 | 	.validator((id: string) => id)
  38 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  39 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  40 | 		const id = idSchema.parse(data);
  41 | 
  42 | 		const product = await db
  43 | 			.select()
  44 | 			.from(products)
  45 | 			.where(eq(products.id, id))
  46 | 			.limit(1);
  47 | 
  48 | 		return product[0] ?? null;
  49 | 	});
  50 | 
  51 | export const productSchema = z.object({
  52 | 	name: z.string().min(1, "Name is required"),
  53 | 	description: z.string().min(1, "Description is required"),
  54 | 	price: z
  55 | 		.string()
  56 | 		.refine((val) => !isNaN(Number(val)), "Price must be a number"),
  57 | 	badge: z.enum(["New", "Sale", "Featured", "Limited"]).nullable().optional(),
  58 | 	image: z
  59 | 		.string()
  60 | 		.url("Image must be a valid URL")
  61 | 		.max(512, "Image must be 512 chars or less"),
  62 | 	inventory: z.enum(["in-stock", "backorder", "preorder"]),
  63 | });
  64 | 
  65 | export const createProduct = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  66 | 	.validator((data: z.infer<typeof productSchema>) =>
  67 | 		productSchema.parse(data),
  68 | 	)
  69 | 	.handler(async ({ data }): Promise<ProductSelect> => {
  70 | 		const session = await getSession();
  71 | 		if (!session) {
  72 | 			throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  73 | 		}
  74 | 
  75 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") {
  76 | 			throw new Error("Forbidden");
  77 | 		}
  78 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  79 | 		const result = await db
  80 | 			.insert(products)
  81 | 			.values({ ...data, badge: data.badge ?? null })
  82 | 			.returning();
  83 | 		const product = result[0];
  84 | 		if (!product) {
  85 | 			throw new Error(
  86 | 				"Failed to create product: no product returned from database",
  87 | 			);
  88 | 		}
  89 | 		return product;
  90 | 	});
  91 | 
  92 | export const uploadProductImage = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  93 | 	.validator((data: { fileBase64: string; fileName: string }) => data)
  94 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  95 | 		// Only admins
  96 | 		const session = await getSession();
  97 | 		if (!session || session.user.role !== "admin") {
  98 | 			throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  99 | 		}
 100 | 
 101 | 
 102 | 		// Convert base64 → Buffer
 103 | 		const base64Data = data.fileBase64.split(",")[1] ?? data.fileBase64;
 104 | 		const buffer = Buffer.from(base64Data, "base64");
 105 | 
 106 | 		// Fix content type: jpg → jpeg
 107 | 		const ext = data.fileName.split(".").pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? "jpg";
 108 | 		const mimeType = ext === "jpg" ? "image/jpeg" : `image/${ext}`;
 109 | 
 110 | 		// Unique name
 111 | 		const uniqueName = `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}.${ext}`;
 112 | 		const filePath = `products/${uniqueName}`;
 113 | 
 114 | 		console.log("Uploading to MinIO Storage:", {
 115 | 			filePath,
 116 | 			mimeType,
 117 | 			bufferSize: buffer.length,
 118 | 		});
 119 | 
 120 | 		// Upload to MinIO
 121 | 		await uploadFile(filePath, buffer, mimeType);
 122 | 
 123 | 		return { url: filePath };
 124 | 	});
 125 | 
 126 | const updateProductSchema = productSchema.partial().extend({
 127 | 	id: z.string().min(1, "Product ID is required"),
 128 | });
 129 | 
 130 | export const updateProduct = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 131 | 	.validator((data: z.infer<typeof updateProductSchema>) =>
 132 | 		updateProductSchema.parse(data),
 133 | 	)
 134 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 135 | 		const session = await getSession();
 136 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 137 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 138 | 
 139 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 140 | 		const { id, ...values } = data;
 141 | 
 142 | 		const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
 143 | 		if (values.name !== undefined) updateData.name = values.name;
 144 | 		if (values.description !== undefined)
 145 | 			updateData.description = values.description;
 146 | 		if (values.price !== undefined) updateData.price = values.price;
 147 | 		if (values.image !== undefined) updateData.image = values.image;
 148 | 		if (values.inventory !== undefined) updateData.inventory = values.inventory;
 149 | 		if (values.badge !== undefined) updateData.badge = values.badge ?? null;
 150 | 
 151 | 		const result = await db
 152 | 			.update(products)
 153 | 			.set(updateData)
 154 | 			.where(eq(products.id, id))
 155 | 			.returning();
 156 | 
 157 | 		const product = result[0];
 158 | 		if (!product) throw new Error("Product not found");
 159 | 		return product;
 160 | 	});
 161 | 
 162 | export const deleteProduct = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 163 | 	.validator((data: { id: string }) => data)
 164 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 165 | 		const session = await getSession();
 166 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 167 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 168 | 
 169 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 170 | 		await db.delete(products).where(eq(products.id, data.id));
 171 | 	});

```

`data/services.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { getSession } from "#/lib/auth.functions";
   2 | import { service, type DbService as ServiceSelect } from "@/db/schema";
   3 | import { generateId } from "@/utils";
   4 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   5 | import { and, eq, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   6 | import { z } from "zod";
   7 | 
   8 | export const serviceSchema = z.object({
   9 | 	serviceName: z.string().min(1, "Service name is required"),
  10 | 	description: z.string(),
  11 |   isAvailable: z.boolean().default(true),
  12 |   category: z.string(),
  13 |   icon: z.string(),
  14 |   color: z.string(),
  15 | 	price: z.number().min(0, "Price must be a positive number"),
  16 | 	duration: z.number().min(1, "Duration is required"),
  17 | });
  18 | 
  19 | export const getAllServices = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
  20 | 	async () => {
  21 | 		const session = await getSession();
  22 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  23 | 
  24 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  25 | 
  26 | 		try {
  27 | 			// Get user's clinic ID
  28 | 			const userClinics = await db
  29 | 				.select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
  30 | 				.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
  31 | 				.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
  32 | 				.limit(1);
  33 | 
  34 | 			const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
  35 | 			if (!clinicId) return [];
  36 | 
  37 | 			const allServices = await db.query.service.findMany({
  38 | 				where: {
  39 | 					clinicId: clinicId as string,
  40 | 					isDeleted: false,
  41 | 				},
  42 | 				orderBy: (service, { asc }) => [asc(service.serviceName)],
  43 | 			});
  44 | 			return allServices;
  45 | 		} catch (error) {
  46 | 			console.error("Error getting all services: ", error);
  47 | 			return [];
  48 | 		}
  49 | 	},
  50 | );
  51 | 
  52 | // Get active services for the current clinic
  53 | export const getAvailableServices = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(
  54 | 	async () => {
  55 | 		const session = await getSession();
  56 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  57 | 
  58 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  59 | 
  60 | 		try {
  61 | 			const userClinics = await db
  62 | 				.select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
  63 | 				.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
  64 | 				.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
  65 | 				.limit(1);
  66 | 
  67 | 			const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
  68 | 			if (!clinicId) return [];
  69 | 
  70 | 			const availableServices = await db.query.service.findMany({
  71 | 				where: {
  72 | 					clinicId: clinicId as string,
  73 | 					isDeleted: false,
  74 | 					isActive: true,
  75 | 				},
  76 | 				orderBy: (service, { asc }) => [asc(service.serviceName)],
  77 | 			});
  78 | 			return availableServices;
  79 | 		} catch (error) {
  80 | 			console.error("Error getting available services: ", error);
  81 | 			return [];
  82 | 		}
  83 | 	},
  84 | );
  85 | 
  86 | export const getServiceById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  87 | 	.validator((id: string) => id)
  88 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  89 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
  90 | 		const serviceId = z.string().parse(data);
  91 | 
  92 | 		const result = await db
  93 | 			.select()
  94 | 			.from(service)
  95 | 			.where(and(eq(service.id, serviceId), eq(service.isDeleted, false)))
  96 | 			.limit(1);
  97 | 
  98 | 		return result[0] ?? null;
  99 | 	});
 100 | 
 101 | export const createService = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 102 | 	.validator((data: z.infer<typeof serviceSchema>) => serviceSchema.parse(data))
 103 | 	.handler(async ({ data }): Promise<ServiceSelect> => {
 104 | 		const session = await getSession();
 105 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 106 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 107 | 
 108 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 109 | 
 110 | 		const userClinics = await db
 111 | 			.select({ clinicId: sql`clinic_id` })
 112 | 			.from(sql`users_to_clinic`)
 113 | 			.where(eq(sql`user_id`, session.user.id))
 114 | 			.limit(1);
 115 | 
 116 | 		const clinicId = userClinics[0]?.clinicId;
 117 | 		if (!clinicId) throw new Error("No clinic assigned");
 118 | 
 119 | 		const result = await db
 120 | 			.insert(service)
 121 | 			.values({
 122 | 				id: generateId(),
 123 | 				clinicId: clinicId as string,
 124 | 				...data,
 125 | 			})
 126 | 			.returning();
 127 | 
 128 | 		if (!result[0]) throw new Error("Failed to create service");
 129 | 		return result[0];
 130 | 	});
 131 | 
 132 | const updateServiceSchema = serviceSchema.partial().extend({
 133 | 	id: z.string().min(1, "Service ID is required"),
 134 | });
 135 | 
 136 | export const updateService = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 137 | 	.validator((data: z.infer<typeof updateServiceSchema>) =>
 138 | 		updateServiceSchema.parse(data),
 139 | 	)
 140 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 141 | 		const session = await getSession();
 142 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 143 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 144 | 
 145 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 146 | 		const { id, ...values } = data;
 147 | 
 148 | 		const [updated] = await db
 149 | 			.update(service)
 150 | 			.set({
 151 | 				...values,
 152 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 153 | 			})
 154 | 			.where(eq(service.id, id))
 155 | 			.returning();
 156 | 
 157 | 		if (!updated) throw new Error("Service not found");
 158 | 		return updated;
 159 | 	});
 160 | 
 161 | export const deleteService = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 162 | 	.validator((data: { id: string }) => data)
 163 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
 164 | 		const session = await getSession();
 165 | 		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 166 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw new Error("Forbidden");
 167 | 
 168 | 		const { db } = await import("@/db");
 169 | 
 170 | 		const [deleted] = await db
 171 | 			.update(service)
 172 | 			.set({
 173 | 				isDeleted: true,
 174 |         color: null,
 175 | 				deletedAt: new Date(),
 176 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 177 | 			})
 178 | 			.where(eq(service.id, data.id))
 179 | 			.returning();
 180 | 
 181 | 		if (!deleted) throw new Error("Service not found");
 182 | 		return { success: true };
 183 | 	});
```

`data/user.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { db } from "@/db";
   2 | import { user } from "@/db/schema";
   3 | import { getSession } from "@/lib/auth.functions";
   4 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   5 | import { eq } from "drizzle-orm";
   6 | import { deleteObject, getPresignedDownloadUrl, getPresignedUploadUrl } from "@/lib/storage";
   7 | 
   8 | // 1. Get a secure URL for the client to upload the file directly to MinIO
   9 | export const getProfileUploadUrl = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  10 |   .validator((data: { fileName: string; contentType: string }) => data)
  11 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
  12 |     const session = await getSession();
  13 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  14 | 
  15 |     const extension = data.fileName.split('.').pop() || 'jpg';
  16 |     const objectName = `avatars/${session.user.id}/${Date.now()}.${extension}`;
  17 | 
  18 |     const uploadUrl = await getPresignedUploadUrl(objectName, data.contentType);
  19 | 
  20 |     return { uploadUrl, objectName };
  21 |   });
  22 | 
  23 | // 2. Update the user record in the DB with the objectName
  24 | // This is called AFTER the client successfully uploads to MinIO using the presigned URL
  25 | export const updateProfile = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  26 |   .validator((data: { name?: string; objectName?: string; phone?: string; address?: string }) => data)
  27 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
  28 |     const session = await getSession();
  29 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  30 | 
  31 |     // Fetch old avatar to clean up
  32 |     const [oldUser] = await db
  33 |       .select({ image: user.image })
  34 |       .from(user)
  35 |       .where(eq(user.id, session.user.id));
  36 | 
  37 |     const updateData: { name?: string; image?: string; phone?: string; address?: string } = {};
  38 |     if (data.name) updateData.name = data.name;
  39 |     if (data.phone) updateData.phone = data.phone;
  40 |     if (data.address) updateData.address = data.address;
  41 | 
  42 |     if (data.objectName) {
  43 |       updateData.image = data.objectName;
  44 | 
  45 |       // MinIO Cleanup: Only delete if the new image is different
  46 |       if (oldUser?.image && oldUser.image !== data.objectName) {
  47 |         await deleteObject(oldUser.image).catch((err: unknown) =>
  48 |           console.error("Failed to delete old avatar:", err)
  49 |         );
  50 |       }
  51 |     }
  52 | 
  53 |     const [updated] = await db
  54 |       .update(user)
  55 |       .set(updateData)
  56 |       .where(eq(user.id, session.user.id))
  57 |       .returning();
  58 | 
  59 |     if (!updated) throw new Error("User not found");
  60 |     return updated;
  61 |   });
  62 | 
  63 | // 3. Get a temporary URL to view the avatar
  64 | export const getAvatarUrl = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  65 |   .validator((data: { objectName: string }) => data)
  66 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
  67 |     const session = await getSession();
  68 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  69 | 
  70 |     return await getPresignedDownloadUrl(data.objectName);
  71 |   });
  72 | 
  73 | 
  74 | 
  75 | export const uploadProfileImage = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  76 |   .validator((data: FormData) => {
  77 |     const file = data.get("file") as File;
  78 |     if (!file) throw new Error("File is required");
  79 |     return { file };
  80 |   })
  81 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
  82 |     const { file } = data;
  83 |     const { uploadUrl, objectName } = await getProfileUploadUrl({
  84 |       data: { fileName: file.name, contentType: file.type },
  85 |     });
  86 | 
  87 |     await fetch(uploadUrl, { method: "PUT", body: file, headers: { "Content-Type": file.type } });
  88 |     return await updateProfile({ data: { objectName } });
  89 |   });

```

`data/vital-signs.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // src/data/vital-signs.ts
   2 | import { db } from "@/db";
   3 | import { vitalSign, type DbVitalSign } from "@/db/schema";
   4 | import { getSession } from "@/lib/auth.functions";
   5 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   6 | import { eq } from "drizzle-orm";
   7 | import { z } from "zod";
   8 | 
   9 | export const vitalSignSchema = z.object({
  10 |   patientId: z.string(),
  11 |   medicalId: z.string(),
  12 |   encounterId: z.string(),
  13 |   recordedAt: z.date().default(() => new Date()),
  14 |   bodyTemperature: z.number().optional(),
  15 |   systolic: z.number().optional(),
  16 |   diastolic: z.number().optional(),
  17 |   heartRate: z.number().optional(),
  18 |   respiratoryRate: z.number().optional(),
  19 |   oxygenSaturation: z.number().optional(),
  20 |   weight: z.number().optional(),
  21 |   height: z.number().optional(),
  22 |   notes: z.string().optional(),
  23 | });
  24 | 
  25 | export type VitalSignInput = z.infer<typeof vitalSignSchema>;
  26 | 
  27 | // Get vital signs for a patient
  28 | export const getPatientVitalSigns = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  29 |   .validator((patientId: string) => patientId)
  30 |   .handler(async ({ data: patientId }) => {
  31 |     const session = await getSession();
  32 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  33 | 
  34 |     const results = await db.query.vitalSign.findMany({
  35 |       where: { patientId },
  36 |       orderBy: { recordedAt: "desc" },
  37 |     });
  38 | 
  39 |     return results;
  40 |   });
  41 | 
  42 | // Get vital signs for an encounter
  43 | export const getEncounterVitalSigns = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  44 |   .validator((encounterId: string) => encounterId)
  45 |   .handler(async ({ data: encounterId }) => {
  46 |     const session = await getSession();
  47 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  48 | 
  49 |     const results = await db.query.vitalSign.findMany({
  50 |       where: { encounterId },
  51 |       orderBy: { recordedAt: "desc" },
  52 |     });
  53 | 
  54 |     return results;
  55 |   });
  56 | 
  57 | // Create vital signs
  58 | export const createVitalSign = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  59 |   .validator((data: VitalSignInput) => vitalSignSchema.parse(data))
  60 |   .handler(async ({ data }): Promise<DbVitalSign> => {
  61 |     const session = await getSession();
  62 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  63 | 
  64 |     // Get clinic ID from patient
  65 |     const patientData = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
  66 |       where: { id: data.patientId, isDeleted: false },
  67 |     });
  68 | 
  69 |     if (!patientData) throw new Error("Patient not found");
  70 | 
  71 |     // Calculate age in days and months
  72 |     const ageDays = Math.floor(
  73 |       (data.recordedAt.getTime() - patientData.dateOfBirth.getTime()) /
  74 |         (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
  75 |     );
  76 |     const ageMonths = Math.floor(ageDays / 30.44);
  77 | 
  78 |     // Calculate BMI if weight and height are provided
  79 |     let bmi: number | null = null;
  80 |     if (data.weight && data.height) {
  81 |       const heightInMeters = data.height / 100;
  82 |       bmi = Number((data.weight / (heightInMeters * heightInMeters)).toFixed(1));
  83 |     }
  84 | 
  85 |     const [result] = await db
  86 |       .insert(vitalSign)
  87 |       .values({
  88 |         id: crypto.randomUUID(),
  89 |         clinicId: patientData.clinicId,
  90 |         ...data,
  91 |         bmi,
  92 |         ageDays,
  93 |         ageMonths,
  94 |         createdAt: new Date(),
  95 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
  96 |       })
  97 |       .returning();
  98 | 
  99 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Failed to create vital signs");
 100 |     return result;
 101 |   });
 102 | 
 103 | // Update vital signs
 104 | export const updateVitalSign = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 105 |   .validator((data: Partial<VitalSignInput> & { id: string }) => data)
 106 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 107 |     const session = await getSession();
 108 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 109 | 
 110 |     const { id, ...updateData } = data;
 111 | 
 112 |     const [result] = await db
 113 |       .update(vitalSign)
 114 |       .set({
 115 |         ...updateData,
 116 |         updatedAt: new Date(),
 117 |       })
 118 |       .where(eq(vitalSign.id, id))
 119 |       .returning();
 120 | 
 121 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Vital sign record not found");
 122 |     return result;
 123 |   });
 124 | 
 125 | // Delete vital signs
 126 | export const deleteVitalSign = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 127 |   .validator((data: { id: string }) => data)
 128 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 129 |     const session = await getSession();
 130 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 131 | 
 132 |     const [result] = await db
 133 |       .delete(vitalSign)
 134 |       .where(eq(vitalSign.id, data.id))
 135 |       .returning();
 136 | 
 137 |     if (!result) throw new Error("Vital sign record not found");
 138 |     return { success: true };
 139 |   });
 140 | 
 141 | // Get vital signs trends
 142 | export const getVitalSignsTrends = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 143 |   .validator((data: { patientId: string; days?: number }) => data)
 144 |   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 145 |     const session = await getSession();
 146 |     if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
 147 | 
 148 |     const { patientId, days = 90 } = data;
 149 |     const startDate = new Date();
 150 |     startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - days);
 151 | 
 152 |     const results = await db.query.vitalSign.findMany({
 153 |       where: {
 154 |         patientId,
 155 |         recordedAt: { gte: startDate },
 156 |       },
 157 |       orderBy: { recordedAt: "asc" },
 158 |     });
 159 | 
 160 |     return results;
 161 |   });

```

`db/helper.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import type { AnyColumn } from "drizzle-orm";
   2 | import { sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | import { pgTableCreator, text, timestamp } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core";
   4 | 
   5 | import type { DbPrescribedItem } from "./schema/types";
   6 | import type { AdherenceItem, PrescriptionWithItems } from "./zod";
   7 | 
   8 | type AdherenceRecommendation = {
   9 | 	action: string;
  10 | 	message: string;
  11 | 	type: "adherence" | "positive";
  12 | };
  13 | 
  14 | type AdherenceDataPoint = {
  15 | 	adherenceRate: number;
  16 | 	drugId: string;
  17 | };
  18 | 
  19 | export function parseFrequency(frequency: string): number {
  20 | 	// Parse frequency string (e.g., "BID" = 2, "TID" = 3, "QD" = 1, "Q4H" = 6)
  21 | 	const frequencyMap: Record<string, number> = {
  22 | 		QD: 1,
  23 | 		BID: 2,
  24 | 		TID: 3,
  25 | 		QID: 4,
  26 | 		Q4H: 6,
  27 | 		Q6H: 4,
  28 | 		Q8H: 3,
  29 | 		Q12H: 2,
  30 | 		PRN: 2
  31 | 	};
  32 | 	return frequencyMap[frequency.toUpperCase()] ?? 2;
  33 | }
  34 | export function getAdherenceStatus(rate: number): string {
  35 | 	if (rate >= 80) return "good";
  36 | 	if (rate >= 50) return "moderate";
  37 | 	return "poor";
  38 | }
  39 | 
  40 | export function generateAdherenceRecommendations(adherenceData: AdherenceDataPoint[]) {
  41 | 	const recommendations: AdherenceRecommendation[] = [];
  42 | 	const poorAdherence = adherenceData.filter(d => d.adherenceRate < 50);
  43 | 
  44 | 	if (poorAdherence.length > 0) {
  45 | 		recommendations.push({
  46 | 			type: "adherence",
  47 | 			message: `Poor adherence detected for ${poorAdherence.length} medication(s)`,
  48 | 			action: "Schedule medication counseling session"
  49 | 		});
  50 | 	}
  51 | 
  52 | 	const highAdherence = adherenceData.filter(d => d.adherenceRate >= 80);
  53 | 	if (highAdherence.length > 0) {
  54 | 		recommendations.push({
  55 | 			type: "positive",
  56 | 			message: `Good adherence for ${highAdherence.length} medication(s)`,
  57 | 			action: "Continue current regimen"
  58 | 		});
  59 | 	}
  60 | 
  61 | 	return recommendations;
  62 | }
  63 | 
  64 | export function groupByMonth(prescriptions: PrescriptionWithItems[]) {
  65 | 	const monthMap = new Map();
  66 | 
  67 | 	for (const prescription of prescriptions) {
  68 | 		const month = prescription.issuedDate.toISOString().slice(0, 7);
  69 | 		if (!monthMap.has(month)) {
  70 | 			monthMap.set(month, {
  71 | 				month,
  72 | 				prescriptionCount: 0,
  73 | 				totalItems: 0
  74 | 			});
  75 | 		}
  76 | 
  77 | 		const stats = monthMap.get(month);
  78 | 		stats.prescriptionCount++;
  79 | 		stats.totalItems += prescription.prescribedItems.length;
  80 | 	}
  81 | 
  82 | 	return Array.from(monthMap.entries())
  83 | 		.map(([_, stats]) => stats)
  84 | 		.sort((a, b) => a.month.localeCompare(b.month));
  85 | }
  86 | 
  87 | export function calculateDaysSupply(item: DbPrescribedItem): number {
  88 | 	const quantity = item.dosageValue || 0;
  89 | 	const dosagePerDay = (item.dosageValue || 0) * parseFrequency(item.frequency);
  90 | 	return dosagePerDay > 0 ? Math.floor(quantity / dosagePerDay) : 0;
  91 | }
  92 | 
  93 | export function calculateRefillInterval(item: DbPrescribedItem): number {
  94 | 	// Calculate when next refill is due (typically 80% of days supply)
  95 | 	const daysSupply = calculateDaysSupply(item);
  96 | 	return Math.floor(daysSupply * 0.8);
  97 | }
  98 | 
  99 | type DoctorStats = {
 100 | 	doctorName: string | undefined;
 101 | 	prescriptionCount: number;
 102 | 	uniquePatients: Set<string>;
 103 | 	totalItems: number;
 104 | };
 105 | 
 106 | export function groupByDoctor(
 107 | 	prescriptions: (PrescriptionWithItems & {
 108 | 		doctor?: { name: string } | null;
 109 | 	})[]
 110 | ) {
 111 | 	const doctorMap = new Map<string, DoctorStats>();
 112 | 
 113 | 	for (const prescription of prescriptions) {
 114 | 		const doctorId = prescription.doctorId;
 115 | 		if (!doctorMap.has(doctorId ?? "")) {
 116 | 			doctorMap.set(doctorId ?? "", {
 117 | 				doctorName: prescription.doctor?.name,
 118 | 				prescriptionCount: 0,
 119 | 				uniquePatients: new Set(),
 120 | 				totalItems: 0
 121 | 			});
 122 | 		}
 123 | 
 124 | 		const stats = doctorMap.get(doctorId ?? "");
 125 | 		if (!stats) continue;
 126 | 		stats.prescriptionCount++;
 127 | 		stats.uniquePatients.add(prescription.patientId);
 128 | 		stats.totalItems += prescription.prescribedItems.length;
 129 | 	}
 130 | 
 131 | 	return Array.from(doctorMap.entries()).map(([id, stats]) => {
 132 | 		return {
 133 | 			doctorId: id,
 134 | 			...stats,
 135 | 			uniquePatients: stats.uniquePatients.size
 136 | 		};
 137 | 	});
 138 | }
 139 | 
 140 | export function groupByDrug(prescriptions: PrescriptionWithItems[]) {
 141 | 	const drugMap = new Map<
 142 | 		string,
 143 | 		{
 144 | 			drugName: string | undefined;
 145 | 			prescriptionCount: number;
 146 | 			totalDoses: number;
 147 | 			totalQuantity: number;
 148 | 		}
 149 | 	>();
 150 | 
 151 | 	for (const prescription of prescriptions) {
 152 | 		for (const item of prescription.prescribedItems) {
 153 | 			const drugId = item.drugId;
 154 | 			if (!drugMap.has(drugId)) {
 155 | 				drugMap.set(drugId, {
 156 | 					drugName: item.drug?.name,
 157 | 					prescriptionCount: 0,
 158 | 					totalDoses: 0,
 159 | 					totalQuantity: 0
 160 | 				});
 161 | 			}
 162 | 
 163 | 			const stats = drugMap.get(drugId);
 164 | 			if (!stats) continue;
 165 | 			stats.prescriptionCount++;
 166 | 			stats.totalDoses += item.dosageValue || 0;
 167 | 			// Note: prescribedItem doesn't have a 'quantity' field, using dosageValue as total quantity
 168 | 			stats.totalQuantity += item.dosageValue || 0;
 169 | 		}
 170 | 	}
 171 | 
 172 | 	return Array.from(drugMap.entries())
 173 | 		.map(([id, stats]) => {
 174 | 			return {
 175 | 				drugId: id,
 176 | 				...stats
 177 | 			};
 178 | 		})
 179 | 		.sort((a, b) => b.prescriptionCount - a.prescriptionCount);
 180 | }
 181 | 
 182 | export const createTable = pgTableCreator(name => `${name}`);
 183 | 
 184 | export const timestamps = {
 185 | 	deletedAt: timestamp("deleted_at", {
 186 | 		withTimezone: true,
 187 | 		mode: "string"
 188 | 	}),
 189 | 	createdAt: timestamp("created_at", {
 190 | 		withTimezone: true,
 191 | 		mode: "string"
 192 | 	})
 193 | 		.defaultNow()
 194 | 		.notNull(),
 195 | 	updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", {
 196 | 		withTimezone: true,
 197 | 		mode: "string"
 198 | 	}).defaultNow()
 199 | };
 200 | 
 201 | /**
 202 |  * Allows a single database instance for multiple projects.
 203 |  * @see https://orm.drizzle.team/docs/goodies#multi-project-schema
 204 |  */
 205 | 
 206 | export function takeFirstOrNull<TData>(data: Array<TData>) {
 207 | 	return data[0] ?? null;
 208 | }
 209 | 
 210 | export function takeFirstOrThrow<TData>(data: Array<TData>, errorMessage?: string) {
 211 | 	const first = takeFirstOrNull(data);
 212 | 
 213 | 	if (!first) {
 214 | 		throw new Error(errorMessage ?? "Item not found");
 215 | 	}
 216 | 
 217 | 	return first;
 218 | }
 219 | 
 220 | export function isEmpty<TColumn extends AnyColumn>(column: TColumn) {
 221 | 	return sql<boolean>`
 222 |     case
 223 |       when ${column} is null then true
 224 |       when ${column} = '' then true
 225 |       when ${column}::text = '[]' then true
 226 |       when ${column}::text = '{}' then true
 227 |       else false
 228 |     end
 229 |   `;
 230 | }
 231 | 
 232 | /**
 233 |  * Converts camelCase to snake_case
 234 |  * @param str - The camelCase string to convert
 235 |  * @returns The snake_case version of the string
 236 |  */
 237 | function toSnakeCase(str: string): string {
 238 | 	return str.replace(/[A-Z]/g, letter => `_${letter.toLowerCase()}`);
 239 | }
 240 | 
 241 | /**
 242 |  * Creates a key-value for file upload columns
 243 |  * @param columnPrefix - The prefix for the column names in camelCase (e.g., 'offeringDocument', 'profilePicture')
 244 |  * @returns Object with only url column
 245 |  */
 246 | export function createFileUrlColumn<T extends string>(columnPrefix: T) {
 247 | 	const snakeCase = toSnakeCase(columnPrefix);
 248 | 	return {
 249 | 		[`${columnPrefix}Url`]: text(`${snakeCase}_url`)
 250 | 	} as Record<`${T}Url`, ReturnType<typeof text>>;
 251 | }
 252 | 
 253 | /**
 254 |  * Creates a key-value for NOT NULL file upload columns
 255 |  * @param columnPrefix - The prefix for the column names in camelCase (e.g., 'offeringDocument', 'profilePicture')
 256 |  * @returns Object with only NOT NULL url column
 257 |  */
 258 | export function createRequiredFileUrlColumn<T extends string>(columnPrefix: T) {
 259 | 	const snakeCase = toSnakeCase(columnPrefix);
 260 | 	return {
 261 | 		[`${columnPrefix}Url`]: text(`${snakeCase}_url`).notNull()
 262 | 	} as Record<`${T}Url`, ReturnType<ReturnType<typeof text>["notNull"]>>;
 263 | }
 264 | 
 265 | /**
 266 |  * Creates a pair of columns for file uploads (fileName and url)
 267 |  * @param columnPrefix - The prefix for the column names in camelCase (e.g., 'offeringDocument', 'profilePicture')
 268 |  * @returns Object with fileName and url columns
 269 |  */
 270 | export function createFileColumns<T extends string>(columnPrefix: T) {
 271 | 	const snakeCase = toSnakeCase(columnPrefix);
 272 | 	return {
 273 | 		[`${columnPrefix}FileName`]: text(`${snakeCase}_file_name`),
 274 | 		[`${columnPrefix}Url`]: text(`${snakeCase}_url`)
 275 | 	} as Record<`${T}FileName` | `${T}Url`, ReturnType<typeof text>>;
 276 | }
 277 | 
 278 | /** * Creates a pair of NOT NULL columns for file uploads (fileName and url)
 279 |  * @param columnPrefix - The prefix for the column names in camelCase (e.g., 'offeringDocument', 'profilePicture')
 280 |  * @returns Object with NOT NULL fileName and url columns
 281 |  */
 282 | export function createRequiredFileColumns<T extends string>(columnPrefix: T) {
 283 | 	const snakeCase = toSnakeCase(columnPrefix);
 284 | 	return {
 285 | 		[`${columnPrefix}FileName`]: text(`${snakeCase}_file_name`).notNull(),
 286 | 		[`${columnPrefix}Url`]: text(`${snakeCase}_url`).notNull()
 287 | 	} as Record<`${T}FileName` | `${T}Url`, ReturnType<ReturnType<typeof text>["notNull"]>>;
 288 | }
 289 | 
 290 | // Helper functions
 291 | export function calculateAdherenceMetrics(prescribedItems: AdherenceItem[]) {
 292 | 	let totalAdherence = 0;
 293 | 	let count = 0;
 294 | 
 295 | 	for (const item of prescribedItems) {
 296 | 		const expectedDoses = calculateExpectedDoses(
 297 | 			item,
 298 | 			item.prescription?.issuedDate ?? new Date(),
 299 | 			item.prescription?.validUntil ?? new Date()
 300 | 		);
 301 | 		const dispensedDoses =
 302 | 			item.dispenses?.reduce(
 303 | 				(sum: number, dispense: { quantityDispensed: number }) =>
 304 | 					sum + dispense.quantityDispensed / (item.dosageValue || 1),
 305 | 				0
 306 | 			) ?? 0;
 307 | 
 308 | 		const adherence = expectedDoses > 0 ? (dispensedDoses / expectedDoses) * 100 : 0;
 309 | 		totalAdherence += adherence;
 310 | 		count++;
 311 | 	}
 312 | 
 313 | 	return {
 314 | 		overallAdherence: count > 0 ? totalAdherence / count : 0,
 315 | 		status: getAdherenceStatus(totalAdherence / count)
 316 | 	};
 317 | }
 318 | 
 319 | export function calculateExpectedDoses(item: AdherenceItem, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
 320 | 	const days = Math.ceil((endDate.getTime() - startDate.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 321 | 	const frequencyPerDay = parseFrequency(item.frequency);
 322 | 	return days * frequencyPerDay * (item.dosageValue || 1);
 323 | }
 324 | 
 325 | /**
 326 |  * Standardized Database Result Wrapper
 327 |  */
 328 | export async function safeDbQuery<T>(queryFn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<{ data: T | null; error: string | null }> {
 329 | 	try {
 330 | 		const result = await queryFn();
 331 | 		return { data: result, error: null };
 332 | 	} catch (err) {
 333 | 		console.error("[DATABASE_ERROR]:", err);
 334 | 		return {
 335 | 			data: null,
 336 | 			error: err instanceof Error ? err.message : "An unexpected database error occurred"
 337 | 		};
 338 | 	}
 339 | }

```

`db/index.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import path from "node:path";
   2 | import { sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | import { drizzle } from "drizzle-orm/node-postgres";
   4 | import { migrate } from "drizzle-orm/node-postgres/migrator"; // Updated import
   5 | import { Pool } from "pg";
   6 | import { relations } from "./schema/relations";
   7 | 
   8 | if (!process.env.DATABASE_URL) {
   9 | 	throw new Error("DATABASE_URL is not set");
  10 | }
  11 | const globalForDb = globalThis as unknown as {
  12 | 	pool: Pool | undefined;
  13 | };
  14 | 
  15 | // Simple Logger Helper
  16 | const logger = {
  17 | 	info: (msg: string, ...args: unknown[]) => console.log(`[DB-INFO] ${msg}`, ...args),
  18 | 	warn: (msg: string, ...args: unknown[]) => console.warn(`[DB-WARN] ${msg}`, ...args),
  19 | 	error: (msg: string, ...args: unknown[]) => console.error(`[DB-ERROR] ${msg}`, ...args),
  20 | 	debug: (msg: string, ...args: unknown[]) =>
  21 | 		process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production" && console.debug(`[DB-DEBUG] ${msg}`, ...args)
  22 | };
  23 | 
  24 | // Use pg Pool instead of postgres.js
  25 | const pool =
  26 | 	globalForDb.pool ??
  27 | 	new Pool({
  28 | 		connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL,
  29 | 		max: 10,
  30 | 		idleTimeoutMillis: 20000,
  31 | 		connectionTimeoutMillis: 10000
  32 | 	});
  33 | 
  34 | if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") globalForDb.pool = pool;
  35 | 
  36 | export const db = drizzle({
  37 | 	client: pool,
  38 | 	// Note: relations are passed via the schema object in the new Drizzle API
  39 | 	relations,
  40 | 	logger: process.env.NODE_ENV === "development"
  41 | });
  42 | 
  43 | export function createDb() {
  44 | 	return drizzle({
  45 | 		client: new Pool({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }),
  46 | 		relations
  47 | 	});
  48 | }
  49 | 
  50 | // export const db = drizzle(pool, { schema });
  51 | 
  52 | export async function checkIsDbReady(): Promise<boolean> {
  53 | 	try {
  54 | 		await db.execute(sql`SELECT 1`);
  55 | 		logger.debug("Database connection check successful");
  56 | 		return true;
  57 | 	} catch (error) {
  58 | 		logger.error("Database connection check failed", error);
  59 | 		return false;
  60 | 	}
  61 | }
  62 | 
  63 | let migrationFnCalled = false;
  64 | 
  65 | export async function runMigrations(): Promise<void> {
  66 | 	const fnName = "runMigrations";
  67 | 
  68 | 	if (migrationFnCalled) {
  69 | 		logger.debug(`[${fnName}] Skipping migration (already called)`);
  70 | 		return;
  71 | 	}
  72 | 
  73 | 	migrationFnCalled = true;
  74 | 
  75 | 	if (process.env.IS_BUILD) {
  76 | 		logger.info(`[${fnName}] Skipping migrations during build process (NODE_ENV: ${process.env.NODE_ENV})`);
  77 | 		return;
  78 | 	}
  79 | 
  80 | 	// Note: Usually you WANT to run migrations in production.
  81 | 	// If you strictly want to skip them, keep this, but ensure your CI/CD handles it.
  82 | 	if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") {
  83 | 		logger.info(`[${fnName}] Running in ${process.env.NODE_ENV}, applying migrations...`);
  84 | 	} else {
  85 | 		logger.info(`[${fnName}] Applying migrations for production...`);
  86 | 	}
  87 | 
  88 | 	const migrationsFolder = path.join(process.cwd(), "packages/db/src/migrations");
  89 | 
  90 | 	try {
  91 | 		logger.info(`[${fnName}] Starting migration process...`);
  92 | 		await migrate(db, { migrationsFolder });
  93 | 		logger.info(`[${fnName}] ✅ Database migration completed successfully`);
  94 | 	} catch (error) {
  95 | 		logger.error(`[${fnName}] ❌ Database migration failed`, error);
  96 | 		throw error;
  97 | 	}
  98 | }
  99 | 
 100 | export type DB = typeof db;
 101 | export type DBType = Parameters<Parameters<typeof db.transaction>[0]>[0];
 102 | export type DBorTx = DB | DBType;

```

`db/reset.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import "dotenv/config";
   2 | import { stdin as input, stdout as output } from "node:process";
   3 | import * as readline from "node:readline";
   4 | import { Client } from "pg"; // Updated import
   5 | 
   6 | const DATABASE_URL = process.env.DATABASE_URL;
   7 | 
   8 | if (!DATABASE_URL) {
   9 | 	console.error("❌ DATABASE_URL environment variable is not set");
  10 | 	process.exit(1);
  11 | }
  12 | 
  13 | async function askConfirmation(): Promise<boolean> {
  14 | 	const args = process.argv.slice(2);
  15 | 	if (args.includes("--force") || args.includes("-y")) {
  16 | 		return true;
  17 | 	}
  18 | 
  19 | 	const rl = readline.createInterface({ input, output });
  20 | 	try {
  21 | 		const answer = await new Promise<string>(resolve => {
  22 | 			rl.question("\n⚠️  WARNING: This will delete ALL data in the public schema. Continue? (y/N): ", resolve);
  23 | 		});
  24 | 		return answer.toLowerCase() === "y" || answer.toLowerCase() === "yes";
  25 | 	} finally {
  26 | 		rl.close();
  27 | 	}
  28 | }
  29 | 
  30 | async function resetDatabase() {
  31 | 	const confirmed = await askConfirmation();
  32 | 	if (!confirmed) {
  33 | 		console.log("❌ Reset cancelled.");
  34 | 		return;
  35 | 	}
  36 | 
  37 | 	console.log("\n🧹 Preparing to reset PostgreSQL database...");
  38 | 	const maskedUrl = DATABASE_URL?.replace(/:([^:@]+)@/, ":****@");
  39 | 	console.log(`📡 Connecting to: ${maskedUrl}`);
  40 | 
  41 | 	// Initialize the pg Client
  42 | 	const client = new Client({ connectionString: DATABASE_URL });
  43 | 
  44 | 	try {
  45 | 		await client.connect();
  46 | 		console.log("✅ Database connection successful\n");
  47 | 
  48 | 		console.log("🔥 Dropping and recreating public schema...");
  49 | 
  50 | 		// pg uses "BEGIN", "COMMIT", "ROLLBACK" for transactions
  51 | 		await client.query("BEGIN");
  52 | 		try {
  53 | 			await client.query("DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS public CASCADE");
  54 | 			await client.query("CREATE SCHEMA public");
  55 | 			await client.query("GRANT ALL ON SCHEMA public TO public");
  56 | 			await client.query("COMMENT ON SCHEMA public IS 'standard public schema'");
  57 | 			await client.query("COMMIT");
  58 | 		} catch (e) {
  59 | 			await client.query("ROLLBACK");
  60 | 			throw e;
  61 | 		}
  62 | 
  63 | 		console.log("✅ Schema reset successful.");
  64 | 		console.log("\n✨ Database reset complete!");
  65 | 		console.log("\n🚀 Next steps:");
  66 | 		console.log("   1. Run migrations: bun run db:migrate");
  67 | 		console.log("   2. Seed database: bun run db:seed");
  68 | 		console.log("   3. Start the app: bun run dev");
  69 | 	} catch (error) {
  70 | 		console.error("\n❌ Reset failed:", error instanceof Error ? error.message : error);
  71 | 		process.exit(1);
  72 | 	} finally {
  73 | 		await client.end();
  74 | 	}
  75 | }
  76 | 
  77 | resetDatabase();

```

```ts
1138 | 		createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow().notNull(),
1139 | 		updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at")
1140 | 			.defaultNow()
1141 | 			.$onUpdate(() => new Date())
1142 | 			.notNull(),
1143 | 		reportedByStaffId: text("reported_by_staff_id").references(() => staff.id, { onDelete: "set null" })
1144 | 	},
1145 | 	table => [
1146 | 		index("adverse_event_patient_vaccine_idx").on(table.patientId, table.vaccineName),
1147 | 		index("adverse_event_date_reported_idx").on(table.dateReported),
1148 | 		index("adverse_event_immunization_idx").on(table.immunizationId)
1149 | 	]
1150 | );
1151 | 
1152 | export const vaccineInventory = pgTable(
1153 | 	"vaccine_inventory",
1154 | 	{
1155 | 		id: text("id").primaryKey(),
1156 | 		clinicId: text("clinic_id").references(() => clinic.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
1157 | 		vaccineName: text("vaccine_name").notNull(),
1158 | 		quantity: integer("quantity").notNull(),
1159 | 		lotNumber: text("lot_number"),
1160 | 		expirationDate: timestamp("expiration_date"),
1161 | 		createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow().notNull(),
1162 | 		updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at")
1163 | 			.defaultNow()
1164 | 			.$onUpdate(() => new Date())
1165 | 			.notNull()
1166 | 	},
1167 | 	table => [
1168 | 		index("vaccine_inventory_clinic_vaccine_idx").on(table.clinicId, table.vaccineName),
1169 | 		index("vaccine_inventory_expiration_idx").on(table.expirationDate)
1170 | 	]
1171 | );
1172 | 
1173 | export const todo = pgTable("todo", {
1174 | 	id: serial("id").primaryKey(),
1175 | 	text: text("text").notNull(),
1176 | 	completed: boolean("completed").default(false).notNull()
1177 | });
1178 | export const alert = pgTable("alert", {
1179 | 	id: text("id").primaryKey(),
1180 | 	title: text("title").notNull(),
1181 | 	message: text("message").notNull(),
1182 | 	type: text("type").notNull(),
1183 | 	timestamp: timestamp("timestamp").defaultNow().notNull(),
1184 | 	action: jsonb("action").$type<{ label: string; href: string } | null>()
1185 | });
1186 | 
1187 | export const aiReport = pgTable("ai_report", {
1188 | 	id: text("id").primaryKey(),
1189 | 	patientId: text("patient_id")
1190 | 		.notNull()
1191 | 		.references(() => patient.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
1192 | 	doctorId: text("doctor_id").references(() => doctor.id, {
1193 | 		onDelete: "set null"
1194 | 	}),
1195 | 	clinicId: text("clinic_id").references(() => clinic.id, {
1196 | 		onDelete: "cascade"
1197 | 	}),
1198 | 	reportType: text("report_type").notNull(),
1199 | 	content: text("content").notNull(),
1200 | 	metadata: jsonb("metadata").$type<Record<string, unknown>>().default({}),
1201 | 	createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { mode: "date" }).defaultNow().notNull(),
1202 | 	generatedBy: text("generated_by")
1203 | 		.notNull()
1204 | 		.references(() => user.id),
1205 | 	updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", { mode: "date" })
1206 | 		.defaultNow()
1207 | 		.$onUpdate(() => new Date())
1208 | });
1209 | 
1210 | export const neonatalAssessment = pgTable(
1211 | 	"neonatal_assessment",
1212 | 	{
1213 | 		id: text("id").primaryKey(),
1214 | 		patientId: text("patient_id")
1215 | 			.notNull()
1216 | 			.references(() => patient.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
1217 | 		clinicId: text("clinic_id")
1218 | 			.notNull()
1219 | 			.references(() => clinic.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
1220 | 		weight: real("weight").notNull(),
1221 | 		height: real("height").notNull(),
1222 | 		vitals: jsonb("vitals").$type<{
1223 | 			bodyTemperature: number;
1224 | 			heartRate: number;
1225 | 			respiratoryRate: number;
1226 | 			oxygenSaturation: number;
1227 | 		}>(),
1228 | 		headCircumference: real("head_circumference").notNull(),
1229 | 		apgarScore: integer("apgar_score").notNull(),
1230 | 		feedingType: feedingTypeEnum("feeding_type").notNull(),
1231 | 		createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { mode: "date" }).defaultNow().notNull(),
1232 | 		updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", { mode: "date" })
1233 | 			.defaultNow()
1234 | 			.$onUpdate(() => new Date())
1235 | 			.notNull()
1236 | 	},
1237 | 	table => [index("neonatal_assessment_patient_idx").on(table.patientId)]
1238 | );

1240 | export const nutritionalAssessment = pgTable(
1241 | 	"nutritional_assessment",
1242 | 	{
1243 | 		id: text("id").primaryKey(),
1244 | 		patientId: text("patient_id")
1245 | 			.notNull()
1246 | 			.references(() => patient.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
1247 | 		clinicId: text("clinic_id")
1248 | 			.notNull()
1249 | 			.references(() => clinic.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
1250 | 		height: real("height").notNull(),
1251 | 		weight: real("weight").notNull(),
1252 | 		bmi: real("bmi").notNull(),
1253 | 		bodyFatPercentage: real("body_fat_percentage").notNull(),
1254 | 		nutritionalStatus: text("nutritional_status").notNull(),
1255 | 		dietaryRestrictions: text("dietary_restrictions"),
1256 | 		recommendations: text("recommendations"),
1257 | 		notes: text("notes"),
1258 | 		followUpDate: timestamp("follow_up_date", { mode: "date" }),
1259 | 		createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { mode: "date" }).defaultNow().notNull(),
1260 | 		updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", { mode: "date" })
1261 | 			.defaultNow()
1262 | 			.$onUpdate(() => new Date())
1263 | 			.notNull()
1264 | 	},
1265 | 	table => [index("nutritional_assessment_patient_idx").on(table.patientId)]
1266 | );
1267 | 
1268 | export const nutritionalRecommendation = pgTable("nutritional_recommendation", {
1269 | 	id: text("id").primaryKey(),
1270 | 	assessmentId: text("assessment_id")
1271 | 		.notNull()
1272 | 		.references(() => nutritionalAssessment.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
1273 | 	patientId: text("patient_id")
1274 | 		.notNull()
1275 | 		.references(() => patient.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
1276 | 	clinicId: text("clinic_id")
1277 | 		.notNull()
1278 | 		.references(() => clinic.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
1279 | 	title: text("title").notNull(),
1280 | 	description: text("description").notNull(),
1281 | 	recommendationType: text("recommendation_type").notNull(), // e.g., "DIET", "SUPPLEMENT", "LIFESTYLE"
1282 | 	priority: text("priority").default("medium"),
1283 | 	dueDate: timestamp("due_date", { mode: "date" }),
1284 | 	isCompleted: boolean("is_completed").default(false),
1285 | 	createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { mode: "date" }).defaultNow().notNull(),
1286 | 	updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", { mode: "date" })
1287 | 		.defaultNow()
1288 | 		.$onUpdate(() => new Date())
1289 | });

```

`db/schema/index.ts`:

```ts
   1 | export * from "./auth";
   2 | export * from "./clinic";
   3 | export * from "./shop";
   4 | export * from "./types";

```

`db/schema/relations.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { defineRelations } from "drizzle-orm";
   2 | 
   3 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   4 | 
   5 | export const relations = defineRelations(schema, r => ({
   6 | 	user: {
   7 | 		sessions: r.many.session(),
   8 | 		accounts: r.many.account(),
   9 | 		clinic: r.one.clinic({
  10 | 			from: r.user.clinicId,
  11 | 			to: r.clinic.id
  12 | 		}),
  13 | 		files: r.many.file({
  14 | 			from: r.user.id,
  15 | 			to: r.file.userId
  16 | 		}),
  17 | 		folders: r.many.folder({
  18 | 			from: r.user.id,
  19 | 			to: r.folder.userId
  20 | 		}),
  21 | 		twoFactors: r.many.twoFactor({
  22 | 			from: r.user.id,
  23 | 			to: r.twoFactor.userId
  24 | 		}),
  25 | 		quota: r.one.userQuota({
  26 | 			from: r.user.id,
  27 | 			to: r.userQuota.userId
  28 | 		}),
  29 | 		clinics: r.many.clinicMember({
  30 | 			from: r.user.id,
  31 | 			to: r.clinicMember.userId
  32 | 		}),
  33 | 		doctors: r.many.doctor({
  34 | 			from: r.user.id,
  35 | 			to: r.doctor.userId
  36 | 		}),
  37 | 		staffs: r.many.staff({
  38 | 			from: r.user.id,
  39 | 			to: r.staff.userId
  40 | 		}),
  41 | 		patients: r.many.patient({
  42 | 			from: r.user.id,
  43 | 			to: r.patient.userId,
  44 | 			alias: "PatientUser"
  45 | 		}),
  46 | 		createdPatients: r.many.patient({
  47 | 			from: r.user.id,
  48 | 			to: r.patient.createdById,
  49 | 			alias: "PatientCreatedBy"
  50 | 		}),
  51 | 		guardians: r.many.guardian({
  52 | 			from: r.user.id,
  53 | 			to: r.guardian.userId
  54 | 		}),

  59 | 		}),

  62 | 			to: r.notification.userId
  63 | 		}),

  72 | 			alias: "usedBy"
  73 | 		}),

  75 | 			from: r.user.id,

  93 | 			alias: "PatientUser"
  94 | 		}),
  95 | 		patientsCreated: r.many.patient({
  96 | 			from: r.user.id,
  97 | 			to: r.patient.createdById,
  98 | 			alias: "PatientCreatedBy"
  99 | 		}),
 100 | 		guardianRelations: r.many.guardian({

 103 | 		})

 105 |
```
