 374 | 	id: z.string().min(1, "File ID is required")

 770 | 
 771 | export type AdherenceItem = DbPrescribedItem & {
 772 | 	prescription?: DbPrescription | null;
 773 | 	dispenses?: {
 774 | 		quantityDispensed: number;
 775 | 	}[];
 776 | 	dosageValue: number | null;
 777 | 	frequency: string;
 778 | };
 779 | 
 780 | // Helper functions
 781 | export function calculateAdherenceMetrics(prescribedItems: AdherenceItem[]) {
 782 | 	let totalAdherence = 0;
 783 | 	let count = 0;
 784 | 
 785 | 	for (const item of prescribedItems) {
 786 | 		const expectedDoses = calculateExpectedDoses(
 787 | 			item,
 788 | 			item.prescription?.issuedDate ?? new Date(),
 789 | 			item.prescription?.validUntil ?? new Date()
 790 | 		);
 791 | 		const dispensedDoses =
 792 | 			item.dispenses?.reduce(
 793 | 				(sum: number, dispense: { quantityDispensed: number }) =>
 794 | 					sum + dispense.quantityDispensed / (item.dosageValue || 1),
 795 | 				0
 796 | 			) ?? 0;
 797 | 
 798 | 		const adherence = expectedDoses > 0 ? (dispensedDoses / expectedDoses) * 100 : 0;
 799 | 		totalAdherence += adherence;
 800 | 		count++;
 801 | 	}
 802 | 
 803 | 	return {
 804 | 		overallAdherence: count > 0 ? totalAdherence / count : 0,
 805 | 		status: getAdherenceStatus(totalAdherence / count)
 806 | 	};
 807 | }
 808 | 
 809 | function getAdherenceStatus(percentage: number): "GOOD" | "FAIR" | "POOR" {
 810 | 	if (percentage >= 80) return "GOOD";
 811 | 	if (percentage >= 50) return "FAIR";
 812 | 	return "POOR";
 813 | }
 814 | 
 815 | export function calculateExpectedDoses(item: AdherenceItem, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
 816 | 	const days = Math.ceil((endDate.getTime() - startDate.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 817 | 	const frequencyPerDay = parseFrequency(item.frequency);
 818 | 	return days * frequencyPerDay * (item.dosageValue || 1);
 819 | }
 820 | export type PrescriptionWithItems = DbPrescription & {
 821 | 	prescribedItems: (DbPrescribedItem & {
 822 | 		drug?: DbDrug | null;
 823 | 	})[];
 824 | };
 825 | 
 826 | function parseFrequency(frequency: string): number {
 827 | 	const f = frequency.toUpperCase();
 828 | 	if (f.includes("QD") || f.includes("ONCE")) return 1;
 829 | 	if (f.includes("BID") || f.includes("TWICE")) return 2;
 830 | 	if (f.includes("TID") || f.includes("THREE")) return 3;
 831 | 	if (f.includes("QID") || f.includes("FOUR")) return 4;
 832 | 	if (f.includes("QHS")) return 1;
 833 | 	return 1;
 834 | }
 835 |

 840 | 	growthRecord: GrowthRecordCreateSchema.array()
 841 | });

 862 | }

 864 | // Schema for admin dashboard stats response
 865 | export const AdminDashboardStatsSchema = z.object({
 866 | 	availableDoctors: z.array(
 867 | 		z.object({
 868 | 			id: z.string(),
 869 | 			name: z.string(),
 870 | 			specialty: z.string().nullable(),
 871 | 			available: z.boolean(),
 872 | 			nextAvailableTime: z.string().nullable()
 873 | 		})
 874 | 	),
 875 | 	last5Records: z.array(
 876 | 		z.object({
 877 | 			id: z.string(),
 878 | 			patientName: z.string(),
 879 | 			doctorName: z.string(),
 880 | 			appointmentDate: z.date(),
 881 | 			status: z.enum(["SCHEDULED", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED", "PENDING", "NO_SHOW", "CONFIRMED"]),
 882 | 			type: z.string().nullable()
 883 | 		})
 884 | 	),
 885 | 	appointmentCounts: z.object({
 886 | 		SCHEDULED: z.number(),
 887 | 		COMPLETED: z.number(),
 888 | 		CANCELLED: z.number(),
 889 | 		PENDING: z.number(),
 890 | 		CONFIRMED: z.number(),
 891 | 		NO_SHOW: z.number()
 892 | 	}),
 893 | 	monthlyData: z.array(
 894 | 		z.object({
 895 | 			month: z.string(),
 896 | 			appointments: z.number()
 897 | 		})
 898 | 	),
 899 | 	totalDoctors: z.number(),
 900 | 	totalPatient: z.number(),
 901 | 	totalAppointments: z.number()
 902 | });
 903 | 
 904 | export const UserAuthSchema = UserSchema.omit({ role: true }).extend({
 905 | 	role: z.enum(["admin", "doctor", "patient", "staff"]),
 906 | 	password: z.string().min(6)
 907 | });
 908 | 
 909 | export const GetAppointmentsInRangeSchema = z.object({
 910 | 	startDate: z.date(),
 911 | 	endDate: z.date(),
 912 | 	doctorId: z.string().optional()
 913 | });

`db/zod/filter.schema.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { z } from "zod";
   2 | 
   3 | export const filterOperators = [
   4 | 	"eq",
   5 | 	"ne",
   6 | 	"lt",
   7 | 	"lte",
   8 | 	"gt",
   9 | 	"gte",
  10 | 	"ilike",
  11 | 	"notIlike",
  12 | 	"isEmpty",
  13 | 	"isNotEmpty",
  14 | 	"inArray",
  15 | 	"notInArray",
  16 | 	"between"
  17 | ] as const;
  18 | 
  19 | export const filterVariants = ["text", "number", "date", "select", "multiSelect", "boolean"] as const;
  20 | 
  21 | export const filterSchema = z.object({
  22 | 	id: z.string(),
  23 | 	value: z.union([z.string(), z.array(z.string())]),
  24 | 	variant: z.enum(filterVariants),
  25 | 	operator: z.enum(filterOperators),
  26 | 	filterId: z.string()
  27 | });
  28 | 
  29 | export type FilterSchema = z.infer<typeof filterSchema>;

```

`db/zod/index.ts`:

```ts
   1 | export * from "./auth.schema";
   2 | export * from "./clinic.schema";
   3 | export * from "./filter.schema";
   4 | export * from "./pagination.schema";

```

`db/zod/pagination.schema.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import z from "zod";
   2 | 
   3 | import { filterSchema } from "./filter.schema";
   4 | 
   5 | /**
   6 |  * Creates a reusable pagination schema with shared filtering, sorting, and soft-delete fields.
   7 |  * Pass in your resource-specific sortable fields enum to generate a fully typed schema.
   8 |  *
   9 |  * @example
  10 |  * ```ts
  11 |  * const SORTABLE_CLUSTER_FIELDS = ["name", "createdAt", "updatedAt"] as const;
  12 |  *
  13 |  * const getAllClustersSchema = createPaginationSchema(SORTABLE_CLUSTER_FIELDS).extend({
  14 |  *   name: z.string().default(""),
  15 |  * });
  16 |  * ```
  17 |  */
  18 | export function createPaginationSchema<T extends readonly [string, ...Array<string>]>(
  19 | 	sortableFields: T,
  20 | 	defaultSort: { id: T[number]; desc: boolean } = {
  21 | 		id: sortableFields[0],
  22 | 		desc: false
  23 | 	}
  24 | ) {
  25 | 	return z.object({
  26 | 		page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
  27 | 		perPage: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(10),
  28 | 		sort: z
  29 | 			.array(
  30 | 				z.object({
  31 | 					id: z.enum(sortableFields),
  32 | 					desc: z.boolean()
  33 | 				})
  34 | 			)
  35 | 			.default([defaultSort]),
  36 | 		createdAt: z.array(z.coerce.number()).default([]),
  37 | 		filters: z.array(filterSchema).default([]),
  38 | 		joinOperator: z.enum(["and", "or"]).default("and")
  39 | 	});
  40 | }
  41 | 
  42 | /**
  43 |  * Creates a reusable cursor-based pagination schema for infinite scrolling.
  44 |  * Pass in your resource-specific sortable fields enum to generate a fully typed schema.
  45 |  *
  46 |  * @example
  47 |  * ```ts
  48 |  * const SORTABLE_CLUSTER_FIELDS = ["name", "createdAt", "updatedAt"] as const;
  49 |  *
  50 |  * const getClustersInfiniteSchema = createCursorPaginationSchema(SORTABLE_CLUSTER_FIELDS).extend({
  51 |  *   name: z.string().default(""),
  52 |  * });
  53 |  * ```
  54 |  */
  55 | export function createCursorPaginationSchema<T extends readonly [string, ...Array<string>]>(
  56 | 	sortableFields: T,
  57 | 	defaultSort: { id: T[number]; desc: boolean } = {
  58 | 		id: sortableFields[0],
  59 | 		desc: false
  60 | 	}
  61 | ) {
  62 | 	return z.object({
  63 | 		cursor: z.string().optional(), // The cursor for the next page (usually an encoded ID or timestamp)
  64 | 		limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(20),
  65 | 		sort: z
  66 | 			.object({
  67 | 				id: z.enum(sortableFields),
  68 | 				desc: z.boolean()
  69 | 			})
  70 | 			.default(defaultSort),
  71 | 		createdAt: z.array(z.coerce.number()).default([]),
  72 | 		filters: z.array(filterSchema).default([]),
  73 | 		joinOperator: z.enum(["and", "or"]).default("and")
  74 | 	});
  75 | }

```

`hooks/index.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // hooks/index.ts
   2 | // Generated hooks for all clinic management models
   3 | 
   4 | import {
   5 | 	type UseMutationOptions as UseMutationOptionsOriginal,
   6 | 	type UseQueryOptions,
   7 | 	useMutation,
   8 | 	useQuery,
   9 | 	useQueryClient
  10 | } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  11 | 
  12 | type UseMutationOptions<
  13 | 	TData = unknown,
  14 | 	TError = Error,
  15 | 	TVariables = unknown,
  16 | 	TContext = unknown
  17 | > = UseMutationOptionsOriginal<TData, TError, TVariables, TContext>;
  18 | 
  19 | // ============================================================================
  20 | // Auth Hooks
  21 | // ============================================================================
  22 | 
  23 | import { ensureSession, getSession } from "@/lib/auth.functions";
  24 | 
  25 | export const authKeys = {
  26 | 	all: ["auth"] as const,
  27 | 	session: () => [...authKeys.all, "session"] as const
  28 | };
  29 | 
  30 | export function useSession(options?: UseQueryOptions) {
  31 | 	return useQuery({
  32 | 		queryKey: authKeys.session(),
  33 | 		queryFn: () => getSession(),
  34 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  35 | 		...options
  36 | 	});
  37 | }
  38 | 
  39 | export function useEnsureSession(options?: UseQueryOptions) {
  40 | 	return useQuery({
  41 | 		queryKey: [...authKeys.session(), "ensure"],
  42 | 		queryFn: () => ensureSession(),
  43 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2,
  44 | 		...options
  45 | 	});
  46 | }
  47 | 
  48 | // ============================================================================
  49 | // Appointment Hooks
  50 | // ============================================================================
  51 | 
  52 | import {
  53 | 	cancelAppointment,
  54 | 	createAppointment,
  55 | 	getAllAppointments,
  56 | 	getAppointmentById,
  57 | 	getAppointmentsCount,
  58 | 	getAvailableTimeSlots,
  59 | 	getMyAppointments,
  60 | 	updateAppointmentStatus
  61 | } from "@/data/appointments";
  62 | 
  63 | export const appointmentKeys = {
  64 | 	all: ["appointments"] as const,
  65 | 	lists: () => [...appointmentKeys.all, "list"] as const,
  66 | 	list: (filters: Record<string, unknown>) => [...appointmentKeys.lists(), filters] as const,
  67 | 	details: () => [...appointmentKeys.all, "detail"] as const,
  68 | 	detail: (id: string) => [...appointmentKeys.details(), id] as const,
  69 | 	my: () => [...appointmentKeys.all, "my"] as const,
  70 | 	count: () => [...appointmentKeys.all, "count"] as const,
  71 | 	timeSlots: (doctorId: string, date: Date) => [...appointmentKeys.all, "timeSlots", doctorId, date] as const
  72 | };
  73 | 
  74 | export function useAllAppointments(options?: UseQueryOptions) {
  75 | 	return useQuery({
  76 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.lists(),
  77 | 		queryFn: () => getAllAppointments(),
  78 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2,
  79 | 		...options
  80 | 	});
  81 | }
  82 | 
  83 | export function useMyAppointments(options?: UseQueryOptions) {
  84 | 	return useQuery({
  85 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.my(),
  86 | 		queryFn: () => getMyAppointments(),
  87 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2,
  88 | 		...options
  89 | 	});
  90 | }
  91 | 
  92 | export function useAppointmentById(id: string, options?: UseQueryOptions) {
  93 | 	return useQuery({
  94 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.detail(id),
  95 | 		queryFn: () => getAppointmentById({ data: id }),
  96 | 		enabled: !!id,
  97 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
  98 | 		...options
  99 | 	});
 100 | }
 101 | 
 102 | export function useAppointmentsCount(options?: UseQueryOptions) {
 103 | 	return useQuery({
 104 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.count(),
 105 | 		queryFn: () => getAppointmentsCount(),
 106 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60,
 107 | 		refetchInterval: 60000,
 108 | 		...options
 109 | 	});
 110 | }
 111 | 
 112 | export function useAvailableTimeSlots(doctorId: string, date: Date, options?: UseQueryOptions) {
 113 | 	return useQuery({
 114 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.timeSlots(doctorId, date),
 115 | 		queryFn: () => getAvailableTimeSlots({ data: { doctorId, date } }),
 116 | 		enabled: !!doctorId && !!date,
 117 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 30,
 118 | 		...options
 119 | 	});
 120 | }
 121 | 
 122 | export function useCreateAppointment(options?: UseMutationOptions) {
 123 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 124 | 	return useMutation({
 125 | 		mutationFn: (data: Parameters<typeof createAppointment>[0]) => createAppointment(data),
 126 | 		onSuccess: () => {
 127 | 			queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: appointmentKeys.my() });
 128 | 			queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: appointmentKeys.count() });
 129 | 			queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: appointmentKeys.lists() });
 130 | 		},
 131 | 		...options
 132 | 	});
 133 | }
 134 | 
 135 | export function useUpdateAppointmentStatus(options?: UseMutationOptions) {
 136 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 137 | 	return useMutation({
 138 | 		mutationFn: (data: Parameters<typeof updateAppointmentStatus>[0]) => updateAppointmentStatus(data),
 139 | 		onSuccess: () => {
 140 | 			queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: appointmentKeys.all });
 141 | 		},
 142 | 		...options
 143 | 	});
 144 | }
 145 | 
 146 | export function useCancelAppointment(options?: UseMutationOptions) {
 147 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 148 | 	return useMutation({
 149 | 		mutationFn: (data: Parameters<typeof cancelAppointment>[0]) => cancelAppointment(data),
 150 | 		onSuccess: () => {
 151 | 			queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: appointmentKeys.all });
 152 | 		},
 153 | 		...options
 154 | 	});
 155 | }

 219 | 		mutationFn: (data: Parameters<typeof createPatient>[0]) => createPatient(data),
 220 | 		onSuccess: () => {
 221 | 			queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: patientKeys.all });
 222 | 		},
 223 | 		...options
 224 | 	});
 225 | }

 227 | export function useUpdatePatient(options?: UseMutationOptions) {
 228 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 229 | 	return useMutation({
 230 | 		mutationFn: (data: Parameters<typeof updatePatient>[0]) => updatePatient(data),
 231 | 		onSuccess: (_, variables) => {
 232 | 			queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: patientKeys.detail(variables.data.id) });
 233 | 			queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: patientKeys.lists() });
 234 | 		},
 235 | 		...options
 236 | 	});
 237 | }

 242 | 		mutationFn: (data: Parameters<typeof deletePatient>[0]) => deletePatient(data),
 243 | 		onSuccess: () => {
 244 | 			queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: patientKeys.all });
 245 | 		},
 246 | 		...options
 247 | 	});
 248 | }

`hooks/use-callback-ref.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import * as React from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | /**
   4 |  * @see https://github.com/radix-ui/primitives/blob/main/packages/react/use-callback-ref/src/useCallbackRef.tsx
   5 |  */
   6 | 
   7 | /**
   8 |  * A custom hook that converts a callback to a ref to avoid triggering re-renders when passed as a
   9 |  * prop or avoid re-executing effects when passed as a dependency
  10 |  */
  11 | function useCallbackRef<T extends (...args: never[]) => unknown>(callback: T | undefined): T {
  12 | 	const callbackRef = React.useRef(callback);
  13 | 
  14 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
  15 | 		callbackRef.current = callback;
  16 | 	});
  17 | 
  18 | 	// https://github.com/facebook/react/issues/19240
  19 | 	return React.useMemo(() => ((...args) => callbackRef.current?.(...args)) as T, []);
  20 | }
  21 | 
  22 | export { useCallbackRef };

```

`hooks/use-controllable-state.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import * as React from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | import { useCallbackRef } from "@/hooks/use-callback-ref";
   4 | 
   5 | /**
   6 |  * @see https://github.com/radix-ui/primitives/blob/main/packages/react/use-controllable-state/src/useControllableState.tsx
   7 |  */
   8 | 
   9 | type UseControllableStateParams<T> = {
  10 | 	prop?: T | undefined;
  11 | 	defaultProp?: T | undefined;
  12 | 	onChange?: (state: T) => void;
  13 | };
  14 | 
  15 | type SetStateFn<T> = (prevState?: T) => T;
  16 | 
  17 | function useControllableState<T>({ prop, defaultProp, onChange = () => {} }: UseControllableStateParams<T>) {
  18 | 	const [uncontrolledProp, setUncontrolledProp] = useUncontrolledState({
  19 | 		defaultProp,
  20 | 		onChange
  21 | 	});
  22 | 	const isControlled = prop !== undefined;
  23 | 	const value = isControlled ? prop : uncontrolledProp;
  24 | 	const handleChange = useCallbackRef(onChange);
  25 | 
  26 | 	const setValue: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<T | undefined>> = React.useCallback(
  27 | 		nextValue => {
  28 | 			if (isControlled) {
  29 | 				const setter = nextValue as SetStateFn<T>;
  30 | 				const value = typeof nextValue === "function" ? setter(prop) : nextValue;
  31 | 				if (value !== prop) handleChange(value as T);
  32 | 			} else {
  33 | 				setUncontrolledProp(nextValue);
  34 | 			}
  35 | 		},
  36 | 		[isControlled, prop, setUncontrolledProp, handleChange]
  37 | 	);
  38 | 
  39 | 	return [value, setValue] as const;
  40 | }
  41 | 
  42 | function useUncontrolledState<T>({ defaultProp, onChange }: Omit<UseControllableStateParams<T>, "prop">) {
  43 | 	const uncontrolledState = React.useState<T | undefined>(defaultProp);
  44 | 	const [value] = uncontrolledState;
  45 | 	const prevValueRef = React.useRef(value);
  46 | 	const handleChange = useCallbackRef(onChange);
  47 | 
  48 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
  49 | 		if (prevValueRef.current !== value) {
  50 | 			handleChange(value as T);
  51 | 			prevValueRef.current = value;
  52 | 		}
  53 | 	}, [value, handleChange]);
  54 | 
  55 | 	return uncontrolledState;
  56 | }
  57 | 
  58 | export { useControllableState };

```

`hooks/use-data-table.ts`:

```ts
   1 | /** biome-ignore-all lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny: <ok> */
   2 | import { useNavigate, useSearch } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import {
   4 | 	type ColumnFiltersState,
   5 | 	type ColumnPinningState,
   6 | 	getCoreRowModel,
   7 | 	getFacetedMinMaxValues,
   8 | 	getFacetedRowModel,
   9 | 	getFacetedUniqueValues,
  10 | 	getFilteredRowModel,
  11 | 	getPaginationRowModel,
  12 | 	getSortedRowModel,
  13 | 	type PaginationState,
  14 | 	type RowSelectionState,
  15 | 	type SortingState,
  16 | 	type TableOptions,
  17 | 	type TableState,
  18 | 	type Updater,
  19 | 	useReactTable,
  20 | 	type VisibilityState
  21 | } from "@tanstack/react-table";
  22 | import * as React from "react";
  23 | 
  24 | import { useDebouncedCallback } from "@/hooks/use-debounced-callback";
  25 | import { parseSortingState, serializeSortingState } from "@/lib/parsers";
  26 | import type { ExtendedColumnSort } from "@/types/data-table";
  27 | 
  28 | const ARRAY_SEPARATOR = ",";
  29 | const DEBOUNCE_MS = 300;
  30 | 
  31 | interface UseDataTableProps<TData>
  32 | 	extends Omit<
  33 | 			TableOptions<TData>,
  34 | 			"state" | "pageCount" | "getCoreRowModel" | "manualFiltering" | "manualPagination" | "manualSorting"
  35 | 		>,
  36 | 		Required<Pick<TableOptions<TData>, "pageCount">> {
  37 | 	initialState?: Omit<Partial<TableState>, "sorting"> & {
  38 | 		sorting?: ExtendedColumnSort<TData>[];
  39 | 	};
  40 | 	history?: "push" | "replace";
  41 | 	debounceMs?: number;
  42 | 	throttleMs?: number;
  43 | 	clearOnDefault?: boolean;
  44 | 	enableAdvancedFilter?: boolean;
  45 | 	scroll?: boolean;
  46 | 	shallow?: boolean;
  47 | 	startTransition?: React.TransitionStartFunction;
  48 | }
  49 | 
  50 | type SearchParams = Record<string, string | number | undefined>;
  51 | 
  52 | export function useDataTable<TData>(props: UseDataTableProps<TData>) {
  53 | 	const {
  54 | 		columns,
  55 | 		pageCount = -1,
  56 | 		initialState,
  57 | 		history = "replace",
  58 | 		debounceMs = DEBOUNCE_MS,
  59 | 		enableAdvancedFilter = false,
  60 | 		shallow = true,
  61 | 		...tableProps
  62 | 	} = props;
  63 | 
  64 | 	const search = useSearch({ strict: false }) as SearchParams;
  65 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  66 | 
  67 | 	const [rowSelection, setRowSelection] = React.useState<RowSelectionState>(initialState?.rowSelection ?? {});
  68 | 	const [columnVisibility, setColumnVisibility] = React.useState<VisibilityState>(
  69 | 		initialState?.columnVisibility ?? {}
  70 | 	);
  71 | 	const [columnPinning, setColumnPinning] = React.useState<ColumnPinningState>(initialState?.columnPinning ?? {});
  72 | 
  73 | 	// Read pagination from search params
  74 | 	const page = Number(search.page) || 1;
  75 | 	const perPage = Number(search.perPage) || (initialState?.pagination?.pageSize ?? 10);
  76 | 
  77 | 	const pagination: PaginationState = React.useMemo(
  78 | 		() => ({
  79 | 			pageIndex: page - 1,
  80 | 			pageSize: perPage
  81 | 		}),
  82 | 		[page, perPage]
  83 | 	);
  84 | 
  85 | 	const onPaginationChange = React.useCallback(
  86 | 		(updaterOrValue: Updater<PaginationState>) => {
  87 | 			const newPagination = typeof updaterOrValue === "function" ? updaterOrValue(pagination) : updaterOrValue;
  88 | 			navigate({
  89 | 				search: ((prev: SearchParams) => ({
  90 | 					...prev,
  91 | 					page: newPagination.pageIndex + 1,
  92 | 					perPage: newPagination.pageSize
  93 | 				})) as any,
  94 | 				replace: history === "replace"
  95 | 			});
  96 | 		},
  97 | 		[pagination, navigate, history]
  98 | 	);
  99 | 
 100 | 	// Read sorting from search params
 101 | 	const columnIds = React.useMemo(() => {
 102 | 		return new Set(columns.map(column => column.id).filter(Boolean) as string[]);
 103 | 	}, [columns]);
 104 | 
 105 | 	const sorting = React.useMemo(
 106 | 		() => parseSortingState<TData>(search.sort as string | undefined, columnIds) ?? initialState?.sorting ?? [],
 107 | 		[search.sort, columnIds, initialState?.sorting]
 108 | 	);
 109 | 
 110 | 	const onSortingChange = React.useCallback(
 111 | 		(updaterOrValue: Updater<SortingState>) => {
 112 | 			const newSorting = typeof updaterOrValue === "function" ? updaterOrValue(sorting) : updaterOrValue;
 113 | 			navigate({
 114 | 				search: ((prev: SearchParams) => ({
 115 | 					...prev,
 116 | 					sort:
 117 | 						newSorting.length > 0
 118 | 							? serializeSortingState(newSorting as ExtendedColumnSort<TData>[])
 119 | 							: undefined
 120 | 				})) as any,
 121 | 				replace: history === "replace"
 122 | 			});
 123 | 		},
 124 | 		[sorting, navigate, history]
 125 | 	);
 126 | 
 127 | 	// Filter handling
 128 | 	const filterableColumns = React.useMemo(() => {
 129 | 		if (enableAdvancedFilter) return [];
 130 | 		return columns.filter(column => column.enableColumnFilter);
 131 | 	}, [columns, enableAdvancedFilter]);
 132 | 
 133 | 	// Read filter values from search params
 134 | 	const filterValues = React.useMemo(() => {
 135 | 		if (enableAdvancedFilter) return {};
 136 | 		const values: Record<string, string | string[] | null> = {};
 137 | 		for (const column of filterableColumns) {
 138 | 			const key = column.id ?? "";
 139 | 			const val = search[key];
 140 | 			if (val !== undefined && val !== null) {
 141 | 				if (column.meta?.options) {
 142 | 					// Array filter - stored as comma-separated string
 143 | 					values[key] = typeof val === "string" ? val.split(ARRAY_SEPARATOR) : null;
 144 | 				} else {
 145 | 					values[key] = typeof val === "string" ? val : null;
 146 | 				}
 147 | 			} else {
 148 | 				values[key] = null;
 149 | 			}
 150 | 		}
 151 | 		return values;
 152 | 	}, [search, filterableColumns, enableAdvancedFilter]);
 153 | 
 154 | 	const debouncedSetFilterValues = useDebouncedCallback((values: Record<string, string | string[] | null>) => {
 155 | 		navigate({
 156 | 			search: ((prev: SearchParams) => {
 157 | 				const next: SearchParams = { ...prev, page: 1 };
 158 | 				for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(values)) {
 159 | 					if (value === null || value === undefined) {
 160 | 						delete next[key];
 161 | 					} else if (Array.isArray(value)) {
 162 | 						next[key] = value.join(ARRAY_SEPARATOR);
 163 | 					} else {
 164 | 						next[key] = value;
 165 | 					}
 166 | 				}
 167 | 				return next;
 168 | 			}) as any,
 169 | 			replace: history === "replace"
 170 | 		});
 171 | 	}, debounceMs);
 172 | 
 173 | 	const initialColumnFilters: ColumnFiltersState = React.useMemo(() => {
 174 | 		if (enableAdvancedFilter) return [];
 175 | 
 176 | 		return Object.entries(filterValues).reduce<ColumnFiltersState>((filters, [key, value]) => {
 177 | 			if (value !== null) {
 178 | 				const processedValue = Array.isArray(value)
 179 | 					? value
 180 | 					: typeof value === "string" && /[^a-zA-Z0-9]/.test(value)
 181 | 						? value.split(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]+/).filter(Boolean)
 182 | 						: [value];
 183 | 
 184 | 				filters.push({
 185 | 					id: key,
 186 | 					value: processedValue
 187 | 				});
 188 | 			}
 189 | 			return filters;
 190 | 		}, []);
 191 | 	}, [filterValues, enableAdvancedFilter]);
 192 | 
 193 | 	const [columnFilters, setColumnFilters] = React.useState<ColumnFiltersState>(initialColumnFilters);
 194 | 
 195 | 	const onColumnFiltersChange = React.useCallback(
 196 | 		(updaterOrValue: Updater<ColumnFiltersState>) => {
 197 | 			if (enableAdvancedFilter) return;
 198 | 
 199 | 			setColumnFilters(prev => {
 200 | 				const next = typeof updaterOrValue === "function" ? updaterOrValue(prev) : updaterOrValue;
 201 | 
 202 | 				const filterUpdates: Record<string, string | string[] | null> = {};
 203 | 				for (const filter of next) {
 204 | 					if (filterableColumns.find(column => column.id === filter.id)) {
 205 | 						filterUpdates[filter.id] = filter.value as string | string[];
 206 | 					}
 207 | 				}
 208 | 
 209 | 				for (const prevFilter of prev) {
 210 | 					if (!next.some(filter => filter.id === prevFilter.id)) {
 211 | 						filterUpdates[prevFilter.id] = null;
 212 | 					}
 213 | 				}
 214 | 
 215 | 				debouncedSetFilterValues(filterUpdates);
 216 | 				return next;
 217 | 			});
 218 | 		},
 219 | 		[debouncedSetFilterValues, filterableColumns, enableAdvancedFilter]
 220 | 	);
 221 | 
 222 | 	const table = useReactTable({
 223 | 		...tableProps,
 224 | 		columns,
 225 | 		initialState,
 226 | 		pageCount,
 227 | 		state: {
 228 | 			pagination,
 229 | 			sorting,
 230 | 			columnVisibility,
 231 | 			columnPinning,
 232 | 			rowSelection,
 233 | 			columnFilters
 234 | 		},
 235 | 		defaultColumn: {
 236 | 			...tableProps.defaultColumn,
 237 | 			enableColumnFilter: false
 238 | 		},
 239 | 		enableRowSelection: true,
 240 | 		onRowSelectionChange: setRowSelection,
 241 | 		onPaginationChange,
 242 | 		onSortingChange,
 243 | 		onColumnFiltersChange,
 244 | 		onColumnVisibilityChange: setColumnVisibility,
 245 | 		onColumnPinningChange: setColumnPinning,
 246 | 		getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
 247 | 		getFilteredRowModel: getFilteredRowModel(),
 248 | 		getPaginationRowModel: getPaginationRowModel(),
 249 | 		getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
 250 | 		getFacetedRowModel: getFacetedRowModel(),
 251 | 		getFacetedUniqueValues: getFacetedUniqueValues(),
 252 | 		getFacetedMinMaxValues: getFacetedMinMaxValues(),
 253 | 		manualPagination: true,
 254 | 		manualSorting: true,
 255 | 		manualFiltering: true
 256 | 	});
 257 | 
 258 | 	return { table, shallow, debounceMs, throttleMs: props.throttleMs };
 259 | }

```

`hooks/use-debounce.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | export function useDebounce<T>(value: T, delay: number): T {
   4 | 	const [debouncedValue, setDebouncedValue] = useState<T>(value);
   5 | 
   6 | 	useEffect(() => {
   7 | 		const handler = setTimeout(() => {
   8 | 			setDebouncedValue(value);
   9 | 		}, delay);
  10 | 
  11 | 		return () => {
  12 | 			clearTimeout(handler);
  13 | 		};
  14 | 	}, [value, delay]);
  15 | 
  16 | 	return debouncedValue;
  17 | }

```

`hooks/use-debounced-callback.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import * as React from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | import { useCallbackRef } from "@/hooks/use-callback-ref";
   4 | 
   5 | export function useDebouncedCallback<T extends (...args: never[]) => unknown>(callback: T, delay: number) {
   6 | 	const handleCallback = useCallbackRef(callback);
   7 | 	const debounceTimerRef = React.useRef(0);
   8 | 	React.useEffect(() => () => window.clearTimeout(debounceTimerRef.current), []);
   9 | 
  10 | 	const setValue = React.useCallback(
  11 | 		(...args: Parameters<T>) => {
  12 | 			window.clearTimeout(debounceTimerRef.current);
  13 | 			debounceTimerRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => handleCallback(...args), delay);
  14 | 		},
  15 | 		[handleCallback, delay]
  16 | 	);
  17 | 
  18 | 	return setValue;
  19 | }

```

`hooks/use-mobile.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import * as React from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | const MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 768;
   4 | 
   5 | export function useIsMobile() {
   6 | 	const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = React.useState<boolean | undefined>(undefined);
   7 | 
   8 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
   9 | 		const mql = window.matchMedia(`(max-width: ${MOBILE_BREAKPOINT - 1}px)`);
  10 | 		const onChange = () => {
  11 | 			setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT);
  12 | 		};
  13 | 		mql.addEventListener("change", onChange);
  14 | 		setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT);
  15 | 		return () => mql.removeEventListener("change", onChange);
  16 | 	}, []);
  17 | 
  18 | 	return !!isMobile;
  19 | }

```

`hooks/use-pagination.ts`:

```ts
   1 | type UsePaginationProps = {
   2 | 	currentPage: number;
   3 | 	totalPages: number;
   4 | 	paginationItemsToDisplay: number;
   5 | };
   6 | 
   7 | type UsePaginationReturn = {
   8 | 	pages: number[];
   9 | 	showLeftEllipsis: boolean;
  10 | 	showRightEllipsis: boolean;
  11 | };
  12 | 
  13 | export function usePagination({
  14 | 	currentPage,
  15 | 	totalPages,
  16 | 	paginationItemsToDisplay
  17 | }: UsePaginationProps): UsePaginationReturn {
  18 | 	function calculatePaginationRange(): number[] {
  19 | 		if (totalPages <= paginationItemsToDisplay) {
  20 | 			return Array.from({ length: totalPages }, (_, i) => i + 1);
  21 | 		}
  22 | 
  23 | 		const halfDisplay = Math.floor(paginationItemsToDisplay / 2);
  24 | 
  25 | 		const initialRange = {
  26 | 			start: currentPage - halfDisplay,
  27 | 			end: currentPage + halfDisplay
  28 | 		};
  29 | 
  30 | 		const adjustedRange = {
  31 | 			start: Math.max(1, initialRange.start),
  32 | 			end: Math.min(totalPages, initialRange.end)
  33 | 		};
  34 | 
  35 | 		if (adjustedRange.start === 1) {
  36 | 			adjustedRange.end = Math.min(paginationItemsToDisplay, totalPages);
  37 | 		}
  38 | 
  39 | 		if (adjustedRange.end === totalPages) {
  40 | 			adjustedRange.start = Math.max(1, totalPages - paginationItemsToDisplay + 1);
  41 | 		}
  42 | 
  43 | 		return Array.from({ length: adjustedRange.end - adjustedRange.start + 1 }, (_, i) => adjustedRange.start + i);
  44 | 	}
  45 | 
  46 | 	const pages = calculatePaginationRange();
  47 | 
  48 | 	// Determine ellipsis display based on the actual pages shown
  49 | 	const showLeftEllipsis = pages.length > 0 && pages[0] > 1 && pages[0] > 2;
  50 | 
  51 | 	const showRightEllipsis =
  52 | 		pages.length > 0 && pages[pages.length - 1] < totalPages && pages[pages.length - 1] < totalPages - 1;
  53 | 
  54 | 	return {
  55 | 		pages,
  56 | 		showLeftEllipsis,
  57 | 		showRightEllipsis
  58 | 	};
  59 | }

```

`hooks/useAppointmentFilters.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // hooks/useAppointmentFilters.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
   4 | import type { DataToolbarProps } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   5 | import type { getMyAppointments } from "@/data/appointments";
   6 | 
   7 | const SORT_OPTIONS = [
   8 | 	{ label: "Date (newest first)", value: "date-desc" },
   9 | 	{ label: "Date (oldest first)", value: "date-asc" },
  10 | 	{ label: "Patient A → Z", value: "patient-asc" },
  11 | 	{ label: "Patient Z → A", value: "patient-desc" },
  12 | 	{ label: "Doctor A → Z", value: "doctor-asc" },
  13 | 	{ label: "Doctor Z → A", value: "doctor-desc" }
  14 | ];
  15 | 
  16 | const STATUS_OPTIONS = [
  17 | 	{ label: "Pending", value: "PENDING" },
  18 | 	{ label: "Confirmed", value: "CONFIRMED" },
  19 | 	{ label: "Completed", value: "COMPLETED" },
  20 | 	{ label: "Cancelled", value: "CANCELLED" },
  21 | 	{ label: "No Show", value: "NO_SHOW" }
  22 | ];
  23 | 
  24 | const TYPE_OPTIONS = [
  25 | 	{ label: "Consultation", value: "CONSULTATION" },
  26 | 	{ label: "Follow-up", value: "FOLLOW_UP" },
  27 | 	{ label: "Emergency", value: "EMERGENCY" },
  28 | 	{ label: "Well Child", value: "WELL_CHILD" },
  29 | 	{ label: "Sick Visit", value: "SICK_VISIT" },
  30 | 	{ label: "Vaccination", value: "VACCINATION" }
  31 | ];
  32 | 
  33 | type AppointmentListItem = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getMyAppointments>>[number];
  34 | 
  35 | type UseAppointmentFiltersReturn = {
  36 | 	filtered: AppointmentListItem[];
  37 | 	toolbar: DataToolbarProps;
  38 | };
  39 | 
  40 | export function useAppointmentFilters(appointments: AppointmentListItem[]): UseAppointmentFiltersReturn {
  41 | 	const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  42 | 	const [status, setStatus] = useState("");
  43 | 	const [type, setType] = useState("");
  44 | 	const [dateFrom, setDateFrom] = useState("");
  45 | 	const [dateTo, setDateTo] = useState("");
  46 | 	const [sort, setSort] = useState("date-desc");
  47 | 
  48 | 	const isDirty = !!(search || status || type || dateFrom || dateTo || sort !== "date-desc");
  49 | 
  50 | 	const filtered = useMemo(() => {
  51 | 		let result = [...appointments];
  52 | 
  53 | 		// Search filter
  54 | 		if (search) {
  55 | 			const q = search.toLowerCase();
  56 | 			result = result.filter(
  57 | 				apt =>
  58 | 					apt.patientFirstName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  59 | 					apt.patientLastName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  60 | 					apt.doctorName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  61 | 					apt.reason?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  62 | 			);
  63 | 		}
  64 | 
  65 | 		// Status filter
  66 | 		if (status) {
  67 | 			result = result.filter(apt => apt.status === status);
  68 | 		}
  69 | 
  70 | 		// Type filter
  71 | 		if (type) {
  72 | 			result = result.filter(apt => apt.type === type);
  73 | 		}
  74 | 
  75 | 		// Date range filter
  76 | 		if (dateFrom) {
  77 | 			result = result.filter(apt => {
  78 | 				const aptDate = new Date(apt.appointmentDate).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  79 | 				return aptDate >= dateFrom;
  80 | 			});
  81 | 		}
  82 | 
  83 | 		if (dateTo) {
  84 | 			result = result.filter(apt => {
  85 | 				const aptDate = new Date(apt.appointmentDate).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  86 | 				return aptDate <= dateTo;
  87 | 			});
  88 | 		}
  89 | 
  90 | 		// Sorting
  91 | 		if (sort === "date-desc") {
  92 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.appointmentDate).getTime() - new Date(a.appointmentDate).getTime());
  93 | 		}
  94 | 		if (sort === "date-asc") {
  95 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(a.appointmentDate).getTime() - new Date(b.appointmentDate).getTime());
  96 | 		}
  97 | 		if (sort === "patient-asc") {
  98 | 			result.sort((a, b) =>
  99 | 				`${a.patientFirstName} ${a.patientLastName}`.localeCompare(`${b.patientFirstName} ${b.patientLastName}`)
 100 | 			);
 101 | 		}
 102 | 		if (sort === "patient-desc") {
 103 | 			result.sort((a, b) =>
 104 | 				`${b.patientFirstName} ${b.patientLastName}`.localeCompare(`${a.patientFirstName} ${a.patientLastName}`)
 105 | 			);
 106 | 		}
 107 | 		if (sort === "doctor-asc") {
 108 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (a.doctorName || "").localeCompare(b.doctorName || ""));
 109 | 		}
 110 | 		if (sort === "doctor-desc") {
 111 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (b.doctorName || "").localeCompare(a.doctorName || ""));
 112 | 		}
 113 | 
 114 | 		return result;
 115 | 	}, [appointments, search, status, type, dateFrom, dateTo, sort]);
 116 | 
 117 | 	const toolbar: DataToolbarProps = {
 118 | 		searchValue: search,
 119 | 		onSearchChange: setSearch,
 120 | 		searchPlaceholder: "Search by patient or doctor...",
 121 | 		filters: [
 122 | 			{
 123 | 				label: "status",
 124 | 				value: status,
 125 | 				placeholder: "All statuses",
 126 | 				options: STATUS_OPTIONS,
 127 | 				onChange: setStatus,
 128 | 				width: "w-[130px]"
 129 | 			},
 130 | 			{
 131 | 				label: "type",
 132 | 				value: type,
 133 | 				placeholder: "All types",
 134 | 				options: TYPE_OPTIONS,
 135 | 				onChange: setType,
 136 | 				width: "w-[140px]"
 137 | 			}
 138 | 		],
 139 | 		sortOptions: SORT_OPTIONS,
 140 | 		sortValue: sort,
 141 | 		onSortChange: setSort,
 142 | 		dateRange: {
 143 | 			from: dateFrom,
 144 | 			to: dateTo,
 145 | 			onFromChange: setDateFrom,
 146 | 			onToChange: setDateTo
 147 | 		},
 148 | 		isDirty,
 149 | 		onReset: () => {
 150 | 			setSearch("");
 151 | 			setStatus("");
 152 | 			setType("");
 153 | 			setDateFrom("");
 154 | 			setDateTo("");
 155 | 			setSort("date-desc");
 156 | 		},
 157 | 		resultCount: { filtered: filtered.length, total: appointments.length }
 158 | 	};
 159 | 
 160 | 	return { filtered, toolbar };
 161 | }

```

`hooks/useDoctorFilters.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // hooks/useDoctorFilters.ts
   2 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
   3 | import type { DataToolbarProps } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   4 | import type { DbDoctor } from "@/db/schema/types";
   5 | 
   6 | const SORT_OPTIONS = [
   7 | 	{ label: "Name A → Z", value: "name-asc" },
   8 | 	{ label: "Name Z → A", value: "name-desc" },
   9 | 	{ label: "Rating (high to low)", value: "rating-desc" },
  10 | 	{ label: "Rating (low to high)", value: "rating-asc" },
  11 | 	{ label: "Newest first", value: "createdAt-desc" }
  12 | ];
  13 | 
  14 | const SPECIALTY_OPTIONS = [
  15 | 	{ label: "Pediatrics", value: "Pediatrics" },
  16 | 	{ label: "Cardiology", value: "Cardiology" },
  17 | 	{ label: "Neurology", value: "Neurology" },
  18 | 	{ label: "Dermatology", value: "Dermatology" },
  19 | 	{ label: "Orthopedics", value: "Orthopedics" },
  20 | 	{ label: "General Medicine", value: "General Medicine" }
  21 | ];
  22 | 
  23 | const AVAILABILITY_OPTIONS = [
  24 | 	{ label: "Available", value: "AVAILABLE" },
  25 | 	{ label: "Unavailable", value: "UNAVAILABLE" },
  26 | 	{ label: "On Leave", value: "ON_LEAVE" }
  27 | ];
  28 | 
  29 | const DOCTOR_TYPE_OPTIONS = [
  30 | 	{ label: "Full Time", value: "FULL" },
  31 | 	{ label: "Part Time", value: "PART_TIME" },
  32 | 	{ label: "Consultant", value: "CONSULTANT" },
  33 | 	{ label: "Visiting", value: "VISITING" }
  34 | ];
  35 | 
  36 | type UseDoctorFiltersReturn = {
  37 | 	filtered: DbDoctor[];
  38 | 	toolbar: DataToolbarProps;
  39 | };
  40 | 
  41 | export function useDoctorFilters(doctors: DbDoctor[]): UseDoctorFiltersReturn {
  42 | 	const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  43 | 	const [specialty, setSpecialty] = useState("");
  44 | 	const [availability, setAvailability] = useState("");
  45 | 	const [doctorType, setDoctorType] = useState("");
  46 | 	const [sort, setSort] = useState("name-asc");
  47 | 
  48 | 	const isDirty = !!(search || specialty || availability || doctorType || sort !== "name-asc");
  49 | 
  50 | 	const filtered = useMemo(() => {
  51 | 		let result = [...doctors];
  52 | 
  53 | 		// Search filter
  54 | 		if (search) {
  55 | 			const q = search.toLowerCase();
  56 | 			result = result.filter(
  57 | 				d =>
  58 | 					d.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  59 | 					d.specialty?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  60 | 					d.email?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  61 | 			);
  62 | 		}
  63 | 
  64 | 		// Specialty filter
  65 | 		if (specialty) {
  66 | 			result = result.filter(d => d.specialty === specialty);
  67 | 		}
  68 | 
  69 | 		// Availability filter
  70 | 		if (availability) {
  71 | 			result = result.filter(d => d.availabilityStatus === availability);
  72 | 		}
  73 | 
  74 | 		// Doctor type filter
  75 | 		if (doctorType) {
  76 | 			result = result.filter(d => d.type === doctorType);
  77 | 		}
  78 | 
  79 | 		// Sorting
  80 | 		if (sort === "name-asc") {
  81 | 			result.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
  82 | 		}
  83 | 		if (sort === "name-desc") {
  84 | 			result.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
  85 | 		}
  86 | 		if (sort === "rating-desc") {
  87 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (b.rating || 0) - (a.rating || 0));
  88 | 		}
  89 | 		if (sort === "rating-asc") {
  90 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (a.rating || 0) - (b.rating || 0));
  91 | 		}
  92 | 		if (sort === "createdAt-desc") {
  93 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(a.createdAt).getTime());
  94 | 		}
  95 | 
  96 | 		return result;
  97 | 	}, [doctors, search, specialty, availability, doctorType, sort]);
  98 | 
  99 | 	const toolbar: DataToolbarProps = {
 100 | 		searchValue: search,
 101 | 		onSearchChange: setSearch,
 102 | 		searchPlaceholder: "Search by name, specialty, or email...",
 103 | 		filters: [
 104 | 			{
 105 | 				label: "specialty",
 106 | 				value: specialty,
 107 | 				placeholder: "All specialties",
 108 | 				options: SPECIALTY_OPTIONS,
 109 | 				onChange: setSpecialty,
 110 | 				width: "w-[140px]"
 111 | 			},
 112 | 			{
 113 | 				label: "availability",
 114 | 				value: availability,
 115 | 				placeholder: "All availability",
 116 | 				options: AVAILABILITY_OPTIONS,
 117 | 				onChange: setAvailability,
 118 | 				width: "w-[130px]"
 119 | 			},
 120 | 			{
 121 | 				label: "type",
 122 | 				value: doctorType,
 123 | 				placeholder: "All types",
 124 | 				options: DOCTOR_TYPE_OPTIONS,
 125 | 				onChange: setDoctorType,
 126 | 				width: "w-[120px]"
 127 | 			}
 128 | 		],
 129 | 		sortOptions: SORT_OPTIONS,
 130 | 		sortValue: sort,
 131 | 		onSortChange: setSort,
 132 | 		isDirty,
 133 | 		onReset: () => {
 134 | 			setSearch("");
 135 | 			setSpecialty("");
 136 | 			setAvailability("");
 137 | 			setDoctorType("");
 138 | 			setSort("name-asc");
 139 | 		},
 140 | 		resultCount: { filtered: filtered.length, total: doctors.length }
 141 | 	};
 142 | 
 143 | 	return { filtered, toolbar };
 144 | }

```

`hooks/useEncounterFilters.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // hooks/useEncounterFilters.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
   4 | import type { DataToolbarProps } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   5 | import type { DbDiagnosis, DbDoctor, DbPatient } from "@/db/schema/types";
   6 | 
   7 | const SORT_OPTIONS = [
   8 | 	{ label: "Date (newest first)", value: "date-desc" },
   9 | 	{ label: "Date (oldest first)", value: "date-asc" },
  10 | 	{ label: "Patient A → Z", value: "patient-asc" },
  11 | 	{ label: "Patient Z → A", value: "patient-desc" },
  12 | 	{ label: "Doctor A → Z", value: "doctor-asc" },
  13 | 	{ label: "Doctor Z → A", value: "doctor-desc" }
  14 | ];
  15 | 
  16 | const STATUS_OPTIONS = [
  17 | 	{ label: "Active", value: "ACTIVE" },
  18 | 	{ label: "Completed", value: "COMPLETED" },
  19 | 	{ label: "On Hold", value: "ON_HOLD" },
  20 | 	{ label: "Cancelled", value: "CANCELLED" }
  21 | ];
  22 | 
  23 | const TYPE_OPTIONS = [
  24 | 	{ label: "Initial", value: "Initial" },
  25 | 	{ label: "Follow-up", value: "Follow-up" },
  26 | 	{ label: "Emergency", value: "Emergency" },
  27 | 	{ label: "Consultation", value: "Consultation" }
  28 | ];
  29 | type EncounterListItem = DbDiagnosis & {
  30 | 	patient?: DbPatient | null;
  31 | 	doctor?: DbDoctor | null;
  32 | };
  33 | 
  34 | type UseEncounterFiltersReturn = {
  35 | 	filtered: EncounterListItem[];
  36 | 	toolbar: DataToolbarProps;
  37 | };
  38 | 
  39 | export function useEncounterFilters(encounters: EncounterListItem[]): UseEncounterFiltersReturn {
  40 | 	const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  41 | 	const [status, setStatus] = useState("");
  42 | 	const [type, setType] = useState("");
  43 | 	const [dateFrom, setDateFrom] = useState("");
  44 | 	const [dateTo, setDateTo] = useState("");
  45 | 	const [sort, setSort] = useState("date-desc");
  46 | 
  47 | 	const isDirty = !!(search || status || type || dateFrom || dateTo || sort !== "date-desc");
  48 | 
  49 | 	const filtered = useMemo(() => {
  50 | 		let result = [...encounters];
  51 | 
  52 | 		// Search filter
  53 | 		if (search) {
  54 | 			const q = search.toLowerCase();
  55 | 			result = result.filter(
  56 | 				e =>
  57 | 					e.patient?.firstName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  58 | 					e.patient?.lastName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  59 | 					e.doctor?.name?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  60 | 					e.diagnosis?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  61 | 					e.symptoms?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  62 | 			);
  63 | 		}
  64 | 
  65 | 		// Status filter
  66 | 		if (status) {
  67 | 			result = result.filter(e => e.status === status);
  68 | 		}
  69 | 
  70 | 		// Type filter
  71 | 		if (type) {
  72 | 			result = result.filter(e => e.type === type);
  73 | 		}
  74 | 
  75 | 		// Date range filter
  76 | 		if (dateFrom) {
  77 | 			result = result.filter(e => {
  78 | 				const encDate = new Date(e.date).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  79 | 				return encDate >= dateFrom;
  80 | 			});
  81 | 		}
  82 | 
  83 | 		if (dateTo) {
  84 | 			result = result.filter(e => {
  85 | 				const encDate = new Date(e.date).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  86 | 				return encDate <= dateTo;
  87 | 			});
  88 | 		}
  89 | 
  90 | 		// Sorting
  91 | 		if (sort === "date-desc") {
  92 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());
  93 | 		}
  94 | 		if (sort === "date-asc") {
  95 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(a.date).getTime() - new Date(b.date).getTime());
  96 | 		}
  97 | 		if (sort === "patient-asc") {
  98 | 			result.sort((a, b) =>
  99 | 				`${a.patient?.firstName} ${a.patient?.lastName}`.localeCompare(
 100 | 					`${b.patient?.firstName} ${b.patient?.lastName}`
 101 | 				)
 102 | 			);
 103 | 		}
 104 | 		if (sort === "patient-desc") {
 105 | 			result.sort((a, b) =>
 106 | 				`${b.patient?.firstName} ${b.patient?.lastName}`.localeCompare(
 107 | 					`${a.patient?.firstName} ${a.patient?.lastName}`
 108 | 				)
 109 | 			);
 110 | 		}
 111 | 		if (sort === "doctor-asc") {
 112 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (a.doctor?.name || "").localeCompare(b.doctor?.name || ""));
 113 | 		}
 114 | 		if (sort === "doctor-desc") {
 115 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (b.doctor?.name || "").localeCompare(a.doctor?.name || ""));
 116 | 		}
 117 | 
 118 | 		return result;
 119 | 	}, [encounters, search, status, type, dateFrom, dateTo, sort]);
 120 | 
 121 | 	const toolbar: DataToolbarProps = {
 122 | 		searchValue: search,
 123 | 		onSearchChange: setSearch,
 124 | 		searchPlaceholder: "Search by patient, doctor, or diagnosis...",
 125 | 		filters: [
 126 | 			{
 127 | 				label: "status",
 128 | 				value: status,
 129 | 				placeholder: "All statuses",
 130 | 				options: STATUS_OPTIONS,
 131 | 				onChange: setStatus,
 132 | 				width: "w-[130px]"
 133 | 			},
 134 | 			{
 135 | 				label: "type",
 136 | 				value: type,
 137 | 				placeholder: "All types",
 138 | 				options: TYPE_OPTIONS,
 139 | 				onChange: setType,
 140 | 				width: "w-[130px]"
 141 | 			}
 142 | 		],
 143 | 		sortOptions: SORT_OPTIONS,
 144 | 		sortValue: sort,
 145 | 		onSortChange: setSort,
 146 | 		dateRange: {
 147 | 			from: dateFrom,
 148 | 			to: dateTo,
 149 | 			onFromChange: setDateFrom,
 150 | 			onToChange: setDateTo
 151 | 		},
 152 | 		isDirty,
 153 | 		onReset: () => {
 154 | 			setSearch("");
 155 | 			setStatus("");
 156 | 			setType("");
 157 | 			setDateFrom("");
 158 | 			setDateTo("");
 159 | 			setSort("date-desc");
 160 | 		},
 161 | 		resultCount: { filtered: filtered.length, total: encounters.length }
 162 | 	};
 163 | 
 164 | 	return { filtered, toolbar };
 165 | }

```

`hooks/useGrowthRecordFilters.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // hooks/useGrowthRecordFilters.ts
   2 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
   3 | import type { DataToolbarProps } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   4 | import type { DbGrowthRecord, DbPatient } from "@/db/schema/types";
   5 | 
   6 | export type GrowthRecordWithPatient = DbGrowthRecord & {
   7 | 	patient?: DbPatient | null;
   8 | };
   9 | 
  10 | const SORT_OPTIONS = [
  11 | 	{ label: "Date (newest first)", value: "date-desc" },
  12 | 	{ label: "Date (oldest first)", value: "date-asc" },
  13 | 	{ label: "Age (youngest first)", value: "age-asc" },
  14 | 	{ label: "Age (oldest first)", value: "age-desc" },
  15 | 	{ label: "Weight (highest first)", value: "weight-desc" },
  16 | 	{ label: "Weight (lowest first)", value: "weight-asc" }
  17 | ];
  18 | 
  19 | const MEASUREMENT_TYPE_OPTIONS = [
  20 | 	{ label: "Weight", value: "WEIGHT" },
  21 | 	{ label: "Height", value: "HEIGHT" },
  22 | 	{ label: "BMI", value: "BMI" },
  23 | 	{ label: "Head Circumference", value: "HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE" }
  24 | ];
  25 | 
  26 | type UseGrowthRecordFiltersReturn = {
  27 | 	filtered: GrowthRecordWithPatient[];
  28 | 	toolbar: DataToolbarProps;
  29 | };
  30 | 
  31 | export function useGrowthRecordFilters(records: GrowthRecordWithPatient[]): UseGrowthRecordFiltersReturn {
  32 | 	const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  33 | 	const [measurementType, setMeasurementType] = useState("");
  34 | 	const [dateFrom, setDateFrom] = useState("");
  35 | 	const [dateTo, setDateTo] = useState("");
  36 | 	const [sort, setSort] = useState("date-desc");
  37 | 
  38 | 	const isDirty = !!(search || measurementType || dateFrom || dateTo || sort !== "date-desc");
  39 | 
  40 | 	const filtered = useMemo(() => {
  41 | 		let result = [...records];
  42 | 
  43 | 		// Search filter (by patient name)
  44 | 		if (search) {
  45 | 			const q = search.toLowerCase();
  46 | 			result = result.filter(
  47 | 				r => r.patient?.firstName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) || r.patient?.lastName?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  48 | 			);
  49 | 		}
  50 | 
  51 | 		// Filter by which measurement has data
  52 | 		if (measurementType) {
  53 | 			result = result.filter(r => {
  54 | 				switch (measurementType) {
  55 | 					case "WEIGHT":
  56 | 						return r.weight !== null && r.weight !== undefined;
  57 | 					case "HEIGHT":
  58 | 						return r.height !== null && r.height !== undefined;
  59 | 					case "BMI":
  60 | 						return r.bmi !== null && r.bmi !== undefined;
  61 | 					case "HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE":
  62 | 						return r.headCircumference !== null && r.headCircumference !== undefined;
  63 | 					default:
  64 | 						return true;
  65 | 				}
  66 | 			});
  67 | 		}
  68 | 
  69 | 		// Date range filter
  70 | 		if (dateFrom) {
  71 | 			result = result.filter(r => {
  72 | 				const recordDate = new Date(r.date).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  73 | 				return recordDate >= dateFrom;
  74 | 			});
  75 | 		}
  76 | 
  77 | 		if (dateTo) {
  78 | 			result = result.filter(r => {
  79 | 				const recordDate = new Date(r.date).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  80 | 				return recordDate <= dateTo;
  81 | 			});
  82 | 		}
  83 | 
  84 | 		// Sorting
  85 | 		if (sort === "date-desc") {
  86 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());
  87 | 		}
  88 | 		if (sort === "date-asc") {
  89 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(a.date).getTime() - new Date(b.date).getTime());
  90 | 		}
  91 | 		if (sort === "age-asc") {
  92 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (a.ageDays || 0) - (b.ageDays || 0));
  93 | 		}
  94 | 		if (sort === "age-desc") {
  95 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (b.ageDays || 0) - (a.ageDays || 0));
  96 | 		}
  97 | 		if (sort === "weight-desc") {
  98 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (b.weight || 0) - (a.weight || 0));
  99 | 		}
 100 | 		if (sort === "weight-asc") {
 101 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (a.weight || 0) - (b.weight || 0));
 102 | 		}
 103 | 
 104 | 		return result;
 105 | 	}, [records, search, measurementType, dateFrom, dateTo, sort]);
 106 | 
 107 | 	const toolbar: DataToolbarProps = {
 108 | 		searchValue: search,
 109 | 		onSearchChange: setSearch,
 110 | 		searchPlaceholder: "Search by patient name...",
 111 | 		filters: [
 112 | 			{
 113 | 				label: "measurement",
 114 | 				value: measurementType,
 115 | 				placeholder: "All measurements",
 116 | 				options: MEASUREMENT_TYPE_OPTIONS,
 117 | 				onChange: setMeasurementType,
 118 | 				width: "w-[160px]"
 119 | 			}
 120 | 		],
 121 | 		sortOptions: SORT_OPTIONS,
 122 | 		sortValue: sort,
 123 | 		onSortChange: setSort,
 124 | 		dateRange: {
 125 | 			from: dateFrom,
 126 | 			to: dateTo,
 127 | 			onFromChange: setDateFrom,
 128 | 			onToChange: setDateTo
 129 | 		},
 130 | 		isDirty,
 131 | 		onReset: () => {
 132 | 			setSearch("");
 133 | 			setMeasurementType("");
 134 | 			setDateFrom("");
 135 | 			setDateTo("");
 136 | 			setSort("date-desc");
 137 | 		},
 138 | 		resultCount: { filtered: filtered.length, total: records.length }
 139 | 	};
 140 | 
 141 | 	return { filtered, toolbar };
 142 | }

```

`hooks/useOrderFilters.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
   2 | import type { DataToolbarProps } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   3 | import type { OrderData } from "@/data/orders";
   4 | 
   5 | const SORT_OPTIONS = [
   6 | 	{ label: "Customer A → Z", value: "name-asc" },
   7 | 	{ label: "Customer Z → A", value: "name-desc" },
   8 | 	{ label: "Total high → low", value: "total-desc" },
   9 | 	{ label: "Total low → high", value: "total-asc" }
  10 | ];
  11 | 
  12 | const STATUS_OPTIONS = [
  13 | 	{ label: "Paid", value: "paid" },
  14 | 	{ label: "Pending", value: "pending" },
  15 | 	{ label: "Failed", value: "failed" }
  16 | ];
  17 | 
  18 | type UseOrderFiltersReturn = {
  19 | 	filtered: OrderData[];
  20 | 	toolbar: DataToolbarProps;
  21 | };
  22 | 
  23 | export function useOrderFilters(orders: OrderData[]): UseOrderFiltersReturn {
  24 | 	const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  25 | 	const [status, setStatus] = useState("");
  26 | 	const [sort, setSort] = useState("");
  27 | 	const [dateFrom, setDateFrom] = useState("");
  28 | 	const [dateTo, setDateTo] = useState("");
  29 | 
  30 | 	const isDirty = !!(search || status || dateFrom || dateTo || sort);
  31 | 
  32 | 	const filtered = useMemo(() => {
  33 | 		let result = [...orders];
  34 | 
  35 | 		if (search) {
  36 | 			const q = search.toLowerCase();
  37 | 			result = result.filter(
  38 | 				o => o.user.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) || o.user.email.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  39 | 			);
  40 | 		}
  41 | 
  42 | 		if (status) {
  43 | 			result = result.filter(o => o.status === status);
  44 | 		}
  45 | 
  46 | 		if (dateFrom) {
  47 | 			result = result.filter(o => {
  48 | 				const d = new Date(o.createdAt);
  49 | 				const orderDate = `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0")}-${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, "0")}`;
  50 | 				return orderDate >= dateFrom;
  51 | 			});
  52 | 		}
  53 | 
  54 | 		if (dateTo) {
  55 | 			result = result.filter(o => {
  56 | 				const d = new Date(o.createdAt);
  57 | 				const orderDate = `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0")}-${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, "0")}`;
  58 | 				return orderDate <= dateTo;
  59 | 			});
  60 | 		}
  61 | 		if (sort === "name-asc") result.sort((a, b) => a.user.name.localeCompare(b.user.name));
  62 | 		if (sort === "name-desc") result.sort((a, b) => b.user.name.localeCompare(a.user.name));
  63 | 		if (sort === "total-desc") result.sort((a, b) => Number(b.total) - Number(a.total));
  64 | 		if (sort === "total-asc") result.sort((a, b) => Number(a.total) - Number(b.total));
  65 | 
  66 | 		return result;
  67 | 	}, [orders, search, status, dateFrom, dateTo, sort]);
  68 | 
  69 | 	const toolbar: DataToolbarProps = {
  70 | 		searchValue: search,
  71 | 		onSearchChange: setSearch,
  72 | 		searchPlaceholder: "Search by customer or email...",
  73 | 		filters: [
  74 | 			{
  75 | 				label: "statuses",
  76 | 				value: status,
  77 | 				placeholder: "All statuses",
  78 | 				options: STATUS_OPTIONS,
  79 | 				onChange: setStatus,
  80 | 				width: "w-[150px]"
  81 | 			}
  82 | 		],
  83 | 		sortOptions: SORT_OPTIONS,
  84 | 		sortValue: sort,
  85 | 		onSortChange: setSort,
  86 | 		isDirty,
  87 | 		onReset: () => {
  88 | 			setSearch("");
  89 | 			setStatus("");
  90 | 			setDateFrom("");
  91 | 			setDateTo("");
  92 | 			setSort("");
  93 | 		},
  94 | 		dateRange: {
  95 | 			from: dateFrom,
  96 | 			to: dateTo,
  97 | 			onFromChange: setDateFrom,
  98 | 			onToChange: setDateTo
  99 | 		},
 100 | 		resultCount: { filtered: filtered.length, total: orders.length }
 101 | 	};
 102 | 
 103 | 	return { filtered, toolbar };
 104 | }

`hooks/usePatientFilters.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // hooks/usePatientFilters.ts
   2 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
   3 | import type { DataToolbarProps } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   4 | import type { DbPatient } from "@/db/schema/types";
   5 | 
   6 | const SORT_OPTIONS = [
   7 | 	{ label: "Name A → Z", value: "name-asc" },
   8 | 	{ label: "Name Z → A", value: "name-desc" },
   9 | 	{ label: "Age (youngest first)", value: "age-asc" },
  10 | 	{ label: "Age (oldest first)", value: "age-desc" },
  11 | 	{ label: "Newest first", value: "createdAt-desc" },
  12 | 	{ label: "Oldest first", value: "createdAt-asc" }
  13 | ];
  14 | 
  15 | const STATUS_OPTIONS = [
  16 | 	{ label: "Active", value: "ACTIVE" },
  17 | 	{ label: "Inactive", value: "INACTIVE" },
  18 | 	{ label: "Pending", value: "PENDING" },
  19 | 	{ label: "Suspended", value: "SUSPENDED" }
  20 | ];
  21 | 
  22 | const GENDER_OPTIONS = [
  23 | 	{ label: "Male", value: "MALE" },
  24 | 	{ label: "Female", value: "FEMALE" },
  25 | 	{ label: "Other", value: "OTHER" }
  26 | ];
  27 | 
  28 | const BLOOD_GROUP_OPTIONS = [
  29 | 	{ label: "A+", value: "A_POSITIVE" },
  30 | 	{ label: "A-", value: "A_NEGATIVE" },
  31 | 	{ label: "B+", value: "B_POSITIVE" },
  32 | 	{ label: "B-", value: "B_NEGATIVE" },
  33 | 	{ label: "O+", value: "O_POSITIVE" },
  34 | 	{ label: "O-", value: "O_NEGATIVE" },
  35 | 	{ label: "AB+", value: "AB_POSITIVE" },
  36 | 	{ label: "AB-", value: "AB_NEGATIVE" }
  37 | ];
  38 | 
  39 | type UsePatientFiltersReturn = {
  40 | 	filtered: DbPatient[];
  41 | 	toolbar: DataToolbarProps;
  42 | };
  43 | 
  44 | export function usePatientFilters(patients: DbPatient[]): UsePatientFiltersReturn {
  45 | 	const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  46 | 	const [status, setStatus] = useState("");
  47 | 	const [gender, setGender] = useState("");
  48 | 	const [bloodGroup, setBloodGroup] = useState("");
  49 | 	const [sort, setSort] = useState("");
  50 | 
  51 | 	const isDirty = !!(search || status || gender || bloodGroup || sort);
  52 | 
  53 | 	const filtered = useMemo(() => {
  54 | 		let result = [...patients];
  55 | 
  56 | 		// Search filter
  57 | 		if (search) {
  58 | 			const q = search.toLowerCase();
  59 | 			result = result.filter(
  60 | 				p =>
  61 | 					p.firstName.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  62 | 					p.lastName.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  63 | 					p.mrn?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  64 | 					p.email?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  65 | 			);
  66 | 		}
  67 | 
  68 | 		// Status filter
  69 | 		if (status) {
  70 | 			result = result.filter(p => p.status === status);
  71 | 		}
  72 | 
  73 | 		// Gender filter
  74 | 		if (gender) {
  75 | 			result = result.filter(p => p.gender === gender);
  76 | 		}
  77 | 
  78 | 		// Blood group filter
  79 | 		if (bloodGroup) {
  80 | 			result = result.filter(p => p.bloodGroup === bloodGroup);
  81 | 		}
  82 | 
  83 | 		// Sorting
  84 | 		if (sort === "name-asc") {
  85 | 			result.sort((a, b) => `${a.firstName} ${a.lastName}`.localeCompare(`${b.firstName} ${b.lastName}`));
  86 | 		}
  87 | 		if (sort === "name-desc") {
  88 | 			result.sort((a, b) => `${b.firstName} ${b.lastName}`.localeCompare(`${a.firstName} ${a.lastName}`));
  89 | 		}
  90 | 		if (sort === "age-asc") {
  91 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.dateOfBirth).getTime() - new Date(a.dateOfBirth).getTime());
  92 | 		}
  93 | 		if (sort === "age-desc") {
  94 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(a.dateOfBirth).getTime() - new Date(b.dateOfBirth).getTime());
  95 | 		}
  96 | 		if (sort === "createdAt-desc") {
  97 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(a.createdAt).getTime());
  98 | 		}
  99 | 		if (sort === "createdAt-asc") {
 100 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(a.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(b.createdAt).getTime());
 101 | 		}
 102 | 
 103 | 		return result;
 104 | 	}, [patients, search, status, gender, bloodGroup, sort]);
 105 | 
 106 | 	const toolbar: DataToolbarProps = {
 107 | 		searchValue: search,
 108 | 		onSearchChange: setSearch,
 109 | 		searchPlaceholder: "Search by name, MRN, or email...",
 110 | 		filters: [
 111 | 			{
 112 | 				label: "status",
 113 | 				value: status,
 114 | 				placeholder: "All statuses",
 115 | 				options: STATUS_OPTIONS,
 116 | 				onChange: setStatus,
 117 | 				width: "w-[130px]"
 118 | 			},
 119 | 			{
 120 | 				label: "gender",
 121 | 				value: gender,
 122 | 				placeholder: "All genders",
 123 | 				options: GENDER_OPTIONS,
 124 | 				onChange: setGender,
 125 | 				width: "w-[120px]"
 126 | 			},
 127 | 			{
 128 | 				label: "blood group",
 129 | 				value: bloodGroup,
 130 | 				placeholder: "All blood types",
 131 | 				options: BLOOD_GROUP_OPTIONS,
 132 | 				onChange: setBloodGroup,
 133 | 				width: "w-[130px]"
 134 | 			}
 135 | 		],
 136 | 		sortOptions: SORT_OPTIONS,
 137 | 		sortValue: sort,
 138 | 		onSortChange: setSort,
 139 | 		isDirty,
 140 | 		onReset: () => {
 141 | 			setSearch("");
 142 | 			setStatus("");
 143 | 			setGender("");
 144 | 			setBloodGroup("");
 145 | 			setSort("");
 146 | 		},
 147 | 		resultCount: { filtered: filtered.length, total: patients.length }
 148 | 	};
 149 | 
 150 | 	return { filtered, toolbar };
 151 | }

`hooks/usePrescriptionFilters.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // hooks/usePrescriptionFilters.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
   4 | import type { DataToolbarProps } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   5 | import type { DbDiagnosis, DbDoctor, DbPatient, DbPrescription } from "@/db/schema/types";
   6 | 
   7 | export type PrescriptionWithRelation = DbPrescription & {
   8 | 	patient?: DbPatient | null;
   9 | 	doctor?: DbDoctor | null;
  10 | 	diagnosis?: DbDiagnosis | null;
  11 | };
  12 | 
  13 | const SORT_OPTIONS = [
  14 | 	{ label: "Date (newest first)", value: "date-desc" },
  15 | 	{ label: "Date (oldest first)", value: "date-asc" },
  16 | 	{ label: "Patient A → Z", value: "patient-asc" },
  17 | 	{ label: "Patient Z → A", value: "patient-desc" },
  18 | 	{ label: "Doctor A → Z", value: "doctor-asc" },
  19 | 	{ label: "Doctor Z → A", value: "doctor-desc" }
  20 | ];
  21 | 
  22 | const STATUS_OPTIONS = [
  23 | 	{ label: "Active", value: "active" },
  24 | 	{ label: "Completed", value: "completed" },
  25 | 	{ label: "Cancelled", value: "cancelled" },
  26 | 	{ label: "Expired", value: "expired" },
  27 | 	{ label: "On Hold", value: "on_hold" }
  28 | ];
  29 | 
  30 | type UsePrescriptionFiltersReturn = {
  31 | 	filtered: PrescriptionWithRelation[];
  32 | 	toolbar: DataToolbarProps;
  33 | };
  34 | 
  35 | export function usePrescriptionFilters(prescriptions: PrescriptionWithRelation[]): UsePrescriptionFiltersReturn {
  36 | 	const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  37 | 	const [status, setStatus] = useState("");
  38 | 	const [dateFrom, setDateFrom] = useState("");
  39 | 	const [dateTo, setDateTo] = useState("");
  40 | 	const [sort, setSort] = useState("date-desc");
  41 | 
  42 | 	const isDirty = !!(search || status || dateFrom || dateTo || sort !== "date-desc");
  43 | 
  44 | 	const filtered = useMemo(() => {
  45 | 		let result = [...prescriptions];
  46 | 
  47 | 		// Search filter
  48 | 		if (search) {
  49 | 			const q = search.toLowerCase();
  50 | 			result = result.filter(
  51 | 				p =>
  52 | 					p.patient?.firstName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  53 | 					p.patient?.lastName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  54 | 					p.doctor?.name?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  55 | 					p.medicationName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
  56 | 					p.diagnosis?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  57 | 			);
  58 | 		}
  59 | 
  60 | 		// Status filter
  61 | 		if (status) {
  62 | 			result = result.filter(p => p.status === status);
  63 | 		}
  64 | 
  65 | 		// Date range filter
  66 | 		if (dateFrom) {
  67 | 			result = result.filter(p => {
  68 | 				const issueDate = new Date(p.issuedDate).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  69 | 				return issueDate >= dateFrom;
  70 | 			});
  71 | 		}
  72 | 
  73 | 		if (dateTo) {
  74 | 			result = result.filter(p => {
  75 | 				const issueDate = new Date(p.issuedDate).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  76 | 				return issueDate <= dateTo;
  77 | 			});
  78 | 		}
  79 | 
  80 | 		// Sorting
  81 | 		if (sort === "date-desc") {
  82 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.issuedDate).getTime() - new Date(a.issuedDate).getTime());
  83 | 		}
  84 | 		if (sort === "date-asc") {
  85 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(a.issuedDate).getTime() - new Date(b.issuedDate).getTime());
  86 | 		}
  87 | 		if (sort === "patient-asc") {
  88 | 			result.sort((a, b) =>
  89 | 				`${a.patient?.firstName} ${a.patient?.lastName}`.localeCompare(
  90 | 					`${b.patient?.firstName} ${b.patient?.lastName}`
  91 | 				)
  92 | 			);
  93 | 		}
  94 | 		if (sort === "patient-desc") {
  95 | 			result.sort((a, b) =>
  96 | 				`${b.patient?.firstName} ${b.patient?.lastName}`.localeCompare(
  97 | 					`${a.patient?.firstName} ${a.patient?.lastName}`
  98 | 				)
  99 | 			);
 100 | 		}
 101 | 		if (sort === "doctor-asc") {
 102 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (a.doctor?.name || "").localeCompare(b.doctor?.name || ""));
 103 | 		}
 104 | 		if (sort === "doctor-desc") {
 105 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (b.doctor?.name || "").localeCompare(a.doctor?.name || ""));
 106 | 		}
 107 | 
 108 | 		return result;
 109 | 	}, [prescriptions, search, status, dateFrom, dateTo, sort]);
 110 | 
 111 | 	const toolbar: DataToolbarProps = {
 112 | 		searchValue: search,
 113 | 		onSearchChange: setSearch,
 114 | 		searchPlaceholder: "Search by patient, doctor, or medication...",
 115 | 		filters: [
 116 | 			{
 117 | 				label: "status",
 118 | 				value: status,
 119 | 				placeholder: "All statuses",
 120 | 				options: STATUS_OPTIONS,
 121 | 				onChange: setStatus,
 122 | 				width: "w-[130px]"
 123 | 			}
 124 | 		],
 125 | 		sortOptions: SORT_OPTIONS,
 126 | 		sortValue: sort,
 127 | 		onSortChange: setSort,
 128 | 		dateRange: {
 129 | 			from: dateFrom,
 130 | 			to: dateTo,
 131 | 			onFromChange: setDateFrom,
 132 | 			onToChange: setDateTo
 133 | 		},
 134 | 		isDirty,
 135 | 		onReset: () => {
 136 | 			setSearch("");
 137 | 			setStatus("");
 138 | 			setDateFrom("");
 139 | 			setDateTo("");
 140 | 			setSort("date-desc");
 141 | 		},
 142 | 		resultCount: { filtered: filtered.length, total: prescriptions.length }
 143 | 	};
 144 | 
 145 | 	return { filtered, toolbar };
 146 | }

```

`hooks/useProductFilters.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
   2 | import type { DataToolbarProps } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   3 | import type { ProductSelect } from "@/db/schema";
   4 | 
   5 | const SORT_OPTIONS = [
   6 | 	{ label: "Name A → Z", value: "name-asc" },
   7 | 	{ label: "Name Z → A", value: "name-desc" },
   8 | 	{ label: "Price low → high", value: "price-asc" },
   9 | 	{ label: "Price high → low", value: "price-desc" },
  10 | 	{ label: "Top rated", value: "rating-desc" }
  11 | ];
  12 | 
  13 | const INVENTORY_OPTIONS = [
  14 | 	{ label: "In stock", value: "in-stock" },
  15 | 	{ label: "Backorder", value: "backorder" },
  16 | 	{ label: "Preorder", value: "preorder" }
  17 | ];
  18 | 
  19 | const BADGE_OPTIONS = [
  20 | 	{ label: "New", value: "New" },
  21 | 	{ label: "Sale", value: "Sale" },
  22 | 	{ label: "Featured", value: "Featured" },
  23 | 	{ label: "Limited", value: "Limited" }
  24 | ];
  25 | 
  26 | type UseProductFiltersReturn = {
  27 | 	filtered: ProductSelect[];
  28 | 	toolbar: DataToolbarProps;
  29 | };
  30 | 
  31 | export function useProductFilters(products: ProductSelect[]): UseProductFiltersReturn {
  32 | 	const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  33 | 	const [inventory, setInventory] = useState("");
  34 | 	const [badge, setBadge] = useState("");
  35 | 	const [sort, setSort] = useState("");
  36 | 
  37 | 	const isDirty = !!(search || inventory || badge || sort);
  38 | 
  39 | 	const filtered = useMemo(() => {
  40 | 		let result = [...products];
  41 | 
  42 | 		if (search) {
  43 | 			const q = search.toLowerCase();
  44 | 			result = result.filter(p => p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q));
  45 | 		}
  46 | 		if (inventory) result.filter(p => p.inventory === inventory);
  47 | 		if (inventory) result = result.filter(p => p.inventory === inventory);
  48 | 		if (badge) result = result.filter(p => p.badge === badge);
  49 | 
  50 | 		if (sort === "name-asc") result.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
  51 | 		if (sort === "name-desc") result.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
  52 | 		if (sort === "price-asc") result.sort((a, b) => Number(a.price) - Number(b.price));
  53 | 		if (sort === "price-desc") result.sort((a, b) => Number(b.price) - Number(a.price));
  54 | 		if (sort === "rating-desc") result.sort((a, b) => Number(b.rating) - Number(a.rating));
  55 | 
  56 | 		return result;
  57 | 	}, [products, search, inventory, badge, sort]);
  58 | 
  59 | 	const toolbar: DataToolbarProps = {
  60 | 		searchValue: search,
  61 | 		onSearchChange: setSearch,
  62 | 		searchPlaceholder: "Search products by name...",
  63 | 		filters: [
  64 | 			{
  65 | 				label: "inventory",
  66 | 				value: inventory,
  67 | 				placeholder: "All inventory",
  68 | 				options: INVENTORY_OPTIONS,
  69 | 				onChange: setInventory,
  70 | 				width: "w-[150px]"
  71 | 			},
  72 | 			{
  73 | 				label: "badges",
  74 | 				value: badge,
  75 | 				placeholder: "All badges",
  76 | 				options: BADGE_OPTIONS,
  77 | 				onChange: setBadge,
  78 | 				width: "w-[140px]"
  79 | 			}
  80 | 		],
  81 | 		sortOptions: SORT_OPTIONS,
  82 | 		sortValue: sort,
  83 | 		onSortChange: setSort,
  84 | 		isDirty,
  85 | 		onReset: () => {
  86 | 			setSearch("");
  87 | 			setInventory("");
  88 | 			setBadge("");
  89 | 			setSort("");
  90 | 		},
  91 | 		resultCount: { filtered: filtered.length, total: products.length }
  92 | 	};
  93 | 
  94 | 	return { filtered, toolbar };
  95 | }

`hooks/useServiceFilters.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // hooks/useServiceFilters.ts
   2 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
   3 | import type { DataToolbarProps } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   4 | import type { DbService } from "@/db/schema/types";
   5 | 
   6 | const SORT_OPTIONS = [
   7 | 	{ label: "Name A → Z", value: "name-asc" },
   8 | 	{ label: "Name Z → A", value: "name-desc" },
   9 | 	{ label: "Price (low to high)", value: "price-asc" },
  10 | 	{ label: "Price (high to low)", value: "price-desc" },
  11 | 	{ label: "Duration (shortest first)", value: "duration-asc" },
  12 | 	{ label: "Duration (longest first)", value: "duration-desc" }
  13 | ];
  14 | 
  15 | const CATEGORY_OPTIONS = [
  16 | 	{ label: "Consultation", value: "CONSULTATION" },
  17 | 	{ label: "Lab Test", value: "LAB_TEST" },
  18 | 	{ label: "Vaccination", value: "VACCINATION" },
  19 | 	{ label: "Procedure", value: "PROCEDURE" },
  20 | 	{ label: "Diagnosis", value: "DIAGNOSIS" },
  21 | 	{ label: "Pharmacy", value: "PHARMACY" },
  22 | 	{ label: "Other", value: "OTHER" }
  23 | ];
  24 | 
  25 | type UseServiceFiltersReturn = {
  26 | 	filtered: DbService[];
  27 | 	toolbar: DataToolbarProps;
  28 | };
  29 | 
  30 | export function useServiceFilters(services: DbService[]): UseServiceFiltersReturn {
  31 | 	const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  32 | 	const [category, setCategory] = useState("");
  33 | 	const [availability, setAvailability] = useState("");
  34 | 	const [sort, setSort] = useState("name-asc");
  35 | 
  36 | 	const isDirty = !!(search || category || availability || sort !== "name-asc");
  37 | 
  38 | 	const filtered = useMemo(() => {
  39 | 		let result = [...services];
  40 | 
  41 | 		// Search filter
  42 | 		if (search) {
  43 | 			const q = search.toLowerCase();
  44 | 			result = result.filter(
  45 | 				s => s.serviceName.toLowerCase().includes(q) || s.description.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  46 | 			);
  47 | 		}
  48 | 
  49 | 		// Category filter
  50 | 		if (category) {
  51 | 			result = result.filter(s => s.category === category);
  52 | 		}
  53 | 
  54 | 		// Availability filter
  55 | 		if (availability) {
  56 | 			result = result.filter(s => s.isAvailable === (availability === "available"));
  57 | 		}
  58 | 
  59 | 		// Sorting
  60 | 		if (sort === "name-asc") {
  61 | 			result.sort((a, b) => a.serviceName.localeCompare(b.serviceName));
  62 | 		}
  63 | 		if (sort === "name-desc") {
  64 | 			result.sort((a, b) => b.serviceName.localeCompare(a.serviceName));
  65 | 		}
  66 | 		if (sort === "price-asc") {
  67 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (a.price || 0) - (b.price || 0));
  68 | 		}
  69 | 		if (sort === "price-desc") {
  70 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (b.price || 0) - (a.price || 0));
  71 | 		}
  72 | 		if (sort === "duration-asc") {
  73 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (a.duration || 0) - (b.duration || 0));
  74 | 		}
  75 | 		if (sort === "duration-desc") {
  76 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (b.duration || 0) - (a.duration || 0));
  77 | 		}
  78 | 
  79 | 		return result;
  80 | 	}, [services, search, category, availability, sort]);
  81 | 
  82 | 	const toolbar: DataToolbarProps = {
  83 | 		searchValue: search,
  84 | 		onSearchChange: setSearch,
  85 | 		searchPlaceholder: "Search services...",
  86 | 		filters: [
  87 | 			{
  88 | 				label: "category",
  89 | 				value: category,
  90 | 				placeholder: "All categories",
  91 | 				options: CATEGORY_OPTIONS,
  92 | 				onChange: setCategory,
  93 | 				width: "w-[140px]"
  94 | 			},
  95 | 			{
  96 | 				label: "availability",
  97 | 				value: availability,
  98 | 				placeholder: "All services",
  99 | 				options: [
 100 | 					{ label: "Available", value: "available" },
 101 | 					{ label: "Unavailable", value: "unavailable" }
 102 | 				],
 103 | 				onChange: setAvailability,
 104 | 				width: "w-[130px]"
 105 | 			}
 106 | 		],
 107 | 		sortOptions: SORT_OPTIONS,
 108 | 		sortValue: sort,
 109 | 		onSortChange: setSort,
 110 | 		isDirty,
 111 | 		onReset: () => {
 112 | 			setSearch("");
 113 | 			setCategory("");
 114 | 			setAvailability("");
 115 | 			setSort("name-asc");
 116 | 		},
 117 | 		resultCount: { filtered: filtered.length, total: services.length }
 118 | 	};
 119 | 
 120 | 	return { filtered, toolbar };
 121 | }
