`hooks/useVitalSignFilters.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // hooks/useVitalSignFilters.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
   4 | import type { DataToolbarProps } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   5 | import type { DbPatient, DbVitalSign } from "@/db/schema/types";
   6 | 
   7 | export type VitalSignWithPatient = DbVitalSign & {
   8 | 	patient?: DbPatient | null;
   9 | };
  10 | 
  11 | const SORT_OPTIONS = [
  12 | 	{ label: "Date (newest first)", value: "date-desc" },
  13 | 	{ label: "Date (oldest first)", value: "date-asc" },
  14 | 	{ label: "Heart Rate (high to low)", value: "hr-desc" },
  15 | 	{ label: "Heart Rate (low to high)", value: "hr-asc" },
  16 | 	{ label: "Blood Pressure (systolic high)", value: "bp-desc" },
  17 | 	{ label: "Blood Pressure (systolic low)", value: "bp-asc" }
  18 | ];
  19 | 
  20 | const VITAL_TYPE_OPTIONS = [
  21 | 	{ label: "All Vitals", value: "" },
  22 | 	{ label: "Temperature", value: "temperature" },
  23 | 	{ label: "Blood Pressure", value: "bp" },
  24 | 	{ label: "Heart Rate", value: "hr" },
  25 | 	{ label: "Respiratory Rate", value: "rr" },
  26 | 	{ label: "Oxygen Saturation", value: "o2" }
  27 | ];
  28 | 
  29 | type UseVitalSignFiltersReturn = {
  30 | 	filtered: VitalSignWithPatient[];
  31 | 	toolbar: DataToolbarProps;
  32 | };
  33 | 
  34 | export function useVitalSignFilters(vitals: VitalSignWithPatient[]): UseVitalSignFiltersReturn {
  35 | 	const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  36 | 	const [vitalType, setVitalType] = useState("");
  37 | 	const [dateFrom, setDateFrom] = useState("");
  38 | 	const [dateTo, setDateTo] = useState("");
  39 | 	const [sort, setSort] = useState("date-desc");
  40 | 
  41 | 	const isDirty = !!(search || vitalType || dateFrom || dateTo || sort !== "date-desc");
  42 | 
  43 | 	const filtered = useMemo(() => {
  44 | 		let result = [...vitals];
  45 | 
  46 | 		// Search filter (by patient name)
  47 | 		if (search) {
  48 | 			const q = search.toLowerCase();
  49 | 			result = result.filter(
  50 | 				v => v.patient?.firstName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) || v.patient?.lastName?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  51 | 			);
  52 | 		}
  53 | 
  54 | 		// Filter by which vital sign has data
  55 | 		if (vitalType) {
  56 | 			result = result.filter(v => {
  57 | 				switch (vitalType) {
  58 | 					case "temperature":
  59 | 						return v.bodyTemperature !== null && v.bodyTemperature !== undefined;
  60 | 					case "bp":
  61 | 						return v.systolic !== null && v.diastolic !== null;
  62 | 					case "hr":
  63 | 						return v.heartRate !== null && v.heartRate !== undefined;
  64 | 					case "rr":
  65 | 						return v.respiratoryRate !== null && v.respiratoryRate !== undefined;
  66 | 					case "o2":
  67 | 						return v.oxygenSaturation !== null && v.oxygenSaturation !== undefined;
  68 | 					default:
  69 | 						return true;
  70 | 				}
  71 | 			});
  72 | 		}
  73 | 
  74 | 		// Date range filter
  75 | 		if (dateFrom) {
  76 | 			result = result.filter(v => {
  77 | 				const recordDate = new Date(v.recordedAt).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  78 | 				return recordDate >= dateFrom;
  79 | 			});
  80 | 		}
  81 | 
  82 | 		if (dateTo) {
  83 | 			result = result.filter(v => {
  84 | 				const recordDate = new Date(v.recordedAt).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  85 | 				return recordDate <= dateTo;
  86 | 			});
  87 | 		}
  88 | 
  89 | 		// Sorting
  90 | 		if (sort === "date-desc") {
  91 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.recordedAt).getTime() - new Date(a.recordedAt).getTime());
  92 | 		}
  93 | 		if (sort === "date-asc") {
  94 | 			result.sort((a, b) => new Date(a.recordedAt).getTime() - new Date(b.recordedAt).getTime());
  95 | 		}
  96 | 		if (sort === "hr-desc") {
  97 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (b.heartRate || 0) - (a.heartRate || 0));
  98 | 		}
  99 | 		if (sort === "hr-asc") {
 100 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (a.heartRate || 0) - (b.heartRate || 0));
 101 | 		}
 102 | 		if (sort === "bp-desc") {
 103 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (b.systolic || 0) - (a.systolic || 0));
 104 | 		}
 105 | 		if (sort === "bp-asc") {
 106 | 			result.sort((a, b) => (a.systolic || 0) - (b.systolic || 0));
 107 | 		}
 108 | 
 109 | 		return result;
 110 | 	}, [vitals, search, vitalType, dateFrom, dateTo, sort]);
 111 | 
 112 | 	const toolbar: DataToolbarProps = {
 113 | 		searchValue: search,
 114 | 		onSearchChange: setSearch,
 115 | 		searchPlaceholder: "Search by patient name...",
 116 | 		filters: [
 117 | 			{
 118 | 				label: "vital sign",
 119 | 				value: vitalType,
 120 | 				placeholder: "All vital signs",
 121 | 				options: VITAL_TYPE_OPTIONS,
 122 | 				onChange: setVitalType,
 123 | 				width: "w-[150px]"
 124 | 			}
 125 | 		],
 126 | 		sortOptions: SORT_OPTIONS,
 127 | 		sortValue: sort,
 128 | 		onSortChange: setSort,
 129 | 		dateRange: {
 130 | 			from: dateFrom,
 131 | 			to: dateTo,
 132 | 			onFromChange: setDateFrom,
 133 | 			onToChange: setDateTo
 134 | 		},
 135 | 		isDirty,
 136 | 		onReset: () => {
 137 | 			setSearch("");
 138 | 			setVitalType("");
 139 | 			setDateFrom("");
 140 | 			setDateTo("");
 141 | 			setSort("date-desc");
 142 | 		},
 143 | 		resultCount: { filtered: filtered.length, total: vitals.length }
 144 | 	};
 145 | 
 146 | 	return { filtered, toolbar };
 147 | }

```

`lib/age-calculator.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // src/lib/age-calculator.ts
   2 | export interface AgeResult {
   3 | 	days: number;
   4 | 	formatted: string;
   5 | 	months: number;
   6 | 	years: number;
   7 | }
   8 | 
   9 | export class AgeCalculator {
  10 | 	/**
  11 | 	 * Calculate age from date of birth
  12 | 	 */
  13 | 	calculate(dateOfBirth: Date | string, referenceDate: Date = new Date()): AgeResult {
  14 | 		const dob = new Date(dateOfBirth);
  15 | 		const ref = new Date(referenceDate);
  16 | 
  17 | 		console.log("AgeCalculator.calculate called with:", { dob, ref });
  18 | 
  19 | 		// Validate that birth date is not in the future
  20 | 		if (dob > ref) {
  21 | 			console.log("Throwing error: Birth date is in the future");
  22 | 			throw new Error("Birth date cannot be in the future");
  23 | 		}
  24 | 
  25 | 		console.log("Validation passed, calculating age...");
  26 | 
  27 | 		// Total days
  28 | 		const days = Math.floor((ref.getTime() - dob.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  29 | 
  30 | 		// Calculate years and months
  31 | 		let years = ref.getFullYear() - dob.getFullYear();
  32 | 		let months = ref.getMonth() - dob.getMonth();
  33 | 
  34 | 		if (months < 0) {
  35 | 			years--;
  36 | 			months += 12;
  37 | 		}
  38 | 
  39 | 		// Adjust for day of month
  40 | 		if (ref.getDate() < dob.getDate()) {
  41 | 			months--;
  42 | 			if (months < 0) {
  43 | 				years--;
  44 | 				months += 12;
  45 | 			}
  46 | 		}
  47 | 
  48 | 		// Format for display
  49 | 		let formatted: string;
  50 | 		if (years === 0) {
  51 | 			if (months === 0 || months === 1) {
  52 | 				formatted = `${days} ${days === 1 ? "day" : "days"}`;
  53 | 			} else if (months < 24) {
  54 | 				formatted = `${months} ${months === 1 ? "month" : "months"}`;
  55 | 			} else {
  56 | 				formatted = `${years} years`;
  57 | 			}
  58 | 		} else {
  59 | 			formatted = `${years} ${years === 1 ? "year" : "years"}, ${months} ${months === 1 ? "month" : "months"}`;
  60 | 		}
  61 | 
  62 | 		return {
  63 | 			days,
  64 | 			months: years * 12 + months,
  65 | 			years,
  66 | 			formatted
  67 | 		};
  68 | 	}
  69 | 
  70 | 	/**
  71 | 	 * Get age in months (standard for pediatric metrics)
  72 | 	 */
  73 | 	inMonths(dateOfBirth: Date | string, referenceDate: Date = new Date()): number {
  74 | 		const dob = new Date(dateOfBirth);
  75 | 		const ref = new Date(referenceDate);
  76 | 
  77 | 		let months = (ref.getFullYear() - dob.getFullYear()) * 12 + (ref.getMonth() - dob.getMonth());
  78 | 
  79 | 		if (ref.getDate() < dob.getDate()) {
  80 | 			months--;
  81 | 		}
  82 | 
  83 | 		return months;
  84 | 	}
  85 | 
  86 | 	/**
  87 | 	 * Get age in days
  88 | 	 */
  89 | 	inDays(dateOfBirth: Date | string, referenceDate: Date = new Date()): number {
  90 | 		const dob = new Date(dateOfBirth);
  91 | 		const ref = new Date(referenceDate);
  92 | 
  93 | 		return Math.floor((ref.getTime() - dob.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  94 | 	}
  95 | 
  96 | 	/**
  97 | 	 * Get age in years
  98 | 	 */
  99 | 	inYears(dateOfBirth: Date | string, referenceDate: Date = new Date()): number {
 100 | 		const dob = new Date(dateOfBirth);
 101 | 		const ref = new Date(referenceDate);
 102 | 
 103 | 		let years = ref.getFullYear() - dob.getFullYear();
 104 | 
 105 | 		if (ref.getMonth() < dob.getMonth() || (ref.getMonth() === dob.getMonth() && ref.getDate() < dob.getDate())) {
 106 | 			years--;
 107 | 		}
 108 | 
 109 | 		return years;
 110 | 	}
 111 | 
 112 | 	/**
 113 | 	 * Get age group for pediatric care
 114 | 	 */
 115 | 	getAgeGroup(
 116 | 		dateOfBirth: Date | string,
 117 | 		referenceDate: Date = new Date()
 118 | 	): "infant" | "toddler" | "preschool" | "school_age" | "adolescent" {
 119 | 		const ageMonths = this.inMonths(dateOfBirth, referenceDate);
 120 | 
 121 | 		if (ageMonths < 12) return "infant";
 122 | 		if (ageMonths < 36) return "toddler";
 123 | 		if (ageMonths < 72) return "preschool";
 124 | 		if (ageMonths < 216) return "school_age";
 125 | 		return "adolescent";
 126 | 	}
 127 | 
 128 | 	/**
 129 | 	 * Get age range string
 130 | 	 */
 131 | 	getAgeRangeString(dateOfBirth: Date | string, referenceDate: Date = new Date()): string {
 132 | 		const years = this.inYears(dateOfBirth, referenceDate);
 133 | 		const months = this.inMonths(dateOfBirth, referenceDate) - years * 12;
 134 | 
 135 | 		if (years === 0) {
 136 | 			if (months === 0) return "0 months";
 137 | 			return `${months} month${months === 1 ? "" : "s"}`;
 138 | 		}
 139 | 		return `${years} year${years === 1 ? "" : "s"}, ${months} month${months === 1 ? "" : "s"}`;
 140 | 	}
 141 | }
 142 | 
 143 | export const ageCalculator = new AgeCalculator();
 144 | 
 145 | // Convenience function for backward compatibility
 146 | export function calculateAge(dateOfBirth: Date | string, referenceDate: Date = new Date()): AgeResult {
 147 | 	const birthDate = typeof dateOfBirth === "string" ? new Date(dateOfBirth) : dateOfBirth;
 148 | 	return ageCalculator.calculate(birthDate, referenceDate);
 149 | }

```

`lib/auth-client.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { adminClient, inferAdditionalFields } from "better-auth/client/plugins";
   2 | import { createAuthClient } from "better-auth/react";
   3 | import type { auth } from "@/lib/auth"; // Import auth instance as type
   4 | 
   5 | import { ac, admin, doctor, patient, staff } from "./permissions";
   6 | 
   7 | const baseURL = import.meta.env.VITE_BETTER_AUTH_URL || "http://localhost:3000";
   8 | 
   9 | export const authClient = createAuthClient({
  10 | 	baseURL,
  11 | 	plugins: [
  12 | 		adminClient({
  13 | 			ac,
  14 | 			roles: { staff, admin, patient, doctor }
  15 | 		}),
  16 | 		inferAdditionalFields<typeof auth>() // Use typeof auth, not Auth
  17 | 	]
  18 | });
  19 | 
  20 | export const { signIn, signUp, useSession, signOut } = authClient;
  21 | 
  22 | export type Session = typeof authClient.$Infer.Session;
  23 | 
  24 | export const useAuth = () => {
  25 | 	const { data, isPending, error } = useSession();
  26 | 	const isAuthenticated = !!data?.user;
  27 | 	const user = data?.user;
  28 | 
  29 | 	return {
  30 | 		isAuthenticated,
  31 | 		user,
  32 | 		isPending,
  33 | 		error
  34 | 	};
  35 | };
  36 | 
  37 | export type AuthClientUser = (typeof authClient.$Infer.Session)["user"];
  38 | export type AuthClientSession = typeof authClient.$Infer.Session;
  39 | export type AuthClient = typeof authClient;
```

`lib/auth.functions.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   2 | import { getRequestHeaders } from "@tanstack/react-start/server";
   3 | import { auth } from "@/lib/auth";
   4 | 
   5 | export const getSession = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
   6 | 	const headers = getRequestHeaders();
   7 | 	const session = await auth.api.getSession({ headers });
   8 | 
   9 | 	return session;
  10 | });
  11 | 
  12 | export const ensureSession = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
  13 | 	const headers = getRequestHeaders();
  14 | 	const session = await auth.api.getSession({ headers });
  15 | 
  16 | 	if (!session) {
  17 | 		throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  18 | 	}
  19 | 
  20 | 	return session;
  21 | });
```

`lib/auth.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { APIError, betterAuth, env, generateId, isProduction } from "better-auth";
   2 | import { drizzleAdapter } from "better-auth/adapters/drizzle";
   3 | import { createAuthMiddleware } from "better-auth/api";
   4 | import { admin, customSession, openAPI, twoFactor } from "better-auth/plugins";
   5 | import { tanstackStartCookies } from "better-auth/tanstack-start";
   6 | import { count, eq } from "drizzle-orm";
   7 | import { db } from "@/db"; // your drizzle instance
   8 | import * as schema from "@/db/schema";
   9 | import { ac, admin as adminRole, doctor, patient, staff } from "./permissions";
  10 | export const auth = betterAuth({
  11 | 	database: drizzleAdapter(db, {
  12 | 		provider: "pg" // or "mysql", "sqlite"
  13 | 	}),
  14 | 	appName: "Clinic",
  15 | 	baseURL: env.BETTER_AUTH_URL,
  16 | 	secret: env.BETTER_AUTH_SECRET,
  17 | 	emailAndPassword: {
  18 | 		enabled: true,
  19 | 		disableSignUp: true,
  20 | 		minPasswordLength: 8,
  21 | 		maxPasswordLength: 128
  22 | 	},
  23 | 	user: {
  24 | 		additionalFields: {
  25 | 			role: {
  26 | 				type: ["doctor", "staff", "patient", "admin"],
  27 | 				required: false,
  28 | 				defaultValue: "doctor"
  29 | 			},
  30 | 			clinicId: { type: "string", required: false, input: true },
  31 | 			address: { type: "string", required: false, input: true },
  32 | 			phone: { type: "string", required: false, input: true }
  33 | 		}
  34 | 	},
  35 | 
  36 | 	databaseHooks: {
  37 | 		user: {
  38 | 			create: {
  39 | 				before: async (user, ctx) => {
  40 | 					const [signUpSetting, inviteSetting] = await Promise.all([
  41 | 						db.query.configStore.findFirst({ where: { key: "sign_up_enabled" } }),
  42 | 						db.query.configStore.findFirst({ where: { key: "invite_required" } })
  43 | 					]);
  44 | 
  45 | 					const isEnabled = signUpSetting?.value !== "false";
  46 | 					const isInviteRequired = inviteSetting?.value === "true";
  47 | 
  48 | 					if (isEnabled === false) {
  49 | 						throw new APIError("FORBIDDEN", {
  50 | 							message: "User sign-up is disabled at the moment."
  51 | 						});
  52 | 					}
  53 | 
  54 | 					if (isInviteRequired === true) {
  55 | 						const invite = ctx?.body?.invite as string | undefined;
  56 | 						if (!invite) {
  57 | 							throw new APIError("BAD_REQUEST", {
  58 | 								message: "Invite code is required for registration."
  59 | 							});
  60 | 						}
  61 | 
  62 | 						const inviteRecord = await db.query.invite.findFirst({
  63 | 							where: { code: invite }
  64 | 						});
  65 | 
  66 | 						if (
  67 | 							!inviteRecord ||
  68 | 							(inviteRecord.expiresAt && inviteRecord.expiresAt < new Date()) ||
  69 | 							inviteRecord.usedBy !== null
  70 | 						) {
  71 | 							throw new APIError("BAD_REQUEST", {
  72 | 								message: "Invite code is invalid or has expired."
  73 | 							});
  74 | 						}
  75 | 					}
  76 | 
  77 | 					const adminCountResult = await db
  78 | 						.select({ value: count() })
  79 | 						.from(schema.user)
  80 | 						.where(eq(schema.user.role, "admin"));
  81 | 					const adminCount = adminCountResult[0]?.value ?? 0;
  82 | 					const isOnboarded = adminCount > 0;
  83 | 					const role = isOnboarded ? "patient" : "admin";
  84 | 
  85 | 					return {
  86 | 						data: { ...user, role }
  87 | 					};
  88 | 				},
  89 | 
  90 | 				after: async (user, ctx) => {
  91 | 					try {
  92 | 						const userRole = user.role as schema.UserRole;
  93 | 						const clinicData = ctx?.body?.clinicData as { name?: string; address?: string } | undefined;
  94 | 						const inviteCode = ctx?.body?.invite as string | undefined;
  95 | 
  96 | 						// Find or create clinic
  97 | 						let clinicId: string;
  98 | 						if (clinicData?.name) {
  99 | 							const [newClinic] = await db
 100 | 								.insert(schema.clinic)
 101 | 								.values({
 102 | 									id: generateId(),
 103 | 									name: clinicData.name,
 104 | 									address: clinicData.address ?? ""
 105 | 								})
 106 | 								.returning();
 107 | 							clinicId = newClinic.id;
 108 | 						} else {
 109 | 							const defaultClinic = await db.query.clinic.findFirst();
 110 | 							if (defaultClinic) {
 111 | 								clinicId = defaultClinic.id;
 112 | 							} else {
 113 | 								const [newClinic] = await db
 114 | 									.insert(schema.clinic)
 115 | 									.values({
 116 | 										id: generateId(),
 117 | 										name: "Default Clinic",
 118 | 										address: "Default Address"
 119 | 									})
 120 | 									.returning();
 121 | 								clinicId = newClinic.id;
 122 | 							}
 123 | 						}
 124 | 
 125 | 						// Connect user to clinic
 126 | 						await db.insert(schema.clinicMember).values({
 127 | 							userId: user.id,
 128 | 							clinicId,
 129 | 							role: userRole as "admin" | "doctor" | "staff" | "patient"
 130 | 						});
 131 | 
 132 | 						// Update user with clinic ID
 133 | 						await db.update(schema.user).set({ clinicId }).where(eq(schema.user.id, user.id));
 134 | 
 135 | 						// Create role-specific records
 136 | 						const roleRecordData = {
 137 | 							userId: user.id,
 138 | 							email: user.email,
 139 | 							clinicId
 140 | 						};
 141 | 
 142 | 						if ((userRole as string) === "doctor") {
 143 | 							await db.insert(schema.doctor).values({
 144 | 								id: generateId(),
 145 | 								...roleRecordData,
 146 | 								role: "doctor",
 147 | 								name: user.name || "",
 148 | 								specialty: "General"
 149 | 							});
 150 | 						} else if ((userRole as string) === "patient") {
 151 | 							const [firstName, ...lastParts] = (user.name || "").split(" ");
 152 | 							await db.insert(schema.patient).values({
 153 | 								id: generateId(),
 154 | 								...roleRecordData,
 155 | 								role: "patient",
 156 | 								firstName: firstName ?? "",
 157 | 								lastName: lastParts.join(" ") || "",
 158 | 								dateOfBirth: new Date(0)
 159 | 							});
 160 | 						}
 161 | 
 162 | 						// Mark invite as used
 163 | 						if (inviteCode) {
 164 | 							await db
 165 | 								.update(schema.invite)
 166 | 								.set({ usedBy: user.id })
 167 | 								.where(eq(schema.invite.code, inviteCode));
 168 | 						}
 169 | 
 170 | 						// Set onboarding flag if first admin
 171 | 						if ((userRole as string) === "admin") {
 172 | 							const adminCountResult = await db
 173 | 								.select({ value: count() })
 174 | 								.from(schema.user)
 175 | 								.where(eq(schema.user.role, "admin"));
 176 | 							if ((adminCountResult[0]?.value ?? 0) === 1) {
 177 | 								await db
 178 | 									.insert(schema.configStore)
 179 | 									.values({ key: "admin_onboarded", value: "true" })
 180 | 									.onConflictDoUpdate({ target: schema.configStore.key, set: { value: "true" } });
 181 | 							}
 182 | 						}
 183 | 
 184 | 						// Create user quota using settings service
 185 | 						const [q, fq, iq] = await Promise.all([
 186 | 							db.query.configStore.findFirst({ where: { key: `quota_${userRole}` } }),
 187 | 							db.query.configStore.findFirst({ where: { key: `quota_${userRole}` } }),
 188 | 							db.query.configStore.findFirst({ where: { key: `file_quota_${userRole}` } }),
 189 | 							db.query.configStore.findFirst({ where: { key: `invite_quota_${userRole}` } })
 190 | 						]);
 191 | 
 192 | 						await db.insert(schema.userQuota).values({
 193 | 							userId: user.id,
 194 | 							quota: Number.parseInt(q?.value ?? "104857600", 10), // 100MB default
 195 | 							fileCountQuota: Number.parseInt(fq?.value ?? "50", 10),
 196 | 							inviteQuota: Number.parseInt(iq?.value ?? "0", 10)
 197 | 						});
 198 | 					} catch (error) {
 199 | 						console.error(`Post-create error for ${user.email}:`, error);
 200 | 					}
 201 | 				}
 202 | 			},
 203 | 
 204 | 			delete: {
 205 | 				before: async user => {
 206 | 					try {
 207 | 						await db.transaction(async tx => {
 208 | 							// Delete role-specific records
 209 | 							await tx.delete(schema.doctor).where(eq(schema.doctor.userId, user.id));
 210 | 							await tx.delete(schema.staff).where(eq(schema.staff.userId, user.id));
 211 | 							await tx.delete(schema.patient).where(eq(schema.patient.userId, user.id));
 212 | 
 213 | 							// Delete clinic memberships
 214 | 							await tx.delete(schema.clinicMember).where(eq(schema.clinicMember.userId, user.id));
 215 | 
 216 | 							// Delete quota
 217 | 							await tx.delete(schema.userQuota).where(eq(schema.userQuota.userId, user.id));
 218 | 						});
 219 | 					} catch (error) {
 220 | 						console.error(`Pre-delete cleanup error for ${user.email}:`, error);
 221 | 						// We don't necessarily want to block deletion if cleanup fails,
 222 | 						// but you could throw an APIError here if it's critical.
 223 | 					}
 224 | 				}
 225 | 			}
 226 | 		}
 227 | 	},
 228 | 	session: {
 229 | 		cookieCache: {
 230 | 			enabled: true,
 231 | 			maxAge: 5 * 60
 232 | 		}
 233 | 	},
 234 | 	experimental: {
 235 | 		joins: false
 236 | 	},
 237 | 
 238 | 	hooks: {
 239 | 		before: createAuthMiddleware(async ctx => {
 240 | 			if (ctx.path === "/sign-up/email") {
 241 | 				const signUpSetting = await db.query.configStore.findFirst({ where: { key: "sign_up_enabled" } });
 242 | 				if (signUpSetting?.value === "false") {
 243 | 					throw new APIError("FORBIDDEN", {
 244 | 						message: "User sign-up is disabled at the moment."
 245 | 					});
 246 | 				}
 247 | 			}
 248 | 		})
 249 | 	},
 250 | 
 251 | 	plugins: [
 252 | 		admin({
 253 | 			ac,
 254 | 			roles: {
 255 | 				admin: adminRole,
 256 | 				doctor,
 257 | 				staff,
 258 | 				patient
 259 | 			}
 260 | 		}),
 261 | 		openAPI({
 262 | 			theme: "deepSpace"
 263 | 		}),
 264 | 		twoFactor(),
 265 | 		customSession(async ({ user, session }) => {
 266 | 			const [fullUser, userQuota, clinicsList] = await Promise.all([
 267 | 				db.query.user.findFirst({ where: { id: user.id } }),
 268 | 				db.query.userQuota.findFirst({ where: { userId: user.id } }),
 269 | 				db
 270 | 					.select({
 271 | 						id: schema.clinic.id,
 272 | 						name: schema.clinic.name,
 273 | 						email: schema.clinic.email,
 274 | 						role: schema.clinicMember.role,
 275 | 						createdAt: schema.clinicMember.createdAt
 276 | 					})
 277 | 					.from(schema.clinicMember)
 278 | 					.innerJoin(schema.clinic, eq(schema.clinicMember.clinicId, schema.clinic.id))
 279 | 					.where(eq(schema.clinicMember.userId, user.id))
 280 | 			]);
 281 | 
 282 | 			const primaryClinic = fullUser?.clinicId
 283 | 				? await db.query.clinic.findFirst({ where: { id: fullUser.clinicId } })
 284 | 				: null;
 285 | 
 286 | 			return {
 287 | 				user: {
 288 | 					...user,
 289 | 					role: fullUser?.role,
 290 | 					clinicId: fullUser?.clinicId as string,
 291 | 					phone: fullUser?.phone as string,
 292 | 					address: fullUser?.address as string,
 293 | 					quota: userQuota,
 294 | 					primaryClinic: primaryClinic ?? undefined,
 295 | 					clinics: clinicsList.map(cm => ({
 296 | 						...cm,
 297 | 						memberRole: cm.role,
 298 | 						joinedAt: cm.createdAt,
 299 | 						isPrimary: cm.id === fullUser?.clinicId
 300 | 					}))
 301 | 				},
 302 | 				session
 303 | 			};
 304 | 		}),
 305 | 		tanstackStartCookies()
 306 | 	],
 307 | 	advanced: {
 308 | 		cookiePrefix: "__bauth",
 309 | 		ipAddress: {
 310 | 			ipAddressHeaders: ["x-forwarded-for", "x-real-ip", "cf-connecting-ip", "true-client-ip"]
 311 | 		},
 312 | 		defaultCookieAttributes: {
 313 | 			httpOnly: true,
 314 | 			sameSite: isProduction ? "strict" : "none",
 315 | 			secure: true
 316 | 		},
 317 | 		telemetry: {
 318 | 			enabled: false
 319 | 		},
 320 | 		database: {
 321 | 			generateId: () => generateId()
 322 | 		}
 323 | 	}
 324 | });
 325 | 
 326 | export type AuthSession = typeof auth.$Infer.Session;
 327 | export type Session = typeof auth.$Infer.Session;
 328 | export type AuthUser = Session["user"];
 329 | export type Role = AuthUser["role"];
 330 | export type Auth = typeof auth;

```

`lib/clinic-store.devtool.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // clinic-store.devtool.tsx
   2 | // TanStack Devtools plugin for clinic stores.
   3 | // Usage in __root.tsx: import StoreDevtools from "@/lib/clinic-store.devtool";
   4 | // then add StoreDevtools to the plugins array of <TanStackDevtools />.
   5 | 
   6 | import { EventClient } from "@tanstack/devtools-event-client";
   7 | import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
   8 | 
   9 | import {
  10 | 	appointmentStore,
  11 | 	authStore,
  12 | 	clinicStore,
  13 | 	doctorStore,
  14 | 	feedingLogStore,
  15 | 	growthRecordStore,
  16 | 	immunizationStore,
  17 | 	milestonesStore,
  18 | 	neonatalStore,
  19 | 	notificationStore,
  20 | 	patientStore,
  21 | 	prescriptionStore,
  22 | 	vaccineScheduleStore,
  23 | 	vitalSignsStore
  24 | } from "./clinic.store";
  25 | 
  26 | // ============================================================================
  27 | // EventMap  (pluginId:eventName  →  payload shape)
  28 | // ============================================================================
  29 | 
  30 | type EventMap = {
  31 | 	"clinic-store:auth": {
  32 | 		isAuthenticated: boolean;
  33 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  34 | 		error: string | null;
  35 | 		userId: string | null;
  36 | 		userName: string | null;
  37 | 	};
  38 | 	"clinic-store:clinic": {
  39 | 		currentClinicId: string | null;
  40 | 		currentClinicName: string | null;

  45 | 	"clinic-store:patient": {
  46 | 		patientsCount: number;

  53 | 	};
  54 | 	"clinic-store:appointment": {
  55 | 		appointmentsCount: number;
  56 | 		selectedDate: string | null;
  57 | 		viewMode: "day" | "week" | "month";
  58 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  59 | 		error: string | null;
  60 | 	};
  61 | 	"clinic-store:doctor": {
  62 | 		doctorsCount: number;
  63 | 		currentDoctorName: string | null;
  64 | 		specialtiesCount: number;
  65 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  66 | 		error: string | null;
  67 | 	};
  68 | 	"clinic-store:notification": {
  69 | 		notificationsCount: number;
  70 | 		unreadCount: number;
  71 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  72 | 		error: string | null;
  73 | 	};
  74 | 	"clinic-store:growth": {
  75 | 		recordsCount: number;
  76 | 		chartDataPoints: number;
  77 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  78 | 		error: string | null;
  79 | 	};
  80 | 	"clinic-store:immunization": {
  81 | 		immunizationsCount: number;
  82 | 		upcomingVaccinesCount: number;
  83 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  84 | 		error: string | null;
  85 | 	};
  86 | 	"clinic-store:feeding": {
  87 | 		logsCount: number;
  88 | 		totalFeedings: number;
  89 | 		averageDuration: number;
  90 | 		totalAmount: number;
  91 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  92 | 		error: string | null;
  93 | 	};
  94 | 	"clinic-store:milestones": {
  95 | 		milestonesCount: number;
  96 | 		ageGroupsCount: number;
  97 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  98 | 		error: string | null;
  99 | 	};
 100 | 	"clinic-store:vaccine-schedule": {
 101 | 		schedulesCount: number;
 102 | 		mandatoryCount: number;
 103 | 		isLoading: boolean;
 104 | 		error: string | null;
 105 | 	};
 106 | 	"clinic-store:neonatal": {
 107 | 		assessmentsCount: number;
 108 | 		currentAssessmentId: string | null;
 109 | 		isLoading: boolean;
 110 | 		error: string | null;
 111 | 	};
 112 | 	"clinic-store:prescription": {
 113 | 		prescriptionsCount: number;
 114 | 		activePrescriptionsCount: number;
 115 | 		isLoading: boolean;
 116 | 		error: string | null;
 117 | 	};
 118 | 	"clinic-store:vitals": {
 119 | 		vitalsCount: number;
 120 | 		hasTrends: boolean;
 121 | 		isLoading: boolean;
 122 | 		error: string | null;
 123 | 	};
 124 | };
 125 | 
 126 | // ============================================================================
 127 | // Event client  (pluginId = "clinic-store")
 128 | // ============================================================================
 129 | 
 130 | class ClinicStoreEventClient extends EventClient<EventMap> {
 131 | 	constructor() {
 132 | 		super({ pluginId: "clinic-store" });
 133 | 	}
 134 | }
 135 | 
 136 | const sdec = new ClinicStoreEventClient();
 137 | 
 138 | // ============================================================================
 139 | // Subscriptions — emit short key ("auth", not "clinic-store:auth")
 140 | // ============================================================================
 141 | 
 142 | authStore.subscribe(() => {
 143 | 	const s = authStore.state;
 144 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:auth", {
 145 | 		isAuthenticated: s.isAuthenticated,
 146 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 147 | 		error: s.error,
 148 | 		userId: s.user?.id ?? null,
 149 | 		userName: s.user?.name ?? null
 150 | 	});
 151 | });
 152 | 
 153 | clinicStore.subscribe(() => {
 154 | 	const s = clinicStore.state;
 155 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:clinic", {
 156 | 		currentClinicId: s.currentClinic?.id ?? null,
 157 | 		currentClinicName: s.currentClinic?.name ?? null,
 158 | 		clinicsCount: s.clinics.length,
 159 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 160 | 		error: s.error
 161 | 	});
 162 | });
 163 | 
 164 | patientStore.subscribe(() => {
 165 | 	const s = patientStore.state;
 166 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:patient", {
 167 | 		patientsCount: s.patients.length,
 168 | 		currentPatientName: s.currentPatient ? `${s.currentPatient.firstName} ${s.currentPatient.lastName}` : null,
 169 | 		totalCount: s.totalCount,
 170 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 171 | 		error: s.error,
 172 | 		filterSearch: s.filters.search,
 173 | 		filterStatus: s.filters.status
 174 | 	});
 175 | });
 176 | 
 177 | appointmentStore.subscribe(() => {
 178 | 	const s = appointmentStore.state;
 179 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:appointment", {
 180 | 		appointmentsCount: s.appointments.length,
 181 | 		selectedDate: s.selectedDate?.toISOString() ?? null,
 182 | 		viewMode: s.viewMode,
 183 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 184 | 		error: s.error
 185 | 	});
 186 | });
 187 | 
 188 | doctorStore.subscribe(() => {
 189 | 	const s = doctorStore.state;
 190 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:doctor", {
 191 | 		doctorsCount: s.doctors.length,
 192 | 		currentDoctorName: s.currentDoctor?.name ?? null,
 193 | 		specialtiesCount: s.specialties.length,
 194 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 195 | 		error: s.error
 196 | 	});
 197 | });

 199 | notificationStore.subscribe(() => {
 200 | 	const s = notificationStore.state;
 201 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:notification", {
 202 | 		notificationsCount: s.notifications.length,
 203 | 		unreadCount: s.unreadCount,
 204 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 205 | 		error: s.error
 206 | 	});
 207 | });

 210 | 	const s = growthRecordStore.state;
 211 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:growth", {
 212 | 		recordsCount: s.records.length,
 213 | 		chartDataPoints: s.chartData.length,
 214 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 215 | 		error: s.error
 216 | 	});
 217 | });

 219 | immunizationStore.subscribe(() => {
 220 | 	const s = immunizationStore.state;
 221 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:immunization", {
 222 | 		immunizationsCount: s.immunizations.length,
 223 | 		upcomingVaccinesCount: s.upcomingVaccines.length,
 224 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 225 | 		error: s.error
 226 | 	});
 227 | });
 228 | 
 229 | feedingLogStore.subscribe(() => {
 230 | 	const s = feedingLogStore.state;
 231 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:feeding", {
 232 | 		logsCount: s.logs.length,
 233 | 		totalFeedings: s.stats?.totalFeedings ?? 0,
 234 | 		averageDuration: s.stats?.averageDuration ?? 0,
 235 | 		totalAmount: s.stats?.totalAmount ?? 0,
 236 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 237 | 		error: s.error
 238 | 	});
 239 | });
 240 | 
 241 | milestonesStore.subscribe(() => {
 242 | 	const s = milestonesStore.state;
 243 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:milestones", {
 244 | 		milestonesCount: s.milestones.length,
 245 | 		ageGroupsCount: Object.keys(s.byAgeGroup).length,
 246 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 247 | 		error: s.error
 248 | 	});
 249 | });
 250 | 
 251 | vaccineScheduleStore.subscribe(() => {
 252 | 	const s = vaccineScheduleStore.state;
 253 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:vaccine-schedule", {
 254 | 		schedulesCount: s.schedules.length,
 255 | 		mandatoryCount: s.mandatoryVaccines.length,
 256 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 257 | 		error: s.error
 258 | 	});
 259 | });

 263 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:neonatal", {
 264 | 		assessmentsCount: s.assessments.length,
 265 | 		currentAssessmentId: s.currentAssessment?.id ?? null,
 266 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 267 | 		error: s.error
 268 | 	});

 273 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:prescription", {
 274 | 		prescriptionsCount: s.prescriptions.length,
 275 | 		activePrescriptionsCount: s.activePrescriptions.length,
 276 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 277 | 		error: s.error
 278 | 	});
 279 | });

 282 | 	const s = vitalSignsStore.state;
 283 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:vitals", {
 284 | 		vitalsCount: s.vitals.length,
 285 | 		hasTrends: s.trends !== null,
 286 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 287 | 		error: s.error
 288 | 	});
 289 | });

 291 | // ============================================================================
 292 | // Panel component
 293 | // ============================================================================
 294 | 
 295 | function DevtoolPanel() {
 296 | 	const [auth, setAuth] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:auth"]>(() => {
 297 | 		const s = authStore.state;
 298 | 		return {
 299 | 			isAuthenticated: s.isAuthenticated,
 300 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 301 | 			error: s.error,
 302 | 			userId: s.user?.id ?? null,
 303 | 			userName: s.user?.name ?? null
 304 | 		};
 305 | 	});
 306 | 	const [clinic, setClinic] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:clinic"]>(() => {
 307 | 		const s = clinicStore.state;
 308 | 		return {
 309 | 			currentClinicId: s.currentClinic?.id ?? null,
 310 | 			currentClinicName: s.currentClinic?.name ?? null,
 311 | 			clinicsCount: s.clinics.length,
 312 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 313 | 			error: s.error
 314 | 		};
 315 | 	});
 316 | 	const [patient, setPatient] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:patient"]>(() => {
 317 | 		const s = patientStore.state;
 318 | 		return {
 319 | 			patientsCount: s.patients.length,
 320 | 			currentPatientName: s.currentPatient ? `${s.currentPatient.firstName} ${s.currentPatient.lastName}` : null,
 321 | 			totalCount: s.totalCount,
 322 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 323 | 			error: s.error,
 324 | 			filterSearch: s.filters.search,
 325 | 			filterStatus: s.filters.status
 326 | 		};
 327 | 	});
 328 | 	const [appt, setAppt] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:appointment"]>(() => {
 329 | 		const s = appointmentStore.state;
 330 | 		return {
 331 | 			appointmentsCount: s.appointments.length,
 332 | 			selectedDate: s.selectedDate?.toISOString() ?? null,
 333 | 			viewMode: s.viewMode,
 334 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 335 | 			error: s.error
 336 | 		};
 337 | 	});
 338 | 	const [doctor, setDoctor] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:doctor"]>(() => {
 339 | 		const s = doctorStore.state;
 340 | 		return {
 341 | 			doctorsCount: s.doctors.length,
 342 | 			currentDoctorName: s.currentDoctor?.name ?? null,
 343 | 			specialtiesCount: s.specialties.length,
 344 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 345 | 			error: s.error
 346 | 		};
 347 | 	});
 348 | 	const [notif, setNotif] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:notification"]>(() => {
 349 | 		const s = notificationStore.state;
 350 | 		return {
 351 | 			notificationsCount: s.notifications.length,
 352 | 			unreadCount: s.unreadCount,
 353 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 354 | 			error: s.error
 355 | 		};
 356 | 	});

 359 | 		return {
 360 | 			recordsCount: s.records.length,
 361 | 			chartDataPoints: s.chartData.length,

 369 | 			immunizationsCount: s.immunizations.length,

 373 | 		};
 374 | 	});

 376 | 		const s = feedingLogStore.state;
 377 | 		return {
 378 | 			logsCount: s.logs.length,
 379 | 			totalFeedings: s.stats?.totalFeedings ?? 0,
 380 | 			averageDuration: s.stats?.averageDuration ?? 0,
 381 | 			totalAmount: s.stats?.totalAmount ?? 0,
 382 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 383 | 			error: s.error
 384 | 		};
 385 | 	});
 386 | 	const [miles, setMiles] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:milestones"]>(() => {
 387 | 		const s = milestonesStore.state;
 388 | 		return {
 389 | 			milestonesCount: s.milestones.length,
 390 | 			ageGroupsCount: Object.keys(s.byAgeGroup).length,
 391 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 392 | 			error: s.error
 393 | 		};
 394 | 	});
 395 | 	const [vacc, setVacc] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:vaccine-schedule"]>(() => {
 396 | 		const s = vaccineScheduleStore.state;
 397 | 		return {
 398 | 			schedulesCount: s.schedules.length,
 399 | 			mandatoryCount: s.mandatoryVaccines.length,
 400 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 401 | 			error: s.error
 402 | 		};
 403 | 	});
 404 | 	const [neon, setNeon] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:neonatal"]>(() => {
 405 | 		const s = neonatalStore.state;
 406 | 		return {
 407 | 			assessmentsCount: s.assessments.length,
 408 | 			currentAssessmentId: s.currentAssessment?.id ?? null,
 409 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 410 | 			error: s.error
 411 | 		};
 412 | 	});
 413 | 	const [rx, setRx] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:prescription"]>(() => {
 414 | 		const s = prescriptionStore.state;
 415 | 		return {
 416 | 			prescriptionsCount: s.prescriptions.length,
 417 | 			activePrescriptionsCount: s.activePrescriptions.length,
 418 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 419 | 			error: s.error
 420 | 		};
 421 | 	});
 422 | 	const [vitals, setVitals] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:vitals"]>(() => {
 423 | 		const s = vitalSignsStore.state;
 424 | 		return { vitalsCount: s.vitals.length, hasTrends: s.trends !== null, isLoading: s.isLoading, error: s.error };
 425 | 	});
 426 | 
 427 | 	useEffect(() => {
 428 | 		const unsubs = [
 429 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:auth", e => setAuth(e.payload)),
 430 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:clinic", e => setClinic(e.payload)),
 431 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:patient", e => setPatient(e.payload)),
 432 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:appointment", e => setAppt(e.payload)),
 433 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:doctor", e => setDoctor(e.payload)),
 434 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:notification", e => setNotif(e.payload)),
 435 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:growth", e => setGrowth(e.payload)),
 436 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:immunization", e => setImmun(e.payload)),
 437 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:feeding", e => setFeed(e.payload)),
 438 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:milestones", e => setMiles(e.payload)),
 439 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:vaccine-schedule", e => setVacc(e.payload)),
 440 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:neonatal", e => setNeon(e.payload)),
 441 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:prescription", e => setRx(e.payload)),
 442 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:vitals", e => setVitals(e.payload))
 443 | 		];
 444 | 		return () =>
 445 | 			unsubs.forEach(fn => {
 446 | 				fn();
 447 | 			});
 448 | 	}, []);
 449 | 
 450 | 	const val = (v: string | number | boolean | null | undefined) => (v === null || v === undefined ? "—" : String(v));
 451 | 
 452 | 	const row = (label: string, value: string | number | boolean | null | undefined) => (
 453 | 		<>
 454 | 			<div className='whitespace-nowrap font-bold text-gray-500 text-sm'>{label}</div>
 455 | 			<div className='text-sm'>{val(value)}</div>
 456 | 		</>
 457 | 	);
 458 | 
 459 | 	return (
 460 | 		<div className='grid grid-cols-[1fr_10fr] gap-4 p-4 text-sm'>
 461 | 			{/* Auth */}
 462 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>Auth</div>
 463 | 			{row("Authenticated", auth.isAuthenticated)}
 464 | 			{row("User", auth.userName)}
 465 | 			{row("User ID", auth.userId)}
 466 | 			{row("Loading", auth.isLoading)}
 467 | 			{row("Error", auth.error)}
 468 | 
 469 | 			{/* Clinic */}
 470 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>Clinic</div>
 471 | 			{row("Current Clinic", clinic.currentClinicName)}
 472 | 			{row("Clinic ID", clinic.currentClinicId)}
 473 | 			{row("Total Clinics", clinic.clinicsCount)}
 474 | 			{row("Loading", clinic.isLoading)}
 475 | 
 476 | 			{/* Patient */}
 477 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>Patient</div>
 478 | 			{row("Loaded", patient.patientsCount)}
 479 | 			{row("Total", patient.totalCount)}
 480 | 			{row("Current", patient.currentPatientName)}
 481 | 			{row("Search", patient.filterSearch || "—")}
 482 | 			{row("Status Filter", patient.filterStatus)}
 483 | 
 484 | 			{/* Appointment */}
 485 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 486 | 				Appointment
 487 | 			</div>
 488 | 			{row("Count", appt.appointmentsCount)}
 489 | 			{row("Selected Date", appt.selectedDate)}
 490 | 			{row("View Mode", appt.viewMode)}
 491 | 
 492 | 			{/* Doctor */}
 493 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>Doctor</div>
 494 | 			{row("Count", doctor.doctorsCount)}
 495 | 			{row("Current", doctor.currentDoctorName)}
 496 | 			{row("Specialties", doctor.specialtiesCount)}
 497 | 
 498 | 			{/* Notifications */}
 499 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 500 | 				Notifications
 501 | 			</div>
 502 | 			{row("Total", notif.notificationsCount)}
 503 | 			{row("Unread", notif.unreadCount)}
 504 | 
 505 | 			{/* Growth */}
 506 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 507 | 				Growth Records
 508 | 			</div>
 509 | 			{row("Records", growth.recordsCount)}
 510 | 			{row("Chart Points", growth.chartDataPoints)}
 511 | 
 512 | 			{/* Immunization */}
 513 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 514 | 				Immunizations
 515 | 			</div>
 516 | 			{row("Total", immun.immunizationsCount)}
 517 | 			{row("Upcoming", immun.upcomingVaccinesCount)}
 518 | 
 519 | 			{/* Feeding */}
 520 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 521 | 				Feeding Logs
 522 | 			</div>
 523 | 			{row("Logs", feed.logsCount)}
 524 | 			{row("Total Feedings", feed.totalFeedings)}
 525 | 			{row("Avg Duration (min)", feed.averageDuration.toFixed(1))}
 526 | 			{row("Total Amount (mL)", feed.totalAmount.toFixed(1))}
 527 | 
 528 | 			{/* Milestones */}
 529 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 530 | 				Milestones
 531 | 			</div>
 532 | 			{row("Count", miles.milestonesCount)}
 533 | 			{row("Age Groups", miles.ageGroupsCount)}
 534 | 
 535 | 			{/* Vaccine Schedule */}
 536 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 537 | 				Vaccine Schedule
 538 | 			</div>
 539 | 			{row("Schedules", vacc.schedulesCount)}
 540 | 			{row("Mandatory", vacc.mandatoryCount)}
 541 | 
 542 | 			{/* Neonatal */}
 543 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>Neonatal</div>
 544 | 			{row("Assessments", neon.assessmentsCount)}
 545 | 			{row("Current", neon.currentAssessmentId)}
 546 | 
 547 | 			{/* Prescriptions */}
 548 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 549 | 				Prescriptions
 550 | 			</div>
 551 | 			{row("Total", rx.prescriptionsCount)}
 552 | 			{row("Active", rx.activePrescriptionsCount)}
 553 | 
 554 | 			{/* Vitals */}
 555 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 556 | 				Vital Signs
 557 | 			</div>
 558 | 			{row("Records", vitals.vitalsCount)}
 559 | 			{row("Has Trends", vitals.hasTrends)}
 560 | 		</div>
 561 | 	);
 562 | }
 563 | 
 564 | // ============================================================================
 565 | // Export — single object, matching the TanStack Devtools plugin shape
 566 | // ============================================================================
 567 | 
 568 | export default {
 569 | 	name: "TanStack Store",
 570 | 	render: <DevtoolPanel />
 571 | };

```

`lib/clinic.store.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // stores/index.ts
   2 | import { Store } from "@tanstack/store";
   3 | 
   4 | import type {
   5 | 	DbAppointment,
   6 | 	DbClinic,
   7 | 	DbDevelopmentalMilestones,
   8 | 	DbDoctor,
   9 | 	DbFeedingLog,
  10 | 	DbGrowthRecord,
  11 | 	DbImmunization,
  12 | 	DbLabTest,
  13 | 	DbNeonatalAssessment,
  14 | 	DbNotification,
  15 | 	DbPatient,
  16 | 	DbPayment,
  17 | 	DbPrescription,
  18 | 	DbService,
  19 | 	DbStaff,
  20 | 	DatabaseUser as DbUser,
  21 | 	DbVaccineSchedule,
  22 | 	DbVitalSign
  23 | } from "@/db/schema/types";
  24 | 
  25 | // ============================================================================
  26 | // Auth Store
  27 | // ============================================================================
  28 | 
  29 | interface AuthState {
  30 | 	user: DbUser | null;
  31 | 	isLoading: boolean;
  32 | 	error: string | null;
  33 | 	isAuthenticated: boolean;
  34 | 	sessionToken: string | null;
  35 | }
  36 | 
  37 | export const authStore = new Store<AuthState>({
  38 | 	user: null,
  39 | 	isLoading: false,
  40 | 	error: null,
  41 | 	isAuthenticated: false,
  42 | 	sessionToken: null
  43 | });
  44 | 
  45 | export const authActions = {
  46 | 	setUser: (user: DbUser | null) => {
  47 | 		authStore.setState(prev => ({
  48 | 			...prev,
  49 | 			user,
  50 | 			isAuthenticated: !!user
  51 | 		}));
  52 | 	},
  53 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
  54 | 		authStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
  55 | 	},
  56 | 	setError: (error: string | null) => {
  57 | 		authStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, error }));
  58 | 	},
  59 | 	logout: () => {
  60 | 		authStore.setState(() => ({
  61 | 			user: null,
  62 | 			isLoading: false,
  63 | 			error: null,
  64 | 			isAuthenticated: false,
  65 | 			sessionToken: null
  66 | 		}));
  67 | 	}
  68 | };
  69 | 
  70 | // ============================================================================
  71 | // Clinic Store
  72 | // ============================================================================
  73 | 
  74 | interface ClinicState {
  75 | 	currentClinic: DbClinic | null;
  76 | 	clinics: DbClinic[];
  77 | 	isLoading: boolean;
  78 | 	error: string | null;
  79 | }
  80 | 
  81 | export const clinicStore = new Store<ClinicState>({
  82 | 	currentClinic: null,
  83 | 	clinics: [],
  84 | 	isLoading: false,
  85 | 	error: null
  86 | });
  87 | 
  88 | export const clinicActions = {
  89 | 	setCurrentClinic: (clinic: DbClinic | null) => {
  90 | 		clinicStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentClinic: clinic }));
  91 | 	},
  92 | 	setClinics: (clinics: DbClinic[]) => {
  93 | 		clinicStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, clinics }));
  94 | 	},
  95 | 	addClinic: (clinic: DbClinic) => {
  96 | 		clinicStore.setState(state => ({
  97 | 			...state,
  98 | 			clinics: [...state.clinics, clinic]
  99 | 		}));
 100 | 	},
 101 | 	updateClinic: (id: string, updates: Partial<DbClinic>) => {
 102 | 		clinicStore.setState(state => ({
 103 | 			...state,
 104 | 			clinics: state.clinics.map(c => (c.id === id ? { ...c, ...updates } : c)),
 105 | 			currentClinic: state.currentClinic?.id === id ? { ...state.currentClinic, ...updates } : state.currentClinic
 106 | 		}));
 107 | 	},
 108 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 109 | 		clinicStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 110 | 	}
 111 | };
 112 | 
 113 | // ============================================================================
 114 | // Patient Store
 115 | // ============================================================================
 116 | 
 117 | interface PatientState {
 118 | 	patients: DbPatient[];
 119 | 	currentPatient: DbPatient | null;
 120 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 121 | 	error: string | null;
 122 | 	totalCount: number;
 123 | 	filters: {
 124 | 		search: string;
 125 | 		status: string | null;
 126 | 		dateRange: { start: Date | null; end: Date | null } | null;
 127 | 	};
 128 | }
 129 | 
 130 | export const patientStore = new Store<PatientState>({
 131 | 	patients: [],
 132 | 	currentPatient: null,
 133 | 	isLoading: false,
 134 | 	error: null,
 135 | 	totalCount: 0,
 136 | 	filters: {
 137 | 		search: "",
 138 | 		status: null,
 139 | 		dateRange: null
 140 | 	}
 141 | });
 142 | 
 143 | export const patientActions = {
 144 | 	setPatients: (patients: DbPatient[], totalCount?: number) => {
 145 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({
 146 | 			...state,
 147 | 			patients,
 148 | 			totalCount: totalCount ?? state.totalCount
 149 | 		}));
 150 | 	},
 151 | 	setCurrentPatient: (patient: DbPatient | null) => {
 152 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentPatient: patient }));
 153 | 	},
 154 | 	addPatient: (patient: DbPatient) => {
 155 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({
 156 | 			...state,
 157 | 			patients: [patient, ...state.patients],
 158 | 			totalCount: state.totalCount + 1
 159 | 		}));
 160 | 	},
 161 | 	updatePatient: (id: string, updates: Partial<DbPatient>) => {
 162 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({
 163 | 			...state,
 164 | 			patients: state.patients.map(p => (p.id === id ? { ...p, ...updates } : p)),
 165 | 			currentPatient:
 166 | 				state.currentPatient?.id === id ? { ...state.currentPatient, ...updates } : state.currentPatient
 167 | 		}));
 168 | 	},
 169 | 	deletePatient: (id: string) => {
 170 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({
 171 | 			...state,
 172 | 			patients: state.patients.filter(p => p.id !== id),
 173 | 			totalCount: state.totalCount - 1,
 174 | 			currentPatient: state.currentPatient?.id === id ? null : state.currentPatient
 175 | 		}));
 176 | 	},
 177 | 	setFilters: (filters: Partial<PatientState["filters"]>) => {
 178 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({
 179 | 			...state,
 180 | 			filters: { ...state.filters, ...filters }
 181 | 		}));
 182 | 	},
 183 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 184 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 185 | 	}
 186 | };
 187 | 
 188 | // ============================================================================
 189 | // Appointment Store
 190 | // ============================================================================
 191 | 
 192 | interface AppointmentState {
 193 | 	appointments: DbAppointment[];
 194 | 	currentAppointment: DbAppointment | null;
 195 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 196 | 	error: string | null;
 197 | 	selectedDate: Date | null;
 198 | 	viewMode: "day" | "week" | "month";
 199 | }
 200 | 
 201 | export const appointmentStore = new Store<AppointmentState>({
 202 | 	appointments: [],
 203 | 	currentAppointment: null,
 204 | 	isLoading: false,
 205 | 	error: null,
 206 | 	selectedDate: new Date(),
 207 | 	viewMode: "day"
 208 | });
 209 | 
 210 | export const appointmentActions = {
 211 | 	setAppointments: (appointments: DbAppointment[]) => {
 212 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, appointments }));
 213 | 	},
 214 | 	setCurrentAppointment: (appointment: DbAppointment | null) => {
 215 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentAppointment: appointment }));
 216 | 	},
 217 | 	addAppointment: (appointment: DbAppointment) => {
 218 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({
 219 | 			...state,
 220 | 			appointments: [...state.appointments, appointment]
 221 | 		}));
 222 | 	},
 223 | 	updateAppointment: (id: string, updates: Partial<DbAppointment>) => {
 224 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({
 225 | 			...state,
 226 | 			appointments: state.appointments.map(a => (a.id === id ? { ...a, ...updates } : a)),
 227 | 			currentAppointment:
 228 | 				state.currentAppointment?.id === id
 229 | 					? { ...state.currentAppointment, ...updates }
 230 | 					: state.currentAppointment
 231 | 		}));
 232 | 	},
 233 | 	deleteAppointment: (id: string) => {
 234 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({
 235 | 			...state,
 236 | 			appointments: state.appointments.filter(a => a.id !== id),
 237 | 			currentAppointment: state.currentAppointment?.id === id ? null : state.currentAppointment
 238 | 		}));
 239 | 	},
 240 | 	setSelectedDate: (date: Date | null) => {
 241 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, selectedDate: date }));
 242 | 	},
 243 | 	setViewMode: (viewMode: "day" | "week" | "month") => {
 244 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, viewMode }));
 245 | 	},
 246 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 247 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 248 | 	}
 249 | };

 289 | 		}));

 349 | // ============================================================================
 350 | // Notification Store
 351 | // ============================================================================
 352 | 
 353 | interface NotificationState {
 354 | 	notifications: DbNotification[];
 355 | 	unreadCount: number;
 356 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 357 | 	error: string | null;
 358 | }
 359 | 
 360 | export const notificationStore = new Store<NotificationState>({
 361 | 	notifications: [],
 362 | 	unreadCount: 0,
 363 | 	isLoading: false,
 364 | 	error: null
 365 | });
 366 | 
 367 | export const notificationActions = {
 368 | 	setNotifications: (notifications: DbNotification[]) => {
 369 | 		const unreadCount = notifications.filter(n => n.status === "unread").length;
 370 | 		notificationStore.setState(state => ({
 371 | 			...state,
 372 | 			notifications,
 373 | 			unreadCount
 374 | 		}));
 375 | 	},
 376 | 	addNotification: (notification: DbNotification) => {
 377 | 		notificationStore.setState(state => ({
 378 | 			...state,
 379 | 			notifications: [notification, ...state.notifications],
 380 | 			unreadCount: notification.status === "unread" ? state.unreadCount + 1 : state.unreadCount
 381 | 		}));
 382 | 	},
 383 | 	markAsRead: (id: string) => {
 384 | 		notificationStore.setState(state => {
 385 | 			const updated = state.notifications.map(n =>
 386 | 				n.id === id && n.status === "unread" ? { ...n, status: "read" as const } : n
 387 | 			);
 388 | 			const newUnreadCount = updated.filter(n => n.status === "unread").length;
 389 | 			return { ...state, notifications: updated, unreadCount: newUnreadCount };
 390 | 		});
 391 | 	},
 392 | 	markAllAsRead: () => {
 393 | 		notificationStore.setState(state => ({
 394 | 			...state,
 395 | 			notifications: state.notifications.map(n => ({ ...n, status: "read" as const })),
 396 | 			unreadCount: 0
 397 | 		}));
 398 | 	},
 399 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 400 | 		notificationStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 401 | 	}
 402 | };
 403 |

 405 | // Pediatric Store - Growth Records
 406 | // ============================================================================

 408 | interface GrowthRecordState {
 409 | 	records: DbGrowthRecord[];
 410 | 	currentRecord: DbGrowthRecord | null;
 411 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 412 | 	error: string | null;
 413 | 	chartData: { date: Date; weight: number; height: number; bmi: number }[];
 414 | }
 415 | 
 416 | export const growthRecordStore = new Store<GrowthRecordState>({
 417 | 	records: [],
 418 | 	currentRecord: null,
 419 | 	isLoading: false,
 420 | 	error: null,
 421 | 	chartData: []
 422 | });
 423 | 
 424 | export const growthRecordActions = {
 425 | 	setRecords: (records: DbGrowthRecord[]) => {
 426 | 		const chartData = records.map(r => ({
 427 | 			date: r.date,
 428 | 			weight: r.weight ?? 0,
 429 | 			height: r.height ?? 0,
 430 | 			bmi: r.bmi ?? 0
 431 | 		}));
 432 | 		growthRecordStore.setState(state => ({
 433 | 			...state,
 434 | 			records,
 435 | 			chartData
 436 | 		}));
 437 | 	},
 438 | 	addRecord: (record: DbGrowthRecord) => {
 439 | 		growthRecordStore.setState(state => ({
 440 | 			...state,
 441 | 			records: [...state.records, record],
 442 | 			chartData: [
 443 | 				...state.chartData,
 444 | 				{ date: record.date, weight: record.weight ?? 0, height: record.height ?? 0, bmi: record.bmi ?? 0 }
 445 | 			]
 446 | 		}));
 447 | 	},
 448 | 	setCurrentRecord: (record: DbGrowthRecord | null) => {
 449 | 		growthRecordStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentRecord: record }));
 450 | 	},
 451 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 452 | 		growthRecordStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 453 | 	}
 454 | };

 456 | // ============================================================================
 457 | // Pediatric Store - Immunizations
 458 | // ============================================================================
 459 | 
 460 | interface ImmunizationState {
 461 | 	immunizations: DbImmunization[];
 462 | 	upcomingVaccines: DbImmunization[];
 463 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 464 | 	error: string | null;
 465 | }
 466 | 
 467 | export const immunizationStore = new Store<ImmunizationState>({
 468 | 	immunizations: [],
 469 | 	upcomingVaccines: [],
 470 | 	isLoading: false,
 471 | 	error: null
 472 | });
 473 | 
 474 | export const immunizationActions = {
 475 | 	setImmunizations: (immunizations: DbImmunization[]) => {
 476 | 		const upcoming = immunizations.filter(i => i.status === "PENDING" || i.isOverDue);
 477 | 		immunizationStore.setState(state => ({
 478 | 			...state,
 479 | 			immunizations,
 480 | 			upcomingVaccines: upcoming
 481 | 		}));
 482 | 	},
 483 | 	addImmunization: (immunization: DbImmunization) => {
 484 | 		immunizationStore.setState(state => ({
 485 | 			...state,
 486 | 			immunizations: [...state.immunizations, immunization],
 487 | 			upcomingVaccines:
 488 | 				immunization.status === "PENDING" || immunization.isOverDue
 489 | 					? [...state.upcomingVaccines, immunization]
 490 | 					: state.upcomingVaccines
 491 | 		}));
 492 | 	},
 493 | 	updateImmunization: (id: string, updates: Partial<DbImmunization>) => {
 494 | 		immunizationStore.setState(state => ({
 495 | 			...state,
 496 | 			immunizations: state.immunizations.map(i => (i.id === id ? { ...i, ...updates } : i)),
 497 | 			upcomingVaccines: state.upcomingVaccines.filter(i => i.id !== id)
 498 | 		}));
 499 | 	},
 500 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 501 | 		immunizationStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 502 | 	}
 503 | };
 504 | 
 505 | // ============================================================================
 506 | // Pediatric Store - Feeding Logs
 507 | // ============================================================================
 508 | 
 509 | interface FeedingLogState {
 510 | 	logs: DbFeedingLog[];
 511 | 	currentLog: DbFeedingLog | null;
 512 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 513 | 	error: string | null;
 514 | 	stats: {
 515 | 		totalFeedings: number;
 516 | 		byType: Record<string, number>;
 517 | 		averageDuration: number;
 518 | 		totalAmount: number;
 519 | 	} | null;
 520 | }
 521 | 
 522 | export const feedingLogStore = new Store<FeedingLogState>({
 523 | 	logs: [],
 524 | 	currentLog: null,
 525 | 	isLoading: false,
 526 | 	error: null,
 527 | 	stats: null
 528 | });
 529 | 
 530 | export const feedingLogActions = {
 531 | 	setLogs: (logs: DbFeedingLog[]) => {
 532 | 		const byType: Record<string, number> = {};
 533 | 		let totalDuration = 0;
 534 | 		let totalAmount = 0;
 535 | 
 536 | 		logs.forEach(log => {
 537 | 			byType[log.type] = (byType[log.type] || 0) + 1;
 538 | 			totalDuration += log.duration ?? 0;
 539 | 			totalAmount += log.amount ?? 0;
 540 | 		});
 541 | 
 542 | 		const stats = {
 543 | 			totalFeedings: logs.length,
 544 | 			byType,
 545 | 			averageDuration: logs.length ? totalDuration / logs.length : 0,
 546 | 			totalAmount
 547 | 		};
 548 | 
 549 | 		feedingLogStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, logs, stats }));
 550 | 	},
 551 | 	addLog: (log: DbFeedingLog) => {
 552 | 		feedingLogStore.setState(state => ({
 553 | 			...state,
 554 | 			logs: [...state.logs, log]
 555 | 		}));
 556 | 		feedingLogActions.setLogs([...feedingLogStore.state.logs, log]);
 557 | 	},
 558 | 	setCurrentLog: (log: DbFeedingLog | null) => {
 559 | 		feedingLogStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentLog: log }));
 560 | 	},
 561 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 562 | 		feedingLogStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 563 | 	}
 564 | };
 565 | 
 566 | // ============================================================================
 567 | // Pediatric Store - Developmental Milestones
 568 | // ============================================================================
 569 | 
 570 | interface MilestonesState {
 571 | 	milestones: DbDevelopmentalMilestones[];
 572 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 573 | 	error: string | null;
 574 | 	byAgeGroup: Record<string, DbDevelopmentalMilestones[]>;
 575 | }
 576 | 
 577 | export const milestonesStore = new Store<MilestonesState>({
 578 | 	milestones: [],
 579 | 	isLoading: false,
 580 | 	error: null,
 581 | 	byAgeGroup: {}
 582 | });
 583 | 
 584 | export const milestoneActions = {
 585 | 	setMilestones: (milestones: DbDevelopmentalMilestones[]) => {
 586 | 		const byAgeGroup: Record<string, DbDevelopmentalMilestones[]> = {};
 587 | 		milestones.forEach(m => {
 588 | 			const age = m.dateRecorded.getFullYear();
 589 | 			if (!byAgeGroup[age]) byAgeGroup[age] = [];
 590 | 			byAgeGroup[age].push(m);
 591 | 		});
 592 | 		milestonesStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, milestones, byAgeGroup }));
 593 | 	},
 594 | 	addMilestone: (milestone: DbDevelopmentalMilestones) => {
 595 | 		milestonesStore.setState(state => ({
 596 | 			...state,
 597 | 			milestones: [...state.milestones, milestone]
 598 | 		}));
 599 | 		milestoneActions.setMilestones([...milestonesStore.state.milestones, milestone]);
 600 | 	},
 601 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 602 | 		milestonesStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 603 | 	}
 604 | };
 605 |

 675 | // Prescription Store
 676 | // ============================================================================
 677 | 
 678 | interface PrescriptionState {
 679 | 	prescriptions: DbPrescription[];
 680 | 	currentPrescription: DbPrescription | null;
 681 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 682 | 	error: string | null;
 683 | 	activePrescriptions: DbPrescription[];
 684 | }
 685 | 
 686 | export const prescriptionStore = new Store<PrescriptionState>({
 687 | 	prescriptions: [],
 688 | 	currentPrescription: null,
 689 | 	isLoading: false,
 690 | 	error: null,
 691 | 	activePrescriptions: []
 692 | });
 693 | 
 694 | export const prescriptionActions = {
 695 | 	setPrescriptions: (prescriptions: DbPrescription[]) => {
 696 | 		const active = prescriptions.filter(p => p.status === "active" || p.status === "on_hold");
 697 | 		prescriptionStore.setState(state => ({
 698 | 			...state,
 699 | 			prescriptions,
 700 | 			activePrescriptions: active
 701 | 		}));
 702 | 	},
 703 | 	setCurrentPrescription: (prescription: DbPrescription | null) => {
 704 | 		prescriptionStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentPrescription: prescription }));
 705 | 	},
 706 | 	addPrescription: (prescription: DbPrescription) => {
 707 | 		prescriptionStore.setState(state => ({
 708 | 			...state,
 709 | 			prescriptions: [...state.prescriptions, prescription],
 710 | 			activePrescriptions:
 711 | 				prescription.status === "active" || prescription.status === "on_hold"
 712 | 					? [...state.activePrescriptions, prescription]
 713 | 					: state.activePrescriptions
 714 | 		}));
 715 | 	},
 716 | 	updatePrescription: (id: string, updates: Partial<DbPrescription>) => {
 717 | 		prescriptionStore.setState(state => ({
 718 | 			...state,
 719 | 			prescriptions: state.prescriptions.map(p => (p.id === id ? { ...p, ...updates } : p)),
 720 | 			activePrescriptions: state.activePrescriptions.filter(p => p.id !== id),
 721 | 			currentPrescription:
 722 | 				state.currentPrescription?.id === id
 723 | 					? { ...state.currentPrescription, ...updates }
 724 | 					: state.currentPrescription
 725 | 		}));
 726 | 	},
 727 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 728 | 		prescriptionStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 729 | 	}
 730 | };
 731 | 
 732 | // ============================================================================
 733 | // Vital Signs Store
 734 | // ============================================================================
 735 | 
 736 | interface VitalSignsState {
 737 | 	vitals: DbVitalSign[];
 738 | 	currentVitals: DbVitalSign | null;
 739 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 740 | 	error: string | null;
 741 | 	trends: {
 742 | 		systolic: number[];
 743 | 		diastolic: number[];
 744 | 		heartRate: number[];
 745 | 		recordedAt: Date[];
 746 | 	} | null;
 747 | }
 748 | 
 749 | export const vitalSignsStore = new Store<VitalSignsState>({
 750 | 	vitals: [],
 751 | 	currentVitals: null,
 752 | 	isLoading: false,
 753 | 	error: null,
 754 | 	trends: null
 755 | });
 756 | 
 757 | export const vitalSignsActions = {
 758 | 	setVitals: (vitals: DbVitalSign[]) => {
 759 | 		const sorted = [...vitals].sort((a, b) => new Date(a.recordedAt).getTime() - new Date(b.recordedAt).getTime());
 760 | 		const trends = {
 761 | 			systolic: sorted.map(v => v.systolic ?? 0),
 762 | 			diastolic: sorted.map(v => v.diastolic ?? 0),
 763 | 			heartRate: sorted.map(v => v.heartRate ?? 0),
 764 | 			recordedAt: sorted.map(v => v.recordedAt)
 765 | 		};
 766 | 		vitalSignsStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, vitals: sorted, trends }));
 767 | 	},
 768 | 	addVitals: (vitals: DbVitalSign) => {
 769 | 		vitalSignsStore.setState(state => ({
 770 | 			...state,
 771 | 			vitals: [...state.vitals, vitals]
 772 | 		}));
 773 | 		vitalSignsActions.setVitals([...vitalSignsStore.state.vitals, vitals]);
 774 | 	},
 775 | 	setCurrentVitals: (vitals: DbVitalSign | null) => {
 776 | 		vitalSignsStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentVitals: vitals }));
 777 | 	},
 778 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 779 | 		vitalSignsStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 780 | 	}
 781 | };
 782 | 
 783 | // ============================================================================
 784 | // Service Store
 785 | // ============================================================================
 786 | 
 787 | interface ServiceState {
 788 | 	services: DbService[];
 789 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 790 | 	error: string | null;
 791 | 	categories: string[];
 792 | }
 793 | 
 794 | export const serviceStore = new Store<ServiceState>({
 795 | 	services: [],
 796 | 	isLoading: false,
 797 | 	error: null,
 798 | 	categories: []
 799 | });
 800 | 
 801 | export const serviceActions = {
 802 | 	setServices: (services: DbService[]) => {
 803 | 		const categories = [...new Set(services.map(s => s.category).filter(Boolean))] as string[];
 804 | 		serviceStore.setState(state => ({
 805 | 			...state,
 806 | 			services,
 807 | 			categories
 808 | 		}));
 809 | 	},
 810 | 	addService: (service: DbService) => {
 811 | 		serviceStore.setState(state => ({
 812 | 			...state,
 813 | 			services: [...state.services, service]
 814 | 		}));
 815 | 		serviceActions.setServices([...serviceStore.state.services, service]);
 816 | 	},
 817 | 	updateService: (id: string, updates: Partial<DbService>) => {
 818 | 		serviceStore.setState(state => ({
 819 | 			...state,
 820 | 			services: state.services.map(s => (s.id === id ? { ...s, ...updates } : s))
 821 | 		}));
 822 | 	},
 823 | 	deleteService: (id: string) => {
 824 | 		serviceStore.setState(state => ({
 825 | 			...state,
 826 | 			services: state.services.filter(s => s.id !== id)
 827 | 		}));
 828 | 	},
 829 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 830 | 		serviceStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 831 | 	}
 832 | };
 833 | 
 834 | // ============================================================================
 835 | // Payment Store
 836 | // ============================================================================
 837 | 
 838 | interface PaymentState {
 839 | 	payments: DbPayment[];
 840 | 	currentPayment: DbPayment | null;
 841 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 842 | 	error: string | null;
 843 | 	totalRevenue: number;
 844 | 	pendingAmount: number;
 845 | }
 846 | 
 847 | export const paymentStore = new Store<PaymentState>({
 848 | 	payments: [],
 849 | 	currentPayment: null,
 850 | 	isLoading: false,
 851 | 	error: null,
 852 | 	totalRevenue: 0,
 853 | 	pendingAmount: 0
 854 | });
 855 | 
 856 | export const paymentActions = {
 857 | 	setPayments: (payments: DbPayment[]) => {
 858 | 		const totalRevenue = payments
 859 | 			.filter(p => p.status === "PAID")
 860 | 			.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.amountPaid ?? p.amount ?? 0), 0);
 861 | 		const pendingAmount = payments
 862 | 			.filter(p => p.status === "PENDING" || p.status === "PARTIAL")
 863 | 			.reduce((sum, p) => sum + ((p.totalAmount ?? p.amount ?? 0) - (p.amountPaid ?? 0)), 0);
 864 | 		paymentStore.setState(state => ({
 865 | 			...state,
 866 | 			payments,
 867 | 			totalRevenue,
 868 | 			pendingAmount
 869 | 		}));
 870 | 	},
 871 | 	addPayment: (payment: DbPayment) => {
 872 | 		paymentStore.setState(state => ({
 873 | 			...state,
 874 | 			payments: [...state.payments, payment]
 875 | 		}));
 876 | 		paymentActions.setPayments([...paymentStore.state.payments, payment]);
 877 | 	},
 878 | 	setCurrentPayment: (payment: DbPayment | null) => {
 879 | 		paymentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentPayment: payment }));
 880 | 	},
 881 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 882 | 		paymentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 883 | 	}
 884 | };
 885 | 
 886 | // ============================================================================
 887 | // Lab Test Store
 888 | // ============================================================================
 889 | 
 890 | interface LabTestState {
 891 | 	labTests: DbLabTest[];
 892 | 	currentLabTest: DbLabTest | null;
 893 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 894 | 	error: string | null;
 895 | 	pendingTests: DbLabTest[];
 896 | }
 897 | 
 898 | export const labTestStore = new Store<LabTestState>({
 899 | 	labTests: [],
 900 | 	currentLabTest: null,
 901 | 	isLoading: false,
 902 | 	error: null,
 903 | 	pendingTests: []
 904 | });
 905 | 
 906 | export const labTestActions = {
 907 | 	setLabTests: (labTests: DbLabTest[]) => {
 908 | 		const pending = labTests.filter(t => t.status === "PENDING" || t.status === "IN_PROGRESS");
 909 | 		labTestStore.setState(state => ({
 910 | 			...state,
 911 | 			labTests,
 912 | 			pendingTests: pending
 913 | 		}));
 914 | 	},
 915 | 	addLabTest: (labTest: DbLabTest) => {
 916 | 		labTestStore.setState(state => ({
 917 | 			...state,
 918 | 			labTests: [...state.labTests, labTest],
 919 | 			pendingTests:
 920 | 				labTest.status === "PENDING" || labTest.status === "IN_PROGRESS"
 921 | 					? [...state.pendingTests, labTest]
 922 | 					: state.pendingTests
 923 | 		}));
 924 | 	},
 925 | 	updateLabTest: (id: string, updates: Partial<DbLabTest>) => {
 926 | 		labTestStore.setState(state => ({
 927 | 			...state,
 928 | 			labTests: state.labTests.map(t => (t.id === id ? { ...t, ...updates } : t)),
 929 | 			pendingTests: state.pendingTests.filter(t => t.id !== id)
 930 | 		}));
 931 | 	},
 932 | 	setCurrentLabTest: (labTest: DbLabTest | null) => {
 933 | 		labTestStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentLabTest: labTest }));
 934 | 	},
 935 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 936 | 		labTestStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 937 | 	}
 938 | };
 939 | 
 940 | // ============================================================================
 941 | // UI Store (for global UI state)
 942 | // ============================================================================
 943 | 
 944 | interface UIState {
 945 | 	sidebarOpen: boolean;
 946 | 	theme: "light" | "dark" | "system";
 947 | 	notificationsEnabled: boolean;
 948 | 	currentModule: "dashboard" | "patients" | "appointments" | "prescriptions" | "pediatrics" | "billing" | "reports";
 949 | 	loadingOverlay: boolean;
 950 | 	toasts: Array<{ id: string; message: string; type: "success" | "error" | "info" | "warning" }>;
 951 | }
 952 | 
 953 | export const uiStore = new Store<UIState>({
 954 | 	sidebarOpen: true,
 955 | 	theme: "system",
 956 | 	notificationsEnabled: true,
 957 | 	currentModule: "dashboard",
 958 | 	loadingOverlay: false,
 959 | 	toasts: []
 960 | });
 961 | 
 962 | export const uiActions = {
 963 | 	toggleSidebar: () => {
 964 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, sidebarOpen: !state.sidebarOpen }));
 965 | 	},
 966 | 	setTheme: (theme: UIState["theme"]) => {
 967 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, theme }));
 968 | 	},
 969 | 	setCurrentModule: (module: UIState["currentModule"]) => {
 970 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentModule: module }));
 971 | 	},
 972 | 	setLoadingOverlay: (loading: boolean) => {
 973 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, loadingOverlay: loading }));
 974 | 	},
 975 | 	addToast: (toast: { message: string; type: UIState["toasts"][number]["type"] }) => {
 976 | 		const id = Date.now().toString();
 977 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({
 978 | 			...state,
 979 | 			toasts: [...state.toasts, { id, message: toast.message, type: toast.type }]
 980 | 		}));
 981 | 		setTimeout(() => {
 982 | 			uiStore.setState(state => ({
 983 | 				...state,
 984 | 				toasts: state.toasts.filter(t => t.id !== id)
 985 | 			}));
 986 | 		}, 5000);
 987 | 	},
 988 | 	removeToast: (id: string) => {
 989 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({
 990 | 			...state,
 991 | 			toasts: state.toasts.filter(t => t.id !== id)
 992 | 		}));
 993 | 	}
 994 | };
 995 | 
 996 | // ============================================================================
 997 | // Example derived store (full name pattern)
 998 | // ============================================================================
 999 | 
1000 | export const demoStore = new Store({
1001 | 	firstName: "Jane",
1002 | 	lastName: "Smith"
1003 | });
1004 | 
1005 | export const fullName = new Store(`${demoStore.state.firstName} ${demoStore.state.lastName}`);
1006 | 
1007 | demoStore.subscribe(() => {
1008 | 	fullName.setState(() => `${demoStore.state.firstName} ${demoStore.state.lastName}`);
1009 | });
```
