`lib/compose-refs.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import * as React from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | type PossibleRef<T> = React.Ref<T> | undefined;
   4 | 
   5 | /**
   6 |  * Set a given ref to a given value
   7 |  * This utility takes care of different types of refs: callback refs and RefObject(s)
   8 |  */
   9 | function setRef<T>(ref: PossibleRef<T>, value: T) {
  10 | 	if (typeof ref === "function") {
  11 | 		return ref(value);
  12 | 	}
  13 | 
  14 | 	if (ref !== null && ref !== undefined) {
  15 | 		ref.current = value;
  16 | 	}
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | /**
  20 |  * A utility to compose multiple refs together
  21 |  * Accepts callback refs and RefObject(s)
  22 |  */
  23 | function composeRefs<T>(...refs: PossibleRef<T>[]): React.RefCallback<T> {
  24 | 	return node => {
  25 | 		let hasCleanup = false;
  26 | 		const cleanups = refs.map(ref => {
  27 | 			const cleanup = setRef(ref, node);
  28 | 			if (!hasCleanup && typeof cleanup === "function") {
  29 | 				hasCleanup = true;
  30 | 			}
  31 | 			return cleanup;
  32 | 		});
  33 | 
  34 | 		// React <19 will log an error to the console if a callback ref returns a
  35 | 		// value. We don't use ref cleanups internally so this will only happen if a
  36 | 		// user's ref callback returns a value, which we only expect if they are
  37 | 		// using the cleanup functionality added in React 19.
  38 | 		if (hasCleanup) {
  39 | 			return () => {
  40 | 				for (let i = 0; i < cleanups.length; i++) {
  41 | 					const cleanup = cleanups[i];
  42 | 					if (typeof cleanup === "function") {
  43 | 						cleanup();
  44 | 					} else {
  45 | 						setRef(refs[i], null);
  46 | 					}
  47 | 				}
  48 | 			};
  49 | 		}
  50 | 	};
  51 | }
  52 | 
  53 | /**
  54 |  * A custom hook that composes multiple refs
  55 |  * Accepts callback refs and RefObject(s)
  56 |  */
  57 | function useComposedRefs<T>(...refs: PossibleRef<T>[]): React.RefCallback<T> {
  58 | 	// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  59 | 	return React.useCallback(composeRefs(...refs), [...refs]);
  60 | }
  61 | 
  62 | export { composeRefs, useComposedRefs };

```

`lib/data-table.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import type { Column } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   2 | 
   3 | import { dataTableConfig } from "#/config/data-table";
   4 | import type { ExtendedColumnFilter, FilterOperator, FilterVariant } from "#/types/data-table";
   5 | 
   6 | export function getCommonPinningStyles<TData>({ column }: { column: Column<TData> }): React.CSSProperties {
   7 | 	const isPinned = column.getIsPinned();
   8 | 	const isLastLeftPinnedColumn = isPinned === "left" && column.getIsLastColumn("left");
   9 | 	const isFirstRightPinnedColumn = isPinned === "right" && column.getIsFirstColumn("right");
  10 | 
  11 | 	return {
  12 | 		boxShadow: isLastLeftPinnedColumn
  13 | 			? "-5px 0 5px -5px var(--border) inset"
  14 | 			: isFirstRightPinnedColumn
  15 | 				? "5px 0 5px -5px var(--border) inset"
  16 | 				: undefined,
  17 | 		left: isPinned === "left" ? `${column.getStart("left")}px` : undefined,
  18 | 		right: isPinned === "right" ? `${column.getAfter("right")}px` : undefined,
  19 | 		position: isPinned ? "sticky" : "relative",
  20 | 		background: isPinned ? "var(--background)" : undefined,
  21 | 		width: column.getSize(),
  22 | 		zIndex: isPinned ? 1 : 0
  23 | 	};
  24 | }
  25 | 
  26 | export function getFilterOperators(filterVariant: FilterVariant) {
  27 | 	const operatorMap: Record<FilterVariant, { label: string; value: FilterOperator }[]> = {
  28 | 		text: dataTableConfig.textOperators,
  29 | 		number: dataTableConfig.numericOperators,
  30 | 		range: dataTableConfig.numericOperators,
  31 | 		date: dataTableConfig.dateOperators,
  32 | 		dateRange: dataTableConfig.dateOperators,
  33 | 		boolean: dataTableConfig.booleanOperators,
  34 | 		select: dataTableConfig.selectOperators,
  35 | 		multiSelect: dataTableConfig.multiSelectOperators
  36 | 	};
  37 | 
  38 | 	return operatorMap[filterVariant] ?? dataTableConfig.textOperators;
  39 | }
  40 | 
  41 | export function getDefaultFilterOperator(filterVariant: FilterVariant) {
  42 | 	const operators = getFilterOperators(filterVariant);
  43 | 
  44 | 	return operators[0]?.value ?? (filterVariant === "text" ? "iLike" : "eq");
  45 | }
  46 | 
  47 | export function getValidFilters<TData>(filters: ExtendedColumnFilter<TData>[]): ExtendedColumnFilter<TData>[] {
  48 | 	return filters.filter(
  49 | 		filter =>
  50 | 			filter.operator === "isEmpty" ||
  51 | 			filter.operator === "isNotEmpty" ||
  52 | 			(Array.isArray(filter.value)
  53 | 				? filter.value.length > 0
  54 | 				: filter.value !== "" && filter.value !== null && filter.value !== undefined)
  55 | 	);
  56 | }

```

`lib/email.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { Resend } from "resend";
   2 | 
   3 | const resend = new Resend(process.env.RESEND_API_KEY);
   4 | 
   5 | // ─── Generic types ───────────────────────────────────────
   6 | 
   7 | type OrderItem = {
   8 | 	name: string;
   9 | 	price: string;
  10 | 	quantity: number;
  11 | 	image: string;
  12 | };
  13 | 
  14 | type StoreConfig = {
  15 | 	name: string;
  16 | 	from: string;
  17 | 	ordersUrl: string;
  18 | 	colors?: {
  19 | 		primary?: string;
  20 | 		background?: string;
  21 | 		text?: string;
  22 | 		muted?: string;
  23 | 		border?: string;
  24 | 	};
  25 | };
  26 | 
  27 | type OrderEmailData = {
  28 | 	to: string;
  29 | 	customerName: string;
  30 | 	orderId: string;
  31 | 	total: string;
  32 | 	items: OrderItem[];
  33 | };
  34 | 
  35 | // ─── Email builder ───────────────────────────────────────
  36 | 
  37 | export async function sendOrderConfirmationEmail(store: StoreConfig, order: OrderEmailData) {
  38 | 	const c = {
  39 | 		primary: store.colors?.primary ?? "#0f172a",
  40 | 		background: store.colors?.background ?? "#f8fafc",
  41 | 		text: store.colors?.text ?? "#0f172a",
  42 | 		muted: store.colors?.muted ?? "#64748b",
  43 | 		border: store.colors?.border ?? "#e2e8f0"
  44 | 	};
  45 | 
  46 | 	const itemRows = order.items
  47 | 		.map(
  48 | 			item =>
  49 | 				`<tr>
  50 |           <td style="padding:12px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid ${c.border};">
  51 |             <img src="${item.image}" alt="${item.name}" width="48" height="48" style="border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover;" />
  52 |           </td>
  53 |           <td style="padding:12px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid ${c.border};font-size:14px;color:${c.text};">
  54 |             ${item.name}
  55 |           </td>
  56 |           <td style="padding:12px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid ${c.border};font-size:14px;text-align:center;color:${c.text};">
  57 |             ${item.quantity}
  58 |           </td>
  59 |           <td style="padding:12px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid ${c.border};font-size:14px;text-align:right;color:${c.text};">
  60 |             $${(Number(item.price) * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}
  61 |           </td>
  62 |         </tr>`
  63 | 		)
  64 | 		.join("");
  65 | 
  66 | 	const html = `
  67 |     <div style="font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto;padding:20px;">
  68 |       <div style="text-align:center;padding:24px 0;border-bottom:2px solid ${c.border};">
  69 |         <h1 style="margin:0;font-size:24px;color:${c.text};">Order Confirmed! ✓</h1>
  70 |         <p style="margin:8px 0 0;font-size:13px;color:${c.muted};">${store.name}</p>
  71 |       </div>
  72 | 
  73 |       <div style="padding:24px 0;">
  74 |         <p style="font-size:16px;color:${c.text};">Hi ${order.customerName},</p>
  75 |         <p style="font-size:14px;color:${c.muted};">
  76 |           Thank you for your purchase. Here's a summary of your order.
  77 |         </p>
  78 |       </div>
  79 | 
  80 |       <div style="background:${c.background};border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:24px;">
  81 |         <p style="margin:0 0 4px;font-size:12px;color:${c.muted};text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;">Order ID</p>
  82 |         <p style="margin:0;font-size:14px;color:${c.text};font-family:monospace;">${order.orderId}</p>
  83 |       </div>
  84 | 
  85 |       <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;">
  86 |         <thead>
  87 |           <tr style="border-bottom:2px solid ${c.border};">
  88 |             <th style="padding:8px;text-align:left;font-size:12px;color:${c.muted};text-transform:uppercase;"></th>
  89 |             <th style="padding:8px;text-align:left;font-size:12px;color:${c.muted};text-transform:uppercase;">Product</th>
  90 |             <th style="padding:8px;text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:${c.muted};text-transform:uppercase;">Qty</th>
  91 |             <th style="padding:8px;text-align:right;font-size:12px;color:${c.muted};text-transform:uppercase;">Subtotal</th>
  92 |           </tr>
  93 |         </thead>
  94 |         <tbody>
  95 |           ${itemRows}
  96 |         </tbody>
  97 |       </table>
  98 | 
  99 |       <div style="text-align:right;padding:16px 8px;border-top:2px solid ${c.text};margin-top:8px;">
 100 |         <span style="font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:${c.text};">Total: $${Number(order.total).toFixed(2)}</span>
 101 |       </div>
 102 | 
 103 |       <div style="text-align:center;padding:32px 0 16px;">
 104 |         <a href="${store.ordersUrl}" style="display:inline-block;background:${c.primary};color:#ffffff;padding:12px 32px;border-radius:8px;text-decoration:none;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;">
 105 |           View My Orders
 106 |         </a>
 107 |       </div>
 108 | 
 109 |       <div style="text-align:center;padding:16px 0;border-top:1px solid ${c.border};">
 110 |         <p style="font-size:12px;color:${c.muted};margin:0;">
 111 |           This email was sent by ${store.name}.
 112 |         </p>
 113 |       </div>
 114 |     </div>
 115 |   `;
 116 | 
 117 | 	const { error } = await resend.emails.send({
 118 | 		from: store.from,
 119 | 		to: order.to,
 120 | 		subject: `Order Confirmed — ${order.orderId.slice(0, 8)}`,
 121 | 		html
 122 | 	});
 123 | 
 124 | 	if (error) {
 125 | 		console.error(`[${store.name}] Failed to send confirmation email:`, error);
 126 | 	}
 127 | }

```

`lib/format.ts`:

```ts
   1 | export function formatDate(date: Date | string | number | undefined, opts: Intl.DateTimeFormatOptions = {}) {
   2 | 	if (!date) return "";
   3 | 
   4 | 	try {
   5 | 		return new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
   6 | 			month: opts.month ?? "long",
   7 | 			day: opts.day ?? "numeric",
   8 | 			year: opts.year ?? "numeric",
   9 | 			...opts
  10 | 		}).format(new Date(date));
  11 | 	} catch {
  12 | 		return "";
  13 | 	}
  14 | }
```

```ts
   1 | import { transformUrl } from "unpic";
   2 | 
   3 | export function getOptimizedUrl(src: string, width: number, height: number, quality: number) {
   4 | 	return (
   5 | 		transformUrl(
   6 | 			{
   7 | 				url: src,
   8 | 				width,
   9 | 				height,
  10 | 				quality,
  11 | 				provider: "cloudflare"
  12 | 			},
  13 | 			{
  14 | 				cloudflare: {
  15 | 					f: "auto",
  16 | 					format: "auto"
  17 | 				}
  18 | 			},
  19 | 			{
  20 | 				cloudflare: {
  21 | 					domain: "tanstack-faster.tancn.dev"
  22 | 				}
  23 | 			}
  24 | 		) || src
  25 | 	);
  26 | }
```

`lib/parsers.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { z } from "zod";
   2 | 
   3 | import { dataTableConfig } from "#/config/data-table";
   4 | import type { ExtendedColumnFilter, ExtendedColumnSort } from "#/types/data-table";
   5 | 
   6 | const sortingItemSchema = z.object({
   7 | 	id: z.string(),
   8 | 	desc: z.boolean()
   9 | });
  10 | 
  11 | export function parseSortingState<TData>(
  12 | 	value: string | undefined,
  13 | 	columnIds?: string[] | Set<string>
  14 | ): ExtendedColumnSort<TData>[] {
  15 | 	if (!value) return [];
  16 | 	const validKeys = columnIds ? (columnIds instanceof Set ? columnIds : new Set(columnIds)) : null;
  17 | 
  18 | 	try {
  19 | 		const parsed = JSON.parse(value);
  20 | 		const result = z.array(sortingItemSchema).safeParse(parsed);
  21 | 		if (!result.success) return [];
  22 | 		if (validKeys && result.data.some(item => !validKeys.has(item.id))) return [];
  23 | 		return result.data as ExtendedColumnSort<TData>[];
  24 | 	} catch {
  25 | 		return [];
  26 | 	}
  27 | }
  28 | 
  29 | export function serializeSortingState<TData>(value: ExtendedColumnSort<TData>[]): string {
  30 | 	return JSON.stringify(value);
  31 | }
  32 | 
  33 | const filterItemSchema = z.object({
  34 | 	id: z.string(),
  35 | 	value: z.union([z.string(), z.array(z.string())]),
  36 | 	variant: z.enum(dataTableConfig.filterVariants),
  37 | 	operator: z.enum(dataTableConfig.operators),
  38 | 	filterId: z.string()
  39 | });
  40 | 
  41 | export type FilterItemSchema = z.infer<typeof filterItemSchema>;
  42 | 
  43 | export function parseFiltersState<TData>(
  44 | 	value: string | undefined,
  45 | 	columnIds?: string[] | Set<string>
  46 | ): ExtendedColumnFilter<TData>[] {
  47 | 	if (!value) return [];
  48 | 	const validKeys = columnIds ? (columnIds instanceof Set ? columnIds : new Set(columnIds)) : null;
  49 | 
  50 | 	try {
  51 | 		const parsed = JSON.parse(value);
  52 | 		const result = z.array(filterItemSchema).safeParse(parsed);
  53 | 		if (!result.success) return [];
  54 | 		if (validKeys && result.data.some(item => !validKeys.has(item.id))) return [];
  55 | 		return result.data as ExtendedColumnFilter<TData>[];
  56 | 	} catch {
  57 | 		return [];
  58 | 	}
  59 | }
  60 | 
  61 | export function serializeFiltersState<TData>(value: ExtendedColumnFilter<TData>[]): string {
  62 | 	return JSON.stringify(value);
  63 | }

```

`lib/prefetch-images.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { createIsomorphicFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   2 | 
   3 | import type { DbDoctor, DbPatient } from "../db/schema";
   4 | import { getEagerImageCount } from "./get-eager-image-count";
   5 | import { getOptimizedUrl } from "./image-optimization";
   6 | 
   7 | export interface SeenSetManager {
   8 | 	isSeen: (src: string) => boolean;
   9 | 	markSeen: (src: string) => void;
  10 | }
  11 | 
  12 | export type PrefetchImage = {
  13 | 	src: string;
  14 | 	srcset?: string | null;
  15 | 	sizes?: string | null;
  16 | 	loading?: string;
  17 | 	width?: number;
  18 | 	height?: number;
  19 | 	quality?: number;
  20 | 	alt?: string;
  21 | };
  22 | 
  23 | /**
  24 |  * Prefetch patient profile images for quick loading in lists and dashboards
  25 |  */
  26 | export const prefetchPatientImages = createIsomorphicFn().client(
  27 | 	async (patients: DbPatient[], seenManager: SeenSetManager) => {
  28 | 		const eagerCount = getEagerImageCount();
  29 | 		let count = 0;
  30 | 		const images: PrefetchImage[] = patients
  31 | 			.filter(patient => patient.image)
  32 | 			.map(patient => ({
  33 | 				src: getOptimizedUrl(patient.image ?? "/placeholder-patient.webp", 64, 64, 70),
  34 | 				alt: `${patient.firstName} ${patient.lastName}`,
  35 | 				loading: count++ < eagerCount ? "eager" : "lazy",
  36 | 				width: 64,
  37 | 				height: 64,
  38 | 				quality: 70
  39 | 			}));
  40 | 
  41 | 		prefetchImages(images, seenManager);
  42 | 	}
  43 | );
  44 | 
  45 | /**
  46 |  * Prefetch doctor profile images for appointments and directory
  47 |  */
  48 | export const prefetchDoctorImages = createIsomorphicFn().client(
  49 | 	async (doctors: DbDoctor[], seenManager: SeenSetManager) => {
  50 | 		const eagerCount = getEagerImageCount();
  51 | 		let count = 0;
  52 | 		const images: PrefetchImage[] = doctors
  53 | 			.filter(doctor => doctor.img)

  56 | 				alt: `Dr. ${doctor.name}`,

  58 | 				width: 64,
  59 | 				height: 64,
  60 | 				quality: 70
  61 | 			}));
  62 | 
  63 | 		prefetchImages(images, seenManager);
  64 | 	}
  65 | );

  72 | 		const eagerCount = getEagerImageCount();

  75 | 			.filter(record => record.thumbnailUrl)

  80 | 				width: 48,

  83 | 			}));
  84 |

  96 | 	) => {

 152 | 				width: 300,

 154 | 				quality: 65
 155 | 			}));

 161 | /**
 162 |  * Prefetch growth chart thumbnails for pediatric tracking
 163 |  */
 164 | export const prefetchGrowthChartImages = createIsomorphicFn().client(
 165 | 	async (growthData: Array<{ patientId: string; chartUrl?: string; date: Date }>, seenManager: SeenSetManager) => {
 166 | 		const eagerCount = getEagerImageCount();
 167 | 		let count = 0;
 168 | 		const images: PrefetchImage[] = growthData
 169 | 			.filter(data => data.chartUrl)
 170 | 			.map(data => ({
 171 | 				src: getOptimizedUrl(data.chartUrl ?? "/placeholder-growth.webp", 400, 300, 60),
 172 | 				alt: `Growth chart for patient ${data.patientId}`,
 173 | 				loading: count++ < eagerCount ? "eager" : "lazy",
 174 | 				width: 400,
 175 | 				height: 300,
 176 | 				quality: 60
 177 | 			}));
 178 | 
 179 | 		prefetchImages(images, seenManager);
 180 | 	}
 181 | );
 182 | 
 183 | /**
 184 |  * Generic prefetch function for any image array
 185 |  */
 186 | export function prefetchImages(images: PrefetchImage[] | undefined, seenManager: SeenSetManager) {
 187 | 	if (!images || images.length === 0) return;
 188 | 
 189 | 	for (const image of images) {
 190 | 		if (image.loading === "lazy" || seenManager.isSeen(image.src)) continue;
 191 | 
 192 | 		const img = new Image();
 193 | 		img.decoding = "async";
 194 | 		img.fetchPriority = "low";
 195 | 		if (image.sizes) img.sizes = image.sizes;
 196 | 		if (image.srcset) img.srcset = image.srcset;
 197 | 		if (image.alt) img.alt = image.alt;
 198 | 
 199 | 		seenManager.markSeen(image.src);
 200 | 		img.src = image.src;
 201 | 	}
 202 | }
 203 | 
 204 | /**
 205 |  * Helper to prefetch all images for a patient dashboard at once
 206 |  */
 207 | export const prefetchPatientDashboardImages = createIsomorphicFn().client(
 208 | 	async (
 209 | 		data: {
 210 | 			patient: DbPatient;
 211 | 			doctor?: DbDoctor;
 212 | 			recentAppointments?: Array<{ doctor?: DbDoctor }>;
 213 | 		},
 214 | 		seenManager: SeenSetManager
 215 | 	) => {
 216 | 		const images: PrefetchImage[] = [];
 217 | 
 218 | 		// Patient profile image
 219 | 		if (data.patient.image) {
 220 | 			images.push({
 221 | 				src: getOptimizedUrl(data.patient.image, 128, 128, 75),
 222 | 				alt: `${data.patient.firstName} ${data.patient.lastName}`,
 223 | 				loading: "eager",
 224 | 				width: 128,
 225 | 				height: 128,
 226 | 				quality: 75
 227 | 			});
 228 | 		}
 229 | 
 230 | 		// Doctor image
 231 | 		if (data.doctor?.img) {
 232 | 			images.push({
 233 | 				src: getOptimizedUrl(data.doctor.img, 64, 64, 70),
 234 | 				alt: `Dr. ${data.doctor.name}`,
 235 | 				loading: "eager",
 236 | 				width: 64,
 237 | 				height: 64,
 238 | 				quality: 70
 239 | 			});
 240 | 		}
 241 | 
 242 | 		// Appointment doctor images
 243 | 		if (data.recentAppointments) {
 244 | 			let count = 0;
 245 | 			const eagerCount = getEagerImageCount();
 246 | 			for (const apt of data.recentAppointments) {
 247 | 				if (apt.doctor?.img) {
 248 | 					images.push({
 249 | 						src: getOptimizedUrl(apt.doctor.img, 48, 48, 65),
 250 | 						alt: `Dr. ${apt.doctor.name}`,
 251 | 						loading: count++ < eagerCount ? "eager" : "lazy",
 252 | 						width: 48,
 253 | 						height: 48,
 254 | 						quality: 65
 255 | 					});
 256 | 				}
 257 | 			}
 258 | 		}
 259 | 
 260 | 		prefetchImages(images, seenManager);
 261 | 	}
 262 | );

```

`lib/seen-set-manager.ts`:

```ts
   1 | export class SeenSetManager {
   2 | 	private seen = new Set<string>();
   3 | 	private maxSize = 1000;
   4 | 	private insertionOrder: string[] = [];
   5 | 
   6 | 	isSeen(src: string): boolean {
   7 | 		return this.seen.has(src);
   8 | 	}
   9 | 
  10 | 	markSeen(src: string): void {
  11 | 		if (!this.seen.has(src)) {
  12 | 			this.seen.add(src);
  13 | 			this.insertionOrder.push(src);
  14 | 
  15 | 			// LRU eviction when size exceeds limit
  16 | 			if (this.seen.size > this.maxSize) {
  17 | 				const oldest = this.insertionOrder.shift();
  18 | 				if (oldest) {
  19 | 					this.seen.delete(oldest);
  20 | 				}
  21 | 			}
  22 | 		}
  23 | 	}
  24 | 
  25 | 	getSize(): number {
  26 | 		return this.seen.size;
  27 | 	}
  28 | 
  29 | 	clear(): void {
  30 | 		this.seen.clear();
  31 | 		this.insertionOrder = [];
  32 | 	}
  33 | }

```

`lib/seo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // lib/seo.ts
   2 | export const seo = ({
   3 | 	title = "Pediatric Clinic Management System - Comprehensive Child Healthcare",
   4 | 	description = "Complete pediatric clinic management system for tracking patient growth, immunizations, developmental milestones, and medical records. Streamline your pediatric practice with digital health records.",
   5 | 	keywords = "pediatric clinic, child healthcare, growth tracking, immunization records, developmental milestones, medical records, clinic management, electronic health records",
   6 | 	image = "https://your-pediatric-clinic.com/og-image.jpg",
   7 | 	url = "https://your-pediatric-clinic.com/",
   8 | 	siteName = "Pediatric Clinic Manager",
   9 | 	twitterSite = "@yourclinic",
  10 | 	twitterCreator = "@yourclinic"
  11 | }: {
  12 | 	title?: string;
  13 | 	description?: string;
  14 | 	image?: string;
  15 | 	keywords?: string;
  16 | 	url?: string;
  17 | 	siteName?: string;
  18 | 	twitterSite?: string;
  19 | 	twitterCreator?: string;
  20 | }) => {
  21 | 	const tags = [
  22 | 		{ title: `${title} | Pediatric Clinic Management` },
  23 | 		{ name: "description", content: description },
  24 | 		{ name: "keywords", content: keywords },
  25 | 		{ name: "twitter:title", content: title },
  26 | 		{ name: "twitter:description", content: description },
  27 | 		{ name: "twitter:creator", content: twitterCreator },
  28 | 		{ name: "twitter:site", content: twitterSite },
  29 | 		{ name: "twitter:url", content: url },
  30 | 		{ name: "og:type", content: "website" },
  31 | 		{ name: "og:title", content: title },
  32 | 		{ name: "og:description", content: description },
  33 | 		{ name: "og:url", content: url },
  34 | 		{ name: "og:site_name", content: siteName },
  35 | 		...(image
  36 | 			? [
  37 | 					{ name: "twitter:image", content: image },
  38 | 					{ name: "twitter:card", content: "summary_large_image" },
  39 | 					{ name: "og:image", content: image }
  40 | 				]
  41 | 			: [])
  42 | 	];
  43 | 
  44 | 	return tags;
  45 | };

```

`lib/settings.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import z from "zod";
   2 | 
   3 | import { db } from "../db";
   4 | import { configStore } from "../db/schema";
   5 | import type { CamelCaseKeys } from "./types";
   6 | import { snakeToCamel } from "./utils";
   7 | 
   8 | // ... (CONFIG_DEF and type definitions remain the same as they are logic-pure)
   9 | const CONFIG_DEF = {
  10 | 	require_invite: z.boolean().default(false),
  11 | 	sign_up_enabled: z.boolean().default(true),
  12 | 	blacklisted_extensions: z.string().default(""),
  13 | 	max_invite_age: z.number().default(1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 7),
  14 | 	allow_user_create_invites: z.boolean().default(true),
  15 | 	default_user_file_count_quota: z.number().default(1000),
  16 | 	default_user_quota: z.number().default(1024 * 1024 * 1024),
  17 | 	default_invites_quota: z.number().default(10),
  18 | 	upload_file_chunk_size: z.number().default(1024 * 1024 * 25),
  19 | 	upload_file_max_size: z.number().default(1024 * 1024 * 1024 * 5),
  20 | 	cdn_url: z.url().or(z.literal("")).default("")
  21 | };
  22 | 
  23 | type ConfigDef = typeof CONFIG_DEF;
  24 | export type ConfigKey = keyof ConfigDef;
  25 | type ConfigState = z.infer<z.ZodObject<ConfigDef>>;
  26 | export type AppSettings = CamelCaseKeys<ConfigState> & {
  27 | 	baseUrl: string;
  28 | 	appName: string;
  29 | };
  30 | 
  31 | const getDefaults = (): AppSettings => {
  32 | 	const defaults: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  33 | 	for (const [key, schema] of Object.entries(CONFIG_DEF)) {
  34 | 		defaults[snakeToCamel(key)] = schema.parse(undefined);
  35 | 	}
  36 | 	return {
  37 | 		...(defaults as CamelCaseKeys<ConfigState>),
  38 | 		baseUrl: process.env.AUTH_BASE_URL || "",
  39 | 		appName: process.env.APP_NAME || ""
  40 | 	};
  41 | };
  42 | 
  43 | // ... (Logic for zShape, keyMap, and defaults remains the same)
  44 | 
  45 | // 1. Convert Data Fetching to a Server Function
  46 | export const getSettings = async (): Promise<AppSettings> => {
  47 | 	let rows: { key: string; value: string }[];
  48 | 	try {
  49 | 		rows = await db.select().from(configStore);
  50 | 	} catch {
  51 | 		return getDefaults();
  52 | 	}
  53 | 
  54 | 	const finalConfig: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  55 | 	const rawMap = new Map(rows.map(r => [r.key, r.value]));
  56 | 
  57 | 	for (const [snakeKey, value] of Object.entries(CONFIG_DEF)) {
  58 | 		const camelKey = snakeToCamel(snakeKey);
  59 | 		const dbValue = rawMap.get(snakeKey);
  60 | 		const schema = value as z.ZodTypeAny;
  61 | 
  62 | 		if (dbValue === undefined) {
  63 | 			finalConfig[camelKey] = schema.parse(undefined);
  64 | 		} else {
  65 | 			// Logic for parsing values from string back to their types
  66 | 			if (schema instanceof z.ZodDefault) {
  67 | 				const innerType = (schema as z.ZodDefault<z.ZodTypeAny>).def.innerType;
  68 | 				if (innerType instanceof z.ZodNumber) finalConfig[camelKey] = Number(dbValue);
  69 | 				else if (innerType instanceof z.ZodBoolean) finalConfig[camelKey] = dbValue === "true";
  70 | 				else finalConfig[camelKey] = dbValue;
  71 | 			} else {
  72 | 				finalConfig[camelKey] = dbValue;
  73 | 			}
  74 | 		}
  75 | 	}
  76 | 
  77 | 	// Ensure database has all current keys
  78 | 	const missing = Object.keys(CONFIG_DEF).filter(k => !new Set(rows.map(r => r.key)).has(k));
  79 | 	if (missing.length > 0) {
  80 | 		const inserts = missing.map(k => ({
  81 | 			key: k,
  82 | 			value: String((CONFIG_DEF as Record<string, z.ZodTypeAny | undefined>)[k]?.parse(undefined))
  83 | 		}));
  84 | 		await db.insert(configStore).values(inserts).onConflictDoNothing().execute();
  85 | 	}
  86 | 
  87 | 	return {
  88 | 		...(finalConfig as AppSettings),
  89 | 		baseUrl: process.env.AUTH_BASE_URL || "",
  90 | 		appName: process.env.APP_NAME || ""
  91 | 	};
  92 | };

```

`lib/storage.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // lib/storage.ts
   2 | import * as Minio from "minio";
   3 | 
   4 | // Initialize MinIO client
   5 | export const minioClient = new Minio.Client({
   6 | 	endPoint: process.env.MINIO_ENDPOINT || "localhost",
   7 | 	port: Number(process.env.MINIO_PORT) || 9000,
   8 | 	useSSL: process.env.MINIO_USE_SSL === "true",
   9 | 	accessKey: process.env.MINIO_ACCESS_KEY || "minioadmin",
  10 | 	secretKey: process.env.MINIO_SECRET_KEY || "minioadmin"
  11 | });
  12 | 
  13 | const BUCKET_NAME = "clinic-avatars";
  14 | const PRESIGNED_URL_EXPIRY = 3600; // 1 hour in seconds
  15 | 
  16 | // Ensure bucket exists on startup
  17 | export async function ensureBucket() {
  18 | 	const exists = await minioClient.bucketExists(BUCKET_NAME);
  19 | 	if (!exists) {
  20 | 		await minioClient.makeBucket(BUCKET_NAME, "us-east-1");
  21 | 		// Set bucket policy for public read (optional - use presigned URLs for security)
  22 | 		const policy = {
  23 | 			Version: "2012-10-17",
  24 | 			Statement: [
  25 | 				{
  26 | 					Effect: "Allow",
  27 | 					Principal: { AWS: ["*"] },
  28 | 					Action: ["s3:GetObject"],
  29 | 					Resource: [`arn:aws:s3:::${BUCKET_NAME}/*`]
  30 | 				}
  31 | 			]
  32 | 		};
  33 | 		await minioClient.setBucketPolicy(BUCKET_NAME, JSON.stringify(policy));
  34 | 	}
  35 | }
  36 | 
  37 | // Generate presigned URL for upload
  38 | export async function getPresignedUploadUrl(objectName: string, contentType: string): Promise<string> {
  39 | 	await ensureBucket();
  40 | 	return minioClient.presignedPutObject(BUCKET_NAME, objectName, PRESIGNED_URL_EXPIRY);
  41 | }
  42 | 
  43 | // Generate presigned URL for download/view
  44 | export async function getPresignedDownloadUrl(objectName: string): Promise<string> {
  45 | 	return minioClient.presignedGetObject(BUCKET_NAME, objectName, PRESIGNED_URL_EXPIRY);
  46 | }
  47 | 
  48 | // Delete an object
  49 | export async function deleteObject(objectName: string): Promise<void> {
  50 | 	await minioClient.removeObject(BUCKET_NAME, objectName);
  51 | }
  52 | 
  53 | // Get object info
  54 | export async function getObjectInfo(objectName: string) {
  55 | 	return minioClient.statObject(BUCKET_NAME, objectName);
  56 | }
  57 | 
  58 | // Upload file directly (server-side)
  59 | export async function uploadFile(objectName: string, fileBuffer: Buffer, contentType: string) {
  60 | 	await ensureBucket();
  61 | 	return minioClient.putObject(BUCKET_NAME, objectName, fileBuffer, undefined, {
  62 | 		"Content-Type": contentType
  63 | 	});
  64 | }
```

```ts
  72 | export type SnakeToCamelCase<S extends string> = S extends `${infer Head}_${infer Tail}`
  73 | 	? `${Lowercase<Head>}${Capitalize<SnakeToCamelCase<Tail>>}`
  74 | 	: Lowercase<S>;
  75 | 
  76 | export type CamelCaseKeys<T> =
  77 | 	T extends Array<infer U>
  78 | 		? Array<CamelCaseKeys<U>>
  79 | 		: T extends object
  80 | 			? {
  81 | 					[K in keyof T as SnakeToCamelCase<K & string>]: CamelCaseKeys<T[K]>;
  82 | 				}
  83 | 			: T;
```

`lib/utils.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { type ClassValue, clsx } from "clsx";
   2 | import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge";
   3 | 
   4 | import type { UploadStatus } from "#/lib/types.ts";
   5 | 
   6 | export function omitMetadata<T extends { metadata?: unknown }>(value: T) {
   7 | 	const { metadata, ...rest } = value;
   8 | 	return rest as Omit<T, "metadata">;
   9 | }
  10 | 
  11 | export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
  12 | 	return twMerge(clsx(inputs));
  13 | }
  14 | 
  15 | export function formatBytes(bytes: number) {
  16 | 	if (bytes === 0) return "0 B";
  17 | 	const k = 1024;
  18 | 	const sizes = ["B", "KB", "MB", "GB", "TB"];
  19 | 	const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
  20 | 	return `${Number.parseFloat((bytes / k ** i).toFixed(2))} ${sizes[i]}`;
  21 | }
  22 | 
  23 | export function parseBytes(input: string): number | null {
  24 | 	const units: Record<string, number> = {
  25 | 		b: 1,
  26 | 		kb: 1024,
  27 | 		mb: 1024 ** 2,
  28 | 		gb: 1024 ** 3,
  29 | 		tb: 1024 ** 4
  30 | 	};
  31 | 	const match = input.toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*([a-z]+)?$/);
  32 | 	if (!match) return null;
  33 | 	const value = Number.parseFloat(match[1]);
  34 | 	const unit = match[2] || "b";
  35 | 	if (!units[unit]) return null;
  36 | 	return Math.floor(value * units[unit]);
  37 | }
  38 | 
  39 | export function formatDuration(ms: number): string {
  40 | 	if (ms < 1000) return `${ms}ms`;
  41 | 	const s = 1000;
  42 | 	const m = s * 60;
  43 | 	const h = m * 60;
  44 | 	const d = h * 24;
  45 | 
  46 | 	if (ms >= d) return `${Number.parseFloat((ms / d).toFixed(2))}d`;
  47 | 	if (ms >= h) return `${Number.parseFloat((ms / h).toFixed(2))}h`;
  48 | 	if (ms >= m) return `${Number.parseFloat((ms / m).toFixed(2))}m`;
  49 | 	return `${Number.parseFloat((ms / s).toFixed(2))}s`;
  50 | }
  51 | 
  52 | export function parseDuration(input: string): number | null {
  53 | 	const units: Record<string, number> = {
  54 | 		ms: 1,
  55 | 		s: 1000,
  56 | 		m: 1000 * 60,
  57 | 		h: 1000 * 60 * 60,
  58 | 		d: 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24
  59 | 	};
  60 | 	const match = input.toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*([a-z]+)?$/);
  61 | 	if (!match) return null;
  62 | 	const value = Number.parseFloat(match[1]);
  63 | 	const unit = match[2] || "ms";
  64 | 	if (!units[unit]) return null;
  65 | 	return Math.floor(value * units[unit]);
  66 | }
  67 | 
  68 | export function getStatusLabel(status: UploadStatus, progress: number): string {
  69 | 	switch (status) {
  70 | 		case "completed":
  71 | 			return "Done";
  72 | 		case "error":
  73 | 			return "Error";
  74 | 		case "pending":
  75 | 			return "Queued";
  76 | 		case "paused":
  77 | 			return "Paused";
  78 | 		default:
  79 | 			return `${progress.toFixed(0)}%`;
  80 | 	}
  81 | }
  82 | 
  83 | export function calculateGlobalProgress(
  84 | 	files: Array<{ id: string; file: File }>,
  85 | 	fileStatuses: Map<string, UploadStatus>,
  86 | 	fileProgress: Map<string, number>
  87 | ): {
  88 | 	completedCount: number;
  89 | 	globalProgress: number;
  90 | 	isGlobalComplete: boolean;
  91 | 	isGlobalError: boolean;
  92 | } {
  93 | 	if (files.length === 0) {
  94 | 		return {
  95 | 			completedCount: 0,
  96 | 			globalProgress: 0,
  97 | 			isGlobalComplete: false,
  98 | 			isGlobalError: false
  99 | 		};
 100 | 	}
 101 | 
 102 | 	const completedCount = files.filter(f => fileStatuses.get(f.id) === "completed").length;
 103 | 
 104 | 	const hasError = files.some(f => fileStatuses.get(f.id) === "error");
 105 | 
 106 | 	const totalSize = files.reduce((acc, f) => acc + f.file.size, 0);
 107 | 	const loadedSize = files.reduce((acc, f) => {
 108 | 		const progress = fileProgress.get(f.id) || 0;
 109 | 		const status = fileStatuses.get(f.id);
 110 | 		const effectiveProgress = status === "completed" ? 100 : progress;
 111 | 		return acc + (f.file.size * effectiveProgress) / 100;
 112 | 	}, 0);
 113 | 
 114 | 	return {
 115 | 		completedCount,
 116 | 		globalProgress: totalSize > 0 ? (loadedSize / totalSize) * 100 : 0,
 117 | 		isGlobalComplete: completedCount === files.length,
 118 | 		isGlobalError: hasError
 119 | 	};
 120 | }
 121 | 
 122 | export function normalize(s: string) {
 123 | 	return String(s)
 124 | 		.toLowerCase()
 125 | 		.replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, " ")
 126 | 		.replace(/\s+/g, " ")
 127 | 		.trim();
 128 | }
 129 | 
 130 | export function extractError(err: string): {
 131 | 	status_code: number | null;
 132 | 	message: string;
 133 | } {
 134 | 	const status = err.match(/response code:\s*(\d+)/i);
 135 | 	const message = err.match(/response text:\s*(.*?)\s*,\s*request id/i);
 136 | 
 137 | 	return {
 138 | 		status_code: status ? Number(status[1]) : null,
 139 | 		message: message ? message[1] : err
 140 | 	};
 141 | }
 142 | 
 143 | export const snakeToCamel = (str: string): string => str.replace(/_([a-z])/g, g => g[1].toUpperCase());
 144 | 
 145 | export const camelToSnake = (str: string): string => str.replace(/[A-Z]/g, letter => `_${letter.toLowerCase()}`);
 146 | 
 147 | const SLUG_CHARS = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789";
 148 | const SLUG_LENGTH = 6;
 149 | const MAX_SLUG_RETRIES = 10;
 150 | 
 151 | export function generateSlug(): string {
 152 | 	let result = "";
 153 | 	const randomValues = crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(SLUG_LENGTH));
 154 | 	for (let i = 0; i < SLUG_LENGTH; i++) {
 155 | 		result += SLUG_CHARS[randomValues[i] % SLUG_CHARS.length];
 156 | 	}
 157 | 	return result;
 158 | }
 159 | 
 160 | export async function generateUniqueSlug(checkExists: (slug: string) => boolean | Promise<boolean>): Promise<string> {
 161 | 	for (let attempt = 0; attempt < MAX_SLUG_RETRIES; attempt++) {
 162 | 		const slug = generateSlug();
 163 | 		const exists = await checkExists(slug);
 164 | 		if (!exists) {
 165 | 			return slug;
 166 | 		}
 167 | 	}
 168 | 	throw new Error("Failed to generate unique slug after maximum retries");
 169 | }
 170 | 
 171 | export function ring(color = "ring-primary") {
 172 | 	return `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-none ${color}`;
 173 | }
 174 | 
 175 | export function getInitials(name: string) {
 176 | 	const parts = name.trim().split(/\s+/);
 177 | 	if (parts.length === 0) return "";
 178 | 	if (parts.length === 1) return parts[0].substring(0, 2).toUpperCase();
 179 | 	return (parts[0][0] + parts[parts.length - 1][0]).toUpperCase();
 180 | }

```


`router.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { QueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | import { createRouter as createTanStackRouter, Link } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import { routeTree } from "./routeTree.gen";
   4 | 
   5 | export function getRouter() {
   6 | 	const router = createTanStackRouter({
   7 | 		routeTree,
   8 | 		scrollRestoration: true,
   9 | 		context: {
  10 | 			queryClient: new QueryClient()
  11 | 		},
  12 | 		defaultPreload: "intent",
  13 | 		defaultPreloadStaleTime: 0,
  14 | 		defaultNotFoundComponent: () => {
  15 | 			return (
  16 | 				<div>
  17 | 					Not found Page
  18 | 					<Link to='/'>Go home</Link>
  19 | 				</div>
  20 | 			);
  21 | 		}
  22 | 	});
  23 | 
  24 | 	return router;
  25 | }
  26 | 
  27 | declare module "@tanstack/react-router" {
  28 | 	interface Register {
  29 | 		router: ReturnType<typeof getRouter>;
  30 | 	}
  31 | }

```

`routes/__root.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { TanStackDevtools } from "@tanstack/react-devtools";
   2 | import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   3 | import { ReactQueryDevtools } from "@tanstack/react-query-devtools";
   4 | import { createRootRouteWithContext, HeadContent, Scripts } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   5 | import { TanStackRouterDevtoolsPanel } from "@tanstack/react-router-devtools";
   6 | import { Toaster } from "sonner";
   7 | import Header from "#/components/Header";
   8 | import { getSession } from "#/lib/auth.functions";
   9 | import appCss from "../styles.css?url";
  10 | 
  11 | export const Route = createRootRouteWithContext<{ queryClient: QueryClient }>()({
  12 | 	beforeLoad: async () => {
  13 | 		const session = await getSession();
  14 | 
  15 | 		return {
  16 | 			session
  17 | 		};
  18 | 	},
  19 | 
  20 | 	head: () => ({
  21 | 		meta: [
  22 | 			{
  23 | 				charSet: "utf-8"
  24 | 			},
  25 | 			{
  26 | 				name: "viewport",
  27 | 				content: "width=device-width, initial-scale=1"
  28 | 			},
  29 | 			{
  30 | 				title: "StackShop"
  31 | 			},
  32 | 			{
  33 | 				description: "StackShop is a platform for buying and selling products"
  34 | 			}
  35 | 		],
  36 | 		links: [
  37 | 			{
  38 | 				rel: "stylesheet",
  39 | 				href: appCss
  40 | 			}
  41 | 		]
  42 | 	}),
  43 | 
  44 | 	shellComponent: RootDocument
  45 | });
  46 | 
  47 | const queryClient = new QueryClient();
  48 | 
  49 | function RootDocument({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  50 | 	return (
  51 | 		<QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
  52 | 			<html lang='en'>
  53 | 				<head>
  54 | 					<HeadContent />
  55 | 				</head>
  56 | 				<body>
  57 | 					<div className='min-h-screen bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 dark:bg-slate-950 dark:text-white'>
  58 | 						<Header />
  59 | 						<main className='mx-auto max-w-6xl px-4 py-6'>{children}</main>
  60 | 					</div>
  61 | 
  62 | 					<Toaster />
  63 | 
  64 | 					<TanStackDevtools
  65 | 						config={{
  66 | 							position: "bottom-right"
  67 | 						}}
  68 | 						plugins={[
  69 | 							{
  70 | 								name: "Tanstack Router",
  71 | 								render: <TanStackRouterDevtoolsPanel />
  72 | 							}
  73 | 						]}
  74 | 					/>
  75 | 
  76 | 					<ReactQueryDevtools initialIsOpen={false} />
  77 | 					<Scripts />
  78 | 				</body>
  79 | 			</html>
  80 | 		</QueryClientProvider>
  81 | 	);
  82 | }
```

```ts
   8 | 				return await auth.handler(request);
```

`routes/appointments/$id.cancel.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/appointments/$id.cancel.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { createFileRoute, redirect, useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   4 | import { AlertCircle } from "lucide-react";
   5 | import { useState } from "react";
   6 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   7 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   8 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
   9 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  10 | import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
  11 | import { cancelAppointment, getAppointmentById } from "@/data/appointments";
  12 | 
  13 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/appointments/$id/cancel")({
  14 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  15 | 		const session = context.session;
  16 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  17 | 		return { user: session.user };
  18 | 	},
  19 | 	loader: async ({ params }) => {
  20 | 		const appointment = await getAppointmentById({ data: params.id });
  21 | 		if (!appointment) throw redirect({ to: "/appointments" });
  22 | 		return { appointment };
  23 | 	},
  24 | 	component: CancelAppointmentPage
  25 | });
  26 | 
  27 | function CancelAppointmentPage() {
  28 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  29 | 	const { appointment } = Route.useLoaderData();
  30 | 	const [reason, setReason] = useState("");
  31 | 	const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  32 | 
  33 | 	const appointmentDate = new Date(appointment.appointmentDate);
  34 | 	const isUpcoming = appointmentDate >= new Date();
  35 | 
  36 | 	if (!isUpcoming || appointment.status === "CANCELLED") {
  37 | 		return (
  38 | 			<div className='mx-auto max-w-lg py-20 text-center'>
  39 | 				<AlertCircle className='mx-auto h-12 w-12 text-slate-400' />
  40 | 				<h1 className='mt-4 font-semibold text-xl'>Cannot Cancel Appointment</h1>
  41 | 				<p className='mt-2 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400'>
  42 | 					This appointment cannot be cancelled because it has already passed or is already cancelled.
  43 | 				</p>
  44 | 				<Button
  45 | 					className='mt-6'
  46 | 					onClick={() => navigate({ to: "/appointments" })}
  47 | 				>
  48 | 					Back to Appointments
  49 | 				</Button>
  50 | 			</div>
  51 | 		);
  52 | 	}
  53 | 
  54 | 	const handleCancel = async () => {
  55 | 		setIsSubmitting(true);
  56 | 		try {
  57 | 			await cancelAppointment({
  58 | 				data: { appointmentId: appointment.id, reason }
  59 | 			});
  60 | 			toast.success("Appointment cancelled successfully");
  61 | 			navigate({ to: "/appointments" });
  62 | 		} catch (error) {
  63 | 			toast.error("Failed to cancel appointment");
  64 | 		} finally {
  65 | 			setIsSubmitting(false);
  66 | 		}
  67 | 	};
  68 | 
  69 | 	return (
  70 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-lg py-8'>
  71 | 			<Card>
  72 | 				<CardHeader>
  73 | 					<CardTitle className='text-2xl'>Cancel Appointment</CardTitle>
  74 | 					<CardDescription>
  75 | 						Are you sure you want to cancel your appointment with Dr. {appointment.doctor.name}?
  76 | 					</CardDescription>
  77 | 				</CardHeader>
  78 | 				<CardContent className='space-y-6'>
  79 | 					<div className='rounded-lg bg-slate-50 p-4 dark:bg-slate-800'>
  80 | 						<h3 className='font-medium'>Appointment Details</h3>
  81 | 						<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
  82 | 							{new Date(appointment.appointmentDate).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
  83 | 								weekday: "long",
  84 | 								year: "numeric",
  85 | 								month: "long",
  86 | 								day: "numeric"
  87 | 							})}
  88 | 							{" at "}
  89 | 							{appointment.time}
  90 | 						</p>
  91 | 						<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
  92 | 							Dr. {appointment.doctor.name} - {appointment.doctor.specialty}
  93 | 						</p>
  94 | 					</div>
  95 | 
  96 | 					<div className='space-y-2'>
  97 | 						<Label htmlFor='reason'>Reason for cancellation (Optional)</Label>
  98 | 						<Textarea
  99 | 							id='reason'
 100 | 							onChange={e => setReason(e.target.value)}
 101 | 							placeholder="Please let us know why you're cancelling..."
 102 | 							rows={4}
 103 | 							value={reason}
 104 | 						/>
 105 | 					</div>
 106 | 
 107 | 					<div className='flex gap-3'>
 108 | 						<Button
 109 | 							onClick={() => navigate({ to: `/appointments/${appointment.id}` })}
 110 | 							variant='outline'
 111 | 						>
 112 | 							Go Back
 113 | 						</Button>
 114 | 						<Button
 115 | 							disabled={isSubmitting}
 116 | 							onClick={handleCancel}
 117 | 							variant='destructive'
 118 | 						>
 119 | 							{isSubmitting ? "Cancelling..." : "Yes, Cancel Appointment"}
 120 | 						</Button>
 121 | 					</div>
 122 | 
 123 | 					<p className='text-center text-slate-500 text-xs'>
 124 | 						Cancellations made less than 24 hours before the appointment may incur a fee.
 125 | 					</p>
 126 | 				</CardContent>
 127 | 			</Card>
 128 | 		</div>
 129 | 	);
 130 | }

```

`routes/appointments/$id.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/appointments/$id.tsx
   2 | import { createFileRoute, Link, notFound, redirect } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import { AlertCircle, Calendar, Clock, FileText, Mail, MapPin, Phone, Stethoscope, User } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
   5 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   6 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
   7 | import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
   8 | import { getAppointmentById } from "@/data/appointments";
   9 | import { formatDate, formatTime } from "@/utils/formDate";
  10 | import type { AppointmentStatus } from "../../db/schema";
  11 | 
  12 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/appointments/$id")({
  13 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  14 | 		const session = context.session;
  15 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  16 | 		return { user: session.user };
  17 | 	},
  18 | 	loader: async ({ params }) => {
  19 | 		const appointment = await getAppointmentById({ data: params.id });
  20 | 		if (!appointment) throw notFound();
  21 | 		return { appointment };
  22 | 	},
  23 | 	component: AppointmentDetailPage
  24 | });
  25 | 
  26 | const statusColors = {
  27 | 	PENDING: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-900/30 dark:text-yellow-400",
  28 | 	CONFIRMED: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400",
  29 | 	COMPLETED: "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400",
  30 | 	CANCELLED: "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400",
  31 | 	NO_SHOW: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400"
  32 | };
  33 | 
  34 | function AppointmentDetailPage() {
  35 | 	const { appointment } = Route.useLoaderData();
  36 | 	const isUpcoming = new Date(appointment.appointmentDate) >= new Date() && appointment.status !== "CANCELLED";
  37 | 	const isCancellable = isUpcoming && appointment.status === "CONFIRMED";
  38 | 
  39 | 	return (
  40 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-3xl py-8'>
  41 | 			<div className='space-y-6'>
  42 | 				{/* Header */}
  43 | 				<div className='flex flex-col justify-between gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center'>
  44 | 					<div>
  45 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  46 | 							<h1 className='font-semibold text-2xl'>Appointment Details</h1>
  47 | 							<Badge className={statusColors[appointment.status as AppointmentStatus]}>
  48 | 								{appointment.status}
  49 | 							</Badge>
  50 | 						</div>
  51 | 						<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
  52 | 							Scheduled on {formatDate(appointment.appointmentDate)} at{" "}
  53 | 							{appointment.time || formatTime(appointment.appointmentDate)}
  54 | 						</p>
  55 | 					</div>
  56 | 					<div className='flex gap-2'>
  57 | 						<Link to='/appointments'>
  58 | 							<Button variant='outline'>Back to Appointments</Button>
  59 | 						</Link>
  60 | 						{isCancellable && (
  61 | 							<Link
  62 | 								params={{ id: appointment.id }}
  63 | 								to='/appointments/$id/cancel'
  64 | 							>
  65 | 								<Button variant='destructive'>Cancel Appointment</Button>
  66 | 							</Link>
  67 | 						)}
  68 | 					</div>
  69 | 				</div>
  70 | 
  71 | 				{/* Patient Information */}
  72 | 				<Card>
  73 | 					<CardHeader>
  74 | 						<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 text-lg'>
  75 | 							<User className='h-5 w-5' />
  76 | 							Patient Information
  77 | 						</CardTitle>
  78 | 					</CardHeader>
  79 | 					<CardContent className='space-y-3'>
  80 | 						<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'>
  81 | 							<div>
  82 | 								<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Full Name</p>
  83 | 								<p className='font-medium'>
  84 | 									{appointment.patient.firstName} {appointment.patient.lastName}
  85 | 								</p>
  86 | 							</div>
  87 | 							<div>
  88 | 								<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Date of Birth</p>
  89 | 								<p className='font-medium'>{formatDate(appointment.patient.dateOfBirth)}</p>
  90 | 							</div>
  91 | 							{appointment.patient.gender && (
  92 | 								<div>
  93 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Gender</p>
  94 | 									<p className='font-medium capitalize'>{appointment.patient.gender.toLowerCase()}</p>
  95 | 								</div>
  96 | 							)}
  97 | 							{appointment.patient.mrn && (
  98 | 								<div>
  99 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Medical Record Number</p>
 100 | 									<p className='font-medium font-mono text-sm'>{appointment.patient.mrn}</p>
 101 | 								</div>
 102 | 							)}
 103 | 						</div>
 104 | 						<Separator />
 105 | 						<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 106 | 							{appointment.patient.phone && (
 107 | 								<div>
 108 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Phone</p>
 109 | 									<p className='flex items-center gap-1 text-sm'>
 110 | 										<Phone className='h-3.5 w-3.5' />
 111 | 										{appointment.patient.phone}
 112 | 									</p>
 113 | 								</div>
 114 | 							)}
 115 | 							{appointment.patient.email && (
 116 | 								<div>
 117 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Email</p>
 118 | 									<p className='flex items-center gap-1 text-sm'>
 119 | 										<Mail className='h-3.5 w-3.5' />
 120 | 										{appointment.patient.email}
 121 | 									</p>
 122 | 								</div>
 123 | 							)}
 124 | 						</div>
 125 | 					</CardContent>
 126 | 				</Card>
 127 | 
 128 | 				{/* Doctor Information */}
 129 | 				<Card>
 130 | 					<CardHeader>
 131 | 						<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 text-lg'>
 132 | 							<Stethoscope className='h-5 w-5' />
 133 | 							Doctor Information
 134 | 						</CardTitle>
 135 | 					</CardHeader>
 136 | 					<CardContent className='space-y-3'>
 137 | 						<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 138 | 							<div>
 139 | 								<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Doctor Name</p>
 140 | 								<p className='font-medium'>Dr. {appointment.doctor.name}</p>
 141 | 							</div>
 142 | 							<div>
 143 | 								<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Specialty</p>
 144 | 								<p className='font-medium'>{appointment.doctor.specialty}</p>
 145 | 							</div>
 146 | 						</div>
 147 | 					</CardContent>
 148 | 				</Card>
 149 | 
 150 | 				{/* Appointment Details */}
 151 | 				<Card>
 152 | 					<CardHeader>
 153 | 						<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 text-lg'>
 154 | 							<Calendar className='h-5 w-5' />
 155 | 							Appointment Details
 156 | 						</CardTitle>
 157 | 					</CardHeader>
 158 | 					<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
 159 | 						<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 160 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 161 | 								<Calendar className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 162 | 								<div>
 163 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Date</p>
 164 | 									<p className='font-medium'>{formatDate(appointment.appointmentDate)}</p>
 165 | 								</div>
 166 | 							</div>
 167 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 168 | 								<Clock className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 169 | 								<div>
 170 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Time</p>
 171 | 									<p className='font-medium'>
 172 | 										{appointment.time || formatTime(appointment.appointmentDate)}
 173 | 									</p>
 174 | 								</div>
 175 | 							</div>
 176 | 						</div>
 177 | 
 178 | 						{appointment.type && (
 179 | 							<div>
 180 | 								<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Appointment Type</p>
 181 | 								<p className='font-medium capitalize'>{appointment.type.toLowerCase()}</p>
 182 | 							</div>
 183 | 						)}
 184 | 
 185 | 						{appointment.reason && (
 186 | 							<div>
 187 | 								<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Reason for Visit</p>
 188 | 								<p className='rounded-lg bg-slate-50 p-3 text-sm dark:bg-slate-800'>
 189 | 									{appointment.reason}
 190 | 								</p>
 191 | 							</div>
 192 | 						)}
 193 | 
 194 | 						{appointment.note && (
 195 | 							<div>
 196 | 								<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Additional Notes</p>
 197 | 								<p className='text-sm'>{appointment.note}</p>
 198 | 							</div>
 199 | 						)}
 200 | 					</CardContent>
 201 | 				</Card>
 202 | 
 203 | 				{/* Important Information */}
 204 | 				<Card className='border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-800 dark:bg-blue-950/20'>
 205 | 					<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
 206 | 						<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 text-base text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-400'>
 207 | 							<AlertCircle className='h-4 w-4' />
 208 | 							Important Information
 209 | 						</CardTitle>
 210 | 					</CardHeader>
 211 | 					<CardContent className='text-blue-700 text-sm dark:text-blue-400'>
 212 | 						<ul className='list-inside list-disc space-y-1'>
 213 | 							<li>Please arrive 15 minutes before your scheduled appointment time</li>
 214 | 							<li>Bring your insurance card and photo ID</li>
 215 | 							<li>Bring any relevant medical records or previous test results</li>
 216 | 							<li>Cancellations require at least 24 hours notice</li>
 217 | 						</ul>

 220 | 			</div>
 221 | 		</div>
 222 | 	);
```
