
`routes/appointments/book.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/appointments/book.tsx
   2 | import { useForm, useStore } from "@tanstack/react-form";
   3 | import { createFileRoute, redirect, useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   4 | import { CalendarIcon, Loader2 } from "lucide-react";
   5 | import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react";
   6 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   7 | import { z } from "zod";
   8 | 
   9 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
  10 | import { Calendar } from "@/components/ui/calendar";
  11 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
  12 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  13 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@/components/ui/popover";
  14 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
  15 | import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
  16 | import { createAppointment, getAvailableTimeSlots } from "@/data/appointments";
  17 | import { getAllDoctors } from "@/data/doctors";
  18 | import { getMyChildren } from "@/data/patients";
  19 | import { getAvailableServices } from "@/data/services";
  20 | import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
  21 | import { formatDate } from "@/utils/formDate";
  22 | 
  23 | const appointmentSchema = z.object({
  24 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a child"),
  25 | 	doctorId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a doctor"),
  26 | 	serviceId: z.string().optional(),
  27 | 	appointmentDate: z.date().min(new Date(), "Please select a future date"),
  28 | 	time: z.string().min(1, "Please select a time"),
  29 | 	reason: z.string().optional()
  30 | });
  31 | 
  32 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/appointments/book")({
  33 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  34 | 		const session = context.session;
  35 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  36 | 		return { user: session.user };
  37 | 	},
  38 | 	component: BookAppointmentPage
  39 | });
  40 | 
  41 | function BookAppointmentPage() {
  42 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  43 | 	const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  44 | 	const [availableSlots, setAvailableSlots] = useState<string[]>([]);
  45 | 	const [isLoadingSlots, setIsLoadingSlots] = useState(false);
  46 | 
  47 | 	// Data states
  48 | 	const [patients, setPatients] = useState<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getMyChildren>>>([]);
  49 | 	const [doctors, setDoctors] = useState<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getAllDoctors>>>([]);
  50 | 	const [services, setServices] = useState<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getAvailableServices>>>([]);
  51 | 	const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
  52 | 
  53 | 	const loadInitialData = useCallback(async () => {
  54 | 		setIsLoading(true);
  55 | 		try {
  56 | 			const [patientsData, doctorsData, servicesData] = await Promise.all([
  57 | 				getMyChildren(),
  58 | 				getAllDoctors(),
  59 | 				getAvailableServices()
  60 | 			]);
  61 | 			setPatients(patientsData);
  62 | 			setDoctors(doctorsData);
  63 | 			setServices(servicesData);
  64 | 		} catch (_error) {
  65 | 			toast.error("Failed to load data");
  66 | 		} finally {
  67 | 			setIsLoading(false);
  68 | 		}
  69 | 	}, []);
  70 | 
  71 | 	useEffect(() => {
  72 | 		loadInitialData();
  73 | 	}, [loadInitialData]);
  74 | 
  75 | 	const form = useForm({
  76 | 		defaultValues: {
  77 | 			patientId: "",
  78 | 			doctorId: "",
  79 | 			serviceId: "",
  80 | 			appointmentDate: undefined as Date | undefined,
  81 | 			time: "",
  82 | 			reason: ""
  83 | 		},
  84 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
  85 | 			const result = appointmentSchema.safeParse(value);
  86 | 			if (!result.success) {
  87 | 				toast.error(result.error.issues[0]?.message);
  88 | 				return;
  89 | 			}
  90 | 
  91 | 			const validatedData = result.data;
  92 | 			setIsSubmitting(true);
  93 | 			try {
  94 | 				await createAppointment({
  95 | 					data: {
  96 | 						patientId: validatedData.patientId,
  97 | 						doctorId: validatedData.doctorId,
  98 | 						serviceId: validatedData.serviceId || undefined,
  99 | 						appointmentDate: validatedData.appointmentDate,
 100 | 						time: validatedData.time,
 101 | 						reason: validatedData.reason,
 102 | 						durationMinutes: 30,
 103 | 						type: "REGULAR"
 104 | 					}
 105 | 				});
 106 | 				toast.success("Appointment booked successfully!");
 107 | 				navigate({ to: "/appointments" });
 108 | 			} catch (_error) {
 109 | 				toast.error("Failed to book appointment. Please try again.");
 110 | 			} finally {
 111 | 				setIsSubmitting(false);
 112 | 			}
 113 | 		}
 114 | 	});
 115 | 
 116 | 	const selectedDoctor = useStore(form.store, state => doctors.find(d => d.id === state.values.doctorId));
 117 | 	const selectedDate = useStore(form.store, state => state.values.appointmentDate);
 118 | 
 119 | 	const loadAvailableSlots = useCallback(
 120 | 		async (doctorId: string, date: Date) => {
 121 | 			setIsLoadingSlots(true);
 122 | 			try {
 123 | 				const slots = await getAvailableTimeSlots({
 124 | 					data: {
 125 | 						doctorId,
 126 | 						date
 127 | 					}
 128 | 				});
 129 | 				setAvailableSlots(slots);
 130 | 				// Clear time selection when slots reload
 131 | 				form.setFieldValue("time", "");
 132 | 			} catch (_error) {
 133 | 				setAvailableSlots([]);
 134 | 			} finally {
 135 | 				setIsLoadingSlots(false);
 136 | 			}
 137 | 		},
 138 | 		[form]
 139 | 	);
 140 | 
 141 | 	// Load available slots when doctor and date are selected
 142 | 	useEffect(() => {
 143 | 		if (selectedDoctor && selectedDate) {
 144 | 			loadAvailableSlots(selectedDoctor.id, selectedDate);
 145 | 		}
 146 | 	}, [selectedDoctor, selectedDate, loadAvailableSlots]);
 147 | 
 148 | 	if (isLoading) {
 149 | 		return (
 150 | 			<div className='flex h-[60vh] items-center justify-center'>
 151 | 				<Loader2 className='h-8 w-8 animate-spin text-slate-400' />
 152 | 			</div>
 153 | 		);
 154 | 	}
 155 | 
 156 | 	return (
 157 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-2xl py-8'>
 158 | 			<Card>
 159 | 				<CardHeader>
 160 | 					<CardTitle className='text-2xl'>Book an Appointment</CardTitle>
 161 | 					<CardDescription>
 162 | 						Schedule a visit for your child with one of our pediatric specialists
 163 | 					</CardDescription>
 164 | 				</CardHeader>
 165 | 				<CardContent>
 166 | 					<form
 167 | 						onSubmit={e => {
 168 | 							e.preventDefault();
 169 | 							e.stopPropagation();
 170 | 							form.handleSubmit();
 171 | 						}}
 172 | 					>
 173 | 						<div className='space-y-6'>
 174 | 							{/* Step 1: Select Patient */}
 175 | 							<form.Field name='patientId'>
 176 | 								{field => (
 177 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 178 | 										<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Select Child *</Label>
 179 | 										<Select
 180 | 											onValueChange={field.handleChange}
 181 | 											value={field.state.value}
 182 | 										>
 183 | 											<SelectTrigger id={field.name}>
 184 | 												<SelectValue placeholder='Choose your child' />
 185 | 											</SelectTrigger>
 186 | 											<SelectContent>
 187 | 												{patients.map(patient => (
 188 | 													<SelectItem
 189 | 														key={patient.id}
 190 | 														value={patient.id}
 191 | 													>
 192 | 														{patient.firstName} {patient.lastName}
 193 | 													</SelectItem>
 194 | 												))}
 195 | 											</SelectContent>
 196 | 										</Select>
 197 | 										{field.state.meta.isTouched && field.state.meta.errors.length > 0 && (
 198 | 											<p className='text-destructive text-sm'>{field.state.meta.errors[0]}</p>
 199 | 										)}
 200 | 									</div>
 201 | 								)}
 202 | 							</form.Field>
 203 | 
 204 | 							{/* Step 2: Select Service */}
 205 | 							<form.Field name='serviceId'>
 206 | 								{field => (
 207 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 208 | 										<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Service Type (Optional)</Label>
 209 | 										<Select
 210 | 											onValueChange={field.handleChange}
 211 | 											value={field.state.value || undefined}
 212 | 										>
 213 | 											<SelectTrigger id={field.name}>
 214 | 												<SelectValue placeholder='Select a service' />
 215 | 											</SelectTrigger>
 216 | 											<SelectContent>
 217 | 												<SelectItem value=''>General Consultation</SelectItem>
 218 | 												{services.map(service => (
 219 | 													<SelectItem
 220 | 														key={service.id}
 221 | 														value={service.id}
 222 | 													>
 223 | 														{service.serviceName} (${service.price})
 224 | 													</SelectItem>
 225 | 												))}
 226 | 											</SelectContent>
 227 | 										</Select>
 228 | 									</div>
 229 | 								)}
 230 | 							</form.Field>
 231 | 
 232 | 							{/* Step 3: Select Doctor */}
 233 | 							<form.Field name='doctorId'>
 234 | 								{field => (
 235 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 236 | 										<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Select Doctor *</Label>
 237 | 										<Select
 238 | 											onValueChange={value => {
 239 | 												field.handleChange(value);
 240 | 												// Reset date and time when doctor changes
 241 | 												form.setFieldValue("appointmentDate", undefined);
 242 | 												form.setFieldValue("time", "");
 243 | 											}}
 244 | 											value={field.state.value}
 245 | 										>
 246 | 											<SelectTrigger id={field.name}>
 247 | 												<SelectValue placeholder='Choose a doctor' />
 248 | 											</SelectTrigger>
 249 | 											<SelectContent>
 250 | 												{doctors.map(doctor => (
 251 | 													<SelectItem
 252 | 														key={doctor.id}
 253 | 														value={doctor.id}
 254 | 													>
 255 | 														Dr. {doctor.name} - {doctor.specialty}
 256 | 													</SelectItem>
 257 | 												))}
 258 | 											</SelectContent>
 259 | 										</Select>
 260 | 										{field.state.meta.isTouched && field.state.meta.errors.length > 0 && (
 261 | 											<p className='text-destructive text-sm'>{field.state.meta.errors[0]}</p>
 262 | 										)}
 263 | 									</div>
 264 | 								)}
 265 | 							</form.Field>
 266 | 
 267 | 							{/* Step 4: Select Date */}
 268 | 							<form.Field name='appointmentDate'>
 269 | 								{field => (
 270 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 271 | 										<Label>Select Date *</Label>
 272 | 										<Popover>
 273 | 											<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 274 | 												<Button
 275 | 													className={cn(
 276 | 														"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 277 | 														!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 278 | 													)}
 279 | 													variant='outline'
 280 | 												>
 281 | 													<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 282 | 													{field.state.value ? formatDate(field.state.value) : "Pick a date"}
 283 | 												</Button>
 284 | 											</PopoverTrigger>
 285 | 											<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
 286 | 												<Calendar
 287 | 													disabled={date => date < new Date()}
 288 | 													mode='single'
 289 | 													onSelect={date => {
 290 | 														field.handleChange(date);
 291 | 														form.setFieldValue("time", "");
 292 | 													}}
 293 | 													selected={field.state.value}
 294 | 												/>
 295 | 											</PopoverContent>
 296 | 										</Popover>
 297 | 									</div>
 298 | 								)}
 299 | 							</form.Field>
 300 | 
 301 | 							{/* Step 5: Select Time Slot */}
 302 | 							{selectedDoctor && selectedDate && (
 303 | 								<form.Field name='time'>
 304 | 									{field => (
 305 | 										<div className='space-y-2'>
 306 | 											<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Select Time *</Label>
 307 | 											{isLoadingSlots ? (
 308 | 												<div className='flex items-center justify-center py-4'>
 309 | 													<Loader2 className='h-6 w-6 animate-spin text-slate-400' />
 310 | 												</div>
 311 | 											) : availableSlots.length > 0 ? (
 312 | 												<div className='grid grid-cols-3 gap-2'>
 313 | 													{availableSlots.map(slot => (
 314 | 														<Button
 315 | 															className={cn(
 316 | 																"h-10",
 317 | 																field.state.value === slot &&
 318 | 																	"bg-primary text-primary-foreground"
 319 | 															)}
 320 | 															key={slot}
 321 | 															onClick={() => field.handleChange(slot)}
 322 | 															type='button'
 323 | 															variant={field.state.value === slot ? "default" : "outline"}
 324 | 														>
 325 | 															{slot}
 326 | 														</Button>
 327 | 													))}
 328 | 												</div>
 329 | 											) : (
 330 | 												<p className='py-4 text-center text-slate-500 text-sm'>
 331 | 													No available time slots for this date. Please select another date.
 332 | 												</p>
 333 | 											)}
 334 | 										</div>
 335 | 									)}
 336 | 								</form.Field>
 337 | 							)}
 338 | 
 339 | 							{/* Step 6: Reason */}
 340 | 							<form.Field name='reason'>
 341 | 								{field => (
 342 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 343 | 										<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Reason for Visit (Optional)</Label>
 344 | 										<Textarea
 345 | 											id={field.name}
 346 | 											onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 347 | 											placeholder='Please describe any symptoms or concerns...'
 348 | 											rows={3}
 349 | 											value={field.state.value}
 350 | 										/>
 351 | 									</div>
 352 | 								)}
 353 | 							</form.Field>
 354 | 
 355 | 							<div className='flex gap-3 pt-4'>
 356 | 								<Button
 357 | 									onClick={() => navigate({ to: "/appointments" })}
 358 | 									type='button'
 359 | 									variant='outline'
 360 | 								>
 361 | 									Cancel
 362 | 								</Button>
 363 | 								<Button
 364 | 									disabled={isSubmitting}
 365 | 									type='submit'
 366 | 								>
 367 | 									{isSubmitting ? (
 368 | 										<>
 369 | 											<Loader2 className='mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin' />
 370 | 											Booking...
 371 | 										</>
 372 | 									) : (
 373 | 										"Book Appointment"
 374 | 									)}
 375 | 								</Button>
 376 | 							</div>
 377 | 						</div>
 378 | 					</form>
 379 | 				</CardContent>
 380 | 			</Card>
 381 | 		</div>
 382 | 	);
 383 | }

```

`routes/appointments/index.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/appointments/index.tsx
   2 | import { createFileRoute, Link, redirect } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import { Calendar, Clock, FileText, Stethoscope, XCircle } from "lucide-react";
   4 | 
   5 | import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
   6 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   7 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
   8 | import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
   9 | import { getMyAppointments } from "@/data/appointments";
  10 | import { formatDate, formatTime } from "@/utils/formDate";
  11 | 
  12 | type AppointmentListItem = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getMyAppointments>>[number];
  13 | 
  14 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/appointments/")({
  15 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  16 | 		const session = context.session;
  17 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  18 | 		return { user: session.user };
  19 | 	},
  20 | 	loader: async () => getMyAppointments(),
  21 | 	component: MyAppointmentsPage
  22 | });
  23 | 
  24 | const statusColors = {
  25 | 	PENDING: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-900/30 dark:text-yellow-400",
  26 | 	CONFIRMED: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400",
  27 | 	COMPLETED: "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400",
  28 | 	CANCELLED: "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400",
  29 | 	NO_SHOW: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400"
  30 | };
  31 | 
  32 | const statusLabels = {
  33 | 	PENDING: "Pending",
  34 | 	CONFIRMED: "Confirmed",
  35 | 	COMPLETED: "Completed",
  36 | 	CANCELLED: "Cancelled",
  37 | 	NO_SHOW: "No Show"
  38 | };
  39 | 
  40 | function MyAppointmentsPage() {
  41 | 	const appointments = Route.useLoaderData();
  42 | 
  43 | 	const upcoming = appointments.filter(
  44 | 		apt => new Date(apt.appointmentDate) >= new Date() && apt.status !== "CANCELLED" && apt.status !== "COMPLETED"
  45 | 	);
  46 | 
  47 | 	const past = appointments.filter(apt => new Date(apt.appointmentDate) < new Date() || apt.status === "COMPLETED");
  48 | 
  49 | 	return (
  50 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-4xl space-y-6 py-8'>
  51 | 			<div className='flex flex-col justify-between gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center'>
  52 | 				<div>
  53 | 					<h1 className='font-semibold text-2xl'>My Appointments</h1>
  54 | 					<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
  55 | 						View and manage your scheduled appointments
  56 | 					</p>
  57 | 				</div>
  58 | 				<Link to='/appointments/book'>
  59 | 					<Button>
  60 | 						<Calendar className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
  61 | 						Book New Appointment
  62 | 					</Button>
  63 | 				</Link>
  64 | 			</div>
  65 | 
  66 | 			<Tabs
  67 | 				className='space-y-4'
  68 | 				defaultValue='upcoming'
  69 | 			>
  70 | 				<TabsList>
  71 | 					<TabsTrigger value='upcoming'>Upcoming ({upcoming.length})</TabsTrigger>
  72 | 					<TabsTrigger value='past'>Past ({past.length})</TabsTrigger>
  73 | 				</TabsList>
  74 | 
  75 | 				<TabsContent
  76 | 					className='space-y-4'
  77 | 					value='upcoming'
  78 | 				>
  79 | 					{upcoming.length === 0 ? (
  80 | 						<EmptyAppointmentsState type='upcoming' />
  81 | 					) : (
  82 | 						upcoming.map(appointment => (
  83 | 							<AppointmentCard
  84 | 								appointment={appointment}
  85 | 								key={appointment.id}
  86 | 							/>
  87 | 						))
  88 | 					)}
  89 | 				</TabsContent>
  90 | 
  91 | 				<TabsContent
  92 | 					className='space-y-4'
  93 | 					value='past'
  94 | 				>
  95 | 					{past.length === 0 ? (
  96 | 						<EmptyAppointmentsState type='past' />
  97 | 					) : (
  98 | 						past.map(appointment => (
  99 | 							<AppointmentCard
 100 | 								appointment={appointment}
 101 | 								key={appointment.id}
 102 | 							/>
 103 | 						))
 104 | 					)}
 105 | 				</TabsContent>
 106 | 			</Tabs>
 107 | 		</div>
 108 | 	);
 109 | }
 110 | 
 111 | function AppointmentCard({ appointment }: { appointment: AppointmentListItem }) {
 112 | 	const appointmentDate = new Date(appointment.appointmentDate);
 113 | 	const isUpcoming = appointmentDate >= new Date() && appointment.status !== "CANCELLED";
 114 | 	const isCancellable = isUpcoming && appointment.status === "CONFIRMED";
 115 | 
 116 | 	return (
 117 | 		<Card className='transition-all hover:shadow-md'>
 118 | 			<CardHeader className='flex flex-col space-y-2 pb-3'>
 119 | 				<div className='flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-2'>
 120 | 					<div className='space-y-1'>
 121 | 						<CardTitle className='text-lg'>
 122 | 							{appointment.patientFirstName} {appointment.patientLastName}
 123 | 						</CardTitle>
 124 | 						<CardDescription className='flex flex-wrap gap-3'>
 125 | 							<span className='flex items-center gap-1 text-sm'>
 126 | 								<Stethoscope className='h-3.5 w-3.5' />
 127 | 								Dr. {appointment.doctorName}
 128 | 							</span>
 129 | 							<span className='flex items-center gap-1 text-sm'>
 130 | 								<span className='text-slate-400'>|</span>
 131 | 								{appointment.doctorSpecialty}
 132 | 							</span>
 133 | 						</CardDescription>
 134 | 					</div>
 135 | 					<Badge className={statusColors[appointment.status as keyof typeof statusColors]}>
 136 | 						{statusLabels[appointment.status as keyof typeof statusLabels]}
 137 | 					</Badge>
 138 | 				</div>
 139 | 			</CardHeader>
 140 | 
 141 | 			<CardContent className='space-y-3 pb-4'>
 142 | 				<div className='grid gap-2 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 143 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 144 | 						<Calendar className='h-4 w-4' />
 145 | 						<span>{formatDate(appointmentDate)}</span>
 146 | 					</div>
 147 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 148 | 						<Clock className='h-4 w-4' />
 149 | 						<span>{appointment.time || formatTime(appointmentDate)}</span>
 150 | 					</div>
 151 | 					{appointment.type && (
 152 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 153 | 							<FileText className='h-4 w-4' />
 154 | 							<span className='capitalize'>{appointment.type.toLowerCase()}</span>
 155 | 						</div>
 156 | 					)}
 157 | 				</div>
 158 | 
 159 | 				{appointment.reason && (
 160 | 					<div className='rounded-lg bg-slate-50 p-3 text-sm dark:bg-slate-800/50'>
 161 | 						<p className='font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300'>Reason for visit:</p>
 162 | 						<p className='text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400'>{appointment.reason}</p>
 163 | 					</div>
 164 | 				)}
 165 | 
 166 | 				<div className='flex flex-wrap gap-2 pt-2'>
 167 | 					{isCancellable && (
 168 | 						<Link
 169 | 							params={{ id: appointment.id }}
 170 | 							to='/appointments/$id/cancel'
 171 | 						>
 172 | 							<Button
 173 | 								className='text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700'
 174 | 								size='sm'
 175 | 								variant='outline'
 176 | 							>
 177 | 								<XCircle className='mr-1 h-3.5 w-3.5' />
 178 | 								Cancel
 179 | 							</Button>
 180 | 						</Link>
 181 | 					)}
 182 | 					<Link
 183 | 						params={{ id: appointment.id }}
 184 | 						to='/appointments/$id'
 185 | 					>
 186 | 						<Button
 187 | 							size='sm'
 188 | 							variant='ghost'
 189 | 						>
 190 | 							View Details
 191 | 						</Button>
 192 | 					</Link>
 193 | 				</div>
 194 | 			</CardContent>
 195 | 		</Card>
 196 | 	);
 197 | }
 198 | 
 199 | function EmptyAppointmentsState({ type }: { type: "upcoming" | "past" }) {
 200 | 	return (
 201 | 		<Card className='py-12 text-center'>
 202 | 			<CardContent>
 203 | 				<div className='mx-auto flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800'>
 204 | 					<Calendar className='h-6 w-6 text-slate-400' />
 205 | 				</div>
 206 | 				<h3 className='mt-4 font-semibold text-lg'>No {type} appointments</h3>
 207 | 				<p className='mt-2 text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 208 | 					{type === "upcoming"
 209 | 						? "You don't have any upcoming appointments scheduled."
 210 | 						: "Your past appointments will appear here."}
 211 | 				</p>
 212 | 				{type === "upcoming" && (
 213 | 					<Link
 214 | 						className='mt-4 inline-block'
 215 | 						to='/appointments/book'
 216 | 					>
 217 | 						<Button>Book an Appointment</Button>
 218 | 					</Link>
 219 | 				)}
 220 | 			</CardContent>
 221 | 		</Card>
 222 | 	);
 223 | }

```

`routes/appointments/manage.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/appointments/manage.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { createFileRoute, redirect, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   4 | import { type ColumnDef, flexRender, getCoreRowModel, useReactTable } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   5 | import { Calendar, CheckCircle, Clock, Eye, MoreHorizontal, XCircle } from "lucide-react";
   6 | import { useState } from "react";
   7 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   8 | import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
   9 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
  10 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
  11 | import {
  12 | 	Dialog,
  13 | 	DialogContent,
  14 | 	DialogDescription,
  15 | 	DialogFooter,
  16 | 	DialogHeader,
  17 | 	DialogTitle
  18 | } from "@/components/ui/dialog";
  19 | import {
  20 | 	DropdownMenu,
  21 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
  22 | 	DropdownMenuItem,
  23 | 	DropdownMenuLabel,
  24 | 	DropdownMenuSeparator,
  25 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  26 | } from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  27 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  28 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
  29 | import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
  30 | import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
  31 | import type { getAppointmentById } from "@/data/appointments";
  32 | import { cancelAppointment, getAllAppointments, updateAppointmentStatus } from "@/data/appointments";
  33 | import { formatDate, formatTime } from "@/utils/formDate";
  34 | import type { AppointmentStatus } from "../../db/schema";
  35 | 
  36 | type AppointmentDetail = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getAppointmentById>>;
  37 | 
  38 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/appointments/manage")({
  39 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  40 | 		const session = context.session;
  41 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  42 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw redirect({ to: "/" });
  43 | 		return { user: session.user };
  44 | 	},
  45 | 	loader: async () => getAllAppointments(),
  46 | 	component: ManageAppointmentsPage
  47 | });
  48 | 
  49 | const statusColors = {
  50 | 	PENDING: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-900/30 dark:text-yellow-400",
  51 | 	CONFIRMED: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400",
  52 | 	COMPLETED: "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400",
  53 | 	CANCELLED: "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400",
  54 | 	NO_SHOW: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400"
  55 | };
  56 | 
  57 | const statusOptions = [
  58 | 	{ value: "PENDING", label: "Pending" },
  59 | 	{ value: "CONFIRMED", label: "Confirmed" },
  60 | 	{ value: "COMPLETED", label: "Completed" },
  61 | 	{ value: "CANCELLED", label: "Cancelled" },
  62 | 	{ value: "NO_SHOW", label: "No Show" }
  63 | ];
  64 | 
  65 | function ManageAppointmentsPage() {
  66 | 	const router = useRouter();
  67 | 	const appointments = Route.useLoaderData();
  68 | 	const [selectedAppointment, setSelectedAppointment] = useState<AppointmentDetail | null>(null);
  69 | 	const [isUpdating, setIsUpdating] = useState(false);
  70 | 	const [cancelReason, setCancelReason] = useState("");
  71 | 	const [showCancelDialog, setShowCancelDialog] = useState(false);
  72 | 
  73 | 	const columns: ColumnDef<(typeof appointments)[number]>[] = [
  74 | 		{
  75 | 			accessorKey: "appointmentDate",
  76 | 			header: "Date & Time",

  86 | 					</div>

  96 | 						{row.original.patientFirstName} {row.original.patientLastName}
  97 | 					</p>
  98 | 				</div>
  99 | 			)

 113 | 			header: "Type",
 114 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (

 116 | 			)
 117 | 		},
 118 | 		{
 119 | 			accessorKey: "status",
 120 | 			header: "Status",
 121 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
 122 | 				<Badge className={statusColors[row.original.status as keyof typeof statusColors]}>
 123 | 					{row.original.status}
 124 | 				</Badge>
 125 | 			)
 126 | 		},
 127 | 		{
 128 | 			id: "actions",
 129 | 			header: "Actions",
 130 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
 131 | 				<DropdownMenu>
 132 | 					<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
 133 | 						<Button
 134 | 							size='icon'
 135 | 							variant='ghost'
 136 | 						>
 137 | 							<MoreHorizontal className='h-4 w-4' />
 138 | 							<span className='sr-only'>Open menu</span>
 139 | 						</Button>
 140 | 					</DropdownMenuTrigger>

 142 | 						<DropdownMenuLabel>Actions</DropdownMenuLabel>

 146 | 							<Eye className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 147 | 							View Details
 148 | 						</DropdownMenuItem>
 149 | 						<DropdownMenuSeparator />
 150 | 						{row.original.status !== "COMPLETED" && row.original.status !== "CANCELLED" && (
 151 | 							<>
 152 | 								<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleStatusUpdate(row.original.id, "CONFIRMED")}>
 153 | 									<CheckCircle className='mr-2 h-4 w-4 text-green-600' />
 154 | 									Confirm
 155 | 								</DropdownMenuItem>
 156 | 								<DropdownMenuItem
 157 | 									className='text-red-600'
 158 | 									onClick={() => {
 159 | 										setSelectedAppointment(row.original as unknown as AppointmentDetail);
 160 | 										setShowCancelDialog(true);
 161 | 									}}
 162 | 								>
 163 | 									<XCircle className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 164 | 									Cancel
 165 | 								</DropdownMenuItem>
 166 | 							</>
 167 | 						)}
 168 | 						{row.original.status === "CONFIRMED" && (
 169 | 							<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleStatusUpdate(row.original.id, "COMPLETED")}>
 170 | 								<CheckCircle className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 171 | 								Mark Complete
 172 | 							</DropdownMenuItem>
 173 | 						)}
 174 | 					</DropdownMenuContent>
 175 | 				</DropdownMenu>
 176 | 			)
 177 | 		}
 178 | 	];
 179 |

 181 | 		data: appointments,
 182 | 		columns,
 183 | 		getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel()
 184 | 	});
 185 | 
 186 | 	const handleStatusUpdate = async (appointmentId: string, status: string) => {
 187 | 		setIsUpdating(true);
 188 | 		try {
 189 | 			await updateAppointmentStatus({
 190 | 				data: { appointmentId, status: status as AppointmentStatus }
 191 | 			});
 192 | 			await router.invalidate();
 193 | 			toast.success(`Appointment ${status.toLowerCase()} successfully`);
 194 | 		} catch (error) {
 195 | 			console.error(error);
 196 | 			toast.error("Failed to update appointment status");
 197 | 		} finally {
 198 | 			setIsUpdating(false);
 199 | 		}
 200 | 	};
 201 | 
 202 | 	const handleCancel = async () => {
 203 | 		if (!selectedAppointment) return;
 204 | 		setIsUpdating(true);
 205 | 		try {
 206 | 			await cancelAppointment({
 207 | 				data: { appointmentId: selectedAppointment.id, reason: cancelReason }
 208 | 			});
 209 | 			await router.invalidate();
 210 | 			toast.success("Appointment cancelled successfully");
 211 | 			setShowCancelDialog(false);
 212 | 			setCancelReason("");
 213 | 			setSelectedAppointment(null);
 214 | 		} catch (error) {
 215 | 			console.error(error);
 216 | 			toast.error("Failed to cancel appointment");
 217 | 		} finally {
 218 | 			setIsUpdating(false);
 219 | 		}
 220 | 	};
 221 | 
 222 | 	const pendingCount = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "PENDING").length;
 223 | 	const confirmedCount = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CONFIRMED").length;
 224 | 	const completedCount = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED").length;
 225 | 
 226 | 	return (
 227 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 py-8'>
 228 | 			<div className='space-y-6'>
 229 | 				{/* Header */}
 230 | 				<div className='flex flex-col justify-between gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center'>
 231 | 					<div>
 232 | 						<h1 className='font-semibold text-2xl'>Manage Appointments</h1>
 233 | 						<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 234 | 							View and manage all clinic appointments
 235 | 						</p>
 236 | 					</div>
 237 | 				</div>
 238 | 
 239 | 				{/* Stats Cards */}
 240 | 				<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-3'>
 241 | 					<Card>
 242 | 						<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
 243 | 							<CardTitle className='font-medium text-slate-500 text-sm'>Pending</CardTitle>
 244 | 						</CardHeader>
 245 | 						<CardContent>
 246 | 							<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{pendingCount}</p>
 247 | 						</CardContent>
 248 | 					</Card>
 249 | 					<Card>
 250 | 						<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
 251 | 							<CardTitle className='font-medium text-slate-500 text-sm'>Confirmed</CardTitle>
 252 | 						</CardHeader>
 253 | 						<CardContent>
 254 | 							<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{confirmedCount}</p>
 255 | 						</CardContent>
 256 | 					</Card>
 257 | 					<Card>
 258 | 						<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
 259 | 							<CardTitle className='font-medium text-slate-500 text-sm'>Completed</CardTitle>
 260 | 						</CardHeader>
 261 | 						<CardContent>
 262 | 							<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{completedCount}</p>
 263 | 						</CardContent>
 264 | 					</Card>
 265 | 				</div>

 273 | 						</CardDescription>
 274 | 					</CardHeader>

 278 | 								{table.getHeaderGroups().map(headerGroup => (

 280 | 										{headerGroup.headers.map(header => (

 284 | 													: flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}

 286 | 										))}
 287 | 									</TableRow>
 288 | 								))}
 289 | 							</TableHeader>
 290 | 							<TableBody>
 291 | 								{table.getRowModel().rows.length ? (

 294 | 											{row.getVisibleCells().map(cell => (
 295 | 												<TableCell key={cell.id}>
 296 | 													{flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
 297 | 												</TableCell>
 298 | 											))}
 299 | 										</TableRow>
 300 | 									))
 301 | 								) : (

 307 | 											No appointments found.
 308 | 										</TableCell>
 309 | 									</TableRow>
 310 | 								)}
 311 | 							</TableBody>
 312 | 						</Table>
 313 | 					</CardContent>
 314 | 				</Card>
 315 | 			</div>
 316 |

 318 | 			<Dialog
 319 | 				onOpenChange={() => setSelectedAppointment(null)}
 320 | 				open={!!selectedAppointment && !showCancelDialog}
 321 | 			>
 322 | 				<DialogContent className='max-w-lg'>
 323 | 					<DialogHeader>
 324 | 						<DialogTitle>Appointment Details</DialogTitle>
 325 | 						<DialogDescription>Detailed information about the appointment</DialogDescription>
 326 | 					</DialogHeader>
 327 | 					{selectedAppointment && (
 328 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 329 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-4'>
 330 | 								<div>

 332 | 									<p className='font-medium'>
 333 | 										{selectedAppointment.patient.firstName} {selectedAppointment.patient.lastName}
 334 | 									</p>
 335 | 								</div>
 336 | 								<div>
 337 | 									<Label className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Doctor</Label>
 338 | 									<p className='font-medium'>Dr. {selectedAppointment.doctor.name}</p>
 339 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>{selectedAppointment.doctor.specialty}</p>
 340 | 								</div>
 341 | 								<div>
 342 | 									<Label className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Date & Time</Label>

 344 | 										{formatDate(selectedAppointment.appointmentDate)} at{" "}

 346 | 									</p>
 347 | 								</div>
 348 | 								<div>
 349 | 									<Label className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Status</Label>
 350 | 									<Badge
 351 | 										className={
 352 | 											statusColors[selectedAppointment.status as keyof typeof statusColors]
 353 | 										}
 354 | 									>
 355 | 										{selectedAppointment.status}
 356 | 									</Badge>
 357 | 								</div>
 358 | 							</div>
 359 | 
 360 | 							{selectedAppointment.reason && (

 362 | 									<Label className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Reason for Visit</Label>

 365 | 									</p>

 367 | 							)}
 368 | 
 369 | 							{selectedAppointment.note && (
 370 | 								<div>
 371 | 									<Label className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Notes</Label>
 372 | 									<p className='text-sm'>{selectedAppointment.note}</p>
 373 | 								</div>
 374 | 							)}
 375 | 
 376 | 							<div className='flex gap-2 pt-4'>
 377 | 								<Select
 378 | 									onValueChange={value => handleStatusUpdate(selectedAppointment.id, value)}
 379 | 									value={selectedAppointment.status as AppointmentStatus}
 380 | 								>
 381 | 									<SelectTrigger className='w-40'>
 382 | 										<SelectValue />
 383 | 									</SelectTrigger>
 384 | 									<SelectContent>
 385 | 										{statusOptions.map(opt => (

 387 | 												key={opt.value}

 389 | 											>
 390 | 												{opt.label}
 391 | 											</SelectItem>
 392 | 										))}
 393 | 									</SelectContent>
 394 | 								</Select>
 395 | 								<Button
 396 | 									onClick={() => setSelectedAppointment(null)}
 397 | 									variant='outline'
 398 | 								>
 399 | 									Close
 400 | 								</Button>
 401 | 							</div>
 402 | 						</div>
 403 | 					)}
 404 | 				</DialogContent>
 405 | 			</Dialog>
 406 | 
 407 | 			{/* Cancel Confirmation Dialog */}
 408 | 			<Dialog
 409 | 				onOpenChange={setShowCancelDialog}
 410 | 				open={showCancelDialog}
 411 | 			>
 412 | 				<DialogContent>
 413 | 					<DialogHeader>
 414 | 						<DialogTitle>Cancel Appointment</DialogTitle>
 415 | 						<DialogDescription>
 416 | 							Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment? This action cannot be undone.
 417 | 						</DialogDescription>
 418 | 					</DialogHeader>
 419 | 					<div className='space-y-3'>
 420 | 						<Label htmlFor='cancelReason'>Reason for cancellation (Optional)</Label>
 421 | 						<Textarea
 422 | 							id='cancelReason'
 423 | 							onChange={e => setCancelReason(e.target.value)}
 424 | 							placeholder='Enter cancellation reason...'
 425 | 							rows={3}
 426 | 							value={cancelReason}
 427 | 						/>
 428 | 					</div>
 429 | 					<DialogFooter>
 430 | 						<Button
 431 | 							disabled={isUpdating}
 432 | 							onClick={() => setShowCancelDialog(false)}
 433 | 							variant='outline'
 434 | 						>
 435 | 							Keep Appointment
 436 | 						</Button>
 437 | 						<Button
 438 | 							disabled={isUpdating}
 439 | 							onClick={handleCancel}
 440 | 							variant='destructive'
 441 | 						>
 442 | 							{isUpdating ? "Cancelling..." : "Yes, Cancel Appointment"}
 443 | 						</Button>
 444 | 					</DialogFooter>
 445 | 				</DialogContent>
 446 | 			</Dialog>
 447 | 		</div>
 448 | 	);
 449 | }

```

`routes/cart.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | import { createFileRoute, Link, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import { Minus, Plus, ShoppingBag } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { useState } from "react";
   5 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   6 | import { clearCart, fetchCartItems, removeFromCart, updateCartQuantity } from "#/data/cart";
   7 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   8 | import { Empty, EmptyContent, EmptyDescription, EmptyHeader, EmptyMedia, EmptyTitle } from "@/components/ui/empty";
   9 | import { createCheckoutSession } from "@/data/checkout";
  10 | 
  11 | // DB shape: Array<{ id: string; name: string; price: string; quantity: number; image: string; inventory: string }>
  12 | // Mock — same shape as the DB response above, useful when copying to another project
  13 | // const cart: CartItem[] = [
  14 | // 	{
  15 | // 		id: "1",

  17 | // 		name: "TanStack Router Pro",
  18 | // 		price: "99.99",
  19 | // 		quantity: 2,
  20 | // 		image: "/tanstack-circle-logo.png",
  21 | // 		inventory: "in-stock",
  22 | // 	},
  23 | // ];

  26 | // 	id: string;
  27 | // 	productId: string;
  28 | // 	name: string;

  35 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/cart")({
  36 | 	component: CartPage,
  37 | 	loader: async () => {
  38 | 		return await fetchCartItems();
  39 | 	}
  40 | });
  41 | 
  42 | function CartPage() {
  43 | 	const router = useRouter();
  44 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  45 | 	const cart = Route.useLoaderData();
  46 | 	const [clearing, setClearing] = useState(false);
  47 | 	const [removingId, setRemovingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  48 | 	const [updatingId, setUpdatingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  49 | 	const [checkingOut, setCheckingOut] = useState(false);
  50 | 
  51 | 	const subtotal = cart.reduce((acc, item) => acc + Number(item.price) * item.quantity, 0);
  52 | 	const shipping = 0;
  53 | 	const total = subtotal + shipping;
  54 | 
  55 | 	async function handleUpdateQuantity(cartItemId: string, delta: 1 | -1) {
  56 | 		setUpdatingId(cartItemId);
  57 | 		await updateCartQuantity({ data: { cartItemId, delta } });
  58 | 		await queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: cartCountQueryKey });
  59 | 		router.invalidate();
  60 | 		setUpdatingId(null);
  61 | 	}
  62 | 
  63 | 	// ✅ EMPTY CART
  64 | 	if (cart.length === 0) {
  65 | 		return (
  66 | 			<div className='mx-auto max-w-5xl rounded-2xl border bg-white/80 p-6 shadow-sm dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-900/80'>
  67 | 				<Empty>
  68 | 					<EmptyHeader>
  69 | 						<EmptyMedia variant='icon'>
  70 | 							<ShoppingBag className='size-6' />
  71 | 						</EmptyMedia>
  72 | 
  73 | 						<EmptyTitle>Your cart is empty</EmptyTitle>
  74 | 
  75 | 						<EmptyDescription>Add a few items from the catalog to see them here.</EmptyDescription>
  76 | 					</EmptyHeader>
  77 | 
  78 | 					<EmptyContent>
  79 | 						<Link to='/products'>
  80 | 							<Button>Browse products</Button>
  81 | 						</Link>
  82 | 					</EmptyContent>
  83 | 				</Empty>
  84 | 			</div>
  85 | 		);
  86 | 	}
  87 | 
  88 | 	// ✅ NORMAL CART
  89 | 	return (
  90 | 		<div className='mx-auto grid max-w-5xl gap-6 rounded-2xl border bg-white/80 p-6 shadow-sm lg:grid-cols-[2fr,1fr] dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-900/80'>
  91 | 			<div className='space-y-4'>
  92 | 				<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  93 | 					<div>
  94 | 						<h1 className='font-semibold text-2xl'>Cart</h1>
  95 | 
  96 | 						<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-300'>
  97 | 							Review your picks before checking out.
  98 | 						</p>
  99 | 					</div>
 100 | 
 101 | 					<Button
 102 | 						disabled={clearing}
 103 | 						onClick={async () => {
 104 | 							setClearing(true);
 105 | 							await clearCart();
 106 | 							await queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 107 | 								queryKey: cartCountQueryKey
 108 | 							});
 109 | 							router.invalidate();
 110 | 							setClearing(false);
 111 | 						}}
 112 | 						size='sm'
 113 | 						type='button'
 114 | 						variant='ghost'
 115 | 					>
 116 | 						{clearing ? "Clearing..." : "Clear cart"}
 117 | 					</Button>
 118 | 				</div>
 119 | 
 120 | 				<div className='divide-y divide-slate-200 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-xs dark:divide-slate-800 dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-950/40'>
 121 | 					{cart.map(item => {
 122 | 						const isBusy = updatingId === item.id || removingId === item.id;
 123 | 
 124 | 						return (
 125 | 							<div
 126 | 								className='grid gap-4 p-4 sm:grid-cols-[auto,1fr,auto]'
 127 | 								key={item.id}
 128 | 							>
 129 | 								<div className='hidden h-20 w-20 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 sm:flex dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-900'>
 130 | 									<img
 131 | 										alt={item.name}
 132 | 										className='h-12 w-12 object-contain'
 133 | 										loading='lazy'
 134 | 										src={item.image}
 135 | 									/>
 136 | 								</div>
 137 | 
 138 | 								<div className='space-y-1'>
 139 | 									<Link
 140 | 										className='font-semibold text-base hover:text-blue-600 dark:hover:text-blue-400'
 141 | 										params={{ id: item.productId }}
 142 | 										to='/products/$id'
 143 | 									>
 144 | 										{item.name}
 145 | 									</Link>
 146 | 
 147 | 									<div className='flex items-center gap-3 font-semibold text-sm'>
 148 | 										<span>${Number(item.price).toFixed(2)}</span>
 149 | 
 150 | 										<span className='text-slate-400'>·</span>
 151 | 
 152 | 										<span className='text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300'>
 153 | 											{item.inventory === "in-stock"
 154 | 												? "In stock"
 155 | 												: item.inventory === "backorder"
 156 | 													? "Backorder"
 157 | 													: "Preorder"}
 158 | 										</span>
 159 | 									</div>
 160 | 								</div>
 161 | 
 162 | 								<div className='flex flex-col items-end gap-3 sm:items-center sm:justify-between sm:gap-2 sm:text-right'>
 163 | 									<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 164 | 										<Button
 165 | 											disabled={isBusy}
 166 | 											onClick={() => handleUpdateQuantity(item.id, -1)}
 167 | 											size='icon'
 168 | 											type='button'
 169 | 											variant='outline'
 170 | 										>
 171 | 											<Minus size={14} />
 172 | 										</Button>
 173 | 
 174 | 										<input
 175 | 											className='h-9 w-14 rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white text-center font-semibold text-sm shadow-xs dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-900'
 176 | 											max={99}
 177 | 											min={1}
 178 | 											readOnly
 179 | 											type='number'
 180 | 											value={item.quantity}
 181 | 										/>
 182 | 
 183 | 										<Button
 184 | 											disabled={isBusy}
 185 | 											onClick={() => handleUpdateQuantity(item.id, 1)}
 186 | 											size='icon'
 187 | 											type='button'
 188 | 											variant='outline'
 189 | 										>
 190 | 											<Plus size={14} />
 191 | 										</Button>
 192 | 									</div>
 193 | 
 194 | 									<div className='font-semibold text-sm'>
 195 | 										${(Number(item.price) * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}
 196 | 									</div>
 197 | 
 198 | 									<Button
 199 | 										className='text-slate-500 hover:text-red-500'
 200 | 										disabled={isBusy}
 201 | 										onClick={async () => {
 202 | 											setRemovingId(item.id);
 203 | 											await removeFromCart({
 204 | 												data: { cartItemId: item.id }
 205 | 											});
 206 | 											await queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 207 | 												queryKey: cartCountQueryKey
 208 | 											});
 209 | 											router.invalidate();
 210 | 											setRemovingId(null);
 211 | 										}}
 212 | 										size='sm'
 213 | 										type='button'
 214 | 										variant='ghost'
 215 | 									>
 216 | 										{removingId === item.id ? "Removing..." : "Remove"}
 217 | 									</Button>
 218 | 								</div>
 219 | 							</div>
 220 | 						);
 221 | 					})}
 222 | 				</div>
 223 | 			</div>
 224 | 
 225 | 			<div className='h-fit rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-5 shadow-xs dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-950/40'>
 226 | 				<h2 className='font-semibold text-lg'>Order Summary</h2>
 227 | 
 228 | 				<div className='mt-4 space-y-3 text-sm'>
 229 | 					<div className='flex justify-between'>
 230 | 						<span className='text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300'>Subtotal</span>
 231 | 
 232 | 						<span className='font-semibold'>${subtotal.toFixed(2)}</span>
 233 | 					</div>
 234 | 
 235 | 					<div className='flex justify-between'>
 236 | 						<span className='text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300'>Shipping</span>
 237 | 
 238 | 						<span className='font-semibold'>${shipping.toFixed(2)}</span>
 239 | 					</div>
 240 | 
 241 | 					<div className='flex justify-between border-t pt-3 font-bold text-base dark:border-slate-800'>
 242 | 						<span>Total</span>
 243 | 
 244 | 						<span>${total.toFixed(2)}</span>
 245 | 					</div>
 246 | 				</div>
 247 | 
 248 | 				<Button
 249 | 					className='mt-5 w-full'
 250 | 					disabled={checkingOut}
 251 | 					onClick={async () => {
 252 | 						setCheckingOut(true);
 253 | 						try {
 254 | 							const { url } = await createCheckoutSession();
 255 | 							window.location.href = url;
 256 | 						} catch (error) {
 257 | 							toast.error(
 258 | 								error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to start checkout. Please try again."
 259 | 							);
 260 | 							setCheckingOut(false);
 261 | 						}
 262 | 					}}
 263 | 					type='button'
 264 | 				>
 265 | 					{checkingOut ? "Redirecting to Stripe..." : "Checkout"}
 266 | 				</Button>
 267 | 			</div>
 268 | 		</div>
 269 | 	);
 270 | }

```

`routes/checkout/cancel.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { createFileRoute, Link } from "@tanstack/react-router";

   6 | 	component: CheckoutCancel
   7 | });

   9 | function CheckoutCancel() {

  11 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-lg py-20 text-center'>
  12 | 			<div className='mx-auto flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-orange-100 dark:bg-orange-900/30'>
  13 | 				<XCircle className='h-8 w-8 text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400' />
  14 | 			</div>
  15 | 
  16 | 			<h1 className='mt-6 font-bold text-2xl'>Payment cancelled</h1>
  17 | 
  18 | 			<p className='mt-2 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300'>
  19 | 				No worries — your cart is still saved. Come back whenever you're ready.
  20 | 			</p>
  21 | 
  22 | 			<div className='mt-8 flex items-center justify-center gap-3'>
  23 | 				<Link to='/cart'>
  24 | 					<Button variant='outline'>Back to cart</Button>
  25 | 				</Link>
  26 | 
  27 | 				<Link to='/products'>

  29 | 				</Link>
  30 | 			</div>
```

`routes/checkout/success.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | import { createFileRoute, Link } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import { CheckCircle, Loader2 } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
   5 | import { cartCountQueryKey } from "#/components/Header";
   6 | import { Button } from "#/components/ui/button";
   7 | import { confirmOrder } from "#/data/checkout";
   8 | 
   9 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/checkout/success")({
  10 | 	component: CheckoutSuccess
  11 | });
  12 | 
  13 | function CheckoutSuccess() {
  14 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  15 | 	const confirmed = useRef(false);
  16 | 	const [status, setStatus] = useState<"loading" | "success" | "error">("loading");
  17 | 
  18 | 	// Runs once when the page loads — verifies payment with Stripe
  19 | 	useEffect(() => {
  20 | 		if (confirmed.current) return;
  21 | 		confirmed.current = true;
  22 | 
  23 | 		const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  24 | 		const sessionId = params.get("session_id");
  25 | 
  26 | 		if (!sessionId) {
  27 | 			setStatus("error");
  28 | 			return;
  29 | 		}
  30 | 
  31 | 		confirmOrder({ data: { sessionId } })
  32 | 			.then(() => {
  33 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: cartCountQueryKey });
  34 | 				setStatus("success");
  35 | 			})
  36 | 			.catch(() => {
  37 | 				setStatus("error");
  38 | 			});
  39 | 	}, [queryClient]);
  40 | 
  41 | 	if (status === "loading") {
  42 | 		return (
  43 | 			<div className='mx-auto max-w-lg py-20 text-center'>
  44 | 				<Loader2 className='mx-auto h-8 w-8 animate-spin text-slate-400' />
  45 | 				<p className='mt-4 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300'>Verifying your payment...</p>
  46 | 			</div>
  47 | 		);
  48 | 	}
  49 | 
  50 | 	if (status === "error") {
  51 | 		return (
  52 | 			<div className='mx-auto max-w-lg py-20 text-center'>
  53 | 				<h1 className='font-bold text-2xl'>Something went wrong</h1>
  54 | 				<p className='mt-2 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300'>
  55 | 					We couldn't verify your payment. If you were charged, please contact support.
  56 | 				</p>
  57 | 				<Link
  58 | 					className='mt-6 inline-block'
  59 | 					to='/products'
  60 | 				>
  61 | 					<Button>Back to products</Button>
  62 | 				</Link>
  63 | 			</div>
  64 | 		);
  65 | 	}
  66 | 
  67 | 	return (
  68 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-lg py-20 text-center'>
  69 | 			<div className='mx-auto flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-green-100 dark:bg-green-900/30'>
  70 | 				<CheckCircle className='h-8 w-8 text-green-600 dark:text-green-400' />
  71 | 			</div>
  72 | 
  73 | 			<h1 className='mt-6 font-bold text-2xl'>Payment successful!</h1>
  74 | 
  75 | 			<p className='mt-2 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300'>
  76 | 				Thank you for your purchase. Your order is being processed.
  77 | 			</p>
  78 | 
  79 | 			<div className='mt-8 flex items-center justify-center gap-3'>
  80 | 				<Link to='/orders'>
  81 | 					<Button variant='outline'>View my orders</Button>
  82 | 				</Link>
  83 | 
  84 | 				<Link to='/products'>
  85 | 					<Button>Continue shopping</Button>
  86 | 				</Link>
  87 | 			</div>
  88 | 		</div>
  89 | 	);
  90 | }

```

`routes/encounters/$id.edit.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { LoadingSpinner } from "@/components/LoadingSpinner";
   2 | import { Alert, AlertDescription } from "@/components/ui/alert";
   3 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
   6 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
   7 | import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
   8 | import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
   9 | import { getEncounterById, updateEncounter } from "@/data/diagnosis";
  10 | import { getAllDoctors } from "@/data/doctors";
  11 | import { useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";
  12 | import { createFileRoute, Link, redirect, useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  13 | import { Activity, ArrowLeft, Droplets, Heart, Ruler, Thermometer, Weight } from "lucide-react";
  14 | import { useState } from "react";
  15 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  16 | import { z } from "zod";
  17 | 
  18 | const encounterSchema = z.object({
  19 | 	type: z.string().min(1, "Visit type is required"),
  20 | 	symptoms: z.string().min(1, "Symptoms are required"),
  21 | 	diagnosis: z.string().optional(),
  22 | 	treatment: z.string().optional(),
  23 | 	notes: z.string().optional(),
  24 | 	followUpPlan: z.string().optional(),
  25 | 	prescribedMedications: z.string().optional(),
  26 | 	status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "COMPLETED", "ON_HOLD"]).default("ACTIVE"),
  27 | 	doctorId: z.string().min(1, "Doctor is required")
  28 | });
  29 | 
  30 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/encounters/$id/edit")({
  31 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  32 | 		const session = context.session;
  33 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  34 | 		if (session.user.role === "patient") throw redirect({ to: "/" });
  35 | 		return { user: session.user };
  36 | 	},
  37 | 	loader: async ({ params }) => {
  38 | 		const [encounter, doctors] = await Promise.all([getEncounterById({ data: params.id }), getAllDoctors()]);
  39 | 		if (!encounter) throw redirect({ to: "/encounters" });
  40 | 		return { encounter, doctors };
  41 | 	},
  42 | 	component: EditEncounterPage
  43 | });
  44 | 
  45 | function EditEncounterPage() {
  46 | 	const { encounter, doctors } = Route.useLoaderData();
  47 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  48 | 	const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  49 | 	const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("encounter");
  50 | 
  51 | 	const form = useForm({
  52 | 		defaultValues: {
  53 | 			type: encounter.type || "CONSULTATION",
  54 | 			symptoms: encounter.symptoms || "",
  55 | 			diagnosis: encounter.diagnosis || "",
  56 | 			treatment: encounter.treatment || "",
  57 | 			notes: encounter.notes || "",
  58 | 			followUpPlan: encounter.followUpPlan || "",
  59 | 			prescribedMedications: encounter.prescribedMedications || "",
  60 | 			status: (encounter.status as "ACTIVE" | "COMPLETED" | "ON_HOLD") || "ACTIVE",
  61 | 			doctorId: encounter.doctorId || ""
  62 | 		},
  63 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
  64 | 			setIsSubmitting(true);
  65 | 			try {
  66 | 				await updateEncounter({
  67 | 					data: {
  68 |             values:{
  69 | 						...value
  70 |             },
  71 | 						id: encounter.id
  72 | 					}
  73 | 				});
  74 | 				toast.success("Encounter updated successfully");
  75 | 				navigate({ to: "/encounters/$id", params: { id: encounter.id } });
  76 | 			} catch (error) {
  77 | 				toast.error("Failed to update encounter");
  78 | 			} finally {
  79 | 				setIsSubmitting(false);
  80 | 			}
  81 | 		}
  82 | 	});
  83 | 
  84 | 	return (
  85 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-4xl px-4 py-8'>
  86 | 			<div className='mb-6'>
  87 | 				<Link
  88 | 					className='inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-600 text-sm hover:text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-400 dark:hover:text-slate-200'
  89 | 					params={{ id: encounter.id }}
  90 | 					to='/encounters/$id'
  91 | 				>
  92 | 					<ArrowLeft className='h-4 w-4' />
  93 | 					Back to Details
  94 | 				</Link>
  95 | 			</div>
  96 | 
  97 | 			<Card>
  98 | 				<CardHeader>
  99 | 					<CardTitle className='text-2xl'>Edit Encounter</CardTitle>
 100 | 					<CardDescription>
 101 | 						Update clinical information for {encounter.patient?.firstName} {encounter.patient?.lastName}
 102 | 					</CardDescription>
 103 | 				</CardHeader>
 104 | 				<CardContent>
 105 | 					<form
 106 | 						onSubmit={e => {
 107 | 							e.preventDefault();
 108 | 							e.stopPropagation();
 109 | 							form.handleSubmit();
 110 | 						}}
 111 | 					>
 112 | 						<Tabs
 113 | 							className='space-y-6'
 114 | 							onValueChange={setActiveTab}
 115 | 							value={activeTab}
 116 | 						>
 117 | 							<TabsList className='grid w-full grid-cols-2'>
 118 | 								<TabsTrigger value='encounter'>Clinical Details</TabsTrigger>
 119 | 								<TabsTrigger
 120 | 									disabled
 121 | 									value='vitals'
 122 | 								>
 123 | 									Vital Signs (Read Only)
 124 | 								</TabsTrigger>
 125 | 							</TabsList>
 126 | 
 127 | 							<TabsContent
 128 | 								className='space-y-6'
 129 | 								value='encounter'
 130 | 							>
 131 | 								<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 132 | 									<form.Field name='doctorId'>
 133 | 										{field => (
 134 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 135 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Attending Doctor</Label>
 136 | 												<Select
 137 | 													onValueChange={field.handleChange}
 138 | 													value={field.state.value}
 139 | 												>
 140 | 													<SelectTrigger id={field.name}>
 141 | 														<SelectValue placeholder='Select doctor' />
 142 | 													</SelectTrigger>
 143 | 													<SelectContent>
 144 | 														{doctors.map((doc: any) => (
 145 | 															<SelectItem
 146 | 																key={doc.id}
 147 | 																value={doc.id}
 148 | 															>
 149 | 																Dr. {doc.name}
 150 | 															</SelectItem>
 151 | 														))}
 152 | 													</SelectContent>
 153 | 												</Select>
 154 | 											</div>
 155 | 										)}
 156 | 									</form.Field>
 157 | 
 158 | 									<form.Field name='status'>
 159 | 										{field => (
 160 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 161 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Encounter Status</Label>
 162 | 												<Select
 163 | 													onValueChange={field.handleChange}
 164 | 													value={field.state.value}
 165 | 												>
 166 | 													<SelectTrigger id={field.name}>
 167 | 														<SelectValue placeholder='Select status' />
 168 | 													</SelectTrigger>
 169 | 													<SelectContent>
 170 | 														<SelectItem value='ACTIVE'>Active</SelectItem>
 171 | 														<SelectItem value='COMPLETED'>Completed</SelectItem>
 172 | 														<SelectItem value='ON_HOLD'>On Hold</SelectItem>
 173 | 													</SelectContent>
 174 | 												</Select>
 175 | 											</div>
 176 | 										)}
 177 | 									</form.Field>
 178 | 
 179 | 									<form.Field name='type'>
 180 | 										{field => (
 181 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 182 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Visit Type</Label>
 183 | 												<Select
 184 | 													onValueChange={field.handleChange}
 185 | 													value={field.state.value}
 186 | 												>
 187 | 													<SelectTrigger id={field.name}>
 188 | 														<SelectValue placeholder='Select type' />
 189 | 													</SelectTrigger>
 190 | 													<SelectContent>
 191 | 														<SelectItem value='CONSULTATION'>Consultation</SelectItem>
 192 | 														<SelectItem value='FOLLOW_UP'>Follow-up</SelectItem>
 193 | 														<SelectItem value='EMERGENCY'>Emergency</SelectItem>

 195 | 														<SelectItem value='SICK_VISIT'>Sick Visit</SelectItem>
 196 | 														<SelectItem value='VACCINATION'>Vaccination</SelectItem>
 197 | 													</SelectContent>
 198 | 												</Select>
 199 | 											</div>
 200 | 										)}
 201 | 									</form.Field>
 202 | 								</div>
 203 | 
 204 | 								<form.Field name='symptoms'>
 205 | 									{field => (
 206 | 										<div className='space-y-2'>
 207 | 											<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Symptoms / Chief Complaint</Label>
 208 | 											<Textarea
 209 | 												id={field.name}
 210 | 												onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 211 | 												rows={3}
 212 | 												value={field.state.value}
 213 | 											/>
 214 | 										</div>
 215 | 									)}
 216 | 								</form.Field>
 217 | 
 218 | 								<form.Field name='diagnosis'>
 219 | 									{field => (
 220 | 										<div className='space-y-2'>
 221 | 											<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Diagnosis</Label>
 222 | 											<Textarea
 223 | 												id={field.name}
 224 | 												onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 225 | 												rows={2}
 226 | 												value={field.state.value}
 227 | 											/>
 228 | 										</div>
 229 | 									)}
 230 | 								</form.Field>
 231 | 
 232 | 								<form.Field name='treatment'>
 233 | 									{field => (
 234 | 										<div className='space-y-2'>
 235 | 											<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Treatment Plan</Label>
 236 | 											<Textarea
 237 | 												id={field.name}
 238 | 												onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 239 | 												rows={2}
 240 | 												value={field.state.value}
 241 | 											/>
 242 | 										</div>
 243 | 									)}
 244 | 								</form.Field>
 245 | 
 246 | 								<form.Field name='prescribedMedications'>
 247 | 									{field => (
 248 | 										<div className='space-y-2'>
 249 | 											<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Prescribed Medications</Label>
 250 | 											<Textarea
 251 | 												id={field.name}
 252 | 												onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 253 | 												rows={2}
 254 | 												value={field.state.value}
 255 | 											/>
 256 | 										</div>
 257 | 									)}
 258 | 								</form.Field>
 259 | 
 260 | 								<form.Field name='followUpPlan'>
 261 | 									{field => (
 262 | 										<div className='space-y-2'>
 263 | 											<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Follow-up Plan</Label>
 264 | 											<Textarea
 265 | 												id={field.name}
 266 | 												onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 267 | 												rows={2}
 268 | 												value={field.state.value}
 269 | 											/>
 270 | 										</div>
 271 | 									)}
 272 | 								</form.Field>
 273 | 
 274 | 								<form.Field name='notes'>
 275 | 									{field => (
 276 | 										<div className='space-y-2'>
 277 | 											<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Additional Notes</Label>
 278 | 											<Textarea
 279 | 												id={field.name}
 280 | 												onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 281 | 												rows={2}
 282 | 												value={field.state.value}
 283 | 											/>
 284 | 										</div>
 285 | 									)}
 286 | 								</form.Field>
 287 | 							</TabsContent>
 288 | 
 289 | 							<TabsContent
 290 | 								className='space-y-4'
 291 | 								value='vitals'
 292 | 							>
 293 | 								<Alert>
 294 | 									<Activity className='h-4 w-4' />
 295 | 									<AlertDescription>
 296 | 										Vital signs are currently read-only in the edit view. To update vitals, please
 297 | 										create a new vital sign record.
 298 | 									</AlertDescription>
 299 | 								</Alert>
 300 | 
 301 | 								{encounter.vitalSigns && encounter.vitalSigns.length > 0 ? (
 302 | 									<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3'>
 303 | 										<div className='space-y-1'>
 304 | 											<Label className='flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500'>
 305 | 												<Thermometer className='h-3.5 w-3.5' /> Temperature
 306 | 											</Label>
 307 | 											<p className='font-medium'>
 308 | 												{encounter.vitalSigns[0].bodyTemperature || "—"} °C
 309 | 											</p>
 310 | 										</div>
 311 | 										<div className='space-y-1'>
 312 | 											<Label className='flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500'>
 313 | 												<Heart className='h-3.5 w-3.5' /> Blood Pressure
 314 | 											</Label>
 315 | 											<p className='font-medium'>
 316 | 												{encounter.vitalSigns[0].systolic || "—"}/
 317 | 												{encounter.vitalSigns[0].diastolic || "—"} mmHg
 318 | 											</p>
 319 | 										</div>
 320 | 										<div className='space-y-1'>
 321 | 											<Label className='flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500'>
 322 | 												<Weight className='h-3.5 w-3.5' /> Weight
 323 | 											</Label>
 324 | 											<p className='font-medium'>{encounter.vitalSigns[0].weight || "—"} kg</p>
 325 | 										</div>
 326 | 										<div className='space-y-1'>
 327 | 											<Label className='flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500'>
 328 | 												<Ruler className='h-3.5 w-3.5' /> Height
 329 | 											</Label>
 330 | 											<p className='font-medium'>{encounter.vitalSigns[0].height || "—"} cm</p>
 331 | 										</div>
 332 | 										<div className='space-y-1'>
 333 | 											<Label className='flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500'>
 334 | 												<Droplets className='h-3.5 w-3.5' /> O₂ Saturation
 335 | 											</Label>
 336 | 											<p className='font-medium'>
 337 | 												{encounter.vitalSigns[0].oxygenSaturation || "—"} %
 338 | 											</p>
 339 | 										</div>
 340 | 										<div className='space-y-1'>
 341 | 											<Label className='flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500'>
 342 | 												<Activity className='h-3.5 w-3.5' /> Heart Rate
 343 | 											</Label>
 344 | 											<p className='font-medium'>
 345 | 												{encounter.vitalSigns[0].heartRate || "—"} bpm
 346 | 											</p>
 347 | 										</div>
 348 | 									</div>
 349 | 								) : (
 350 | 									<p className='py-8 text-center text-slate-500 text-sm'>
 351 | 										No vital signs recorded for this encounter.
 352 | 									</p>
 353 | 								)}
 354 | 							</TabsContent>
 355 | 						</Tabs>
 356 | 
 357 | 						<div className='mt-8 flex justify-end gap-3 border-t pt-6'>
 358 | 							<Button
 359 | 								onClick={() => navigate({ to: "/encounters/$id", params: { id: encounter.id } })}
 360 | 								type='button'
 361 | 								variant='outline'
 362 | 							>
 363 | 								Cancel
 364 | 							</Button>
 365 | 							<Button
 366 | 								disabled={isSubmitting}
 367 | 								type='submit'
 368 | 							>
 369 | 								{isSubmitting ? (
 370 | 									<>
 371 | 										<LoadingSpinner
 372 | 											className='mr-2'
 373 | 											size='sm'
 374 | 										/>
 375 | 										Saving...
 376 | 									</>
 377 | 								) : (
 378 | 									"Save Changes"
 379 | 								)}
 380 | 							</Button>
 381 | 						</div>
 382 | 					</form>
 383 | 				</CardContent>
 384 | 			</Card>
 385 | 		</div>
 386 | 	);
 387 | }
 388 | 
 389 | async function getAllPatients() {
 390 | 	// This is a placeholder, you should import the actual function
 391 | 	return [];
 392 | }

 394 | /**
 395 |  * Mock or helper functions if not available in context
 396 |  */
 397 | const updateEncounterMock = async ({ data }: { data: any }) => {
 398 | 	// This should be replaced by the actual data action
 399 | 	console.log("Updating encounter", data);
 400 | 	return data;
 401 | };
 402 | 
 403 | /**
 404 |  * Note: In a real implementation, ensure updateEncounter is imported from @/data/diagnosis
 405 |  * and that it handles the database update correctly.
 406 |  */
 407 | 
 408 | /**
 409 |  * Example of what the updateEncounter data action might look like:
 410 |  *
 411 |  * export const updateEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 412 |  *   .validator((d: any) => d)
 413 |  *   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 414 |  *     const { id, ...updates } = data;
 415 |  *     return await db.update(encounters)
 416 |  *       .set(updates)
 417 |  *       .where(eq(encounters.id, id))
 418 |  *       .returning();
 419 |  *   });
 420 |  */
 421 | 
 422 | /**
 423 |  * Since I don't have the schema or the exact update function in context,
 424 |  * I'm assuming updateEncounter exists in @/data/diagnosis based on the pattern.
 425 |  */
 426 | 
 427 | /**
 428 |  * If updateEncounter is not yet defined in @/data/diagnosis, you would add it there:
 429 |  *
 430 |  * export const updateEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 431 |  *   .validator((d: any) => d)
 432 |  *   .handler(async ({ data }) => {
 433 |  *     const { id, ...updates } = data;
 434 |  *     const [updated] = await db
 435 |  *       .update(diagnosis)
 436 |  *       .set({
 437 |  *         ...updates,
 438 |  *         updatedAt: new Date(),
 439 |  *       })
 440 |  *       .where(eq(diagnosis.id, id))
 441 |  *       .returning();
 442 |  *     return updated;
 443 |  *   });
 444 |  */
 445 | 
 446 | /**
 447 |  * The component uses standard shadcn/ui components and TanStack Form for validation and submission.
 448 |  */
 449 | 
 450 | /**
 451 |  * The "Read Only" vitals tab is a safety measure since updating vitals often requires
 452 |  * updating multiple tables (vitalSigns, growthRecords) and it's cleaner to handle that
 453 |  * via a dedicated "Add Vitals" flow or during initial creation.
 454 |  */

```

`routes/encounters/$id.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/encounters/$id.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { createFileRoute, Link, notFound, redirect } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   4 | import {
   5 | 	Activity,
   6 | 	ArrowLeft,
   7 | 	Calendar,
   8 | 	Droplets,
   9 | 	Heart,
  10 | 	Pill,
  11 | 	Ruler,
  12 | 	Stethoscope,
  13 | 	Thermometer,
  14 | 	User,
  15 | 	Weight
  16 | } from "lucide-react";
  17 | import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
  18 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
  19 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
  20 | import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
  21 | import { getEncounterById } from "@/data/diagnosis";
  22 | import { formatDate } from "@/utils/formDate";
  23 | 
  24 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/encounters/$id")({
  25 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  26 | 		const session = context.session;
  27 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  28 | 		return { user: session.user };
  29 | 	},
  30 | 	loader: async ({ params }) => {
  31 | 		const encounter = await getEncounterById({ data: params.id });
  32 | 		if (!encounter) throw notFound();
  33 | 		return { encounter };
  34 | 	},
  35 | 	component: EncounterDetailPage
  36 | });
  37 | 
  38 | function EncounterDetailPage() {
  39 | 	const { encounter } = Route.useLoaderData();
  40 | 
  41 | 	const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
  42 | 		switch (status) {
  43 | 			case "ACTIVE":
  44 | 				return "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400";
  45 | 			case "COMPLETED":
  46 | 				return "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400";
  47 | 			default:
  48 | 				return "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400";
  49 | 		}
  50 | 	};
  51 | 
  52 | 	return (
  53 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-4xl px-4 py-8'>
  54 | 			<div className='space-y-6'>
  55 | 				{/* Header with Back Button */}
  56 | 				<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4'>
  57 | 					<Link
  58 | 						className='inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-600 text-sm hover:text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-400 dark:hover:text-slate-200'
  59 | 						to='/encounters'
  60 | 					>
  61 | 						<ArrowLeft className='h-4 w-4' />
  62 | 						Back to Encounters
  63 | 					</Link>
  64 | 					<div className='flex gap-2'>
  65 | 						<Link
  66 | 							params={{ id: encounter.id }}
  67 | 							to='/encounters/$id/edit'
  68 | 						>
  69 | 							<Button
  70 | 								size='sm'
  71 | 								variant='outline'
  72 | 							>
  73 | 								Edit Encounter
  74 | 							</Button>
  75 | 						</Link>
  76 | 					</div>
  77 | 				</div>
  78 | 
  79 | 				{/* Encounter Header */}
  80 | 				<Card>
  81 | 					<CardHeader>
  82 | 						<div className='flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-3'>
  83 | 							<div>
  84 | 								<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  85 | 									<h1 className='font-semibold text-2xl'>Encounter Details</h1>
  86 | 									<Badge className={getStatusColor(encounter.status)}>
  87 | 										{encounter.status || "ACTIVE"}
  88 | 									</Badge>
  89 | 								</div>
  90 | 								<CardDescription className='mt-1'>
  91 | 									{formatDate(encounter.date)} • {encounter.type || "Consultation"}
  92 | 								</CardDescription>
  93 | 							</div>
  94 | 						</div>
  95 | 					</CardHeader>
  96 | 				</Card>
  97 | 
  98 | 				<Tabs
  99 | 					className='space-y-6'
 100 | 					defaultValue='overview'
 101 | 				>
 102 | 					<TabsList className='grid w-full grid-cols-4'>
 103 | 						<TabsTrigger value='overview'>Overview</TabsTrigger>
 104 | 						<TabsTrigger value='vitals'>Vital Signs</TabsTrigger>
 105 | 						<TabsTrigger value='growth'>Growth</TabsTrigger>
 106 | 						<TabsTrigger value='prescriptions'>Prescriptions</TabsTrigger>
 107 | 					</TabsList>
 108 | 
 109 | 					{/* Overview Tab */}
 110 | 					<TabsContent
 111 | 						className='space-y-4'
 112 | 						value='overview'
 113 | 					>
 114 | 						{/* Patient & Doctor Info */}
 115 | 						<Card>
 116 | 							<CardHeader>
 117 | 								<CardTitle className='text-lg'>Patient & Doctor Information</CardTitle>
 118 | 							</CardHeader>
 119 | 							<CardContent className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 120 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 121 | 									<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 122 | 										<User className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 123 | 										<span className='font-medium'>Patient</span>
 124 | 									</div>
 125 | 									<Link
 126 | 										className='text-primary hover:underline'
 127 | 										params={{ id: encounter.patientId }}
 128 | 										to='/patients/$id'
 129 | 									>
 130 | 										{encounter.patient?.firstName} {encounter.patient?.lastName}
 131 | 									</Link>
 132 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>
 133 | 										DOB: {formatDate(encounter.patient?.dateOfBirth)}
 134 | 									</p>
 135 | 								</div>
 136 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>

 139 | 										<span className='font-medium'>Doctor</span>
 140 | 									</div>
 141 | 									<p>Dr. {encounter.doctor?.name}</p>
 142 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>{encounter.doctor?.specialty}</p>

 149 | 										</div>
 150 | 										<Link
 151 | 											className='text-primary hover:underline'
 152 | 											params={{ id: encounter.appointment.id }}
 153 | 											to='/appointments/$id'
 154 | 										>
 155 | 											{formatDate(encounter.appointment.appointmentDate)} -{" "}
 156 | 											{encounter.appointment.type}
 157 | 										</Link>
 158 | 									</div>
 159 | 								)}
 160 | 							</CardContent>
 161 | 						</Card>
 162 | 
 163 | 						{/* Symptoms & Diagnosis */}
 164 | 						<Card>
 165 | 							<CardHeader>
 166 | 								<CardTitle className='text-lg'>Clinical Information</CardTitle>
 167 | 							</CardHeader>
 168 | 							<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
 169 | 								<div>
 170 | 									<h3 className='mb-1 font-medium text-sm'>Symptoms / Chief Complaint</h3>
 171 | 									<p className='rounded-lg bg-slate-50 p-3 text-sm dark:bg-slate-800'>
 172 | 										{encounter.symptoms}
 173 | 									</p>
 174 | 								</div>
 175 | 								{encounter.diagnosis && (
 176 | 									<div>
 177 | 										<h3 className='mb-1 font-medium text-sm'>Diagnosis</h3>
 178 | 										<p className='rounded-lg bg-slate-50 p-3 text-sm dark:bg-slate-800'>
 179 | 											{encounter.diagnosis}
 180 | 										</p>
 181 | 									</div>
 182 | 								)}
 183 | 								{encounter.treatment && (
 184 | 									<div>
 185 | 										<h3 className='mb-1 font-medium text-sm'>Treatment Plan</h3>
 186 | 										<p className='rounded-lg bg-slate-50 p-3 text-sm dark:bg-slate-800'>

 188 | 										</p>
 189 | 									</div>
 190 | 								)}
 191 | 							</CardContent>
 192 | 						</Card>
 193 | 
 194 | 						{/* Additional Information */}
 195 | 						{(encounter.notes || encounter.followUpPlan || encounter.prescribedMedications) && (
 196 | 							<Card>
 197 | 								<CardHeader>
 198 | 									<CardTitle className='text-lg'>Additional Information</CardTitle>
 199 | 								</CardHeader>
 200 | 								<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
 201 | 									{encounter.prescribedMedications && (
 202 | 										<div>
 203 | 											<h3 className='mb-1 flex items-center gap-2 font-medium text-sm'>
 204 | 												<Pill className='h-4 w-4' />
 205 | 												Prescribed Medications
 206 | 											</h3>
 207 | 											<p className='text-sm'>{encounter.prescribedMedications}</p>
 208 | 										</div>
 209 | 									)}
 210 | 									{encounter.followUpPlan && (
 211 | 										<div>
 212 | 											<h3 className='mb-1 font-medium text-sm'>Follow-up Plan</h3>
 213 | 											<p className='text-sm'>{encounter.followUpPlan}</p>
 214 | 										</div>
 215 | 									)}
 216 | 									{encounter.notes && (
 217 | 										<div>
 218 | 											<h3 className='mb-1 font-medium text-sm'>Notes</h3>
```
