```tsx
 221 | 									)}
 222 | 								</CardContent>
 223 | 							</Card>
 224 | 						)}
 225 | 					</TabsContent>
 226 | 
 227 | 					{/* Vital Signs Tab */}
 228 | 					<TabsContent
 229 | 						className='space-y-4'
 230 | 						value='vitals'
 231 | 					>
 232 | 						{encounter.vitalSigns && encounter.vitalSigns.length > 0 ? (
 233 | 							encounter.vitalSigns.map((vitals: any, index: number) => (
 234 | 								<Card key={index}>
 235 | 									<CardHeader>
 236 | 										<CardTitle className='text-lg'>Vital Signs Recorded</CardTitle>
 237 | 										<CardDescription>{formatDate(vitals.recordedAt)}</CardDescription>
 238 | 									</CardHeader>
 239 | 									<CardContent>
 240 | 										<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3'>
 241 | 											{vitals.bodyTemperature && (
 242 | 												<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 243 | 													<Thermometer className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 244 | 													<div>
 245 | 														<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Temperature</p>
 246 | 														<p className='font-medium'>{vitals.bodyTemperature}°C</p>
 247 | 													</div>
 248 | 												</div>
 249 | 											)}
 250 | 											{vitals.systolic && vitals.diastolic && (
 251 | 												<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 252 | 													<Heart className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 253 | 													<div>
 254 | 														<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Blood Pressure</p>
 255 | 														<p className='font-medium'>
 256 | 															{vitals.systolic}/{vitals.diastolic} mmHg
 257 | 														</p>
 258 | 													</div>
 259 | 												</div>
 260 | 											)}
 261 | 											{vitals.heartRate && (
 262 | 												<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 263 | 													<Heart className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 264 | 													<div>
 265 | 														<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Heart Rate</p>
 266 | 														<p className='font-medium'>{vitals.heartRate} bpm</p>
 267 | 													</div>
 268 | 												</div>
 269 | 											)}
 270 | 											{vitals.respiratoryRate && (
 271 | 												<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 272 | 													<Activity className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 273 | 													<div>
 274 | 														<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Respiratory Rate</p>
 275 | 														<p className='font-medium'>{vitals.respiratoryRate} /min</p>
 276 | 													</div>
 277 | 												</div>
 278 | 											)}
 279 | 											{vitals.oxygenSaturation && (
 280 | 												<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 281 | 													<Droplets className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 282 | 													<div>
 283 | 														<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>O₂ Saturation</p>
 284 | 														<p className='font-medium'>{vitals.oxygenSaturation}%</p>
 285 | 													</div>
 286 | 												</div>
 287 | 											)}
 288 | 											{vitals.weight && (
 289 | 												<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 290 | 													<Weight className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 291 | 													<div>
 292 | 														<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Weight</p>
 293 | 														<p className='font-medium'>{vitals.weight} kg</p>
 294 | 													</div>
 295 | 												</div>
 296 | 											)}
 297 | 											{vitals.height && (
 298 | 												<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 299 | 													<Ruler className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 300 | 													<div>
 301 | 														<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Height</p>
 302 | 														<p className='font-medium'>{vitals.height} cm</p>
 303 | 													</div>
 304 | 												</div>
 305 | 											)}
 306 | 										</div>
 307 | 									</CardContent>
 308 | 								</Card>
 309 | 							))
 310 | 						) : (
 311 | 							<Card>
 312 | 								<CardContent className='py-12 text-center'>
 313 | 									<Activity className='mx-auto h-12 w-12 text-slate-400' />
 314 | 									<h3 className='mt-4 font-semibold text-lg'>No Vital Signs</h3>
 315 | 									<p className='mt-2 text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 316 | 										No vital signs were recorded for this encounter.
 317 | 									</p>
 318 | 								</CardContent>
 319 | 							</Card>
 320 | 						)}
 321 | 					</TabsContent>
 322 | 
 323 | 					{/* Growth Tab */}
 324 | 					<TabsContent
 325 | 						className='space-y-4'
 326 | 						value='growth'
 327 | 					>
 328 | 						<Card>
 329 | 							<CardHeader>
 330 | 								<CardTitle className='text-lg'>Growth Measurements</CardTitle>
 331 | 								<CardDescription>Height, weight, and BMI tracking</CardDescription>
 332 | 							</CardHeader>
 333 | 							<CardContent>
 334 | 								{encounter.vitalSigns && encounter.vitalSigns[0]?.weight ? (
 335 | 									<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-3'>
 336 | 										<div className='text-center'>
 337 | 											<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Weight</p>
 338 | 											<p className='font-bold text-xl'>{encounter.vitalSigns[0].weight} kg</p>
 339 | 										</div>
 340 | 										<div className='text-center'>
 341 | 											<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Height</p>
 342 | 											<p className='font-bold text-xl'>
 343 | 												{encounter.vitalSigns[0].height || "—"} cm
 344 | 											</p>
 345 | 										</div>
 346 | 										<div className='text-center'>
 347 | 											<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>BMI</p>
 348 | 											<p className='font-bold text-xl'>
 349 | 												{encounter.vitalSigns[0].weight && encounter.vitalSigns[0].height
 350 | 													? (
 351 | 															encounter.vitalSigns[0].weight /
 352 | 															(encounter.vitalSigns[0].height / 100) ** 2
 353 | 														).toFixed(1)
 354 | 													: "—"}
 355 | 											</p>
 356 | 										</div>
 357 | 									</div>
 358 | 								) : (

 360 | 										No growth measurements recorded for this encounter.
 361 | 									</p>

 365 | 					</TabsContent>
 366 |

 368 | 					<TabsContent

 370 | 						value='prescriptions'
 371 | 					>
 372 | 						{encounter.prescriptions && encounter.prescriptions.length > 0 ? (
 373 | 							encounter.prescriptions.map((prescription: any, index: number) => (

 379 | 													Prescription #{prescription.id.slice(0, 8)}
 380 | 												</CardTitle>

 382 | 													Issued: {formatDate(prescription.issuedDate)} • Status:{" "}
 383 | 													{prescription.status}
 384 | 												</CardDescription>
 385 | 											</div>
 386 | 											<Link
 387 | 												params={{ id: prescription.id }}

 392 | 													variant='outline'
 393 | 												>
 394 | 													View Details
 395 | 												</Button>
 396 | 											</Link>
 397 | 										</div>
 398 | 									</CardHeader>
 399 | 									<CardContent>
 400 | 										<p className='font-medium'>
 401 | 											Diagnosis: {prescription.diagnosis || "Not specified"}
 402 | 										</p>
 403 | 										{prescription.prescribedItems && prescription.prescribedItems.length > 0 && (
 404 | 											<div className='mt-3 space-y-2'>
 405 | 												<p className='font-medium text-sm'>Medications:</p>
 406 | 												<ul className='list-inside list-disc space-y-1 text-sm'>
 407 | 													{prescription.prescribedItems.map((item: any, i: number) => (
 408 | 														<li key={i}>
 409 | 															{item.drug?.name || item.drugId} - {item.dosageValue}{" "}
 410 | 															{item.dosageUnit} - {item.frequency}
 411 | 														</li>
 412 | 													))}
 413 | 												</ul>
 414 | 											</div>
 415 | 										)}
 416 | 									</CardContent>
 417 | 								</Card>
 418 | 							))
 419 | 						) : (
 420 | 							<Card>
 421 | 								<CardContent className='py-12 text-center'>
 422 | 									<Pill className='mx-auto h-12 w-12 text-slate-400' />
 423 | 									<h3 className='mt-4 font-semibold text-lg'>No Prescriptions</h3>
 424 | 									<p className='mt-2 text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 425 | 										No prescriptions were created for this encounter.
 426 | 									</p>
 427 | 								</CardContent>
 428 | 							</Card>
 429 | 						)}
 430 | 					</TabsContent>
 431 | 				</Tabs>
 432 | 			</div>
 433 | 		</div>
 434 | 	);
 435 | }

```

`routes/encounters/index.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/encounters/index.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { createFileRoute, Link, redirect } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   4 | import { Calendar, Filter, Plus, Search, Stethoscope, User } from "lucide-react";
   5 | import { useState } from "react";
   6 | import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
   7 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   8 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
   9 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
  10 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
  11 | import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
  12 | import { getAllEncounters } from "@/data/diagnosis";
  13 | import { formatDate } from "@/utils/formDate";
  14 | 
  15 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/encounters/")({
  16 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  17 | 		const session = context.session;
  18 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  19 | 		if (session.user.role === "patient") throw redirect({ to: "/" });
  20 | 		return { user: session.user };
  21 | 	},
  22 | 	loader: async () => getAllEncounters(),
  23 | 	component: EncountersListPage
  24 | });
  25 | 
  26 | function EncountersListPage() {
  27 | 	const encounters = Route.useLoaderData();
  28 | 	const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  29 | 	const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState("ALL");
  30 | 
  31 | 	const filteredEncounters = encounters.filter(encounter => {
  32 | 		const matchesSearch =
  33 | 			encounter.patientFirstName?.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
  34 | 			encounter.patientLastName?.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
  35 | 			encounter.doctorName?.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
  36 | 			encounter.diagnosis?.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
  37 | 
  38 | 		const matchesStatus = statusFilter === "ALL" || encounter.status === statusFilter;
  39 | 
  40 | 		return matchesSearch && matchesStatus;
  41 | 	});
  42 | 
  43 | 	const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
  44 | 		switch (status) {
  45 | 			case "ACTIVE":
  46 | 				return "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400";
  47 | 			case "COMPLETED":
  48 | 				return "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400";
  49 | 			case "ON_HOLD":
  50 | 				return "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-900/30 dark:text-yellow-400";
  51 | 			default:
  52 | 				return "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400";
  53 | 		}
  54 | 	};
  55 | 
  56 | 	return (
  57 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 py-8'>
  58 | 			<div className='space-y-6'>
  59 | 				{/* Header */}
  60 | 				<div className='flex flex-col justify-between gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center'>
  61 | 					<div>
  62 | 						<h1 className='font-semibold text-2xl'>Patient Encounters</h1>
  63 | 						<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
  64 | 							View all patient visits, diagnoses, and treatment records
  65 | 						</p>
  66 | 					</div>
  67 | 					<Link to='/encounters/new'>
  68 | 						<Button>
  69 | 							<Plus className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
  70 | 							New Encounter
  71 | 						</Button>
  72 | 					</Link>
  73 | 				</div>
  74 | 
  75 | 				{/* Filters */}
  76 | 				<Card>
  77 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  78 | 						<div className='flex flex-col gap-4 sm:flex-row'>
  79 | 							<div className='relative flex-1'>
  80 | 								<Search className='absolute top-1/2 left-3 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400' />
  81 | 								<Input
  82 | 									className='pl-9'
  83 | 									onChange={e => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
  84 | 									placeholder='Search by patient, doctor, or diagnosis...'
  85 | 									value={searchQuery}
  86 | 								/>
  87 | 							</div>
  88 | 							<Select
  89 | 								onValueChange={setStatusFilter}
  90 | 								value={statusFilter}
  91 | 							>
  92 | 								<SelectTrigger className='w-40'>
  93 | 									<Filter className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
  94 | 									<SelectValue placeholder='Status' />
  95 | 								</SelectTrigger>
  96 | 								<SelectContent>
  97 | 									<SelectItem value='ALL'>All Status</SelectItem>
  98 | 									<SelectItem value='ACTIVE'>Active</SelectItem>
  99 | 									<SelectItem value='COMPLETED'>Completed</SelectItem>
 100 | 									<SelectItem value='ON_HOLD'>On Hold</SelectItem>
 101 | 								</SelectContent>
 102 | 							</Select>
 103 | 						</div>
 104 | 					</CardContent>
 105 | 				</Card>
 106 | 
 107 | 				{/* Encounters Table */}
 108 | 				<Card>
 109 | 					<CardHeader>
 110 | 						<CardTitle className='text-lg'>All Encounters</CardTitle>
 111 | 						<CardDescription>
 112 | 							Total {filteredEncounters.length} encounter{filteredEncounters.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
 113 | 						</CardDescription>
 114 | 					</CardHeader>
 115 | 					<CardContent className='p-0'>
 116 | 						<Table>
 117 | 							<TableHeader>
 118 | 								<TableRow>
 119 | 									<TableHead>Date</TableHead>
 120 | 									<TableHead>Patient</TableHead>
 121 | 									<TableHead>Doctor</TableHead>
 122 | 									<TableHead>Diagnosis</TableHead>
 123 | 									<TableHead>Status</TableHead>
 124 | 									<TableHead className='w-[50px]' />
 125 | 								</TableRow>
 126 | 							</TableHeader>
 127 | 							<TableBody>
 128 | 								{filteredEncounters.length === 0 ? (
 129 | 									<TableRow>
 130 | 										<TableCell
 131 | 											className='h-24 text-center text-slate-500'
 132 | 											colSpan={6}
 133 | 										>
 134 | 											No encounters found.
 135 | 										</TableCell>
 136 | 									</TableRow>
 137 | 								) : (
 138 | 									filteredEncounters.map(encounter => (
 139 | 										<TableRow key={encounter.id}>
 140 | 											<TableCell className='whitespace-nowrap'>
 141 | 												<div className='flex items-center gap-1 text-sm'>
 142 | 													<Calendar className='h-3.5 w-3.5 text-slate-400' />
 143 | 													{formatDate(encounter.date)}
 144 | 												</div>
 145 | 											</TableCell>
 146 | 											<TableCell>
 147 | 												<Link
 148 | 													className='flex items-center gap-2 hover:underline'
 149 | 													params={{ id: encounter.patientId }}
 150 | 													to='/patients/$id'
 151 | 												>
 152 | 													<User className='h-3.5 w-3.5 text-slate-400' />
 153 | 													<span className='font-medium'>
 154 | 														{encounter.patientFirstName} {encounter.patientLastName}
 155 | 													</span>
 156 | 												</Link>
 157 | 											</TableCell>
 158 | 											<TableCell>
 159 | 												<div className='flex items-center gap-1'>
 160 | 													<Stethoscope className='h-3.5 w-3.5 text-slate-400' />
 161 | 													<span>Dr. {encounter.doctorName}</span>
 162 | 												</div>
 163 | 											</TableCell>
 164 | 											<TableCell>
 165 | 												<span className='line-clamp-1 text-sm'>
 166 | 													{encounter.diagnosis || "—"}
 167 | 												</span>
 168 | 											</TableCell>
 169 | 											<TableCell>
 170 | 												<Badge className={getStatusColor(encounter.status?? "")}>
 171 | 													{encounter.status || "ACTIVE"}
 172 | 												</Badge>
 173 | 											</TableCell>
 174 | 											<TableCell>
 175 | 												<Link
 176 | 													params={{ id: encounter.id }}
 177 | 													to='/encounters/$id'
 178 | 												>
 179 | 													<Button
 180 | 														size='sm'
 181 | 														variant='ghost'
 182 | 													>
 183 | 														View
 184 | 													</Button>
 185 | 												</Link>
 186 | 											</TableCell>
 187 | 										</TableRow>
 188 | 									))
 189 | 								)}
 190 | 							</TableBody>
 191 | 						</Table>
 192 | 					</CardContent>
 193 | 				</Card>
 194 | 			</div>
 195 | 		</div>
 196 | 	);
 197 | }

```

`routes/encounters/new.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/encounters/new.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Alert, AlertDescription } from "@/components/ui/alert";
   4 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
   6 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
   7 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
   8 | import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
   9 | import { getPatientAppointments } from "@/data/appointments";
  10 | import { createEncounter } from "@/data/diagnosis";
  11 | import { getAllDoctors } from "@/data/doctors";
  12 | import { getAllPatients } from "@/data/patients";
  13 | import { calculateAgeInDays, calculateAgeInMonths, calculateBMI } from "@/utils/growth";
  14 | import {
  15 |   createServerValidate,
  16 |   formOptions,
  17 |   getFormData,
  18 |   mergeForm,
  19 |   ServerValidateError,
  20 |   useForm as useFormStart,
  21 |   useTransform
  22 | } from "@tanstack/react-form-start";
  23 | import { createFileRoute, redirect, useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  24 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
  25 | import { setResponseStatus } from "@tanstack/react-start/server";
  26 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
  27 | import { Activity, AlertCircle, Droplets, Heart, Ruler, Thermometer, Weight } from "lucide-react";
  28 | import { useState } from "react";
  29 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  30 | import { z } from "zod";
  31 | import { generateId } from '../../utils';
  32 | 
  33 | // ============================================================================
  34 | // Shared Form Schema & Options
  35 | // ============================================================================
  36 | 
  37 | export const encounterFormSchema = z.object({
  38 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient"),
  39 | 	doctorId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a doctor"),
  40 | 	appointmentId: z.string().optional(),
  41 | 	type: z.string().default("CONSULTATION"),
  42 | 	symptoms: z.string().min(1, "Please enter symptoms"),
  43 | 	diagnosis: z.string().optional(),
  44 | 	treatment: z.string().optional(),
  45 | 	notes: z.string().optional(),
  46 | 	followUpPlan: z.string().optional(),
  47 | 	prescribedMedications: z.string().optional()
  48 | });
  49 | 
  50 | export const vitalSignsFormSchema = z.object({
  51 | 	bodyTemperature: z.number().min(34, "Temperature too low").max(42, "Temperature too high").optional(),
  52 | 	systolic: z.number().min(60, "Systolic too low").max(200, "Systolic too high").optional(),
  53 | 	diastolic: z.number().min(40, "Diastolic too low").max(120, "Diastolic too high").optional(),
  54 | 	heartRate: z.number().min(40, "Heart rate too low").max(200, "Heart rate too high").optional(),
  55 | 	respiratoryRate: z.number().min(10, "Respiratory rate too low").max(60, "Respiratory rate too high").optional(),
  56 | 	oxygenSaturation: z.number().min(70, "Oxygen saturation too low").max(100, "Oxygen saturation too high").optional(),
  57 | 	weight: z.number().min(0.5, "Weight too low").max(200, "Weight too high").optional(),
  58 | 	height: z.number().min(30, "Height too low").max(250, "Height too high").optional()
  59 | });
  60 | 
  61 | export const growthFormSchema = z.object({
  62 | 	weight: z.number().min(0.5).max(200).optional(),
  63 | 	height: z.number().min(30).max(250).optional(),
  64 | 	headCircumference: z
  65 | 		.number()
  66 | 		.min(20, "Head circumference too small")
  67 | 		.max(70, "Head circumference too large")
  68 | 		.optional()
  69 | });
  70 | 
  71 | export const completeEncounterSchema = z.object({
  72 | 	encounter: encounterFormSchema,
  73 | 	vitalSigns: vitalSignsFormSchema,
  74 | 	growth: growthFormSchema
  75 | });
  76 | 
  77 | export type CompleteEncounterForm = z.infer<typeof completeEncounterSchema>;
  78 | 
  79 | export const formOpts = formOptions({
  80 | 	defaultValues: {
  81 | 		encounter: {
  82 | 			patientId: "",
  83 | 			doctorId: "",
  84 | 			appointmentId: "",
  85 | 			type: "CONSULTATION",
  86 | 			symptoms: "",
  87 | 			diagnosis: "",
  88 | 			treatment: "",
  89 | 			notes: "",
  90 | 			followUpPlan: "",
  91 | 			prescribedMedications: ""
  92 | 		},
  93 | 		vitalSigns: {
  94 | 			bodyTemperature: undefined,
  95 | 			systolic: undefined,
  96 | 			diastolic: undefined,
  97 | 			heartRate: undefined,
  98 | 			respiratoryRate: undefined,
  99 | 			oxygenSaturation: undefined,
 100 | 			weight: undefined,
 101 | 			height: undefined
 102 | 		},
 103 | 		growth: {
 104 | 			weight: undefined,
 105 | 			height: undefined,
 106 | 			headCircumference: undefined
 107 | 		}
 108 | 	} as CompleteEncounterForm
 109 | });
 110 | 
 111 | // ============================================================================
 112 | // Server Functions
 113 | // ============================================================================
 114 | 
 115 | const serverValidate = createServerValidate({
 116 | 	...formOpts,
 117 | 	onServerValidate: async ({ value }) => {
 118 | 		const result = completeEncounterSchema.safeParse(value);
 119 | 		if (!result.success) {
 120 | 			return result.error.issues[0]?.message || "Invalid form data";
 121 | 		}
 122 | 		return undefined;
 123 | 	}
 124 | });
 125 | 
 126 | export const submitEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 127 | 	.inputValidator((data: unknown) => {
 128 | 		if (!(data instanceof FormData)) {
 129 | 			throw new Error("Invalid form data");
 130 | 		}
 131 | 		return data;
 132 | 	})
 133 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 134 | 		try {
 135 | 			const validatedData = await serverValidate(ctx.data);
 136 | 
 137 | 			// Create the encounter/diagnosis
 138 | 			const encounter = await createEncounter({
 139 | 				data: {
 140 | 					patientId: validatedData.encounter.patientId,
 141 | 					doctorId: validatedData.encounter.doctorId,
 142 | 					medicalId: crypto.randomUUID(),
 143 | 					appointmentId: validatedData.encounter.appointmentId || undefined,
 144 | 					type: validatedData.encounter.type,
 145 | 					symptoms: validatedData.encounter.symptoms,
 146 | 					diagnosis: validatedData.encounter.diagnosis,
 147 | 					treatment: validatedData.encounter.treatment,
 148 | 					notes: validatedData.encounter.notes,
 149 | 					followUpPlan: validatedData.encounter.followUpPlan,
 150 | 					prescribedMedications: validatedData.encounter.prescribedMedications
 151 | 				}
 152 | 			});
 153 | 
 154 | 			// Create vital signs if any provided
 155 | 			const hasVitals = Object.values(validatedData.vitalSigns).some(v => v !== undefined);
 156 | 			if (hasVitals) {
 157 | 				const { createVitalSign } = await import("@/data/vital-signs");
 158 | 				const vitalSignsData = {
 159 | 					patientId: validatedData.encounter.patientId,
 160 | 					medicalId: encounter.medicalId,
 161 | 					encounterId: encounter.id,
 162 | 					recordedAt: new Date(),
 163 | 					...validatedData.vitalSigns
 164 | 				};
 165 | 				await createVitalSign({ data: vitalSignsData });
 166 | 			}
 167 | 
 168 | 			// Create growth record if weight or height provided
 169 | 			if (validatedData.growth.weight || validatedData.growth.height) {
 170 | 				const { createGrowthRecord } = await import("@/data/growthRecord");
 171 | 				const growthData = {
 172 |           id: generateId(),
 173 | 					patientId: validatedData.encounter.patientId,
 174 | 					date: new Date(),
 175 | 					weight: validatedData.growth.weight,
 176 | 					height: validatedData.growth.height,
 177 | 					headCircumference: validatedData.growth.headCircumference
 178 | 				};
 179 | 				await createGrowthRecord({ data: growthData });
 180 | 			}
 181 | 
 182 | 			return { success: true, encounterId: encounter.id };
 183 | 		} catch (e) {
 184 | 			if (e instanceof ServerValidateError) {
 185 | 				return e.response;
 186 | 			}
 187 | 			setResponseStatus(500);
 188 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create encounter");
 189 | 		}
 190 | 	});
 191 | 
 192 | export const getFormDataFromServer = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
 193 | 	return getFormData();
 194 | });
 195 | 
 196 | // ============================================================================
 197 | // Route Component
 198 | // ============================================================================
 199 | 
 200 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/encounters/new")({
 201 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
 202 | 		const session = context.session;
 203 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
 204 | 		if (session.user.role === "patient") throw redirect({ to: "/" });
 205 | 		return { user: session.user };
 206 | 	},
 207 | 	loader: async () => ({
 208 | 		formState: await getFormDataFromServer(),
 209 | 		patients: await getAllPatients(),
 210 | 		doctors: await getAllDoctors()
 211 | 	}),
 212 | 	component: NewEncounterPage
 213 | });
 214 | 
 215 | function NewEncounterPage() {
 216 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
 217 | 	const { formState, patients: initialPatients, doctors: initialDoctors } = Route.useLoaderData();
 218 | 	const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
 219 | 	const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("encounter");
 220 | 	const [appointments, setAppointments] = useState<any[]>([]);
 221 | 	const [selectedPatient, setSelectedPatient] = useState<any>(null);
 222 | 	const [growthPreview, setGrowthPreview] = useState<{ bmi?: number; ageMonths?: number; ageDays?: number }>({});
 223 | 
 224 | 	// Use the server-side form with proper validation
 225 | 	const form = useFormStart({
 226 | 		...formOpts,
 227 | 		transform: useTransform(baseForm => mergeForm(baseForm, formState), [formState])
 228 | 	});
 229 | 
 230 | 	// Form errors from server validation
 231 | 	const formErrors = useSelector(form.store, (s) => s.errors);
 232 | 
 233 | 	const loadPatientAppointments = async (patientId: string) => {
 234 | 		try {
 235 | 			const appointmentsData = await getPatientAppointments({ data: patientId });
 236 | 			setAppointments(appointmentsData);
 237 | 		} catch (error) {
 238 | 			console.error("Failed to load appointments", error);
 239 | 		}
 240 | 	};
 241 | 
 242 | 	const handlePatientChange = async (patientId: string) => {
 243 | 		const patient = initialPatients.find((p: any) => p.id === patientId);
 244 | 		setSelectedPatient(patient);
 245 | 
 246 | 		if (patientId) {
 247 | 			await loadPatientAppointments(patientId);
 248 | 			// Calculate age for growth tracking
 249 | 			if (patient?.dateOfBirth) {
 250 | 				const ageMonths = calculateAgeInMonths(new Date(patient.dateOfBirth));
 251 | 				const ageDays = calculateAgeInDays(new Date(patient.dateOfBirth));
 252 | 				setGrowthPreview(prev => ({ ...prev, ageMonths, ageDays }));
 253 | 			}
 254 | 		} else {
 255 | 			setAppointments([]);
 256 | 			setSelectedPatient(null);
 257 | 		}
 258 | 	};
 259 | 
 260 | 	const updateGrowthPreview = (weight?: number, height?: number) => {
 261 | 		if (weight && height) {
 262 | 			const bmi = calculateBMI(weight, height);
 263 | 			setGrowthPreview(prev => ({ ...prev, bmi: bmi.bmi }));
 264 | 		} else {
 265 | 			setGrowthPreview(prev => ({ ...prev, bmi: undefined }));
 266 | 		}
 267 | 	};
 268 | 
 269 | 	const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 270 | 		e.preventDefault();
 271 | 		setIsSubmitting(true);
 272 | 
 273 | 		try {
 274 | 			const formData = new FormData(e.target as HTMLFormElement);
 275 | 			const result = await submitEncounter({ data: formData });
 276 | 
 277 | 			if (!(result instanceof Response) && result.success) {
 278 | 				toast.success("Encounter created successfully");
 279 | 				navigate({ to: "/encounters" });
 280 | 			} else if (result && "errors" in result) {
 281 | 				// Handle validation errors
 282 | 				toast.error("Please fix the validation errors");
 283 | 			}
 284 | 		} catch (error) {
 285 | 			toast.error("Failed to create encounter");
 286 | 		} finally {
 287 | 			setIsSubmitting(false);
 288 | 		}
 289 | 	};
 290 | 
 291 | 	if (!initialPatients.length && !initialDoctors.length) {
 292 | 		return (
 293 | 			<div className='mx-auto max-w-4xl px-4 py-8'>
 294 | 				<Alert variant='destructive'>
 295 | 					<AlertCircle className='h-4 w-4' />
 296 | 					<AlertDescription>
 297 | 						Failed to load required data. Please refresh the page or contact support.
 298 | 					</AlertDescription>
 299 | 				</Alert>
 300 | 			</div>
 301 | 		);
 302 | 	}
 303 | 
 304 | 	return (
 305 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-4xl px-4 py-8'>
 306 | 			<Card>
 307 | 				<CardHeader>

 827 | 					<CardFooter className='flex justify-end gap-3'>
 828 | 						<Button
 829 | 							onClick={() => navigate({ to: "/encounters" })}
 830 | 							type='button'
 831 | 							variant='outline'
 832 | 						>
 833 | 							Cancel
 834 | 						</Button>
 835 | 						<form.Subscribe selector={state => [state.canSubmit, state.isSubmitting]}>
 836 | 							{([canSubmit, isSubmitting]) => (
 837 | 								<Button
 838 | 									disabled={!canSubmit || isSubmitting}
 839 | 									type='submit'
 840 | 								>
 841 | 									{isSubmitting ? "Creating..." : "Complete Visit"}
 842 | 								</Button>
 843 | 							)}
 844 | 						</form.Subscribe>
 845 | 					</CardFooter>
 846 | 				</form>
 847 | 			</Card>
 848 | 		</div>
 849 | 	);
 850 | }

```

`routes/index.tsx`:

```tsx
 490 | 					/>
 491 | 					<FeatureCard
 492 | 						description='State-of-the-art equipment and child-friendly environment designed for comfort.'
 493 | 						title='Modern Facilities'
 494 | 					/>
 495 | 					<FeatureCard
 496 | 						description="Secure access to your child's medical history, growth charts, and immunization records."
 497 | 						title='Digital Health Records'
 498 | 					/>
 499 | 					<FeatureCard
 500 | 						description="Easy scheduling and reminders for all your child's healthcare needs."
 501 | 						title='Online Appointment Booking'
 502 | 					/>
 503 | 					<FeatureCard
 504 | 						description='Get expert advice from home for minor concerns and follow-up questions.'
 505 | 						title='24/7 Telehealth Support'
 506 | 					/>
 507 | 					<FeatureCard
 508 | 						description='We partner with parents to ensure the best outcomes for every child.'
 509 | 						title='Family-Centered Care'
 510 | 					/>
 511 | 				</div>
 512 | 			</section>
 513 | 		</div>
 514 | 	);
 515 | }
 516 | 
 517 | function ServiceCard({
 518 | 	icon: Icon,
 519 | 	title,
 520 | 	description,
 521 | 	color
 522 | }: {
 523 | 	icon: React.ElementType;
 524 | 	title: string;
 525 | 	description: string;
 526 | 	color: "blue" | "green" | "red" | "purple";
 527 | }) {
 528 | 	const colorClasses = {
 529 | 		blue: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400",
 530 | 		green: "bg-green-100 text-green-600 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400",
 531 | 		red: "bg-red-100 text-red-600 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400",
 532 | 		purple: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-600 dark:bg-purple-900/30 dark:text-purple-400"
 533 | 	};
 534 | 
 535 | 	return (
 536 | 		<Card className='h-full text-center transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg'>
 537 | 			<CardContent className='p-6'>
 538 | 				<div
 539 | 					className={`mx-auto mb-4 flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-xl ${colorClasses[color]}`}
 540 | 				>
 541 | 					<Icon className='h-6 w-6' />
 542 | 				</div>
 543 | 				<h3 className='mb-2 font-semibold text-lg'>{title}</h3>
 544 | 				<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>{description}</p>
 545 | 			</CardContent>
 546 | 		</Card>
 547 | 	);
 548 | }
 549 | 
 550 | function FeatureCard({ title, description }: { title: string; description: string }) {
 551 | 	return (
 552 | 		<div className='flex gap-3'>
 553 | 			<div className='flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10'>
 554 | 				<Heart className='h-4 w-4 text-primary' />
 555 | 			</div>
 556 | 			<div>
 557 | 				<h3 className='font-semibold'>{title}</h3>
 558 | 				<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>{description}</p>
 559 | 			</div>
 560 | 		</div>
 561 | 	);
 562 | }
```

`routes/orders/index.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { createFileRoute, Link, redirect } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   2 | import { Package } from "lucide-react";
   3 | import { Button } from "#/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Empty, EmptyContent, EmptyDescription, EmptyHeader, EmptyTitle } from "@/components/ui/empty";
   5 | import { getOrdersByUser } from "@/data/orders";
   6 | 
   7 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/orders/")({
   8 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
   9 | 		const session = context.session;
  10 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  11 | 	},
  12 | 	loader: async () => getOrdersByUser(),
  13 | 	component: RouteComponent
  14 | });
  15 | 
  16 | const statusStyles = {
  17 | 	pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-900/30 dark:text-yellow-400",
  18 | 	paid: "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400",
  19 | 	failed: "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400"
  20 | };
  21 | 
  22 | function RouteComponent() {
  23 | 	const orders = Route.useLoaderData();
  24 | 
  25 | 	if (orders.length === 0) {
  26 | 		return (
  27 | 			<div className='mx-auto max-w-3xl py-16'>
  28 | 				<Empty>
  29 | 					<EmptyHeader>
  30 | 						<Package
  31 | 							className='mx-auto text-slate-400'
  32 | 							size={40}
  33 | 						/>
  34 | 						<EmptyTitle>No orders yet</EmptyTitle>
  35 | 						<EmptyDescription>Once you complete a purchase, your orders will appear here.</EmptyDescription>
  36 | 					</EmptyHeader>
  37 | 
  38 | 					<EmptyContent>
  39 | 						<Link to='/products'>
  40 | 							<Button>Browse products</Button>
  41 | 						</Link>
  42 | 					</EmptyContent>
  43 | 				</Empty>
  44 | 			</div>
  45 | 		);
  46 | 	}
  47 | 
  48 | 	return (
  49 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-3xl space-y-6 py-8'>
  50 | 			<div>
  51 | 				<h1 className='font-semibold text-2xl'>My Orders</h1>
  52 | 				<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-300'>Your purchase history.</p>
  53 | 			</div>
  54 | 
  55 | 			<div className='space-y-4'>
  56 | 				{orders.map(order => (
  57 | 					<div
  58 | 						className='rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-xs dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-950/40'
  59 | 						key={order.id}
  60 | 					>
  61 | 						<div className='flex items-center justify-between border-slate-200 border-b px-5 py-3 dark:border-slate-800'>
  62 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-4 text-sm'>
  63 | 								<span className='text-slate-500'>
  64 | 									{order.createdAt.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
  65 | 										year: "numeric",
  66 | 										month: "short",
  67 | 										day: "numeric"
  68 | 									})}
  69 | 								</span>
  70 | 
  71 | 								<span
  72 | 									className={`rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 font-medium text-xs ${statusStyles[order.status]}`}
  73 | 								>
  74 | 									{order.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + order.status.slice(1)}
  75 | 								</span>
  76 | 							</div>
  77 | 
  78 | 							<span className='font-semibold text-sm'>${Number(order.total).toFixed(2)}</span>
  79 | 						</div>
  80 | 
  81 | 						<div className='divide-y divide-slate-100 dark:divide-slate-800'>
  82 | 							{order.items.map(item => (
  83 | 								<div
  84 | 									className='flex items-center gap-4 px-5 py-3'
  85 | 									key={item.id}
  86 | 								>
  87 | 									<div className='flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-900'>
  88 | 										<img
  89 | 											alt={item.name}
  90 | 											className='h-8 w-8 object-contain'
  91 | 											loading='lazy'
  92 | 											src={item.image}
  93 | 										/>
  94 | 									</div>
  95 | 
  96 | 									<div className='flex-1'>
  97 | 										<p className='font-semibold text-sm'>{item.name}</p>
  98 | 										<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>
  99 | 											Qty: {item.quantity} · ${Number(item.price).toFixed(2)} each
 100 | 										</p>
 101 | 									</div>
 102 | 
 103 | 									<span className='font-semibold text-sm'>
 104 | 										${(Number(item.price) * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}
 105 | 									</span>
 106 | 								</div>
 107 | 							))}
 108 | 						</div>
 109 | 					</div>
 110 | 				))}
 111 | 			</div>
 112 | 		</div>
 113 | 	);
 114 | }
```

`routes/orders/manage-orders.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { createFileRoute, redirect, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   2 | import { type ColumnDef, flexRender, getCoreRowModel, useReactTable } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   3 | import { Eye } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { useState } from "react";
   5 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   6 | import { DataToolbar } from "#/components/DataToolbar";
   7 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   8 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
   9 | import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from "@/components/ui/dialog";
  10 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
  11 | import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
  12 | import type { OrderData } from "@/data/orders";
  13 | import { getAllOrders, updateOrderStatus } from "@/data/orders";
  14 | import { useOrderFilters } from "@/hooks/useOrderFilters";
  15 | 
  16 | const statusStyles = {
  17 | 	pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-900/30 dark:text-yellow-400",
  18 | 	paid: "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400",
  19 | 	failed: "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400"
  20 | };
  21 | 
  22 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/orders/manage-orders")({
  23 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  24 | 		const session = context.session;
  25 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  26 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw redirect({ to: "/" });
  27 | 		return { user: session.user };
  28 | 	},
  29 | 	loader: async () => getAllOrders(),
  30 | 	component: ManageOrdersPage
  31 | });
  32 | 
  33 | // ── Component ──
  34 | function ManageOrdersPage() {
  35 | 	const orders = Route.useLoaderData();
  36 | 	const { filtered, toolbar } = useOrderFilters(orders);
  37 | 	const router = useRouter();
  38 | 
  39 | 	const [viewingOrder, setViewingOrder] = useState<OrderData | null>(null);
  40 | 	const [updatingId, setUpdatingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  41 | 	const columns: ColumnDef<OrderData>[] = [
  42 | 		{
  43 | 			accessorKey: "createdAt",
  44 | 			header: "Date",
  45 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
  46 | 				<span className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-300'>
  47 | 					{row.original.createdAt.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
  48 | 						year: "numeric",
  49 | 						month: "short",
  50 | 						day: "numeric"
  51 | 					})}
  52 | 				</span>
  53 | 			)
  54 | 		},
  55 | 		{
  56 | 			id: "customer",
  57 | 			header: "Customer",
  58 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
  59 | 				<div>
  60 | 					<p className='font-medium text-sm'>{row.original.user.name}</p>
  61 | 					<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>{row.original.user.email}</p>
  62 | 				</div>
  63 | 			)
  64 | 		},
  65 | 		{
  66 | 			accessorKey: "status",
  67 | 			header: "Status",
  68 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
  69 | 				<span
  70 | 					className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 font-medium text-xs ${statusStyles[row.original.status]}`}
  71 | 				>
  72 | 					{row.original.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + row.original.status.slice(1)}
  73 | 				</span>
  74 | 			)
  75 | 		},
  76 | 		{
  77 | 			id: "itemsCount",
  78 | 			header: "Items",
  79 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
  80 | 				<span className='text-sm'>{row.original.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0)}</span>
  81 | 			)
  82 | 		},
  83 | 		{
  84 | 			accessorKey: "total",
  85 | 			header: "Total",
  86 | 			cell: ({ row }) => <span className='font-semibold text-sm'>${Number(row.original.total).toFixed(2)}</span>
  87 | 		},
  88 | 		{
  89 | 			id: "actions",
  90 | 			header: "",
  91 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
  92 | 				<Button
  93 | 					onClick={() => setViewingOrder(row.original)}
  94 | 					size='sm'
  95 | 					variant='outline'
  96 | 				>
  97 | 					<Eye size={14} />
  98 | 				</Button>
  99 | 			)
 100 | 		}
 101 | 	];
 102 | 
 103 | 	const table = useReactTable({
 104 | 		data: filtered,
 105 | 		columns,
 106 | 		getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel()
 107 | 	});
 108 | 
 109 | 	return (
 110 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 py-8'>
 111 | 			<div className='space-y-6'>
 112 | 				<Card>
 113 | 					<CardHeader>
 114 | 						<CardTitle className='text-lg'>Manage Orders</CardTitle>
 115 | 						<CardDescription>View all customer orders and their details.</CardDescription>
 116 | 						<DataToolbar {...toolbar} />
 117 | 					</CardHeader>
 118 | 				</Card>
 119 | 
 120 | 				<Card>
 121 | 					<CardContent className='p-0'>
 122 | 						<Table>
 123 | 							<TableHeader>
 124 | 								{table.getHeaderGroups().map(headerGroup => (
 125 | 									<TableRow key={headerGroup.id}>
 126 | 										{headerGroup.headers.map(header => (
 127 | 											<TableHead key={header.id}>
 128 | 												{header.isPlaceholder
 129 | 													? null
 130 | 													: flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
 131 | 											</TableHead>
 132 | 										))}
 133 | 									</TableRow>
 134 | 								))}
 135 | 							</TableHeader>
 136 | 							<TableBody>
 137 | 								{table.getRowModel().rows.length ? (
 138 | 									table.getRowModel().rows.map(row => (
 139 | 										<TableRow key={row.id}>
 140 | 											{row.getVisibleCells().map(cell => (
 141 | 												<TableCell key={cell.id}>
 142 | 													{flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
 143 | 												</TableCell>
 144 | 											))}
 145 | 										</TableRow>
 146 | 									))
 147 | 								) : (
 148 | 									<TableRow>
 149 | 										<TableCell
 150 | 											className='h-24 text-center text-slate-500'
 151 | 											colSpan={columns.length}
 152 | 										>
 153 | 											No orders found.
 154 | 										</TableCell>
 155 | 									</TableRow>
 156 | 								)}
 157 | 							</TableBody>
 158 | 						</Table>
 159 | 					</CardContent>
 160 | 				</Card>
 161 | 			</div>
 162 | 
 163 | 			{/* Order detail Dialog */}
 164 | 			<Dialog
 165 | 				onOpenChange={open => {
 166 | 					if (!open) setViewingOrder(null);
 167 | 				}}
 168 | 				open={viewingOrder !== null}
 169 | 			>
 170 | 				<DialogContent className='max-w-lg'>
 171 | 					<DialogHeader>
 172 | 						<DialogTitle>Order Details</DialogTitle>
 173 | 						<DialogDescription>
 174 | 							Order placed on{" "}
 175 | 							{viewingOrder?.createdAt.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
 176 | 								year: "numeric",
 177 | 								month: "long",
 178 | 								day: "numeric"
 179 | 							})}
 180 | 						</DialogDescription>
 181 | 					</DialogHeader>
 182 | 
 183 | 					{viewingOrder && (
 184 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 185 | 							<div className='rounded-lg border border-slate-200 p-3 dark:border-slate-800'>
 186 | 								<p className='font-medium text-sm'>{viewingOrder.user.name}</p>
 187 | 								<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>{viewingOrder.user.email}</p>
 188 | 							</div>
 189 | 
 190 | 							<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
 191 | 								<Select
 192 | 									disabled={updatingId === viewingOrder.id}
 193 | 									onValueChange={async value => {
 194 | 										setUpdatingId(viewingOrder.id);
 195 | 										try {
 196 | 											await updateOrderStatus({
 197 | 												data: {
 198 | 													orderId: viewingOrder.id,
 199 | 													status: value as "pending" | "paid" | "failed"
 200 | 												}
 201 | 											});
 202 | 											toast.success("Order status updated");
 203 | 											router.invalidate();
 204 | 											setViewingOrder(null);
 205 | 										} catch {
 206 | 											toast.error("Failed to update status");
 207 | 										}
 208 | 										setUpdatingId(null);
 209 | 									}}
 210 | 									value={viewingOrder.status}
 211 | 								>
 212 | 									<SelectTrigger className='h-8 w-30 text-xs'>
 213 | 										<SelectValue />
 214 | 									</SelectTrigger>
 215 | 									<SelectContent>
 216 | 										<SelectItem value='pending'>
 217 | 											<span className='text-yellow-600'>Pending</span>
 218 | 										</SelectItem>
 219 | 										<SelectItem value='paid'>
 220 | 											<span className='text-green-600'>Paid</span>
 221 | 										</SelectItem>
 222 | 										<SelectItem value='failed'>
 223 | 											<span className='text-red-600'>Failed</span>
 224 | 										</SelectItem>
 225 | 									</SelectContent>
 226 | 								</Select>
 227 | 								<span className='font-bold text-lg'>${Number(viewingOrder.total).toFixed(2)}</span>
 228 | 							</div>
 229 | 
 230 | 							<div className='divide-y divide-slate-100 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 dark:divide-slate-800 dark:border-slate-800'>
 231 | 								{viewingOrder.items.map(item => (
 232 | 									<div
 233 | 										className='flex items-center gap-3 p-3'
 234 | 										key={item.id}
 235 | 									>
 236 | 										<div className='flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-900'>
 237 | 											<img
 238 | 												alt={item.name}
 239 | 												className='h-6 w-6 object-contain'
 240 | 												src={item.image}
 241 | 											/>
 242 | 										</div>
 243 | 										<div className='flex-1'>
 244 | 											<p className='font-medium text-sm'>{item.name}</p>
 245 | 											<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>
 246 | 												Qty: {item.quantity} · ${Number(item.price).toFixed(2)} each
 247 | 											</p>
 248 | 										</div>
 249 | 										<span className='font-semibold text-sm'>
 250 | 											${(Number(item.price) * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}
 251 | 										</span>
 252 | 									</div>
 253 | 								))}
 254 | 							</div>
 255 | 						</div>
 256 | 					)}
 257 | 				</DialogContent>
 258 | 			</Dialog>
 259 | 		</div>
 260 | 	);
 261 | }
```

`routes/patients/$id.edit.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/patients/$id.edit.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";
   4 | import { createFileRoute, redirect, useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   5 | import { useState } from "react";
   6 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   7 | import { z } from "zod";
   8 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   9 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
  10 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
  11 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  12 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
  13 | import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
  14 | import { getPatientById, updatePatient } from "@/data/patients";
  15 | import type { BloodGroup, Gender } from "../../db/schema";
  16 | 
  17 | const patientEditSchema = z.object({
  18 | 	firstName: z.string().min(1, "First name is required"),
  19 | 	lastName: z.string().min(1, "Last name is required"),
  20 | 	dateOfBirth: z.string().min(1, "Date of birth is required"),
  21 | 	gender: z.enum(["MALE", "FEMALE", "OTHER"]).optional(),
  22 | 	email: z.string().email().optional().or(z.literal("")),
  23 | 	phone: z.string().optional(),
  24 | 	address: z.string().optional(),
  25 | 	bloodGroup: z
  26 | 		.enum([
  27 | 			"A_POSITIVE",
  28 | 			"A_NEGATIVE",
  29 | 			"B_POSITIVE",
  30 | 			"B_NEGATIVE",
  31 | 			"O_POSITIVE",
  32 | 			"O_NEGATIVE",
  33 | 			"AB_POSITIVE",
  34 | 			"AB_NEGATIVE"
  35 | 		])
  36 | 		.optional(),
  37 | 	allergies: z.string().optional(),
  38 | 	medicalConditions: z.string().optional(),
  39 | 	medicalHistory: z.string().optional(),
  40 | 	emergencyContactName: z.string().optional(),
  41 | 	emergencyContactNumber: z.string().optional()
  42 | });
  43 | 
  44 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/patients/$id/edit")({
  45 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  46 | 		const session = context.session;
  47 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  48 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin" && session.user.role !== "staff") {
  49 | 			throw redirect({ to: "/patients" });
  50 | 		}
  51 | 		return { user: session.user };
  52 | 	},
  53 | 	loader: async ({ params }) => {
  54 | 		const patient = await getPatientById({ data: params.id });
  55 | 		if (!patient) throw redirect({ to: "/patients" });
  56 | 		return { patient };
  57 | 	},
  58 | 	component: EditPatientPage
  59 | });
  60 | 
  61 | function EditPatientPage() {
  62 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  63 | 	const { patient } = Route.useLoaderData();
  64 | 	const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  65 | 
  66 | 	const formatDateForInput = (date: Date | string | null) => {
  67 | 		if (!date) return "";
  68 | 		const d = new Date(date);
  69 | 		return d.toISOString().split("T")[0];
  70 | 	};
  71 | 
  72 | 	const form = useForm({
  73 | 		defaultValues: {
  74 | 			firstName: patient.firstName,
  75 | 			lastName: patient.lastName,
  76 | 			dateOfBirth: formatDateForInput(patient.dateOfBirth),
  77 | 			gender: patient.gender || undefined,
  78 | 			email: patient.email || "",
  79 | 			phone: patient.phone || "",
  80 | 			address: patient.address || "",
  81 | 			bloodGroup: patient.bloodGroup || undefined,
  82 | 			allergies: patient.allergies || "",
  83 | 			medicalConditions: patient.medicalConditions || "",
  84 | 			medicalHistory: patient.medicalHistory || "",
  85 | 			emergencyContactName: patient.emergencyContactName || "",
  86 | 			emergencyContactNumber: patient.emergencyContactNumber || ""
  87 | 		},
  88 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
  89 | 			const result = patientEditSchema.safeParse(value);
  90 | 			if (!result.success) {
  91 | 				toast.error(result.error.issues[0]?.message);
  92 | 				return;
  93 | 			}
  94 | 
  95 | 			setIsSubmitting(true);
  96 | 			try {
  97 | 				await updatePatient({
  98 | 					data: {
  99 | 						id: patient.id,
 100 | 						...value,
 101 | 						dateOfBirth: new Date(value.dateOfBirth),
 102 | 						gender: value.gender,
 103 | 						bloodGroup: value.bloodGroup
 104 | 					}
 105 | 				});
 106 | 				toast.success("Patient updated successfully");
 107 | 				navigate({ to: "/patients/$id", params: { id: patient.id } });
 108 | 			} catch (error) {
 109 | 				console.error(error);
 110 | 				toast.error("Failed to update patient");
 111 | 			} finally {
 112 | 				setIsSubmitting(false);
 113 | 			}
 114 | 		}
 115 | 	});
 116 | 
 117 | 	const bloodGroupOptions = [
 118 | 		{ value: "A_POSITIVE", label: "A+" },
 119 | 		{ value: "A_NEGATIVE", label: "A-" },
 120 | 		{ value: "B_POSITIVE", label: "B+" },
 121 | 		{ value: "B_NEGATIVE", label: "B-" },
 122 | 		{ value: "O_POSITIVE", label: "O+" },
 123 | 		{ value: "O_NEGATIVE", label: "O-" },
 124 | 		{ value: "AB_POSITIVE", label: "AB+" },
 125 | 		{ value: "AB_NEGATIVE", label: "AB-" }
 126 | 	];
 127 | 
 128 | 	return (
 129 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-2xl px-4 py-8'>
 130 | 			<Card>
 131 | 				<CardHeader>
 132 | 					<CardTitle className='text-2xl'>Edit Patient</CardTitle>
 133 | 					<CardDescription>Update the patient's information below.</CardDescription>
 134 | 				</CardHeader>
 135 | 				<CardContent>
 136 | 					<form
 137 | 						onSubmit={e => {
 138 | 							e.preventDefault();
 139 | 							e.stopPropagation();
 140 | 							form.handleSubmit();
 141 | 						}}
 142 | 					>
 143 | 						<div className='space-y-6'>
 144 | 							{/* Personal Information */}
 145 | 							<div>
 146 | 								<h3 className='mb-3 font-semibold text-lg'>Personal Information</h3>
 147 | 								<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 148 | 									<form.Field name='firstName'>
 149 | 										{field => (
 150 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 151 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>First Name *</Label>
 152 | 												<Input
 153 | 													id={field.name}
 154 | 													onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 155 | 													value={field.state.value}
 156 | 												/>
 157 | 											</div>
 158 | 										)}
 159 | 									</form.Field>
 160 | 
 161 | 									<form.Field name='lastName'>
 162 | 										{field => (
 163 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 164 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Last Name *</Label>
 165 | 												<Input
 166 | 													id={field.name}
 167 | 													onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 168 | 													value={field.state.value}
 169 | 												/>
 170 | 											</div>
 171 | 										)}
 172 | 									</form.Field>
 173 | 
 174 | 									<form.Field name='dateOfBirth'>
 175 | 										{field => (
 176 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 177 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Date of Birth *</Label>
 178 | 												<Input
 179 | 													id={field.name}
 180 | 													onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 181 | 													type='date'
 182 | 													value={field.state.value}
 183 | 												/>
 184 | 											</div>
 185 | 										)}
 186 | 									</form.Field>
 187 | 
 188 | 									<form.Field name='gender'>
 189 | 										{field => (
 190 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 191 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Gender</Label>
 192 | 												<Select
 193 | 													onValueChange={value => field.handleChange(value as Gender)}
 194 | 													value={field.state.value}
 195 | 												>
 196 | 													<SelectTrigger id={field.name}>
 197 | 														<SelectValue placeholder='Select gender' />
 198 | 													</SelectTrigger>
 199 | 													<SelectContent>
 200 | 														<SelectItem value='MALE'>Male</SelectItem>
 201 | 														<SelectItem value='FEMALE'>Female</SelectItem>
 202 | 														<SelectItem value='OTHER'>Other</SelectItem>
 203 | 													</SelectContent>
 204 | 												</Select>
 205 | 											</div>
 206 | 										)}
 207 | 									</form.Field>
 208 | 								</div>
 209 | 							</div>
 210 | 
 211 | 							{/* Contact Information */}
 212 | 							<div>
 213 | 								<h3 className='mb-3 font-semibold text-lg'>Contact Information</h3>
 214 | 								<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 215 | 									<form.Field name='email'>
 216 | 										{field => (
 217 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 218 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Email</Label>
 219 | 												<Input
 220 | 													id={field.name}
 221 | 													onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 222 | 													placeholder='patient@example.com'
 223 | 													type='email'
 224 | 													value={field.state.value}
 225 | 												/>
 226 | 											</div>
 227 | 										)}
 228 | 									</form.Field>
 229 | 
 230 | 									<form.Field name='phone'>
 231 | 										{field => (
 232 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 233 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Phone</Label>
 234 | 												<Input
 235 | 													id={field.name}
 236 | 													onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 237 | 													placeholder='(555) 555-5555'
 238 | 													value={field.state.value}
 239 | 												/>
 240 | 											</div>
 241 | 										)}
 242 | 									</form.Field>
 243 | 
 244 | 									<form.Field name='address'>
 245 | 										{field => (
 246 | 											<div className='space-y-2 sm:col-span-2'>
 247 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Address</Label>
 248 | 												<Input
 249 | 													id={field.name}
 250 | 													onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 251 | 													placeholder='Street address, city, zip code'
 252 | 													value={field.state.value}
 253 | 												/>
 254 | 											</div>
 255 | 										)}
 256 | 									</form.Field>
 257 | 								</div>
 258 | 							</div>
 259 | 
 260 | 							{/* Medical Information */}
 261 | 							<div>
 262 | 								<h3 className='mb-3 font-semibold text-lg'>Medical Information</h3>
 263 | 								<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 264 | 									<form.Field name='bloodGroup'>
 265 | 										{field => (

 267 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Blood Group</Label>
 268 | 												<Select

 270 | 													value={field.state.value}

 275 | 													<SelectContent>
 276 | 														{bloodGroupOptions.map(option => (

 279 | 																value={option.value}
 280 | 															>
 281 | 																{option.label}
 282 | 															</SelectItem>
 283 | 														))}
 284 | 													</SelectContent>
 285 | 												</Select>
 286 | 											</div>
 287 | 										)}
 288 | 									</form.Field>
 289 | 
 290 | 									<form.Field name='allergies'>
 291 | 										{field => (
 292 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 293 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Allergies</Label>
 294 | 												<Input
 295 | 													id={field.name}
 296 | 													onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 297 | 													placeholder='e.g., Penicillin, Peanuts'
 298 | 													value={field.state.value}
 299 | 												/>
 300 | 											</div>
 301 | 										)}
 302 | 									</form.Field>
 303 | 
 304 | 									<form.Field name='medicalConditions'>
 305 | 										{field => (
 306 | 											<div className='space-y-2 sm:col-span-2'>
 307 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Medical Conditions</Label>

 309 | 													id={field.name}
 310 | 													onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 311 | 													placeholder='Chronic conditions, diagnoses, etc.'
 312 | 													rows={2}
 313 | 													value={field.state.value}
 314 | 												/>
 315 | 											</div>
 316 | 										)}
 317 | 									</form.Field>
 318 | 
 319 | 									<form.Field name='medicalHistory'>
 320 | 										{field => (
 321 | 											<div className='space-y-2 sm:col-span-2'>
 322 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Medical History</Label>

 324 | 													id={field.name}
 325 | 													onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 326 | 													placeholder='Previous surgeries, hospitalizations, etc.'
 327 | 													rows={2}
 328 | 													value={field.state.value}
 329 | 												/>
 330 | 											</div>
 331 | 										)}
 332 | 									</form.Field>
 333 | 								</div>
 334 | 							</div>
 335 | 
 336 | 							{/* Emergency Contact */}
 337 | 							<div>
 338 | 								<h3 className='mb-3 font-semibold text-lg'>Emergency Contact</h3>
 339 | 								<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 340 | 									<form.Field name='emergencyContactName'>
 341 | 										{field => (
 342 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 343 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Contact Name</Label>
 344 | 												<Input
 345 | 													id={field.name}
 346 | 													onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 347 | 													placeholder='Full name'
 348 | 													value={field.state.value}
 349 | 												/>
 350 | 											</div>
 351 | 										)}
 352 | 									</form.Field>
 353 | 
 354 | 									<form.Field name='emergencyContactNumber'>
 355 | 										{field => (
 356 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 357 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Contact Number</Label>
 358 | 												<Input
 359 | 													id={field.name}
 360 | 													onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 361 | 													placeholder='Phone number'
 362 | 													value={field.state.value}
 363 | 												/>
 364 | 											</div>
 365 | 										)}
 366 | 									</form.Field>
 367 | 								</div>
 368 | 							</div>
 369 | 
 370 | 							<div className='flex gap-3 pt-4'>
 371 | 								<Button
 372 | 									onClick={() => navigate({ to: "/patients/$id", params: { id: patient.id } })}
 373 | 									type='button'
 374 | 									variant='outline'
 375 | 								>
 376 | 									Cancel
 377 | 								</Button>
 378 | 								<Button
 379 | 									disabled={isSubmitting}
 380 | 									type='submit'
 381 | 								>
 382 | 									{isSubmitting ? "Saving..." : "Save Changes"}
 383 | 								</Button>
 384 | 							</div>
 385 | 						</div>
 386 | 					</form>
 387 | 				</CardContent>
 388 | 			</Card>
 389 | 		</div>
 390 | 	);
 391 | }

```

`routes/patients/$id.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/patients/$id.tsx
   2 | import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar";

   4 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";

   7 | import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
   8 | import { getPatientAppointments } from "@/data/appointments";
   9 | import { getPatientEncounters } from "@/data/diagnosis";
  10 | import { getPatientMedicalRecords } from "@/data/medical-records";
  11 | import { getPatientById } from "@/data/patients";
  12 | import { formatDate, getInitials } from "@/utils/formDate";
  13 | import { calculateAge } from "@/utils/growth";
  14 | import { createFileRoute, Link, notFound, redirect } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  15 | import {
  16 |   Activity,
  17 |   ArrowLeft,
  18 |   Calendar,
  19 |   ClipboardList,
  20 |   Clock,
  21 |   Droplet,
  22 |   Edit,
  23 |   FileText,
  24 |   Heart,

  26 |   MapPin,
  27 |   Phone,
  28 |   Shield,
  29 |   Stethoscope,
  30 |   Syringe,
  31 |   User
  32 | } from "lucide-react";
  33 | import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  34 | 
  35 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/patients/$id")({
  36 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  37 | 		const session = context.session;
  38 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  39 | 		return { user: session.user };
  40 | 	},
  41 | 	loader: async ({ params }) => {
  42 | 		const patient = await getPatientById({ data: params.id });
  43 | 		if (!patient) throw notFound();
  44 | 		return { patient };
  45 | 	},
  46 | 	component: PatientDetailPage
  47 | });
  48 | 
  49 | function PatientDetailPage() {
  50 | 	const { patient } = Route.useLoaderData();
  51 | 	const { user } = Route.useRouteContext();
  52 | 	const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("overview");
  53 | 
  54 | 	const isAdmin = user?.role === "admin";
  55 | 	const isStaff = user?.role === "staff" || user?.role === "doctor";
  56 | 	const canEdit = isAdmin || isStaff;
  57 | 
  58 | 	const bloodGroupLabels: Record<string, string> = {
  59 | 		A_POSITIVE: "A+",
  60 | 		A_NEGATIVE: "A-",
  61 | 		B_POSITIVE: "B+",
  62 | 		B_NEGATIVE: "B-",
  63 | 		O_POSITIVE: "O+",
  64 | 		O_NEGATIVE: "O-",
  65 | 		AB_POSITIVE: "AB+",
  66 | 		AB_NEGATIVE: "AB-"
  67 | 	};
  68 | 
  69 | 	return (
  70 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-6xl px-4 py-8'>
  71 | 			<div className='space-y-6'>
  72 | 				{/* Header with Back Button */}
  73 | 				<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4'>
  74 | 					<Link
  75 | 						className='inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-600 text-sm hover:text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-400 dark:hover:text-slate-200'
  76 | 						to='/patients'
  77 | 					>
  78 | 						<ArrowLeft className='h-4 w-4' />
  79 | 						Back to Patients
  80 | 					</Link>
  81 | 					{canEdit && (
  82 | 						<Link
  83 | 							params={{ id: patient.id }}
  84 | 							to='/patients/$id/edit'
  85 | 						>
  86 | 							<Button
  87 | 								size='sm'
  88 | 								variant='outline'
  89 | 							>
  90 | 								<Edit className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
  91 | 								Edit Patient
  92 | 							</Button>
  93 | 						</Link>
  94 | 					)}
  95 | 				</div>
  96 | 
  97 | 				{/* Patient Profile Card */}
  98 | 				<Card>
  99 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 100 | 						<div className='flex flex-col gap-6 sm:flex-row sm:items-start'>
 101 | 							{/* Avatar */}
 102 | 							<div className='flex justify-center sm:justify-start'>
 103 | 								<Avatar className='h-24 w-24 border-4 border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800'>
 104 | 									<AvatarImage src={patient.image || undefined} />
 105 | 									<AvatarFallback className='bg-primary/10 text-2xl text-primary'>
 106 | 										{getInitials(patient.firstName, patient.lastName)}
 107 | 									</AvatarFallback>
 108 | 								</Avatar>
 109 | 							</div>
 110 | 
 111 | 							{/* Patient Info */}
 112 | 							<div className='flex-1 space-y-3 text-center sm:text-left'>
 113 | 								<div>
 114 | 									<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-2 sm:justify-start'>
 115 | 										<h1 className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 116 | 											{patient.firstName} {patient.lastName}
 117 | 										</h1>
 118 | 										<Badge
 119 | 											className='text-xs'
 120 | 											variant='outline'
 121 | 										>
 122 | 											MRN: {patient.mrn || "—"}
 123 | 										</Badge>
 124 | 									</div>
 125 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-sm'>
 126 | 										Patient since {formatDate(patient.createdAt)}
 127 | 									</p>
 128 | 								</div>
 129 | 
 130 | 								<div className='grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4'>
 131 | 									<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>

 138 | 											</p>
 139 | 										</div>
 140 | 									</div>
 141 | 									<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 142 | 										<User className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />

 144 | 											<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Gender</p>

 147 | 											</p>
 148 | 										</div>
 149 | 									</div>
 150 | 									<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>

 156 | 											</p>

 158 | 									</div>

 165 | 													patient.status === "ACTIVE"
 166 | 														? "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400"
 167 | 														: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400"
 168 | 												}`}
 169 | 											>
 170 | 												{patient.status || "ACTIVE"}
 171 | 											</Badge>
 172 | 										</div>
 173 | 									</div>
 174 | 								</div>
 175 | 							</div>
 176 | 						</div>
 177 |

 179 | 
 180 | 						{/* Contact Information */}
 181 | 						<div className='grid gap-6 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 182 | 							<div>
 183 | 								<h3 className='mb-3 font-semibold text-sm'>Contact Information</h3>
 184 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 185 | 									{patient.phone && (
 186 | 										<div className='flex items-center gap-2 text-sm'>
 187 | 											<Phone className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 188 | 											<span>{patient.phone}</span>
 189 | 										</div>
 190 | 									)}
 191 | 									{patient.email && (
 192 | 										<div className='flex items-center gap-2 text-sm'>

 195 | 										</div>
 196 | 									)}
 197 | 									{patient.address && (

 202 | 									)}
 203 | 								</div>
 204 | 							</div>
 205 | 
 206 | 							<div>
 207 | 								<h3 className='mb-3 font-semibold text-sm'>Emergency Contact</h3>

 209 | 									{patient.emergencyContactName && (

 213 | 										</div>
 214 | 									)}
 215 | 									{patient.emergencyContactNumber && (
 216 | 										<div className='flex items-center gap-2 text-sm'>
 217 | 											<Phone className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
```
