```tsx
 219 | 										</div>
 220 | 									)}
 221 | 								</div>
 222 | 							</div>
 223 | 						</div>
 224 | 					</CardContent>
 225 | 				</Card>
 226 | 
 227 | 				{/* Medical Information Section */}
 228 | 				{(patient.allergies || patient.medicalConditions || patient.medicalHistory) && (
 229 | 					<Card>
 230 | 						<CardHeader>
 231 | 							<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 text-lg'>
 232 | 								<Shield className='h-5 w-5' />
 233 | 								Medical Information
 234 | 							</CardTitle>
 235 | 						</CardHeader>
 236 | 						<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
 237 | 							{patient.allergies && (
 238 | 								<div>
 239 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Allergies</p>
 240 | 									<p className='text-sm'>{patient.allergies}</p>
 241 | 								</div>
 242 | 							)}
 243 | 							{patient.medicalConditions && (
 244 | 								<div>
 245 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Medical Conditions</p>
 246 | 									<p className='text-sm'>{patient.medicalConditions}</p>
 247 | 								</div>
 248 | 							)}
 249 | 							{patient.medicalHistory && (
 250 | 								<div>
 251 | 									<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>Medical History</p>
 252 | 									<p className='text-sm'>{patient.medicalHistory}</p>
 253 | 								</div>
 254 | 							)}
 255 | 						</CardContent>
 256 | 					</Card>
 257 | 				)}
 258 | 
 259 | 				{/* Tabs for Appointments, Records, etc. */}
 260 | 				<Tabs
 261 | 					defaultValue='overview'
 262 | 					onValueChange={setActiveTab}
 263 | 					value={activeTab}
 264 | 				>
 265 | 					<TabsList className='grid w-full grid-cols-4 lg:w-auto'>
 266 | 						<TabsTrigger value='overview'>Overview</TabsTrigger>
 267 | 						<TabsTrigger value='appointments'>Appointments</TabsTrigger>
 268 | 						<TabsTrigger value='encounters'>Encounters</TabsTrigger>
 269 | 						<TabsTrigger value='records'>Medical Records</TabsTrigger>
 270 | 					</TabsList>
 271 | 
 272 | 					<TabsContent
 273 | 						className='mt-6 space-y-4'
 274 | 						value='overview'
 275 | 					>
 276 | 						<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4'>
 277 | 							<StatCard
 278 | 								color='blue'
 279 | 								icon={Calendar}
 280 | 								label='Total Appointments'
 281 | 								value='—'
 282 | 							/>
 283 | 							<StatCard
 284 | 								color='green'
 285 | 								icon={Stethoscope}
 286 | 								label='Total Encounters'
 287 | 								value='—'
 288 | 							/>
 289 | 							<StatCard
 290 | 								color='purple'
 291 | 								icon={Syringe}
 292 | 								label='Immunizations'
 293 | 								value='—'
 294 | 							/>
 295 | 							<StatCard
 296 | 								color='orange'
 297 | 								icon={Activity}
 298 | 								label='Growth Records'
 299 | 								value='—'
 300 | 							/>
 301 | 						</div>
 302 | 						<Card>
 303 | 							<CardHeader>
 304 | 								<CardTitle className='text-lg'>Recent Activity</CardTitle>
 305 | 								<CardDescription>Latest appointments and updates</CardDescription>
 306 | 							</CardHeader>
 307 | 							<CardContent>
 308 | 								<p className='py-8 text-center text-slate-500 text-sm'>
 309 | 									No recent activity to display.
 310 | 								</p>
 311 | 							</CardContent>
 312 | 						</Card>
 313 | 					</TabsContent>
 314 | 
 315 | 					<TabsContent
 316 | 						className='mt-6'
 317 | 						value='appointments'
 318 | 					>
 319 | 						<PatientAppointmentsTab patientId={patient.id} />
 320 | 					</TabsContent>
 321 | 
 322 | 					<TabsContent
 323 | 						className='mt-6'
 324 | 						value='encounters'
 325 | 					>
 326 | 						<PatientEncountersTab patientId={patient.id} />
 327 | 					</TabsContent>
 328 | 
 329 | 					<TabsContent
 330 | 						className='mt-6'
 331 | 						value='records'
 332 | 					>
 333 | 						<PatientRecordsTab patientId={patient.id} />
 334 | 					</TabsContent>
 335 | 				</Tabs>
 336 | 			</div>
 337 | 		</div>
 338 | 	);
 339 | }
 340 | 
 341 | function StatCard({
 342 | 	icon: Icon,
 343 | 	label,
 344 | 	value,
 345 | 	color
 346 | }: {
 347 | 	icon: any;
 348 | 	label: string;
 349 | 	value: string;
 350 | 	color: "blue" | "green" | "purple" | "orange";
 351 | }) {
 352 | 	const colorClasses = {
 353 | 		blue: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400",
 354 | 		green: "bg-green-100 text-green-600 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400",
 355 | 		purple: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-600 dark:bg-purple-900/30 dark:text-purple-400",
 356 | 		orange: "bg-orange-100 text-orange-600 dark:bg-orange-900/30 dark:text-orange-400"
 357 | 	};
 358 | 
 359 | 	return (
 360 | 		<Card>
 361 | 			<CardContent className='flex items-center gap-4 p-4'>
 362 | 				<div className={`flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full ${colorClasses[color]}`}>
 363 | 					<Icon className='h-5 w-5' />
 364 | 				</div>
 365 | 				<div>
 366 | 					<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>{label}</p>
 367 | 					<p className='font-bold text-xl'>{value}</p>
 368 | 				</div>
 369 | 			</CardContent>
 370 | 		</Card>
 371 | 	);
 372 | }
 373 | 
 374 | function PatientAppointmentsTab({ patientId }: { patientId: string }) {
 375 | 	const [appointments, setAppointments] = useState<any[]>([]);
 376 | 	const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 377 | 
 378 | 	useEffect(() => {
 379 | 		const fetchAppointments = async () => {
 380 | 			try {
 381 | 				const data = await getPatientAppointments({ data: patientId  });
 382 | 				setAppointments(data);
 383 | 			} catch (error) {
 384 | 				console.error("Failed to fetch appointments", error);
 385 | 			} finally {
 386 | 				setLoading(false);
 387 | 			}
 388 | 		};
 389 | 		fetchAppointments();
 390 | 	}, [patientId]);
 391 | 
 392 | 	if (loading) {
 393 | 		return <PatientTabSkeleton />;
 394 | 	}
 395 | 
 396 | 	if (appointments.length === 0) {
 397 | 		return (
 398 | 			<Card>
 399 | 				<CardContent className='py-12 text-center'>
 400 | 					<Calendar className='mx-auto h-12 w-12 text-slate-400' />
 401 | 					<h3 className='mt-4 font-semibold text-lg'>No Appointments</h3>
 402 | 					<p className='mt-2 text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 403 | 						This patient doesn't have any appointments yet.
 404 | 					</p>
 405 | 				</CardContent>
 406 | 			</Card>
 407 | 		);
 408 | 	}
 409 | 
 410 | 	return (
 411 | 		<div className='space-y-4'>
 412 | 			{appointments.map(apt => (
 413 | 				<Card key={apt.id}>
 414 | 					<CardContent className='p-4'>
 415 | 						<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3'>
 416 | 							<div className='space-y-1'>
 417 | 								<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 418 | 									<Clock className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 419 | 									<span className='font-medium'>
 420 | 										{formatDate(apt.appointmentDate)} at {apt.time}
 421 | 									</span>
 422 | 								</div>
 423 | 								<p className='text-sm'>Dr. {apt.doctorName}</p>
 424 | 								{apt.reason && <p className='text-slate-500 text-sm'>{apt.reason}</p>}
 425 | 							</div>
 426 | 							<Badge
 427 | 								className={
 428 | 									apt.status === "COMPLETED"
 429 | 										? "bg-green-100 text-green-700"
 430 | 										: apt.status === "CONFIRMED"
 431 | 											? "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700"
 432 | 											: apt.status === "CANCELLED"
 433 | 												? "bg-red-100 text-red-700"
 434 | 												: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700"
 435 | 								}
 436 | 							>
 437 | 								{apt.status}
 438 | 							</Badge>
 439 | 						</div>
 440 | 					</CardContent>
 441 | 				</Card>
 442 | 			))}
 443 | 		</div>
 444 | 	);
 445 | }
 446 | 
 447 | function PatientEncountersTab({ patientId }: { patientId: string }) {
 448 | 	const [encounters, setEncounters] = useState<any[]>([]);
 449 | 	const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 450 | 
 451 | 	useEffect(() => {
 452 | 		const fetchEncounters = async () => {
 453 | 			try {
 454 | 				const { encounters: data } = await getPatientEncounters({
 455 | 					data: { patientId }
 456 | 				});
 457 | 				setEncounters(data);
 458 | 			} catch (error) {
 459 | 				console.error("Failed to fetch encounters", error);
 460 | 			} finally {
 461 | 				setLoading(false);
 462 | 			}
 463 | 		};
 464 | 		fetchEncounters();
 465 | 	}, [patientId]);
 466 | 
 467 | 	if (loading) {
 468 | 		return <PatientTabSkeleton />;
 469 | 	}
 470 | 
 471 | 	if (encounters.length === 0) {
 472 | 		return (
 473 | 			<Card>
 474 | 				<CardContent className='py-12 text-center'>
 475 | 					<ClipboardList className='mx-auto h-12 w-12 text-slate-400' />
 476 | 					<h3 className='mt-4 font-semibold text-lg'>No Encounters</h3>
 477 | 					<p className='mt-2 text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 478 | 						No encounter records found for this patient.
 479 | 					</p>
 480 | 				</CardContent>
 481 | 			</Card>
 482 | 		);
 483 | 	}
 484 | 
 485 | 	return (
 486 | 		<div className='space-y-4'>
 487 | 			{encounters.map(encounter => (
 488 | 				<Card key={encounter.id}>
 489 | 					<CardContent className='p-4'>
 490 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 491 | 							<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2'>
 492 | 								<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 493 | 									<Stethoscope className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 494 | 									<span className='font-medium'>{formatDate(encounter.date)}</span>
 495 | 								</div>
 496 | 								<Badge variant='outline'>{encounter.type || "Consultation"}</Badge>
 497 | 							</div>
 498 | 							{encounter.diagnosis && (
 499 | 								<p className='text-sm'>
 500 | 									<span className='font-medium'>Diagnosis:</span> {encounter.diagnosis}
 501 | 								</p>
 502 | 							)}
 503 | 							{encounter.treatment && (
 504 | 								<p className='text-sm'>
 505 | 									<span className='font-medium'>Treatment:</span> {encounter.treatment}
 506 | 								</p>
 507 | 							)}
 508 | 							<Link
 509 | 								className='inline-block text-primary text-sm hover:underline'
 510 | 								params={{ id: encounter.id }}
 511 | 								to='/encounters/$id'
 512 | 							>
 513 | 								View Details →
 514 | 							</Link>
 515 | 						</div>
 516 | 					</CardContent>
 517 | 				</Card>
 518 | 			))}
 519 | 		</div>
 520 | 	);
 521 | }
 522 | 
 523 | function PatientRecordsTab({ patientId }: { patientId: string }) {
 524 | 	const [records, setRecords] = useState<any[]>([]);
 525 | 	const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 526 | 
 527 | 	useEffect(() => {
 528 | 		const fetchRecords = async () => {
 529 | 			try {
 530 | 				const { records: data } = await getPatientMedicalRecords({
 531 | 					data: { patientId }
 532 | 				});
 533 | 				setRecords(data);
 534 | 			} catch (error) {
 535 | 				console.error("Failed to fetch medical records", error);
 536 | 			} finally {
 537 | 				setLoading(false);
 538 | 			}
 539 | 		};
 540 | 		fetchRecords();
 541 | 	}, [patientId]);
 542 | 
 543 | 	if (loading) {
 544 | 		return <PatientTabSkeleton />;
 545 | 	}
 546 | 
 547 | 	if (records.length === 0) {
 548 | 		return (
 549 | 			<Card>
 550 | 				<CardContent className='py-12 text-center'>
 551 | 					<FileText className='mx-auto h-12 w-12 text-slate-400' />
 552 | 					<h3 className='mt-4 font-semibold text-lg'>No Medical Records</h3>
 553 | 					<p className='mt-2 text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 554 | 						No medical records found for this patient.
 555 | 					</p>
 556 | 				</CardContent>
 557 | 			</Card>
 558 | 		);
 559 | 	}
 560 | 
 561 | 	return (
 562 | 		<div className='space-y-4'>
 563 | 			{records.map(record => (
 564 | 				<Card key={record.id}>
 565 | 					<CardContent className='p-4'>
 566 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 567 | 							<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2'>
 568 | 								<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 569 | 									<FileText className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-400' />
 570 | 									<span className='font-medium'>{formatDate(record.createdAt)}</span>
 571 | 								</div>
 572 | 								{record.followUpDate && (
 573 | 									<Badge variant='outline'>Follow-up: {formatDate(record.followUpDate)}</Badge>
 574 | 								)}
 575 | 							</div>
 576 | 							{record.diagnosis && (
 577 | 								<p className='text-sm'>
 578 | 									<span className='font-medium'>Diagnosis:</span> {record.diagnosis}
 579 | 								</p>
 580 | 							)}
 581 | 							{record.treatmentPlan && (
 582 | 								<p className='text-sm'>
 583 | 									<span className='font-medium'>Treatment Plan:</span> {record.treatmentPlan}
 584 | 								</p>
 585 | 							)}
 586 | 							<Link
 587 | 								className='inline-block text-primary text-sm hover:underline'
 588 | 								params={{ id: record.id }}
 589 | 								to='/medical-records/$id'
 590 | 							>
 591 | 								View Details →
 592 | 							</Link>
 593 | 						</div>
 594 | 					</CardContent>
 595 | 				</Card>
 596 | 			))}
 597 | 		</div>
 598 | 	);
 599 | }
 600 | 
 601 | function PatientTabSkeleton() {
 602 | 	return (
 603 | 		<div className='space-y-4'>
 604 | 			{[1, 2, 3].map(i => (
 605 | 				<Card key={i}>
 606 | 					<CardContent className='p-4'>
 607 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 608 | 							<div className='h-5 w-32 animate-pulse rounded bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-700' />
 609 | 							<div className='h-4 w-48 animate-pulse rounded bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-700' />
 610 | 							<div className='h-4 w-56 animate-pulse rounded bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-700' />
 611 | 						</div>
 612 | 					</CardContent>
 613 | 				</Card>
 614 | 			))}
 615 | 		</div>
 616 | 	);
 617 | }

```

`routes/patients/index.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/patients/index.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { createFileRoute, Link, redirect } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   4 | import { Mail, MoreHorizontal, Phone, Plus, Search } from "lucide-react";
   5 | import { useState } from "react";
   6 | import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar";
   7 | import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
   8 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   9 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
  10 | import {
  11 | 	DropdownMenu,
  12 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
  13 | 	DropdownMenuItem,
  14 | 	DropdownMenuLabel,
  15 | 	DropdownMenuSeparator,
  16 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  17 | } from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  18 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
  19 | import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
  20 | import { getAllPatients } from "@/data/patients";
  21 | import { formatDate, getInitials } from "@/utils/formDate";
  22 | import { calculateAge } from "@/utils/growth";
  23 | 
  24 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/patients/")({
  25 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  26 | 		const session = context.session;
  27 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  28 | 		return { user: session.user };
  29 | 	},
  30 | 	loader: async () => getAllPatients(),
  31 | 	component: PatientsListPage
  32 | });
  33 | 
  34 | function PatientsListPage() {
  35 | 	const patients = Route.useLoaderData();
  36 | 	const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  37 | 
  38 | 	const filteredPatients = patients.filter(
  39 | 		patient =>
  40 | 			patient.firstName.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
  41 | 			patient.lastName.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
  42 | 			patient.mrn?.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
  43 | 	);
  44 | 
  45 | 	const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
  46 | 		switch (status) {
  47 | 			case "ACTIVE":
  48 | 				return "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400";
  49 | 			case "INACTIVE":
  50 | 				return "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400";
  51 | 			default:
  52 | 				return "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-900/30 dark:text-yellow-400";
  53 | 		}
  54 | 	};
  55 | 
  56 | 	return (
  57 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 py-8'>
  58 | 			<div className='space-y-6'>
  59 | 				{/* Header */}
  60 | 				<div className='flex flex-col justify-between gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center'>
  61 | 					<div>
  62 | 						<h1 className='font-semibold text-2xl'>Patients</h1>
  63 | 						<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
  64 | 							Manage and view all patient records
  65 | 						</p>
  66 | 					</div>
  67 | 					<Link to='/patients/new'>
  68 | 						<Button>
  69 | 							<Plus className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
  70 | 							Add New Patient
  71 | 						</Button>
  72 | 					</Link>
  73 | 				</div>
  74 | 
  75 | 				{/* Search Bar */}
  76 | 				<Card>
  77 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  78 | 						<div className='relative'>
  79 | 							<Search className='absolute top-1/2 left-3 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400' />
  80 | 							<Input
  81 | 								className='pl-9'
  82 | 								onChange={e => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
  83 | 								placeholder='Search by name or MRN...'
  84 | 								value={searchQuery}
  85 | 							/>
  86 | 						</div>
  87 | 					</CardContent>
  88 | 				</Card>
  89 | 
  90 | 				{/* Patients Table */}
  91 | 				<Card>
  92 | 					<CardHeader>
  93 | 						<CardTitle className='text-lg'>All Patients</CardTitle>
  94 | 						<CardDescription>
  95 | 							Total {filteredPatients.length} patient{filteredPatients.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
  96 | 						</CardDescription>
  97 | 					</CardHeader>
  98 | 					<CardContent className='p-0'>
  99 | 						<Table>
 100 | 							<TableHeader>
 101 | 								<TableRow>
 102 | 									<TableHead>Patient</TableHead>
 103 | 									<TableHead>MRN</TableHead>
 104 | 									<TableHead>Age</TableHead>
 105 | 									<TableHead>Gender</TableHead>
 106 | 									<TableHead>Contact</TableHead>
 107 | 									<TableHead>Status</TableHead>
 108 | 									<TableHead className='w-[50px]' />
 109 | 								</TableRow>
 110 | 							</TableHeader>
 111 | 							<TableBody>
 112 | 								{filteredPatients.length === 0 ? (
 113 | 									<TableRow>
 114 | 										<TableCell
 115 | 											className='h-24 text-center text-slate-500'
 116 | 											colSpan={7}
 117 | 										>
 118 | 											No patients found.
 119 | 										</TableCell>
 120 | 									</TableRow>
 121 | 								) : (
 122 | 									filteredPatients.map(patient => (
 123 | 										<TableRow key={patient.id}>
 124 | 											<TableCell>
 125 | 												<Link
 126 | 													className='flex items-center gap-3 hover:underline'
 127 | 													params={{ id: patient.id }}
 128 | 													to='/patients/$id'
 129 | 												>
 130 | 													<Avatar className='h-9 w-9'>
 131 | 														<AvatarImage src={patient.image || undefined} />
 132 | 														<AvatarFallback className='bg-primary/10 text-primary text-xs'>
 133 | 															{getInitials(patient.firstName, patient.lastName)}
 134 | 														</AvatarFallback>
 135 | 													</Avatar>
 136 | 													<div>
 137 | 														<p className='font-medium text-sm'>
 138 | 															{patient.firstName} {patient.lastName}
 139 | 														</p>
 140 | 														<p className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>
 141 | 															DOB: {formatDate(patient.dateOfBirth)}
 142 | 														</p>
 143 | 													</div>
 144 | 												</Link>
 145 | 											</TableCell>
 146 | 											<TableCell>
 147 | 												<span className='font-mono text-sm'>{patient.mrn || "—"}</span>
 148 | 											</TableCell>
 149 | 											<TableCell>
 150 | 												<span className='text-sm'>
 151 | 													{calculateAge(patient.dateOfBirth, "string") as string}
 152 | 												</span>
 153 | 											</TableCell>
 154 | 											<TableCell>
 155 | 												<span className='text-sm capitalize'>
 156 | 													{patient.gender?.toLowerCase() || "—"}
 157 | 												</span>
 158 | 											</TableCell>
 159 | 											<TableCell>
 160 | 												<div className='space-y-0.5'>
 161 | 													{patient.phone && (
 162 | 														<div className='flex items-center gap-1 text-slate-500 text-xs'>
 163 | 															<Phone className='h-3 w-3' />
 164 | 															{patient.phone}
 165 | 														</div>
 166 | 													)}
 167 | 													{patient.email && (
 168 | 														<div className='flex items-center gap-1 text-slate-500 text-xs'>
 169 | 															<Mail className='h-3 w-3' />
 170 | 															{patient.email}
 171 | 														</div>
 172 | 													)}
 173 | 												</div>
 174 | 											</TableCell>
 175 | 											<TableCell>
 176 | 												<Badge className={getStatusColor(patient.status || "ACTIVE")}>
 177 | 													{patient.status || "ACTIVE"}
 178 | 												</Badge>
 179 | 											</TableCell>
 180 | 											<TableCell>
 181 | 												<DropdownMenu>
 182 | 													<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
 183 | 														<Button
 184 | 															size='icon'
 185 | 															variant='ghost'
 186 | 														>
 187 | 															<MoreHorizontal className='h-4 w-4' />
 188 | 															<span className='sr-only'>Open menu</span>
 189 | 														</Button>
 190 | 													</DropdownMenuTrigger>
 191 | 													<DropdownMenuContent align='end'>
 192 | 														<DropdownMenuLabel>Actions</DropdownMenuLabel>
 193 | 														<Link
 194 | 															params={{ id: patient.id }}
 195 | 															to='/patients/$id'
 196 | 														>
 197 | 															<DropdownMenuItem>View Details</DropdownMenuItem>
 198 | 														</Link>
 199 | 														<Link
 200 | 															params={{ id: patient.id }}
 201 | 															to='/patients/$id/edit'
 202 | 														>
 203 | 															<DropdownMenuItem>Edit Patient</DropdownMenuItem>
 204 | 														</Link>
 205 | 														<DropdownMenuSeparator />
 206 | 														<DropdownMenuItem className='text-red-600'>
 207 | 															Deactivate
 208 | 														</DropdownMenuItem>
 209 | 													</DropdownMenuContent>
 210 | 												</DropdownMenu>
 211 | 											</TableCell>
 212 | 										</TableRow>
 213 | 									))
 214 | 								)}
 215 | 							</TableBody>
 216 | 						</Table>
 217 | 					</CardContent>
 218 | 				</Card>
 219 | 			</div>
 220 | 		</div>
 221 | 	);
 222 | }

```

`routes/patients/new.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/patients/new.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";
   4 | import { createFileRoute, redirect, useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   5 | import { useState } from "react";
   6 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   7 | import { z } from "zod";
   8 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   9 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
  10 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
  11 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  12 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
  13 | import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
  14 | import { createPatient } from "@/data/patients";
  15 | import type { BloodGroup, Gender } from "../../db/schema";
  16 | import { generateId } from "../../utils";
  17 | 
  18 | const patientFormSchema = z.object({
  19 | 	firstName: z.string().min(1, "First name is required"),
  20 | 	lastName: z.string().min(1, "Last name is required"),
  21 | 	dateOfBirth: z.string().min(1, "Date of birth is required"),
  22 | 	gender: z.enum(["MALE", "FEMALE", "OTHER"]).optional(),
  23 | 	email: z.string().email().optional().or(z.literal("")),
  24 | 	phone: z.string().optional(),
  25 | 	address: z.string().optional(),
  26 | 	bloodGroup: z
  27 | 		.enum([
  28 | 			"A_POSITIVE",
  29 | 			"A_NEGATIVE",
  30 | 			"B_POSITIVE",
  31 | 			"B_NEGATIVE",
  32 | 			"O_POSITIVE",
  33 | 			"O_NEGATIVE",
  34 | 			"AB_POSITIVE",
  35 | 			"AB_NEGATIVE"
  36 | 		])
  37 | 		.optional(),
  38 | 	allergies: z.string().optional(),
  39 | 	medicalConditions: z.string().optional(),
  40 | 	medicalHistory: z.string().optional(),
  41 | 	emergencyContactName: z.string().optional(),
  42 | 	emergencyContactNumber: z.string().optional()
  43 | });
  44 | 
  45 | type PatientFormValues = z.infer<typeof patientFormSchema>;
  46 | 
  47 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/patients/new")({
  48 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  49 | 		const session = context.session;
  50 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  51 | 		return { user: session.user, clinicId: session.user.clinicId };
  52 | 	},
  53 | 	component: NewPatientPage
  54 | });
  55 | 
  56 | function NewPatientPage() {
  57 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  58 | 	const { user, clinicId } = Route.useRouteContext();
  59 | 	const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  60 | 
  61 | 	const form = useForm({
  62 | 		defaultValues: {
  63 | 			firstName: "",
  64 | 			lastName: "",
  65 | 			dateOfBirth: "",
  66 | 			gender: "MALE" as Gender,
  67 | 			email: "",
  68 | 			phone: "",
  69 | 			address: "",
  70 | 			bloodGroup: "AB_NEGATIVE" as BloodGroup,
  71 | 			allergies: "",
  72 | 			medicalConditions: "",
  73 | 			medicalHistory: "",
  74 | 			emergencyContactName: "",
  75 | 			emergencyContactNumber: ""
  76 | 		},
  77 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
  78 | 			const result = patientFormSchema.safeParse(value);
  79 | 			if (!result.success) {
  80 | 				toast.error(result.error.issues[0]?.message);
  81 | 				return;
  82 | 			}
  83 | 
  84 | 			setIsSubmitting(true);
  85 | 			try {
  86 | 				await createPatient({
  87 | 					data: {
  88 | 						...value,
  89 | 						id: generateId(),
  90 | 						userId: user.id,
  91 | 						clinicId: clinicId,
  92 | 
  93 | 						dateOfBirth: new Date(value.dateOfBirth),
  94 | 						gender: value.gender,
  95 | 						bloodGroup: value.bloodGroup
  96 | 					}
  97 | 				});
  98 | 				toast.success("Patient created successfully");
  99 | 				navigate({ to: "/patients" });
 100 | 			} catch (error) {
 101 | 				toast.error("Failed to create patient");
 102 | 			} finally {
 103 | 				setIsSubmitting(false);
 104 | 			}
 105 | 		}
 106 | 	});
 107 | 
 108 | 	const bloodGroupOptions = [
 109 | 		{ value: "A_POSITIVE", label: "A+" },
 110 | 		{ value: "A_NEGATIVE", label: "A-" },
 111 | 		{ value: "B_POSITIVE", label: "B+" },
 112 | 		{ value: "B_NEGATIVE", label: "B-" },
 113 | 		{ value: "O_POSITIVE", label: "O+" },
 114 | 		{ value: "O_NEGATIVE", label: "O-" },
 115 | 		{ value: "AB_POSITIVE", label: "AB+" },
 116 | 		{ value: "AB_NEGATIVE", label: "AB-" }
 117 | 	];
 118 |

 124 | 					<CardDescription>Enter the patient's information below to create a new record.</CardDescription>
 125 | 				</CardHeader>
 126 | 				<CardContent>
 127 | 					<form
 128 | 						onSubmit={e => {
 129 | 							e.preventDefault();
 130 | 							e.stopPropagation();
 131 | 							form.handleSubmit();
 132 | 						}}
 133 | 					>
 134 | 						<div className='space-y-6'>
 135 | 							{/* Personal Information */}
 136 | 							<div>

 142 | 												<Label htmlFor={field.name}>First Name *</Label>

 146 | 													value={field.state.value}
 147 | 												/>
 148 | 											</div>
```

`routes/products/$id.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { RecommendedProducts } from "#/components/RecommndedProducts";
   2 | import { Button } from "#/components/ui/button";
   3 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "#/components/ui/card";
   4 | import { Skeleton } from "#/components/ui/skeleton";
   5 | import { addToCart } from "#/data/cart";
   6 | import { getProductById, getRecommendedProducts } from "#/data/products";
   7 | import { useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   8 | import { createFileRoute, Link, notFound, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   9 | import { ArrowLeftIcon, ShoppingBagIcon, SparklesIcon } from "lucide-react";
  10 | import { Suspense, useState } from "react";
  11 |  const cartCountQueryKey = ["cart-count"] as const;
  12 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/products/$id")({
  13 | 	component: RouteComponent,
  14 | 	loader: async ({ params }) => {
  15 | 		//Product detail
  16 | 		const product = await getProductById({ data: params.id });
  17 | 		if (!product) {
  18 | 			throw notFound();
  19 | 		}
  20 | 		//Recommended products
  21 | 		const recommendedProducts = getRecommendedProducts();
  22 | 		return {
  23 | 			product,
  24 | 			recommendedProducts
  25 | 		};
  26 | 	},
  27 | 	head: ({ loaderData }) => {
  28 | 		if (!loaderData) {
  29 | 			return {};
  30 | 		}
  31 | 
  32 | 		const { product } = loaderData;
  33 | 
  34 | 		return {
  35 | 			meta: [
  36 | 				{ title: product.name },
  37 | 				{ name: "description", content: product.description },
  38 | 				{ name: "image", content: product.image },
  39 | 				{ name: "title", content: product.name },
  40 | 				{
  41 | 					name: "canonical",
  42 | 					content:
  43 | 						process.env.NODE_ENV === "production"
  44 | 							? `https://stackshop-prod.appwrite.network/products/${product.id}`
  45 | 							: `http://localhost:3000/products/${product.id}`
  46 | 				}
  47 | 			]
  48 | 		};
  49 | 	}
  50 | });
  51 | 
  52 | function RouteComponent() {
  53 | 	const router = useRouter();
  54 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  55 | 	const { product, recommendedProducts } = Route.useLoaderData();
  56 | 	console.log(product);
  57 | 	const [adding, setAdding] = useState(false);
  58 | 
  59 | 	return (
  60 | 		<div>
  61 | 			<Card className='mx-auto max-w-4xl p-6'>
  62 | 				<Link
  63 | 					className='inline-flex items-center gap-2 font-medium text-blue-600 text-sm hover:text-blue-700'
  64 | 					to='/products'
  65 | 				>
  66 | 					<ArrowLeftIcon size={16} />
  67 | 					Back to products
  68 | 				</Link>
  69 | 				<Card>
  70 | 					<div className='grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2'>
  71 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
  72 | 							<div className='aspect-4/3 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border bg-linear-to-br from-slate-50 via-white to-slate-100 dark:from-slate-800 dark:to-slate-900'>
  73 | 								<img
  74 | 									alt={product?.name}
  75 | 									className='h-full w-full object-contain p-6'
  76 | 									loading='lazy'
  77 | 									src={product?.image}
  78 | 								/>
  79 | 							</div>
  80 | 						</div>
  81 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
  82 | 							<CardHeader className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  83 | 								<CardTitle>
  84 | 									<h1 className='font-semibold text-2xl'>{product?.name}</h1>
  85 | 								</CardTitle>
  86 | 								<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  87 | 									{product?.badge && (
  88 | 										<span className='rounded-full bg-slate-900 px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold text-white text-xs'>
  89 | 											{product.badge}
  90 | 										</span>
  91 | 									)}
  92 | 								</div>
  93 | 							</CardHeader>
  94 | 							<CardContent className='flex flex-col items-start space-y-4'>
  95 | 								<CardDescription className='text-lg'>{product?.description}</CardDescription>
  96 | 								<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
  97 | 									<span className='font-bold text-3xl'>${product?.price}</span>
  98 | 									<span className='text-slate-500 text-sm'>
  99 | 										Rated {product?.rating.toString()} ({product?.reviews} reviews)
 100 | 									</span>
 101 | 								</div>
 102 | 								<div className='flex items-center gap-3 rounded-xl border bg-slate-50 p-4 font-medium text-sm dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-800'>
 103 | 									<SparklesIcon
 104 | 										className='text-amber-500'
 105 | 										size={18}
 106 | 									/>
 107 | 									{product?.inventory === "in-stock"
 108 | 										? "Ships in 1–2 business days."
 109 | 										: product?.inventory === "backorder"
 110 | 											? "Backordered — shipping in ~2 weeks."
 111 | 											: "Preorder — shipping in the next drop."}
 112 | 								</div>
 113 | 							</CardContent>
 114 | 							<CardFooter className='flex items-center justify-between border-t-0 bg-transparent pt-0'>
 115 | 								<div className='flex flex-wrap gap-3'>
 116 | 									<Button
 117 | 										className='bg-slate-900 px-4 text-white shadow-sm transition hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md dark:bg-white dark:text-slate-900'
 118 | 										disabled={adding}
 119 | 										onClick={async e => {
 120 | 											e.preventDefault();
 121 | 											e.stopPropagation();
 122 | 											setAdding(true);
 123 | 											await addToCart({ data: { productId: product.id } });
 124 | 											await queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 125 | 												queryKey: cartCountQueryKey
 126 | 											}); // "the data you cached under this key is now stale — refetch it."
 127 | 
 128 | 											router.invalidate();
 129 | 											setAdding(false);
 130 | 										}}
 131 | 									>
 132 | 										<ShoppingBagIcon size={16} />
 133 | 										{adding ? "Adding..." : "Add to Cart"}
 134 | 									</Button>
 135 | 									<Button
 136 | 										className='border-slate-200 text-slate-700 transition hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-sm dark:border-slate-800 dark:text-slate-100'
 137 | 										variant='outline'
 138 | 									>
 139 | 										Save for later
 140 | 									</Button>
 141 | 								</div>
 142 | 							</CardFooter>
 143 | 						</div>
 144 | 					</div>
 145 | 				</Card>
 146 | 			</Card>
 147 | 			<div className='mb-6'>
 148 | 				<Suspense
 149 | 					fallback={
 150 | 						<div>
 151 | 							<h2 className='my-4 font-bold text-2xl'>Recommended Products</h2>
 152 | 
 153 | 							<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3'>
 154 | 								{Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, index) => (
 155 | 									<Card key={index}>
 156 | 										<CardHeader>
 157 | 											<Skeleton className='aspect-4/3 w-full rounded-xl' />
 158 | 										</CardHeader>
 159 | 
 160 | 										<CardContent className='space-y-3'>
 161 | 											<Skeleton className='h-5 w-3/4' />
 162 | 											<Skeleton className='h-4 w-full' />
 163 | 											<Skeleton className='h-4 w-2/3' />
 164 | 
 165 | 											<div className='flex items-center justify-between pt-2'>
 166 | 												<Skeleton className='h-6 w-20' />
 167 | 												<Skeleton className='h-4 w-24' />
 168 | 											</div>
 169 | 										</CardContent>
 170 | 
 171 | 										<CardFooter>
 172 | 											<Skeleton className='h-10 w-full rounded-md' />
 173 | 										</CardFooter>
 174 | 									</Card>
 175 | 								))}
 176 | 							</div>
 177 | 						</div>
 178 | 					}
 179 | 				>
 180 | 					<RecommendedProducts recommendedProducts={recommendedProducts} />
 181 | 				</Suspense>
 182 | 			</div>
 183 | 		</div>
 184 | 	);
 185 | }

```

`routes/products/create-product.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { type FieldApi, useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";
   2 | import { createFileRoute, redirect, useNavigate, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import imageCompression from "browser-image-compression";
   4 | import { useState } from "react";
   5 | import type { z } from "zod";
   6 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   7 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
   8 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
   9 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  10 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
  11 | import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
  12 | import { createProduct, productSchema, uploadProductImage } from "@/data/products";
  13 | import type { BadgeValue, InventoryValue } from "@/db/schema";
  14 | 
  15 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/products/create-product")({
  16 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  17 | 		const session = context.session;
  18 | 
  19 | 		if (!session) {
  20 | 			throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  21 | 		}
  22 | 
  23 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") {
  24 | 			throw redirect({ to: "/" });
  25 | 		}
  26 | 
  27 | 		return { user: session.user };
  28 | 	},
  29 | 	component: RouteComponent
  30 | });
  31 | 
  32 | function fieldValidator(schema: z.ZodTypeAny) {
  33 | 	return ({ value }: { value: unknown }) => {
  34 | 		const result = schema.safeParse(value);
  35 | 		return result.success ? undefined : result.error.issues[0]?.message;
  36 | 	};
  37 | }
  38 | 
  39 | function FieldMessage({ error }: { error?: string }) {
  40 | 	if (!error) return null;
  41 | 	return <p className='text-destructive text-sm'>{error}</p>;
  42 | }
  43 | 
  44 | function FormField({
  45 | 	field,
  46 | 	label,
  47 | 	children
  48 | }: {
  49 | 	field: FieldApi<any, any, any, any>;
  50 | 	label: string;
  51 | 	children: React.ReactNode;
  52 | }) {
  53 | 	const error = field.state.meta.isTouched ? (field.state.meta.errors[0] as string | undefined) : undefined;
  54 | 
  55 | 	return (
  56 | 		<div className='space-y-2'>
  57 | 			<Label htmlFor={field.name}>{label}</Label>
  58 | 			{children}
  59 | 			<FieldMessage error={error} />
  60 | 		</div>
  61 | 	);
  62 | }
  63 | 
  64 | function RouteComponent() {
  65 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  66 | 	const router = useRouter();
  67 | 	const [submitError, setSubmitError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  68 | 	const [imagePreview, setImagePreview] = useState<string | null>(null);
  69 | 	const [compressedFile, setCompressedFile] = useState<File | null>(null);
  70 | 
  71 | 	const form = useForm({
  72 | 		defaultValues: {
  73 | 			name: "",
  74 | 			description: "",
  75 | 			price: "",
  76 | 			badge: undefined as BadgeValue | undefined,
  77 | 			image: "",
  78 | 			inventory: "in-stock" as InventoryValue
  79 | 		},
  80 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
  81 | 			try {
  82 | 				setSubmitError(null);
  83 | 
  84 | 				if (!compressedFile) {
  85 | 					setSubmitError("Please select an image");
  86 | 					return; // Exit early if no image is selected
  87 | 				}
  88 | 
  89 | 				// Convert to base64 and upload only now
  90 | 				const base64 = await new Promise<string>((resolve, reject) => {
  91 | 					const reader = new FileReader();
  92 | 					reader.onload = () => resolve(reader.result as string);
  93 | 					reader.onerror = reject;
  94 | 					reader.readAsDataURL(compressedFile);
  95 | 				});
  96 | 
  97 | 				const { url } = await uploadProductImage({
  98 | 					data: {
  99 | 						fileBase64: base64,
 100 | 						fileName: compressedFile.name
 101 | 					}
 102 | 				});
 103 | 
 104 | 				await createProduct({
 105 | 					data: {
 106 | 						name: value.name,
 107 | 						description: value.description,
 108 | 						price: value.price,
 109 | 						badge: value.badge,
 110 | 						image: url,
 111 | 						inventory: value.inventory
 112 | 					}
 113 | 				});
 114 | 
 115 | 				await router.invalidate({ sync: true });
 116 | 				navigate({ to: "/products" });
 117 | 			} catch {
 118 | 				setSubmitError("Something went wrong. Please try again.");
 119 | 			}
 120 | 		}
 121 | 	});
 122 | 
 123 | 	async function handleImageSelect(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) {
 124 | 		const file = e.target.files?.[0];
 125 | 		if (!file) return;
 126 | 
 127 | 		try {
 128 | 			const compressed = await imageCompression(file, {
 129 | 				maxSizeMB: 0.5,
 130 | 				maxWidthOrHeight: 1200,
 131 | 				useWebWorker: true
 132 | 			});
 133 | 
 134 | 			setCompressedFile(compressed);
 135 | 			setImagePreview(URL.createObjectURL(compressed));
 136 | 		} catch {
 137 | 			setSubmitError("Error compressing image");
 138 | 		}
 139 | 	}
 140 | 
 141 | 	return (
 142 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 py-8'>
 143 | 			<div className='space-y-6'>
 144 | 				<Card>
 145 | 					<CardHeader className='gap-2'>
 146 | 						<CardTitle className='text-lg'>Create Product</CardTitle>
 147 | 						<CardDescription className='line-clamp-2'>
 148 | 							Fill in the details to add a new product to the catalog.
 149 | 						</CardDescription>
 150 | 					</CardHeader>
 151 | 				</Card>
 152 | 				<Card>
 153 | 					<CardContent>
 154 | 						<form
 155 | 							className='space-y-6'
 156 | 							onSubmit={e => {
 157 | 								e.preventDefault();
 158 | 								e.stopPropagation();
 159 | 								form.handleSubmit();
 160 | 							}}
 161 | 						>
 162 | 							<form.Field
 163 | 								name='name'
 164 | 								validators={{
 165 | 									onChange: fieldValidator(productSchema.shape.name)
 166 | 								}}
 167 | 							>
 168 | 								{field => (
 169 | 									<FormField
 170 | 										field={field}
 171 | 										label='Product Name *'
 172 | 									>
 173 | 										<Input
 174 | 											aria-invalid={field.state.meta.isTouched && !field.state.meta.isValid}
 175 | 											id={field.name}
 176 | 											name={field.name}
 177 | 											onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 178 | 											placeholder='Enter product name'
 179 | 											type='text'
 180 | 											value={field.state.value}
 181 | 										/>
 182 | 									</FormField>
 183 | 								)}
 184 | 							</form.Field>
 185 | 
 186 | 							<form.Field
 187 | 								name='description'
 188 | 								validators={{
 189 | 									onChange: fieldValidator(productSchema.shape.description)
 190 | 								}}
 191 | 							>
 192 | 								{field => (
 193 | 									<FormField
 194 | 										field={field}
 195 | 										label='Description *'
 196 | 									>
 197 | 										<Textarea
 198 | 											aria-invalid={field.state.meta.isTouched && !field.state.meta.isValid}
 199 | 											id={field.name}
 200 | 											name={field.name}
 201 | 											onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 202 | 											placeholder='Enter product description'
 203 | 											value={field.state.value}
 204 | 										/>
 205 | 									</FormField>
 206 | 								)}
 207 | 							</form.Field>
 208 | 
 209 | 							<form.Field
 210 | 								name='price'
 211 | 								validators={{
 212 | 									onChange: fieldValidator(productSchema.shape.price)
 213 | 								}}
 214 | 							>
 215 | 								{field => (
 216 | 									<FormField
 217 | 										field={field}
 218 | 										label='Price *'
 219 | 									>
 220 | 										<Input
 221 | 											aria-invalid={field.state.meta.isTouched && !field.state.meta.isValid}
 222 | 											id={field.name}
 223 | 											name={field.name}
 224 | 											onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 225 | 											placeholder='0.00'
 226 | 											step='0.01'
 227 | 											type='number'
 228 | 											value={field.state.value}
 229 | 										/>
 230 | 									</FormField>
 231 | 								)}
 232 | 							</form.Field>
 233 | 
 234 | 							<form.Field name='image'>
 235 | 								{field => (
 236 | 									<FormField
 237 | 										field={field}
 238 | 										label='Product Image *'
 239 | 									>
 240 | 										<div className='space-y-3'>
 241 | 											<label className='flex cursor-pointer flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-lg border-2 border-dashed p-6 transition-colors hover:border-primary/50 hover:bg-muted/50'>
 242 | 												{imagePreview ? (
 243 | 													<img
 244 | 														alt='Preview'
 245 | 														className='h-36 w-36 rounded-lg object-cover'
 246 | 														src={imagePreview}
 247 | 													/>
 248 | 												) : (
 249 | 													<>
 250 | 														<div className='flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-muted'>
 251 | 															<svg
 252 | 																className='text-muted-foreground'
 253 | 																fill='none'
 254 | 																height='20'
 255 | 																stroke='currentColor'
 256 | 																strokeLinecap='round'
 257 | 																strokeLinejoin='round'
 258 | 																strokeWidth='1.5'
 259 | 																viewBox='0 0 24 24'
 260 | 																width='20'
 261 | 																xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'
 262 | 															>
 263 | 																<title>Upload icon</title>
 264 | 																<path d='M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4' />
 265 | 																<polyline points='17 8 12 3 7 8' />
 266 | 																<line
 267 | 																	x1='12'
 268 | 																	x2='12'
 269 | 																	y1='3'
 270 | 																	y2='15'
 271 | 																/>
 272 | 															</svg>
 273 | 														</div>
 274 | 														<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 275 | 															Click to select an image
 276 | 														</p>
 277 | 													</>
 278 | 												)}
 279 | 												<input
 280 | 													accept='image/*'
 281 | 													className='hidden'
 282 | 													onChange={handleImageSelect}
 283 | 													type='file'
 284 | 												/>
 285 | 											</label>
 286 | 
 287 | 											{imagePreview && (
 288 | 												<Button
 289 | 													onClick={() => {
 290 | 														setImagePreview(null);
 291 | 														setCompressedFile(null);
 292 | 													}}
 293 | 													size='sm'
 294 | 													type='button'
 295 | 													variant='outline'
 296 | 												>
 297 | 													Remove image
 298 | 												</Button>
 299 | 											)}
 300 | 										</div>
 301 | 									</FormField>
 302 | 								)}
 303 | 							</form.Field>
 304 | 
 305 | 							<form.Field
 306 | 								name='badge'
 307 | 								validators={{
 308 | 									onChange: fieldValidator(productSchema.shape.badge)
 309 | 								}}
 310 | 							>
 311 | 								{field => (
 312 | 									<FormField
 313 | 										field={field}
 314 | 										label='Badge (optional)'
 315 | 									>
 316 | 										<Select
 317 | 											name={field.name}
 318 | 											onValueChange={value =>
 319 | 												field.handleChange(value === "none" ? undefined : (value as BadgeValue))
 320 | 											}
 321 | 											value={field.state.value ?? "none"}
 322 | 										>
 323 | 											<SelectTrigger className='w-full'>
 324 | 												<SelectValue placeholder='Select badge' />
 325 | 											</SelectTrigger>
 326 | 											<SelectContent>
 327 | 												<SelectItem value='none'>None</SelectItem>
 328 | 												<SelectItem value='New'>New</SelectItem>
 329 | 												<SelectItem value='Sale'>Sale</SelectItem>
 330 | 												<SelectItem value='Featured'>Featured</SelectItem>
 331 | 												<SelectItem value='Limited'>Limited</SelectItem>
 332 | 											</SelectContent>
 333 | 										</Select>
 334 | 									</FormField>
 335 | 								)}
 336 | 							</form.Field>
 337 | 
 338 | 							<form.Field
 339 | 								name='inventory'
 340 | 								validators={{
 341 | 									onChange: fieldValidator(productSchema.shape.inventory)
 342 | 								}}
 343 | 							>
 344 | 								{field => (
 345 | 									<FormField
 346 | 										field={field}
 347 | 										label='Inventory Status *'
 348 | 									>
 349 | 										<Select
 350 | 											onValueChange={value => field.handleChange(value as InventoryValue)}
 351 | 											value={field.state.value}
 352 | 										>
 353 | 											<SelectTrigger
 354 | 												className='w-full'
 355 | 												id={field.name}
 356 | 											>
 357 | 												<SelectValue />
 358 | 											</SelectTrigger>
 359 | 											<SelectContent>
 360 | 												<SelectItem value='in-stock'>In Stock</SelectItem>
 361 | 												<SelectItem value='backorder'>Backorder</SelectItem>
 362 | 												<SelectItem value='preorder'>Preorder</SelectItem>
 363 | 											</SelectContent>
 364 | 										</Select>
 365 | 									</FormField>
 366 | 								)}
 367 | 							</form.Field>
 368 | 
 369 | 							<FieldMessage error={submitError ?? undefined} />
 370 | 
 371 | 							<form.Subscribe selector={state => [state.canSubmit, state.isSubmitting]}>
 372 | 								{([canSubmit, isSubmitting]) => (
 373 | 									<div className='flex gap-4'>
 374 | 										<Button
 375 | 											className='flex-1'
 376 | 											disabled={!canSubmit || isSubmitting}
 377 | 											type='submit'
 378 | 										>
 379 | 											{isSubmitting ? "Creating..." : "Create Product"}
 380 | 										</Button>
 381 | 										<Button
 382 | 											onClick={() => navigate({ to: "/products" })}
 383 | 											type='button'
 384 | 											variant='outline'
 385 | 										>
 386 | 											Cancel
 387 | 										</Button>
 388 | 									</div>
 389 | 								)}
 390 | 							</form.Subscribe>
 391 | 						</form>
 392 | 					</CardContent>
 393 | 				</Card>
 394 | 			</div>
 395 | 		</div>
 396 | 	);
 397 | }
```

`routes/products/index.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | import { createFileRoute } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import { createMiddleware } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   4 | import { getAllProducts } from "#/data/products";
   5 | import { DataToolbar } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   6 | import { ProductCard } from "@/components/ProductCard";
   7 | import { Card, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
   8 | import { useProductFilters } from "@/hooks/useProductFilters";
   9 | 
  10 | const loggerMiddleware = createMiddleware().server(async ({ next, request }) => {
  11 | 	console.log("-----loggerMiddleware----", request.url, "from", request.headers.get("origin"));
  12 | 	return next();
  13 | });
  14 | 
  15 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/products/")({
  16 | 	loader: async () => getAllProducts(),
  17 | 	component: RouteComponent,
  18 | 	server: {
  19 | 		middleware: [loggerMiddleware],
  20 | 		handlers: {
  21 | 			POST: async ({ request }) => {
  22 | 				let body = null;
  23 | 				try {
  24 | 					body = await request.json();
  25 | 				} catch {
  26 | 					body = {};
  27 | 				}
  28 | 				return Response.json({
  29 | 					message: "Hello, world from POST request",
  30 | 					body
  31 | 				});
  32 | 			}
  33 | 		}
  34 | 	}
  35 | });
  36 | 
  37 | function RouteComponent() {
  38 | 	const products = Route.useLoaderData();
  39 | 	const { data } = useQuery({
  40 | 		queryKey: ["products"],
  41 | 		queryFn: () => getAllProducts(),
  42 | 		initialData: products
  43 | 	});
  44 | 
  45 | 	const { filtered, toolbar } = useProductFilters(data);
  46 | 
  47 | 	return (
  48 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
  49 | 			<section className='mx-auto max-w-6xl space-y-4'>
  50 | 				<Card className='bg-white/80 p-6 shadow-md'>
  51 | 					<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  52 | 						<div className='space-y-1'>
  53 | 							<CardHeader className='px-0'>
  54 | 								<p className='text-slate-500 text-sm uppercase tracking-wide'>StartShop Catalog</p>
  55 | 								<CardTitle className='font-semibold text-2xl'>Products built for makers</CardTitle>
  56 | 							</CardHeader>
  57 | 							<CardDescription className='text-slate-600 text-sm'>
  58 | 								Browse a minimal, production-flavoured catalog with TanStack Start server functions and
  59 | 								typed routes.
  60 | 							</CardDescription>
  61 | 							<DataToolbar {...toolbar} />
  62 | 						</div>
  63 | 					</div>
  64 | 				</Card>
  65 | 			</section>
  66 | 			<section className='mx-auto max-w-6xl'>
  67 | 				{filtered.length > 0 ? (
  68 | 					<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3'>
  69 | 						{filtered.map(product => (
  70 | 							<ProductCard
  71 | 								key={product.id}
  72 | 								product={product}
  73 | 							/>
  74 | 						))}
  75 | 					</div>
  76 | 				) : (
  77 | 					<p className='py-16 text-center text-slate-500 text-sm'>No products match your filters.</p>
  78 | 				)}
  79 | 			</section>
  80 | 		</div>
  81 | 	);
  82 | }

```

`routes/products/manage-products.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { createFileRoute, redirect, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   2 | import { type ColumnDef, flexRender, getCoreRowModel, useReactTable } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   3 | import imageCompression from "browser-image-compression";
   4 | import { Pencil, Trash2 } from "lucide-react";
   5 | import { useState } from "react";
   6 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   7 | import { DataToolbar } from "@/components/DataToolbar";
   8 | import {
   9 | 	AlertDialog,

  29 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  30 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
  31 | import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
  32 | import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
  33 | import { deleteProduct, getAllProducts, updateProduct, uploadProductImage } from "@/data/products";
  34 | import type { BadgeValue, InventoryValue, ProductSelect } from "@/db/schema";
  35 | import { useProductFilters } from "@/hooks/useProductFilters";
  36 | 
  37 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/products/manage-products")({
  38 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  39 | 		const session = context.session;
  40 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  41 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw redirect({ to: "/" });
  42 | 		return { user: session.user };
  43 | 	},
  44 | 	loader: async () => getAllProducts(),
  45 | 	component: ManageProductsPage
  46 | });
  47 | 
  48 | function ManageProductsPage() {
  49 | 	const products = Route.useLoaderData();
  50 | 	const { filtered, toolbar } = useProductFilters(products);
  51 | 	const router = useRouter();
  52 | 
  53 | 	// Edit dialog state
  54 | 	const [editingProduct, setEditingProduct] = useState<ProductSelect | null>(null);
  55 | 	const [editForm, setEditForm] = useState({
  56 | 		name: "",
  57 | 		description: "",
  58 | 		price: "",
  59 | 		badge: "none",
  60 | 		inventory: "in-stock"
  61 | 	});
  62 | 
  63 | 	// Image state
  64 | 	const [imagePreview, setImagePreview] = useState<string | null>(null);
  65 | 	const [compressedFile, setCompressedFile] = useState<File | null>(null);
  66 | 
  67 | 	// Delete dialog state
  68 | 	const [deletingProduct, setDeletingProduct] = useState<ProductSelect | null>(null);
  69 | 
  70 | 	// Loading states
  71 | 	const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
  72 | 	const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false);
  73 | 
  74 | 	function openEditDialog(product: ProductSelect) {
  75 | 		setEditingProduct(product);
  76 | 		setEditForm({
  77 | 			name: product.name,
  78 | 			description: product.description,
  79 | 			price: product.price,
  80 | 			badge: product.badge ?? "none",
  81 | 			inventory: product.inventory
  82 | 		});
  83 | 		setImagePreview(null);
  84 | 		setCompressedFile(null);
  85 | 	}
  86 | 
  87 | 	async function handleImageSelect(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) {
  88 | 		const file = e.target.files?.[0];
  89 | 		if (!file) return;
  90 | 
  91 | 		try {
  92 | 			const compressed = await imageCompression(file, {
  93 | 				maxSizeMB: 0.5,
  94 | 				maxWidthOrHeight: 1200,
  95 | 				useWebWorker: true
  96 | 			});
  97 | 			setCompressedFile(compressed);
  98 | 			setImagePreview(URL.createObjectURL(compressed));
  99 | 		} catch {
 100 | 			console.error("Error compressing image");
 101 | 		}
 102 | 	}
 103 | 
 104 | 	async function handleSave() {
 105 | 		if (!editingProduct) return;
 106 | 		setIsSaving(true);
 107 | 
 108 | 		try {
 109 | 			let imageUrl: string | undefined;
 110 | 
 111 | 			if (compressedFile) {
 112 | 				const base64 = await new Promise<string>((resolve, reject) => {
 113 | 					const reader = new FileReader();
 114 | 					reader.onload = () => resolve(reader.result as string);
 115 | 					reader.onerror = reject;
 116 | 					reader.readAsDataURL(compressedFile);
 117 | 				});
 118 | 
 119 | 				const { url } = await uploadProductImage({
 120 | 					data: {
 121 | 						fileBase64: base64,
 122 | 						fileName: compressedFile.name
 123 | 					}
 124 | 				});
 125 | 				imageUrl = url;
 126 | 			}
 127 | 
 128 | 			await updateProduct({
 129 | 				data: {
 130 | 					id: editingProduct.id,
 131 | 					name: editForm.name,
 132 | 					description: editForm.description,
 133 | 					price: editForm.price,
 134 | 					badge: editForm.badge === "none" ? undefined : (editForm.badge as BadgeValue),
 135 | 					inventory: editForm.inventory as InventoryValue,
 136 | 					...(imageUrl ? { image: imageUrl } : {})
 137 | 				}
 138 | 			});
 139 | 
 140 | 			await router.invalidate();
 141 | 			setEditingProduct(null);
 142 | 			toast.success("Product updated successfully.");
 143 | 		} catch {
 144 | 			toast.error("Failed to update product. Please try again.");
 145 | 		} finally {
 146 | 			setIsSaving(false);
 147 | 		}
 148 | 
 149 | 		setIsSaving(false);
 150 | 		setEditingProduct(null);
 151 | 	}
 152 | 
 153 | 	async function handleDelete() {
 154 | 		if (!deletingProduct) return;
 155 | 		setIsDeleting(true);
 156 | 
 157 | 		try {
 158 | 			await deleteProduct({ data: { id: deletingProduct.id } });
 159 | 			await router.invalidate();
 160 | 			setDeletingProduct(null);
 161 | 			toast.success("Product deleted successfully.");
 162 | 		} catch {
 163 | 			toast.error("Failed to delete product. Please try again.");
 164 | 		} finally {
 165 | 			setIsDeleting(false);
 166 | 		}
 167 | 
 168 | 		setIsDeleting(false);
 169 | 		setDeletingProduct(null);
 170 | 	}
 171 | 
 172 | 	const columns: ColumnDef<ProductSelect>[] = [
 173 | 		{
 174 | 			accessorKey: "image",
 175 | 			header: "Image",
 176 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
 177 | 				<img
 178 | 					alt={row.original.name}
 179 | 					className='h-10 w-10 rounded-md object-cover'
 180 | 					src={row.original.image}
 181 | 				/>
 182 | 			)
 183 | 		},
 184 | 		{
 185 | 			accessorKey: "name",
 186 | 			header: "Name"
 187 | 		},
 188 | 		{
 189 | 			accessorKey: "price",
 190 | 			header: "Price",
 191 | 			cell: ({ row }) => <span>${row.original.price}</span>
 192 | 		},
 193 | 		{
 194 | 			accessorKey: "badge",
 195 | 			header: "Badge",
 196 | 			cell: ({ row }) => <span className='text-slate-500 text-sm'>{row.original.badge ?? "—"}</span>
 197 | 		},
 198 | 		{
 199 | 			accessorKey: "inventory",
 200 | 			header: "Inventory",
 201 | 			cell: ({ row }) => {
 202 | 				const status = row.original.inventory;
 203 | 				const styles: Record<string, string> = {
 204 | 					"in-stock": "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-950 dark:text-emerald-300",
 205 | 					backorder: "bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-950 dark:text-amber-300",
 206 | 					preorder: "bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 dark:bg-indigo-950 dark:text-indigo-300"
 207 | 				};
 208 | 				return (
 209 | 					<span
 210 | 						className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-medium text-xs ${styles[status] ?? ""}`}
 211 | 					>
 212 | 						{status}
 213 | 					</span>
 214 | 				);
 215 | 			}
 216 | 		},
 217 | 		{
 218 | 			id: "actions",
 219 | 			header: "Actions",
 220 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
 221 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 222 | 					<Button
 223 | 						onClick={() => openEditDialog(row.original)}
 224 | 						size='sm'
 225 | 						variant='outline'
 226 | 					>
 227 | 						<Pencil size={14} />
 228 | 					</Button>
 229 | 					<Button
 230 | 						className='text-red-500 hover:border-red-300 hover:text-red-700'
 231 | 						onClick={() => setDeletingProduct(row.original)}
 232 | 						size='sm'
 233 | 						variant='outline'
 234 | 					>
 235 | 						<Trash2 size={14} />
 236 | 					</Button>
 237 | 				</div>
 238 | 			)
 239 | 		}
 240 | 	];
 241 | 
 242 | 	const table = useReactTable({
 243 | 		data: filtered,
 244 | 		columns,
 245 | 		getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel()
 246 | 	});
 247 | 	return (
 248 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 py-8'>
 249 | 			<div className='space-y-6'>
 250 | 				<Card>
 251 | 					<CardHeader>
 252 | 						<CardTitle className='text-lg'>Manage Products</CardTitle>
 253 | 						<CardDescription>Edit or remove products from the catalog.</CardDescription>
 254 | 						<DataToolbar {...toolbar} />
 255 | 					</CardHeader>
 256 | 				</Card>
 257 | 
 258 | 				<Card>
 259 | 					<CardContent className='p-0'>
 260 | 						<Table>
 261 | 							<TableHeader>
 262 | 								{table.getHeaderGroups().map(headerGroup => (
 263 | 									<TableRow key={headerGroup.id}>
 264 | 										{headerGroup.headers.map(header => (
 265 | 											<TableHead key={header.id}>
 266 | 												{header.isPlaceholder
 267 | 													? null
 268 | 													: flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
 269 | 											</TableHead>
 270 | 										))}
 271 | 									</TableRow>
 272 | 								))}
 273 | 							</TableHeader>
 274 | 							<TableBody>
 275 | 								{table.getRowModel().rows.length ? (
 276 | 									table.getRowModel().rows.map(row => (
 277 | 										<TableRow key={row.id}>
 278 | 											{row.getVisibleCells().map(cell => (
 279 | 												<TableCell key={cell.id}>
 280 | 													{flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
 281 | 												</TableCell>
 282 | 											))}
 283 | 										</TableRow>
 284 | 									))
 285 | 								) : (
 286 | 									<TableRow>
 287 | 										<TableCell
 288 | 											className='h-24 text-center text-slate-500'
 289 | 											colSpan={columns.length}
 290 | 										>
 291 | 											No products found.
 292 | 										</TableCell>
 293 | 									</TableRow>
 294 | 								)}
 295 | 							</TableBody>
 296 | 						</Table>
 297 | 					</CardContent>
 298 | 				</Card>
 299 | 			</div>
 300 | 
 301 | 			{/* Edit Dialog */}
 302 | 			<Dialog
 303 | 				onOpenChange={open => {
 304 | 					if (!open) setEditingProduct(null);
 305 | 				}}
 306 | 				open={editingProduct !== null}
 307 | 			>
 308 | 				<DialogContent className='sm:max-w-lg'>
 309 | 					<DialogHeader>
 310 | 						<DialogTitle>Edit Product</DialogTitle>
 311 | 						<DialogDescription>Update the product details below.</DialogDescription>
 312 | 					</DialogHeader>
 313 | 
 314 | 					<div className='space-y-4 py-4'>
 315 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 316 | 							<Label htmlFor='edit-name'>Name</Label>
 317 | 							<Input
 318 | 								id='edit-name'
 319 | 								onChange={e => setEditForm(prev => ({ ...prev, name: e.target.value }))}
 320 | 								value={editForm.name}
 321 | 							/>
 322 | 						</div>
 323 | 
 324 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 325 | 							<Label htmlFor='edit-description'>Description</Label>
 326 | 							<Textarea
 327 | 								id='edit-description'
 328 | 								onChange={e =>
 329 | 									setEditForm(prev => ({
 330 | 										...prev,
 331 | 										description: e.target.value
 332 | 									}))
 333 | 								}
 334 | 								value={editForm.description}
 335 | 							/>
 336 | 						</div>
 337 | 
 338 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 339 | 							<Label htmlFor='edit-price'>Price</Label>
 340 | 							<Input
 341 | 								id='edit-price'
 342 | 								onChange={e => setEditForm(prev => ({ ...prev, price: e.target.value }))}
 343 | 								step='0.01'
 344 | 								type='number'
 345 | 								value={editForm.price}
 346 | 							/>
 347 | 						</div>
 348 | 
 349 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 350 | 							<Label>Badge</Label>
 351 | 							<Select
 352 | 								onValueChange={value => setEditForm(prev => ({ ...prev, badge: value ?? "none" }))}
 353 | 								value={editForm.badge}
 354 | 							>
 355 | 								<SelectTrigger className='w-full'>
 356 | 									<SelectValue />
 357 | 								</SelectTrigger>
 358 | 								<SelectContent>
 359 | 									<SelectItem value='none'>None</SelectItem>
 360 | 									<SelectItem value='New'>New</SelectItem>
 361 | 									<SelectItem value='Sale'>Sale</SelectItem>
 362 | 									<SelectItem value='Featured'>Featured</SelectItem>
 363 | 									<SelectItem value='Limited'>Limited</SelectItem>
 364 | 								</SelectContent>
 365 | 							</Select>
 366 | 						</div>
 367 | 
 368 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 369 | 							<Label>Inventory Status</Label>
 370 | 							<Select
 371 | 								onValueChange={value =>
 372 | 									setEditForm(prev => ({
 373 | 										...prev,
 374 | 										inventory: value as InventoryValue
 375 | 									}))
 376 | 								}
 377 | 								value={editForm.inventory}
 378 | 							>
 379 | 								<SelectTrigger className='w-full'>
 380 | 									<SelectValue />
 381 | 								</SelectTrigger>
 382 | 								<SelectContent>
 383 | 									<SelectItem value='in-stock'>In Stock</SelectItem>
 384 | 									<SelectItem value='backorder'>Backorder</SelectItem>
 385 | 									<SelectItem value='preorder'>Preorder</SelectItem>
 386 | 								</SelectContent>
 387 | 							</Select>
 388 | 						</div>
 389 | 
 390 | 						{/* Image field */}
 391 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 392 | 							<Label>Product Image</Label>
 393 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-4'>
 394 | 								<img
 395 | 									alt='Product'
 396 | 									className='h-20 w-20 rounded-lg border object-cover'
 397 | 									src={imagePreview ?? editingProduct?.image ?? ""}
 398 | 								/>
 399 | 								<div className='flex flex-col gap-2'>
 400 | 									{!imagePreview && (
 401 | 										<label className='inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-2 rounded-md border px-3 py-2 text-sm transition hover:bg-muted'>
 402 | 											Change image
 403 | 											<input
 404 | 												accept='image/*'
 405 | 												className='hidden'
 406 | 												onChange={handleImageSelect}
 407 | 												type='file'
 408 | 											/>
 409 | 										</label>
 410 | 									)}
 411 | 									{imagePreview && (
 412 | 										<Button
 413 | 											onClick={() => {
 414 | 												setImagePreview(null);
 415 | 												setCompressedFile(null);
 416 | 											}}
 417 | 											size='sm'
 418 | 											type='button'
 419 | 											variant='outline'
 420 | 										>
 421 | 											Undo change
 422 | 										</Button>
 423 | 									)}
 424 | 								</div>
 425 | 							</div>
 426 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 427 | 								{imagePreview
 428 | 									? "New image selected — will upload on save."
 429 | 									: "Leave unchanged to keep the current image."}
 430 | 							</p>
 431 | 						</div>
 432 | 					</div>
 433 | 
 434 | 					<DialogFooter>
 435 | 						<Button
 436 | 							disabled={isSaving}
 437 | 							onClick={() => setEditingProduct(null)}
 438 | 							variant='outline'
 439 | 						>
 440 | 							Cancel
 441 | 						</Button>
 442 | 						<Button
 443 | 							disabled={isSaving}
 444 | 							onClick={handleSave}
 445 | 						>
 446 | 							{isSaving ? "Saving..." : "Save Changes"}
 447 | 						</Button>
 448 | 					</DialogFooter>
 449 | 				</DialogContent>
 450 | 			</Dialog>
 451 | 
 452 | 			{/* Delete AlertDialog */}
 453 | 			<AlertDialog
 454 | 				onOpenChange={open => {
 455 | 					if (!open) setDeletingProduct(null);
 456 | 				}}
 457 | 				open={deletingProduct !== null}
 458 | 			>
 459 | 				<AlertDialogContent>
 460 | 					<AlertDialogHeader>
 461 | 						<AlertDialogTitle>Delete Product</AlertDialogTitle>
 462 | 						<AlertDialogDescription>
 463 | 							Are you sure you want to delete{" "}
 464 | 							<span className='font-semibold'>{deletingProduct?.name}</span>? This action cannot be
 465 | 							undone.
 466 | 						</AlertDialogDescription>
 467 | 					</AlertDialogHeader>
 468 | 					<AlertDialogFooter>
 469 | 						<AlertDialogCancel disabled={isDeleting}>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
 470 | 						<AlertDialogAction
 471 | 							className='bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700'
 472 | 							disabled={isDeleting}
 473 | 							onClick={handleDelete}
 474 | 						>
 475 | 							{isDeleting ? "Deleting..." : "Delete"}
 476 | 						</AlertDialogAction>
 477 | 					</AlertDialogFooter>
 478 | 				</AlertDialogContent>
 479 | 			</AlertDialog>
 480 | 		</div>
 481 | 	);
 482 | }

```

`routes/profile.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/profile.tsx
   2 | import { createFileRoute, redirect, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import imageCompression from "browser-image-compression";
   4 | import { Building2, Calendar, Mail, MapPin, Pencil, Phone, Save, Shield, User, X } from "lucide-react";
   5 | import { useState } from "react";
   6 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   7 | import { z } from "zod";
   8 | 
   9 | import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar";
  10 | import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
  11 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
  12 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
  13 | import {
  14 | 	Dialog,
  15 | 	DialogContent,
  16 | 	DialogDescription,
  17 | 	DialogFooter,
  18 | 	DialogHeader,
  19 | 	DialogTitle
  20 | } from "@/components/ui/dialog";
  21 | import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
  22 | import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  23 | import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
  24 | import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
  25 | import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
  26 | import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
  27 | import { updateProfile, uploadProfileImage } from "@/data/user";
  28 | import { useCurrentClinic } from "@/hooks";
  29 | import type { Session } from "@/lib/auth-client";
  30 | 
  31 | // Validation schemas
  32 | const profileSchema = z.object({
  33 | 	name: z.string().min(2, "Name must be at least 2 characters"),
  34 | 	phone: z.string().optional(),
  35 | 	address: z.string().optional()
  36 | });
  37 | 
  38 | const passwordSchema = z
  39 | 	.object({
  40 | 		currentPassword: z.string().min(1, "Current password is required"),
  41 | 		newPassword: z.string().min(8, "Password must be at least 8 characters"),
  42 | 		confirmPassword: z.string().min(1, "Please confirm your password")
  43 | 	})
  44 | 	.refine(data => data.newPassword === data.confirmPassword, {
  45 | 		message: "Passwords don't match",
  46 | 		path: ["confirmPassword"]
  47 | 	});
  48 | 
  49 | type ProfileFormValues = z.infer<typeof profileSchema>;
  50 | 
  51 | // Extended user type with additional fields
  52 | interface ExtendedUser {
  53 | 	id: string;
  54 | 	name: string;
  55 | 	email: string;
  56 | 	emailVerified: boolean;
  57 | 	image?: string | null;
  58 | 	role: "admin" | "doctor" | "staff" | "patient";
  59 | 	phone?: string | null;
  60 | 	address?: string | null;
  61 | 	createdAt: string | Date;
  62 | 	clinicId?: string | null;
  63 | }
  64 | 
  65 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/profile")({
  66 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  67 | 		const session = context.session as Session | null;
  68 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  69 | 		return { user: session.user as ExtendedUser };
  70 | 	},
  71 | 	component: ProfilePage
  72 | });
  73 | 
  74 | function ProfilePage() {
  75 | 	const { user } = Route.useRouteContext();
  76 | 	const router = useRouter();
  77 | 	const { data: clinic, isLoading: clinicLoading } = useCurrentClinic();
  78 | 
  79 | 	// Edit dialog state
  80 | 	const [isEditOpen, setIsEditOpen] = useState(false);
  81 | 	const [isPasswordOpen, setIsPasswordOpen] = useState(false);
  82 | 	const [editForm, setEditForm] = useState<ProfileFormValues>({
  83 | 		name: user.name,
  84 | 		phone: user.phone || "",
  85 | 		address: user.address || ""
  86 | 	});
  87 | 
  88 | 	// Image state
  89 | 	const [imagePreview, setImagePreview] = useState<string | null>(null);
  90 | 	const [compressedFile, setCompressedFile] = useState<File | null>(null);
  91 | 
  92 | 	// Password form state
  93 | 	const [passwordForm, setPasswordForm] = useState({
  94 | 		currentPassword: "",
  95 | 		newPassword: "",
  96 | 		confirmPassword: ""
  97 | 	});
  98 | 	const [passwordErrors, setPasswordErrors] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  99 | 
 100 | 	// Loading states
 101 | 	const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
 102 | 	const [isChangingPassword, setIsChangingPassword] = useState(false);
 103 | 
 104 | 	// Notification preferences
 105 | 	const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState({
 106 | 		emailNotifications: true,
 107 | 		smsNotifications: false,
 108 | 		appointmentReminders: true,
 109 | 		marketingEmails: false
 110 | 	});
 111 | 
 112 | 	function openEditDialog() {
 113 | 		setEditForm({
 114 | 			name: user.name,
 115 | 			phone: user.phone || "",
 116 | 			address: user.address || ""
 117 | 		});
 118 | 		setImagePreview(null);
 119 | 		setCompressedFile(null);
 120 | 		setIsEditOpen(true);
 121 | 	}
 122 | 
 123 | 	async function handleImageSelect(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) {
 124 | 		const file = e.target.files?.[0];
 125 | 		if (!file) return;
 126 | 
 127 | 		// Validate file type
 128 | 		if (!file.type.startsWith("image/")) {
 129 | 			toast.error("Please select an image file");
 130 | 			return;
 131 | 		}
 132 | 
 133 | 		// Validate file size (max 5MB)
 134 | 		if (file.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
 135 | 			toast.error("Image must be less than 5MB");
 136 | 			return;
 137 | 		}
 138 | 
 139 | 		try {
 140 | 			const compressed = await imageCompression(file, {
 141 | 				maxSizeMB: 0.5,
 142 | 				maxWidthOrHeight: 800,
 143 | 				useWebWorker: true
 144 | 			});
 145 | 			setCompressedFile(compressed);
 146 | 			setImagePreview(URL.createObjectURL(compressed));
 147 | 		} catch (error) {
 148 | 			console.error("Error compressing image", error);
 149 | 			toast.error("Failed to process image");
 150 | 		}
 151 | 	}
 152 | 
 153 | 	async function handleSave() {
 154 | 		setIsSaving(true);
 155 | 
 156 | 		try {
 157 | 			let imageUrl: string | undefined;
 158 | 
 159 | 			if (compressedFile) {
 160 | 				const formData = new FormData();
 161 | 				formData.append("file", compressedFile);
 162 | 				const uploadedUser = await uploadProfileImage({
 163 | 					data: formData
 164 | 				});
 165 | 				imageUrl = uploadedUser.image || undefined;
 166 | 			}
 167 | 
 168 | 			await updateProfile({
 169 | 				data: {
 170 | 					name: editForm.name,
 171 | 					phone: editForm.phone || undefined,
 172 | 					address: editForm.address || undefined,
 173 | 					...(imageUrl ? { image: imageUrl } : {})
 174 | 				}
 175 | 			});
 176 | 
 177 | 			await router.invalidate();
 178 | 			setIsEditOpen(false);
 179 | 			toast.success("Profile updated successfully");
 180 | 		} catch (error) {
 181 | 			console.error("Failed to update profile", error);
 182 | 			toast.error("Failed to update profile. Please try again.");
 183 | 		} finally {
 184 | 			setIsSaving(false);
 185 | 		}
 186 | 	}
 187 | 
 188 | 	async function handlePasswordChange() {
 189 | 		// Validate form
 190 | 		const result = passwordSchema.safeParse(passwordForm);
 191 | 		if (!result.success) {
 192 | 			const errors: Record<string, string> = {};
 193 | 			result.error.issues.forEach(issue => {
 194 | 				if (issue.path[0]) {
 195 | 					errors[issue.path[0] as string] = issue.message;
 196 | 				}
 197 | 			});
 198 | 			setPasswordErrors(errors);
 199 | 			return;
 200 | 		}
 201 | 
 202 | 		setIsChangingPassword(true);
 203 | 		try {
 204 | 			// Call your password change API here
 205 | 			await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
 206 | 
 207 | 			setIsPasswordOpen(false);
 208 | 			setPasswordForm({ currentPassword: "", newPassword: "", confirmPassword: "" });
 209 | 			setPasswordErrors({});
 210 | 			toast.success("Password changed successfully");
 211 | 		} catch (error) {
 212 | 			toast.error("Failed to change password. Please check your current password.");
 213 | 		} finally {
 214 | 			setIsChangingPassword(false);
 215 | 		}
 216 | 	}
 217 | 
 218 | 	async function handleNotificationChange(key: keyof typeof notifications) {
 219 | 		setNotifications(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: !prev[key] }));
 220 | 		toast.success("Preferences saved");
 221 | 	}
 222 | 
 223 | 	const memberSince = new Date(user.createdAt).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
 224 | 		year: "numeric",
 225 | 		month: "long",
 226 | 		day: "numeric"
 227 | 	});
 228 | 
 229 | 	const getRoleBadge = () => {
 230 | 		const roleConfig = {
 231 | 			admin: {
 232 | 				label: "Administrator",
 233 | 				color: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 dark:bg-purple-900/30 dark:text-purple-400",
 234 | 				icon: Shield
 235 | 			},
 236 | 			doctor: {
 237 | 				label: "Medical Doctor",
 238 | 				color: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400",
 239 | 				icon: User
 240 | 			},
 241 | 			staff: {
 242 | 				label: "Staff Member",
 243 | 				color: "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400",
 244 | 				icon: User
 245 | 			},
 246 | 			patient: {
 247 | 				label: "Patient",
 248 | 				color: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-400",
 249 | 				icon: User
 250 | 			}
 251 | 		};
 252 | 		const config = roleConfig[user.role] || roleConfig.patient;
 253 | 		const Icon = config.icon;
 254 | 		return (
 255 | 			<span
 256 | 				className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full px-2.5 py-1 font-medium text-xs ${config.color}`}
 257 | 			>
 258 | 				<Icon size={12} />
 259 | 				{config.label}
 260 | 			</span>
 261 | 		);

 571 | 											/>

 587 | 												setImagePreview(null);
 588 | 												setCompressedFile(null);
 589 | 											}}

 621 | 							/>

 630 | 								placeholder='+1 (555) 000-0000'

 632 | 								value={editForm.phone}
 633 | 							/>
 634 | 						</div>

 643 | 								value={editForm.address}
 644 | 							/>
 645 | 						</div>
 646 | 
 647 | 						{/* Email is read-only */}
 648 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 649 | 							<Label htmlFor='edit-email'>Email Address</Label>
 650 | 							<Input
 651 | 								className='bg-muted'
 652 | 								id='edit-email'

 654 | 								type='email'
 655 | 								value={user.email}
 656 | 							/>

 658 | 								Email cannot be changed. Contact support for assistance.
 659 | 							</p>
 660 | 						</div>
 661 | 					</div>
```
