```tsx
 664 | 						<Button
 665 | 							disabled={isSaving}
 666 | 							onClick={() => setIsEditOpen(false)}
 667 | 							variant='outline'
 668 | 						>
 669 | 							Cancel
 670 | 						</Button>
 671 | 						<Button
 672 | 							disabled={isSaving}
 673 | 							onClick={handleSave}
 674 | 						>
 675 | 							{isSaving ? (
 676 | 								<>Saving...</>
 677 | 							) : (
 678 | 								<>
 679 | 									<Save
 680 | 										className='mr-2'
 681 | 										size={14}
 682 | 									/>
 683 | 									Save Changes
 684 | 								</>
 685 | 							)}
 686 | 						</Button>
 687 | 					</DialogFooter>
 688 | 				</DialogContent>
 689 | 			</Dialog>
 690 | 
 691 | 			{/* Change Password Dialog */}
 692 | 			<Dialog
 693 | 				onOpenChange={setIsPasswordOpen}
 694 | 				open={isPasswordOpen}
 695 | 			>
 696 | 				<DialogContent className='sm:max-w-md'>
 697 | 					<DialogHeader>
 698 | 						<DialogTitle>Change Password</DialogTitle>
 699 | 						<DialogDescription>Enter your current password and choose a new one</DialogDescription>
 700 | 					</DialogHeader>
 701 | 
 702 | 					<div className='space-y-4 py-3'>
 703 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 704 | 							<Label htmlFor='current-password'>Current Password</Label>
 705 | 							<Input
 706 | 								id='current-password'
 707 | 								onChange={e => setPasswordForm(prev => ({ ...prev, currentPassword: e.target.value }))}
 708 | 								type='password'
 709 | 								value={passwordForm.currentPassword}
 710 | 							/>
 711 | 							{passwordErrors.currentPassword && (
 712 | 								<p className='text-destructive text-sm'>{passwordErrors.currentPassword}</p>
 713 | 							)}
 714 | 						</div>
 715 | 
 716 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 717 | 							<Label htmlFor='new-password'>New Password</Label>
 718 | 							<Input
 719 | 								id='new-password'
 720 | 								onChange={e => setPasswordForm(prev => ({ ...prev, newPassword: e.target.value }))}
 721 | 								type='password'
 722 | 								value={passwordForm.newPassword}
 723 | 							/>
 724 | 							{passwordErrors.newPassword && (
 725 | 								<p className='text-destructive text-sm'>{passwordErrors.newPassword}</p>
 726 | 							)}
 727 | 						</div>
 728 | 
 729 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 730 | 							<Label htmlFor='confirm-password'>Confirm New Password</Label>
 731 | 							<Input
 732 | 								id='confirm-password'
 733 | 								onChange={e => setPasswordForm(prev => ({ ...prev, confirmPassword: e.target.value }))}
 734 | 								type='password'
 735 | 								value={passwordForm.confirmPassword}
 736 | 							/>
 737 | 							{passwordErrors.confirmPassword && (
 738 | 								<p className='text-destructive text-sm'>{passwordErrors.confirmPassword}</p>
 739 | 							)}
 740 | 						</div>
 741 | 
 742 | 						<div className='rounded-lg bg-amber-50 p-3 dark:bg-amber-950/30'>
 743 | 							<p className='text-amber-800 text-xs dark:text-amber-400'>
 744 | 								Password must be at least 8 characters and include a mix of letters, numbers, and
 745 | 								symbols.
 746 | 							</p>
 747 | 						</div>
 748 | 					</div>
 749 | 
 750 | 					<DialogFooter>
 751 | 						<Button
 752 | 							disabled={isChangingPassword}
 753 | 							onClick={() => setIsPasswordOpen(false)}
 754 | 							variant='outline'
 755 | 						>
 756 | 							Cancel
 757 | 						</Button>
 758 | 						<Button
 759 | 							disabled={isChangingPassword}
 760 | 							onClick={handlePasswordChange}
 761 | 						>
 762 | 							{isChangingPassword ? "Changing..." : "Change Password"}
 763 | 						</Button>
 764 | 					</DialogFooter>
 765 | 				</DialogContent>
 766 | 			</Dialog>
 767 | 		</div>
 768 | 	);
 769 | }

```

`routes/services/$id.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/services/$id.tsx
   2 | import { createFileRoute, Link, notFound, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | import { ArrowLeft, Calendar, Clock, DollarSign, Heart, Shield, Star } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { useState } from "react";
   5 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   6 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   7 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
   8 | import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
   9 | import { getServiceById } from "@/data/services";
  10 | import { useSession } from "@/lib/auth-client";
  11 | 
  12 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/services/$id")({
  13 | 	component: ServiceDetailPage,
  14 | 	loader: async ({ params }) => {
  15 | 		const service = await getServiceById({ data: params.id });
  16 | 		if (!service) {
  17 | 			throw notFound();
  18 | 		}
  19 | 		return { service };
  20 | 	},
  21 | 	head: ({ loaderData }) => {
  22 | 		if (!loaderData) return {};
  23 | 		const { service } = loaderData;
  24 | 		return {
  25 | 			meta: [
  26 | 				{ title: `${service.serviceName} | Pediatric Services` },
  27 | 				{ name: "description", content: service.description }
  28 | 			]
  29 | 		};
  30 | 	}
  31 | });
  32 | 
  33 | function ServiceDetailPage() {
  34 | 	const { service } = Route.useLoaderData();
  35 | 	const router = useRouter();
  36 | 	const { data: session } = useSession();
  37 | 	const [isBooking, setIsBooking] = useState(false);
  38 | 
  39 | 	const handleBookAppointment = async () => {
  40 | 		if (!session) {
  41 | 			toast.error("Please sign in to book an appointment");
  42 | 			router.navigate({ to: "/sign-in" });
  43 | 			return;
  44 | 		}
  45 | 
  46 | 		setIsBooking(true);
  47 | 		try {
  48 | 			// Navigate to appointment booking with service pre-selected
  49 | 			router.navigate({
  50 | 				to: "/appointments/book",
  51 | 				search: { serviceId: service.id }
  52 | 			});
  53 | 		} catch (error) {
  54 | 			console.error(error);
  55 | 			toast.error("Failed to start booking process");
  56 | 		} finally {
  57 | 			setIsBooking(false);
  58 | 		}
  59 | 	};
  60 | 
  61 | 	const features = [
  62 | 		{ icon: Heart, text: "Child-friendly environment" },
  63 | 		{ icon: Shield, text: "Certified pediatric specialists" },
  64 | 		{ icon: Star, text: "Trusted by thousands of parents" },
  65 | 		{ icon: Clock, text: "Flexible scheduling available" }
  66 | 	];
  67 | 
  68 | 	return (
  69 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
  70 | 			{/* Back Navigation */}
  71 | 			<Link
  72 | 				className='inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-600 text-sm hover:text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-400 dark:hover:text-slate-200'
  73 | 				to='/services'
  74 | 			>
  75 | 				<ArrowLeft className='h-4 w-4' />
  76 | 				Back to all services
  77 | 			</Link>
  78 | 
  79 | 			<div className='grid gap-8 lg:grid-cols-3'>
  80 | 				{/* Main Content */}
  81 | 				<div className='lg:col-span-2'>
  82 | 					<Card>
  83 | 						<CardHeader>
  84 | 							<div className='mb-2 flex items-center gap-3'>
  85 | 								<div
  86 | 									className='flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl text-2xl'
  87 | 									style={{ backgroundColor: `${service.color}20`, color: service.color ?? "" }}
  88 | 								>
  89 | 									{service.icon || "🩺"}
  90 | 								</div>
  91 | 								<div>
  92 | 									<CardTitle className='text-2xl'>{service.serviceName}</CardTitle>
  93 | 									<CardDescription className='flex items-center gap-3'>
  94 | 										<span className='flex items-center gap-1'>
  95 | 											<Clock className='h-3 w-3' />~{service.duration} minutes
  96 | 										</span>
  97 | 										<span className='flex items-center gap-1 font-semibold text-slate-900 dark:text-white'>
  98 | 											<DollarSign className='h-3 w-3' />${service.price}
  99 | 										</span>
 100 | 									</CardDescription>
 101 | 								</div>
 102 | 							</div>
 103 | 						</CardHeader>
 104 | 
 105 | 						<CardContent className='space-y-6'>
 106 | 							<div>
 107 | 								<h3 className='mb-2 font-semibold text-lg'>About this service</h3>
 108 | 								<p className='text-slate-600 leading-relaxed dark:text-slate-400'>
 109 | 									{service.description}
 110 | 								</p>
 111 | 							</div>
 112 | 
 113 | 							<Separator />
 114 | 
 115 | 							<div>
 116 | 								<h3 className='mb-4 font-semibold text-lg'>What to expect</h3>
 117 | 								<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'>
 118 | 									{features.map((feature, index) => (
 119 | 										<div
 120 | 											className='flex items-center gap-3'
 121 | 											key={index}
 122 | 										>
 123 | 											<div className='flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800'>
 124 | 												<feature.icon className='h-4 w-4 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400' />
 125 | 											</div>
 126 | 											<span className='text-slate-700 text-sm dark:text-slate-300'>
 127 | 												{feature.text}
 128 | 											</span>
 129 | 										</div>
 130 | 									))}
 131 | 								</div>
 132 | 							</div>
 133 | 
 134 | 							<Separator />
 135 | 
 136 | 							<div>
 137 | 								<h3 className='mb-2 font-semibold text-lg'>Preparing for your visit</h3>
 138 | 								<ul className='list-inside list-disc space-y-1 text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 139 | 									<li>Bring your child's insurance card and photo ID</li>
 140 | 									<li>Arrive 15 minutes before your scheduled appointment</li>
 141 | 									<li>Bring any relevant medical records or previous test results</li>
 142 | 									<li>List any medications your child is currently taking</li>
 143 | 									<li>Write down any questions or concerns you'd like to discuss</li>
 144 | 								</ul>
 145 | 							</div>
 146 | 						</CardContent>
 147 | 					</Card>
 148 | 				</div>
 149 | 
 150 | 				{/* Sidebar - Booking Card */}
 151 | 				<div>
 152 | 					<Card className='sticky top-24'>
 153 | 						<CardHeader>
 154 | 							<CardTitle className='text-center text-lg'>Book Appointment</CardTitle>
 155 | 							<CardDescription className='text-center'>
 156 | 								Schedule this service for your child
 157 | 							</CardDescription>
 158 | 						</CardHeader>
 159 | 						<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
 160 | 							<div className='rounded-lg bg-slate-50 p-4 dark:bg-slate-800/50'>
 161 | 								<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
 162 | 									<span className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>Service fee</span>
 163 | 									<span className='font-semibold'>${service.price}</span>
 164 | 								</div>

 166 | 									<span className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>Duration</span>
 167 | 									<span className='text-sm'>{service.duration} minutes</span>
 168 | 								</div>
 169 | 								<Separator className='my-2' />
 170 | 								<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
 171 | 									<span className='font-medium'>Total</span>
 172 | 									<span className='font-bold text-lg'>${service.price}</span>
 173 | 								</div>
 174 | 							</div>
 175 | 
 176 | 							<Button
 177 | 								className='w-full'
 178 | 								disabled={isBooking}
 179 | 								onClick={handleBookAppointment}
 180 | 								size='lg'
 181 | 							>
 182 | 								<Calendar className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />

 184 | 							</Button>
 185 | 
 186 | 							<p className='text-center text-slate-500 text-xs'>
 187 | 								Free cancellation up to 24 hours before appointment
 188 | 							</p>
 189 | 						</CardContent>
 190 | 					</Card>
 191 | 
 192 | 					{/* Related Info Card */}
 193 | 					<Card className='mt-4'>
 194 | 						<CardHeader>
 195 | 							<CardTitle className='text-sm'>Insurance & Payment</CardTitle>
 196 | 						</CardHeader>

 200 | 								verification.
 201 | 							</p>
```

`routes/services/index.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/services/index.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { createFileRoute, Link } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   4 | import { CheckCircle, Clock, DollarSign, Stethoscope } from "lucide-react";
   5 | import { Suspense } from "react";
   6 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
   7 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
   8 | import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
   9 | import { getAllServices } from "@/data/services";
  10 | import type { DbService } from "@/db/schema";
  11 | 
  12 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/services/")({
  13 | 	loader: async () => {
  14 | 		return getAllServices();
  15 | 	},
  16 | 	component: ServicesPage
  17 | });
  18 | 
  19 | function ServicesPage() {
  20 | 	const services = Route.useLoaderData();
  21 | 
  22 | 	return (
  23 | 		<div className='space-y-8'>
  24 | 			{/* Hero Section */}
  25 | 			<section className='rounded-2xl bg-linear-to-r from-slate-900 to-slate-800 px-6 py-12 text-white shadow-xl dark:from-slate-950 dark:to-slate-900'>
  26 | 				<div className='mx-auto max-w-3xl text-center'>
  27 | 					<div className='mb-4 flex justify-center'>
  28 | 						<div className='rounded-full bg-white/20 p-3'>
  29 | 							<Stethoscope className='h-8 w-8' />
  30 | 						</div>
  31 | 					</div>
  32 | 					<h1 className='mb-4 font-bold text-4xl'>Our Pediatric Services</h1>
  33 | 					<p className='text-lg text-slate-300'>
  34 | 						Comprehensive healthcare services for children from birth to adolescence. All our services are
  35 | 						delivered by experienced pediatric specialists.
  36 | 					</p>
  37 | 				</div>
  38 | 			</section>
  39 | 
  40 | 			{/* Services Grid */}
  41 | 			<section className='mx-auto max-w-6xl'>
  42 | 				<div className='mb-6 flex items-center justify-between'>
  43 | 					<div>
  44 | 						<h2 className='font-semibold text-2xl'>Available Services</h2>
  45 | 						<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
  46 | 							Browse our full range of pediatric services
  47 | 						</p>
  48 | 					</div>
  49 | 				</div>
  50 | 
  51 | 				<Suspense fallback={<ServicesGridSkeleton />}>
  52 | 					<div
  53 | 						className='grid gap-6 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3'
  54 | 						data-slot='card-group'
  55 | 					>
  56 | 						{Array.isArray(services) &&
  57 | 							(services as unknown as DbService[]).map((service: DbService) => (
  58 | 								<ServiceCard
  59 | 									key={service.id}
  60 | 									service={service}
  61 | 								/>
  62 | 							))}
  63 | 					</div>
  64 | 				</Suspense>
  65 | 			</section>
  66 | 		</div>
  67 | 	);
  68 | }
  69 | 
  70 | function ServiceCard({ service }: { service: DbService }) {
  71 | 	const isAvailable = service.isAvailable;
  72 | 
  73 | 	return (
  74 | 		<Card className='group flex h-full flex-col transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg'>
  75 | 			<CardHeader>
  76 | 				<div className='mb-2 flex items-center justify-between'>
  77 | 					<div className='flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-slate-300'>
  78 | 						{service.icon ? (
  79 | 							<span className='text-2xl'>{service.icon}</span>
  80 | 						) : (
  81 | 							<Stethoscope className='h-5 w-5' />
  82 | 						)}
  83 | 					</div>
  84 | 					{isAvailable ? (
  85 | 						<span className='inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full bg-emerald-100 px-2 py-1 font-medium text-[10px] text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 dark:text-emerald-400'>
  86 | 							<CheckCircle className='h-3 w-3' />
  87 | 							Available
  88 | 						</span>
  89 | 					) : (
  90 | 						<span className='inline-flex rounded-full bg-slate-100 px-2 py-1 font-medium text-[10px] text-slate-500 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-slate-400'>
  91 | 							Coming Soon
  92 | 						</span>
  93 | 					)}
  94 | 				</div>
  95 | 				<CardTitle className='text-xl'>{service.serviceName}</CardTitle>
  96 | 				<CardDescription className='line-clamp-2'>{service.description}</CardDescription>
  97 | 			</CardHeader>
  98 | 
  99 | 			<CardContent className='flex-1 space-y-2'>
 100 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 101 | 					<Clock className='h-4 w-4' />
 102 | 					<span>~{service.duration} minutes</span>
 103 | 				</div>
 104 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg text-slate-900 dark:text-white'>
 105 | 					<DollarSign className='h-4 w-4' />
 106 | 					<span>${service.price}</span>
 107 | 				</div>
 108 | 			</CardContent>
 109 | 
 110 | 			<CardFooter className='pt-4'>
 111 | 				<Link
 112 | 					className='w-full'
 113 | 					params={{ id: service.id }}
 114 | 					to='/services/$id'
 115 | 				>
 116 | 					<Button
 117 | 						className='w-full'
 118 | 						disabled={!isAvailable}
 119 | 						variant={isAvailable ? "default" : "outline"}
 120 | 					>
 121 | 						{isAvailable ? "Book Appointment" : "Notify Me"}
 122 | 					</Button>
 123 | 				</Link>
 124 | 			</CardFooter>
 125 | 		</Card>
 126 | 	);
 127 | }
 128 | 
 129 | function ServicesGridSkeleton() {
 130 | 	return (
 131 | 		<div className='grid gap-6 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3'>
 132 | 			{Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, i) => (
 133 | 				<Card key={i}>
 134 | 					<CardHeader>
 135 | 						<div className='mb-2 flex items-center justify-between'>
 136 | 							<Skeleton className='h-12 w-12 rounded-xl' />
 137 | 							<Skeleton className='h-5 w-16 rounded-full' />
 138 | 						</div>
 139 | 						<Skeleton className='h-6 w-3/4' />
 140 | 						<Skeleton className='h-4 w-full' />
 141 | 						<Skeleton className='h-4 w-2/3' />
 142 | 					</CardHeader>
 143 | 					<CardContent className='space-y-2'>
 144 | 						<Skeleton className='h-4 w-24' />
 145 | 						<Skeleton className='h-6 w-16' />
 146 | 					</CardContent>
 147 | 					<CardFooter>
 148 | 						<Skeleton className='h-10 w-full rounded-md' />
 149 | 					</CardFooter>
 150 | 				</Card>
 151 | 			))}
 152 | 		</div>
 153 | 	);
 154 | }
```

`routes/services/manage.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/routes/services/manage.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { createFileRoute, redirect, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   4 | import { type ColumnDef, flexRender, getCoreRowModel, useReactTable } from "@tanstack/react-table";

  21 | 	Dialog,
  22 | 	DialogContent,
  23 | 	DialogDescription,

  41 | import { createService, deleteService, getAllServices, updateService } from "@/data/services";
  42 | import type { DbService } from "@/db/schema";
  43 | 
  44 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/services/manage")({
  45 | 	beforeLoad: async ({ context }) => {
  46 | 		const session = context.session;
  47 | 		if (!session) throw redirect({ to: "/sign-in" });
  48 | 		if (session.user.role !== "admin") throw redirect({ to: "/" });
  49 | 		return { user: session.user };
  50 | 	},
  51 | 	loader: async () => getAllServices(),
  52 | 	component: ManageServicesPage
  53 | });
  54 | 
  55 | function ManageServicesPage() {
  56 | 	const router = useRouter();
  57 | 	const initialServices = Route.useLoaderData();
  58 | 	const [services, setServices] = useState<DbService[]>(initialServices as unknown as DbService[]);
  59 | 
  60 | 	// Dialog states
  61 | 	const [isCreateOpen, setIsCreateOpen] = useState(false);
  62 | 	const [isEditOpen, setIsEditOpen] = useState(false);
  63 | 	const [deletingService, setDeletingService] = useState<DbService | null>(null);
  64 | 
  65 | 	// Form states
  66 | 	const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
  67 | 		serviceName: "",
  68 | 		description: "",
  69 | 		price: "",
  70 | 		duration: "30",
  71 | 		category: "CONSULTATION",
  72 | 		isAvailable: true,
  73 | 		icon: "🩺",
  74 | 		color: "#3b82f6"
  75 | 	});
  76 | 	const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  77 | 	const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  78 | 
  79 | 	const columns: ColumnDef<DbService>[] = [
  80 | 		{
  81 | 			accessorKey: "serviceName",
  82 | 			header: "Service Name",
  83 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
  84 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
  85 | 					<div
  86 | 						className='flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-sm'
  87 | 						style={{ backgroundColor: `${row.original.color}20`, color: row.original.color ?? "" }}
  88 | 					>
  89 | 						{row.original.icon || "🩺"}
  90 | 					</div>
  91 | 					<span className='font-medium'>{row.original.serviceName}</span>
  92 | 				</div>
  93 | 			)
  94 | 		},
  95 | 		{
  96 | 			accessorKey: "description",
  97 | 			header: "Description",
  98 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
  99 | 				<span className='line-clamp-2 max-w-xs text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 100 | 					{row.original.description}
 101 | 				</span>
 102 | 			)
 103 | 		},
 104 | 		{
 105 | 			accessorKey: "duration",
 106 | 			header: "Duration",
 107 | 			cell: ({ row }) => <span>{row.original.duration} min</span>
 108 | 		},
 109 | 		{
 110 | 			accessorKey: "price",
 111 | 			header: "Price",
 112 | 			cell: ({ row }) => <span className='font-semibold'>${row.original.price}</span>
 113 | 		},
 114 | 		{
 115 | 			accessorKey: "isAvailable",
 116 | 			header: "Status",
 117 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
 118 | 				<span
 119 | 					className={`inline-flex rounded-full px-2 py-1 font-medium text-xs ${
 120 | 						row.original.isAvailable
 121 | 							? "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 dark:text-emerald-400"
 122 | 							: "bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-slate-400"
 123 | 					}`}
 124 | 				>
 125 | 					{row.original.isAvailable ? "Available" : "Unavailable"}
 126 | 				</span>
 127 | 			)
 128 | 		},
 129 | 		{
 130 | 			id: "actions",
 131 | 			header: "Actions",
 132 | 			cell: ({ row }) => (
 133 | 				<DropdownMenu>
 134 | 					<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
 135 | 						<Button
 136 | 							size='icon'
 137 | 							variant='ghost'
 138 | 						>
 139 | 							<MoreHorizontal className='h-4 w-4' />
 140 | 							<span className='sr-only'>Open menu</span>
 141 | 						</Button>
 142 | 					</DropdownMenuTrigger>
 143 | 					<DropdownMenuContent align='end'>
 144 | 						<DropdownMenuLabel>Actions</DropdownMenuLabel>
 145 | 						<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => openEditDialog(row.original)}>
 146 | 							<Pencil className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 147 | 							Edit
 148 | 						</DropdownMenuItem>
 149 | 						<DropdownMenuSeparator />
 150 | 						<DropdownMenuItem
 151 | 							className='text-red-600'
 152 | 							onClick={() => setDeletingService(row.original)}
 153 | 						>
 154 | 							<Trash2 className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 155 | 							Delete
 156 | 						</DropdownMenuItem>
 157 | 					</DropdownMenuContent>
 158 | 				</DropdownMenu>
 159 | 			)
 160 | 		}
 161 | 	];
 162 | 
 163 | 	const table = useReactTable({
 164 | 		data: services,
 165 | 		columns,
 166 | 		getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel()
 167 | 	});
 168 | 
 169 | 	const openEditDialog = (service: DbService) => {
 170 | 		setEditingId(service.id);
 171 | 		setFormData({
 172 | 			serviceName: service.serviceName,
 173 | 			description: service.description,
 174 | 			price: service.price.toString(),
 175 | 			duration: (service.duration ?? 30).toString(),
 176 | 			category: service.category ?? "",
 177 | 			isAvailable: service.isAvailable ?? true,
 178 | 			icon: service.icon || "🩺",
 179 | 			color: service.color || "#3b82f6"
 180 | 		});
 181 | 		setIsEditOpen(true);
 182 | 	};
 183 | 
 184 | 	const handleCreate = async () => {
 185 | 		setIsSubmitting(true);
 186 | 		try {
 187 | 			await createService({
 188 | 				data: {
 189 | 					serviceName: formData.serviceName,
 190 | 					description: formData.description,
 191 | 					price: Number.parseFloat(formData.price),
 192 | 					duration: Number.parseInt(formData.duration, 10),
 193 | 					category: formData.category ?? "",
 194 | 					isAvailable: formData.isAvailable,
 195 | 					icon: formData.icon,
 196 | 					color: formData.color
 197 | 				}
 198 | 			});
 199 | 			await router.invalidate();
 200 | 			setServices((await getAllServices()) as unknown as DbService[]);
 201 | 			setIsCreateOpen(false);
 202 | 			resetForm();
 203 | 			toast.success("Service created successfully");
 204 | 		} catch (error) {
 205 | 			console.error(error);
 206 | 			toast.error("Failed to create service");
 207 | 		} finally {
 208 | 			setIsSubmitting(false);
 209 | 		}
 210 | 	};
 211 | 
 212 | 	const handleUpdate = async () => {
 213 | 		if (!editingId) return;
 214 | 		setIsSubmitting(true);
 215 | 		try {
 216 | 			await updateService({
 217 | 				data: {
 218 | 					id: editingId,
 219 | 					serviceName: formData.serviceName,
 220 | 					description: formData.description,
 221 | 					price: Number.parseFloat(formData.price),
 222 | 					duration: Number.parseInt(formData.duration, 10),
 223 | 					category: formData.category ?? "",
 224 | 					isAvailable: formData.isAvailable,
 225 | 					icon: formData.icon,
 226 | 					color: formData.color
 227 | 				}
 228 | 			});
 229 | 			await router.invalidate();
 230 | 			setServices((await getAllServices()) as unknown as DbService[]);
 231 | 			setIsEditOpen(false);
 232 | 			resetForm();
 233 | 			toast.success("Service updated successfully");
 234 | 		} catch (error) {
 235 | 			console.error(error);
 236 | 			toast.error("Failed to update service");
 237 | 		} finally {
 238 | 			setIsSubmitting(false);
 239 | 		}
 240 | 	};
 241 | 
 242 | 	const handleDelete = async () => {
 243 | 		if (!deletingService) return;
 244 | 		setIsSubmitting(true);
 245 | 		try {
 246 | 			await deleteService({ data: { id: deletingService.id } });
 247 | 			await router.invalidate();
 248 | 			setServices((await getAllServices()) as unknown as DbService[]);
 249 | 			setDeletingService(null);
 250 | 			toast.success("Service deleted successfully");
 251 | 		} catch (error) {
 252 | 			console.error(error);
 253 | 			toast.error("Failed to delete service");
 254 | 		} finally {
 255 | 			setIsSubmitting(false);
 256 | 		}
 257 | 	};
 258 | 
 259 | 	const resetForm = () => {
 260 | 		setFormData({
 261 | 			serviceName: "",
 262 | 			description: "",
 263 | 			price: "",
 264 | 			duration: "30",
 265 | 			category: "CONSULTATION",
 266 | 			isAvailable: true,
 267 | 			icon: "🩺",
 268 | 			color: "#3b82f6"
 269 | 		});
 270 | 		setEditingId(null);
 271 | 	};
 272 | 
 273 | 	const commonIcons = ["🩺", "💉", "🩸", "🧪", "📋", "🩹", "💊", "🏥", "👶", "🧬", "🫀", "🧠"];
 274 | 
 275 | 	return (
 276 | 		<div className='mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 py-8'>
 277 | 			<div className='space-y-6'>
 278 | 				<div className='flex flex-col justify-between gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center'>
 279 | 					<div>
 280 | 						<h1 className='font-semibold text-2xl'>Manage Services</h1>
 281 | 						<p className='text-slate-600 text-sm dark:text-slate-400'>
 282 | 							Create, edit, and manage your clinic's service offerings
 283 | 						</p>
 284 | 					</div>
 285 | 					<Button onClick={() => setIsCreateOpen(true)}>
 286 | 						<Plus className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 287 | 						Add Service
 288 | 					</Button>
 289 | 				</div>
 290 | 
 291 | 				<Card>
 292 | 					<CardHeader>
 293 | 						<CardTitle className='text-lg'>All Services</CardTitle>
 294 | 						<CardDescription>
 295 | 							Total {services.length} service{services.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""} available
 296 | 						</CardDescription>
 297 | 					</CardHeader>
 298 | 					<CardContent className='p-0'>
 299 | 						<Table>
 300 | 							<TableHeader>
 301 | 								{table.getHeaderGroups().map(headerGroup => (
 302 | 									<TableRow key={headerGroup.id}>
 303 | 										{headerGroup.headers.map(header => (
 304 | 											<TableHead key={header.id}>
 305 | 												{header.isPlaceholder
 306 | 													? null
 307 | 													: flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
 308 | 											</TableHead>
 309 | 										))}
 310 | 									</TableRow>
 311 | 								))}
 312 | 							</TableHeader>
 313 | 							<TableBody>
 314 | 								{table.getRowModel().rows.length ? (
 315 | 									table.getRowModel().rows.map(row => (
 316 | 										<TableRow key={row.id}>
 317 | 											{row.getVisibleCells().map(cell => (
 318 | 												<TableCell key={cell.id}>
 319 | 													{flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
 320 | 												</TableCell>
 321 | 											))}
 322 | 										</TableRow>
 323 | 									))
 324 | 								) : (
 325 | 									<TableRow>
 326 | 										<TableCell
 327 | 											className='h-24 text-center text-slate-500'
 328 | 											colSpan={columns.length}
 329 | 										>
 330 | 											No services found. Create your first service to get started.
 331 | 										</TableCell>
 332 | 									</TableRow>
 333 | 								)}
 334 | 							</TableBody>
 335 | 						</Table>
 336 | 					</CardContent>
 337 | 				</Card>
 338 | 			</div>
 339 | 
 340 | 			{/* Create Service Dialog */}
 341 | 			<Dialog
 342 | 				onOpenChange={setIsCreateOpen}
 343 | 				open={isCreateOpen}
 344 | 			>
 345 | 				<DialogContent className='max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto sm:max-w-lg'>
 346 | 					<DialogHeader>
 347 | 						<DialogTitle>Create New Service</DialogTitle>
 348 | 						<DialogDescription>
 349 | 							Add a new service to your clinic's catalog. Fill in the details below.
 350 | 						</DialogDescription>
 351 | 					</DialogHeader>
 352 | 					<ServiceForm
 353 | 						commonIcons={commonIcons}
 354 | 						formData={formData}
 355 | 						setFormData={setFormData}
 356 | 					/>
 357 | 					<DialogFooter>
 358 | 						<Button
 359 | 							disabled={isSubmitting}
 360 | 							onClick={() => setIsCreateOpen(false)}
 361 | 							variant='outline'
 362 | 						>
 363 | 							Cancel
 364 | 						</Button>
 365 | 						<Button
 366 | 							disabled={isSubmitting}
 367 | 							onClick={handleCreate}
 368 | 						>
 369 | 							{isSubmitting ? "Creating..." : "Create Service"}
 370 | 						</Button>
 371 | 					</DialogFooter>
 372 | 				</DialogContent>
 373 | 			</Dialog>
 374 | 
 375 | 			{/* Edit Service Dialog */}
 376 | 			<Dialog
 377 | 				onOpenChange={setIsEditOpen}
 378 | 				open={isEditOpen}
 379 | 			>
 380 | 				<DialogContent className='max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto sm:max-w-lg'>
 381 | 					<DialogHeader>
 382 | 						<DialogTitle>Edit Service</DialogTitle>
 383 | 						<DialogDescription>Update the service details below.</DialogDescription>
 384 | 					</DialogHeader>
 385 | 					<ServiceForm
 386 | 						commonIcons={commonIcons}
 387 | 						formData={formData}
 388 | 						setFormData={setFormData}
 389 | 					/>
 390 | 					<DialogFooter>
 391 | 						<Button
 392 | 							disabled={isSubmitting}
 393 | 							onClick={() => setIsEditOpen(false)}
 394 | 							variant='outline'
 395 | 						>
 396 | 							Cancel
 397 | 						</Button>
 398 | 						<Button
 399 | 							disabled={isSubmitting}
 400 | 							onClick={handleUpdate}
 401 | 						>
 402 | 							{isSubmitting ? "Saving..." : "Save Changes"}
 403 | 						</Button>
 404 | 					</DialogFooter>
 405 | 				</DialogContent>
 406 | 			</Dialog>
 407 | 
 408 | 			{/* Delete Confirmation Dialog */}
 409 | 			<AlertDialog
 410 | 				onOpenChange={() => setDeletingService(null)}
 411 | 				open={!!deletingService}
 412 | 			>
 413 | 				<AlertDialogContent>
 414 | 					<AlertDialogHeader>
 415 | 						<AlertDialogTitle>Delete Service</AlertDialogTitle>
 416 | 						<AlertDialogDescription>
 417 | 							Are you sure you want to delete "{deletingService?.serviceName}"? This action cannot be
 418 | 							undone and may affect existing appointments.
 419 | 						</AlertDialogDescription>
 420 | 					</AlertDialogHeader>
 421 | 					<AlertDialogFooter>
 422 | 						<AlertDialogCancel disabled={isSubmitting}>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
 423 | 						<AlertDialogAction
 424 | 							className='bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700'
 425 | 							disabled={isSubmitting}
 426 | 							onClick={handleDelete}
 427 | 						>
 428 | 							{isSubmitting ? "Deleting..." : "Delete"}
 429 | 						</AlertDialogAction>
 430 | 					</AlertDialogFooter>
 431 | 				</AlertDialogContent>
 432 | 			</AlertDialog>
 433 | 		</div>
 434 | 	);
 435 | }
 436 | 
 437 | interface ServiceFormData {
 438 | 	serviceName: string;
 439 | 	description: string;
 440 | 	price: string;
 441 | 	duration: string;
 442 | 	category: string;
 443 | 	isAvailable: boolean;
 444 | 	icon: string;
 445 | 	color: string;
 446 | }
 447 | 
 448 | // Service Form Component (reused for create/edit)
 449 | function ServiceForm({
 450 | 	formData,
 451 | 	setFormData,
 452 | 	commonIcons
 453 | }: {
 454 | 	formData: ServiceFormData;
 455 | 	setFormData: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<ServiceFormData>>;
 456 | 	commonIcons: string[];
 457 | }) {
 458 | 	const categories = [
 459 | 		{ value: "CONSULTATION", label: "Consultation" },
 460 | 		{ value: "LAB_TEST", label: "Lab Test" },
 461 | 		{ value: "VACCINATION", label: "Vaccination" },
 462 | 		{ value: "PROCEDURE", label: "Procedure" },
 463 | 		{ value: "DIAGNOSIS", label: "Diagnosis" },
 464 | 		{ value: "PHARMACY", label: "Pharmacy" },
 465 | 		{ value: "OTHER", label: "Other" }
 466 | 	];
 467 | 
 468 | 	return (
 469 | 		<div className='space-y-4 py-2'>
 470 | 			<div className='space-y-2'>
 471 | 				<Label htmlFor='serviceName'>Service Name *</Label>
 472 | 				<Input
 473 | 					id='serviceName'
 474 | 					onChange={e => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, serviceName: e.target.value }))}
 475 | 					placeholder='e.g., General Checkup'
 476 | 					value={formData.serviceName}
 477 | 				/>
 478 | 			</div>
 479 | 
 480 | 			<div className='space-y-2'>
 481 | 				<Label htmlFor='description'>Description *</Label>
 482 | 				<Textarea
 483 | 					id='description'
 484 | 					onChange={e => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, description: e.target.value }))}
 485 | 					placeholder='Describe the service...'
 486 | 					rows={3}
 487 | 					value={formData.description}
 488 | 				/>
 489 | 			</div>
 490 | 
 491 | 			<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-4'>
 492 | 				<div className='space-y-2'>
 493 | 					<Label htmlFor='price'>Price ($) *</Label>
 494 | 					<Input
 495 | 						id='price'
 496 | 						onChange={e => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, price: e.target.value }))}
 497 | 						placeholder='49.99'
 498 | 						step='0.01'
 499 | 						type='number'
 500 | 						value={formData.price}
 501 | 					/>
 502 | 				</div>
 503 | 				<div className='space-y-2'>
 504 | 					<Label htmlFor='duration'>Duration (minutes) *</Label>
 505 | 					<Input
 506 | 						id='duration'
 507 | 						onChange={e => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, duration: e.target.value }))}
 508 | 						placeholder='30'
 509 | 						type='number'
 510 | 						value={formData.duration}
 511 | 					/>
 512 | 				</div>
 513 | 			</div>
 514 | 
 515 | 			<div className='space-y-2'>
 516 | 				<Label htmlFor='category'>Category</Label>
 517 | 				<select
 518 | 					className='flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:font-medium file:text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50'
 519 | 					id='category'
 520 | 					onChange={e => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, category: e.target.value }))}
 521 | 					value={formData.category}
 522 | 				>
 523 | 					{categories.map(cat => (
 524 | 						<option
 525 | 							key={cat.value}
 526 | 							value={cat.value}
 527 | 						>
 528 | 							{cat.label}
 529 | 						</option>
 530 | 					))}
 531 | 				</select>
 532 | 			</div>
 533 | 
 534 | 			<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-4'>
 535 | 				<div className='space-y-2'>
 536 | 					<Label htmlFor='icon'>Icon</Label>
 537 | 					<select
 538 | 						className='flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:font-medium file:text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50'
 539 | 						id='icon'
 540 | 						onChange={e => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, icon: e.target.value }))}
 541 | 						value={formData.icon}
 542 | 					>
 543 | 						{commonIcons.map(icon => (
 544 | 							<option
 545 | 								key={icon}
 546 | 								value={icon}
 547 | 							>
 548 | 								{icon}
 549 | 							</option>
 550 | 						))}
 551 | 					</select>
 552 | 				</div>
 553 | 				<div className='space-y-2'>
 554 | 					<Label htmlFor='color'>Color</Label>
 555 | 					<Input
 556 | 						id='color'
 557 | 						onChange={e => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, color: e.target.value }))}
 558 | 						type='color'
 559 | 						value={formData.color}
 560 | 					/>
 561 | 				</div>
 562 | 			</div>
 563 | 
 564 | 			<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
 565 | 				<Label htmlFor='isAvailable'>Service Available</Label>
 566 | 				<Switch
 567 | 					checked={formData.isAvailable}
 568 | 					id='isAvailable'
 569 | 					onCheckedChange={checked => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, isAvailable: checked }))}
 570 | 				/>
 571 | 			</div>
 572 | 		</div>
 573 | 	);
 574 | }

```

`routes/sign-in.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { createFileRoute } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   2 | import { LoginForm } from "#/components/login-form";
   3 | 
   4 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/sign-in")({
   5 | 	component: RouteComponent
   6 | });
   7 | 
   8 | function RouteComponent() {
   9 | 	return (
  10 | 		<div className='flex min-h-svh w-full items-center justify-center p-6 md:p-10'>
  11 | 			<div className='w-full max-w-sm'>
  12 | 				<LoginForm />
  13 | 			</div>
  14 | 		</div>
  15 | 	);
  16 | }

```

```tsx

   2 | import { SignupForm } from "#/components/signup-form";
   3 |

   5 | 	component: RouteComponent
   6 | });
   7 | 
   8 | function RouteComponent() {
   9 | 	return (
  10 | 		<div className='flex min-h-svh w-full items-center justify-center p-6 md:p-10'>
  11 | 			<div className='w-full max-w-sm'>
  12 | 				<SignupForm />
  13 | 			</div>
  14 | 		</div>
  15 | 	);
  16 | }
```

```css
  57 |   --radius-md: calc(var(--radius) * 0.8);

  60 |   --radius-2xl: calc(var(--radius) * 1.8);
  61 |   --radius-3xl: calc(var(--radius) * 2.2);
  62 |   --radius-4xl: calc(var(--radius) * 2.6);
  63 | }

  65 | :root {
  66 |   --background: oklch(1 0 0);
  67 |   --foreground: oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823);
  68 |   --card: oklch(1 0 0);
  69 |   --card-foreground: oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823);
  70 |   --popover: oklch(1 0 0);
  71 |   --popover-foreground: oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823);
  72 |   --primary: oklch(0.511 0.096 186.391);
  73 |   --primary-foreground: oklch(0.984 0.014 180.72);
  74 |   --secondary: oklch(0.967 0.001 286.375);
  75 |   --secondary-foreground: oklch(0.21 0.006 285.885);
  76 |   --muted: oklch(0.967 0.001 286.375);
  77 |   --muted-foreground: oklch(0.552 0.016 285.938);
  78 |   --accent: oklch(0.511 0.096 186.391);
  79 |   --accent-foreground: oklch(0.984 0.014 180.72);
  80 |   --destructive: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325);
  81 |   --border: oklch(0.92 0.004 286.32);
  82 |   --input: oklch(0.92 0.004 286.32);
  83 |   --ring: oklch(0.705 0.015 286.067);
  84 |   --chart-1: oklch(0.871 0.006 286.286);
  85 |   --chart-2: oklch(0.552 0.016 285.938);
  86 |   --chart-3: oklch(0.442 0.017 285.786);
  87 |   --chart-4: oklch(0.37 0.013 285.805);
  88 |   --chart-5: oklch(0.274 0.006 286.033);
  89 |   --radius: 0.625rem;
  90 |   --sidebar: oklch(0.985 0 0);
  91 |   --sidebar-foreground: oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823);
  92 |   --sidebar-primary: oklch(0.6 0.118 184.704);
  93 |   --sidebar-primary-foreground: oklch(0.984 0.014 180.72);
```

```ts
 520 | 	getReader(): ReadableStreamDefaultReader<R>;
 521 | 	cancel(reason?: any): Promise<void>;

 527 | interface ReadableStreamDefaultReader<R = any> {
 528 | 	read(): Promise<ReadableStreamReadResult<R>>;
 529 | 	releaseLock(): void;
 530 | 	closed: Promise<void>;
 531 | 	cancel(reason?: any): Promise<void>;
 532 | }

 535 | 	| {
 536 | 			done: false;
 537 | 			value: R;
 538 | 	  }

 540 | 			done: true;
 541 | 			value?: undefined;
 542 | 	  };

 564 | }
```

`types/data-grid.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import type { RowData } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   2 |

   4 | 
   5 | export interface CellSelectOption {

  10 | export type Cell =
  11 | 	| {
  12 | 			variant: "short-text";
  13 | 	  }
  14 | 	| {
  15 | 			variant: "long-text";
  16 | 	  }
  17 | 	| {
  18 | 			variant: "number";
  19 | 			min?: number;
  20 | 			max?: number;
  21 | 			step?: number;
  22 | 	  }
  23 | 	| {
  24 | 			variant: "select";
  25 | 			options: CellSelectOption[];
  26 | 	  }
  27 | 	| {
  28 | 			variant: "multi-select";
  29 | 			options: CellSelectOption[];
  30 | 	  }
  31 | 	| {
  32 | 			variant: "checkbox";
  33 | 	  }
  34 | 	| {
  35 | 			variant: "date";
  36 | 	  };
  37 | 
  38 | export interface UpdateCell {
  39 | 	rowIndex: number;
  40 | 	columnId: string;
  41 | 	value: unknown;
  42 | }
  43 | 
  44 | declare module "@tanstack/react-table" {

  46 | 		label?: string;
```

`types/globals.d.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { auth } from "@/lib/auth"; // Your Better-Auth instance
   2 | import { Roles } from "@/types/globals";
   3 | 
   4 | export const checkRole = async (_role: Roles): Promise<boolean> => {
   5 | 	const session = await auth.api.getSession();
   6 | 
   7 | 	// Assuming Better-Auth stores user metadata in session.user.publicMetadata
   8 | 	const userRole = session?.user?.publicMetadata?.role?.toLowerCase();
   9 | 
  10 | 	return userRole === role.toLowerCase();
  11 | };
  12 | 
  13 | export const getRole = async (): Promise<string> => {
  14 | 	const session = await getSession();
  15 | 
  16 | 	// Default to "patient" if role is missing
  17 | 	const role = session?.user?.publicMetadata?.role?.toLowerCase() || "patient";
  18 | 
  19 | 	return role;
  20 | };
  21 | export { Roles };
```

`types/helper.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { endOfMonth, format, getMonth, startOfYear } from "date-fns";
   2 | 
   3 | import type { AppointmentStatus } from "../db/schema";
   4 | 
   5 | // --- Utility types and functions from your original file ---
   6 | // export type AppointmentStatus = 'CANCELLED' | 'COMPLETED' | 'PENDING' | 'SCHEDULED'
   7 | 
   8 | interface Appointment {
   9 | 	appointmentDate: Date; // Renamed from appointment_date to match Drizzle schema
  10 | 	status: AppointmentStatus;
  11 | }
  12 | 
  13 | function isValidStatus(status: string): status is AppointmentStatus {
  14 | 	return ["CANCELLED", "NO_SHOW", "CONFIRMED", "COMPLETED", "PENDING"].includes(status);
  15 | }
  16 | 
  17 | const initializeMonthlyData = () => {
  18 | 	const this_year = new Date().getFullYear();
  19 | 
  20 | 	const months = Array.from({ length: getMonth(new Date()) + 1 }, (_, index) => ({
  21 | 		appointment: 0,
  22 | 		completed: 0,
  23 | 		name: format(new Date(this_year, index), "MMM")
  24 | 	}));
  25 | 	return months;
  26 | };
  27 | 
  28 | // Exported for use in other routers (e.g., doctor.router.ts and admin.router.ts)
  29 | export const processAppointments = async (appointments: Appointment[]) => {
  30 | 	const monthlyData = initializeMonthlyData();
  31 | 
  32 | 	const appointmentCounts = appointments.reduce<Record<AppointmentStatus, number>>(
  33 | 		(acc, appointment) => {
  34 | 			const status = appointment.status;
  35 | 			const appointmentDate = appointment?.appointmentDate; // Renamed
  36 | 
  37 | 			const monthIndex = getMonth(appointmentDate);
  38 | 
  39 | 			if (
  40 | 				appointmentDate >= startOfYear(new Date()) &&
  41 | 				appointmentDate <= endOfMonth(new Date()) &&
  42 | 				monthlyData[monthIndex] // check that this exists
  43 | 			) {
  44 | 				monthlyData[monthIndex].appointment += 1;
  45 | 
  46 | 				if (status === "COMPLETED") {
  47 | 					monthlyData[monthIndex].completed += 1;
  48 | 				}
  49 | 			}
  50 | 
  51 | 			if (isValidStatus(status)) {
  52 | 				acc[status] = (acc[status] || 0) + 1;
  53 | 			}
  54 | 
  55 | 			return acc;
  56 | 		},
  57 | 		{
  58 | 			CANCELLED: 0,
  59 | 			COMPLETED: 0,
  60 | 			PENDING: 0,
  61 | 			NO_SHOW: 0,
  62 | 			CONFIRMED: 0
  63 | 		}
  64 | 	);
  65 | 
  66 | 	return { appointmentCounts, monthlyData };
  67 | };
  68 | 
  69 | export interface AllAppointmentsProps {
  70 | 	page: number | string;
  71 | 	limit?: number | string;
  72 | 	search?: string;
  73 | 	id?: string;
  74 | }

```

`utils/age.ts`:

```ts
   1 | export function calculateDateRange(period: string, startDate?: Date, endDate?: Date): { start: Date; end: Date } {
   2 | 	const end = endDate || new Date();
   3 | 	const start =
   4 | 		startDate ||
   5 | 		(() => {
   6 | 			const d = new Date();
   7 | 			switch (period) {
   8 | 				case "week":
   9 | 					d.setDate(d.getDate() - 7);
  10 | 					break;
  11 | 				case "month":
  12 | 					d.setMonth(d.getMonth() - 1);
  13 | 					break;
  14 | 				case "quarter":
  15 | 					d.setMonth(d.getMonth() - 3);
  16 | 					break;
  17 | 				case "year":
  18 | 					d.setFullYear(d.getFullYear() - 1);
  19 | 					break;
  20 | 				case "6months":
  21 | 					d.setMonth(d.getMonth() - 6);
  22 | 					break;
  23 | 				default:
  24 | 					d.setMonth(d.getMonth() - 1);
  25 | 			}
  26 | 			return d;
  27 | 		})();
  28 | 	return { start, end };
  29 | }
  30 | 
  31 | export function groupDataByDate<T extends { date?: Date; appointmentDate?: Date; createdAt?: Date }>(
  32 | 	items: T[],
  33 | 	groupBy: string,
  34 | 	valueExtractor: (item: T) => number
  35 | ): Array<{ date: string; value: number; label: string }> {
  36 | 	const grouped = new Map<string, number>();
  37 | 
  38 | 	for (const item of items) {
  39 | 		const rawDate = item.date || item.appointmentDate || item.createdAt;
  40 | 		if (!rawDate) continue;
  41 | 
  42 | 		const date = new Date(rawDate);
  43 | 		let key: string;
  44 | 
  45 | 		if (groupBy === "day") {
  46 | 			key = date.toISOString().split("T")[0] || "";
  47 | 		} else if (groupBy === "week") {
  48 | 			const weekStart = new Date(date);
  49 | 			weekStart.setDate(date.getDate() - date.getDay());
  50 | 			key = weekStart.toISOString().split("T")[0] || "";
  51 | 		} else {
  52 | 			key = `${date.getFullYear()}-${date.getMonth() + 1}`;
  53 | 		}
  54 | 
  55 | 		grouped.set(key, (grouped.get(key) || 0) + valueExtractor(item));
  56 | 	}
  57 | 
  58 | 	return Array.from(grouped.entries())
  59 | 		.map(([key, value]) => ({ date: key, value, label: key }))
  60 | 		.sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date));
  61 | }
  62 | 
  63 | export function calculateTrend(current: number, previous: number): "improving" | "declining" | "stable" {
  64 | 	if (current > previous * 1.05) return "improving";
  65 | 	if (current < previous * 0.95) return "declining";
  66 | 	return "stable";
  67 | }

```

`utils/appointment.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { db } from "@/db";
   2 | 
   3 | export async function getTimeLeftForAppointment(appointmentId: string): Promise<string> {
   4 | 	const record = await db.query.appointment.findFirst({
   5 | 		with: {
   6 | 			patient: true,
   7 | 			doctor: true,
   8 | 			clinic: true,
   9 | 			service: true
  10 | 		},
  11 | 		where: { id: appointmentId }
  12 | 	});
  13 | 
  14 | 	if (!record?.appointmentDate) {
  15 | 		return "Appointment not found or date missing";
  16 | 	}
  17 | 
  18 | 	const now = new Date();
  19 | 	const appointmentTime = new Date(record.appointmentDate);
  20 | 
  21 | 	const diffMs = appointmentTime.getTime() - now.getTime();
  22 | 	if (diffMs < 0) return "Appointment has already passed";
  23 | 
  24 | 	const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60));
  25 | 	const hours = Math.floor(diffMins / 60);
  26 | 	const mins = diffMins % 60;
  27 | 
  28 | 	if (hours > 0) {
  29 | 		return `${hours} hours and ${mins} minutes remaining`;
  30 | 	}
  31 | 	return `${mins} minutes remaining`;
  32 | }

```

`utils/calendar.ts`:

```ts
   1 | /**
   2 |  * Generate time slots between start and end times
   3 |  */
   4 | export function generateTimeSlots(startTime: string, endTime: string, slotDurationMinutes: number): string[] {
   5 | 	const slots: string[] = [];
   6 | 	const [startHour, startMinute] = startTime.split(":").map(Number);
   7 | 	const [endHour, endMinute] = endTime.split(":").map(Number);
   8 | 
   9 | 	let currentHour = startHour ?? 0;
  10 | 	let currentMinute = startMinute ?? 0;
  11 | 
  12 | 	while (currentHour < (endHour ?? 0) || (currentHour === (endHour ?? 0) && currentMinute < (endMinute ?? 0))) {
  13 | 		const time = `${currentHour.toString().padStart(2, "0")}:${currentMinute.toString().padStart(2, "0")}`;
  14 | 		slots.push(time);
  15 | 
  16 | 		currentMinute += slotDurationMinutes;
  17 | 		if (currentMinute >= 60) {
  18 | 			currentHour += Math.floor(currentMinute / 60);
  19 | 			currentMinute = currentMinute % 60;
  20 | 		}
  21 | 	}
  22 | 
  23 | 	return slots;
  24 | }
  25 | 
  26 | /**
  27 |  * Calculate available time slots based on working hours and booked slots
  28 |  */
  29 | export function calculateAvailableSlots(
  30 | 	workingStart: string,
  31 | 	workingEnd: string,
  32 | 	durationMinutes: number,
  33 | 	bookedSlots: Array<{ start: Date; duration: number }>,
  34 | 	date: Date
  35 | ): Array<{ startTime: string; endTime: string; available: boolean }> {
  36 | 	const slots: Array<{
  37 | 		startTime: string;
  38 | 		endTime: string;
  39 | 		available: boolean;
  40 | 	}> = [];
  41 | 
  42 | 	const [startHour, startMinute] = workingStart.split(":").map(Number);
  43 | 	const [endHour, endMinute] = workingEnd.split(":").map(Number);
  44 | 
  45 | 	let currentHour = startHour ?? 0;
  46 | 	let currentMinute = startMinute ?? 0;
  47 | 	const endTotalMinutes = (endHour ?? 0) * 60 + (endMinute ?? 0);
  48 | 
  49 | 	// Create a set of booked time ranges for quick lookup
  50 | 	const bookedRanges = bookedSlots.map(slot => ({
  51 | 		startMinutes: slot.start.getHours() * 60 + slot.start.getMinutes(),
  52 | 		endMinutes: slot.start.getHours() * 60 + slot.start.getMinutes() + slot.duration
  53 | 	}));
  54 | 
  55 | 	while (currentHour * 60 + currentMinute + durationMinutes <= endTotalMinutes) {
  56 | 		const slotStartMinutes = currentHour * 60 + currentMinute;
  57 | 		const slotEndMinutes = slotStartMinutes + durationMinutes;
  58 | 
  59 | 		// Check if slot overlaps with any booked slot
  60 | 		const isBooked = bookedRanges.some(
  61 | 			booked => !(slotEndMinutes <= booked.startMinutes || slotStartMinutes >= booked.endMinutes)
  62 | 		);
  63 | 
  64 | 		const startTimeStr = `${currentHour.toString().padStart(2, "0")}:${currentMinute.toString().padStart(2, "0")}`;
  65 | 
  66 | 		const endTime = new Date(date);
  67 | 		endTime.setHours(currentHour, currentMinute + durationMinutes);
  68 | 		const endTimeStr = `${endTime.getHours().toString().padStart(2, "0")}:${endTime
  69 | 			.getMinutes()
  70 | 			.toString()
  71 | 			.padStart(2, "0")}`;
  72 | 
  73 | 		slots.push({
  74 | 			startTime: startTimeStr,
  75 | 			endTime: endTimeStr,
  76 | 			available: !isBooked
  77 | 		});
  78 | 
  79 | 		currentMinute += durationMinutes;
  80 | 		if (currentMinute >= 60) {
  81 | 			currentHour += Math.floor(currentMinute / 60);
  82 | 			currentMinute = currentMinute % 60;
  83 | 		}
  84 | 	}
  85 | 
  86 | 	return slots;
  87 | }
  88 | 
  89 | /**
  90 |  * Format time for display (e.g., "09:00" -> "9:00 AM")
  91 |  */
  92 | export function formatTimeForDisplay(time: string): string {
  93 | 	const [hour, minute] = time.split(":").map(Number);
  94 | 	const period = (hour ?? 0) >= 12 ? "PM" : "AM";
  95 | 	const displayHour = (hour ?? 0) % 12 || 12;
  96 | 	return `${displayHour}:${minute?.toString().padStart(2, "0")} ${period}`;
  97 | }
  98 | 
  99 | /**
 100 |  * Check if a time is within working hours
 101 |  */
 102 | export function isWithinWorkingHours(time: string, workingStart: string, workingEnd: string): boolean {
 103 | 	const [hour, minute] = time.split(":").map(Number);
 104 | 	const [startHour, startMinute] = workingStart.split(":").map(Number);
 105 | 	const [endHour, endMinute] = workingEnd.split(":").map(Number);
 106 | 
 107 | 	const timeMinutes = (hour ?? 0) * 60 + (minute ?? 0);
 108 | 	const startMinutes = (startHour ?? 0) * 60 + (startMinute ?? 0);
 109 | 	const endMinutes = (endHour ?? 0) * 60 + (endMinute ?? 0);
 110 | 
 111 | 	return timeMinutes >= startMinutes && timeMinutes + 30 <= endMinutes;
 112 | }
 113 | 
 114 | /**
 115 |  * Get event color based on appointment type

 117 | export function getEventColor(type: string): string {
 118 | 	const colors: Record<string, string> = {
 119 | 		"well-child": "#10b981",
 120 | 		"sick-visit": "#3b82f6",
 121 | 		"follow-up": "#8b5cf6",
 122 | 		immunization: "#f59e0b",
 123 | 		consultation: "#06b6d4",
 124 | 		CHECKUP: "#10b981",
 125 | 		FOLLOW_UP: "#8b5cf6",
 126 | 		CONSULTATION: "#06b6d4",
 127 | 		EMERGENCY: "#ef4444",
 128 | 		VACCINATION: "#f59e0b",
 129 | 		LAB_TEST: "#8b5cf6"
 130 | 	};
 131 | 	return colors[type] || "#6b7280";
 132 | }

 135 |  * Get status color based on appointment status
 136 |  */

 139 | 		SCHEDULED: "#3b82f6",
 140 | 		CONFIRMED: "#10b981",
 141 | 		COMPLETED: "#6b7280",
 142 | 		CANCELLED: "#ef4444",
 143 | 		NO_SHOW: "#ef4444",
 144 | 		PENDING: "#f59e0b"
 145 | 	};
```

`utils/doseage.ts`:

```ts
   1 | export interface PatientContext {
   2 | 	weight: number; // kg
   3 | 	ageMonths: number;
   4 | 	ageYears: number;
   5 | 	condition?: string;
   6 | 	renalImpairment?: boolean;
   7 | 	hepaticImpairment?: boolean;
   8 | }
   9 | 
  10 | export interface DrugDosage {
  11 | 	drugName: string;
  12 | 	indication: string;
  13 | 	minDoseMg: number;
  14 | 	maxDoseMg: number;
  15 | 	unit: string;
  16 | 	frequency: string;
  17 | 	maxDailyDose: number;
  18 | 	route: "PO" | "IV" | "IM" | "SC" | "PR" | "TOPICAL";
  19 | 	weightBased: boolean;
  20 | 	mgPerKg: number;
  21 | }
  22 | 
  23 | export const pediatricDrugs: Record<string, DrugDosage> = {
  24 | 	paracetamol: {
  25 | 		drugName: "Paracetamol (Acetaminophen)",
  26 | 		indication: "Fever, Pain",
  27 | 		minDoseMg: 10,
  28 | 		maxDoseMg: 15,
  29 | 		unit: "mg/kg",
  30 | 		frequency: "Every 4-6 hours",
  31 | 		maxDailyDose: 60,
  32 | 		route: "PO",
  33 | 		weightBased: true,
  34 | 		mgPerKg: 15
  35 | 	},
  36 | 	ibuprofen: {
  37 | 		drugName: "Ibuprofen",
  38 | 		indication: "Fever, Pain, Inflammation",
  39 | 		minDoseMg: 5,
  40 | 		maxDoseMg: 10,
  41 | 		unit: "mg/kg",
  42 | 		frequency: "Every 6-8 hours",
  43 | 		maxDailyDose: 30,
  44 | 		route: "PO",
  45 | 		weightBased: true,
  46 | 		mgPerKg: 10
  47 | 	},
  48 | 	amoxicillin: {
  49 | 		drugName: "Amoxicillin",
  50 | 		indication: "Bacterial infections",
  51 | 		minDoseMg: 25,
  52 | 		maxDoseMg: 45,
  53 | 		unit: "mg/kg/day",
  54 | 		frequency: "Every 12 hours",
  55 | 		maxDailyDose: 1500,
  56 | 		route: "PO",
  57 | 		weightBased: true,
  58 | 		mgPerKg: 40
  59 | 	}
  60 | };
  61 | 
  62 | export function calculatePediatricDosage(
  63 | 	drugKey: string,
  64 | 	patient: PatientContext
  65 | ): {
  66 | 	singleDose: number;
  67 | 	dailyDose: number;
  68 | 	concentration?: string;
  69 | 	volume?: number;
  70 | 	warning?: string;
  71 | } {
  72 | 	const drug = pediatricDrugs[drugKey];
  73 | 
  74 | 	if (!drug) {
  75 | 		throw new Error(`Drug ${drugKey} not found in pediatric formulary`);
  76 | 	}
  77 | 
  78 | 	if (!drug.weightBased && !patient.weight) {
  79 | 		throw new Error("Patient weight required for weight-based dosing");
  80 | 	}
  81 | 
  82 | 	let singleDose: number;
  83 | 	if (drug.weightBased && patient.weight) {
  84 | 		singleDose = drug.mgPerKg * patient.weight;
  85 | 	} else {
  86 | 		singleDose = drug.minDoseMg;
  87 | 	}
  88 | 
  89 | 	// Check against min/max bounds
  90 | 	const singleDoseMin = drug.minDoseMg * (patient.weight || 1);
  91 | 	const singleDoseMax = drug.maxDoseMg * (patient.weight || 1);
  92 | 
  93 | 	let warning: string | undefined;
  94 | 	if (singleDose < singleDoseMin) {
  95 | 		warning = `Dose (${singleDose}mg) below recommended minimum (${singleDoseMin}mg)`;
  96 | 	} else if (singleDose > singleDoseMax) {
  97 | 		warning = `Dose (${singleDose}mg) exceeds recommended maximum (${singleDoseMax}mg)`;
  98 | 	}
  99 | 
 100 | 	const dailyDose = singleDose * (drug.frequency.includes("12") ? 2 : 4);
 101 | 
 102 | 	if (dailyDose > drug.maxDailyDose) {
 103 | 		warning = `${warning || ""} Daily dose exceeds maximum of ${drug.maxDailyDose}mg`.trim();
 104 | 	}
 105 | 
 106 | 	return {
 107 | 		singleDose: Math.round(singleDose),
 108 | 		dailyDose: Math.round(dailyDose),
 109 | 		warning
 110 | 	};
 111 | }
 112 | 
 113 | export function calculateFluidRequirements(weight: number): {
 114 | 	maintenanceRate: number;
 115 | 	dailyVolume: number;
 116 | } {
 117 | 	let hourlyRate = 0;
 118 | 
 119 | 	if (weight <= 10) {
 120 | 		hourlyRate = weight * 4;
 121 | 	} else if (weight <= 20) {
 122 | 		hourlyRate = 40 + (weight - 10) * 2;
 123 | 	} else {
 124 | 		hourlyRate = 60 + (weight - 20);
 125 | 	}
 126 | 
 127 | 	return {
 128 | 		maintenanceRate: hourlyRate,
 129 | 		dailyVolume: hourlyRate * 24
 130 | 	};
 131 | }
 132 | 
 133 | export function calculateCalorieRequirements(
 134 | 	ageMonths: number,
 135 | 	weight: number
 136 | ): { caloriesPerDay: number; proteinGrams: number } {
 137 | 	let caloriesPerKg = 0;
 138 | 
 139 | 	if (ageMonths < 12) {
 140 | 		caloriesPerKg = 100;
 141 | 	} else if (ageMonths < 36) {
 142 | 		caloriesPerKg = 95;
 143 | 	} else if (ageMonths < 144) {
 144 | 		caloriesPerKg = 85;
 145 | 	} else {
 146 | 		caloriesPerKg = 45;
 147 | 	}
 148 | 
 149 | 	const caloriesPerDay = weight * caloriesPerKg;
 150 | 	const proteinGrams = weight * 1.5;
 151 | 
 152 | 	return {
 153 | 		caloriesPerDay: Math.round(caloriesPerDay),
 154 | 		proteinGrams: Math.round(proteinGrams)
 155 | 	};
 156 | }
```

`utils/formDate.ts`:

```ts
   1 | export type MeasurementType = "Weight" | "Height" | "BMI" | "HeadCircumference";
   2 | export function formatDate(date: Date | string | null | undefined, options?: Intl.DateTimeFormatOptions): string {
   3 | 	if (!date) {
   4 | 		return "Invalid Date";
   5 | 	}
   6 | 
   7 | 	const dateObj = new Date(date);
   8 | 	if (Number.isNaN(dateObj.getTime())) {
   9 | 		return "Invalid Date";
  10 | 	}
  11 | 
  12 | 	const defaultOptions: Intl.DateTimeFormatOptions = {
  13 | 		year: "numeric",
  14 | 		month: "short",
  15 | 		day: "numeric"
  16 | 	};
  17 | 
  18 | 	return dateObj.toLocaleDateString("en-US", options ?? defaultOptions);
  19 | }
  20 | 
  21 | export function formatAge(dateOfBirth: Date | string | number): string {
  22 | 	const dob = new Date(dateOfBirth);
  23 | 	const today = new Date();
  24 | 
  25 | 	const diffInMs = today.getTime() - dob.getTime();
  26 | 	const diffInDays = Math.floor(diffInMs / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  27 | 	const diffInWeeks = Math.floor(diffInDays / 7);
  28 | 	const diffInMonths = (today.getFullYear() - dob.getFullYear()) * 12 + (today.getMonth() - dob.getMonth());
  29 | 	const diffInYears = today.getFullYear() - dob.getFullYear();
  30 | 
  31 | 	// 1. Under 8 weeks (approx 2 months) -> Show Weeks
  32 | 	if (diffInWeeks < 8) {
  33 | 		return `${diffInWeeks} ${diffInWeeks === 1 ? "week" : "weeks"}`;
  34 | 	}
  35 | 
  36 | 	// 2. Under 24 months -> Show Months
  37 | 	if (diffInMonths < 24) {
  38 | 		return `${diffInMonths} ${diffInMonths === 1 ? "month" : "months"}`;
  39 | 	}
  40 | 
  41 | 	// 3. Otherwise -> Show Years
  42 | 	// Adjust for birthday not yet reached this year
  43 | 	const birthdayReached =
  44 | 		today.getMonth() > dob.getMonth() || (today.getMonth() === dob.getMonth() && today.getDate() >= dob.getDate());
  45 | 
  46 | 	const actualYears = birthdayReached ? diffInYears : diffInYears - 1;
  47 | 
  48 | 	return `${actualYears} ${actualYears === 1 ? "year" : "years"}`;
  49 | }
  50 | 
  51 | export const daysOfWeek = ["sunday", "monday", "tuesday", "wednesday", "thursday", "friday", "saturday"];
  52 | 
  53 | export function generateRandomColor(): string {
  54 | 	let hexColor = "";
  55 | 	do {
  56 | 		const randomInt = Math.floor(Math.random() * 16_777_216);
  57 | 
  58 | 		hexColor = `#${randomInt.toString(16).padStart(6, "0")}`;
  59 | 	} while (hexColor.toLowerCase() === "#ffffff" || hexColor.toLowerCase() === "#000000"); // Ensure it’s not white or black
  60 | 	return hexColor;
  61 | }

  63 | export function formatTimeByHours(hour: number, minute: number): string {
  64 | 	const period = hour >= 12 ? "PM" : "AM";
  65 | 	const adjustedHour = hour % 12 || 12;
  66 | 	const formattedMinute = minute.toString().padStart(2, "0");
  67 | 	return `${adjustedHour}:${formattedMinute} ${period}`;
  68 | }
  69 | type Times = {
  70 | 	label: string;
  71 | 	value: string;
  72 | };
  73 | 
  74 | export function generateTimes(start_hour: number, closeHour: number, intervalInMinutes: number) {
  75 | 	const times: Times[] = [];
  76 | 	const startHour = start_hour;
  77 | 	const endHour = closeHour;
  78 | 	const intervalMinutes = intervalInMinutes;
  79 | 
  80 | 	for (let hour = startHour; hour <= endHour; hour++) {
  81 | 		for (let minute = 0; minute < 60; minute += intervalMinutes) {
  82 | 			if (hour === endHour && minute > 0) {
  83 | 				break;
  84 | 			}
  85 | 			const formattedTime = formatTimeByHours(hour, minute);
  86 | 			times.push({ label: formattedTime, value: formattedTime });
  87 | 		}
  88 | 	}
  89 | 
  90 | 	return times;
  91 | }
  92 | 
  93 | type DiscountInput = {
  94 | 	amount: number;
  95 | 	discount?: number;
  96 | 	discountPercentage?: number;
  97 | };
  98 | 
  99 | export function calculateDiscount({ amount, discount, discountPercentage }: DiscountInput): {
 100 | 	finalAmount: number;
 101 | 	discountPercentage?: number;
 102 | 	discountAmount?: number;
 103 | } {
 104 | 	if (discount != null && discountPercentage != null) {
 105 | 		throw new Error("Provide either discount amount or discount percentage, not both.");
 106 | 	}
 107 | 
 108 | 	if (discount != null) {
 109 | 		// Calculate discount percentage if a discount amount is provided
 110 | 		const discountPercent = (discount / amount) * 100;
 111 | 		return {
 112 | 			finalAmount: amount - discount,
 113 | 			discountPercentage: discountPercent,
 114 | 			discountAmount: discount
 115 | 		};
 116 | 	}
 117 | 	if (discountPercentage != null) {
 118 | 		// Calculate discount amount if a discount percentage is provided
 119 | 		const discountAmount = (discountPercentage / 100) * amount;
 120 | 		return {
 121 | 			finalAmount: amount - discountAmount,
 122 | 			discountPercentage,
 123 | 			discountAmount
 124 | 		};
 125 | 	}
 126 | 	throw new Error("Please provide either a discount amount or a discount percentage.");
 127 | }
 128 | 
 129 | export const formatTime = (date: Date | null | undefined, startTime?: string) => {
 130 | 	if (!date) {
 131 | 		return "N/A";
 132 | 	}
 133 | 
 134 | 	const appointmentDate = new Date(date);
 135 | 	if (startTime) {
 136 | 		return startTime;
 137 | 	}
 138 | 
 139 | 	return appointmentDate.toLocaleTimeString([], {
 140 | 		hour: "2-digit",
 141 | 		minute: "2-digit",
 142 | 		hour12: true
 143 | 	});
 144 | };

 146 | export const formatDuration = (durationMinutes?: number) => {
 147 | 	if (!durationMinutes) {
 148 | 		return "N/A";
 149 | 	}
 150 | 
 151 | 	if (durationMinutes >= 60) {
 152 | 		const hours = Math.floor(durationMinutes / 60);
 153 | 		const minutes = durationMinutes % 60;
 154 | 		return minutes > 0 ? `${hours}h ${minutes}m` : `${hours}h`;
 155 | 	}
 156 | 
 157 | 	return `${durationMinutes}m`;
 158 | };

 160 | export const getAvatarColor = (doctorId?: string) => {
 161 | 	if (!doctorId) {
 162 | 		return "bg-gray-100 text-gray-600";
 163 | 	}
 164 | 
 165 | 	// Generate consistent color based on doctorId
 166 | 	const colors = [
 167 | 		"bg-blue-100 text-blue-600",
 168 | 		"bg-green-100 text-green-600",
 169 | 		"bg-purple-100 text-purple-600",
 170 | 		"bg-amber-100 text-amber-600",
 171 | 		"bg-pink-100 text-pink-600",
 172 | 		"bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-600",
 173 | 		"bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-600"
 174 | 	];
 175 | 
 176 | 	const hash = doctorId.split("").reduce((acc, char) => Math.imul(31, acc) + char.charCodeAt(0), 0);
 177 | 
 178 | 	return colors[Math.abs(hash) % colors.length];
 179 | };
 180 | 
 181 | export const getTimeframeStartDate = (timeframe: "day" | "week" | "month" | "year" | "all"): Date | null => {
 182 | 	const now = new Date();
 183 | 
 184 | 	if (timeframe === "day") {
 185 | 		return new Date(now.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0));
 186 | 	}
 187 | 	if (timeframe === "week") {
 188 | 		return new Date(now.setDate(now.getDate() - 7));
 189 | 	}
 190 | 	if (timeframe === "month") {
 191 | 		return new Date(now.setMonth(now.getMonth() - 1));
 192 | 	}
 193 | 	if (timeframe === "year") {
 194 | 		return new Date(now.setFullYear(now.getFullYear() - 1));
 195 | 	}
 196 | 
 197 | 	return null;
 198 | };
 199 | 
 200 | export const formatRelativeTime = (date: Date): string => {
 201 | 	const now = new Date();
 202 | 	const diffInMs = now.getTime() - date.getTime();
 203 | 	const diffInDays = Math.floor(diffInMs / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 204 | 
 205 | 	if (diffInDays === 0) {
 206 | 		return "Today";
 207 | 	}
 208 | 	if (diffInDays === 1) {
 209 | 		return "Yesterday";
 210 | 	}
 211 | 	if (diffInDays < 7) {
 212 | 		return `${diffInDays} days ago`;
 213 | 	}
 214 | 	if (diffInDays < 30) {
 215 | 		return `${Math.floor(diffInDays / 7)} weeks ago`;
 216 | 	}
 217 | 	if (diffInDays < 365) {
 218 | 		return `${Math.floor(diffInDays / 30)} months ago`;
 219 | 	}
 220 | 	return `${Math.floor(diffInDays / 365)} years ago`;
 221 | };
 222 | 
 223 | export const formatPhoneNumber = (phone?: string | null): string => {
 224 | 	if (!phone) {
 225 | 		return "No phone";
 226 | 	}
 227 | 	const cleaned = phone.replace(/\D/g, "");
 228 | 	if (cleaned.length === 11) {
 229 | 		return `(${cleaned.slice(0, 2)}) ${cleaned.slice(2, 7)}-${cleaned.slice(7)}`;
 230 | 	}
 231 | 	if (cleaned.length === 10) {
 232 | 		return `(${cleaned.slice(0, 2)}) ${cleaned.slice(2, 6)}-${cleaned.slice(6)}`;
 233 | 	}
 234 | 	return cleaned || phone;
 235 | };
 236 | export function formatNumber(amount: number): string {
 237 | 	return amount?.toLocaleString("en-US", {
 238 | 		maximumFractionDigits: 0
 239 | 	});
 240 | }
 241 | 
 242 | export function getInitials(name: string, lastName: string): string {
 243 | 	const words = name.trim().split(" ");
 244 | 
 245 | 	const firstTwoWords = words.slice(0, 2);
 246 | 
 247 | 	const initials = firstTwoWords.map(word => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase());
 248 | 
 249 | 	return initials.join("");
 250 | }
 251 | 
 252 | export const getInitial = (firstName: string, lastName: string): string => {
 253 | 	const firstInitial = firstName?.[0] ?? "";
 254 | 	const lastInitial = lastName?.[0] ?? "";
 255 | 	return `${firstInitial}${lastInitial}`.toUpperCase();
 256 | };
 257 | 
 258 | export const getGenderLabel = (gender: string): string => {
 259 | 	const labels: Record<string, string> = {
 260 | 		MALE: "Male",
 261 | 		FEMALE: "Female"
 262 | 	};
 263 | 	return labels[gender] ?? "Unknown";
 264 | };

 266 | export function getYAxisLabel(type: MeasurementType): string {
 267 | 	switch (type) {
 268 | 		case "Weight":
 269 | 			return "Weight (kg)";
 270 | 		case "Height":
 271 | 			return "Height (cm)";
 272 | 		case "HeadCircumference":
 273 | 			return "Head Circumference (cm)";
 274 | 		default:
 275 | 			return "";
 276 | 	}
 277 | }
 278 | 
 279 | export function getPercentileVariant(percentile: number): "default" | "secondary" | "destructive" | "outline" {
 280 | 	if (percentile < 5 || percentile > 95) {
 281 | 		return "destructive";
 282 | 	}
 283 | 	if (percentile < 10 || percentile > 90) {
 284 | 		return "secondary";
 285 | 	}
 286 | 	return "default";
 287 | }
```

`utils/growth.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // utils/growth.ts - SHARED (no database imports)
   2 | import { differenceInDays, differenceInMonths } from "date-fns";
   3 | 
   4 | import zscoreWfa from "../../data/zscore-wfa.json"; // ============================================
   5 | // PURE CALCULATION FUNCTIONS (safe for client)

   8 | export function calculateAgeInMonths(dateOfBirth: Date, asOfDate: Date = new Date()): number {
   9 | 	const years = asOfDate.getFullYear() - dateOfBirth.getFullYear();
  10 | 	const months = asOfDate.getMonth() - dateOfBirth.getMonth();
  11 | 	return years * 12 + months;
  12 | }
  13 | 
  14 | export function calculateAgeInDays(dateOfBirth: Date, measurementDate?: Date): number {
  15 | 	const birthDate = dateOfBirth instanceof Date ? dateOfBirth : new Date(dateOfBirth);
  16 | 	const targetDate = measurementDate || new Date();
  17 | 	const diffTime = Math.abs(targetDate.getTime() - birthDate.getTime());
  18 | 	return Math.floor(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  19 | }
  20 | 
  21 | export function calculateZScore(value: number, m: number, l: number, s: number): number {
  22 | 	if (l === 0) {
  23 | 		return Math.log(value / m) / s;
  24 | 	}
  25 | 	return ((value / m) ** l - 1) / (l * s);
  26 | }
  27 | 
  28 | export type GrowthRecordMeasurement = {
  29 | 	weight?: number | null;
  30 | 	height?: number | null;
  31 | 	bmi?: number | null;
  32 | 	headCircumference?: number | null;
  33 | 	weightForAgeZ?: number | null;
  34 | 	heightForAgeZ?: number | null;
  35 | 	bmiForAgeZ?: number | null;
  36 | 	hcForAgeZ?: number | null;

  41 | 		case "WEIGHT":
  42 | 			return record.weight ?? null;
  43 | 		case "HEIGHT":
  44 | 			return record.height ?? null;
  45 | 		case "BMI":
  46 | 			return record.bmi ?? null;
  47 | 		case "HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE":
  48 | 			return record.headCircumference ?? null;
  49 | 		default:
  50 | 			return null;
  51 | 	}

  56 | 		case "WEIGHT":

  65 | 			return null;

  69 | export function getAge(dateOfBirth: string): string {
  70 | 	const today = new Date();
  71 | 	const birthDate = new Date(dateOfBirth);
  72 | 	let ageMonths = (today.getFullYear() - birthDate.getFullYear()) * 12;
  73 | 	ageMonths += today.getMonth() - birthDate.getMonth();
  74 | 	if (today.getDate() < birthDate.getDate()) {
  75 | 		ageMonths--;
  76 | 	}
  77 | 
  78 | 	if (ageMonths < 24) {
  79 | 		return `${ageMonths} months`;
  80 | 	}
  81 | 	const years = Math.floor(ageMonths / 12);
  82 | 	return `${years} years`;
  83 | }
  84 | 
  85 | export const calculateBMI = (weight: number, height: number) => {
  86 | 	const heightInMeters = height / 100;
  87 | 	const bmi = weight / (heightInMeters * heightInMeters);
  88 | 
  89 | 	let status: string;
  90 | 	let colorCode: string;
  91 | 
  92 | 	if (bmi < 18.5) {
  93 | 		status = "Underweight";
  94 | 		colorCode = "#1E90FF";
  95 | 	} else if (bmi >= 18.5 && bmi <= 24.9) {
  96 | 		status = "Normal";
  97 | 		colorCode = "#1E90FF";
  98 | 	} else if (bmi >= 25 && bmi <= 29.9) {
  99 | 		status = "Overweight";
 100 | 		colorCode = "#FF9800";
 101 | 	} else {
 102 | 		status = "Obesity";
 103 | 		colorCode = "#FF5722";
 104 | 	}
 105 | 
 106 | 	return {
 107 | 		bmi: Number.parseFloat(bmi.toFixed(2)),
 108 | 		status,
 109 | 		colorCode
 110 | 	};
 111 | };
 112 | 
 113 | export type AgeDetails = {
 114 | 	days: number;
 115 | 	months: number;
 116 | 	years: number;
 117 | };
 118 | 
 119 | export type AgeOutputFormat = "number" | "string" | "object";
 120 | 
 121 | /**
 122 |  * Calculates age from a date of birth with flexible output formats.
 123 |  *
 124 |  * @param dateOfBirth - The birth date as a Date object or ISO string.
 125 |  * @param format - 'number' (default, returns total years), 'string' (e.g., "25y 4m"), or 'object' ({years, months, days}).
 126 |  */
 127 | export const calculateAge = (
 128 | 	dateOfBirth: string | Date,
 129 | 	format: AgeOutputFormat = "number"
 130 | ): number | string | AgeDetails => {
 131 | 	const birth = new Date(dateOfBirth);
 132 | 	const today = new Date();
 133 | 
 134 | 	// Guard clause for invalid dates
 135 | 	if (Number.isNaN(birth.getTime())) {
 136 | 		throw new Error("Invalid date provided to calculateAge");
 137 | 	}
 138 | 
 139 | 	let years = today.getFullYear() - birth.getFullYear();
 140 | 	let months = today.getMonth() - birth.getMonth();
 141 | 	let days = today.getDate() - birth.getDate();
 142 | 
 143 | 	// Handle day overflow
 144 | 	if (days < 0) {
 145 | 		months--;
 146 | 		// Get total days in the previous month
 147 | 		const previousMonth = new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth(), 0);
 148 | 		days += previousMonth.getDate();
 149 | 	}
 150 | 
 151 | 	// Handle month overflow
 152 | 	if (months < 0) {
 153 | 		years--;
 154 | 		months += 12;
 155 | 	}
 156 | 
 157 | 	// Return based on requested format
 158 | 	switch (format) {
 159 | 		case "object":
 160 | 			return { years, months, days };
 161 | 
 162 | 		case "string":
 163 | 			if (years > 0) {
 164 | 				return `${years}y ${months}m ${days}d`;
 165 | 			}
 166 | 			if (months > 0) {
 167 | 				return `${months}m ${days}d`;
 168 | 			}
 169 | 			if (days === 0) {
 170 | 				return "Newborn";
 171 | 			}
 172 | 			return `${days}d`;
 173 | 
 174 | 		default:
 175 | 			return years;
 176 | 	}
 177 | };
 178 | 
 179 | export function calculatePercentileFromZ(zScore: number | null): number {
 180 | 	if (zScore === null) return 50;
 181 | 
 182 | 	// Standard normal CDF approximation
 183 | 	const t = 1 / (1 + 0.231_641_9 * Math.abs(zScore));
 184 | 	const d = 0.398_942_3 * Math.exp((-zScore * zScore) / 2);
 185 | 	const p = d * t * (0.319_381_5 + t * (-0.356_563_8 + t * (1.781_478 + t * (-1.821_256 + t * 1.330_274))));
 186 | 	const percentile = zScore > 0 ? 1 - p : p;
 187 | 
 188 | 	return Math.round(percentile * 100);
 189 | }
 190 | 
 191 | export function calculatePercentile(value: number, mean: number, sd: number): number {
 192 | 	const zScore = (value - mean) / sd;
 193 | 	return calculatePercentileFromZ(zScore);
 194 | }
 195 | 
 196 | export interface GrowthMeasurement {
 197 | 	ageMonths: number;
 198 | 	gender: "MALE" | "FEMALE";
 199 | 	headCircumference?: number;
 200 | 	height?: number;
 201 | 	weight?: number;
 202 | }
 203 | 
 204 | export interface PercentileResult {
 205 | 	classification: "SEVERE_UNDERWEIGHT" | "UNDERWEIGHT" | "NORMAL" | "OVERWEIGHT" | "OBESE";
 206 | 	percentile: number;
 207 | 	zScore: number;
 208 | }
 209 | 
 210 | export function calculateWFAPercentile(weight: number, ageDays: number, gender: "MALE" | "FEMALE"): PercentileResult {
 211 | 	// LMS method for WFA calculation
 212 | 	const genderKey = gender === "MALE" ? "boys" : "girls";
 213 | 	const data = zscoreWfa.wfa[genderKey];
 214 | 	const ageIndex = data.find(d => Number.parseInt(d.Day, 10) === ageDays) || data[0];
 215 | 
 216 | 	if (!ageIndex) {
 217 | 		return { percentile: 50, zScore: 0, classification: "NORMAL" };
 218 | 	}
 219 | 
 220 | 	const l = Number.parseFloat(ageIndex.L);
 221 | 	const m = Number.parseFloat(ageIndex.M);
 222 | 	const s = Number.parseFloat(ageIndex.S);
 223 | 
 224 | 	const zScore = ((weight / m) ** l - 1) / (l * s);
 225 | 	const percentile = normDist(zScore) * 100;
 226 | 
 227 | 	return {
 228 | 		percentile,
 229 | 		zScore,
 230 | 		classification: getGrowthClassification(zScore)
 231 | 	};
 232 | }
 233 | 
 234 | export function calculateHeightVelocity(measurements: GrowthMeasurement[]): number {
 235 | 	if (measurements.length < 2) return 0;
 236 | 	const sorted = measurements.sort((a, b) => a.ageMonths - b.ageMonths);
 237 | 	const first = sorted[0];
 238 | 	const last = sorted[sorted.length - 1];
 239 | 
 240 | 	const heightGain = (last?.height || 0) - (first?.height || 0);
 241 | 	const monthsDiff = (last?.ageMonths ?? 0) - (first?.ageMonths ?? 0);
 242 | 
 243 | 	return monthsDiff > 0 ? (heightGain / monthsDiff) * 12 : 0;
 244 | }
 245 | 
 246 | export function detectGrowthAbnormalities(
 247 | 	measurements: GrowthMeasurement[]
 248 | ): Array<{ type: string; severity: string; recommendation: string }> {
 249 | 	const alerts = [];
 250 | 	const velocities = [];
 251 | 
 252 | 	for (let i = 1; i < measurements.length; i++) {
 253 | 		const prev = measurements[i - 1];
 254 | 		const curr = measurements[i];
 255 | 		const monthsDiff = (curr?.ageMonths ?? 0) - (prev?.ageMonths ?? 0);
 256 | 
 257 | 		if (monthsDiff > 0 && prev?.height && curr?.height) {
 258 | 			const velocity = ((curr?.height - prev?.height) / monthsDiff) * 12;
 259 | 			velocities.push(velocity);
 260 | 		}
 261 | 	}
 262 | 
 263 | 	// Check for growth faltering
 264 | 	const avgVelocity = velocities.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / velocities.length;
 265 | 	if (avgVelocity < 5 && avgVelocity > 0) {
 266 | 		alerts.push({
 267 | 			type: "GROWTH_FALTERING",
 268 | 			severity: "HIGH",
 269 | 			recommendation: "Evaluate for nutritional deficiency or underlying condition"
 270 | 		});
 271 | 	}
 272 | 
 273 | 	return alerts;
 274 | }
 275 | 
 276 | function getGrowthClassification(zScore: number) {
 277 | 	if (zScore < -3) return "SEVERE_UNDERWEIGHT";
 278 | 	if (zScore < -2) return "UNDERWEIGHT";
 279 | 	if (zScore <= 1) return "NORMAL";
 280 | 	if (zScore <= 2) return "OVERWEIGHT";
 281 | 	return "OBESE";
 282 | }
 283 | 
 284 | function normDist(z: number): number {
 285 | 	// Cumulative distribution function for standard normal
 286 | 	const t = 1 / (1 + 0.231_641_9 * Math.abs(z));
 287 | 	const d = 0.398_942_3 * Math.exp((-z * z) / 2);
 288 | 	const p = d * t * (0.319_381_5 + t * (-0.356_563_8 + t * (1.781_478 + t * (-1.821_256 + t * 1.330_274))));
 289 | 	return z > 0 ? 1 - p : p;
 290 | }
 291 | export const calculateClinicalAge = (dob: Date | string) => {
 292 | 	const birthDate = new Date(dob);
 293 | 	const now = new Date();
 294 | 
 295 | 	const months = differenceInMonths(now, birthDate);
 296 | 	// Calculate remaining days after the last full month
 297 | 	const days = differenceInDays(now, new Date(birthDate.setMonth(birthDate.getMonth() + months)));
 298 | 
 299 | 	return { months, days };
 300 | };
```

`utils/id.ts`:

```ts
   1 | const prefixes = {
   2 | 	user: "USR",
   3 | 	patient: "PAT",
   4 | 	record: "REC",
   5 | 	doctor: "DOC",
   6 | 	appointment: "APT"
   7 | } as const;
   8 | 
   9 | type Prefix = keyof typeof prefixes;
  10 | 
  11 | type GenerateIdOptions = {
  12 | 	separator?: string;
  13 | };
  14 | 
  15 | export function generateId(prefixOrOptions?: Prefix | GenerateIdOptions, inputOptions: GenerateIdOptions = {}) {
  16 | 	// Determine if the first argument is options or prefix
  17 | 	const isOptions = typeof prefixOrOptions === "object" && prefixOrOptions !== null;
  18 | 
  19 | 	const finalOptions = isOptions ? prefixOrOptions : inputOptions;
  20 | 	const prefix = isOptions ? undefined : prefixOrOptions;
  21 | 
  22 | 	const { separator = "_" } = finalOptions;
  23 | 
  24 | 	const id = crypto.randomUUID();
  25 | 
  26 | 	if (prefix && prefix in prefixes) {
  27 | 		return `${prefixes[prefix]}${separator}${id}`;
  28 | 	}
  29 | 
  30 | 	return id;
  31 | }
```
