```ts
 118 | export interface ImmunizationStatus {
 119 | 	vaccineId: string;
 120 | 	doseNumber: number;
 121 | 	status: "DUE" | "OVERDUE" | "COMPLETED" | "UPCOMING";
 122 | 	dueDate: Date;
 123 | }
 124 | 
 125 | export function getPatientImmunizationStatus(
 126 | 	birthDate: Date,
 127 | 	completedDoses: Array<{
 128 | 		vaccineId: string;
 129 | 		doseNumber: number;
 130 | 		dateAdministered: Date;
 131 | 	}>
 132 | ): ImmunizationStatus[] {
 133 | 	const today = new Date();
 134 | 	const ageInMonths =
 135 | 		(today.getFullYear() - birthDate.getFullYear()) * 12 + (today.getMonth() - birthDate.getMonth());
 136 | 	const schedule: ImmunizationStatus[] = [];
 137 | 
 138 | 	for (const vaccine of immunizationSchedule) {
 139 | 		for (const dose of vaccine.doses) {
 140 | 			const isCompleted = completedDoses.some(c => c.vaccineId === vaccine.id && c.doseNumber === dose.number);
 141 | 
 142 | 			const dueDate = new Date(birthDate);
 143 | 			dueDate.setMonth(dueDate.getMonth() + dose.preferredAgeMonths);
 144 | 
 145 | 			let status: ImmunizationStatus["status"] = "UPCOMING";
 146 | 
 147 | 			if (isCompleted) {
 148 | 				status = "COMPLETED";
 149 | 			} else if (ageInMonths > dose.ageMonthsMax) {
 150 | 				status = "OVERDUE";
 151 | 			} else if (ageInMonths >= dose.ageMonthsMin) {
 152 | 				status = "DUE";
 153 | 			}
 154 | 
 155 | 			schedule.push({
 156 | 				vaccineId: vaccine.id,
 157 | 				doseNumber: dose.number,
 158 | 				status,
 159 | 				dueDate
 160 | 			});
 161 | 		}
 162 | 	}
 163 | 
 164 | 	return schedule;
 165 | }
 166 | 
 167 | export function getUpcomingImmunizations(
 168 | 	birthDate: Date,
 169 | 	completedDoses: Array<{ vaccineId: string; doseNumber: number }>,
 170 | 	lookaheadMonths = 3
 171 | ): ImmunizationStatus[] {
 172 | 	const allStatus = getPatientImmunizationStatus(
 173 | 		birthDate,
 174 | 		completedDoses.map(d => ({ ...d, dateAdministered: new Date() }))
 175 | 	);
 176 | 	const today = new Date();
 177 | 	const limitDate = new Date();
 178 | 	limitDate.setMonth(limitDate.getMonth() + lookaheadMonths);
 179 | 
 180 | 	return allStatus.filter(item => item.status !== "COMPLETED" && item.dueDate <= limitDate && item.dueDate >= today);
 181 | }
 182 | 
 183 | export function getOverdueImmunizations(
 184 | 	birthDate: Date,
 185 | 	completedDoses: Array<{ vaccineId: string; doseNumber: number }>
 186 | ): ImmunizationStatus[] {
 187 | 	const allStatus = getPatientImmunizationStatus(
 188 | 		birthDate,
 189 | 		completedDoses.map(d => ({ ...d, dateAdministered: new Date() }))
 190 | 	);
 191 | 	return allStatus.filter(item => item.status === "OVERDUE");
 192 | }
```

```ts
   4 | export * from "./growth";
   5 | export * from "./id";
   6 | export function mapActionToType(action: string): "appointment" | "patient" | "payment" | "prescription" {
   7 | 	const lowerAction = action.toLowerCase();
   8 | 	if (lowerAction.includes("appointment")) {
   9 | 		return "appointment";
  10 | 	}
  11 | 	if (lowerAction.includes("patient")) {
  12 | 		return "patient";
  13 | 	}
  14 | 	if (lowerAction.includes("payment")) {
  15 | 		return "payment";
  16 | 	}
  17 | 	if (lowerAction.includes("prescription")) {
  18 | 		return "prescription";
  19 | 	}
  20 | 	return "appointment";
  21 | }
  22 | 
  23 | export function mapActionToActivity(action: string): "created" | "updated" | "cancelled" | "completed" {
  24 | 	const lowerAction = action.toLowerCase();
  25 | 	if (lowerAction.includes("create")) {
  26 | 		return "created";
  27 | 	}
  28 | 	if (lowerAction.includes("update")) {
  29 | 		return "updated";
  30 | 	}
  31 | 	if (lowerAction.includes("cancel")) {
  32 | 		return "cancelled";
  33 | 	}
  34 | 	if (lowerAction.includes("complete")) {
  35 | 		return "completed";
  36 | 	}
  37 | 	return "updated";
  38 | }
  39 | 
  40 | export function calculatePatientSatisfaction(): number {
  41 | 	// Implement based on your survey/review data
  42 | 	// For now, return a default or calculate from database
  43 | 	return 4.5;
  44 | }
  45 | 
  46 | export function getInitials(firstName: string, lastName: string): string {
  47 | 	return `${firstName.charAt(0)}${lastName.charAt(0)}`.toUpperCase();
  48 | }
  49 | 
  50 | // Helper to calculate age in years/months from date of birth
  51 | export const getAgeString = (dateOfBirth: Date | string) => {
  52 | 	const today = new Date();
  53 | 	const birthDate = new Date(dateOfBirth);
  54 | 	let ageMonths = (today.getFullYear() - birthDate.getFullYear()) * 12;
  55 | 	ageMonths += today.getMonth() - birthDate.getMonth();
  56 | 	if (today.getDate() < birthDate.getDate()) {
  57 | 		ageMonths--;
  58 | 	}
  59 | 	if (ageMonths < 24) {
  60 | 		return `${ageMonths} months`;
  61 | 	}
  62 | 	const years = Math.floor(ageMonths / 12);
  63 | 	return `${years} years`;
  64 | };

```
